   159:   function shouldSyncKey(key){
   160:     return SYNC_KEYS.indexOf(key) !== -1;
   161:   }
   162: 
   163:   const MEMBER_PUSH_KEYS = new Set([
   164:     'mums_attendance',
   165:     'mums_mailbox_state',
   166:     'mums_mailbox_tables',  // REALTIME FIX: MEMBERs must push mailbox table updates
   167:                              // so ALL connected users (other MEMBERs, TL, SA) see
   168:                              // assignment changes without a refresh.
   169:     'ums_cases',
   170:     'ums_schedule_notifs',
   171:     'mums_schedule_notifs'
   172:   ]);
   173: 
   174:   // Persisted suppression for server-forbidden keys.
   175:   // If the server returns 403 for a key, continuing to attempt pushes creates
   176:   // request storms and console spam (especially on dashboards that emit
   177:   // frequent log updates). We remember forbidden keys per-browser and skip
   178:   // subsequent pushes for those keys.
   179:   const FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_STORAGE = 'mums_forbidden_push_keys_v1';
   180:   // If a user's role changes (e.g., promoted to Team Lead), we should not
   181:   // permanently suppress keys forever. We expire the suppression periodically.
   182:   const FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_TTL_MS = 12 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 12 hours
   183:   const forbiddenPushKeys = new Set();
   184: 
   185:   function loadForbiddenPushKeys(){
   186:     try{
   187:       const raw = localStorage.getItem(FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_STORAGE);
   188:       const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
   189: 
   190:       // Back-compat: older builds stored a raw array.
   191:       let keys = [];
   192:       let ts = 0;
   193:       if(Array.isArray(parsed)){
   194:         keys = parsed;
   195:       } else if(parsed && typeof parsed === 'object'){
   196:         keys = Array.isArray(parsed.keys) ? parsed.keys : [];
   197:         ts = Number(parsed.ts || 0);
   198:       }
   199: 
   200:       if(ts && (Date.now() - ts) > FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_TTL_MS){
   201:         try{ localStorage.removeItem(FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_STORAGE); }catch(_){ }
   202:         return;
   203:       }
   204: 
   205:       keys.forEach((k)=>{ if(k) forbiddenPushKeys.add(String(k)); });
   206:     }catch(_){ }
   207:   }
   208:   function saveForbiddenPushKeys(){
   209:     try{
   210:       localStorage.setItem(
   211:         FORBIDDEN_PUSH_KEYS_STORAGE,
   212:         JSON.stringify({ v: 1, ts: Date.now(), keys: Array.from(forbiddenPushKeys) })
   213:       );
   214:     }catch(_){ }
   215:   }
   216:   function markForbiddenPushKey(key){
   217:     try{
   218:       const k = String(key||'').trim();
   219:       if(!k) return;
   220:       if(forbiddenPushKeys.has(k)) return;
   221:       forbiddenPushKeys.add(k);
   222:       saveForbiddenPushKeys();
   223:       try{ if(window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_PUSH_FORBIDDEN', detail: k }); }catch(_){ }
   224:     }catch(_){ }
   225:   }
   226: 
   227:   // Load once on module init.
   228:   loadForbiddenPushKeys();
   229: 
   230:   function canPushKey(key){
   231:     try{
   232:       const k = String(key||'');
   233:       if(forbiddenPushKeys.has(k)) return false;
   234:       if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled())) return false;
   235:       if (!(CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) return false;
   236:       const u = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? (Auth.getUser()||{}) : {};
   237:       const role = String(u.role || 'MEMBER');
   238:       if (role === 'MEMBER' && !MEMBER_PUSH_KEYS.has(k)) return false;
   239:       return true;
   240:     }catch(_){
   241:       return false;
   242:     }
   243:   }
   244: 
   245: 
   246:   // ----------------------
   247:   // Offline-first push queue (all SYNC_KEYS)
   248:   // ----------------------
   249:   const QUEUE_KEY = 'mums_sync_queue_v1';
   250:   let queueCache = null;
   251:   let flushing = false;
   252: 
   253:   function loadQueue(){
   254:     try {
   255:       const raw = localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY);
   256:       const obj = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
   257:       return (obj && typeof obj === 'object') ? obj : {};
   258:     } catch(_) { return {}; }
   259:   }
   260:   function saveQueue(q){
   261:     try {
   262:       queueCache = q;
   263:       localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY, JSON.stringify(q || {}));
   264:     } catch(_) {}
   265:   }
   266:   function getQueue(){
   267:     if (!queueCache) queueCache = loadQueue();
   268:     return queueCache;
   269:   }
   270:   function isQueued(key){
   271:     try {
   272:       const q = getQueue();
   273:       return !!(q && q[String(key||'')]);
   274:     } catch(_) { return false; }
   275:   }
   276: 
   277:   function enqueue(key, value, removedIds, op, reason, err){
   278:     try {
   279:       const k = String(key||'');
   280:       if (!k) return;
   281:       if (!canPushKey(k)) return;
   282:       const q = getQueue();
   283:       const prev = q[k] || {};
   284:       const next = {
   285:         key: k,
   286:         value: value,
   287:         removedIds: Array.isArray(removedIds) ? removedIds : [],
   288:         op: op || 'set',
   289:         ts: Date.now(),
   290:         tries: Number(prev.tries || 0),
   291:         lastError: err ? String(err) : (prev.lastError || ''),
   292:         reason: reason ? String(reason) : (prev.reason || '')
   293:       };
   294:       q[k] = next;
   295:       saveQueue(q);
   296:       try { if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_ENQUEUE', detail: k + ' (reason=' + next.reason + ')' }); } catch(_) {}
   297:     } catch(_) {}
   298:   }
   299: 
   300:   async function flushQueue(trigger){
   301:     if (flushing) return { ok:false, error:'flush_in_progress' };
   302:     flushing = true;
   303:     try {
   304:       const q = getQueue();
   305:       const keys = Object.keys(q || {});
   306:       if (!keys.length) return { ok:true, flushed:0, remaining:0 };
   307: 
   308:       try { if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_FLUSH_START', detail: 'keys=' + keys.length + ' trigger=' + String(trigger||'') }); } catch(_) {}
   309: 
   310:       let okCount = 0;
   311:       const flushedEvents = [];
   312: 
   313:       for (const k of keys) {
   314:         const item = q[k];
   315:         if (!item) continue;
   316:         if (!canPushKey(item.key || k)) {
   317:           try{ if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_DROP_FORBIDDEN', detail: String(item.key||k) + ' reason=client_guard' }); }catch(_){}
   318:           delete q[k];
   319:           continue;
   320:         }
   321: 
   322:         // Only attempt flush when cloud auth is available.
   323:         if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled() && CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) {
   324:           item.tries = Number(item.tries||0) + 1;
   325:           item.lastError = 'no_auth_token';
   326:           q[k] = item;
   327:           continue;
   328:         }
   329: 
   330:         try {
   331:           const out = await cloudFetch('/api/sync/push', {
   332:             method: 'POST',
   333:             body: JSON.stringify({
   334:               key: item.key,
   335:               value: item.value,
   336:               removedIds: item.removedIds || [],
   337:               op: item.op || 'set',
   338:               clientId: clientId,
   339:               ts: Date.now(),
   340:               _fromQueue: true
   341:             })
   342:           });
   343: 
   344:           if (out && out.ok) {
   345:             try{
   346:               if(String(item.key||'') === 'mums_user_events'){
   347:                 flushedEvents.push({ key: item.key, value: item.value, ts: item.ts || Date.now() });
   348:               }
   349:             }catch(_){ }
   350:             delete q[k];
   351:             okCount++;
   352:           } else {
   353:             const st = out ? out.status : 0;
   354:             // Permanent failure hardening:
   355:             // - 403 indicates the current role is not allowed to push this key.
   356:             //   Keeping it in the queue causes repeated 403 spam on resume.
   357:             if(st === 403){
   358:               try{ markForbiddenPushKey(item.key || k); }catch(_){ }
   359:               try{ if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_DROP_FORBIDDEN', detail: String(item.key||k) + ' status=403' }); }catch(_){}
   360:               delete q[k];
   361:               continue;
   362:             }
   363:             item.tries = Number(item.tries||0) + 1;
   364:             item.lastError = 'http_' + String(out ? out.status : 'unknown');
   365:             // FIX v3.9.25: Drop items after 10 failed attempts to prevent infinite retry loops
   366:             // that cause ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES browser exhaustion.
   367:             if (item.tries >= 10) {
   368:               try{ if(window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_DROP_MAX_TRIES', detail: String(item.key||k) }); }catch(_){}
   369:               delete q[k];
   370:             } else {
   371:               q[k] = item;
   372:             }
   373:           }
   374:         } catch (e) {
   375:           item.tries = Number(item.tries||0) + 1;
   376:           item.lastError = String(e && e.message ? e.message : e);
   377:           // FIX v3.9.25: Drop after 10 tries to prevent browser resource exhaustion
   378:           if (item.tries >= 10) {
   379:             try{ if(window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_DROP_MAX_TRIES', detail: String(item.key||k) }); }catch(_){}
   380:             delete q[k];
   381:           } else {
   382:             q[k] = item;
   383:           }
   384:         }
   385:       }
   386: 
   387:       saveQueue(q);
   388: 
   389:       try { if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_QUEUE_FLUSH_DONE', detail: 'ok=' + okCount + ' remaining=' + Object.keys(q||{}).length }); } catch(_) {}
   390: 
   391:       // Enhanced: dispatch queue flush details for listeners (User Management realtime).
   392:       try{
   393:         if(window.dispatchEvent){
   394:           window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('SYNC_QUEUE_FLUSH_DONE', { detail: { ok:true, flushed: okCount, remaining: Object.keys(q||{}).length, events: flushedEvents } }));
   395:           // If the flush contained a user_created event, nudge the UI to refresh the roster.
   396:           const userCreated = (flushedEvents||[]).find(e=>e && e.value && e.value.type === 'user_created');
   397:           if(userCreated){
   398:             window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail: { key: 'mums_user_list_updated', event: userCreated.value, source: 'SYNC_QUEUE_FLUSH_DONE' } }));
   399:           }
   400:         }
   401:       }catch(_){ }
   402: 
   403:       return { ok:true, flushed: okCount, remaining: Object.keys(q||{}).length };
   404:     } finally {
   405:       flushing = false;
   406:     }
   407:   }
   408: 
   409:   // Keep queue cache fresh across tabs.
   410:   try {
   411:     window.addEventListener('storage', (e)=>{
   412:       if (e && e.key === QUEUE_KEY) queueCache = null;
   413:     });
   414:   } catch(_) {}
   415: 
   416: 
   417: function applyRemoteKey(key, value){
   418:     // Migrate legacy lock key to new cloud key
   419:     try{
   420:       if(String(key||'') === 'ums_schedule_locks') key = 'mums_schedule_lock_state';
   421:     }catch(_){ }
   422:     if (!shouldSyncKey(key)) return;
   423:     // Do not overwrite locally queued changes.
   424:     if (isQueued && isQueued(key)) {
   425:       try { if (window.Store && Store.addLog) Store.addLog({ action: 'SYNC_REMOTE_SKIPPED_QUEUED', detail: String(key||'') }); } catch(_){}
   426:       return;
   427:     }
   428:     if (!window.Store) return;
   429:     const rawWrite = (typeof Store.__rawWrite === 'function') ? Store.__rawWrite
   430:       : (typeof Store.__writeRaw === 'function') ? Store.__writeRaw
   431:       : null;
   432:     if (!rawWrite) return;
   433:     rawWrite(key, value, { fromRealtime: true });
   434: 
   435:     // Special: user management realtime events
   436:     try{
   437:       if(String(key||'') === 'mums_user_events' && window.dispatchEvent){
   438:         const ev = (value && typeof value === 'object') ? value : null;
   439:         if(ev && ev.type === 'user_created'){
   440:           window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail: { key: 'mums_user_list_updated', event: ev } }));
   441:         }
   442:       }
   443:     }catch(_){ }
   444:   }
   445: 
   446:   // ----------------------
   447:   // Local relay (dev only)
   448:   // ----------------------
   449:   function connectRelay(){
   450:     try {
   451:       if (!_RT_WS_URL) {
   452:         if (!pollingFallbackStop) pollingFallbackStop = startPollingFallback();
   453:         return;
   454:       }
   455:       const env = (window.EnvRuntime && EnvRuntime.env && EnvRuntime.env()) || (window.MUMS_ENV || {});
   456:       const relayUrl = (env.REALTIME_RELAY_URL || '').trim() || DEFAULT_RELAY_URL;
   457: 
   458:       ws = new WebSocket(relayUrl);
   459:       ws.addEventListener('open', ()=>{ wsOk = true; });
   460:       ws.addEventListener('close', ()=>{ wsOk = false; });
   461:       ws.addEventListener('error', ()=>{ wsOk = false; });
   462:       ws.addEventListener('message', (ev)=>{
   463:         try{
   464:           const msg = JSON.parse(ev.data || '{}');
   465:           if (!msg || msg.type !== 'set' || !shouldSyncKey(msg.key)) return;
   466:           applyRemoteKey(msg.key, msg.value);
   467:         }catch(_){ }
   468:       });
   469:     } catch (_) {}
   470:   }
   471: 
   472:   function relaySend(key, value){
   473:     try {
   474:       if (!wsOk || !ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
   475:       ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type:'set', key, value }));
   476:     } catch (_) {}
   477:   }
   478: 
   479:   // ----------------------
   480:   // Cloud sync (Supabase)
   481:   // ----------------------
   482:   async function cloudFetch(url, opts){
   483:     const headers = Object.assign({}, (opts && opts.headers) || {});
   484:     const token = window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
   485:     if (token) headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + token;
   486:     headers['Content-Type'] = headers['Content-Type'] || 'application/json';
   487:     const res = await fetch(url, Object.assign({}, opts || {}, { headers }));
   488:     const text = await res.text();
   489:     let json = null;
   490:     try { json = text ? JSON.parse(text) : null; } catch (_) {}
   491:     return { ok: res.ok, status: res.status, json, text };
   492:   }
   493: 
   494:   async function pullOnce(){
   495:     try {
   496:       const out = await cloudFetch(`/api/sync/pull?since=${encodeURIComponent(String(lastCloudTs))}&clientId=${encodeURIComponent(clientId)}`);
   497:       if (!out.ok) {
   498:         // Keep current status; surface detail.
   499:         dispatchStatus(cloudMode, `Pull failed (${out.status})`);
   500:         return;
   501:       }
   502:       const docs = (out.json && out.json.docs) ? out.json.docs : [];
   503:       for (const d of docs) {
   504:         if (!d || !d.key) continue;
   505:         // Ignore our own echo if desired; Store.__writeRaw already suppresses republish.
   506:         applyRemoteKey(d.key, d.value);
   507:         if (d.updatedAt && d.updatedAt > lastCloudTs) lastCloudTs = d.updatedAt;
   508:       }
   509:       cloudOkAt = Date.now();
   510:       if (cloudMode !== 'realtime') {
   511:         dispatchStatus('polling', 'Polling sync active');
   512:       }
   513:       // Do not downgrade mode to polling; realtime remains mandatory.
   514:     } catch (e) {
   515:       dispatchStatus(cloudMode, `Pull error: ${String(e && e.message ? e.message : e)}`);
   516:     }
   517:   }
   518: 
   519: 
   520:   function processSync(data){
   521:     try {
   522:       const docs = (data && data.docs) ? data.docs : [];
   523:       for (const d of docs) {
   524:         if (!d || !d.key) continue;
   525:         applyRemoteKey(d.key, d.value);
   526:         if (d.updatedAt && d.updatedAt > lastCloudTs) lastCloudTs = d.updatedAt;
   527:       }
   528:     } catch(_) {}
   529:   }
   530: 
   531:   function startPollingFallback() {
   532:     if (pollingFallbackActive) return pollingFallbackStop || (()=>{});
   533:     pollingFallbackActive = true;
   534:     let _pollInterval = null;
   535:     async function poll() {
   536:       try {
   537:         if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled())) return;
   538:         if (!(CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) return;
   539:         const out = await cloudFetch(`/api/sync/pull?since=${encodeURIComponent(String(lastCloudTs))}&clientId=${encodeURIComponent(clientId)}`);
   540:         if (out && out.ok) {
   541:           updateSyncBadge('connected', 'Sync: Connected');
   542:           processSync(out.json || {});
   543:         } else if (out && out.json && out.json.error === 'sync_unavailable') {
   544:           updateSyncBadge('error', 'Sync unavailable');
   545:         } else if (out && out.status >= 500) {
   546:           updateSyncBadge('error', `Sync unavailable (${out.status})`);
   547:         }
   548:       } catch(_) {
   549:         updateSyncBadge('error', 'Polling failed');
   550:       }
   551:     }
   552:     _pollInterval = setInterval(poll, 30000);
   553:     poll();
   554:     return () => {
   555:       try { if (_pollInterval) clearInterval(_pollInterval); } catch(_) {}
   556:       _pollInterval = null;
   557:       pollingFallbackActive = false;
   558:     };
   559:   }
   560: 
   561:   function ensureOfflinePull(){
   562:     try{
   563:       if(offlinePullTimer) return;
   564:       // FIX v3.9.25: Increased from 8s to 45s — 8s caused ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES
   565:       // when API was failing (each failed pull consumed a TCP connection slot).
   566:       offlinePullTimer = setInterval(()=>{
   567:         try{
   568:           if (cloudMode === 'realtime') return;
   569:           if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled())) return;
   570:           if (!(CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) return;
   571:           pullOnce();
   572:         }catch(_){ }
   573:       }, 45000);
   574:     }catch(_){ }
   575:   }
   576: 
   577:   function stopCloud(){
   578:     try {
   579:       if (connectTimer) { clearTimeout(connectTimer); connectTimer = null; }
   580:       if (reconnectTimer) { clearTimeout(reconnectTimer); reconnectTimer = null; }
   581:       if (_rtState.circuitTimer) { clearTimeout(_rtState.circuitTimer); _rtState.circuitTimer = null; }
   582:       if (reconcileTimer) { clearInterval(reconcileTimer); reconcileTimer = null; }
   583:       if (offlinePullTimer) { clearInterval(offlinePullTimer); offlinePullTimer = null; }
   584:     } catch (_) {}
   585:     try { if (sbChannel && sbChannel.unsubscribe) sbChannel.unsubscribe(); } catch (_) {}
   586:     try {
   587:       if (window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT && typeof window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.removeAllChannels === 'function') {
   588:         window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.removeAllChannels();
   589:       }
   590:     } catch (_) {}
   591:     // FIX v3.9.31: No longer null the client here — we keep the singleton alive.
   592:     // forceClientRecreate is handled in trySupabaseRealtimeMandatory via realtime.disconnect().
   593:     sbChannel = null;
   594:     sbClient = null;
   595:   }
   596: 
   597:   function scheduleReconnect(reason){
   598:     try {
   599:       if (_rtState.circuitOpen) return;
   600:       if (userExplicitlyLoggedOut) {
   601:         if (_rt_DEBUG) console.log('[Realtime Guard] Reconnect skipped: explicit logout');
   602:         return;
   603:       }
   604:       const rs = String(reason || '').toLowerCase();
   605:       if (rs === 'closed' || rs === 'channel_error' || rs === 'timed_out' || rs === 'not-subscribed') {
   606:         forceClientRecreate = true;
   607:       }
   608:       _rtState.attempts++;
   609:       if (_rtState.attempts > _RT_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
   610:         _rtState.circuitOpen = true;
   611:         updateSyncBadge('error', 'Sync: Offline ↺');
   612:         if (!pollingFallbackStop) pollingFallbackStop = startPollingFallback();
   613:         if (_rt_DEBUG) console.warn('[MUMS Sync] Circuit open — too many failures. Auto-retry in 5min.');
   614:         _rtState.circuitTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   615:           resetRealtimeCircuit();
   616:           connectCloudMandatory();
   617:         }, _RT_CIRCUIT_RESET_MS);
   618:         return;
   619:       }
   620:       if (reconnectTimer) return;
   621:       const jitter = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000);
   622:       const delay = Math.min(30000, 1000 * Math.pow(2, _rtState.attempts)) + jitter;
   623:       reconnectBackoffMs = delay;
   624:       updateSyncBadge('connecting', `Reconnecting… ${reason ? '('+reason+')' : ''}`);
   625:       reconnectTimer = setTimeout(async ()=>{
   626:   try{ if(window.EnvRuntime && typeof EnvRuntime.ready==='function'){ await Promise.race([EnvRuntime.ready(), new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res, 2500))]); } }catch(e){ (window.MUMS_DEBUG||{}).warn && MUMS_DEBUG.warn('realtime.env_wait_failed',{e:String(e)}); }
   627: 
   628:         reconnectTimer = null;
   629:         connectCloudMandatory();
   630:       }, delay);
   631:     } catch (_) {}
   632:   }
   633: 
   634:   function trySupabaseRealtimeMandatory(){
   635:     try {
   636:       const env = (window.EnvRuntime && EnvRuntime.env && EnvRuntime.env()) || (window.MUMS_ENV || {});
   637:       const enabled = String(env.SYNC_ENABLE_SUPABASE_REALTIME || 'true').toLowerCase() !== 'false';
   638:       if (!enabled) return false;
   639:       if (!window.supabase || !env.SUPABASE_URL || !env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) return false;
   640:       if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) return false;
   641: 
   642:       const token = String(CloudAuth.accessToken() || '');
   643:       if (!token) return false;
   644:       lastAuthToken = token;
   645:       // BUG FIX: was console.log — moved to debug-only to eliminate console spam
   646:       try{ (window.MUMS_DEBUG||{}).log && MUMS_DEBUG.log('realtime.preparing_subscribe', { hasToken: !!token }); }catch(_){}
   647:       // FIX v3.9.31b: Correct GoTrueClient singleton approach.
   648:       // v3.9.31 called realtime.disconnect() here — WRONG. Phoenix Socket's disconnect()
   649:       // clears its internal reconnect timer and puts the socket into a manual-disconnect
   650:       // state. Subsequent subscribe() calls then see "WebSocket closed before connection
   651:       // established" × N, triggering CHANNEL_ERROR → scheduleReconnect → disconnect loop.
   652:       // CORRECT FIX: do NOT touch the socket at all. stopCloud() already called
   653:       // removeAllChannels() which removed stale channels but kept the WebSocket alive.
   654:       // We simply reset the flag and resubscribe new channels on the live socket.
   655:       // This prevents GoTrueClient spam (no new createClient calls) AND keeps sync healthy.
   656:       if (forceClientRecreate) {
   657:         forceClientRecreate = false; // flag reset only — socket and client stay untouched
   658:       }
   659:       if (!window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT) {
   660:         window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT = window.supabase.createClient(env.SUPABASE_URL, env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, {
   661:           auth: {
   662:             persistSession: false,
   663:             autoRefreshToken: false,
   664:             detectSessionInUrl: false,
   665:             storage: SUPABASE_STORAGE,
   666:             storageKey: 'mums_shared'
   667:           },
   668:           realtime: { params: { eventsPerSecond: 10 } },
   669:           global: {
   670:             headers: {
   671:               // Critical: provide user JWT so Realtime respects RLS (authenticated role)
   672:               Authorization: 'Bearer ' + token
   673:             }
   674:           }
   675:         });
   676:       }
   677:       sbClient = window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT;
   678: 
   679:       const seq = activeSeq;
   680: 
   681:       // Critical: authorize Realtime socket (Supabase Realtime v2)
   682:       try { sbClient.realtime && sbClient.realtime.setAuth && sbClient.realtime.setAuth(token); } catch (_) {}
   683: 
   684:       // Subscribe to documents table changes (server writes). RLS allows authenticated select;
   685:       // we still do a reconciliation pull after we are subscribed.
   686:       sbChannel = sbClient.channel('mums-sync-docs')
   687:         .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'mums_documents' }, (payload) => {
   688:           try {
   689:             const row = payload && payload.new ? payload.new : null;
   690:             if (!row || !row.key) return;
   691:             if (row.updated_by_client_id && row.updated_by_client_id === clientId) return;
   692:             applyRemoteKey(row.key, row.value);
   693:             const ts = row.updated_at ? Date.parse(row.updated_at) : Date.now();
   694:             if (ts > lastCloudTs) lastCloudTs = ts;
   695:           } catch (_) {}
   696:         })
   697:         .on('postgres_changes', { event: 'INSERT', schema: 'public', table: 'mums_sync_log' }, (payload) => {
   698:           try {
   699:             const row = payload && payload.new ? payload.new : null;
   700:             if (!row) return;
   701:             if (row.client_id === clientId) return; // Prevent self-echo
   702:             if(window.dispatchEvent){
   703:               window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:realtime_alert', { detail: row }));
   704:             }
   705: 
   706:             // Mailbox override events must propagate immediately across online users.
   707:             // Trigger a forced cloud override sync as soon as the audit row arrives,
   708:             // so pages reflect set/lift changes without requiring refresh.
   709:             try{
   710:               const action = String(row.action || '').toLowerCase();
   711:               const scope = String(row.scope || '').toLowerCase();
   712:               if(['set','reset','freeze'].includes(action) && ['global','superadmin'].includes(scope)){
   713:                 if(window.Store && typeof Store.startMailboxOverrideSync === 'function'){
   714:                   Store.startMailboxOverrideSync({ force:true });
   715:                 }
   716:               }
   717:             }catch(_){ }
   718:           } catch (_) {}
   719:         })
   720:         .subscribe((status) => {
   721:           // Ignore status events from older channels after a reconnect.
   722:           if (seq !== activeSeq) return;
   723:           // Avoid console flood: log only when status actually changes.
   724:           if (status !== 'SUBSCRIBED' && status !== lastRtStatusLogged) {
   725:             lastRtStatusLogged = status;
   726:             if (_rt_DEBUG) console.warn('[Realtime Guard] Channel status:', status);
   727:           } else if (status === 'SUBSCRIBED') {
   728:             lastRtStatusLogged = '';
   729:           }
   730:           if (status === 'SUBSCRIBED') {
   731:             wsFailureCount = 0;
   732:             forcePollingOnly = false;
   733:             forceClientRecreate = false;
   734:             resetRealtimeCircuit();
   735:             cloudOkAt = Date.now();
   736:             reconnectBackoffMs = 1200;
   737:             updateSyncBadge('connected', 'Supabase Realtime connected');
   738:             try {
   739:               window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:syncstatus', {
   740:                 detail: { mode: 'realtime', syncMode: 'realtime', detail: 'Supabase Realtime connected', lastOkAt: cloudOkAt }
   741:               }));
   742:             } catch(_) {}
   743:             // Flush queued local changes before reconciling.
   744:             try {
   745:               flushQueue('subscribed').then(()=>{ try { pullOnce(); } catch(_) {} });
   746:             } catch(_) {
   747:               try { pullOnce(); } catch(_) {}
   748:             }
   749: 
   750: 
   751:             // Integrity reconciliation: keep status green, but periodically pull
   752:             // PERF OPT: Reconcile interval increased from 15s → 45s.
   753:             // Supabase Realtime is the primary real-time channel; this poll is only
   754:             // a safety net for missed events. 45s is sufficient without hammering the API.
   755:             try {
   756:               const intervalMs = Math.max(15000, Number(env.SYNC_RECONCILE_MS || 45000));
   757:               if (reconcileTimer) clearInterval(reconcileTimer);
   758:               reconcileTimer = setInterval(()=>{
   759:                 if (cloudMode !== 'realtime') return;
   760:                 pullOnce();
   761:               }, intervalMs);
   762:             } catch (_) {}
   763:           } else if (status === 'CHANNEL_ERROR' || status === 'TIMED_OUT') {
   764:             wsFailureCount += 1;
   765:             try {
   766:               window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:syncstatus', {
   767:                 detail: { mode: 'offline', syncMode: 'offline', error: status, detail: String(status || 'CHANNEL_ERROR') }
   768:               }));
   769:             } catch(_) {}
   770:             if (wsFailureCount >= 2) {
   771:               forcePollingOnly = true;
   772:               if (!pollingFallbackStop) pollingFallbackStop = startPollingFallback();
   773:               dispatchStatus('polling', 'Realtime unavailable, polling fallback active');
   774:               return;
   775:             }
   776:             // Treat transient channel errors as reconnecting (yellow), not offline (red), to avoid UI flicker.
   777:             scheduleReconnect(status);
   778:           } else if (status === 'CLOSED') {
   779:             // BUG FIX 2026-04-16: Only treat CLOSED as an error when the sequence still
   780:             // matches (i.e., this is NOT from our own stopCloud/unsubscribe during token
   781:             // rotation or manual reconnect). Stale CLOSED events from old channels must
   782:             // be silently ignored — previously they fired scheduleReconnect() causing the
   783:             // "Connecting" loop even after a successful re-subscribe.
   784:             if (seq === activeSeq) {
   785:               try {
   786:                 window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:syncstatus', {
   787:                   detail: { mode: 'offline', syncMode: 'offline', error: 'CLOSED', detail: 'CLOSED' }
   788:                 }));
   789:               } catch(_) {}
   790:               if (wsFailureCount >= 2) {
   791:                 forcePollingOnly = true;
   792:                 if (!pollingFallbackStop) pollingFallbackStop = startPollingFallback();
   793:                 dispatchStatus('polling', 'Realtime closed, polling fallback active');
   794:                 return;
   795:               }
   796:               scheduleReconnect('closed');
   797:             }
   798:             // If seq !== activeSeq: this CLOSED came from our own unsubscribe — ignore silently.
   799:           }
   800:         });
   801: 
   802:       // Mandatory realtime: fail fast if we cannot subscribe within timeout.
   803:       try {
   804:         const timeoutMs = Math.max(2500, Number(env.SYNC_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS || 7000));
   805:         if (connectTimer) clearTimeout(connectTimer);
   806:         connectTimer = setTimeout(()=>{
   807:           connectTimer = null;
   808:           if (cloudMode !== 'realtime') {
   809:             dispatchStatus('offline', 'Realtime required but not connected (check network / Realtime replication)');
   810:             scheduleReconnect('not-subscribed');
   811:           }
   812:         }, timeoutMs);
   813:       } catch (_) {}
   814: 
   815:       return true;
   816:     } catch (_) {
   817:       return false;
   818:     }
   819:   }
   820: 
   821:   function connectCloudMandatory(){
   822:     try {
   823:       if (userExplicitlyLoggedOut) {
   824:         dispatchStatus('offline', 'Logged out');
   825:         return;
   826:       }
   827:       // Invalidate any in-flight callbacks from a previous channel (unsubscribe emits CLOSED).
   828:       activeSeq = ++connectSeq;
   829: 
   830:       stopCloud();
   831: 
   832:       if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled())) {
   833:         dispatchStatus('offline', 'Cloud auth disabled (SUPABASE_URL/ANON_KEY missing)');
   834:         return;
   835:       }
   836: 
   837:       if (!(CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken())) {
   838:         // Debug-only: suppress noisy 'no token' log on cold boot
   839:         try{ (window.MUMS_DEBUG||{}).log && MUMS_DEBUG.log('realtime.connect_skipped_no_token'); }catch(_){}
   840:         dispatchStatus('offline', 'Not authenticated');
   841:         return;
   842:       }
   843: 
   844:       if (forcePollingOnly) {
   845:         if (!pollingFallbackStop) pollingFallbackStop = startPollingFallback();
   846:         dispatchStatus('polling', 'Polling fallback active');
   847:         return;
   848:       }
   849: 
   850:       dispatchStatus('connecting', 'Connecting to Supabase Realtime…');
   851: 
   852:       // Attempt Supabase Realtime (mandatory).
   853:       const ok = trySupabaseRealtimeMandatory();
   854:       if (!ok) {
   855:         if (_rt_DEBUG) console.warn('[Realtime Guard] subscribe init failed (env/auth missing)');
   856:         dispatchStatus('offline', 'Realtime init failed (env/auth missing)');
   857:         scheduleReconnect('init-failed');
   858:       }
   859:     } catch (e) {
   860:       dispatchStatus('offline', String(e && e.message ? e.message : e));
   861:     }
   862:   }
   863: 
   864:   async function cloudPush(key, value, removedIds, op){
   865:     try {
   866:       if(!canPushKey(key)) return;
   867:       const body = { key, value, removedIds: removedIds || [], op: op || 'set', clientId, ts: Date.now() };
   868:       const out = await cloudFetch('/api/sync/push', {
   869:         method: 'POST',
   870:         body: JSON.stringify(body)
   871:       });
   872: 
   873:       // RBAC mismatch hardening:
   874:       // If the server forbids this key, permanently suppress further attempts
   875:       // to prevent repeated 403 request storms and console spam.
   876:       if (!out.ok && out.status === 403) {
   877:         const code = String(out && out.json && out.json.code ? out.json.code : '').trim();
   878:         if (code === 'forbidden_key' || code === 'forbidden_member_write' || !code) {
   879:           try{ markForbiddenPushKey(key); }catch(_){ }
   880:           dispatchStatus(cloudMode, `Push forbidden (${String(key||'')})`);
   881:           return;
   882:         }
   883:       }
   884: 
   885:       if (!out.ok) {
   886:         try { enqueue(key, value, removedIds, op, 'push_failed', 'http_' + String(out.status)); } catch(_){}
   887:         // Do not change mode on push failures; surface detail only.
   888:         dispatchStatus(cloudMode, `Push failed (${out.status})`);
   889:       }
   890:     } catch (e) {
   891:       try { enqueue(key, value, removedIds, op, 'push_error', String(e && e.message ? e.message : e)); } catch(_){}
   892:       dispatchStatus(cloudMode, `Push error: ${String(e && e.message ? e.message : e)}`);
   893:     }
   894:   }
   895: 
   896:   function diffArray(prevArr, nextArr){
   897:     const prev = Array.isArray(prevArr) ? prevArr : [];
   898:     const next = Array.isArray(nextArr) ? nextArr : [];
   899:     const idOf = (it)=>{
   900:       if (!it || typeof it !== 'object') return '';
   901:       return String(it.id || it.caseNo || it.case_no || it.uuid || it.key || '');
   902:     };
   903:     const prevIds = new Set(prev.map(idOf).filter(Boolean));
   904:     const nextIds = new Set(next.map(idOf).filter(Boolean));
   905:     const removed = [];
   906:     prevIds.forEach((id)=>{ if (!nextIds.has(id)) removed.push(id); });
   907:     return removed;
   908:   }
   909: 
   910:   function schedulePush(key, value){
   911:     if (!shouldSyncKey(key)) return;
   912: 
   913:     // Relay (dev)
   914:     relaySend(key, value);
   915: 
   916:     // Cloud
   917:     if (!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled())) return;
   918:     if (!canPushKey(key)) return;
   919: 
   920:     // Debounce per key
   921:     if (pushTimers.has(key)) clearTimeout(pushTimers.get(key));
   922:     // FIX v3.9.25: Exponential backoff on push — prevents ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES
   923:     const _pushTries = (function(){ try{ const _q=loadQueue(); return _q && _q[key] ? Number((_q[key]||{}).tries||0) : 0; }catch(_r){ return 0; } })();
   924:     const _pushDelay = Math.min(30000, 300 * Math.pow(2, Math.min(_pushTries, 6)));
   925:     pushTimers.set(key, setTimeout(()=>{
   926:       pushTimers.delete(key);
   927:       const prev = lastLocalByKey.get(key);
   928:       lastLocalByKey.set(key, value);
   929: 
   930:       let removedIds = [];
   931:       let op = 'set';
   932:       if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   933:         removedIds = diffArray(prev, value);
   934:         op = 'merge'; // safe for list keys
   935:       } else if (typeof value === 'object') {
   936:         op = 'merge';
   937: 
   938:         // CLEAR BUG FIX: Schedule block keys must use op='set' (replace) not 'merge'.
   939:         // With op='merge', a server-side mergeObjects shallow-merges old user entries
   940:         // back on top of cleared entries — causing deleted blocks to resurrect.
   941:         // Setting op='set' makes the pushed value authoritative: the server stores it
   942:         // exactly as-is without mixing in stale data from other clients.
   943:         // _ts is embedded so the server can resolve multi-tab race conditions (last-write-wins).
   944:         if (key === 'mums_schedule_blocks' || key === 'mums_schedule_snapshots' || key === 'ums_weekly_schedules') {
   945:           op = 'set';
   946:           // Stamp the push time so the server can reject older pushes from stale tabs.
   947:           if (value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
   948:             value = Object.assign({}, value, { _ts: Date.now() });
   949:           }
   950:         }
   951: 
   952:         // RESURRECTION FIX: For mums_mailbox_tables, compute which assignment IDs
   953:         // were present in the previous push but are absent in the current push.
   954:         // These are forwarded to push.js as removedIds so mergeMailboxAssignments
   955:         // can exclude them from Supabase's existing doc — preventing the server's
   956:         // additive merge from silently resurrecting deleted cases.
   957:         if (key === 'mums_mailbox_tables' && prev && typeof prev === 'object') {
   958:           try {
   959:             const flatAssigns = (tables) => Object.values(tables || {}).reduce((acc, t) => {
   960:               if (t && Array.isArray(t.assignments)) acc.push(...t.assignments);
   961:               return acc;
   962:             }, []);
   963:             const assignRemoved = diffArray(flatAssigns(prev), flatAssigns(value));
   964:             if (assignRemoved.length) removedIds = assignRemoved;
   965:           } catch(_) {}
   966:         }
   967:       }
   968: 
   969:       // If realtime isn't healthy, queue the change and let reconnect/flush handle it.
   970:       if (cloudMode !== 'realtime') {
   971:         if (!canPushKey(key)) return;
   972:         enqueue(key, value, removedIds, op, 'not_realtime', cloudMode);
   973:         try { connectCloudMandatory(); } catch(_){}
   974:         return;
   975:       }
   976:       cloudPush(key, value, removedIds, op);
   977:     }, 300));
   978:   }
   979: 
   980:   // Connect after DOM and env are ready
   981:   async function hasSupabaseSession(){
   982:     try {
   983:       if (!(window.supabase && window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT && window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.auth && typeof window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.auth.getSession === 'function')) return false;
   984:       const out = await window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.auth.getSession();
   985:       const session = out && out.data ? out.data.session : null;
   986:       return !!(session && session.access_token);
   987:     } catch (_) {
   988:       return false;
   989:     }
   990:   }
   991: 
   992:   function waitForAuthStateSignal(maxMs){
   993:     return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   994:       let done = false;
   995:       let timer = null;
   996:       let unsub = null;
   997:       function finish(v){
   998:         if (done) return;
   999:         done = true;
  1000:         try { if (timer) clearTimeout(timer); } catch(_) {}
  1001:         try { if (typeof unsub === 'function') unsub(); else if (unsub && typeof unsub.unsubscribe === 'function') unsub.unsubscribe(); } catch(_) {}
  1002:         resolve(!!v);
  1003:       }
  1004: 
  1005:       timer = setTimeout(()=>finish(false), Math.max(0, Number(maxMs || 0)));
  1006: 
  1007:       try {
  1008:         window.addEventListener('mums:session_hydrated', function onHydrated(){
  1009:           try { window.removeEventListener('mums:session_hydrated', onHydrated); } catch(_) {}
  1010:           finish(true);
  1011:         }, { once: true });
  1012:       } catch(_) {}
  1013: 
  1014:       try {
  1015:         const auth = window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT && window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT.auth;
  1016:         if (auth && typeof auth.onAuthStateChange === 'function') {
  1017:           const out = auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session)=>{
  1018:             if (session && session.access_token) finish(true);
  1019:           });
  1020:           unsub = out && out.data ? out.data.subscription : null;
  1021:         }
  1022:       } catch(_) {}
  1023:     });
  1024:   }
  1025: 
  1026:   async function waitForRealtimeAuthReady(maxMs){
  1027:     const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(0, Number(maxMs || 0));
  1028:     while (Date.now() < deadline) {
  1029:       if (userExplicitlyLoggedOut) return false;
  1030:       try {
  1031:         const tokenReady = !!(window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled() && CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken());
  1032:         if (tokenReady) {
  1033:           const sbSession = await hasSupabaseSession();
  1034:           if (sbSession || !window.__MUMS_SB_CLIENT) {
  1035:             return true;
  1036:           }
  1037:         }
  1038:       } catch (_) {}
  1039:       await new Promise((res)=>setTimeout(res, 150));
  1040:     }
  1041: 
  1042:     // Last chance: wait for explicit auth-state/session signal.
  1043:     return waitForAuthStateSignal(1200);
  1044:   }
  1045: 
  1046:   async function boot(){
  1047:     if (bootStarted) return;
  1048:     bootStarted = true;
  1049:     try {
  1050:       connectRelay();
  1051: 
  1052:       // Mandatory realtime: wait briefly for session restore to avoid false offline / UI flicker.
  1053:       dispatchStatus('connecting', 'Waiting for session…');
  1054: 
  1055:       try {
  1056:         if (window.EnvRuntime && typeof EnvRuntime.ready === 'function') {
  1057:           await Promise.race([EnvRuntime.ready(), new Promise((res)=>setTimeout(res, 2000))]);
  1058:         }
  1059:       } catch (_) {}
  1060: 
  1061:       try {
  1062:         if (window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.refreshSession === 'function') {
  1063:           await CloudAuth.refreshSession();
  1064:         }
  1065:       } catch (_) {}
  1066: 
  1067:       const ready = await waitForRealtimeAuthReady(4200);
  1068:       if (_rt_DEBUG) console.log('[Realtime Guard] Auth readiness', { ready });
  1069: 
  1070:       // Connect once we have a token.
  1071:       if (ready && window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.isEnabled && CloudAuth.isEnabled() && CloudAuth.accessToken && CloudAuth.accessToken()) {
  1072:         connectCloudMandatory();
  1073:       } else {
  1074:         dispatchStatus('offline', 'Login required');
  1075:       }
  1076:       ensureOfflinePull();
  1077: 
  1078: 
  1079:       // Reconnect on login/logout.
  1080:       window.addEventListener('mums:auth', (e)=>{
  1081:         // e.detail = { type: 'login'|'logout' }
  1082:         const t = (e && e.detail && e.detail.type) ? String(e.detail.type) : '';
  1083:         if (t === 'logout') {
  1084:           userExplicitlyLoggedOut = true;
  1085:           stopCloud();
  1086:           dispatchStatus('offline', 'Logged out');
  1087:           return;
  1088:         }
  1089:         userExplicitlyLoggedOut = false;
  1090:         connectCloudMandatory();
  1091:         ensureOfflinePull();
  1092:       });
  1093: 
  1094:       // BUG FIX 2026-04-16: Debounced token-rotation reconnect.
  1095:       //
  1096:       // ROOT CAUSE OF "Sync: Connecting" LOOP + CONSOLE SPAM:
  1097:       //   1. mums:authtoken fires (token refresh)
  1098:       //   2. → connectCloudMandatory() → stopCloud() → sbChannel.unsubscribe()
  1099:       //   3. → Supabase emits CLOSED status on the channel callback
  1100:       //   4. → scheduleReconnect('closed') → connectCloudMandatory() AGAIN
  1101:       //   5. → "[Realtime Guard] Preparing realtime subscribe" printed on every iteration
  1102:       //   6. → UI flickers orange "Connecting" after every 1-hour token refresh
  1103:       //
  1104:       // FIX: Two-layer guard:
  1105:       //   a) Debounce 400ms so rapid token events (e.g. loadSession + refreshSession firing
  1106:       //      in quick succession at boot) collapse into one reconnect.
  1107:       //   b) Skip reconnect entirely when SUBSCRIBED and token changed but channel is live —
  1108:       //      just call setAuth() to update the WS auth in-place (no channel tear-down).
  1109:       //   c) Only do a full reconnect when channel is NOT already subscribed.
  1110:       window.addEventListener('mums:authtoken', (e)=>{
  1111:         try {
  1112:           const t = (e && e.detail && e.detail.token) ? String(e.detail.token) : '';
  1113:           if (!t || t === lastAuthToken) return;
  1114:           userExplicitlyLoggedOut = false;
  1115:           lastAuthToken = t;
  1116: 
  1117:           // Debounce: cancel any pending reconnect and restart the timer.
  1118:           if (_authtokenDebounceTimer) { clearTimeout(_authtokenDebounceTimer); _authtokenDebounceTimer = null; }
  1119:           _authtokenDebounceTimer = setTimeout(()=>{
  1120:             _authtokenDebounceTimer = null;
  1121:             try {
  1122:               // PREFERRED PATH: if already SUBSCRIBED, just rotate the auth token
  1123:               // on the existing channel. No teardown → no CLOSED event → no reconnect loop.
  1124:               if (cloudMode === 'realtime' && sbClient && sbClient.realtime &&
  1125:                   typeof sbClient.realtime.setAuth === 'function') {
  1126:                 sbClient.realtime.setAuth(lastAuthToken);
  1127:                 ensureOfflinePull();
  1128:                 return; // ✅ Token updated in-place — no reconnect needed
  1129:               }
  1130:               // FALLBACK: channel not live → do full reconnect (normal startup path).
  1131:               connectCloudMandatory();
  1132:               ensureOfflinePull();
  1133:             } catch (_) {}
  1134:           }, _AUTHTOKEN_DEBOUNCE_MS);
  1135:         } catch (_) {}
  1136:       });
  1137:       bootCompleted = true;
  1138:     } catch (_) {}
  1139:   }
  1140: 
  1141:   function initRealtimeSync(){
  1142:     if (bootCompleted || bootStarted) return;
  1143:     setTimeout(()=>{ try { boot(); } catch(_) {} }, 400);
  1144:   }
  1145: 
  1146:   // Delay boot to allow Store/Auth to initialize.
  1147:   initRealtimeSync();
  1148: 
  1149:   try {
  1150:     window.addEventListener('mums:session_hydrated', ()=>{ try{ initRealtimeSync(); }catch(_){} }, { once: true });
  1151:   } catch(_) {}
  1152: 
  1153:   window.Realtime = {
  1154:     onLocalWrite: schedulePush,
  1155:     clientId: ()=>clientId,
  1156:     syncKeys: ()=>SYNC_KEYS.slice(),
  1157:     queueStatus: ()=>{
  1158:       try {
  1159:         const q = getQueue();
  1160:         const keys = Object.keys(q||{});
  1161:         return keys.map(k=>({ key:k, tries:Number((q[k]||{}).tries||0), lastError:String((q[k]||{}).lastError||'') })).sort((a,b)=>a.key.localeCompare(b.key));
  1162:       } catch(_) { return []; }
  1163:     },
  1164:     flushQueue: (trigger)=>flushQueue(trigger||'manual'),
  1165:     forceReconnect: ()=>{ try{ userExplicitlyLoggedOut = false; forcePollingOnly = false; wsFailureCount = 0; resetRealtimeCircuit(); connectCloudMandatory(); }catch(_){ } },
  1166:     resetCircuit: ()=>{ try{ resetRealtimeCircuit(); }catch(_){ } },
  1167:     init: ()=>{ try{ initRealtimeSync(); }catch(_){ } }
  1168:   };
  1169: })();

    26:   function getBearerToken(){
    27:     try{
    28:       const t = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? String(CloudAuth.accessToken()||'').trim() : '';
    29:       if(t) return t;
    30:     }catch(_){ }
    31:     try{
    32:       const sess = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.loadSession) ? CloudAuth.loadSession() : null;
    33:       const t2 = sess && sess.access_token ? String(sess.access_token).trim() : '';
    34:       return t2 || '';
    35:     }catch(_){ }
    36:     return '';

    39:   function normalizeThemeMeta(raw){
    40:     const out = {};
    41:     const src = (raw && typeof raw === 'object' && !Array.isArray(raw)) ? raw : {};
    42:     Object.keys(src).forEach((themeId)=>{
    43:       const id = String(themeId||'').trim();
    44:       if(!id) return;
    45:       const node = src[themeId];
    46:       if(!node || typeof node !== 'object' || Array.isArray(node)) return;
    47:       const hidden = !!node.hidden;
    48:       const deleted = !!node.deleted;
    49:       if(!hidden && !deleted) return;
    50:       out[id] = { hidden, deleted };
    51:     });
    52:     return out;
    53:   }
    54: 
    55:   function getThemeCatalog(){
    56:     return (Config && Array.isArray(Config.THEMES)) ? Config.THEMES : [];
    57:   }

    59:   function isValidThemeId(themeId){
    60:     const id = String(themeId||'').trim();
    61:     if(!id) return false;
    62:     return getThemeCatalog().some(t => String(t && t.id || '').trim() === id);
    63:   }

    66:     const id = String(themeId||'').trim();
    67:     const found = getThemeCatalog().find(t => String(t && t.id || '').trim() === id);
    68:     return found && found.name ? String(found.name) : id || 'Unknown Theme';

    71:   async function loadGlobalThemeSettings(force){

   175:         if(window.Store && Store.addLog){
   176:           const u = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;

   195:           </div>

   201:   try{

   204:       window.addEventListener('error', (ev)=>{

   211:       window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (ev)=>{

   214:           const err = (reason instanceof Error) ? reason : new Error(String(reason || 'Unhandled promise rejection'));
   215:           showFatalError(err);
   216:         }catch(_){ }
   217:       });
   218:     }
   219:   }catch(_){ }
   220: 
   221:   function fitText(el, minPx, maxPx){
   222:     try{
   223:       if(!el) return;
   224:       const min = Number(minPx||12);
   225:       const max = Number(maxPx||22);
   226:       el.style.fontSize = max + 'px';
   227:       void el.offsetHeight;
   228:       let cur = max;
   229:       while(cur > min && (el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight + 1 || el.scrollWidth > el.clientWidth + 1)){
   230:         cur -= 1;
   231:         el.style.fontSize = cur + 'px';
   232:       }
   233:     }catch(e){ }
   234:   }
   235: 
   236:   function applyTheme(themeId){
   237:     const themes = (Config && Array.isArray(Config.THEMES)) ? Config.THEMES : [];
   238:     const t = themes.find(x=>x.id===themeId) || themes[0];
   239:     if(!t) return;
   240: 
   241:     let modePref = (t.mode ? String(t.mode) : (String(t.id||'').includes('light') ? 'light' : 'dark'));
   242:     let mode = modePref;
   243:     if(modePref === 'auto'){
   244:       try{
   245:         mode = (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) ? 'dark' : 'light';
   246:       }catch(_){ mode = 'light'; }
   247:     }
   248: 
   249:     let tt = t;
   250:     if(modePref === 'auto' && mode === 'dark' && t.dark && typeof t.dark === 'object'){
   251:       try{ tt = Object.assign({}, t, t.dark); }catch(_){ tt = t; }
   252:     }
   253: 
   254:     const r = document.documentElement;
   255:     r.style.setProperty('--bg', tt.bg);
   256:     r.style.setProperty('--panel', tt.panel);
   257:     r.style.setProperty('--panel2', tt.panel2);
   258:     r.style.setProperty('--text', tt.text);
   259:     r.style.setProperty('--muted', tt.muted);
   260:     r.style.setProperty('--border', tt.border);
   261:     r.style.setProperty('--accent', tt.accent);
   262: 
   263:     try{
   264:       const hex = String(tt.accent||'').trim();
   265:       const m = /^#?([0-9a-fA-F]{6})$/.exec(hex);
   266:       if(m){
   267:         const s = m[1];
   268:         const rr = parseInt(s.slice(0,2), 16);
   269:         const gg = parseInt(s.slice(2,4), 16);
   270:         const bb = parseInt(s.slice(4,6), 16);
   271:         r.style.setProperty('--accent-rgb', `${rr},${gg},${bb}`);
   272:       }else{
   273:         r.style.setProperty('--accent-rgb', '74,163,255');
   274:       }
   275:     }catch(_){ r.style.setProperty('--accent-rgb', '74,163,255'); }
   276: 
   277:     r.style.setProperty('--bgRad1', tt.bgRad1);
   278:     r.style.setProperty('--bgRad3', tt.bgRad3);
   279: 
   280:     try{
   281:       if(tt.font) r.style.setProperty('--font', tt.font); else r.style.removeProperty('--font');
   282:       if(tt.radius) r.style.setProperty('--radius', tt.radius); else r.style.removeProperty('--radius');
   283:       if(tt.shadow) r.style.setProperty('--shadow', tt.shadow); else r.style.removeProperty('--shadow');
   284:     }catch(_){ }
   285:     try{
   286:       document.body.dataset.theme = t.id;
   287:       document.body.dataset.mode = mode;
   288:       document.documentElement.dataset.mode = mode;
   289: 
   290:       try{
   291:         r.style.setProperty("--surface-0", tt.bg);
   292:         r.style.setProperty("--surface-1", tt.panel);
   293:         r.style.setProperty("--surface-2", tt.panel2);
   294:         r.style.setProperty("--text-0", tt.text);
   295:         r.style.setProperty("--text-muted", tt.muted);
   296:         r.style.setProperty("--border-0", tt.border);
   297:         const isLight = mode === "light";
   298:         r.style.setProperty("--control-bg", isLight ? "rgba(255,255,255,.92)" : "rgba(18,24,38,.92)");
   299:         r.style.setProperty("--control-border", isLight ? "rgba(15,23,42,.12)" : tt.border);
   300:         r.style.setProperty("--control-text", tt.text);
   301:         r.style.setProperty("--overlay-scrim", isLight ? "rgba(15,23,42,.40)" : "rgba(0,0,0,.55)");
   302:         r.style.setProperty("--btn-glass-top", isLight ? "rgba(15,23,42,.04)" : "rgba(255,255,255,.08)");
   303:         r.style.setProperty("--btn-glass-bot", isLight ? "rgba(15,23,42,.02)" : "rgba(255,255,255,.02)");
   304:         r.style.setProperty("--accent-contrast", chooseAccentText(tt.accent));
   305:       }catch(_){ }
   306: 
   307:       try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("mums:themeApplied", { detail: { id: t.id, mode } })); }catch(_){ }
   308:       try{ if(typeof renderThemeAudit === "function") renderThemeAudit(); }catch(_){ }
   309: 
   310:     }catch(e){}
   311:   }
   312: 
   313:   function _parseColor(str){
   314:     const s = String(str||'').trim();
   315:     let m = /^#?([0-9a-f]{3})$/i.exec(s);
   316:     if(m){
   317:       const h = m[1];
   318:       return [int(h[0]*2), int(h[1]*2), int(h[2]*2)];
   319:     }
   320:     m = /^#?([0-9a-f]{6})$/i.exec(s);
   321:     if(m){
   322:       const h = m[1];
   323:       return [int(h.slice(0,2)), int(h.slice(2,4)), int(h.slice(4,6))];
   324:     }
   325:     m = /^rgba?\(([^)]+)\)$/i.exec(s);
   326:     if(m){
   327:       const parts = m[1].split(',').map(x=>parseFloat(x));
   328:       if(parts.length>=3) return [clamp(parts[0]), clamp(parts[1]), clamp(parts[2])];
   329:     }
   330:     return [255,255,255];
   331: 
   332:     function int(hex){ return parseInt(hex,16); }
   333:     function clamp(n){ n = Number(n); if(!Number.isFinite(n)) return 0; return Math.max(0, Math.min(255, n)); }
   334:   }
   335: 
   336:   function applySettingsVisibility(user){
   337:     try{
   338:       if(!user || !window.Store || !Store.getRoleSettingsFeatures) return;
   339: 
   340:       const rawRole = String(user.role||'').trim();
   341:       const role = (Store && Store.normalizeRole) ? Store.normalizeRole(rawRole)
   342:         : rawRole.toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_').replace(/-+/g,'_');
   343: 
   344:       const all = Store.getRoleSettingsFeatures();
   345:       const feats = (all && all[role]) ? all[role] : null;
   346: 
   347:       const hasAny = feats && typeof feats==='object' && Object.keys(feats).length>0;
   348:       if(!hasAny){
   349:         document.querySelectorAll('.settings-card').forEach(c=>{ try{ c.style.display=''; }catch(_){ } });
   350:         return;
   351:       }
   352: 
   353:       const map = {
   354:         profile: 'openProfileBtn',
   355:         sound: 'openSoundBtn',
   356:         theme: 'openThemeBtn',
   357:         quicklinks: 'openLinksBtn',
   358:         worldclocks: 'openClocksBtn',
   359:         cursor: 'openCursorBtn',
   360:         sidebar: 'openSidebarBtn',
   361:         datatools: 'openDataToolsBtn',
   362:       };
   363: 
   364:       Object.keys(map).forEach(key=>{
   365:         const allowed = (key in feats) ? !!feats[key] : true;
   366:         const btn = document.getElementById(map[key]);
   367:         if(!btn) return;
   368:         const card = btn.closest ? btn.closest('.settings-card') : null;
   369:         if(card) card.style.display = allowed ? '' : 'none';
   370:       });
   371:     }catch(e){ }
   372:   };
   373: 
   374:   function bindSystemCheckModal(currentUser){
   375:     if(window.__mumsSystemCheck && window.__mumsSystemCheck.bound) return;
   376: 
   377:     const els = {
   378:       state: document.getElementById('syscheckState'),
   379:       countdown: document.getElementById('syscheckCountdown'),
   380:       fill: document.getElementById('syscheckFill'),
   381:       hint: document.getElementById('syscheckHint'),
   382:       list: document.getElementById('syscheckList'),
   383:       critPill: document.getElementById('syscheckCriticalPill'),
   384:       minorPill: document.getElementById('syscheckMinorPill'),
   385:       runBtn: document.getElementById('syscheckRunBtn'),
   386:       clearBtn: document.getElementById('syscheckClearResolvedBtn'),
   387:     };
   388:     if(!els.runBtn || !els.list) return;
   389: 
   390:     let running = false;
   391:     let timer = null;
   392:     let remaining = 0;
   393: 
   394:     function setState(s){ if(els.state) els.state.textContent = s; }
   395:     function setHint(s){ if(els.hint) els.hint.textContent = s; }
   396:     function setProgress(p){ if(els.fill) els.fill.style.width = `${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, p))}%`; }
   397: 
   398:     function renderFindings(findings){
   399:       const crit = findings.filter(f=>f.severity==='Critical').length;
   400:       const minor = findings.filter(f=>f.severity==='Minor').length;
   401:       if(els.critPill) els.critPill.textContent = `Critical: ${crit}`;
   402:       if(els.minorPill) els.minorPill.textContent = `Minor: ${minor}`;
   403:       els.list.innerHTML = findings.map(f=>{
   404:         const cls = (f.severity==='Critical') ? 'crit' : 'minor';
   405:         const sev = (f.severity==='Critical') ? `<span class="sev crit">CRITICAL</span>` : `<span class="sev minor">MINOR</span>`;
   406:         const rec = f.recommendation ? `<div class="small" style="margin-top:8px"><b>Recommendation:</b> ${UI.esc(f.recommendation)}</div>` : '';
   407:         const impact = f.impact ? `<div class="small muted" style="margin-top:6px">${UI.esc(f.impact)}</div>` : '';
   408:         const detail = f.details ? `<details style="margin-top:10px"><summary class="small" style="cursor:pointer;font-weight:900">Details</summary><div class="small muted" style="margin-top:8px;white-space:pre-wrap">${UI.esc(String(f.details))}</div></details>` : '';
   409:         return `<div class="syscheck-item ${cls}"><div class="t"><div><div style="font-weight:950">${UI.esc(f.title||'Finding')}</div>${impact}</div>${sev}</div>${rec}${detail}</div>`;
   410:       }).join('');
   411:     }
   412: 
   413:     function reset(){
   414:       running = false;
   415:       if(timer){ clearInterval(timer); timer=null; }
   416:       remaining = 0;
   417:       if(els.countdown) els.countdown.textContent = '—';
   418:       setState('Ready');
   419:       setHint('Press Run to start diagnostics.');
   420:       setProgress(0);
   421:       renderFindings([]);
   422:     }
   423: 
   424:     function makeFinding(severity, title, impact, recommendation, details){
   425:       return { severity, title, impact, recommendation, details };
   426:     }
   427: 
   428:     async function run(){
   429:       if(running) return;
   430:       running = true;
   431:       setState('Running');
   432:       setHint('Initializing checks...');
   433:       setProgress(0);
   434:       renderFindings([]);
   435: 
   436:       const findings = [];
   437:       const steps = [];
   438:       const addStep = (label, fn)=> steps.push({ label, fn });
   439: 
   440:       addStep('Core globals', ()=>{
   441:         const missing = [];
   442:         ['Config','Store','UI','Auth','Pages'].forEach(k=>{ if(!window[k]) missing.push(k); });
   443:         if(missing.length){
   444:           findings.push(makeFinding('Critical', 'Missing core globals', 'The app may fail to route or render pages.', 'Verify script load order and ensure all bundled JS files are present.', `Missing: ${missing.join(', ')}`));
   445:         }
   446:       });
   447: 
   448:       addStep('Navigation integrity', ()=>{
   449:         try{
   450:           const nav = (window.Config && Config.NAV) ? Config.NAV : [];
   451:           const flat = [];
   452:           (nav||[]).forEach(i=>{ if(i && i.children) i.children.forEach(c=>flat.push(c.id)); else if(i) flat.push(i.id); });
   453:           if(flat.includes('gmt_overview')){
   454:             findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'GMT Overview is still present in the main navigation', 'Users may access the page outside Settings > World Clocks.', 'Remove the GMT Overview entry from Config.NAV.', 'Config.NAV contains gmt_overview'));
   455:           }
   456:         }catch(e){
   457:           findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'Navigation integrity check failed', 'Unable to validate navigation items.', 'Review Config.NAV structure.', String(e)));
   458:         }
   459:       });
   460: 
   461:       addStep('User record sanity', ()=>{
   462:         try{
   463:           const users = (Store && Store.getUsers) ? Store.getUsers() : [];
   464:           const ids = new Set();
   465:           const dup = [];
   466:           (users||[]).forEach(u=>{ if(!u) return; const id = String(u.id||''); if(ids.has(id)) dup.push(id); ids.add(id); });
   467:           if(dup.length){
   468:             findings.push(makeFinding('Critical', 'Duplicate user IDs found', 'May cause permission and routing inconsistencies.', 'Clean local storage users list and ensure user deletion is permanent.', `Duplicate IDs: ${dup.join(', ')}`));
   469:           }
   470:           const sa = (users||[]).find(u=>String(u.role||'').toUpperCase()==='SUPER_ADMIN');
   471:           if(sa && (sa.teamId || sa.shiftId)){
   472:             findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'Super Admin still has team/shift assigned', 'UI may show incorrect shift context for the Super Admin account.', 'Clear teamId/shiftId for SUPER_ADMIN in the users store.', JSON.stringify({teamId:sa.teamId, shiftId:sa.shiftId})));
   473:           }
   474:         }catch(e){
   475:           findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'User record sanity check failed', 'Unable to validate users store.', 'Review users storage schema.', String(e)));
   476:         }
   477:       });
   478: 
   479:       addStep('World Clocks config', ()=>{
   480:         try{
   481:           const list = (Store && Store.getWorldClocks) ? Store.getWorldClocks() : [];
   482:           if(!Array.isArray(list)){
   483:             findings.push(makeFinding('Critical', 'World clocks config is not an array', 'Clocks modal and bottom bar may fail to render.', 'Reset world clocks config in local storage and re-save via Settings.', typeof list));
   484:             return;
   485:           }
   486:           const offs = (window.WorldClockUtils && Array.isArray(WorldClockUtils.GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES)) ? WorldClockUtils.GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES : null;
   487:           if(!offs || !offs.length){
   488:             findings.push(makeFinding('Critical', 'GMT offsets list missing', 'GMT Overview and pinned offset clocks may fail.', 'Ensure WorldClockUtils.GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES is defined (app.js) and loaded before any GMT pages.', 'WorldClockUtils.GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES is missing/empty'));
   489:           }
   490: 
   491:           if(window.WorldClockUtils && typeof WorldClockUtils.formatTimePartsForClock==='function'){
   492:             const sample = list[0] || { timeZone:'UTC', offsetMinutes:0 };
   493:             try{ WorldClockUtils.formatTimePartsForClock(new Date(), sample); }catch(ex){
   494:               findings.push(makeFinding('Critical', 'World clock formatter threw an exception', 'Clock rendering may crash pages.', 'Validate timeZone / offsetMinutes values in world clocks settings.', String(ex)));
   495:             }
   496:           }
   497:         }catch(e){
   498:           findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'World clocks check failed', 'Unable to validate world clocks configuration.', 'Review Store.getWorldClocks and clock schemas.', String(e)));
   499:         }
   500:       });
   501: 
   502:       addStep('Page smoke tests', async ()=>{
   503:         try{
   504:           const pageIds = Object.keys(window.Pages||{});
   505:           const allow = new Set(['dashboard','logs','gmt_overview','master_schedule','my_schedule']);
   506:           const root = document.createElement('div');
   507:           root.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:-99999px;top:-99999px;width:1200px;height:800px;overflow:hidden;';
   508:           document.body.appendChild(root);
   509:           for(const id of pageIds){
   510:             if(!allow.has(id)) continue;
   511:             root.innerHTML = '';
   512:             try{ await Promise.resolve(window.Pages[id](root)); }
   513:             catch(ex){
   514:               findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', `Smoke test failed: ${id}`, 'This page may throw errors for some users.', 'Open Activity Logs for the stack trace and fix the offending module.', String(ex && (ex.stack||ex))));
   515:             }
   516:           }
   517:           root.remove();
   518:         }catch(e){
   519:           findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', 'Page smoke tests failed', 'Unable to run render smoke tests.', 'Check that Pages registry exists and functions are callable.', String(e)));
   520:         }
   521:       });
   522: 
   523:       remaining = Math.max(6, Math.ceil(steps.length * 1.2));
   524:       if(els.countdown) els.countdown.textContent = String(remaining);
   525:       if(timer) clearInterval(timer);
   526:       timer = setInterval(()=>{
   527:         remaining = Math.max(0, remaining-1);
   528:         if(els.countdown) els.countdown.textContent = String(remaining);
   529:         if(remaining<=0 && timer){ clearInterval(timer); timer=null; }
   530:       }, 1000);
   531: 
   532:       for(let i=0;i<steps.length;i++){
   533:         const step = steps[i];
   534:         setHint(`Running: ${step.label} (${i+1}/${steps.length})`);
   535:         try{ await Promise.resolve(step.fn()); }
   536:         catch(e){ findings.push(makeFinding('Minor', `System check step failed: ${step.label}`, 'A diagnostics step threw unexpectedly.', 'Review the system check implementation and ensure it is safe for offline use.', String(e && (e.stack||e)))); }
   537:         setProgress(Math.round(((i+1)/steps.length)*100));
   538:         await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r, 150));
   539:       }
   540: 
   541:       renderFindings(findings);
   542:       const critCount = findings.filter(f=>f.severity==='Critical').length;
   543:       setState(critCount===0 ? 'Completed' : 'Completed with issues');
   544:       setHint(critCount===0 ? 'No critical findings. You can clear resolved error logs now.' : 'Resolve critical findings before clearing error logs.');
   545: 
   546:       try{
   547:         if(critCount===0){
   548:           const okTs = Date.now();
   549:           localStorage.setItem('mums_syscheck_last_ok_ts', String(okTs));
   550:         }
   551:       }catch(_){ }
   552: 
   553:       try{
   554:         if(critCount===0 && window.Store && Store.autoFixLogs){
   555:           const cut = Number(localStorage.getItem('mums_syscheck_last_ok_ts')||0) || Number(window.__mumsBootTs||0) || Date.now();
   556:           Store.autoFixLogs({ clearResolvedBefore: cut, smartClearResolved: true });
   557:         }
   558:       }catch(_){ }
   559: 
   560:       running = false;
   561:     }
   562: 
   563:     els.runBtn.onclick = run;
   564:     if(els.clearBtn){
   565:       els.clearBtn.onclick = ()=>{
   566:         try{
   567:           const cut = Number(localStorage.getItem('mums_syscheck_last_ok_ts')||0) || Number(window.__mumsBootTs||0) || Date.now();
   568:           if(window.Store && Store.autoFixLogs) Store.autoFixLogs({ clearResolvedBefore: cut, smartClearResolved: true });
   569:           UI.toast && UI.toast('Resolved errors cleared from Activity Logs.');
   570:         }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
   571:       };
   572:     }
   573: 
   574:     window.__mumsSystemCheck = { bound:true, reset, run };
   575:     reset();
   576:   }
   577: 
   578:   function _relLum(rgb){
   579:     const srgb = rgb.map(v=>v/255).map(v=> v<=0.03928 ? v/12.92 : Math.pow((v+0.055)/1.055, 2.4));
   580:     return 0.2126*srgb[0] + 0.7152*srgb[1] + 0.0722*srgb[2];
   581:   }
   582: 
   583:   function _contrast(c1, c2){
   584:     const L1 = _relLum(_parseColor(c1));
   585:     const L2 = _relLum(_parseColor(c2));
   586:     const hi = Math.max(L1,L2);
   587:     const lo = Math.min(L1,L2);
   588:     return (hi+0.05)/(lo+0.05);
   589:   }
   590: 
   591:   function chooseAccentText(accent){
   592:     const a = String(accent||'');
   593:     const onWhite = _contrast('#ffffff', a);
   594:     const onDark = _contrast('#0b1220', a);
   595:     return (onDark > onWhite) ? '#0b1220' : '#ffffff';
   596:   }
   597: 
   598:   function renderThemeAudit(){
   599:     const audit = document.getElementById('themeAudit');
   600:     const inner = document.getElementById('themeAuditInner');
   601:     if(!audit || !inner) return;
   602: 
   603:     const user = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
   604:     const can = (window.Config && Config.can) ? Config.can(user, 'manage_release_notes') : false;
   605:     if(!can){
   606:       audit.style.display = 'none';
   607:       inner.innerHTML = '';
   608:       return;
   609:     }
   610: 
   611:     const cs = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
   612:     const bg = cs.getPropertyValue('--bg').trim() || '#0b1220';
   613:     const panel = cs.getPropertyValue('--panel').trim() || '#121c2f';
   614:     const text = cs.getPropertyValue('--text').trim() || '#eaf2ff';
   615:     const muted = cs.getPropertyValue('--muted').trim() || '#a8b6d6';
   616:     const border = cs.getPropertyValue('--border').trim() || 'rgba(255,255,255,.08)';
   617:     const accent = cs.getPropertyValue('--accent').trim() || '#4aa3ff';
   618: 
   619:     const rows = [
   620:       { k: 'Text on Panel', v: _contrast(text, panel), min: 4.5 },
   621:       { k: 'Muted on Panel', v: _contrast(muted, panel), min: 3.0 },
   622:       { k: 'Text on Background', v: _contrast(text, bg), min: 4.5 },
   623:       { k: 'Accent on Panel', v: _contrast(accent, panel), min: 3.0 },
   624:       { k: 'Border on Panel', v: _contrast(border, panel), min: 1.8 },
   625:     ];
   626: 
   627:     inner.innerHTML = `
   628:       <div class="theme-lab-grid">
   629:         ${rows.map(row=>{
   630:           const ratio = (Math.round(row.v*100)/100).toFixed(2);
   631:           const b = (row.v >= row.min) ? {label:'✅ PASS', col:'#10b981', bg:'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)'}
   632:                   : (row.v >= Math.max(3.0, row.min)) ? {label:'⚠️ WARN', col:'#fbbf24', bg:'rgba(245,158,11,0.1)'}
   633:                   : {label:'❌ FAIL', col:'#ef4444', bg:'rgba(239,68,68,0.1)'};
   634:           return `
   635:             <div class="theme-lab-card">
   636:                <div class="theme-lab-copy">
   637:                   <div class="theme-lab-k">${UI.esc(row.k)}</div>
   638:                   <div class="theme-lab-v">Ratio: ${ratio}:1</div>
   639:                </div>
   640:                <div class="theme-lab-status" style="background:${b.bg}; color:${b.col}; border-color:${b.col}; box-shadow:0 0 15px ${b.bg};">
   641:                   ${b.label}
   642:                </div>
   643:             </div>
   644:           `;
   645:         }).join('')}
   646:       </div>
   647:       <div class="theme-lab-guide small muted">
   648:         <strong>Diagnostic Guidance:</strong> If any parameter fails WCAG 2.1 AA standards, adjust your <code>Config.THEMES</code> definitions. Muted text requires 3.0:1, while standard text requires 4.5:1 against the active panel background.
   649:       </div>
   650:     `;
   651: 
   652:     audit.style.display = 'block';
   653:   }
   654: 
   655:   // =========================================================================
   656:   // BOSS THUNTER: ULTIMATE COMPACT BENTO MANAGER + API SYNC
   657:   // =========================================================================
   658:   function renderThemeGrid(){
   659:     const grid = document.getElementById('themeGrid');
   660:     if(!grid) return;
   661: 
   662:     const user = (window.Auth && window.Auth.getUser) ? window.Auth.getUser() : null;
   663:     const rawRole = String(user?.role || '').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_');
   664:     const saRole = (window.Config && Config.ROLES && Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN) ? String(Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN).toUpperCase() : 'SUPER_ADMIN';
   665:     const isSA = (rawRole === saRole) || (rawRole === 'SUPER_ADMIN');
   666: 
   667:     // ENSURE DATA IS LOADED BEFORE RENDERING UI
   668:     if (!__themeMetaLoaded) {
   669:       if (!__themeMetaLoading) {
   670:         grid.innerHTML = '<div class="muted" style="padding:40px; text-align:center; font-size:14px; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;"><div class="mbx-spinner" style="margin-right:10px;"></div> Syncing Global Theme Policy...</div>';
   671:         loadThemeMeta().then(() => renderThemeGrid());
   672:       }
   673:       return;
   674:     }
   675: 
   676:     const cur = resolveEffectiveThemeForUser();
   677:     const rawThemes = getThemeCatalog();
   678:     const globalDefault = String(__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.defaultTheme || '').trim() || 'apex';
   679: 
   680:     // BULLETPROOF FILTERING LOGIC
   681:     const visibleThemes = rawThemes.filter(t => {
   682:         const m = __themeMeta[t.id] || {};
   683:         if (m.deleted) return false;
   684:         if (m.hidden) {
   685:             if (!isSA) return false;
   686:             if (isSA && !__themeEditMode) return false;
   687:         }
   688:         return true;
   689:     });
   690: 
   691:     const summaryHtml = `
   692:       <div class="th-summary">
   693:         <div class="th-summary-item">
   694:           <span class="th-summary-label">Your Active Theme</span>
   695:           <span class="th-summary-value">${UI.esc(getThemeName(cur))}</span>
   696:         </div>
   697:         <div class="th-summary-item">
   698:           <span class="th-summary-label">Org Default</span>
   699:           <span class="th-summary-value">${UI.esc(getThemeName(globalDefault))}</span>
   700:         </div>
   701:       </div>
   702:     `;
   703: 
   704:     // SUPER ADMIN CONTROL BAR
   705:     const forcedThemeActive      = !!(__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedTheme);
   706:     const forcedBrightnessActive = !!(__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedBrightness);
   707:     const forcedAt               = (__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedAt) || null;
   708:     const forcedByName           = (__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedByName) || null;
   709:     const forcedBothActive       = forcedThemeActive && forcedBrightnessActive;
   710: 
   711:     const adminBarHtml = isSA ? `
   712:       <div class="th-toolbar">
   713:         <div class="th-toolbar-controls">
   714:           <div class="th-global-default-panel">
   715:             <label class="small muted" for="globalDefaultThemeSelect">Global Default Theme</label>
   716:             <div class="th-global-default-row">
   717:               <select class="input" id="globalDefaultThemeSelect">
   718:                 ${rawThemes.filter(t => !(__themeMeta[t.id] && __themeMeta[t.id].deleted)).map(t => `<option value="${UI.esc(t.id)}" ${t.id === globalDefault ? 'selected' : ''}>${UI.esc(t.name || t.id)}</option>`).join('')}
   719:               </select>
   720:               <button class="btn-glass btn-glass-primary" id="saveGlobalDefaultThemeBtn">Save Default</button>
   721:             </div>
   722:             <div class="small" id="globalDefaultThemeStatus" aria-live="polite" style="display:none"></div>
   723:           </div>
