   724:           <div class="th-toolbar-actions">
   725:             <button class="btn-glass ${__themeEditMode ? 'btn-glass-danger' : 'btn-glass-primary'}" id="toggleThemeEditBtn">
   726:               ${__themeEditMode ? '✅ Done Editing' : '⚙️ Manage Themes'}
   727:             </button>
   728:           </div>
   729:         </div>
   730: 
   731:         <!-- ── SUPER ADMIN: Force All Users panel ─────────────────────── -->
   732:         <div class="th-force-panel" style="margin-top:14px;padding:14px 16px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.22);border-radius:10px;">
   733:           <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
   734:             <div>
   735:               <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#C9A84C;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">
   736:                 <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
   737:                 Force All Users — APEX + 130% Brightness
   738:               </div>
   739:               <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.7);line-height:1.5;max-width:480px;">
   740:                 Overwrites every user's localStorage theme and brightness on their next page load.
   741:                 Fixes accounts stuck on dark/dim setups. Cannot be undone per-user — they can re-customize after.
   742:               </div>
   743:               ${forcedBothActive ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:#C9A84C;margin-top:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
   744:                 <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#C9A84C" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
   745:                 <strong>ACTIVE</strong> — forced on${forcedByName ? ' by ' + UI.esc(forcedByName) : ''}${forcedAt ? ' · ' + new Date(forcedAt).toLocaleString() : ''}
   746:               </div>` : '<div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);margin-top:5px;">Status: Not currently forced</div>'}
   747:             </div>
   748:             <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-width:160px;">
   749:               <button class="btn-glass btn-glass-primary" id="forceAllUsersApexBtn"
   750:                 style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.4);color:#C9A84C;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;padding:9px 18px;">
   751:                 🛡️ ${forcedBothActive ? 'Re-Force All Users' : 'Force All Users'}
   752:               </button>
   753:               ${forcedBothActive ? `<button class="btn-glass" id="clearForceAllBtn"
   754:                 style="font-size:11px;padding:6px 14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);">
   755:                 ✕ Clear Force
   756:               </button>` : ''}
   757:             </div>
   758:           </div>
   759:           <div id="forceAllUsersStatus" style="display:none;font-size:11px;margin-top:8px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;"></div>
   760:         </div>
   761: 
   762:       </div>
   763:     ` : summaryHtml;
   764: 
   765:     // BUILD COMPACT BENTO CARDS
   766:     const cardsHtml = visibleThemes.map(t => {
   767:       const m = __themeMeta[t.id] || {};
   768:       const active = t.id === cur;
   769:       const isHidden = !!m.hidden;
   770:       const isGlobalDefault = t.id === globalDefault;
   771: 
   772:       const mode = String(t.mode || '').trim() || 'N/A';
   773:       const adminHtml = `
   774:           <div class="th-admin-bar">
   775:               <button class="th-admin-btn" data-hide-theme="${UI.esc(t.id)}" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
   776:                   ${isHidden ? '👁️ Unhide' : '👀 Hide'}
   777:               </button>
   778:               <button class="th-admin-btn del" data-del-theme="${UI.esc(t.id)}" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
   779:                   🗑️ Delete
   780:               </button>
   781:           </div>
   782:       `;
   783: 
   784:       return `
   785:         <div class="th-card ${active?'is-active':''} ${isHidden?'is-hidden':''} ${__themeEditMode?'show-admin th-jiggle':''}" data-theme="${UI.esc(t.id)}" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Apply theme ${UI.esc(t.name || t.id)}">
   786:            <div class="th-swatch" style="--t-bg:${t.bg || '#0b1220'}; --t-panel:${t.panel || '#121c2f'}; --t-acc:${t.accent || '#4aa3ff'};"></div>
   787:            <div class="th-info">
   788:               <div class="th-title">${UI.esc(t.name || 'Untitled Theme')}</div>
   789:               <div class="th-meta">ID: ${UI.esc(t.id || 'n/a')}</div>
   790:               <div class="th-mode">Mode: ${UI.esc(mode.toUpperCase())}</div>
   791:               <div class="th-desc">${UI.esc(t.description || 'Enterprise-ready appearance profile.')}</div>
   792:               <div class="th-badges">
   793:                 ${active ? '<div class="th-badge th-badge-active">ACTIVE</div>' : ''}
   794:                 ${isGlobalDefault ? '<div class="th-badge th-badge-default">GLOBAL DEFAULT</div>' : ''}
   795:                 ${isHidden ? '<div class="th-badge th-badge-hidden">HIDDEN</div>' : ''}
   796:               </div>
   797:             </div>
   798:             ${isSA ? adminHtml : ''}
   799:         </div>
   800:       `;
   801:     }).join('') || '<div class="muted th-empty">No themes available.</div>';
   802: 
   803:     grid.innerHTML = adminBarHtml + `<div class="th-grid">${cardsHtml}</div>`;
   804: 
   805:     // EVENT BINDINGS
   806:     const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('toggleThemeEditBtn');
   807:     if(toggleBtn) {
   808:         toggleBtn.onclick = () => {
   809:             __themeEditMode = !__themeEditMode;
   810:             renderThemeGrid();
   811:         };
   812:     }
   813: 
   814:     // ── Force All Users button ─────────────────────────────────────────
   815:     const forceAllBtn = document.getElementById('forceAllUsersApexBtn');
   816:     if(forceAllBtn){
   817:       forceAllBtn.onclick = async () => {
   818:         const statusEl = document.getElementById('forceAllUsersStatus');
   819:         const token = getBearerToken();
   820:         if(!token){ if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='Session expired.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:#f85149;'; } return; }
   821:         forceAllBtn.disabled = true;
   822:         forceAllBtn.textContent = '⏳ Forcing...';
   823:         if(statusEl){ statusEl.style.display='none'; }
   824:         try{
   825:           const res = await fetch('/api/settings/global-theme', {
   826:             method: 'POST',
   827:             headers: { 'Content-Type':'application/json', 'Authorization':`Bearer ${token}` },
   828:             body: JSON.stringify({ action:'force_all', themeId:'apex', brightness:130 })
   829:           });
   830:           const data = await res.json().catch(()=>({}));
   831:           if(!res.ok || !data.ok) throw new Error(data.message || data.error || `HTTP ${res.status}`);
   832:           __globalThemeSettings = {
   833:             defaultTheme:'apex', brightness:130,
   834:             forcedTheme:true, forcedBrightness:true,
   835:             forcedAt: data.forcedAt, forcedByName: data.forcedByName
   836:           };
   837:           __globalThemeLoaded = true;
   838:           if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✓ All users will get APEX + 130% brightness on next page load.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(63,185,80,.1);color:#3fb950;border-radius:5px;'; }
   839:           renderThemeGrid();
   840:         }catch(err){
   841:           if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✗ Error: '+String(err&&err.message||err); statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;border-radius:5px;'; }
   842:         }finally{
   843:           forceAllBtn.disabled = false;
   844:           forceAllBtn.textContent = '🛡️ Force All Users';
   845:         }
   846:       };
   847:     }
   848: 
   849:     // ── Clear Force button ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   850:     const clearForceBtn = document.getElementById('clearForceAllBtn');
   851:     if(clearForceBtn){
   852:       clearForceBtn.onclick = async () => {
   853:         const statusEl = document.getElementById('forceAllUsersStatus');
   854:         const token = getBearerToken();
   855:         if(!token) return;
   856:         clearForceBtn.disabled = true;
   857:         try{
   858:           const res = await fetch('/api/settings/global-theme', {
   859:             method: 'POST',
   860:             headers: { 'Content-Type':'application/json', 'Authorization':`Bearer ${token}` },
   861:             body: JSON.stringify({ forcedTheme:false, forcedBrightness:false })
   862:           });
   863:           const data = await res.json().catch(()=>({}));
   864:           if(!res.ok || !data.ok) throw new Error(data.message||data.error||`HTTP ${res.status}`);
   865:           __globalThemeSettings = Object.assign({}, __globalThemeSettings, { forcedTheme:false, forcedBrightness:false, forcedAt:null, forcedByName:null });
   866:           if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='Force cleared — users can now freely customize.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(139,148,158,.1);color:#8b949e;border-radius:5px;'; }
   867:           renderThemeGrid();
   868:         }catch(err){
   869:           if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✗ Error: '+String(err&&err.message||err); statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;border-radius:5px;'; }
   870:         }finally{ clearForceBtn.disabled = false; }
   871:       };
   872:     }
   873: 
   874:     const saveDefaultBtn = document.getElementById('saveGlobalDefaultThemeBtn');
   875:     if(saveDefaultBtn){
   876:       saveDefaultBtn.onclick = async () => {
   877:         const select = document.getElementById('globalDefaultThemeSelect');
   878:         const status = document.getElementById('globalDefaultThemeStatus');
   879:         const selectedTheme = String(select && select.value || '').trim();
   880:         if(!isValidThemeId(selectedTheme)){
   881:           if(status){
   882:             status.style.display = 'block';
   883:             status.style.color = '#fda4af';
   884:             status.textContent = 'Invalid theme selection.';
   885:           }
   886:           return;
   887:         }
   888: 
   889:         const token = getBearerToken();
   890:         if(!token){
   891:           if(status){
   892:             status.style.display = 'block';
   893:             status.style.color = '#fda4af';
   894:             status.textContent = 'Session expired. Please login again.';
   895:           }
   896:           return;
   897:         }
   898: 
   899:         saveDefaultBtn.disabled = true;
   900:         saveDefaultBtn.textContent = 'Saving...';
   901:         if(status){
   902:           status.style.display = 'block';
   903:           status.style.color = '#93c5fd';
   904:           status.textContent = 'Syncing global default theme...';
   905:         }
   906: 
   907:         try{
   908:           const res = await fetch('/api/settings/global-theme', {
   909:             method: 'POST',
   910:             headers: {
   911:               'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   912:               'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`
   913:             },
   914:             body: JSON.stringify({ themeId: selectedTheme })
   915:           });
   916:           const data = await res.json().catch(()=>({}));
   917:           if(!res.ok || !data.ok) throw new Error(data.message || data.error || `HTTP ${res.status}`);
   918: 
   919:           __globalThemeSettings = { defaultTheme: selectedTheme };
   920:           __globalThemeLoaded = true;
   921: 
   922:           if(status){
   923:             status.style.color = '#34d399';
   924:             status.textContent = `Global default set to ${getThemeName(selectedTheme)}.`;
   925:           }
   926:           renderThemeGrid();
   927:         }catch(e){
   928:           if(status){
   929:             status.style.color = '#fda4af';
   930:             status.textContent = `Failed to save: ${String(e && e.message || e)}`;
   931:           }
   932:         }finally{
   933:           saveDefaultBtn.disabled = false;
   934:           saveDefaultBtn.textContent = 'Save Default';
   935:         }
   936:       };
   937:     }
   938: 
   939:     grid.querySelectorAll('.th-card').forEach(tile => {
   940:       const pick = (e) => {
   941:         if(__themeEditMode) return;
   942:         const id = tile.dataset.theme;
   943:         try{ if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_THEME', { id:id }); else Store.setTheme(id); }catch(_){ try{ Store.setTheme(id); }catch(__){} }
   944:         try{ applyTheme(id); }catch(_){ }
   945:         renderThemeGrid();
   946:       };
   947:       tile.onclick = pick;
   948:       tile.onkeydown = (e)=>{ if(e.key==='Enter' || e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); pick(e); } };
   949:     });
   950: 
   951:     if (isSA) {
   952:         grid.querySelectorAll('[data-hide-theme]').forEach(btn => {
   953:             btn.onclick = async (e) => {
   954:                 e.stopPropagation();
   955:                 if(btn.dataset.busy) return;
   956: 
   957:                 const tid = btn.getAttribute('data-hide-theme');
   958:                 const nextMeta = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(__themeMeta));
   959:                 nextMeta[tid] = nextMeta[tid] || {};
   960:                 nextMeta[tid].hidden = !nextMeta[tid].hidden;
   961: 
   962:                 btn.dataset.busy = '1';
   963:                 const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
   964:                 btn.innerHTML = '<span class="mbx-spinner"></span> Sync...';
   965: 
   966:                 const res = await saveThemeMeta(nextMeta);
   967:                 if(!res.ok){
   968:                     try{ UI.toast('Sync failed: ' + res.message, 'error'); }catch(_){}
   969:                     btn.innerHTML = originalText;
   970:                     delete btn.dataset.busy;
   971:                     return;
   972:                 }
   973:                 renderThemeGrid();
   974:             };
   975:         });
   976: 
   977:         grid.querySelectorAll('[data-del-theme]').forEach(btn => {
   978:             btn.onclick = async (e) => {
   979:                 e.stopPropagation();
   980:                 if(btn.dataset.busy) return;
   981: 
   982:                 const tid = btn.getAttribute('data-del-theme');
   983:                 const ok = await UI.confirm({ title: 'Delete Theme Globally', message: 'Hide and delete this theme for all users?', okText: 'Yes, Delete', danger: true });
   984:                 if (!ok) return;
   985: 
   986:                 const nextMeta = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(__themeMeta));
   987:                 nextMeta[tid] = nextMeta[tid] || {};
   988:                 nextMeta[tid].deleted = true;
   989: 
   990:                 btn.dataset.busy = '1';
   991:                 const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
   992:                 btn.innerHTML = '<span class="mbx-spinner"></span> Purging...';
   993: 
   994:                 if(cur === tid) {
   995:                     const fallbackId = isValidThemeId(globalDefault) ? globalDefault : resolveEffectiveThemeForUser();
   996:                     Store.dispatch ? Store.dispatch('UPDATE_THEME', { id:fallbackId }) : Store.setTheme(fallbackId);
   997:                     applyTheme(fallbackId);
   998:                 }
   999: 
  1000:                 const res = await saveThemeMeta(nextMeta);
  1001:                 if(!res.ok){
  1002:                     try{ UI.toast('Delete sync failed: ' + res.message, 'error'); }catch(_){}
  1003:                     btn.innerHTML = originalText;
  1004:                     delete btn.dataset.busy;
  1005:                     return;
  1006:                 }
  1007:                 renderThemeGrid();
  1008:             };
  1009:         });
  1010:     }
  1011: 
  1012:     try{ renderThemeAudit(); }catch(_){ }
  1013:   }
  1014: 
  1015: 
  1016:   // Bottom quick links
  1017:   function normalizeUrl(u){
  1018:     const s = String(u||'').trim();
  1019:     if(!s) return '';
  1020:     if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(s)) return s;
  1021:     return 'https://' + s;
  1022:   }
  1023: 
  1024:   function renderQuickLinksBar(){
  1025:     const wrap = document.getElementById('quickLinksInner');
  1026:     if(!wrap) return;
  1027:     const links = Store.getQuickLinks();
  1028: 
  1029:     wrap.innerHTML = links.map((l, idx)=>{
  1030:       const has = !!(l && l.url);
  1031:       const label = String(l?.label||'').trim();
  1032:       const url = normalizeUrl(l?.url||'');
  1033:       const glow = String(l?.glowColor||l?.glow||'').trim();
  1034:       const glowCss = has ? (glow || 'var(--accent)') : '';
  1035:       const tip = (label || url || `Link ${idx+1}`).trim();
  1036:       const num = String(idx+1);
  1037:       const shownLabel = label || '';
  1038:       return `
  1039:         <div class="qitem" data-idx="${idx}" ${has?`data-has="1"`:''} data-tip="${UI.esc(tip)}">
  1040:           <div class="qlabel">${UI.esc(shownLabel)}</div>
  1041:           <button class="qcircle ${has?'filled glowing':''}" ${has?`style="--glow:${UI.esc(glowCss)}"`:''} type="button" data-idx="${idx}" aria-label="Quick link ${idx+1}">
  1042:             <span class="qtxt">${UI.esc(num)}</span>
  1043:           </button>
  1044:         </div>
  1045:       `;
  1046:     }).join('');
  1047: 
  1048:     wrap.querySelectorAll('.qcircle').forEach(btn=>{
  1049:       btn.onclick = ()=>{
  1050:         const idx = Number(btn.dataset.idx||0);
  1051:         const links = Store.getQuickLinks();
  1052:         const l = links[idx] || {};
  1053:         const url = normalizeUrl(l.url);
  1054:         if(!url) return;
  1055:         window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener');
  1056:       };
  1057:     });
  1058:   }
  1059: 
  1060:   const CLOCK_STYLES = [
  1061:     {id:'classic', name:'Classic'},
  1062:     {id:'neon', name:'Neon'},
  1063:     {id:'mono', name:'Monochrome'},
  1064:     {id:'glass', name:'Glass'},
  1065:     {id:'bold', name:'Bold'},
  1066:     {id:'minimal', name:'Minimal'},
  1067:     {id:'terminal', name:'Terminal'},
  1068:     {id:'chip', name:'Chip'},
  1069:     {id:'rounded', name:'Rounded'},
  1070:     {id:'outline', name:'Outline'},
  1071:   ];
  1072: 
  1073:   function tzLabel(tz){
  1074:     const map = {
  1075:       'Asia/Manila':'Manila',
  1076:       'UTC':'UTC',
  1077:       'America/Los_Angeles':'Los Angeles',
  1078:       'America/New_York':'New York',
  1079:       'Europe/London':'London',
  1080:       'Europe/Paris':'Paris',
  1081:       'Asia/Tokyo':'Tokyo',
  1082:       'Asia/Singapore':'Singapore',
  1083:       'Australia/Sydney':'Sydney'
  1084:     };
  1085:     const key = String(tz||'').trim();
  1086:     return map[key] || key || 'UTC';
  1087:   }
  1088: 
  1089:   function formatTimeParts(date, tz){
  1090:     try{
  1091:       const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-GB', { timeZone: tz, hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit', hour12:false });
  1092:       const parts = Object.fromEntries(fmt.formatToParts(date).filter(p=>p.type!=='literal').map(p=>[p.type,p.value]));
  1093:       return { hh: parts.hour||'00', mm: parts.minute||'00', ss: parts.second||'00' };
  1094:     }catch(e){
  1095:       const d = date;
  1096:       return { hh: String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0'), mm: String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0'), ss: String(d.getSeconds()).padStart(2,'0') };
  1097:     }
  1098:   }
  1099: 
  1100:   const GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES = [
  1101:     -720,-660,-600,-570,-540,-480,-420,-360,-300,-240,-210,-180,-120,-60,
  1102:     0,60,120,180,210,240,270,300,330,345,360,390,420,480,525,540,570,600,630,660,690,720,765,780,840
  1103:   ];
  1104: 
  1105:   function _pad2(n){ return String(n).padStart(2,'0'); }
  1106: 
  1107:   function gmtLabelFromMinutes(mins){
  1108:     const m = Number(mins)||0;
  1109:     const sign = m>=0 ? '+' : '-';
  1110:     const abs = Math.abs(m);
  1111:     const hh = Math.floor(abs/60);
  1112:     const mm = abs%60;
  1113:     return `GMT${sign}${_pad2(hh)}:${_pad2(mm)}`;
  1114:   }
  1115: 
  1116:   function formatTimePartsForClock(now, clock){
  1117:     const c = clock || {};
  1118:     const off = (c.offsetMinutes === 0 || c.offsetMinutes) ? Number(c.offsetMinutes) : null;
  1119:     if(off !== null && Number.isFinite(off)){
  1120:       const ms = now.getTime() + off*60*1000;
  1121:       const d = new Date(ms);
  1122:       return { hh:_pad2(d.getUTCHours()), mm:_pad2(d.getUTCMinutes()), ss:_pad2(d.getUTCSeconds()) };
  1123:     }
  1124:     const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1125:     return formatTimeParts(now, tz);
  1126:   }
  1127: 
  1128:   window.WorldClockUtils = window.WorldClockUtils || {};
  1129:   window.WorldClockUtils.GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES = GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES.slice();
  1130:   window.WorldClockUtils.gmtLabelFromMinutes = gmtLabelFromMinutes;
  1131:   window.WorldClockUtils.formatTimePartsForClock = formatTimePartsForClock;
  1132:   window.WorldClockUtils.clockZoneLabel = clockZoneLabel;
  1133: 
  1134:   function clockZoneLabel(clock){
  1135:     const c = clock || {};
  1136:     const off = (c.offsetMinutes === 0 || c.offsetMinutes) ? Number(c.offsetMinutes) : null;
  1137:     if(off !== null && Number.isFinite(off)) return gmtLabelFromMinutes(off);
  1138:     return tzLabel(c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila');
  1139:   }
  1140: 
  1141:   function parseClockZoneValue(val){
  1142:     const v = String(val||'').trim();
  1143:     if(v.startsWith('offset:')){
  1144:       const n = Number(v.slice(7));
  1145:       return { timeZone: 'UTC', offsetMinutes: Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0 };
  1146:     }
  1147:     return { timeZone: v || 'Asia/Manila', offsetMinutes: null };
  1148:   }
  1149: 
  1150:   function ensureGmtOverviewUI(){
  1151:     const modal = document.getElementById('clocksModal');
  1152:     if(!modal) return null;
  1153:     const body = modal.querySelector('.body');
  1154:     if(!body) return null;
  1155: 
  1156:     let panel = modal.querySelector('#gmtOverviewPanel');
  1157:     if(panel) return panel;
  1158: 
  1159:     panel = document.createElement('div');
  1160:     panel.id = 'gmtOverviewPanel';
  1161:     panel.className = 'gmt-overview';
  1162:     panel.innerHTML = `
  1163:       <div class="gmt-head">
  1164:         <div>
  1165:           <div class="settings-card-title">GMT Overview</div>
  1166:           <div class="small muted" style="margin-top:6px">View current time for all commonly used GMT/UTC offsets. Click an offset to pin it as a clock.</div>
  1167:         </div>
  1168:         <div class="gmt-controls">
  1169:           <input class="input" id="gmtSearch" placeholder="Search offsets (e.g., +08, 5:30, GMT+10)..." />
  1170:         </div>
  1171:       </div>
  1172:       <div class="gmt-grid" id="gmtOverviewGrid" aria-label="GMT overview"></div>
  1173:     `;
  1174:     body.appendChild(panel);
  1175: 
  1176:     panel.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
  1177:       const tile = e.target && (e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('[data-gmtoff]') : null);
  1178:       if(!tile) return;
  1179:       const mins = Number(tile.getAttribute('data-gmtoff'));
  1180:       if(!Number.isFinite(mins)) return;
  1181: 
  1182:       try{
  1183:         const cur = Store.getWorldClocks().slice();
  1184:         const exists = cur.some(c=> Number(c && c.offsetMinutes) === mins);
  1185:         if(!exists){
  1186:           cur.push({
  1187:             enabled: true,
  1188:             label: gmtLabelFromMinutes(mins),
  1189:             timeZone: 'UTC',
  1190:             offsetMinutes: mins,
  1191:             hoursColor: '#EAF3FF',
  1192:             minutesColor: '#9BD1FF',
  1193:             alarmEnabled: false,
  1194:             alarmTime: '09:00',
  1195:             style: 'classic'
  1196:           });
  1197:           try{ if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_CLOCKS', cur); }catch(_){ try{ Store.saveWorldClocks(cur); }catch(__){} }
  1198:           refreshWorldClocksNow();
  1199:           try{ renderClocksGrid(); renderClocksPreviewStrip(); }catch(_){ }
  1200:         }
  1201:       }catch(err){ console.error(err); }
  1202:     });
  1203: 
  1204:     const search = panel.querySelector('#gmtSearch');
  1205:     if(search){
  1206:       search.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
  1207:         try{ renderGmtOverview(); }catch(_){ }
  1208:       });
  1209:     }
  1210: 
  1211:     return panel;
  1212:   }
  1213: 
  1214:   function renderGmtOverview(){
  1215:     const panel = ensureGmtOverviewUI();
  1216:     if(!panel) return;
  1217:     const grid = panel.querySelector('#gmtOverviewGrid');
  1218:     if(!grid) return;
  1219: 
  1220:     const q = String(panel.querySelector('#gmtSearch')?.value||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  1221:     const now = new Date();
  1222: 
  1223:     const filtered = GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES.filter(mins=>{
  1224:       if(!q) return true;
  1225:       const label = gmtLabelFromMinutes(mins).toLowerCase();
  1226:       return label.includes(q) || String(mins).includes(q) || String(mins/60).includes(q);
  1227:     });
  1228: 
  1229:     grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(mins=>{
  1230:       const ms = now.getTime() + mins*60*1000;
  1231:       const d = new Date(ms);
  1232:       const hh = _pad2(d.getUTCHours());
  1233:       const mm = _pad2(d.getUTCMinutes());
  1234:       const dateHint = UI && UI.manilaParts ? (()=>{
  1235:         try{
  1236:           const man = UI.manilaParts(now).isoDate;
  1237:           const od  = UI.manilaParts(new Date(ms)).isoDate;
  1238:           if(od === man) return '';
  1239:           return od > man ? ' (+1d)' : ' (-1d)';
  1240:         }catch(_){ return ''; }
  1241:       })() : '';
  1242:       return `
  1243:         <button class="gmt-tile" type="button" data-gmtoff="${mins}">
  1244:           <div class="gmt-tile-top">
  1245:             <div class="small" style="font-weight:900">${UI.esc(gmtLabelFromMinutes(mins))}${UI.esc(dateHint)}</div>
  1246:             <div class="gmt-tile-time">${hh}:${mm}</div>
  1247:           </div>
  1248:           <div class="small muted">Click to pin</div>
  1249:         </button>
  1250:       `;
  1251:     }).join('');
  1252:   }
  1253: 
  1254:   function startGmtOverviewTicker(){
  1255:     try{
  1256:       if(window.__mumsGmtOverviewTimer) return;
  1257:       window.__mumsGmtOverviewTimer = setInterval(()=>{
  1258:         const modal = document.getElementById('clocksModal');
  1259:         if(!modal || !modal.classList.contains('open')) return;
  1260:         try{ renderGmtOverview(); }catch(_){ }
  1261:       }, 30000);
  1262:     }catch(_){ }
  1263:   }
  1264: 
  1265: function renderWorldClocksBar(){
  1266:     const wrap = document.getElementById('worldClocks');
  1267:     if(!wrap) return;
  1268:     const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1269:     const now = new Date();
  1270:     wrap.innerHTML = list.map((c, i)=>{
  1271:       const on = !!c.enabled;
  1272:       if(!on) return '';
  1273:       const t = formatTimePartsForClock(now, c);
  1274:       const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1275:       const label = String(c.label||clockZoneLabel(c)||`Clock ${i+1}`);
  1276:       const hcol = c.hoursColor || '#EAF3FF';
  1277:       const mcol = c.minutesColor || '#9BD1FF';
  1278:       const style = String(c.style||'classic');
  1279:       return `
  1280:         <div class="wclock wc-${style}" data-idx="${i}" title="${UI.esc(label)} (${UI.esc(clockZoneLabel(c))})">
  1281:           <div class="wc-label">${UI.esc(label)}</div>
  1282:           <div class="wc-time"><span class="wc-h" style="color:${UI.esc(hcol)}">${UI.esc(t.hh)}</span><span class="wc-sep">:</span><span class="wc-m" style="color:${UI.esc(mcol)}">${UI.esc(t.mm)}</span><span class="wc-sec">:${UI.esc(t.ss)}</span></div>
  1283:         </div>
  1284:       `;
  1285:     }).join('');
  1286:   }
  1287: 
  1288:   function _bucketForUser(u){
  1289:     try{
  1290:       if(!u) return 'mid';
  1291:       let teamId = u.teamId || '';
  1292:       const rawRole = String(u.role || '').trim();
  1293:       let role = (window.Store && Store.normalizeRole) ? Store.normalizeRole(rawRole)
  1294:         : rawRole.toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_').replace(/-+/g,'_');
  1295: 
  1296:       try{
  1297:         const uid = u.id || u.user_id || u.userId || '';
  1298:         if ((!teamId || !role) && uid && window.Store && Store.getUserById) {
  1299:           const su = Store.getUserById(uid);
  1300:           if (su) {
  1301:             if (!teamId && su.teamId) teamId = su.teamId;
  1302:             if (!role && su.role) {
  1303:               const rr = String(su.role||'').trim();
  1304:               role = (window.Store && Store.normalizeRole) ? Store.normalizeRole(rr)
  1305:                 : rr.toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_').replace(/-+/g,'_');
  1306:             }
  1307:             if (!u.name && su.name) u.name = su.name;
  1308:             if (!u.username && su.username) u.username = su.username;
  1309:             if (!u.photo && (su.photo || su.avatar || su.photoDataUrl || su.avatar_url || su.avatarUrl)) {
  1310:               u.photo = su.photo || su.avatar || su.photoDataUrl || su.avatar_url || su.avatarUrl;
  1311:             }
  1312:           }
  1313:         }
  1314:       }catch(_){ }
  1315: 
  1316:       if(role === 'SUPER_ADMIN' || role === 'SUPER_USER'){
  1317:         let teamOverride = !!(u.teamOverride ?? u.team_override ?? false);
  1318:         try{
  1319:           const uid = u.id || u.user_id || u.userId || '';
  1320:           if(uid && window.Store && Store.getUserById){
  1321:             const su = Store.getUserById(uid);
  1322:             if(su){
  1323:               if(!teamOverride && su.teamOverride !== undefined) teamOverride = !!su.teamOverride;
  1324:               if(!teamId && su.teamId) teamId = su.teamId;
  1325:             }
  1326:           }
  1327:         }catch(_){ }
  1328: 
  1329:         if(teamOverride && teamId){
  1330:           const t0 = Config.teamById ? Config.teamById(teamId) : null;
  1331:           const label0 = String((t0 && t0.label) || '').toLowerCase();
  1332:           if(label0.includes('morning')) return 'morning';
  1333:           if(label0.includes('mid')) return 'mid';
  1334:           if(label0.includes('night')) return 'night';
  1335:         }
  1336:         return 'dev';
  1337:       }
  1338: 
  1339:       if(!teamId) return 'mid';
  1340: 
  1341:       const t = Config.teamById ? Config.teamById(teamId) : null;
  1342:       const label = String((t && t.label) || '').toLowerCase();
  1343:       if(label.includes('morning')) return 'morning';
  1344:       if(label.includes('mid')) return 'mid';
  1345:       if(label.includes('night')) return 'night';
  1346:     }catch(_){ }
  1347:     return 'mid';
  1348:   }
  1349: 
  1350:   function _initials(name){
  1351:     const s = String(name||'').trim();
  1352:     if(!s) return 'U';
  1353:     const parts = s.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
  1354:     const a = (parts[0]||'').slice(0,1);
  1355:     const b = (parts.length>1 ? parts[parts.length-1] : '').slice(0,1);
  1356:     return (a + b).toUpperCase();
  1357:   }
  1358: 
  1359:   function _normalizeDailyWorkMode(modeRaw){
  1360:     const mode = String(modeRaw || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  1361:     if(!mode) return '';
  1362:     if(mode === 'OFFICE' || mode === 'IN_OFFICE' || mode === 'IN OFFICE') return 'OFFICE';
  1363:     if(mode === 'WFH' || mode === 'WFM' || mode === 'WORK_FROM_HOME' || mode === 'WORK FROM HOME') return 'WFH';
  1364:     return '';
  1365:   }
  1366: 
  1367:   function renderOnlineUsersBar(){
  1368:     const host = document.getElementById('onlineUsersBar');
  1369:     if(!host) return;
  1370: 
  1371:     const isMobile = !!(window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches) || (window.innerWidth <= 768);
  1372: 
  1373:     let list = [];
  1374:     try{ list = (window.Store && Store.getOnlineUsers) ? Store.getOnlineUsers() : []; }catch(_){ list=[]; }
  1375:     const latestModeByUser = {};
  1376:     try{
  1377:       const attendance = (window.Store && Store.getAttendance) ? Store.getAttendance() : [];
  1378:       (Array.isArray(attendance) ? attendance : []).forEach(rec=>{
  1379:         if(!rec) return;
  1380:         const uid = String(rec.userId || rec.id || '').trim();
  1381:         if(!uid || latestModeByUser[uid]) return;
  1382:         const normalized = _normalizeDailyWorkMode(rec.mode);
  1383:         if(normalized) latestModeByUser[uid] = normalized;
  1384:       });
  1385:     }catch(_){ }
  1386: 
  1387:     const buckets = { morning:[], mid:[], night:[], dev:[] };
  1388:     list.forEach(u=>{
  1389:       const b = _bucketForUser(u);
  1390:       (buckets[b]||buckets.mid).push(u);
  1391:     });
  1392: 
  1393:     // Active threshold: heartbeat within last 90s → full green
  1394:     // (Allows one missed 60s beat before turning gray — prevents flicker on slow networks)
  1395:     // Idle threshold: beyond 90s but still in roster (TTL=300s) → grayed out
  1396:     const ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_MS = 90 * 1000; // 90s = 2× 45s HB interval — green if beat within 90s
  1397:     const _nowTs = Date.now();
  1398: 
  1399:     function pills(arr){
  1400:       return (arr||[]).slice(0, 18).map(u=>{
  1401:         const uid = String(u.userId || u.id || '').trim();
  1402:         const mode = _normalizeDailyWorkMode(u.mode) || (uid ? latestModeByUser[uid] : '');
  1403:         const red = mode === 'WFH';
  1404:         const photo = u.photo ? String(u.photo) : '';
  1405:         const nm = String(u.name||u.username||'User');
  1406:         // Determine if user is active or idle based on last heartbeat time
  1407:         const lastSeen = Number(u.lastSeen || u.last_seen || 0);
  1408:         const isIdle = lastSeen > 0 && (_nowTs - lastSeen) > ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_MS;
  1409:         const idleLabel = isIdle ? ' · Away' : '';
  1410:         const pillClass = isIdle ? 'is-idle' : (red ? 'is-red' : '');
  1411:         const titleLabel = UI.esc(nm + idleLabel);
  1412:         return `
  1413:           <div class="online-pill ${pillClass}" title="${titleLabel}">
  1414:             ${photo ? `<img src="${UI.esc(photo)}" alt="${UI.esc(nm)}" />` : `<span class="ini">${UI.esc(_initials(nm))}</span>`}
  1415:           </div>
  1416:         `;
  1417:       }).join('');
  1418:     }
  1419: 
  1420:     function sec(title, arr){
  1421:       const items = pills(arr);
  1422:       // Active count (green) vs total (includes idle/grayed)
  1423:       const activeCount = arr.filter(u => {
  1424:         const lastSeen = Number(u.lastSeen || u.last_seen || 0);
  1425:         return lastSeen <= 0 || (_nowTs - lastSeen) <= ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_MS;
  1426:       }).length;
  1427:       const totalCount = arr.length;
  1428:       // Show "2 / 3" when there are idle users, "2" when all active
  1429:       const countDisplay = (totalCount > activeCount && totalCount > 0)
  1430:         ? `${activeCount}<span style="opacity:.45;font-weight:500">/${totalCount}</span>`
  1431:         : String(totalCount);
  1432: 
  1433:       if(isMobile){
  1434:         return `
  1435:           <details class="onlinebar-acc" ${arr.length ? 'open' : ''}>
  1436:             <summary>
  1437:               <span class="onlinebar-title">${UI.esc(title)}</span>
  1438:               <span class="onlinebar-count">${countDisplay}</span>
  1439:             </summary>
  1440:             <div class="onlinebar-badges">
  1441:               <div class="onlinebar-list">${items || '<span class="small" style="opacity:.7">—</span>'}</div>
  1442:             </div>
  1443:           </details>
  1444:         `;
  1445:       }
  1446: 
  1447:       return `
  1448:         <div class="onlinebar-sec">
  1449:           <div class="onlinebar-head">
  1450:             <div class="onlinebar-title">${UI.esc(title)}</div>
  1451:             <div class="onlinebar-count">${countDisplay}</div>
  1452:           </div>
  1453:           <div class="onlinebar-list">${items || '<span class="small" style="opacity:.7">—</span>'}</div>
  1454:         </div>
  1455:       `;
  1456:     }
  1457: 
  1458:     const head = isMobile ? `
  1459:       <div class="mob-sheet-head">
  1460:         <div class="mob-sheet-title">User Online</div>
  1461:         <div class="mob-sheet-actions">
  1462:           <button class="mob-sheet-close" type="button" aria-label="Close" data-close-onlinebar="1">✕</button>
  1463:         </div>
  1464:       </div>
  1465:     ` : '';
  1466: 
  1467:     host.innerHTML = `
  1468:       ${head}
  1469:       <div class="onlinebar-inner">
  1470:         ${sec('Morning Shift', buckets.morning)}
  1471:         ${sec('Mid Shift', buckets.mid)}
  1472:         ${sec('Night Shift', buckets.night)}
  1473:         ${sec('Developer Access', buckets.dev)}
  1474:       </div>
  1475:     `;
  1476: 
  1477:     if(isMobile && !host.__mobCloseBound){
  1478:       host.__mobCloseBound = true;
  1479:       host.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
  1480:         const btn = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('[data-close-onlinebar]') : null;
  1481:         if(!btn) return;
  1482:         document.body.classList.remove('mobile-online-open');
  1483:         try{
  1484:           const t = document.getElementById('toggleUserOnlineBar');
  1485:           if(t) t.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
  1486:         }catch(_){}
  1487:       });
  1488:     }
  1489:   }
  1490: 
  1491:   function refreshWorldClocksNow(){
  1492:   try{ renderWorldClocksBar(); }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
  1493:   try{ renderClocksPreviewStrip(); }catch(_){ }
  1494:   try{ updateWorldClocksTimes(); }catch(_){ }
  1495:   try{ updateClocksPreviewTimes(); }catch(_){ }
  1496: }
  1497: 
  1498:   function renderClocksPreviewStrip(){
  1499:     const strip = document.getElementById('clocksPreviewStrip');
  1500:     if(!strip) return;
  1501:     const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1502:     const now = new Date();
  1503: 
  1504:     strip.innerHTML = list.map((c,i)=>{
  1505:       const t = formatTimePartsForClock(now, c);
  1506:       const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1507:       const label = String(c.label||clockZoneLabel(c)||`Clock ${i+1}`);
  1508:       const hcol = c.hoursColor || '#EAF3FF';
  1509:       const mcol = c.minutesColor || '#9BD1FF';
  1510:       const style = String(c.style||'classic');
  1511:       const on = !!c.enabled;
  1512:       return `
  1513:         <div class="wclock wc-${style} wclock-preview ${on?'':'is-off'}" draggable="true" data-idx="${i}" title="Drag to reorder • ${UI.esc(label)} (${UI.esc(clockZoneLabel(c))})">
  1514:           <div class="wc-label">${UI.esc(label)}</div>
  1515:           <div class="wc-time">
  1516:             <span class="wc-h" style="color:${UI.esc(hcol)}">${UI.esc(t.hh)}</span><span class="wc-sep">:</span><span class="wc-m" style="color:${UI.esc(mcol)}">${UI.esc(t.mm)}</span><span class="wc-sec">:${UI.esc(t.ss)}</span>
  1517:           </div>
  1518:           <div class="wc-drag" aria-hidden="true">↔</div>
  1519:         </div>
  1520:       `;
  1521:     }).join('');
  1522: 
  1523:     strip.querySelectorAll('.wclock-preview').forEach(el=>{
  1524:       el.addEventListener('dragstart', (e)=>{
  1525:         try{ e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', String(el.dataset.idx||'')); }catch(_){}
  1526:         el.classList.add('dragging');
  1527:       });
  1528:       el.addEventListener('dragend', ()=>{ el.classList.remove('dragging'); });
  1529:       el.addEventListener('dragover', (e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); el.classList.add('dragover'); });
  1530:       el.addEventListener('dragleave', ()=>{ el.classList.remove('dragover'); });
  1531:       el.addEventListener('drop', (e)=>{
  1532:         e.preventDefault();
  1533:         el.classList.remove('dragover');
  1534:         let from = -1;
  1535:         try{ from = Number(e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain')); }catch(_){}
  1536:         const to = Number(el.dataset.idx||-1);
  1537:         if(!Number.isFinite(from) || !Number.isFinite(to) || from<0 || to<0 || from===to) return;
  1538:         try{
  1539:           const cur = Store.getWorldClocks().slice();
  1540:           if(from>=cur.length || to>=cur.length) return;
  1541:           const item = cur.splice(from,1)[0];
  1542:           cur.splice(to,0,item);
  1543:           try{ if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_CLOCKS', cur); else Store.saveWorldClocks(cur); }catch(_){ try{ Store.saveWorldClocks(cur); }catch(__){} }
  1544:           renderClocksGrid();
  1545:           renderWorldClocksBar();
  1546:           renderClocksPreviewStrip();
  1547:         }catch(err){ console.error(err); }
  1548:       });
  1549:     });
  1550:   }
  1551: 
  1552: function updateWorldClocksTimes(){
  1553:   const wrap = document.getElementById('worldClocks');
  1554:   if(!wrap) return;
  1555:   const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1556:   if(!Array.isArray(list) || list.length===0) return;
  1557:   const now = new Date();
  1558:   wrap.querySelectorAll('.wclock').forEach(el=>{
  1559:     const i = Number(el.dataset.idx||-1);
  1560:     if(!(i>=0)) return;
  1561:     const c = list[i];
  1562:     if(!c || !c.enabled) return;
  1563:     const t = formatTimePartsForClock(now, c);
  1564:       const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1565:     const h = el.querySelector('.wc-h');
  1566:     const m = el.querySelector('.wc-m');
  1567:     const s = el.querySelector('.wc-sec');
  1568:     if(h) h.textContent = t.hh;
  1569:     if(m) m.textContent = t.mm;
  1570:     if(s) s.textContent = ':' + t.ss;
  1571:   });
  1572: }
  1573: 
  1574: function updateClocksPreviewTimes(){
  1575:   const strip = document.getElementById('clocksPreviewStrip');
  1576:   if(!strip) return;
  1577:   const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1578:   if(!Array.isArray(list) || list.length===0) return;
  1579:   const now = new Date();
  1580:   strip.querySelectorAll('.wclock-preview').forEach(el=>{
  1581:     const i = Number(el.dataset.idx||-1);
  1582:     if(!(i>=0)) return;
  1583:     const c = list[i];
  1584:     if(!c) return;
  1585:     const t = formatTimePartsForClock(now, c);
  1586:       const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1587:     const h = el.querySelector('.wc-h');
  1588:     const m = el.querySelector('.wc-m');
  1589:     const s = el.querySelector('.wc-sec');
  1590:     if(h) h.textContent = t.hh;
  1591:     if(m) m.textContent = t.mm;
  1592:     if(s) s.textContent = ':' + t.ss;
  1593:   });
  1594: }
  1595: 
  1596:   const _alarmState = { lastKey: null };
  1597:   function checkWorldClockAlarms(){
  1598:     const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1599:     const now = new Date();
  1600:     const user = Auth && Auth.getUser ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  1601:     const userId = user ? user.id : 'anon';
  1602: 
  1603:     for(let i=0;i<list.length;i++){
  1604:       const c = list[i] || {};
  1605:       if(!c.enabled || !c.alarmEnabled || !c.alarmTime) continue;
  1606:       const t = formatTimePartsForClock(now, c);
  1607:       const tz = c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila';
  1608:       const hm = `${t.hh}:${t.mm}`;
  1609:       if(hm === c.alarmTime && t.ss === '00'){
  1610:         const key = `${i}|${tz}|${c.alarmTime}|${UI.manilaNow().isoDate}`;
  1611:         if(_alarmState.lastKey === key) continue;
  1612:         _alarmState.lastKey = key;
  1613:         try{ UI.playNotifSound(userId); }catch(e){}
  1614:       }
  1615:     }
  1616:   }
  1617: 
  1618:   function renderClocksGrid(){
  1619:     const grid = document.getElementById('clocksGrid');
  1620:     if(!grid) return;
  1621:     const list = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1622:     const namedTimeZones = [
  1623:       'Asia/Manila','UTC','America/Los_Angeles','America/New_York',
  1624:       'Europe/London','Europe/Paris','Asia/Tokyo','Asia/Singapore','Australia/Sydney'
  1625:     ];
  1626: 
  1627:     const offsetOpts = GMT_OFFSETS_MINUTES.map(mins=>{
  1628:       const v = `offset:${mins}`;
  1629:       return { value: v, label: gmtLabelFromMinutes(mins) };
  1630:     });
  1631:     const styleOpts = CLOCK_STYLES.map(s=>`<option value="${UI.esc(s.id)}">${UI.esc(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
  1632: 
  1633:     grid.innerHTML = list.map((c, i)=>{
  1634:       const selTz = (c && (c.offsetMinutes === 0 || c.offsetMinutes) && Number.isFinite(Number(c.offsetMinutes)))
  1635:         ? (`offset:${Number(c.offsetMinutes)}`)
  1636:         : (c.timeZone || 'Asia/Manila');
  1637: 
  1638:       const gmtGroup = offsetOpts.map(o=>`<option value="${UI.esc(o.value)}" ${o.value===selTz?'selected':''}>${UI.esc(o.label)}</option>`).join('');
  1639:       const namedGroup = namedTimeZones.map(z=>`<option value="${UI.esc(z)}" ${z===selTz?'selected':''}>${UI.esc(tzLabel(z))}</option>`).join('');
  1640:       const tzOpts = `<optgroup label="GMT / UTC offsets">${gmtGroup}</optgroup><optgroup label="Named time zones">${namedGroup}</optgroup>`;
  1641:       return `
  1642:         <div class="clock-card" data-idx="${i}">
  1643:           <div class="row" style="justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
  1644:             <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
  1645:               <div class="chip">Clock ${i+1}</div>
  1646:               <label class="small" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
  1647:                 <input type="checkbox" class="clk-enabled" ${c.enabled?'checked':''} />
  1648:                 Enabled
  1649:               </label>
  1650:               <label class="small" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
  1651:                 <input type="checkbox" class="clk-alarmEnabled" ${c.alarmEnabled?'checked':''} />
  1652:                 Alarm enabled
  1653:               </label>
  1654:             </div>
  1655:             <div class="small muted" style="white-space:nowrap">Alarm uses Notification Sound</div>
  1656:           </div>
  1657: 
  1658:           <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:10px">
  1659:             <label class="small">Label
  1660:               <input class="input clk-label" value="${UI.esc(c.label||'')}" placeholder="e.g. Support HQ" />
  1661:             </label>
  1662:             <label class="small">Time zone
  1663:               <select class="input clk-tz">${tzOpts}</select>
  1664:             </label>
  1665:           </div>
  1666: 
  1667:           <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:10px">
  1668:             <label class="small">Hours color
  1669:               <input class="input clk-hc" type="color" value="${UI.esc(c.hoursColor||'#EAF3FF')}" />
  1670:             </label>
  1671:             <label class="small">Minutes color
  1672:               <input class="input clk-mc" type="color" value="${UI.esc(c.minutesColor||'#9BD1FF')}" />
  1673:             </label>
  1674:             <label class="small">Clock design
  1675:               <select class="input clk-style">${styleOpts}</select>
  1676:             </label>
  1677:           </div>
  1678: 
  1679:           <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:10px">
  1680:             <label class="small">Alarm time
  1681:               <input class="input clk-alarm" type="time" value="${UI.esc(c.alarmTime||'')}" style="max-width:180px" ${c.alarmEnabled?'':'disabled'} />
  1682:             </label>
  1683:           </div>
  1684:         </div>
  1685:       `;
  1686:     }).join('');
  1687: 
  1688:     grid.querySelectorAll('.clock-card').forEach(card=>{
  1689:       const i = Number(card.dataset.idx||0);
  1690:       const s = (list[i] && list[i].style) ? list[i].style : 'classic';
  1691:       const sel = card.querySelector('.clk-style');
  1692:       if(sel) sel.value = s;
  1693:     });
  1694: 
  1695:     try{ renderClocksPreviewStrip(); }catch(e){ }
  1696: 
  1697:     if(!grid.__liveBind){
  1698:       grid.__liveBind = true;
  1699:       let t = null;
  1700:       const commit = ()=>{
  1701:         try{
  1702:           const next = Store.getWorldClocks();
  1703:           grid.querySelectorAll('.clock-card').forEach(card=>{
  1704:             const i = Number(card.dataset.idx||0);
  1705:             if(!next[i]) next[i] = {};
  1706:             const q = (sel)=>card.querySelector(sel);
  1707:             const alarmOn = !!q('.clk-alarmEnabled')?.checked;
  1708:             const alarmInput = q('.clk-alarm');
  1709:             try{ if(alarmInput) alarmInput.disabled = !alarmOn; }catch(_){ }
  1710:             next[i] = {
  1711:               enabled: !!q('.clk-enabled')?.checked,
  1712:               label: String(q('.clk-label')?.value||'').trim(),
  1713:               timeZone: parseClockZoneValue(String(q('.clk-tz')?.value||'Asia/Manila')).timeZone,
  1714:               offsetMinutes: parseClockZoneValue(String(q('.clk-tz')?.value||'Asia/Manila')).offsetMinutes,
  1715:               hoursColor: String(q('.clk-hc')?.value||'#EAF3FF'),
  1716:               minutesColor: String(q('.clk-mc')?.value||'#9BD1FF'),
  1717:               style: String(q('.clk-style')?.value||'classic'),
  1718:               alarmEnabled: alarmOn,
  1719:               alarmTime: alarmOn ? String(alarmInput?.value||'').trim() : '',
  1720:             };
  1721:           });
  1722:           try{ if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_CLOCKS', next); else Store.saveWorldClocks(next); }catch(_){ try{ Store.saveWorldClocks(next); }catch(__){} }
  1723:           refreshWorldClocksNow();
  1724:           try{ renderClocksPreviewStrip(); }catch(_){ }
  1725:         }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
  1726:       };
  1727:       grid.__commitClocks = ()=>{ try{ clearTimeout(t); }catch(_){ } try{ commit(); }catch(_){ } };
  1728:       grid.addEventListener('input', ()=>{ clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(commit, 150); });
  1729:       grid.addEventListener('change', ()=>{ clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(commit, 0); });
  1730:     }
  1731:   }
  1732: 
  1733:   function renderLinksGrid(){
  1734:     const grid = document.getElementById('linksGrid');
  1735:     if(!grid) return;
  1736:     const links = Store.getQuickLinks();
  1737:     grid.innerHTML = links.map((l, idx)=>{
  1738:       const label = String(l?.label||'');
  1739:       const url = String(l?.url||'');
  1740:       const glowColor = String(l?.glowColor||l?.glow||'');
  1741:       return `
  1742:         <div class="link-row" data-idx="${idx}">
  1743:           <div class="lr-head">
  1744:             <div class="lr-slot">Link ${idx+1}</div>
  1745:             <div class="lr-actions">
  1746:               <button class="btn tiny" type="button" data-save>Save</button>
  1747:               <button class="btn tiny danger" type="button" data-del>Delete</button>
  1748:             </div>
  1749:           </div>
  1750:           <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:10px">
  1751:             <label class="small">Label
  1752:               <input class="input" data-label value="${UI.esc(label)}" placeholder="e.g., Zendesk" />
  1753:             </label>
  1754:             <label class="small">URL
  1755:               <input class="input" data-url value="${UI.esc(url)}" placeholder="https://..." />
  1756:             </label>
  1757:             <label class="small">Glow color (for filled circles)
  1758:               <div class="row" style="gap:10px;align-items:center">
  1759:                 <input type="color" data-glow value="${UI.esc((glowColor||'').trim()||'#4f46e5')}" style="width:44px;height:34px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;padding:0" />
  1760:                 <input class="input" data-glowText value="${UI.esc((glowColor||'').trim())}" placeholder="#4f46e5 (optional)" />
  1761:               </div>
  1762:             </label>
  1763:           </div>
  1764:         </div>
  1765:       `;
  1766:     }).join('');
  1767: 
  1768:     grid.querySelectorAll('.link-row').forEach(row=>{
  1769:       const idx = Number(row.dataset.idx||0);
  1770:       const getVals = ()=>({
  1771:         label: String(row.querySelector('[data-label]')?.value||'').trim(),
  1772:         url: String(row.querySelector('[data-url]')?.value||'').trim(),
  1773:         glowColor: String((row.querySelector('[data-glowText]')?.value||row.querySelector('[data-glow]')?.value||'')).trim()
  1774:       });
  1775:       const saveBtn = row.querySelector('[data-save]');
  1776:       const delBtn = row.querySelector('[data-del]');
  1777:       const glowPick = row.querySelector('[data-glow]');
  1778:       const glowTxt = row.querySelector('[data-glowText]');
  1779:       if(glowPick && glowTxt){
  1780:         glowPick.oninput = ()=>{ try{ glowTxt.value = String(glowPick.value||'').trim(); }catch(_){ } };
  1781:         glowTxt.oninput = ()=>{
  1782:           const v = String(glowTxt.value||'').trim();
  1783:           if(/^#([0-9a-fA-F]{6})$/.test(v)) glowPick.value = v;
  1784:         };
  1785:       }
  1786:       if(saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  1787:         const v = getVals();
  1788:         const url = normalizeUrl(v.url);
  1789:         if(!url){ alert('Please enter a valid URL.'); return; }
  1790:         Store.setQuickLink(idx, { label: v.label, url, glowColor: v.glowColor });
  1791:         renderQuickLinksBar();
  1792:         renderLinksGrid();
  1793:       };
  1794:       if(delBtn) delBtn.onclick = async ()=>{
  1795:         const ok = await UI.confirm({ title:'Delete Quick Link', message:'Delete this quick link?', okText:'Delete', danger:true });
  1796:         if(!ok) return;
  1797:         Store.clearQuickLink(idx);
  1798:         renderQuickLinksBar();
  1799:         renderLinksGrid();
  1800:       };
  1801:     });
  1802:   }
  1803: 
  1804:   function renderNav(user){
  1805:     const nav = UI.el('#nav');
  1806: 
  1807:     const iconFor = (id)=>{
  1808:       const map = {
  1809:         dashboard: 'dashboard',
  1810:             gmt_overview: 'dashboard',
  1811:         mailbox: 'mailbox',
  1812:         team: 'members',
  1813:         members: 'members',
  1814:         master_schedule: 'schedule',
  1815:         team_config: 'tasks',
  1816:         admin: 'users',
  1817:         users: 'users',
  1818:         announcements: 'announce',
  1819:         logs: 'dashboard',
  1820:         my_reminders: 'reminder_me',
  1821:         team_reminders: 'reminder_team',
  1822:         my_record: 'schedule',
  1823:         my_attendance: 'schedule',
  1824:         my_schedule: 'schedule',
  1825:         my_case: 'mailbox',
  1826:         my_task: 'tasks',
  1827:         system: 'dashboard',
  1828:         system_overview: 'dashboard',
  1829:         system_requests: 'dashboard',
  1830:         system_realtime: 'dashboard',
  1831:         system_timers: 'dashboard',
  1832:         system_supabase: 'dashboard',
  1833:         system_cloudflare: 'dashboard',
  1834:         system_queue: 'dashboard',
  1835:         system_analytics: 'dashboard',
  1836:       };
  1837:       return map[id] || 'dashboard';
  1838:     };
  1839: 
  1840:     function canAccessNavItem(n){
  1841:       const id = String(n && n.id || '').trim();
  1842:       if(id === 'my_quickbase') return true;
  1843:       if(id === 'manila_calendar') return true;
  1844:       return !!Config.can(user, n.perm);
  1845:     }
  1846: 
  1847:     function renderItem(n, depth){
  1848:       const padVal = (12 + depth*12);
  1849:       const pad = `style="padding-left:${padVal}px"`;
  1850:       const hasKids = Array.isArray(n.children) && n.children.length;
  1851:       const depthClass = depth > 0 ? ' nav-subitem' : '';
  1852: 
  1853:       if(!hasKids){
  1854:         if(!canAccessNavItem(n)) return '';
  1855:         const href = (n && n.route) ? String(n.route) : (`/${n.id}`);
  1856:         return `<a class="nav-item depth-${depth}${depthClass}" href="${href}" data-page="${n.id}" data-label="${UI.esc(n.label)}" ${pad} title="${UI.esc(n.label)}">
  1857:           <span class="nav-ico" data-ico="${iconFor(n.id)}" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  1858:           <span class="nav-label">${UI.esc(n.label)}</span>
  1859:         </a>`;
  1860:       }
  1861: 
  1862:       const key = `nav_group_${n.id}`;
  1863:       const open = localStorage.getItem(key);
  1864:       const isOpen = open === null ? true : (open === '1');
  1865:       const kidsHtml = n.children
  1866:         .map(k => renderItem(k, depth+1))
  1867:         .filter(Boolean)
  1868:         .join('');
  1869:       if(!canAccessNavItem(n) && !kidsHtml) return '';
  1870:       if(!kidsHtml) return '';
  1871: 
  1872:       const special = n.id === 'my_record' ? ' is-record-group' : '';
  1873:       return `
  1874:         <div class="nav-group${special}" data-group="${n.id}">
  1875:           <button class="nav-group-head depth-${depth}" type="button" data-toggle="${n.id}" aria-expanded="${isOpen?'true':'false'}" ${pad} data-label="${UI.esc(n.label)}" title="${UI.esc(n.label)}">
  1876:             <span class="nav-ico" data-ico="${iconFor(n.id)}" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  1877:             <span class="nav-label">${UI.esc(n.label)}</span>
  1878:             <span class="chev">▾</span>
  1879:           </button>
  1880:           <div class="nav-group-kids depth-${depth+1}" style="display:${isOpen?'block':'none'}">${kidsHtml}</div>
  1881:         </div>
  1882:       `;
  1883:     }
  1884: 
  1885:     function sectionFor(item){
  1886:       const id = String(item && item.id || '');
  1887:       if(id === 'my_record') return 'records';
  1888:       if(id === 'my_reminders' || id === 'team_reminders') return 'notifications';
  1889:       if(id === 'system') return 'system';
  1890:       return 'main';
  1891:     }
  1892: 
  1893:     const sectionLabel = {
  1894:       main: 'MAIN',
  1895:       records: 'RECORDS',
  1896:       notifications: 'NOTIFICATIONS',
  1897:       system: 'SYSTEM'
  1898:     };
  1899: 
  1900:     const navItems = Array.isArray(Config.NAV) ? [...Config.NAV] : [];
  1901: 
  1902:     try{
  1903:       const extras = (window.Store && Store.getUserExtraPrivs) ? Store.getUserExtraPrivs(user.id) : [];
  1904:       const kids = [];
  1905:       if(extras && extras.length){
  1906:         kids.push({ id: 'commands', label: 'Commands', icon: '⚡', perm: 'view_dashboard' });
  1907:         if(extras.includes('view_master_schedule')) kids.push({ id: 'master_schedule', label: 'Master Schedule', icon: '📅', perm: 'view_master_schedule' });
  1908:         if(extras.includes('create_users')) kids.push({ id: 'users', label: 'User Management', icon: '👤', perm: 'create_users' });
  1909:         if(extras.includes('manage_announcements')) kids.push({ id: 'announcements', label: 'Announcement', icon: '📣', perm: 'manage_announcements' });
  1910:         navItems.push({ id: 'commands_group', label: 'Commands', icon: '⚡', perm: 'view_dashboard', children: kids });
  1911:       }
  1912:     }catch(_){ }
  1913: 
  1914:     const visible = navItems.map(item=>({ item, html: renderItem(item,0) })).filter(x=>x.html);
  1915:     let navHtml = '';
  1916:     let lastSection = '';
  1917:     visible.forEach(({ item, html })=>{
  1918:       const section = sectionFor(item);
  1919:       if(section !== lastSection){
  1920:         navHtml += `<div class="nav-section-label" data-section="${section}">${sectionLabel[section] || 'MAIN'}</div>`;
  1921:         lastSection = section;
  1922:       }
  1923:       navHtml += html;
  1924:     });
  1925: 
  1926:     nav.innerHTML = navHtml;
  1927: 
  1928:     if(!nav.innerHTML.trim()){
  1929:       nav.innerHTML = `
  1930:         <div class="small muted" style="padding:10px 6px">
  1931:           No menu items available for this account.<br/>
  1932:           Check the user role/permissions in <b>User Management</b>.
  1933:         </div>
  1934:       `;
  1935:       return;
  1936:     }
  1937: 
  1938:     nav.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn=>{
  1939:       btn.onclick = ()=>{
  1940:         const id = btn.dataset.toggle;
  1941:         const wrap = nav.querySelector(`.nav-group[data-group="${CSS.escape(id)}"]`);
  1942:         if(!wrap) return;
  1943:         const kids = wrap.querySelector('.nav-group-kids');
  1944:         const open = kids.style.display !== 'none';
  1945:         kids.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
  1946:         btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'false' : 'true');
  1947:         localStorage.setItem(`nav_group_${id}`, open ? '0' : '1');
  1948:       };
  1949:     });
  1950: 
  1951:     if(!nav.__routeBound){
  1952:       nav.__routeBound = true;
  1953:       nav.__lastNavAt = 0;
  1954:       nav.__lastNavPage = '';
  1955:       nav.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
  1956:         const a = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('a.nav-item') : null;
  1957:         if(!a) return;
  1958: 
  1959:         const href = String(a.getAttribute('href') || '');
  1960:         if(!(href.startsWith('/') || href.startsWith('#'))) return;
  1961: 
  1962:         if(e.defaultPrevented) return;
  1963:         if(e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey) return;
  1964:         if(typeof e.button === 'number' && e.button !== 0) return;
  1965: 
  1966:         const pageId = _routePageIdFromHref(href);
  1967:         if(!pageId) return;
  1968: 
  1969:         e.preventDefault();
  1970:         e.stopPropagation();
  1971: 
  1972:         const now = Date.now();
  1973:         const sinceLastTap = now - Number(nav.__lastNavAt || 0);
  1974:         const isSameTarget = nav.__lastNavPage === pageId;
  1975:         nav.__lastNavAt = now;
  1976:         nav.__lastNavPage = pageId;
  1977: 
  1978:         // Keep accidental double-click protection, but do not block intentional
  1979:         // fast page switching. Only suppress near-identical taps.
  1980:         if(isSameTarget && sinceLastTap < 80) return;
  1981: 
  1982:         try{ setActiveNav(pageId); }catch(_){ }
  1983: 
  1984:         if(href.startsWith('#') || String(window.location.protocol||'') === 'file:'){
  1985:           window.location.hash = '#' + pageId;
  1986:         }else{
  1987:           navigateToPageId(pageId);
  1988:         }
  1989: 
  1990:         try{ if(_isMobileViewport()) closeMobileDrawers(); }catch(_){ }
  1991:       });
  1992:     }
  1993:   }
  1994: 
  1995:   // Global avatar onerror handler — safe to call from inline HTML attributes.
  1996:   function mumsAvatarFallback(img) {
  1997:     try {
  1998:       const alt = String(img && img.alt || '');
  1999:       const parent = img && img.parentElement;
  2000:       if (parent) parent.innerHTML = '<div class="initials">' + alt + '</div>';
  2001:     } catch(_) {}
  2002:   }
  2003:   window.mumsAvatarFallback = mumsAvatarFallback;
  2004: 
  2005:   function renderUserCard(user){
  2006:     const el = UI.el('#userCard');
  2007:     if(!el) return;
  2008:     const team = Config.teamById(user.teamId);
  2009:     const prof = Store.getProfile(user.id) || {};
  2010:     const initials = UI.initials(user.name||user.username);
  2011:     const _rawSrc = prof.photoDataUrl || '';
  2012:     // Cache-bust Supabase storage URLs to prevent stale CDN responses after upload
  2013:     const _bustedSrc = (_rawSrc && !_rawSrc.startsWith('data:'))
  2014:       ? _rawSrc + (_rawSrc.includes('?') ? '&_v=' : '?_v=') + (prof.updatedAt || Date.now())
  2015:       : _rawSrc;
  2016:     const _avatarFallback = `<div class="initials">${UI.esc(initials)}</div>`;
  2017:     const avatarHtml = _bustedSrc
  2018:       ? `<img src="${UI.esc(_bustedSrc)}" alt="${UI.esc(initials)}" class="mums-avatar-img" onerror="mumsAvatarFallback(this)" />`
  2019:       : _avatarFallback;
  2020: 
  2021:     let shiftLabel = (team && team.label) ? String(team.label) : '';
  2022:     try{
  2023:       const r = String(user.role||'').toUpperCase();
  2024:       const isSuper = (window.Config && Config.ROLES) ? (r === String(Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN) || r === String(Config.ROLES.SUPER_USER)) : (r === 'SUPER_ADMIN' || r === 'SUPER_USER');
  2025:       const override = !!(user.teamOverride ?? user.team_override ?? false);
  2026:       const tid = (user.teamId === null || user.teamId === undefined) ? '' : String(user.teamId);
  2027:       if(isSuper && !override && !tid){
  2028:         shiftLabel = 'Developer Access';
  2029:       }
  2030:     }catch(_){ }
  2031: 
  2032:     let isActive = true;
  2033:     try{
  2034:       const online = (window.Store && Store.getOnlineUsers) ? Store.getOnlineUsers() : [];
  2035:       isActive = online.some(rec => String(rec.userId || rec.id || '') === String(user.id));
  2036:     }catch(_){ }
  2037: 
  2038:     const roleLabel = String(user.role||'').replaceAll('_',' ');
  2039:     const safeRole = UI.esc(roleLabel || 'Member');
  2040:     const safeShift = UI.esc(shiftLabel || 'N/A');
  2041:     const subtitle = `${safeRole} • ${safeShift}`;
  2042: 
  2043:     el.innerHTML = `
  2044:       <div class="sp-compact sp-compact-v3" role="group" aria-label="User profile">
  2045:         <div class="sp-row">
  2046:           <div class="sp-photo sp-photo-sm sp-photo-circle" aria-hidden="true">
  2047:             ${avatarHtml}
  2048:             <span class="sp-presence-dot ${isActive ? 'is-active' : 'is-idle'}" title="${isActive ? 'Active' : 'Away'}"></span>
  2049:           </div>
  2050:           <div class="sp-info sp-info-row">
  2051:             <div class="sp-name sp-name-strong">${UI.esc(user.name||user.username||'Unknown User')}</div>
  2052:             <div class="sp-meta sp-meta-subtitle" title="Timezone: Asia/Manila">${subtitle}</div>
  2053:           </div>
  2054:         </div>
  2055:       </div>
  2056:     `;
  2057: 
  2058:     const nm = el.querySelector('.sp-name');
  2059:     const sub = el.querySelector('.sp-meta-subtitle');
  2060:     requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
  2061:       try{
  2062:         if(nm) fitText(nm, 15, 24);
  2063:         if(sub) fitText(sub, 11, 14);
  2064:       }catch(err){ console.error('Profile RAF error', err); }
  2065:     });
  2066:   }
  2067: 
  2068:   function cloudProfileEnabled(){
  2069:     try{
  2070:       return !!(window.CloudUsers && window.MUMS_ENV && MUMS_ENV.SUPABASE_URL && MUMS_ENV.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
  2071:     }catch(_){ return false; }
  2072:   }
  2073: 
  2074:   function openCropModal(dataUrl, opts){
  2075:     opts = opts || {};
  2076:     const onDone = typeof opts.onDone === 'function' ? opts.onDone : function(){};
  2077:     const onCancel = typeof opts.onCancel === 'function' ? opts.onCancel : function(){};
  2078:     const canvas = UI.el('#cropCanvas');
  2079:     const zoomEl = UI.el('#cropZoom');
  2080:     const btnCancel = UI.el('#cropCancel');
  2081:     const btnSave = UI.el('#cropSave');
  2082:     if(!canvas || !zoomEl || !btnCancel || !btnSave){
  2083:       onCancel();
  2084:       return;
  2085:     }
  2086: 
  2087:     const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  2088:     const size = canvas.width || 320;
  2089: 
  2090:     const state = {
  2091:       img: null,
  2092:       baseScale: 1,
  2093:       zoom: 1,
  2094:       offX: 0,
  2095:       offY: 0,
  2096:       dragging: false,
  2097:       lastX: 0,
  2098:       lastY: 0
  2099:     };
  2100: 
  2101:     function clamp(){
  2102:       if(!state.img) return;
  2103:       const scale = state.baseScale * state.zoom;
  2104:       const maxX = Math.max(0, (state.img.width * scale - size) / 2);
  2105:       const maxY = Math.max(0, (state.img.height * scale - size) / 2);
  2106:       state.offX = Math.max(-maxX, Math.min(maxX, state.offX));
  2107:       state.offY = Math.max(-maxY, Math.min(maxY, state.offY));
  2108:     }
  2109: 
  2110:     function draw(){
  2111:       if(!state.img) return;
  2112:       const scale = state.baseScale * state.zoom;
  2113:       clamp();
  2114:       ctx.clearRect(0,0,size,size);
  2115:       ctx.fillStyle = '#0b0f16';
  2116:       ctx.fillRect(0,0,size,size);
  2117: 
  2118:       ctx.save();
  2119:       ctx.translate(size/2 + state.offX, size/2 + state.offY);
  2120:       ctx.scale(scale, scale);
  2121:       ctx.drawImage(state.img, -state.img.width/2, -state.img.height/2);
  2122:       ctx.restore();
  2123: 
  2124:       ctx.save();
  2125:       ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.18)';
  2126:       ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  2127:       ctx.strokeRect(1,1,size-2,size-2);
  2128:       ctx.restore();
  2129:     }
  2130: 
  2131:     function pointToCanvas(e){
  2132:       const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  2133:       const sx = size / (r.width || size);
  2134:       const sy = size / (r.height || size);
  2135:       return { x: (e.clientX - r.left) * sx, y: (e.clientY - r.top) * sy };
  2136:     }
  2137: 
  2138:     canvas.onpointerdown = (e)=>{
  2139:       try{ canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId); }catch(_){}
  2140:       const p = pointToCanvas(e);
  2141:       state.dragging = true;
  2142:       state.lastX = p.x;
  2143:       state.lastY = p.y;
  2144:     };
  2145:     canvas.onpointermove = (e)=>{
  2146:       if(!state.dragging) return;
  2147:       const p = pointToCanvas(e);
  2148:       const dx = p.x - state.lastX;
  2149:       const dy = p.y - state.lastY;
  2150:       state.lastX = p.x;
  2151:       state.lastY = p.y;
  2152:       state.offX += dx;
  2153:       state.offY += dy;
  2154:       draw();
  2155:     };
  2156:     canvas.onpointerup = ()=>{ state.dragging = false; };
  2157:     canvas.onpointercancel = ()=>{ state.dragging = false; };
  2158: 
  2159:     zoomEl.oninput = ()=>{
  2160:       state.zoom = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, Number(zoomEl.value||1)));
  2161:       draw();
  2162:     };
  2163: 
  2164:     btnCancel.onclick = ()=>{
  2165:       UI.closeModal('cropModal');
  2166:       onCancel();
  2167:     };
  2168: 
  2169:     btnSave.onclick = ()=>{
  2170:       if(!state.img){
  2171:         UI.closeModal('cropModal');
  2172:         onCancel();
  2173:         return;
  2174:       }
  2175:       const outSize = 512;
  2176:       const out = document.createElement('canvas');
  2177:       out.width = outSize;
  2178:       out.height = outSize;
  2179:       const octx = out.getContext('2d');
  2180:       const k = outSize / size;
  2181:       const baseOut = state.baseScale * k;
  2182:       const scaleOut = baseOut * state.zoom;
  2183:       const offX = state.offX * k;
  2184:       const offY = state.offY * k;
  2185: 
  2186:       const maxX = Math.max(0, (state.img.width * scaleOut - outSize) / 2);
  2187:       const maxY = Math.max(0, (state.img.height * scaleOut - outSize) / 2);
  2188:       const cx = Math.max(-maxX, Math.min(maxX, offX));
  2189:       const cy = Math.max(-maxY, Math.min(maxY, offY));
  2190: 
  2191:       octx.fillStyle = '#0b0f16';
  2192:       octx.fillRect(0,0,outSize,outSize);
  2193:       octx.save();
  2194:       octx.translate(outSize/2 + cx, outSize/2 + cy);
  2195:       octx.scale(scaleOut, scaleOut);
  2196:       octx.drawImage(state.img, -state.img.width/2, -state.img.height/2);
  2197:       octx.restore();
  2198: 
  2199:       let png = '';
  2200:       try{ png = out.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(_){ png = ''; }
  2201:       UI.closeModal('cropModal');
  2202:       if(png) onDone(png);
  2203:       else onCancel();
  2204:     };
  2205: 
  2206:     const img = new Image();
  2207:     img.onload = ()=>{
  2208:       state.img = img;
  2209:       state.zoom = 1;
  2210:       zoomEl.value = '1';
  2211:       state.offX = 0;
  2212:       state.offY = 0;
  2213:       state.baseScale = Math.max(size / img.width, size / img.height);
  2214:       draw();
  2215:     };
  2216:     img.onerror = ()=>{
  2217:       UI.closeModal('cropModal');
  2218:       onCancel();
  2219:     };
  2220:     img.src = dataUrl;
  2221: 
  2222:     UI.openModal('cropModal');
  2223:   }
  2224: 
  2225:   function openProfileModal(user, opts){
  2226:     opts = opts || {};
  2227:     var shouldOpenModal = (opts.openModal !== false);
  2228:     const prof = Store.getProfile(user.id) || {};
  2229:     const roleUpper0 = String(user && user.role ? user.role : '').trim().toUpperCase();
  2230:     const isSuperAdmin0 = (roleUpper0 === 'SUPER_ADMIN');
  2231:     const isSuperRole0 = (roleUpper0 === 'SUPER_ADMIN' || roleUpper0 === 'SUPER_USER');
  2232:     const inferredOverride0 = isSuperRole0 ? !!(user.teamOverride ?? user.team_override ?? false) || !!(user.teamId) : false;
  2233:     const teamForLabel = (!user.teamId && isSuperRole0 && !inferredOverride0) ? { id:'', label:'Developer Access' } : Config.teamById(user.teamId);
  2234: 
  2235:     const nameEl = UI.el('#profileName');
  2236:     const emailEl = UI.el('#profileEmail');
  2237:     const roleEl = UI.el('#profileRole');
  2238:     const teamEl = UI.el('#profileTeam');
  2239:     // QB Integration section removed — token is managed globally by SUPER_ADMIN in Global QB Settings
  2240:     const qbTokenEl = null; // field removed from UI
  2241: 
  2242:     let teamSel = UI.el('#profileTeamSelect');
  2243:     if(isSuperRole0){
  2244:       try{
  2245:         if(!teamSel){
  2246:           teamSel = document.createElement('select');
  2247:           teamSel.id = 'profileTeamSelect';
  2248:           teamSel.className = 'input';
  2249: 
  2250:           const opt0 = document.createElement('option');
  2251:           opt0.value = '';
  2252:           opt0.textContent = 'Developer Access';
  2253:           teamSel.appendChild(opt0);
  2254: 
  2255:           (Config && Array.isArray(Config.TEAMS) ? Config.TEAMS : []).forEach(t=>{
  2256:             if(!t || !t.id) return;
  2257:             const o = document.createElement('option');
  2258:             o.value = String(t.id);
  2259:             o.textContent = String(t.label || t.id);
  2260:             teamSel.appendChild(o);
  2261:           });
  2262: 
  2263:           if(teamEl && teamEl.parentElement){
  2264:             teamEl.parentElement.appendChild(teamSel);
  2265:           }
  2266:         }
  2267:       }catch(_){ }
  2268:     }
  2269: 
  2270:     if(nameEl) nameEl.value = user.name||'';
  2271:     if(emailEl) {
  2272:       let em = user.email||'';
  2273:       if(!em){
  2274:         try{
  2275:           const su = (window.Store && typeof Store.getUserById === 'function') ? Store.getUserById(user.id) : null;
  2276:           if(su && su.email) em = String(su.email);
  2277:         }catch(_){ }
  2278:       }
  2279:       if(!em){
  2280:         try{
  2281:           const cu = (window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.getUser === 'function') ? CloudAuth.getUser() : null;
  2282:           if(cu && cu.email) em = String(cu.email);
  2283:         }catch(_){ }
  2284:       }
  2285:       if(!em){
  2286:         try{
  2287:           const domain = (window.Config && Config.USERNAME_EMAIL_DOMAIN) ? String(Config.USERNAME_EMAIL_DOMAIN) : 'mums.local';
  2288:           const un = String(user.username||'').trim();
  2289:           if(un) em = `${un}@${domain}`;
  2290:         }catch(_){ }
  2291:       }
  2292:       emailEl.value = em;
  2293:     }
  2294:     if(roleEl) roleEl.value = user.role||'';
  2295:     if(teamEl) teamEl.value = (teamForLabel && teamForLabel.label) ? teamForLabel.label : '';
  2296:     // qbTokenEl removed
  2297: 
  2298:     try{
  2299:       if(isSuperRole0 && teamSel){
  2300:         if(teamEl) teamEl.style.display = 'none';
  2301:         teamSel.style.display = '';
  2302: 
  2303:         let teamId = String(user.teamId || '').trim();
  2304:         let teamOverride = !!(user.teamOverride ?? user.team_override ?? false);
  2305:         if(isSuperRole0 && (user.teamOverride === undefined && user.team_override === undefined)) teamOverride = !!teamId;
  2306:         teamSel.value = (teamOverride && teamId) ? teamId : '';
  2307:       } else {
  2308:         if(teamEl) teamEl.style.display = '';
  2309:         if(teamSel) teamSel.style.display = 'none';
  2310:       }
  2311:     }catch(_){ }
  2312: 
  2313:     renderProfileAvatar(prof.photoDataUrl, user);
  2314: 
  2315:     const layoutSel = UI.el('#profileLayout');
  2316:     if(layoutSel){
  2317:       layoutSel.value = localStorage.getItem('mums_profile_layout') || 'banner';
  2318:     }
  2319: 
  2320:     if(cloudProfileEnabled()){
  2321:       try{
  2322:         CloudUsers.me().then(out=>{
  2323:           try{
  2324:             if(!out || !out.ok || !out.profile) return;
  2325:             const p = out.profile;
  2326:             if(nameEl && (String(nameEl.value||'').trim() === String(user.name||'').trim())){
  2327:               if(p.name) nameEl.value = p.name;
  2328:             }
  2329:             if(p.avatar_url){
  2330:               Store.setProfile(user.id, { photoDataUrl: p.avatar_url, updatedAt: Date.now() });
  2331:               renderProfileAvatar(p.avatar_url, user);
  2332:               renderUserCard(user);
  2333:             }
  2334: 
  2335:             if(emailEl && p.email) emailEl.value = p.email;
  2336:             // qbTokenEl removed — QB token is now global-only
  2337:             if(isSuperRole0 && teamSel){
  2338:               const roleUp = String(p.role || user.role || '').toUpperCase();
  2339:               const isSuperRole = (roleUp === 'SUPER_ADMIN' || roleUp === 'SUPER_USER');
  2340:               const teamIdRaw = (p.team_id === null || p.team_id === undefined) ? '' : String(p.team_id||'').trim();
  2341:               let tOverride = !!(p.team_override ?? p.teamOverride ?? false);
  2342:               if(isSuperRole && (p.team_override === undefined && p.teamOverride === undefined)) tOverride = !!teamIdRaw;
  2343:               teamSel.value = (tOverride && teamIdRaw) ? teamIdRaw : '';
  2344:             }
  2345:           }catch(_){ }
  2346:         }).catch(()=>{});
  2347:       }catch(_){ }
  2348:     }
  2349: 
  2350:     const input = UI.el('#profilePhotoInput');
  2351:     if(input){
  2352:       input.value = '';
  2353:       input.onchange = async()=>{
  2354:         try{
  2355:           const f = input.files && input.files[0];
  2356:           if(!f) return;
  2357:           const dataUrl = await UI.readImageAsDataUrl(f, 1400);
  2358:           openCropModal(dataUrl, {
