  2359:             onDone: async (croppedPng)=>{
  2360:               if(!croppedPng) return;
  2361:               if(cloudProfileEnabled()){
  2362:                 const up = await CloudUsers.uploadAvatar(croppedPng);
  2363:                 if(!up.ok){
  2364:                   await UI.alert({ title:'Upload failed', message: up.message || 'Could not upload avatar.' });
  2365:                   return;
  2366:                 }
  2367:                 const url = up.url || (up.data && (up.data.url || up.data.publicUrl)) || '';
  2368:                 Store.setProfile(user.id, { photoDataUrl: url, updatedAt: Date.now() });
  2369:                 renderProfileAvatar(url, user);
  2370:                 renderUserCard(user);
  2371:               } else {
  2372:                 Store.setProfile(user.id, { photoDataUrl: croppedPng, updatedAt: Date.now() });
  2373:                 renderProfileAvatar(croppedPng, user);
  2374:                 renderUserCard(user);
  2375:               }
  2376:             },
  2377:             onCancel: ()=>{}
  2378:           });
  2379:         } catch (e){
  2380:           console.error('Photo upload error', e);
  2381:         }
  2382:       };
  2383:     }
  2384: 
  2385:     const rm = UI.el('#profileRemovePhoto');
  2386:     if(rm){
  2387:       rm.onclick = async ()=>{
  2388:         const hasPhoto = !!(Store.getProfile(user.id)||{}).photoDataUrl;
  2389:         if(!hasPhoto) return;
  2390:         const ok = await UI.confirm({ title:'Remove Profile Photo', message:'Remove your profile photo?', okText:'Remove', danger:true });
  2391:         if(!ok) return;
  2392: 
  2393:         if(cloudProfileEnabled()){
  2394:           const out = await CloudUsers.removeAvatar();
  2395:           if(!out.ok){
  2396:             await UI.alert({ title:'Remove failed', message: out.message || 'Could not remove avatar.' });
  2397:             return;
  2398:           }
  2399:         }
  2400: 
  2401:         Store.setProfile(user.id, { photoDataUrl: null, updatedAt: Date.now() });
  2402:         renderProfileAvatar(null, user);
  2403:         renderUserCard(Store.getUsers().find(u=>u.id===user.id) || user);
  2404:       };
  2405:     }
  2406: 
  2407:     UI.el('#profileSave').onclick = async ()=>{
  2408:       const name = String((nameEl && nameEl.value) || '').trim();
  2409:       const qbToken = ''; // QB token field removed from profile UI
  2410: 
  2411:       let teamIdSel = '';
  2412:       let teamOverrideSel = false;
  2413:       try{
  2414:         if(isSuperRole0 && teamSel){
  2415:           teamIdSel = String(teamSel.value||'').trim();
  2416:           teamOverrideSel = !!teamIdSel;
  2417:         }
  2418:       }catch(_){ }
  2419: 
  2420:       if(cloudProfileEnabled()){
  2421:         const payload = { name: name || (user.name||user.username), qb_token: qbToken };
  2422:         if(isSuperRole0){
  2423:           payload.team_id = teamOverrideSel ? teamIdSel : null;
  2424:           payload.team_override = !!teamOverrideSel;
  2425:         }
  2426: 
  2427:         const out = await CloudUsers.updateMe(payload);
  2428:         if(!out.ok){
  2429:           await UI.alert({ title:'Save failed', message: out.message || 'Could not update profile.' });
  2430:           return;
  2431:         }
  2432: 
  2433:         try{ await CloudUsers.refreshIntoLocalStore(); }catch(_){ }
  2434:       }
  2435: 
  2436:       const localPatch = { name: name || user.username };
  2437:       if(isSuperRole0){
  2438:         localPatch.teamOverride = !!teamOverrideSel;
  2439:         localPatch.teamId = teamOverrideSel ? teamIdSel : '';
  2440:       }
  2441:       Store.updateUser(user.id, localPatch);
  2442:       try{ Store.setProfile(user.id, { qb_token: qbToken, updatedAt: Date.now() }); }catch(_){ }
  2443: 
  2444:       if(layoutSel){
  2445:         localStorage.setItem('mums_profile_layout', String(layoutSel.value||'card'));
  2446:       }
  2447: 
  2448:       const updated = Store.getUsers().find(u=>u.id===user.id);
  2449:       if(updated){ renderUserCard(updated); }
  2450:       if(shouldOpenModal){
  2451:         UI.closeModal('profileModal');
  2452:       }
  2453:     };
  2454: 
  2455:     if(shouldOpenModal){
  2456:       UI.openModal('profileModal');
  2457:     }
  2458:   }
  2459: 
  2460:   function renderProfileAvatar(photoDataUrl, user){
  2461:     const box = UI.el('#profileAvatar');
  2462:     if(!box) return;
  2463:     const initStr = UI.esc(UI.initials((user&&(user.name||user.username))||''));
  2464:     const fallbackHtml = `<div class="initials" style="font-size:28px">${initStr}</div>`;
  2465:     if(photoDataUrl){
  2466:       const img = document.createElement('img');
  2467:       img.alt = 'User photo';
  2468:       img.className = 'mums-avatar-img';
  2469:       img.onerror = () => { box.innerHTML = fallbackHtml; };
  2470:       img.onload = () => { box.innerHTML = ''; box.appendChild(img); };
  2471:       // Show initials immediately while image loads (no broken-img flash)
  2472:       box.innerHTML = fallbackHtml;
  2473:       img.src = photoDataUrl; // set AFTER event handlers are bound
  2474:     } else {
  2475:       box.innerHTML = fallbackHtml;
  2476:     }
  2477:   }
  2478: 
  2479:   function canSeeLog(me, entry){
  2480:     const isSuper = me.role === Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN;
  2481:     const isAdmin = isSuper || me.role === Config.ROLES.ADMIN;
  2482:     const isLead = me.role === Config.ROLES.TEAM_LEAD;
  2483:     if(isAdmin) return true;
  2484:     if(isLead){
  2485:       const showAll = localStorage.getItem('ums_logs_show_all') === '1';
  2486:       return showAll ? true : (entry.teamId === me.teamId);
  2487:     }
  2488:     return entry.teamId === me.teamId;
  2489:   }
  2490: 
  2491:   function renderSideLogs(user){
  2492:     try{
  2493:       if(window.Components && Components.SidebarLogs){
  2494:         Components.SidebarLogs.render(user);
  2495:         return;
  2496:       }
  2497:     }catch(_){ }
  2498:     const box = UI.el('#sideLogs');
  2499:     const list = UI.el('#sideLogsList');
  2500:     const hint = UI.el('#sideLogsHint');
  2501:     const viewAllBtn = UI.el('#sideLogsViewAll');
  2502:     if(!box) return;
  2503: 
  2504:     const openLogs = ()=>{ try{ navigateToPageId('logs'); }catch(_){ window.location.hash = '#logs'; } };
  2505:     if(viewAllBtn) viewAllBtn.onclick = openLogs;
  2506: 
  2507:     if(!list || !hint) return;
  2508: 
  2509:     const logs = Store.getLogs().filter(l=>canSeeLog(user,l)).slice(0,6);
  2510:     if(hint) hint.textContent = logs.length ? `Updated ${logs.length} item${logs.length>1?'s':''}` : 'No activity';
  2511: 
  2512:     const fmt = (ts)=>{
  2513:       try{
  2514:         const p = UI.manilaParts(new Date(ts));
  2515:         const hh = String(p.hh).padStart(2,'0');
  2516:         const mm = String(p.mm).padStart(2,'0');
  2517:         return `${hh}:${mm}`;
  2518:       }catch(e){
  2519:         const d = new Date(ts);
  2520:         const hh = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');
  2521:         const mm = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
  2522:         return `${hh}:${mm}`;
  2523:       }
  2524:     };
  2525: 
  2526:     if(!logs.length){
  2527:       list.innerHTML = '<div class="log-empty">No recent activity.</div>';
  2528:       return;
  2529:     }
  2530: 
  2531:     list.innerHTML = logs.map((e, idx)=>{
  2532:       const teamClass = `team-${e.teamId}`;
  2533:       const msg = UI.esc(e.msg||e.action||'Activity updated');
  2534:       return `<div class="logline ${teamClass}" title="${UI.esc(e.detail||'')}">
  2535:         <span class="t">${fmt(e.ts)}</span>
  2536:         <span class="tl-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  2537:         <span class="m">${msg}</span>
  2538:       </div>`;
  2539:     }).join('');
  2540:   }
  2541: 
  2542:   function setActiveNav(page){
  2543:     UI.els('#nav a').forEach(a=>a.classList.toggle('active', a.dataset.page===page));
  2544:     UI.els('#nav .nav-group').forEach(g=>g.classList.remove('active'));
  2545:     const active = UI.el(`#nav a[data-page="${CSS.escape(page)}"]`);
  2546:     if(active){
  2547:       const group = active.closest('.nav-group');
  2548:       if(group){
  2549:         group.classList.add('active');
  2550:         const kids = group.querySelector('.nav-group-kids');
  2551:         const head = group.querySelector('.nav-group-head');
  2552:         if(kids && kids.style.display==='none'){
  2553:           kids.style.display = 'block';
  2554:           if(head) head.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
  2555:           const id = group.getAttribute('data-group');
  2556:           if(id) localStorage.setItem(`nav_group_${id}`,'1');
  2557:         }
  2558:       }
  2559:     }
  2560:   }

  2562:   function renderRightNow(){
  2563:     const chip = UI.el('#summaryNowChip');
  2564:     if(chip) chip.textContent = 'Asia/Manila';
  2565:   }

  2567:   function mkGuideSvg(title, lines){
  2568:     const esc = UI.esc;
  2569:     let arr = [];
  2570:     if(Array.isArray(lines)) arr = lines;
  2571:     else if(typeof lines === 'string') arr = lines.split('\n');
  2572:     else if(lines != null) arr = [String(lines)];
  2573:     const safeLines = arr.slice(0,6).map(x=>esc(x));
  2574:     const lineY = [54,76,98,120,142,164];
  2575:     const text = safeLines.map((t,i)=>`<text x="28" y="${lineY[i]}" font-size="12" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.82)" font-family="system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto">${t}</text>`).join('');
  2576:     return `
  2577:       <svg viewBox="0 0 520 200" width="100%" height="140" aria-hidden="true">
  2578:         <defs>
  2579:           <linearGradient id="g" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
  2580:             <stop offset="0" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,.10)"/>
  2581:             <stop offset="1" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,.05)"/>
  2582:           </linearGradient>
  2583:         </defs>
  2584:         <rect x="10" y="10" width="500" height="180" rx="18" fill="url(#g)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.12)"/>
  2585:         <rect x="24" y="26" width="472" height="28" rx="10" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.18)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.10)"/>
  2586:         <text x="36" y="46" font-size="13" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.92)" font-weight="700" font-family="system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto">${esc(title)}</text>
  2587:         ${text}
  2588:         <rect x="24" y="158" width="180" height="18" rx="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.07)"/>
  2589:         <rect x="212" y="158" width="120" height="18" rx="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.06)"/>
  2590:         <rect x="340" y="158" width="156" height="18" rx="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.05)"/>
  2591:       </svg>
  2592:     `;
  2593:   }

  2728: 
  2729:   function buildGuideKB(){
  2730:     const kb=[];
  2731:     const guides=GUIDES||{};
  2732:     const sections=[['guide','GUIDE'],['notes','NOTES'],['legends','LEGENDS'],['manual','MANUAL']];
  2733:     const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase();
  2734:     Object.keys(guides).forEach(pageId=>{
  2735:       const g=guides[pageId]||{};
  2736:       const pageTitle=g.title||pageId;
  2737:       sections.forEach(([key,label])=>{
  2738:         const items=g[key]||[];
  2739:         if(key==='notes'){
  2740:           items.forEach((t,i)=>{
  2741:             const q=label+' '+(i+1);
  2742:             const a=String(t||'');
  2743:             const blob=norm([pageId,pageTitle,label,q,a].join(' '));
  2744:             kb.push({pageId,pageTitle,section:label,q,aShort:a,aLong:'',steps:[],tips:[],tags:[],blob});
  2745:           });
  2746:           return;
  2747:         }
  2748:         if(key==='legends'){
  2749:           items.forEach((r,i)=>{
  2750:             const q=String((r&&r[0])|| (label+' '+(i+1)));
  2751:             const a=String((r&&r[1])||'');
  2752:             const blob=norm([pageId,pageTitle,label,q,a].join(' '));
  2753:             kb.push({pageId,pageTitle,section:label,q,aShort:a,aLong:'',steps:[],tips:[],tags:[],blob});
  2754:           });
  2755:           return;
  2756:         }
  2757:         if(key==='manual'){
  2758:           items.forEach((it,i)=>{
  2759:             const q=String(it?.title || ('Manual '+(i+1)));
  2760:             const a=String(it?.caption || '');
  2761:             const blob=norm([pageId,pageTitle,label,q,a].join(' '));
  2762:             kb.push({pageId,pageTitle,section:label,q,aShort:a,aLong:'',steps:[],tips:[],tags:[],blob});
  2763:           });
  2764:           return;
  2765:         }
  2766:         items.forEach((it,i)=>{
  2767:           if(!it) return;
  2768:           const q=String(it.q || ('Guide '+(i+1)));
  2769:           const a=String(it.a || it.a_short || '');
  2770:           const aLong=String(it.a_long || '');
  2771:           const steps=Array.isArray(it.steps)?it.steps:[];
  2772:           const tips=Array.isArray(it.tips)?it.tips:[];
  2773:           const tags=Array.isArray(it.tags)?it.tags:[];
  2774:           const blob=norm([pageId,pageTitle,label,q,a,aLong,steps.join(' '),tips.join(' '),tags.join(' ')].join(' '));
  2775:           kb.push({pageId,pageTitle,section:label,q,aShort:a,aLong,steps,tips,tags,blob});
  2776:         });
  2777:       });
  2778:     });
  2779:     return kb;
  2780:   }
  2781: 
  2782:   const _guideKB = buildGuideKB();
  2783: 
  2784:   function _tokenize(s){
  2785:     return String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g,' ').split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).filter(w=>w.length>1);
  2786:   }
  2787: 
  2788:   function _scoreGuideItem(tokens, item, currentPageId){
  2789:     let score=0;
  2790:     if(item.pageId===currentPageId) score+=20;
  2791:     const blob=item.blob||'';
  2792:     const q=String(item.q||'').toLowerCase();
  2793:     for(const t of tokens){
  2794:       if(blob.includes(t)) score+=3;
  2795:       if(q.includes(t)) score+=4;
  2796:     }
  2797:     const joined=tokens.join(' ');
  2798:     if(joined.includes('paint') && blob.includes('paint')) score+=8;
  2799:     if(joined.includes('coverage') && blob.includes('coverage')) score+=8;
  2800:     if(joined.includes('clear') && blob.includes('clear')) score+=6;
  2801:     if((joined.includes('sl')||joined.includes('el')||joined.includes('vl')||joined.includes('hl')) && item.section==='LEGENDS') score+=6;
  2802:     return score;
  2803:   }
  2804: 
  2805:   function updateAnnouncementBar(){
  2806:     const bar = UI.el('#announceBar');
  2807:     const active = UI.activeAnnouncements();
  2808: 
  2809:     const titleEl = UI.el('#announceTitle');
  2810:     const msgEl = UI.el('#announceMsg');
  2811:     const metaEl = UI.el('#announceMeta');
  2812:     const avatarEl = UI.el('#announceAvatar');
  2813:     const whoEl = UI.el('#announceWho');
  2814: 
  2815:     if(!active.length){
  2816:       bar.style.visibility='hidden';
  2817:       bar.dataset.count='0';
  2818:       bar.dataset.idx='0';
  2819:       if(avatarEl) avatarEl.innerHTML = '';
  2820:       if(whoEl) whoEl.textContent = '';
  2821:       return;
  2822:     }
  2823: 
  2824:     bar.style.visibility='visible';
  2825:     const count = active.length;
  2826:     const idx = Number(bar.dataset.idx||0) % count;
  2827:     const a = active[idx];
  2828: 
  2829:     bar.dataset.count = String(count);
  2830:     bar.dataset.idx = String(idx);
  2831: 
  2832:     const who = a.createdByName || '—';
  2833:     if(whoEl) whoEl.textContent = who;
  2834: 
  2835:     const tms = a.startAt || a.createdAt;
  2836:     let when = '—';
  2837:     if(tms){
  2838:       const ts = new Date(tms);
  2839:       const p = UI.manilaParts(ts);
  2840:       const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0');
  2841:       when = `${p.isoDate} ${pad(p.hh)}:${pad(p.mm)}`;
  2842:     }
  2843: 
  2844:     if(titleEl) titleEl.textContent = String(a.title||'Announcement');
  2845:     if(msgEl) msgEl.textContent = String(a.short || '').trim() || '—';
  2846:     if(metaEl) metaEl.textContent = when ? `Active from ${when}` : '';
  2847: 
  2848:     try{
  2849:       const pid = String(a.createdBy||'');
  2850:       const prof = pid ? Store.getProfile(pid) : null;
  2851:       const photo = prof && prof.photoDataUrl ? prof.photoDataUrl : '';
  2852:       const initials = String(who||'—').trim().split(/\s+/).slice(0,2).map(x=>x[0]||'').join('').toUpperCase();
  2853:       if(avatarEl){
  2854:         avatarEl.innerHTML = photo
  2855:           ? `<img src="${photo}" alt="" />`
  2856:           : `<div class="initials">${UI.esc(initials || '—')}</div>`;
  2857:       }
  2858:     }catch(_){}
  2859: 
  2860:     bar.onclick = ()=>{
  2861:       UI.el('#annModalTitle').textContent = a.title || 'Announcement';
  2862:       const body = UI.el('#annModalBody');
  2863:       if(a.fullHtml){ body.innerHTML = a.fullHtml; }
  2864:       else { body.textContent = a.full || a.short || ''; }
  2865:       UI.openModal('topAnnModal');
  2866:     };
  2867:   }
  2868: 
  2869:   function startAnnouncementRotation(){
  2870:     if(annTimer) return;
  2871:     updateAnnouncementBar();
  2872:     // PERF FIX v4.0: Increased from 3s to 8s — 3s caused unnecessary DOM thrashing.
  2873:     annTimer = setInterval(()=>{
  2874:       try{
  2875:       const bar = UI.el('#announceBar');
  2876:       const count = Number(bar.dataset.count||0);
  2877:       if(count<=1){ updateAnnouncementBar(); return; }
  2878:       bar.dataset.idx = String((Number(bar.dataset.idx||0)+1)%count);
  2879:       updateAnnouncementBar();
  2880: 
  2881:       }catch(e){ console.error('Announcement interval error', e); }
  2882:     }, 8000);
  2883:   }
  2884: 
  2885: 
  2886:   function _normalizeRouteSegment(raw){
  2887:     try{
  2888:       let s = String(raw||'').trim();
  2889:       if(!s) return '';
  2890:       if(s.startsWith('#')) s = s.slice(1);
  2891:       if(s.startsWith('/')) s = s.slice(1);
  2892:       return s.split('?')[0].split('#')[0].split('/')[0] || '';
  2893:     }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2894:   }
  2895: 
  2896:   function _normalizeRoutePath(raw){
  2897:     try{
  2898:       let s = String(raw||'').trim();
  2899:       if(!s) return '';
  2900:       if(s.startsWith('#')) s = s.slice(1);
  2901:       if(s.startsWith('/')) s = s.slice(1);
  2902:       s = s.split('?')[0].split('#')[0];
  2903:       s = s.replace(/\/+$/g,'');
  2904:       return s;
  2905:     }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2906:   }
  2907: 
  2908:   function _routePageIdFromRoutePath(routePath){
  2909:     try{
  2910:       const rp = String(routePath||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  2911:       if(rp === 'distribution/monitoring') return 'distribution_monitoring';
  2912:       // System sub-pages all resolve to main 'system' page (tab driven internally)
  2913:       if(rp.startsWith('system/') || rp === 'system') return 'system';
  2914:       // Backward compatibility for legacy System submenu URLs like /system_overview
  2915:       if(rp.startsWith('system_')) return 'system';
  2916:       return String(routePath||'').split('/')[0] || '';
  2917:     }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2918:   }
  2919: 
  2920:   function _routePathForPageId(pageId){
  2921:     try{
  2922:       const id = String(pageId||'').trim();
  2923:       if(id === 'distribution_monitoring') return '/distribution/monitoring';
  2924:       if(id.startsWith('system_')){
  2925:         const tab = id.slice('system_'.length).trim().toLowerCase();
  2926:         return tab ? ('/system/' + tab) : '/system';
  2927:       }
  2928:       return '/' + id;
  2929:     }catch(_){ return '/' + String(pageId||''); }
  2930:   }
  2931: 
  2932:   function _routePageIdFromHref(href){
  2933:     // FIX v3.9.31: System sub-menu tab fix.
  2934:     // Nav items for system sub-pages have href="/system_supabase" (built from n.id).
  2935:     // _routePageIdFromRoutePath converts BOTH "/system_supabase" and "/system/supabase"
  2936:     // to "system" — so navigateToPageId always got "system" and pushed /system to history,
  2937:     // which means tabFromRoute() always returned "overview".
  2938:     // FIX: Return the full "system_supabase" id from href so navigateToPageId can call
  2939:     // _routePathForPageId("system_supabase") which correctly builds "/system/supabase",
  2940:     // allowing tabFromRoute() inside Pages.system to read the correct tab from the URL.
  2941:     // NOTE: resolveRoutePageId() uses _routePageIdFromRoutePath (not this fn) so it still
  2942:     // returns "system" → Pages.system(main) is still called correctly. No regression.
  2943:     try{
  2944:       const h = String(href||'').trim();
  2945:       if(!h) return '';
  2946: 
  2947:       if(h[0] === '#' || h[0] === '/'){
  2948:         const routePath = _normalizeRoutePath(h);
  2949:         // Preserve full system_tab id (e.g. "system_supabase") so navigateToPageId
  2950:         // builds the correct /system/supabase URL instead of collapsing to /system.
  2951:         if(routePath.startsWith('system_') && routePath.length > 'system_'.length){
  2952:           return routePath.toLowerCase(); // "system_supabase", "system_requests", etc.
  2953:         }
  2954:         // /system/supabase format (hash or path): rebuild as system_tab
  2955:         if(routePath.startsWith('system/') && routePath.split('/')[1]){
  2956:           return 'system_' + routePath.split('/')[1].toLowerCase();
  2957:         }
  2958:         return _routePageIdFromRoutePath(routePath);
  2959:       }
  2960:       return '';
  2961:     }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2962:   }
  2963: 
  2964:   function resolveRoutePageId(){
  2965:     try{
  2966:       const pages = window.Pages || {};
  2967:       const hashPath = _normalizeRoutePath(window.location.hash||'');
  2968:       const hashId = _routePageIdFromRoutePath(hashPath);
  2969: 
  2970:       const proto = String(window.location.protocol||'');
  2971:       if(proto !== 'file:'){
  2972:         const path = _normalizeRoutePath(window.location.pathname||'/');
  2973:         const pathId = _routePageIdFromRoutePath(path);
  2974: 
  2975:         if(pathId && !pathId.includes('.') && pages[pathId]) return pathId;
  2976:         if(hashId && pages[hashId]) return hashId;
  2977:       }else{
  2978:         if(hashId && pages[hashId]) return hashId;
  2979:       }
  2980: 
  2981:       if(pages['dashboard']) return 'dashboard';
  2982:       const keys = Object.keys(pages);
  2983:       return keys.length ? keys[0] : 'dashboard';
  2984:     }catch(_){
  2985:       return 'dashboard';
  2986:     }
  2987:   }
  2988: 
  2989:   const NAV_RENDER = {
  2990:     seq: 0,
  2991:     queued: false,
  2992:     queuedReason: '',
  2993:     inFlight: false,
  2994:     lastPageId: '',
  2995:     lastHref: ''
  2996:   };
  2997: 
  2998:   function requestRouteRender(reason){
  2999:     NAV_RENDER.queuedReason = String(reason||'route');
  3000:     if(NAV_RENDER.queued) return;
  3001:     NAV_RENDER.queued = true;
  3002:     Promise.resolve().then(()=>{
  3003:       NAV_RENDER.queued = false;
  3004:       route(NAV_RENDER.queuedReason || 'route');
  3005:     });
  3006:   }
  3007: 
  3008: 
  3009:   function navigateToPageId(pageId, opts){
  3010:     const pages = window.Pages || {};
  3011:     const requestedId = String(pageId||'').trim();
  3012:     let id = requestedId;
  3013:     if(!id || !pages[id]){
  3014:       if(id.startsWith('system_') && pages['system']) id = 'system';
  3015:       else id = pages['dashboard'] ? 'dashboard' : (Object.keys(pages)[0] || 'dashboard');
  3016:     }
  3017: 
  3018:     const proto = String(window.location.protocol||'');
  3019:     if(proto === 'file:'){
  3020:       window.location.hash = '#' + id;
  3021:       return;
  3022:     }
  3023: 
  3024:     try{
  3025:       const url = _routePathForPageId(requestedId || id);
  3026:       const currentPath = _normalizeRoutePath(window.location.pathname||'/');
  3027:       const targetPath = _normalizeRoutePath(url);
  3028:       if(currentPath === targetPath && NAV_RENDER.lastPageId === id){
  3029:         requestRouteRender('navigate:same-page-refresh');
  3030:         return;
  3031:       }
  3032:       if(opts && opts.replace) history.replaceState({},'', url);
  3033:       else history.pushState({},'', url);
  3034:       try{ if(window.location.hash) history.replaceState({},'', url); }catch(_){ }
  3035:       requestRouteRender('navigate:' + id);
  3036:     }catch(_){
  3037:       window.location.hash = '#' + id;
  3038:     }
  3039:   }
  3040: 
  3041:   function route(reason){
  3042:     const runSeq = ++NAV_RENDER.seq;
  3043:     NAV_RENDER.inFlight = true;
  3044:     try{
  3045:       const user = Auth.getUser();
  3046:       if(!user) return;
  3047:       renderUserCard(user);
  3048:       renderSideLogs(user);
  3049: 
  3050:       const pageId = resolveRoutePageId();
  3051:       NAV_RENDER.lastPageId = pageId;
  3052:       NAV_RENDER.lastHref = String(window.location.pathname || window.location.hash || '');
  3053: 
  3054:       if(runSeq !== NAV_RENDER.seq) return;
  3055: 
  3056: 	      try{ window._currentPageId = pageId; }catch(_){ }
  3057: 	      try{ window.__mumsRouteSeq = runSeq; }catch(_){ }
  3058:       try{
  3059:         const menu = (Config && Array.isArray(Config.NAV)) ? Config.NAV : [];
  3060:         const flat = [];
  3061:         menu.forEach((item)=>{
  3062:           if(!item) return;
  3063:           flat.push(item);
  3064:           if(Array.isArray(item.children)) item.children.forEach(child=> flat.push(child));
  3065:         });
  3066:         const m = flat.find(x=>x && x.id===pageId) || null;
  3067:         window._currentPageLabel = m ? (m.label||pageId) : pageId;
  3068:       }catch(e){ window._currentPageLabel = pageId; }
  3069: 
  3070:       if(runSeq !== NAV_RENDER.seq) return;
  3071: 
  3072:       setActiveNav(pageId);
  3073: 
  3074:       const main = UI.el('#main');
  3075:       if(!main) return;
  3076:       if(cleanup){ try{ cleanup(); }catch(e){} cleanup=null; }
  3077:       main.innerHTML = '';
  3078:       main.dataset.routeSeq = String(runSeq);
  3079: 
  3080:       try{
  3081:         window.Pages[pageId](main);
  3082:       }catch(pageErr){
  3083:         showFatalError(pageErr);
  3084:       }
  3085:       if(runSeq !== NAV_RENDER.seq) return;
  3086:       if(main._cleanup){ cleanup = main._cleanup; main._cleanup = null; }
  3087: 
  3088:       updateAnnouncementBar();
  3089:     }catch(e){
  3090:       showFatalError(e);
  3091:     }finally{
  3092:       if(runSeq === NAV_RENDER.seq) NAV_RENDER.inFlight = false;
  3093:     }
  3094:   }
  3095: 
  3096:   const ReminderEngine = (function(){
  3097:     let started = false;
  3098:     let timer = null;
  3099:     let ticking = false;
  3100: 
  3101:     let showAll = false;
  3102:     const expanded = new Set();
  3103:     let lastSignature = '';
  3104: 
  3105:     const KEYS = {
  3106:       my: 'mums_my_reminders',
  3107:       team: 'mums_team_reminders',
  3108:       settings: 'mums_reminder_settings',
  3109:       prefsPrefix: 'mums_reminder_prefs_'
  3110:     };
  3111: 
  3112:     function getSettings(){
  3113:       try{
  3114:         if(window.Store && typeof Store.getReminderSettings === 'function'){
  3115:           return Store.getReminderSettings();
  3116:         }
  3117:       }catch(_){}
  3118:       return { snoozePresets:[5,10,15,30], categories:['Work','Personal','Urgent'], escalationAfterMin:2, maxVisible:3 };
  3119:     }
  3120: 
  3121:     function getPrefs(userId){
  3122:       try{
  3123:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(KEYS.prefsPrefix + String(userId));
  3124:         if(!raw) return { muteUntil: 0 };
  3125:         const o = JSON.parse(raw);
  3126:         return (o && typeof o === 'object') ? { muteUntil: Number(o.muteUntil||0) } : { muteUntil: 0 };
  3127:       }catch(_){ return { muteUntil: 0 }; }
  3128:     }
  3129:     function setPrefs(userId, patch){
  3130:       try{
  3131:         const cur = getPrefs(userId);
  3132:         const next = Object.assign({}, cur, patch||{});
  3133:         next.muteUntil = Number(next.muteUntil||0);
  3134:         localStorage.setItem(KEYS.prefsPrefix + String(userId), JSON.stringify(next));
  3135:         try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail:{ key: KEYS.prefsPrefix + String(userId) }})); }catch(_){}
  3136:       }catch(_){}
  3137:     }
  3138: 
  3139:     const Audio = (function(){
  3140:       let ctx = null;
  3141:       let osc = null;
  3142:       let gain = null;
  3143:       let running = false;
  3144:       let locked = false;
  3145:       let pulseTimer = null;
  3146:       let curInterval = 650;
  3147: 
  3148:       function ensure(){
  3149:         if(ctx) return;
  3150:         try{
  3151:           const AC = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
  3152:           if(!AC) return;
  3153:           ctx = new AC();
  3154:           gain = ctx.createGain();
  3155:           gain.gain.value = 0.0001;
  3156:           gain.connect(ctx.destination);
  3157:           osc = ctx.createOscillator();
  3158:           osc.type = 'sine';
  3159:           osc.frequency.value = 880;
  3160:           osc.connect(gain);
  3161:           osc.start();
  3162:         }catch(e){
  3163:           ctx=null; osc=null; gain=null;
  3164:         }
  3165:       }
  3166:       async function unlock(){
  3167:         try{
  3168:           ensure();
  3169:           if(!ctx) return false;
  3170:           if(ctx.state === 'suspended') await ctx.resume();
  3171:           locked = false;
  3172:           return true;
  3173:         }catch(e){
  3174:           locked = true;
  3175:           return false;
  3176:         }
  3177:       }
  3178:       async function start(mode){
  3179:         ensure();
  3180:         if(!ctx || !gain) { locked=true; return; }
  3181:         try{
  3182:           if(ctx.state === 'suspended') await ctx.resume();
  3183:           locked = false;
  3184:         }catch(e){ locked=true; }
  3185:         const interval = (mode && mode.interval) ? Number(mode.interval) : 650;
  3186:         const amp = (mode && mode.amp) ? Number(mode.amp) : 0.04;
  3187: 
  3188:         if(running && interval === curInterval) return;
  3189: 
  3190:         running = true;
  3191:         curInterval = interval;
  3192: 
  3193:         try{ if(pulseTimer) clearInterval(pulseTimer); }catch(_){}
  3194:         pulseTimer = null;
  3195: 
  3196:         let on = false;
  3197:         const pulse = ()=>{
  3198:           if(!running) return;
  3199:           try{
  3200:             on = !on;
  3201:             gain.gain.setTargetAtTime(on ? amp : 0.0001, ctx.currentTime, 0.01);
  3202:           }catch(e){}
  3203:         };
  3204:         pulse();
  3205:         pulseTimer = setInterval(pulse, curInterval);
  3206:       }
  3207:       function stop(){
  3208:         running = false;
  3209:         try{ if(pulseTimer) clearInterval(pulseTimer); }catch(_){}
  3210:         pulseTimer = null;
  3211:         try{
  3212:           if(gain && ctx) gain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.0001, ctx.currentTime, 0.01);
  3213:         }catch(e){}
  3214:       }
  3215:       function isLocked(){ return !!locked; }
  3216:       return { start, stop, unlock, isLocked };
  3217:     })();
  3218: 
  3219:     function repeatLabel(r){
  3220:       const rep = String(r.repeat||'none');
  3221:       if(rep === 'custom') return 'Custom';
  3222:       if(rep === 'daily') return 'Daily';
  3223:       if(rep === 'weekly') return 'Weekly';
  3224:       return 'One-time';
  3225:     }
  3226: 
  3227:     function nextAlarmAtForReminder(r, now){
  3228:       const rep = String(r.repeat||'none');
  3229:       const base = Number(r.alarmAt||now);
  3230:       if(rep === 'none') return base;
  3231: 
  3232:       const baseDate = new Date(base);
  3233:       const hh = baseDate.getHours();
  3234:       const mm = baseDate.getMinutes();
  3235: 
  3236:       const makeCandidate = (d)=>{
  3237:         const dt = new Date(d);
  3238:         dt.setHours(hh, mm, 0, 0);
  3239:         return dt.getTime();
  3240:       };
  3241: 
  3242:       if(rep === 'daily'){
  3243:         let t = makeCandidate(now);
  3244:         if(t <= now + 500) t += 24*60*60*1000;
  3245:         return t;
  3246:       }
  3247: 
  3248:       if(rep === 'weekly'){
  3249:         const targetDow = baseDate.getDay();
  3250:         const d0 = new Date(now);
  3251:         d0.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  3252:         for(let i=0;i<14;i++){
  3253:           const d = new Date(d0.getTime() + i*24*60*60*1000);
  3254:           if(d.getDay() === targetDow){
  3255:             const t = makeCandidate(d.getTime());
  3256:             if(t > now + 500) return t;
  3257:           }
  3258:         }
  3259:         return base + 7*24*60*60*1000;
  3260:       }
  3261: 
  3262:       if(rep === 'custom'){
  3263:         const days = Array.isArray(r.repeatDays) ? r.repeatDays.map(x=>Number(x)).filter(x=>x>=0 && x<=6) : [];
  3264:         if(!days.length) return base;
  3265:         const set = new Set(days);
  3266:         const d0 = new Date(now);
  3267:         d0.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  3268:         for(let i=0;i<21;i++){
  3269:           const d = new Date(d0.getTime() + i*24*60*60*1000);
  3270:           if(set.has(d.getDay())){
  3271:             const t = makeCandidate(d.getTime());
  3272:             if(t > now + 500) return t;
  3273:           }
  3274:         }
  3275:         return base + 7*24*60*60*1000;
  3276:       }
  3277: 
  3278:       return base;
  3279:     }
  3280: 
  3281:     function getActiveForUser(user){
  3282:       const now = Date.now();
  3283:       const active = [];
  3284:       try{
  3285:         const my = (Store.getMyReminders && Store.getMyReminders(user.id)) || [];
  3286:         my.forEach(r=>{
  3287:           if(!r || r.closedAt) return;
  3288:           const dueAt = (r.snoozeUntil && r.snoozeUntil>now) ? r.snoozeUntil : r.alarmAt;
  3289:           if(now >= Number(dueAt||0)){
  3290:             const ageMin = Math.max(0, (now - Number(dueAt||now)) / 60000);
  3291:             active.push({ kind:'my', r, dueAt, ageMin });
  3292:           }
  3293:         });
  3294: 
  3295:         const team = (Store.getTeamReminders && Store.getTeamReminders(user.teamId)) || [];
  3296:         team.forEach(r=>{
  3297:           if(!r) return;
  3298:           const st = (r.perUser && r.perUser[String(user.id)]) ? r.perUser[String(user.id)] : {};
  3299:           if(st && st.closedAt) return;
  3300:           const dueAt = (st && st.snoozeUntil && st.snoozeUntil>now) ? st.snoozeUntil : r.alarmAt;
  3301:           if(now >= Number(dueAt||0)){
  3302:             const ageMin = Math.max(0, (now - Number(dueAt||now)) / 60000);
  3303:             active.push({ kind:'team', r, dueAt, ageMin });
  3304:           }
  3305:         });
  3306:       }catch(e){}
  3307: 
  3308:       active.sort((a,b)=>{
  3309:         const pa = (a.r && a.r.priority==='high') ? 0 : 1;
  3310:         const pb = (b.r && b.r.priority==='high') ? 0 : 1;
  3311:         if(pa!==pb) return pa-pb;
  3312:         return (a.dueAt||0)-(b.dueAt||0);
  3313:       });
  3314:       return active;
  3315:     }
  3316: 
  3317:     function getNextDueForUser(user){
  3318:       const now = Date.now();
  3319:       let min = null;
  3320:       try{
  3321:         const my = (Store.getMyReminders && Store.getMyReminders(user.id)) || [];
  3322:         my.forEach(r=>{
  3323:           if(!r || r.closedAt) return;
  3324:           const dueAt = (r.snoozeUntil && r.snoozeUntil>now) ? r.snoozeUntil : r.alarmAt;
  3325:           const t = Number(dueAt||0);
  3326:           if(!t) return;
  3327:           if(min===null || t < min) min = t;
  3328:         });
  3329: 
  3330:         const team = (Store.getTeamReminders && Store.getTeamReminders(user.teamId)) || [];
  3331:         team.forEach(r=>{
  3332:           if(!r) return;
  3333:           const st = (r.perUser && r.perUser[String(user.id)]) ? r.perUser[String(user.id)] : {};
  3334:           if(st && st.closedAt) return;
  3335:           const dueAt = (st && st.snoozeUntil && st.snoozeUntil>now) ? st.snoozeUntil : r.alarmAt;
  3336:           const t = Number(dueAt||0);
  3337:           if(!t) return;
  3338:           if(min===null || t < min) min = t;
  3339:         });
  3340:       }catch(_){}
  3341:       return min;
  3342:     }
  3343: 
  3344:     function signatureFor(active, settings){
  3345:       const parts = active.map(a=>{
  3346:         const r = a.r||{};
  3347:         return [
  3348:           a.kind, r.id,
  3349:           Number(a.dueAt||0),
  3350:           String(r.short||''),
  3351:           String(r.details||''),
  3352:           String(r.priority||'normal'),
  3353:           String(r.category||''),
  3354:           String(r.repeat||'none'),
  3355:           Array.isArray(r.repeatDays)? r.repeatDays.join('.') : '',
  3356:           Math.floor(a.ageMin*10)/10
  3357:         ].join('|');
  3358:       });
  3359:       return [String(showAll), String(Audio.isLocked()), String(settings.escalationAfterMin||0), String(settings.maxVisible||3), parts.join(';;')].join('::');
  3360:     }
  3361: 
  3362:     function renderCards(user, active){
  3363:       const host = UI.el('#reminderFloatHost');
  3364:       if(!host) return;
  3365: 
  3366:       const settings = getSettings();
  3367:       const sig = signatureFor(active, settings);
  3368: 
  3369:       if(sig === lastSignature){
  3370:         return;
  3371:       }
  3372:       lastSignature = sig;
  3373: 
  3374:       host.innerHTML = '';
  3375:       if(!active.length) return;
  3376: 
  3377:       const maxVisible = Math.max(1, Number(settings.maxVisible||3));
  3378:       const now = Date.now();
  3379: 
  3380:       const visible = showAll ? active : active.slice(0, maxVisible);
  3381:       const hiddenCount = showAll ? 0 : Math.max(0, active.length - visible.length);
  3382: 
  3383:       if(hiddenCount > 0){
  3384:         const more = document.createElement('div');
  3385:         more.className = 'reminder-card more';
  3386:         more.innerHTML = `
  3387:           <div class="rc-top">
  3388:             <div class="rc-badge">Reminders</div>
  3389:             <div style="min-width:0;flex:1 1 auto">
  3390:               <div class="rc-title">+${hiddenCount} more</div>
  3391:               <div class="rc-meta">Click to expand the full list</div>
  3392:             </div>
  3393:             <div class="rc-actions">
  3394:               <button class="rc-close" type="button" title="Show all">Show</button>
  3395:             </div>
  3396:           </div>
  3397:         `;
  3398:         more.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
  3399:           e.stopPropagation();
  3400:           showAll = true;
  3401:           tickSoon(0);
  3402:         });
  3403:         host.appendChild(more);
  3404:       }
  3405: 
  3406:       const presets = Array.isArray(settings.snoozePresets) ? settings.snoozePresets : [5,10];
  3407: 
  3408:       visible.forEach(item=>{
  3409:         const r = item.r;
  3410:         const kind = item.kind;
  3411:         const isMy = kind==='my';
  3412:         const cls = isMy ? 'my' : 'team';
  3413:         const pri = (r.priority==='high') ? 'high' : 'normal';
  3414:         const dueLabel = new Date(item.dueAt||r.alarmAt||now).toLocaleString();
  3415:         const badge = isMy ? 'My Reminder' : 'Team Reminder';
  3416:         const cat = String(r.category||'').trim();
  3417:         const escalated = (Number(settings.escalationAfterMin||0) > 0) && (item.ageMin >= Number(settings.escalationAfterMin||0));
  3418: 
  3419:         const snoozeButtons = presets.slice(0, 6).map(m=>{
  3420:           const mm = Math.max(1, Number(m||0));
  3421:           return `<button class="reminder-pill" data-act="snooze" data-min="${UI.esc(String(mm))}" type="button">Snooze ${UI.esc(String(mm))}m</button>`;
  3422:         }).join('');
  3423: 
  3424:         const key = `${kind}:${String(r.id||'')}`;
  3425: 
  3426:         const card = document.createElement('div');
  3427:         card.className = `reminder-card ${cls} ${pri}${escalated ? ' escalated' : ''}${expanded.has(key) ? ' expanded' : ''}`;
  3428:         card.setAttribute('data-kind', kind);
  3429:         card.setAttribute('data-id', String(r.id||''));
  3430:         card.innerHTML = `
  3431:           <div class="rc-top">
  3432:             <div class="rc-badge">${UI.esc(badge)}</div>
  3433:             <div style="min-width:0;flex:1 1 auto">
  3434:               <div class="rc-title">${UI.esc(r.short||'Reminder')}</div>
  3435:               <div class="rc-meta">${UI.esc(dueLabel)}${cat ? ` • ${UI.esc(cat)}` : ''}${r.priority==='high' ? ' • HIGH' : ''}${Audio.isLocked() ? ' • Sound blocked (click)' : ''}${escalated ? ' • Escalated' : ''}</div>
  3436:             </div>
  3437:             <div class="rc-actions">
  3438:               <button class="rc-close" type="button" title="Close alarm">Close</button>
  3439:             </div>
  3440:           </div>
  3441: 
  3442:           <div class="rc-body">
  3443:             <div class="rc-details">${UI.esc(r.details||'')}</div>
  3444:             <div class="rc-row">
  3445:               <div><b>Repeat:</b> ${UI.esc(repeatLabel(r))}</div>
  3446:               <div><b>Duration:</b> ${UI.esc(String(r.durationMin||1))}m</div>
  3447:             </div>
  3448:             <div class="rc-pills">
  3449:               ${snoozeButtons}
  3450:               <button class="reminder-pill" data-act="mute" data-min="15" type="button">Mute 15m</button>
  3451:               <button class="reminder-pill primary" data-act="open" type="button">${isMy ? 'Open My Reminders' : 'Open Team Reminders'}</button>
  3452:             </div>
  3453:           </div>
  3454:         `;
  3455:         host.appendChild(card);
  3456: 
  3457:         const handleCardAction = async (e)=>{
  3458:           try{
  3459:             const closeBtn = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('.rc-close');
  3460:             const pill = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('.reminder-pill');
  3461:             if(closeBtn){
  3462:               e.stopPropagation();
  3463:               await Audio.unlock();
  3464:               handleClose(user, kind, r);
  3465:               tickSoon(50);
  3466:               return;
  3467:             }
  3468:             if(pill){
  3469:               e.stopPropagation();
  3470:               await Audio.unlock();
  3471:               const act = pill.getAttribute('data-act');
  3472:               if(act==='snooze'){
  3473:                 const min = Number(pill.getAttribute('data-min')||10);
  3474:                 handleSnooze(user, kind, r, min);
  3475:               }else if(act==='open'){
  3476:                 openReminderPage(isMy);
  3477:               }else if(act==='mute'){
  3478:                 const min = Math.max(1, Number(pill.getAttribute('data-min')||15));
  3479:                 const until = Date.now() + min*60*1000;
  3480:                 setPrefs(user.id, { muteUntil: until });
  3481:               }
  3482:               tickSoon(50);
  3483:               return;
  3484:             }
  3485:             await Audio.unlock();
  3486:             if(expanded.has(key)) expanded.delete(key); else expanded.add(key);
  3487:             tickSoon(0);
  3488:           }catch(_){}
  3489:         };
  3490: 
  3491:         card.addEventListener('click', handleCardAction);
  3492:         const closeEl = card.querySelector('.rc-close');
  3493:         if(closeEl) closeEl.addEventListener('click', handleCardAction);
  3494:         card.querySelectorAll('.reminder-pill').forEach(btn=> btn.addEventListener('click', handleCardAction));
  3495:       });
  3496:     }
  3497: 
  3498:     function handleClose(user, kind, r){
  3499:       const now = Date.now();
  3500:       if(kind==='my'){
  3501:         if((r.repeat||'none')==='none'){
  3502:           Store.updateMyReminder(r.id, { closedAt: now, snoozeUntil: null });
  3503:         }else{
  3504:           const t = nextAlarmAtForReminder(r, now);
  3505:           Store.updateMyReminder(r.id, { alarmAt: t, snoozeUntil: null, closedAt: null });
  3506:         }
  3507:       }else{
  3508:         Store.closeTeamReminderForUser(r.id, user.id);
  3509:         try{
  3510:           const all = Store.getAllTeamReminders ? Store.getAllTeamReminders() : [];
  3511:           const cur = all.find(x=>x && String(x.id)===String(r.id));
  3512:           if(cur && (cur.repeat||'none')!=='none'){
  3513:             const users = (Store.getUsers && Store.getUsers()) || [];
  3514:             const members = users.filter(u => u && u.status==='active' && String(u.teamId)===String(cur.teamId));
  3515:             const ids = members.map(u=>String(u.id));
  3516:             const perUser = cur.perUser || {};
  3517:             const allClosed = ids.length ? ids.every(id=> perUser[id] && perUser[id].closedAt ) : true;
  3518:             if(allClosed){
  3519:               const t = nextAlarmAtForReminder(cur, now);
  3520:               const ackLog = Array.isArray(cur.ackLog) ? cur.ackLog.slice() : [];
  3521:               ackLog.push({ ts: now, userId: String(user.id), action:'repeat_reset' });
  3522:               Store.updateTeamReminder(cur.id, { alarmAt: t, perUser: {}, ackLog });
  3523:             }
  3524:           }
  3525:         }catch(_){}
  3526:       }
  3527:     }
  3528: 
  3529:     function handleSnooze(user, kind, r, minutes){
  3530:       const now = Date.now();
  3531:       const until = now + Math.max(1, Number(minutes||10))*60*1000;
  3532:       if(kind==='my'){
  3533:         Store.updateMyReminder(r.id, { snoozeUntil: until, closedAt: null });
  3534:       }else{
  3535:         Store.snoozeTeamReminderForUser(r.id, user.id, Math.max(1, Number(minutes||10)));
  3536:       }
  3537:     }
  3538: 
  3539:     function openReminderPage(isMy){
  3540:       const targetHash = isMy ? '#my_reminders' : '#team_reminders';
  3541:       if(window.location.hash === targetHash){
  3542:         try{ window.dispatchEvent(new Event('hashchange')); }catch(_){}
  3543:         try{ window.dispatchEvent(new Event('popstate')); }catch(_){}
  3544:         return;
  3545:       }
  3546:       window.location.hash = targetHash;
  3547:     }
  3548: 
  3549:     function computeNextDelay(user, active){
  3550:       const now = Date.now();
  3551:       if(active.length){
  3552:         return 1000;
  3553:       }
  3554:       const nextDue = getNextDueForUser(user);
  3555:       if(nextDue === null) return 60000;
  3556:       const dt = Math.max(250, Math.min(60000, Number(nextDue) - now));
  3557:       return dt;
  3558:     }
  3559: 
  3560:     async function tick(){
  3561:       if(ticking) return;
  3562:       ticking = true;
  3563:       try{
  3564:         const user = Auth.getUser();
  3565:         if(!user) return;
  3566: 
  3567:         const settings = getSettings();
  3568:         const prefs = getPrefs(user.id);
  3569:         const now = Date.now();
  3570: 
  3571:         const active = getActiveForUser(user);
  3572: 
  3573:         renderCards(user, active);
  3574: 
  3575:         const muted = (prefs.muteUntil && Number(prefs.muteUntil) > now);
  3576: 
  3577:         if(active.length && !muted){
  3578:           const escalated = active.some(a => Number(settings.escalationAfterMin||0) > 0 && a.ageMin >= Number(settings.escalationAfterMin||0));
  3579:           await Audio.start(escalated ? { interval: 350, amp: 0.06 } : { interval: 650, amp: 0.04 });
  3580:         }else{
  3581:           Audio.stop();
  3582:           if(!active.length) showAll = false;
  3583:         }
  3584: 
  3585:         if(started){
  3586:           scheduleNext(computeNextDelay(user, active));
  3587:         }
  3588:       }catch(_){
  3589:         if(started) scheduleNext(2000);
  3590:       }finally{
  3591:         ticking = false;
  3592:       }
  3593:     }
  3594: 
  3595:     function scheduleNext(ms){
  3596:       try{ if(timer) clearTimeout(timer); }catch(_){}
  3597:       timer = setTimeout(()=>tick(), Math.max(0, Number(ms||0)));
  3598:     }
  3599:     function tickSoon(ms){
  3600:       if(!started) return;
  3601:       scheduleNext(Math.max(0, Number(ms||0)));
  3602:     }
  3603: 
  3604:     function start(){
  3605:       if(started) return;
  3606:       started = true;
  3607:       lastSignature = '';
  3608:       tickSoon(0);
  3609: 
  3610:       window.addEventListener('pointerdown', ()=>{ Audio.unlock(); }, { passive:true });
  3611:       window.addEventListener('hashchange', ()=>{ showAll = false; tickSoon(0); }, { passive:true });
  3612: 
  3613:       window.addEventListener('mums:store', (e)=>{
  3614:         try{
  3615:           const k = e && e.detail ? String(e.detail.key||'') : '';
  3616:           if(k === KEYS.settings || k === KEYS.my || k === KEYS.team || k.startsWith(KEYS.prefsPrefix)){
  3617:             tickSoon(0);
  3618:           }
  3619:         }catch(_){}
  3620:       });
  3621:     }
  3622: 
  3623:     function stop(){
  3624:       started = false;
  3625:       try{ if(timer) clearTimeout(timer); }catch(_){}
  3626:       timer = null;
  3627:       try{ Audio.stop(); }catch(_){}
  3628:     }
  3629: 
  3630:     return { start, stop, tickSoon, setPrefs, getPrefs };
  3631:   })();
  3632:   window.ReminderEngine = ReminderEngine;
  3633: 
  3634:   function openDataToolsModal(){
  3635:     try{
  3636:       const summary = document.getElementById('storageHealthSummary');
  3637:       const details = document.getElementById('healthDetails');
  3638:       const rep = Store.healthCheck ? Store.healthCheck() : {ok:true,keysChecked:0,errors:[],sizeBytes:0};
  3639:       const mb = (rep.sizeBytes/1024/1024).toFixed(2);
  3640:       if(summary) summary.textContent = rep.ok ? `OK • ${rep.keysChecked} keys • ~${mb} MB` : `Issues • ${rep.errors.length} errors • ~${mb} MB`;
  3641:       if(details) details.textContent = rep.ok ? '' : rep.errors.map(e=>`${e.key}: ${e.error}`).join('\n');
  3642: 
  3643:       const runBtn = document.getElementById('runHealthCheckBtn');
  3644:       if(runBtn){
  3645:         runBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  3646:           const r = Store.healthCheck();
  3647:           const mb2 = (r.sizeBytes/1024/1024).toFixed(2);
  3648:           if(summary) summary.textContent = r.ok ? `OK • ${r.keysChecked} keys • ~${mb2} MB` : `Issues • ${r.errors.length} errors • ~${mb2} MB`;
  3649:           if(details) details.textContent = r.ok ? '' : r.errors.map(e=>`${e.key}: ${e.error}`).join('\n');
  3650:         };
  3651:       }
  3652: 
  3653:       const exportBtn = document.getElementById('exportAllBtn');
  3654:       if(exportBtn){
  3655:         exportBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  3656:           const data = Store.exportAllData();
  3657:           UI.downloadJSON(data, `mums_export_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.json`);
  3658:         };
  3659:       }
  3660:

  3664:           const f = impInput.files && impInput.files[0];
