  3669:           const res = Store.importAllData(obj);
  3670:           if(!res.ok){ alert('Import failed: '+(res.error||'')); return; }
  3671:           alert('Import successful. Reloading...');
  3672:           location.reload();
  3673:         };
  3674:       }
  3675: 
  3676:       const resetBtn = document.getElementById('factoryResetBtn2');
  3677:       if(resetBtn){
  3678:         resetBtn.onclick = async ()=>{
  3679:           const ok = await UI.confirm({ title:'Factory Reset', message:'Factory reset local data? This will clear offline storage for this app.', okText:'Reset', danger:true });
  3680:           if(!ok) return;
  3681:           try{ Store.factoryReset && Store.factoryReset(); }catch(e){}
  3682:           alert('Reset complete. Reloading...');
  3683:           location.href = '/login';
  3684:         };
  3685:       }
  3686: 
  3687:       UI.openModal('dataHealthModal');
  3688:     }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
  3689:   }
  3690: 
  3691:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  3692:   // MUMS NOTIFICATION SYSTEM — v3.9.47
  3693:   // Scans QB records for Case Notes with today's Manila date.
  3694:   // Excludes entries where the tech name in [DATE TIME NAME] matches the
  3695:   // current user's QB Name (they wrote it themselves — no need to notify them).
  3696:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  3697:   (function _initMumsNotifications() {
  3698: 
  3699:     // ── Manila today string ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  3700:     function _manilaToday() {
  3701:       try {
  3702:         const parts = {};
  3703:         new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', { timeZone:'Asia/Manila', year:'2-digit', month:'short', day:'2-digit' })
  3704:           .formatToParts(new Date()).forEach(p => { parts[p.type] = p.value; });
  3705:         return parts.month.toUpperCase().slice(0,3) + '-' + parts.day.replace(/^0/,'') + '-' + parts.year;
  3706:       } catch(_) { return ''; }
  3707:     }
  3708: 
  3709:     // ── Relative time label ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  3710:     function _relTime(dateObj) {
  3711:       if (!dateObj) return '';
  3712:       const diff = Date.now() - dateObj.getTime();
  3713:       const mins = Math.round(diff / 60000);
  3714:       if (mins < 1) return 'Just now';
  3715:       if (mins < 60) return mins + ' min ago';
  3716:       const hrs = Math.round(mins / 60);
  3717:       if (hrs < 24) return hrs + 'h ago';
  3718:       return 'Yesterday';
  3719:     }
  3720: 
  3721:     // ── Parse [MON-DD-YY HH:MM AM/PM NAME] bracket → { dateStr, time, who, dateObj } ──
  3722:     // NOTE: Input is already PHT-converted text. dateObj is for sorting/relTime display only.
  3723:     function _parseBracket(bracketText) {
  3724:       // Pattern: MON-DD-YY HH:MM AM/PM Name Here
  3725:       const re = /^([A-Z]{3}-\d{1,2}-\d{2})\s+(\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?:\s*(?:AM|PM))?)\s+(.+)$/i;
  3726:       const m = re.exec(bracketText.trim());
  3727:       if (!m) return null;
  3728:       const MMAP = {JAN:0,FEB:1,MAR:2,APR:3,MAY:4,JUN:5,JUL:6,AUG:7,SEP:8,OCT:9,NOV:10,DEC:11};
  3729:       const dateParts = m[1].split('-');
  3730:       const mon = dateParts[0].toUpperCase();
  3731:       if (!(mon in MMAP)) return null;
  3732:       const dd = parseInt(dateParts[1], 10);
  3733:       const yy = parseInt(dateParts[2], 10);
  3734:       const year = yy < 50 ? 2000+yy : 1900+yy;
  3735:       const timeParts = m[2].trim().split(/[\s:]/);
  3736:       let hh = parseInt(timeParts[0], 10);
  3737:       const mi = parseInt(timeParts[1], 10);
  3738:       const ap = (m[2].match(/PM/i) ? 'PM' : (m[2].match(/AM/i) ? 'AM' : ''));
  3739:       if (ap === 'PM' && hh < 12) hh += 12;
  3740:       if (ap === 'AM' && hh === 12) hh = 0;
  3741:       // Timestamps are already PHT (UTC+8) — convert to UTC for accurate sorting
  3742:       const dateObj = new Date(Date.UTC(year, MMAP[mon], dd, hh - 8, mi, 0)); // PHT → UTC
  3743:       return { dateStr: m[1], timeStr: m[2].trim(), who: m[3].trim(), dateObj, bracketDateToken: m[1] };
  3744:     }
  3745: 
  3746:     // ── Get current user's QB name ───────────────────────────────────────
  3747:     function _myQbName() {
  3748:       try {
  3749:         const user = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  3750:         if (!user) return '';
  3751:         // Check qb_name on profile
  3752:         const prof = (window.Store && Store.getProfile) ? Store.getProfile(user.id || user.user_id) : null;
  3753:         const qbName = String((prof && prof.qb_name) || (user && user.qb_name) || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  3754:         return qbName;
  3755:       } catch(_) { return ''; }
  3756:     }
  3757: 
  3758:     // ── Colour index for avatar — keyed on reporter NAME (not case ID) ────
  3759:     // Same person always gets the same colour across all notifications.
  3760:     function _colIdx(str) {
  3761:       let h = 0;
  3762:       for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) h = (h * 31 + str.charCodeAt(i)) & 0xffffffff;
  3763:       return (Math.abs(h) % 4) + 1; // 1-4
  3764:     }
  3765: 
  3766:     // ── Escape HTML ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  3767:     function _esc(s) {
  3768:       return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
  3769:     }
  3770: 
  3771:     // ── Include me preference ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  3772:     // LS key: mums_notif_include_me — 'true' = include own updates in notifications
  3773:     // Default: 'false' (exclude own updates — original behaviour)
  3774:     var LS_INCLUDE_ME = 'mums_notif_include_me';
  3775: 
  3776:     function _isIncludeMeOn() {
  3777:       try { return localStorage.getItem(LS_INCLUDE_ME) === 'true'; } catch(_) { return false; }
  3778:     }
  3779: 
  3780:     function _syncIncludeMeCheckbox() {
  3781:       var cb = document.getElementById('mnpIncludeMe');
  3782:       var hint = document.getElementById('mnpIncludeMeHint');
  3783:       if (!cb) return;
  3784:       var on = _isIncludeMeOn();
  3785:       cb.checked = on;
  3786:       if (hint) hint.textContent = on
  3787:         ? 'Your own case note updates are included'
  3788:         : 'Your own updates are excluded by default';
  3789:     }
  3790: 
  3791:     window.__mumsNotifToggleIncludeMe = function(checked) {
  3792:       try { localStorage.setItem(LS_INCLUDE_ME, checked ? 'true' : 'false'); } catch(_) {}
  3793:       var hint = document.getElementById('mnpIncludeMeHint');
  3794:       if (hint) hint.textContent = checked
  3795:         ? 'Your own case note updates are included'
  3796:         : 'Your own updates are excluded by default';
  3797:       // Re-build notifications with new preference
  3798:       const qb = window.__mumsQbRecords;
  3799:       if (qb && Array.isArray(qb.records)) {
  3800:         window.__mumsNotifRefresh(qb.records, qb.columns);
  3801:       }
  3802:     };
  3803: 
  3804:     // ── Core: scan records and build notification items ───────────────────
  3805:     // IMPORTANT: QB stores case note timestamps in EST (UTC-5).
  3806:     // We must convert them to PHT (UTC+8) before comparing against Manila today.
  3807:     // _convertCNtoPHT mirrors the logic in my_quickbase.js _convertNotesESTtoPHT.
  3808:     // DST-aware Eastern Time → PHT converter for notification system
  3809:     // QB uses Eastern Time (ET): EDT(UTC-4) Mar-Nov, EST(UTC-5) Dec-Feb
  3810:     function _etOffsetH(year, month, day) {
  3811:       if (month > 2 && month < 10) return 4;
  3812:       if (month === 2) { const d = new Date(year,2,1); const s2 = ((7-d.getDay())%7)+8; return day>=s2?4:5; }
  3813:       if (month === 10) { const d = new Date(year,10,1); const s1 = ((7-d.getDay())%7)+1; return day<s1?4:5; }
  3814:       return 5;
  3815:     }
  3816:     function _convertCNtoPHT(text) {
  3817:       if (!text) return text;
  3818:       const _MMAP = {JAN:0,FEB:1,MAR:2,APR:3,MAY:4,JUN:5,JUL:6,AUG:7,SEP:8,OCT:9,NOV:10,DEC:11};
  3819:       const _MN   = ['JAN','FEB','MAR','APR','MAY','JUN','JUL','AUG','SEP','OCT','NOV','DEC'];
  3820:       return text.replace(
  3821:         /\[([A-Z]{3})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{2})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)([\s\S]*?)\]/gi,
  3822:         function(full, mon, dd, yy, hh, mi, ap, rest) {
  3823:           try {
  3824:             const monU = mon.toUpperCase();
  3825:             if (!(_MMAP[monU] !== undefined)) return full;
  3826:             const year = parseInt(yy) < 50 ? 2000+parseInt(yy) : 1900+parseInt(yy);
  3827:             const month = _MMAP[monU], day = parseInt(dd);
  3828:             let h = parseInt(hh);
  3829:             if (ap.toUpperCase()==='PM' && h<12) h+=12;
  3830:             if (ap.toUpperCase()==='AM' && h===12) h=0;
  3831:             const offsetH = _etOffsetH(year, month, day);
  3832:             const utcMs = Date.UTC(year, month, day, h+offsetH, parseInt(mi), 0);
  3833:             const phtMs = utcMs + 8*3600*1000;
  3834:             const p     = new Date(phtMs);
  3835:             const ph    = p.getUTCHours(), pm2 = p.getUTCMinutes();
  3836:             const pap   = ph>=12?'PM':'AM';
  3837:             const ph12  = ph%12||12;
  3838:             return '['+_MN[p.getUTCMonth()]+'-'+p.getUTCDate()+'-'+
  3839:               String(p.getUTCFullYear()).slice(-2)+' '+ph12+':'+
  3840:               String(pm2).padStart(2,'0')+' '+pap+rest+']';
  3841:           } catch(_) { return full; }
  3842:         }
  3843:       );
  3844:     }
  3845: 
  3846:     function _buildNotifications(records, columns) {
  3847:       const today = _manilaToday();
  3848:       if (!today || !Array.isArray(records)) return [];
  3849:       const myQb = _myQbName();
  3850: 
  3851:       // Find Case Notes column
  3852:       const cnCol = columns.find(c => ['case notes','notes'].includes(String(c&&c.label||'').trim().toLowerCase()));
  3853:       // Find Case # / record id column
  3854:       const caseNumCol = columns.find(c => String(c&&c.label||'').trim().toLowerCase() === 'case #');
  3855:       // Find Short Description column
  3856:       const descCol = columns.find(c => {
  3857:         const lbl = String(c&&c.label||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  3858:         return lbl.includes('short description') || lbl.includes('concern') || lbl === 'description' || lbl === 'subject';
  3859:       });
  3860: 
  3861:       if (!cnCol) return [];
  3862: 
  3863:       const items = [];
  3864:       const todayRe = new RegExp('\\[(' + today.replace(/-/g,'\\-') + '\\s[^\\]]+)\\]', 'gi');
  3865: 
  3866:       records.forEach(row => {
  3867:         const cnRaw = row && row.fields && row.fields[String(cnCol.id)] ? String(row.fields[String(cnCol.id)].value || '') : '';
  3868:         if (!cnRaw) return;
  3869:         // Convert EST→PHT so timestamps match Manila today correctly
  3870:         const cnVal = _convertCNtoPHT(cnRaw);
  3871: 
  3872:         // Find all today brackets
  3873:         const matches = [];
  3874:         let m;
  3875:         const re = new RegExp('\\[(' + today.replace(/-/g,'\\-') + '\\s[^\\]]+)\\]', 'gi');
  3876:         while ((m = re.exec(cnVal)) !== null) {
  3877:           const parsed = _parseBracket(m[1]);
  3878:           if (!parsed) continue;
  3879:           // Check include-me preference:
  3880:           // - includeMeOn=false (default): exclude entries where WHO matches current user → they wrote it
  3881:           // - includeMeOn=true: include ALL entries (user wants to see their own updates too)
  3882:           const includeMeOn = _isIncludeMeOn();
  3883:           if (!includeMeOn && myQb) {
  3884:             if (parsed.who.toLowerCase().includes(myQb) || myQb.includes(parsed.who.toLowerCase())) continue;
  3885:             // Partial word match (at least 4 chars)
  3886:             if (myQb.length >= 4 && parsed.who.toLowerCase().split(' ').some(part => part.length >= 4 && myQb.includes(part))) continue;
  3887:           }
  3888:           matches.push(parsed);
  3889:         }
  3890:         if (!matches.length) return;
  3891: 
  3892:         // Get the most recent today-bracket
  3893:         const newest = matches.reduce((a,b) => (!a || (b.dateObj > a.dateObj)) ? b : a, null);
  3894:         if (!newest) return;
  3895: 
  3896:         const caseId = String(row.qbRecordId || (caseNumCol && row.fields && row.fields[String(caseNumCol.id)] ? row.fields[String(caseNumCol.id)].value : '') || 'N/A');
  3897:         const shortDesc = descCol && row.fields && row.fields[String(descCol.id)] ? String(row.fields[String(descCol.id)].value || '') : '';
  3898: 
  3899:         // Build the first line of the note (after the last bracket entry)
  3900:         // Extract text after [DATE TIME NAME]
  3901:         const afterBracket = cnVal.slice(cnVal.lastIndexOf(']') + 1).trim().replace(/^-+\s*/, '').trim();
  3902:         const noteLine = afterBracket.slice(0, 120) || cnVal.slice(0, 120);
  3903: 
  3904:         items.push({
  3905:           caseId,
  3906:           shortDesc,
  3907:           who: newest.who,
  3908:           timeStr: newest.timeStr,
  3909:           dateToken: today,
  3910:           dateObj: newest.dateObj,
  3911:           noteLine,
  3912:           colIdx: _colIdx(newest.who), // keyed on name: same person = same color
  3913:         });
  3914:       });
  3915: 
  3916:       // Sort by most recent first
  3917:       items.sort((a, b) => b.dateObj - a.dateObj);
  3918:       return items;
  3919:     }
  3920: 
  3921:     // ── Render items into panel ────────────────────────────────────────────
  3922:     let _allItems = [];
  3923:     let _readSet = new Set();
  3924: 
  3925:     function _render(filter) {
  3926:       const list = document.getElementById('mnpList');
  3927:       const empty = document.getElementById('mnpEmpty');
  3928:       const meta = document.getElementById('mnpMeta');
  3929:       const badge = document.getElementById('mumsNotifBadge');
  3930:       const bellBtn = document.getElementById('mumsNotifBtn');
  3931:       const tabCt = document.getElementById('mnpTabCt');
  3932:       if (!list) return;
  3933: 
  3934:       const toShow = filter === 'unread'
  3935:         ? _allItems.filter(it => !_readSet.has(it.caseId))
  3936:         : _allItems;
  3937: 
  3938:       const unreadCount = _allItems.filter(it => !_readSet.has(it.caseId)).length;
  3939: 
  3940:       // Update badge
  3941:       if (badge) {
  3942:         badge.textContent = unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : String(unreadCount);
  3943:         badge.style.display = unreadCount > 0 ? '' : 'none';
  3944:       }
  3945:       if (bellBtn) {
  3946:         bellBtn.classList.toggle('has-unread', unreadCount > 0);
  3947:       }
  3948:       if (meta) meta.textContent = unreadCount > 0 ? unreadCount + ' UNREAD' : 'ALL READ';
  3949:       if (tabCt) {
  3950:         tabCt.textContent = String(unreadCount);
  3951:         tabCt.style.display = unreadCount > 0 ? '' : 'none';
  3952:       }
  3953: 
  3954:       if (!toShow.length) {
  3955:         if (empty) empty.style.display = '';
  3956:         // Remove all item nodes
  3957:         Array.from(list.querySelectorAll('.mnp-item, .mnp-divider')).forEach(el => el.remove());
  3958:         return;
  3959:       }
  3960:       if (empty) empty.style.display = 'none';
  3961: 
  3962:       // ── Avatar initials from reporter name ───────────────────────────────
  3963:       // Generates 1-2 letter initials from a "First Last" name string.
  3964:       // Falls back to first 2 chars if name has only one word.
  3965:       function _initials(name) {
  3966:         const parts = String(name || '').trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
  3967:         if (!parts.length) return '?';
  3968:         if (parts.length === 1) return parts[0].slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
  3969:         return (parts[0][0] + parts[parts.length-1][0]).toUpperCase();
  3970:       }
  3971: 
  3972:       // Build HTML
  3973:       let html = '';
  3974:       toShow.forEach((item, idx) => {
  3975:         const isUnread = !_readSet.has(item.caseId);
  3976:         // Color is keyed on reporter name — same person = same color always
  3977:         const c = 'mnp-c' + item.colIdx;
  3978:         const avatarInitials = _initials(item.who);
  3979:         html += `
  3980: <div class="mnp-item${isUnread ? ' mnp-unread' : ''}" data-case="${_esc(item.caseId)}" onclick="window.__mumsNotifOpenCase('${_esc(item.caseId)}')">
  3981:   <div class="mnp-icon ${c}" title="${_esc(item.who)}" style="font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.01em;">${_esc(avatarInitials)}</div>
  3982:   <div class="mnp-body">
  3983:     <div class="mnp-row">
  3984:       <span class="mnp-casenum">CASE #${_esc(item.caseId)}</span>
  3985:       <span class="mnp-ts">${_esc(_relTime(item.dateObj))}</span>
  3986:       ${isUnread ? '<div class="mnp-unread-dot"></div>' : ''}
  3987:     </div>
  3988:     <div class="mnp-desc">${_esc(item.shortDesc || '(No description)')}</div>
  3989:     <div class="mnp-note">
  3990:       <span class="mnp-note-time">[${_esc(item.dateToken)} ${_esc(item.timeStr)}]</span>
  3991:       <span class="mnp-note-who"> ${_esc(item.who)}</span>
  3992:       ${item.noteLine ? '— ' + _esc(item.noteLine.slice(0,80)) : ''}
  3993:     </div>
  3994:   </div>
  3995: </div>
  3996: ${idx < toShow.length - 1 ? '<div class="mnp-divider"></div>' : ''}`;
  3997:       });
  3998:       list.innerHTML = html + (empty ? empty.outerHTML : '');
  3999:       if (empty) {
  4000:         const newEmpty = list.querySelector('.mnp-empty');
  4001:         if (newEmpty) newEmpty.style.display = 'none';
  4002:       }
  4003:     }
  4004: 
  4005:     // ── Public interface ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4006:     let _activeTab = 'all';
  4007: 
  4008:     window.__mumsNotifTabAll = function() {
  4009:       _activeTab = 'all';
  4010:       document.getElementById('mnpTabAll').classList.add('mnp-tab-on');
  4011:       document.getElementById('mnpTabUnread').classList.remove('mnp-tab-on');
  4012:       _render('all');
  4013:     };
  4014:     window.__mumsNotifTabUnread = function() {
  4015:       _activeTab = 'unread';
  4016:       document.getElementById('mnpTabUnread').classList.add('mnp-tab-on');
  4017:       document.getElementById('mnpTabAll').classList.remove('mnp-tab-on');
  4018:       _render('unread');
  4019:     };
  4020:     window.__mumsNotifMarkAll = function() {
  4021:       _allItems.forEach(it => _readSet.add(it.caseId));
  4022:       _render(_activeTab);
  4023:     };
  4024:     window.__mumsNotifRead = function(caseId) {
  4025:       _readSet.add(caseId);
  4026:       _render(_activeTab);
  4027:     };
  4028:     window.__mumsNotifOpenCase = function(caseId) {
  4029:       _readSet.add(caseId);
  4030:       _render(_activeTab);
  4031:       _closePanel();
  4032:       // Open Case Detail View for this case#
  4033:       _openCaseDetail(caseId);
  4034:     };
  4035:     window.__mumsNotifRefresh = function(records, columns) {
  4036:       _allItems = _buildNotifications(records, columns);
  4037:       _render(_activeTab);
  4038:     };
  4039: 
  4040:     // ── Bell toggle ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4041:     let _panelOpen = false;
  4042:     function _openPanel() {
  4043:       const panel = document.getElementById('mumsNotifPanel');
  4044:       if (!panel) return;
  4045:       _panelOpen = true;
  4046:       panel.style.display = '';
  4047:       panel.style.animation = 'mnpPanelIn .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.2,.64,1) both';
  4048:       document.getElementById('mumsNotifBtn').setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
  4049:       // Sync include-me checkbox state
  4050:       _syncIncludeMeCheckbox();
  4051:       _render(_activeTab);
  4052:       setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', _closeOnOutside), 10);
  4053:     }
  4054:     function _closePanel() {
  4055:       const panel = document.getElementById('mumsNotifPanel');
  4056:       if (!panel) return;
  4057:       _panelOpen = false;
  4058:       panel.style.display = 'none';
  4059:       document.getElementById('mumsNotifBtn').setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
  4060:       document.removeEventListener('click', _closeOnOutside);
  4061:     }
  4062:     function _closeOnOutside(e) {
  4063:       const wrap = document.getElementById('mumsNotifWrap');
  4064:       if (wrap && !wrap.contains(e.target)) _closePanel();
  4065:     }
  4066: 
  4067:     function _bindBell() {
  4068:       const btn = document.getElementById('mumsNotifBtn');
  4069:       if (!btn || btn.__mumsNotifBound) return;
  4070:       btn.__mumsNotifBound = true;
  4071:       btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  4072:         e.stopPropagation();
  4073:         _panelOpen ? _closePanel() : _openPanel();
  4074:       });
  4075:     }
  4076: 
  4077:     // ── Open Case Detail by case ID ──────────────────────────────────────
  4078:     function _openCaseDetail(caseId) {
  4079:       var _tryOpen = function() {
  4080:         try {
  4081:           var mainEl = document.getElementById('main');
  4082:           if (!mainEl) return false;
  4083:           // root._qbcdOpen is set on the main element by _initQbCaseDetailModal
  4084:           if (typeof mainEl._qbcdOpen !== 'function') return false;
  4085:           // Find the snap matching this case ID from host._qbRowSnaps
  4086:           var host = mainEl.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
  4087:           if (!host) return false;
  4088:           var snaps = host._qbRowSnaps || [];
  4089:           if (!snaps.length) return false;
  4090:           var snap = snaps.find(function(s) { return s && String(s.recordId) === String(caseId); });
  4091:           if (!snap) return false;
  4092:           mainEl._qbcdOpen(snap, snaps);
  4093:           return true;
  4094:         } catch(_) { return false; }
  4095:       };
  4096: 
  4097:       // Try immediately (already on QB page with records loaded)
  4098:       if (_tryOpen()) return;
  4099: 
  4100:       // Navigate to my_quickbase first, then open after records load
  4101:       var _pendingCase = String(caseId);
  4102:       var _onRecords = function() {
  4103:         // Wait one tick for _qbcdOpen to be bound after render
  4104:         setTimeout(function() {
  4105:           if (!_tryOpen()) {
  4106:             // Retry up to 3x with 300ms delay
  4107:             var retries = 0;
  4108:             var retry = setInterval(function() {
  4109:               if (_tryOpen() || ++retries >= 6) clearInterval(retry);
  4110:             }, 300);
  4111:           }
  4112:           window.removeEventListener('mums:qb_records_loaded', _onRecords);
  4113:         }, 200);
  4114:       };
  4115:       window.addEventListener('mums:qb_records_loaded', _onRecords);
  4116: 
  4117:       // Navigate to my_quickbase
  4118:       try {
  4119:         if (window.App && typeof App.navigate === 'function') {
  4120:           App.navigate('my_quickbase');
  4121:         } else {
  4122:           var navBtn = document.querySelector('[data-page="my_quickbase"], a[href*="my_quickbase"]');
  4123:           if (navBtn) navBtn.click();
  4124:         }
  4125:       } catch(_) {}
  4126:     }
  4127: 
  4128:     // ── Listen for QB records loaded event ────────────────────────────────
  4129:     window.addEventListener('mums:qb_records_loaded', function(e) {
  4130:       const { records, columns } = e.detail || {};
  4131:       if (Array.isArray(records) && Array.isArray(columns)) {
  4132:         window.__mumsNotifRefresh(records, columns);
  4133:       }
  4134:     });
  4135: 
  4136:     // ── Auto-refresh every 60 seconds (picks up live sync updates) ────────
  4137:     setInterval(function() {
  4138:       const qb = window.__mumsQbRecords;
  4139:       if (qb && Array.isArray(qb.records)) {
  4140:         window.__mumsNotifRefresh(qb.records, qb.columns);
  4141:       }
  4142:     }, 60000);
  4143: 
  4144:     // Bind on DOMContentLoaded (or immediately if already loaded)
  4145:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
  4146:       document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', _bindBell);
  4147:     } else {
  4148:       _bindBell();
  4149:       // Retry after app boot (bell may not exist yet at this point)
  4150:       setTimeout(_bindBell, 800);
  4151:     }
  4152:     // Also bind release notes button at same time
  4153:     setTimeout(function() {
  4154:       if (window.__mumsBindReleaseNotes) window.__mumsBindReleaseNotes();
  4155:     }, 900);
  4156: 
  4157:     // ── AUTO-FETCH QB records for notifications on login ───────────────────
  4158:     // Fetches latest QB records in the background so notification bell works
  4159:     // WITHOUT requiring the user to open My Quickbase first.
  4160:     // Runs once on boot after auth is ready, then every 5 minutes.
  4161:     function _autoFetchQBForNotif() {
  4162:       try {
  4163:         const tok = (window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function')
  4164:           ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  4165:         if (!tok) return; // not authenticated yet
  4166: 
  4167:         fetch('/api/quickbase/monitoring', {
  4168:           headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
  4169:         })
  4170:         .then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; })
  4171:         .then(function(d) {
  4172:           if (!d || !d.ok) return;
  4173:           const records = Array.isArray(d.records) ? d.records : [];
  4174:           const columns = Array.isArray(d.columns) ? d.columns : [];
  4175:           if (records.length && columns.length) {
  4176:             // Store globally so My Quickbase page can use the cache too
  4177:             window.__mumsQbRecords = {
  4178:               records: records,
  4179:               columns: columns,
  4180:               loadedAt: Date.now(),
  4181:             };
  4182:             // Update notification bell
  4183:             if (typeof window.__mumsNotifRefresh === 'function') {
  4184:               window.__mumsNotifRefresh(records, columns);
  4185:             }
  4186:           }
  4187:         })
  4188:         .catch(function() {}); // silent fail — bell will update when QB page opens
  4189:       } catch(_) {}
  4190:     }
  4191: 
  4192:     // Run after auth hydration (wait for token to be available)
  4193:     setTimeout(function() { _autoFetchQBForNotif(); }, 3000);
  4194:     // Refresh every 5 minutes
  4195:     setInterval(_autoFetchQBForNotif, 5 * 60 * 1000);
  4196: 
  4197:   })();
  4198:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4199:   // END NOTIFICATION SYSTEM
  4200:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4201: 
  4202:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4203:   // RELEASE NOTES SYSTEM — v3.9.47
  4204:   // Viewer: all users. Admin panel: Super Admin only (publish HTML files).
  4205:   // Storage: mums_documents key='mums_release_notes' in Supabase.
  4206:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4207:   (function _initReleaseNotes() {
  4208:     console.info('[ReleaseNotes] System initializing v3.9.47');
  4209: 
  4210:     function _tok() {
  4211:       try { return (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : ''; } catch(_) { return ''; }
  4212:     }
  4213:     function _headers() {
  4214:       const t = _tok();
  4215:       const h = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
  4216:       if (t) h['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + t;
  4217:       return h;
  4218:     }
  4219:     function _esc(s) {
  4220:       return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
  4221:     }
  4222:     function _fmtDate(iso) {
  4223:       try {
  4224:         return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month:'short', day:'numeric', year:'numeric' });
  4225:       } catch(_) { return iso || '—'; }
  4226:     }
  4227:     function _tagClass(t) {
  4228:       const map = { feature:'rn-tag-feature', fix:'rn-tag-fix', security:'rn-tag-security', breaking:'rn-tag-breaking', ui:'rn-tag-ui' };
  4229:       return map[String(t).toLowerCase()] || 'rn-tag-feature';
  4230:     }
  4231: 
  4232:     // ── Load notes list ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4233:     async function _loadNotes() {
  4234:       try {
  4235:         const r = await fetch('/api/settings/release_notes', { headers: _headers() });
  4236:         const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  4237:         return d.ok ? (d.notes || []) : [];
  4238:       } catch(_) { return []; }
  4239:     }
  4240: 
  4241:     // ── Load single note full content ──────────────────────────────────
  4242:     async function _loadNoteContent(noteId) {
  4243:       try {
  4244:         const r = await fetch('/api/settings/release_notes?noteId=' + encodeURIComponent(noteId), { headers: _headers() });
  4245:         const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  4246:         return d.ok ? d.note : null;
  4247:       } catch(_) { return null; }
  4248:     }
  4249: 
  4250:     // ── Render sidebar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4251:     function _renderSidebar(notes, activeId) {
  4252:       const sb = document.getElementById('rnSidebar');
  4253:       if (!sb) return;
  4254:       if (!notes.length) {
  4255:         sb.innerHTML = '<div class="rn-sidebar-loading">No release notes yet.</div>';
  4256:         return;
  4257:       }
  4258:       sb.innerHTML = notes.map((n, i) => {
  4259:         const tags = (n.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="rn-tag ${_tagClass(t)}">${_esc(t)}</span>`).join('');
  4260:         const isNew = n.isNew ? '<span class="rn-new-badge">NEW</span>' : '';
  4261:         return `
  4262: <div class="rn-note-item${n.id === activeId ? ' active' : ''}" onclick="window.__rnSelectNote('${_esc(n.id)}')">
  4263:   <div class="rn-note-version">v${_esc(n.version)} ${isNew}</div>
  4264:   <div class="rn-note-title">${_esc(n.title)}</div>
  4265:   <div class="rn-note-date">${_fmtDate(n.publishedAt)}</div>
  4266:   ${tags ? '<div class="rn-note-tags">' + tags + '</div>' : ''}
  4267: </div>
  4268: ${i < notes.length - 1 ? '<div class="rn-sidebar-divider"></div>' : ''}`;
  4269:       }).join('');
  4270:     }
  4271: 
  4272:     // ── Show note in iframe ────────────────────────────────────────────
  4273:     var _cachedNoteContent = {};
  4274:     async function _showNote(noteId) {
  4275:       const iframe = document.getElementById('rnIframe');
  4276:       const empty  = document.getElementById('rnContentEmpty');
  4277:       if (!iframe || !empty) return;
  4278: 
  4279:       iframe.style.display = 'none';
  4280:       empty.style.display = 'flex';
  4281: 
  4282:       // Load content (cache it)
  4283:       let note = _cachedNoteContent[noteId];
  4284:       if (!note) {
  4285:         note = await _loadNoteContent(noteId);
  4286:         if (note) _cachedNoteContent[noteId] = note;
  4287:       }
  4288:       if (!note || !note.htmlContent) return;
  4289: 
  4290:       // Inject HTML into sandboxed iframe
  4291:       empty.style.display = 'none';
  4292:       iframe.style.display = 'block';
  4293:       const blob = new Blob([note.htmlContent], { type: 'text/html' });
  4294:       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  4295:       iframe.onload = () => { try { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } catch(_) {} };
  4296:       iframe.src = url;
  4297:     }
  4298: 
  4299:     // ── Main open handler ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  4300:     var _notesList = [];
  4301:     var _activeNoteId = null;
  4302: 
  4303:     window.__rnSelectNote = function(noteId) {
  4304:       _activeNoteId = noteId;
  4305:       _renderSidebar(_notesList, noteId);
  4306:       _showNote(noteId);
  4307:     };
  4308: 
  4309:     function _openViewer() {
  4310:       var m = document.getElementById('releaseNotesModal');
  4311:       if (!m) { console.error('[ReleaseNotes] Modal element not found'); return; }
  4312: 
  4313:       // Re-append to body to escape .app overflow:hidden stacking context
  4314:       if (m.parentElement !== document.body) {
  4315:         document.body.appendChild(m);
  4316:       }
  4317: 
  4318:       m.style.cssText = 'display:flex!important;position:fixed!important;inset:0!important;' +
  4319:         'z-index:2147483100!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;' +
  4320:         'background:rgba(6,12,24,.88)!important;padding:16px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;';
  4321:       m.classList.add('open');
  4322:       try { document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
  4323:       console.info('[ReleaseNotes] Modal opened');
  4324: 
  4325:       // Show Publish button for Super Admin
  4326:       try {
  4327:         var user = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  4328:         var role = String((user && user.role) || '').toUpperCase();
  4329:         var isSA = role === 'SUPER_ADMIN';
  4330:         var publishBtn = document.getElementById('rnPublishToggleBtn');
  4331:         if (publishBtn) publishBtn.style.display = isSA ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
  4332:       } catch(_) {}
  4333: 
  4334:       // Load notes
  4335:       var sb = document.getElementById('rnSidebar');
  4336:       if (sb) sb.innerHTML = '<div class="rn-sidebar-loading">Loading\u2026</div>';
  4337:       _loadNotes().then(function(notes) {
  4338:         _notesList = notes;
  4339:         _renderSidebar(_notesList, _activeNoteId);
  4340:         if (_notesList.length && !_activeNoteId) {
  4341:           _activeNoteId = _notesList[0].id;
  4342:           _renderSidebar(_notesList, _activeNoteId);
  4343:           _showNote(_activeNoteId);
  4344:         }
  4345:       });
  4346:       var dot = document.getElementById('rnNewDot');
  4347:       if (dot) dot.style.display = 'none';
  4348:     }
  4349: 
  4350:     function _closeViewer() {
  4351:       var m = document.getElementById('releaseNotesModal');
  4352:       if (!m) return;
  4353:       m.removeAttribute('style');
  4354:       m.classList.remove('open');
  4355:       try { if (!document.querySelector('.modal.open')) document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
  4356:       // Reset publish panel
  4357:       var pp = document.getElementById('rnPublishPanel');
  4358:       if (pp) pp.style.display = 'none';
  4359:     }
  4360: 
  4361:     // ── Publish panel toggle (SA only) ────────────────────────────────
  4362:     var _publishPanelOpen = false;
  4363:     window.__rnTogglePublishPanel = function() {
  4364:       var pp = document.getElementById('rnPublishPanel');
  4365:       if (!pp) return;
  4366:       _publishPanelOpen = !_publishPanelOpen;
  4367:       pp.style.display = _publishPanelOpen ? '' : 'none';
  4368:       var btn = document.getElementById('rnPublishToggleBtn');
  4369:       if (btn) {
  4370:         btn.style.background = _publishPanelOpen ? 'rgba(34,211,238,.22)' : 'rgba(34,211,238,.12)';
  4371:         btn.innerHTML = _publishPanelOpen
  4372:           ? '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> Close'
  4373:           : '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> Publish Note';
  4374:       }
  4375:     };
  4376: 
  4377:     // ── File loaded handler ───────────────────────────────────────────
  4378:     var _rnHtmlContent = '';
  4379:     var _rnSelectedTags = [];
  4380:     window.__rnFileLoaded = function(input) {
  4381:       var file = input && input.files && input.files[0];
  4382:       if (!file) return;
  4383:       var lbl = document.getElementById('rnFileChosen');
  4384:       if (lbl) lbl.textContent = file.name;
  4385:       var reader = new FileReader();
  4386:       reader.onload = function(e) {
  4387:         _rnHtmlContent = e.target.result;
  4388:         var pw = document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap');
  4389:         var pf = document.getElementById('rnPreviewIframe');
  4390:         if (pw && pf) {
  4391:           pw.style.display = '';
  4392:           var blob = new Blob([_rnHtmlContent], { type: 'text/html' });
  4393:           var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  4394:           pf.onload = function() { try { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } catch(_) {} };
  4395:           pf.src = url;
  4396:         }
  4397:       };
  4398:       reader.readAsText(file);
  4399:     };
  4400:     window.__rnToggleTag = function(tag, btn) {
  4401:       var idx = _rnSelectedTags.indexOf(tag);
  4402:       if (idx >= 0) { _rnSelectedTags.splice(idx, 1); btn.classList.remove('selected'); }
  4403:       else { _rnSelectedTags.push(tag); btn.classList.add('selected'); }
  4404:     };
  4405:     window.__rnPublish = async function() {
  4406:       var version = (document.getElementById('rnVersion') || {}).value || '';
  4407:       var title   = (document.getElementById('rnTitle')   || {}).value || '';
  4408:       if (!version.trim() || !title.trim() || !_rnHtmlContent) {
  4409:         if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Fill in version, title and choose an HTML file.', 'error');
  4410:         else alert('Fill in version, title and choose an HTML file.');
  4411:         return;
  4412:       }
  4413:       var btn = document.getElementById('rnPublishBtn');
  4414:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Publishing\u2026'; }
  4415:       try {
  4416:         var r = await fetch('/api/settings/release_notes', {
  4417:           method: 'POST', headers: _headers(),
  4418:           body: JSON.stringify({ version: version.trim(), title: title.trim(), tags: _rnSelectedTags, htmlContent: _rnHtmlContent })
  4419:         });
  4420:         var d = await r.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
  4421:         if (d.ok) {
  4422:           _rnHtmlContent = ''; _rnSelectedTags = [];
  4423:           if (document.getElementById('rnVersion')) document.getElementById('rnVersion').value = '';
  4424:           if (document.getElementById('rnTitle'))   document.getElementById('rnTitle').value = '';
  4425:           if (document.getElementById('rnFileChosen')) document.getElementById('rnFileChosen').textContent = '';
  4426:           if (document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap')) document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap').style.display = 'none';
  4427:           if (document.getElementById('rnFileInput')) document.getElementById('rnFileInput').value = '';
  4428:           if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Release note published! \uD83D\uDE80', 'success');
  4429:           // Close publish panel and reload sidebar
  4430:           window.__rnTogglePublishPanel();
  4431:           _activeNoteId = null;
  4432:           _loadNotes().then(function(notes) {
  4433:             _notesList = notes;
  4434:             _renderSidebar(_notesList, null);
  4435:           });
  4436:         } else {
  4437:           if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Error: ' + (d.message || 'unknown'), 'error');
  4438:         }
  4439:       } catch(e) {
  4440:         if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Network error.', 'error');
  4441:       }
  4442:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Publish \u2192'; }
  4443:     };
  4444: 
  4445:     // ── Check for new notes on load ────────────────────────────────────
  4446:     async function _checkNew() {
  4447:       const notes = await _loadNotes();
  4448:       const hasNew = notes.some(n => n.isNew);
  4449:       const dot = document.getElementById('rnNewDot');
  4450:       if (dot) dot.style.display = hasNew ? '' : 'none';
  4451:     }

  4460:       document.querySelectorAll('[data-close="releaseNotesModal"]').forEach(function(b) {
  4461:         b.onclick = _closeViewer;
  4462:       });
  4463:       setTimeout(_checkNew, 2000);
  4464:     }
  4465:

  4470:     window.__mumsCloseReleaseNotes = _closeViewer;

  4472:

  4476:     setTimeout(_bindBtn, 1500);

  4572:   : '<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:16px">No release notes published yet.</div>'}
  4573:     </div>
  4574:   </div>

  4576:

  4581:           });
  4582:         });

  4588:           if (fn) fn.textContent = _fileName;
  4589:           const pw = document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap');

  4591:             pw.style.display = '';

  4595:               iframe.src = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  4596:             }
  4597:           }
  4598:         }
  4599:       }
  4600: 
  4601:       // Global helpers for admin panel interactions
  4602:       window.__rnToggleTag = function(tag, btn) {
  4603:         const idx = _selectedTags.indexOf(tag);
  4604:         if (idx >= 0) { _selectedTags.splice(idx, 1); btn.classList.remove('selected'); }
  4605:         else { _selectedTags.push(tag); btn.classList.add('selected'); }
  4606:       };
  4607: 
  4608:       window.__rnFileLoaded = function(input) {
  4609:         const file = input.files[0];
  4610:         if (!file) return;
  4611:         _fileName = file.name;
  4612:         const reader = new FileReader();
  4613:         reader.onload = function(e) {
  4614:           _htmlContent = e.target.result;
  4615:           // Show file status
  4616:           document.getElementById('rnDropZone').style.display = 'none';
  4617:           const fs = document.getElementById('rnFileStatus');
  4618:           if (fs) { fs.style.display = ''; document.getElementById('rnFileName').textContent = _fileName; }
  4619:           // Show preview
  4620:           const pw = document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap');
  4621:           if (pw) {
  4622:             pw.style.display = '';
  4623:             const iframe = document.getElementById('rnPreviewIframe');
  4624:             if (iframe) {
  4625:               const blob = new Blob([_htmlContent], { type:'text/html' });
  4626:               const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  4627:               iframe.onload = () => { try { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } catch(_) {} };
  4628:               iframe.src = url;
  4629:             }
  4630:           }
  4631:         };
  4632:         reader.readAsText(file);
  4633:       };
  4634: 
  4635:       window.__rnClearFile = function() {
  4636:         _htmlContent = ''; _fileName = '';
  4637:         document.getElementById('rnDropZone').style.display = '';
  4638:         const fs = document.getElementById('rnFileStatus'); if (fs) fs.style.display = 'none';
  4639:         const pw = document.getElementById('rnPreviewWrap'); if (pw) pw.style.display = 'none';
  4640:         const fi = document.getElementById('rnFileInput'); if (fi) fi.value = '';
  4641:       };
  4642: 
  4643:       window.__rnPublish = async function() {
  4644:         const version = (document.getElementById('rnVersion') || {}).value || '';
  4645:         const title   = (document.getElementById('rnTitle')   || {}).value || '';
  4646:         const summary = (document.getElementById('rnSummary') || {}).value || '';
  4647:         if (!version.trim() || !title.trim() || !_htmlContent) {
  4648:           alert('Please fill in version, title and attach an HTML file.');
  4649:           return;
  4650:         }
  4651:         const btn = document.getElementById('rnPublishBtn');
  4652:         if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Publishing…'; }
  4653:         try {
  4654:           const r = await fetch('/api/settings/release_notes', {
  4655:             method: 'POST', headers: _headers(),
  4656:             body: JSON.stringify({ version: version.trim(), title: title.trim(), summary: summary.trim(), tags: _selectedTags, htmlContent: _htmlContent })
  4657:           });
  4658:           const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  4659:           if (d.ok) {
  4660:             _htmlContent = ''; _fileName = ''; _selectedTags = [];
  4661:             if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Release note published successfully! 🚀', 'success');
  4662:             window.__mumsRenderReleaseNotes();
  4663:           } else {
  4664:             if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Failed: ' + (d.message || 'unknown error'), 'error');
  4665:           }
  4666:         } catch(e) {
  4667:           if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Network error publishing.', 'error');
  4668:         }
  4669:         if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; }
  4670:       };
  4671: 
  4672:       window.__rnDelete = async function(id, title) {
  4673:         if (!confirm('Delete release note "' + title + '"?')) return;
  4674:         try {
  4675:           const r = await fetch('/api/settings/release_notes', {
  4676:             method: 'POST', headers: _headers(),
  4677:             body: JSON.stringify({ action:'delete', id })
  4678:           });
  4679:           const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  4680:           if (d.ok) {
  4681:             if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Release note deleted.', 'success');
  4682:             window.__mumsRenderReleaseNotes();
  4683:           }
  4684:         } catch(e) {}
  4685:       };
  4686: 
  4687:       _refreshAdmin();
  4688:     };
  4689: 
  4690:   })();

  4692:   // END RELEASE NOTES SYSTEM
  4693:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4694: 
  4695:   function bindGlobalSearch(user){
  4696:     const topInput = document.getElementById('globalSearchInput');
  4697:     const topBtn = document.getElementById('globalSearchBtn');
  4698:     const modalInput = document.getElementById('globalSearchModalInput');
  4699:     const resultsEl = document.getElementById('globalSearchResults');
  4700:     const modalId = 'globalSearchModal';
  4701:     const roleLabel = String((user && (user.roleLabel || user.role)) || '').trim();
  4702:     const menuNodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#leftNav a.nav-item, #leftNav button.nav-item'));
  4703: 
  4704:     function listItems(query){
  4705:       const q = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  4706:       return menuNodes
  4707:         .map((node)=>{
  4708:           const label = String((node.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim());
  4709:           if(!label) return null;
  4710:           const href = node.getAttribute('href') || '';
  4711:           return { node, label, href, haystack: `${label} ${href}`.toLowerCase() };
  4712:         })
  4713:         .filter(Boolean)
  4714:         .filter((item)=> !q || item.haystack.includes(q))
  4715:         .slice(0, 12);
  4716:     }
  4717: 
  4718:     function render(query){
  4719:       if(!resultsEl) return;
  4720:       const items = listItems(query);
  4721:       if(!items.length){
  4722:         resultsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="muted" style="padding:10px">No matches found.</div>';
  4723:         return;
  4724:       }
  4725: 
  4726:       resultsEl.innerHTML = items.map((item)=>{
  4727:         const hint = item.href ? ` <span class="muted">${item.href}</span>` : '';
  4728:         return `<button class="gresult" type="button" data-label="${encodeURIComponent(item.label)}">${item.label}${hint}</button>`;
  4729:       }).join('');
  4730: 
  4731:       Array.from(resultsEl.querySelectorAll('[data-label]')).forEach((btn)=>{
  4732:         btn.onclick = ()=>{
  4733:           const label = decodeURIComponent(String(btn.getAttribute('data-label') || ''));
  4734:           const target = items.find((it)=>it.label === label);
  4735:           if(!target) return;
  4736:           try{ target.node.click(); }catch(_){ if(target.href) location.hash = target.href; }
  4737:           UI.closeModal(modalId);
  4738:         };
  4739:       });
  4740:     }
  4741: 
  4742:     function open(query){
  4743:       UI.openModal(modalId);
  4744:       if(modalInput){
  4745:         modalInput.value = query || '';
  4746:         render(modalInput.value);
  4747:         setTimeout(()=>{ try{ modalInput.focus(); modalInput.select(); }catch(_){} }, 0);
  4748:       }else{
  4749:         render(query || '');
  4750:       }
  4751:     }
  4752: 
  4753:     if(topBtn) topBtn.onclick = ()=> open(topInput ? topInput.value : '');
  4754:     if(topInput){
  4755:       topInput.onkeydown = (e)=>{ if(e.key === 'Enter'){ e.preventDefault(); open(topInput.value); } };
  4756:     }
  4757:     if(modalInput){
  4758:       modalInput.oninput = ()=> render(modalInput.value);
  4759:       modalInput.onkeydown = (e)=>{ if(e.key === 'Escape') UI.closeModal(modalId); };
  4760:     }
  4761: 
  4762:     document.addEventListener('keydown', (e)=>{
  4763:       if((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && String(e.key || '').toLowerCase() === 'k'){
  4764:         e.preventDefault();
  4765:         open(topInput ? topInput.value : '');
  4766:       }
  4767:     });
  4768: 
  4769:     if(topInput && !topInput.placeholder){
  4770:       topInput.placeholder = roleLabel ? `Search (${roleLabel})` : 'Search…';
  4771:     }
  4772: 
  4773:     render('');
  4774:   }
  4775: 
  4776: 
  4777:   function setupClassicTopbarClock(){
  4778:     let timer = null;
  4779:     let fmt = null;
  4780: 
  4781:     function ensureFormatter(){
  4782:       if(fmt) return fmt;
  4783:       try{
  4784:         fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
  4785:           weekday:'short', year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'2-digit',
  4786:           hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit', hour12:false,
  4787:           timeZone:'Asia/Manila'
  4788:         });
  4789:       }catch(_){
  4790:         fmt = null;
  4791:       }
  4792:       return fmt;
  4793:     }
  4794: 
  4795:     function tick(){
  4796:       const el = document.getElementById('classicManilaClock');
  4797:       if(!el) return;
  4798:       try{
  4799:         const f = ensureFormatter();
  4800:         el.textContent = f ? f.format(new Date()) : new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,19);
  4801:       }catch(_){
  4802:         el.textContent = new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,19);
  4803:       }
  4804:     }
  4805: 
  4806:     function apply(){
  4807:       const isClassic = (document.body && document.body.dataset && document.body.dataset.theme==='classic_style');
  4808:       const host = document.querySelector('.topbar-center');
  4809:       let el = document.getElementById('classicManilaClock');
  4810: 
  4811:       if(!isClassic){
  4812:         if(el) el.style.display = 'none';
  4813:         if(timer){ clearInterval(timer); timer=null; }
  4814:         return;
  4815:       }
  4816: 
  4817:       if(!host) return;
  4818:       if(!el){
  4819:         el = document.createElement('div');
  4820:         el.id = 'classicManilaClock';
  4821:         el.className = 'classic-clock';
  4822:         host.insertBefore(el, host.firstChild);
  4823:       }
  4824:       el.style.display = '';
  4825:       tick();
  4826:       if(!timer){ timer = setInterval(tick, 1000); }
  4827:     }
  4828: 
  4829:     window.addEventListener('mums:themeApplied', apply);
  4830:     apply();
  4831:   }
  4832: 
  4833:   // ── SIDEBAR STATE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4834:   // applySidebarState([collapsed]) — reads localStorage when called with no arg.
  4835:   function applySidebarState(collapsed) {
  4836:     try {
  4837:       const pref = (collapsed !== undefined)
  4838:         ? collapsed
  4839:         : (localStorage.getItem('mums_sidebar_default') === 'collapsed');
  4840:       document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed', !!pref);
  4841:       // Keep hover-expand in sync (only meaningful while collapsed).
  4842:       const hoverOn = (localStorage.getItem('mums_sidebar_hover') ?? '1') === '1';
  4843:       document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-hoverable', !!pref && hoverOn);
  4844:       // Persist the current state so future loads start correctly.
  4845:       localStorage.setItem('mums_sidebar_default', pref ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded');
  4846:     } catch (_) {}
  4847:   }
  4848: 
  4849:   // bindSidebarToggle() — wires the #sidebarToggle hamburger button.
  4850:   function bindSidebarToggle() {
  4851:     const btn = document.getElementById('sidebarToggle');
  4852:     if (!btn || btn.__sidebarBound) return;
  4853:     btn.__sidebarBound = true;
  4854:     let lastClick = 0;
  4855:     btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  4856:       const now = Date.now();
  4857:       const isCollapsed = document.body.classList.contains('sidebar-collapsed');
  4858:       // Double-click within 400 ms → pin as rail (collapsed) permanently.
  4859:       if (now - lastClick < 400) {
  4860:         applySidebarState(true);
  4861:       } else {
  4862:         applySidebarState(!isCollapsed);
  4863:       }
  4864:       lastClick = now;
  4865:     });
  4866:   }
  4867: 
  4868:   // ── RIGHTBAR STATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4869:   function applyRightbarState(collapsed) {
  4870:     try {
  4871:       const pref = (collapsed !== undefined)
  4872:         ? collapsed
  4873:         : (localStorage.getItem('mums_rightbar_default') === 'collapsed');
  4874:       document.body.classList.toggle('rightbar-collapsed', !!pref);
  4875:       localStorage.setItem('mums_rightbar_default', pref ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded');
  4876:     } catch (_) {}
  4877:   }
  4878: 
  4879:   function bindRightbarToggle() {
  4880:     const btn = document.getElementById('toggleRightPanelBtn');
  4881:     if (!btn || btn.__rightbarBound) return;
  4882:     btn.__rightbarBound = true;
  4883:     btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  4884:       const now = document.body.classList.contains('rightbar-collapsed');
  4885:       applyRightbarState(!now);
  4886:     });
  4887:   }
  4888: 
  4889:   // ── DENSITY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4890:   function applyDensity() {
  4891:     try {
  4892:       const d = localStorage.getItem('mums_density') || 'normal';
  4893:       document.body.classList.toggle('density-compact', d === 'compact');
  4894:     } catch (_) {}
  4895:   }
  4896: 
  4897:   // ── BOTTOM BARS VISIBILITY ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4898:   // Persists per user via localStorage. Keys: mums_bar_online | mums_bar_quicklinks
  4899:   //
  4900:   // LAYOUT STRATEGY (correct approach):
  4901:   // ─ Toggling CSS classes (online-bar-hidden / quicklinks-bar-hidden) on <body>
  4902:   //   drives the CSS variables --mums-dock-h and --mums-onlinebar-h to 0px.
  4903:   // ─ The existing rule:
  4904:   //     .app { padding-bottom: calc(var(--mums-dock-h) + var(--mums-onlinebar-h) + 18px) }
  4905:   //   automatically recalculates — no padding-bottom override needed.
  4906:   // ─ Sidebars (.side/.right) are grid items in the 1fr row and auto-expand
  4907:   //   as the available grid height grows. No explicit height override required.
  4908:   // ─ The bars themselves use transform:translateY(100%) for smooth slide-out.
  4909: 
  4910:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4911:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4912:   //  BOTTOM BARS VISIBILITY SYSTEM — v5 FINAL FIX
  4913:   //
  4914:   //  BUG IN v4: Wrote measured heights back to --mums-dock-h/--mums-onlinebar-h.
  4915:   //  Those SAME vars drive bar sizing:
  4916:   //    .quicklinks-bar { height: var(--mums-dock-h) }
  4917:   //    .onlinebar-sec  { min-height: var(--mums-onlinebar-h) }
  4918:   //  Result: ResizeObserver measured bar → wrote to var → bar grew → RO fired
  4919:   //  again → infinite loop → grid row 3 ballooned → row 2 collapsed → blank screen.
  4920:   //
  4921:   //  PERMANENT FIX: New isolated variable --mums-bar-spacer.
  4922:   //  • --mums-dock-h / --mums-onlinebar-h: UNTOUCHED — still drive bar sizing.
  4923:   //  • --mums-bar-spacer: ONLY written by JS, ONLY used in grid-template-rows.
  4924:   //  • Zero circular dependency. Zero feedback loop.
  4925:   //
  4926:   //  .app grid-template-rows: auto  1fr  var(--mums-bar-spacer)
  4927:   //    Row 3 = exact sum of measured bar heights → row 2 (1fr) always bounded.
  4928:   //    Bars hidden → spacer = 0 → row 2 expands to fill full viewport height.
  4929:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  4930: 
  4931:   const BAR_KEYS = {
  4932:     online:     'mums_bar_online',
  4933:     quicklinks: 'mums_bar_quicklinks',
  4934:   };
  4935: 
  4936:   // Cached measured heights — set by ResizeObserver, read by _commitSpacer
  4937:   var _measuredBarH = { online: 0, quicklinks: 0 };
  4938:   var _barRO        = { online: null, quicklinks: null };
  4939:   var _barRAF       = null;
  4940: 
  4941:   // Write ONLY to --mums-bar-spacer on <html> inline style.
  4942:   // <html> inline style = highest CSS specificity, no :root override can beat it.
  4943:   // --mums-bar-spacer is NOT used inside bars → zero circular dependency.
  4944:   function _commitSpacer() {
  4945:     try {
  4946:       var onlineShow     = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.online)     !== '0';
  4947:       var quicklinksShow = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.quicklinks) !== '0';
  4948:       var qlH     = quicklinksShow ? _measuredBarH.quicklinks : 0;
  4949:       var onlineH = onlineShow     ? _measuredBarH.online     : 0;
  4950:       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--mums-bar-spacer', (qlH + onlineH) + 'px');
  4951:       // Sync online bar's bottom so it floats directly above quicklinks bar
  4952:       try {
  4953:         var ob = document.getElementById('onlineUsersBar') || document.querySelector('.online-users-bar');
  4954:         if (ob) ob.style.bottom = qlH + 'px';
  4955:       } catch(_) {}
  4956:     } catch (_) {}
  4957:   }
  4958: 
  4959:   // Measure one bar's ACTUAL rendered height and cache it
  4960:   function _measureOne(key, el) {
  4961:     if (!el) return;
  4962:     try {
  4963:       _measuredBarH[key] = Math.ceil(el.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0);
  4964:       _commitSpacer();
  4965:     } catch (_) {}
  4966:   }
  4967: 
  4968:   // Attach ResizeObserver — fires whenever bar resizes (content/theme/window)
  4969:   function _watchBar(key, el) {
  4970:     if (!el) return;
  4971:     try {
  4972:       if (_barRO[key]) { try { _barRO[key].disconnect(); } catch(_){} }
  4973:       if (typeof ResizeObserver !== 'undefined') {
  4974:         _barRO[key] = new ResizeObserver(function() {
  4975:           if (_barRAF) cancelAnimationFrame(_barRAF);
  4976:           _barRAF = requestAnimationFrame(function() { _measureOne(key, el); });
  4977:         });
  4978:         _barRO[key].observe(el);
  4979:       }
  4980:       _measureOne(key, el); // immediate measurement on attach
  4981:     } catch (_) {}
  4982:   }
  4983: 
  4984:   function _initBarObservers() {
  4985:     try {
  4986:       var ql = document.getElementById('quickLinksBar')  || document.querySelector('.quicklinks-bar');
  4987:       var ob = document.getElementById('onlineUsersBar') || document.querySelector('.online-users-bar');
  4988:       _watchBar('quicklinks', ql);
  4989:       _watchBar('online',     ob);
  4990:     } catch (_) {}
  4991:   }
  4992: 
  4993:   function applyBarVisibility() {
  4994:     try {
  4995:       var onlineShow     = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.online)     !== '0';
  4996:       var quicklinksShow = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.quicklinks) !== '0';
  4997:       document.body.classList.toggle('online-bar-hidden',     !onlineShow);
  4998:       document.body.classList.toggle('quicklinks-bar-hidden', !quicklinksShow);
  4999:       _commitSpacer(); // immediate snap
  5000:       // Re-measure after slide animation settles (280ms) for exact pixel fit
  5001:       setTimeout(function() {
  5002:         try {
  5003:           var ql = document.getElementById('quickLinksBar')  || document.querySelector('.quicklinks-bar');
  5004:           var ob = document.getElementById('onlineUsersBar') || document.querySelector('.online-users-bar');
  5005:           if (quicklinksShow && ql) _measureOne('quicklinks', ql);
  5006:           if (onlineShow     && ob) _measureOne('online',     ob);
  5007:           _commitSpacer();
  5008:         } catch (_) {}
  5009:       }, 320);
  5010:     } catch (_) {}
  5011:   }
  5012: 
  5013:   function setBarVisibility(barKey, visible) {
  5014:     try {
  5015:       localStorage.setItem(BAR_KEYS[barKey], visible ? '1' : '0');
  5016:       applyBarVisibility();
  5017:       _syncBarVisibilityCheckboxes();
  5018:     } catch (_) {}
  5019:   }
  5020: 
  5021:   function _syncBarVisibilityCheckboxes() {
  5022:     try {
  5023:       var onlineChk     = document.getElementById('toggleOnlineBar');
  5024:       var quicklinksChk = document.getElementById('toggleQuickLinksBar');
  5025:       if (onlineChk)     onlineChk.checked     = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.online)     !== '0';
  5026:       if (quicklinksChk) quicklinksChk.checked = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.quicklinks) !== '0';
  5027:     } catch (_) {}
  5028:   }
  5029: 
  5030:   function bindBarVisibilityControls() {
  5031:     try {
  5032:       var onlineChk     = document.getElementById('toggleOnlineBar');
  5033:       var quicklinksChk = document.getElementById('toggleQuickLinksBar');
  5034:       if (onlineChk && !onlineChk.__barBound) {
  5035:         onlineChk.__barBound = true;
  5036:         onlineChk.checked = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.online) !== '0';
  5037:         onlineChk.addEventListener('change', function() { setBarVisibility('online', onlineChk.checked); });
  5038:       }
  5039:       if (quicklinksChk && !quicklinksChk.__barBound) {
  5040:         quicklinksChk.__barBound = true;
  5041:         quicklinksChk.checked = localStorage.getItem(BAR_KEYS.quicklinks) !== '0';
  5042:         quicklinksChk.addEventListener('change', function() { setBarVisibility('quicklinks', quicklinksChk.checked); });
  5043:       }
  5044:       _initBarObservers();
  5045:     } catch (_) {}
  5046:   }
  5047: 
  5048:   // ── MAIN SETTINGS NAV (Mockup C — Two-column layout) ─────────────────────────
  5049:   (function initMainSettingsSystem(){

  5062:       } catch(_) {}

  5087: 
  5088:         // ── APPEARANCE DEFAULTS PANEL (Super Admin) ────────────────────
  5089:         (function initAppearanceDefaultsPanel(){
  5090:           const forceBtn = document.getElementById('forceApexBrightnessBtn');
  5091:           const clearBtn = document.getElementById('clearForceApexBtn');
  5092:           const statusEl = document.getElementById('appearanceForceStatus');
  5093:           const infoEl   = document.getElementById('appearanceForcedInfo');
  5094: 
  5095:           function refreshPanelState(){
  5096:             if(!infoEl || !clearBtn) return;
  5097:             const forced = __globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedTheme && __globalThemeSettings.forcedBrightness;
  5098:             if(forced){
  5099:               const at   = __globalThemeSettings.forcedAt    ? new Date(__globalThemeSettings.forcedAt).toLocaleString()    : '';
  5100:               const who  = __globalThemeSettings.forcedByName || '';
  5101:               infoEl.innerHTML = '✅ <strong>ACTIVE</strong> — All users get APEX + 130% on next load.' +
  5102:                 (who ? ' Forced by ' + UI.esc(who) + '.' : '') + (at ? ' Set: ' + UI.esc(at) : '');
  5103:               infoEl.style.cssText = 'display:block;font-size:10px;color:#C9A84C;margin-bottom:10px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.08);border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);';
  5104:               clearBtn.style.display = '';
  5105:             } else {
  5106:               infoEl.style.display = 'none';
  5107:               clearBtn.style.display = 'none';
  5108:             }
  5109:           }
  5110: 
  5111:           if(forceBtn && !forceBtn.__apexBound){
  5112:             forceBtn.__apexBound = true;
  5113:             forceBtn.onclick = async () => {
  5114:               const token = getBearerToken();
  5115:               if(!token){ if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='Session expired.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;border-radius:5px;'; } return; }
  5116:               forceBtn.disabled = true;
  5117:               forceBtn.innerHTML = '⏳ Applying…';
  5118:               if(statusEl) statusEl.style.display = 'none';
  5119:               try{
  5120:                 const res = await fetch('/api/settings/global-theme',{
  5121:                   method:'POST',
  5122:                   headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':`Bearer ${token}`},
  5123:                   body:JSON.stringify({action:'force_all',themeId:'apex',brightness:130})
  5124:                 });
  5125:                 const data = await res.json().catch(()=>({}));
  5126:                 if(!res.ok||!data.ok) throw new Error(data.message||data.error||'HTTP '+res.status);
  5127:                 __globalThemeSettings = Object.assign({},__globalThemeSettings,{
  5128:                   defaultTheme:'apex',brightness:130,
  5129:                   forcedTheme:true,forcedBrightness:true,
  5130:                   forcedAt:data.forcedAt||new Date().toISOString(),forcedByName:data.forcedByName||null
  5131:                 });
  5132:                 __globalThemeLoaded = true;
  5133:                 if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✓ Force applied. All users will get APEX + 130% on next page load.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(63,185,80,.1);color:#3fb950;border-radius:5px;'; }
  5134:                 refreshPanelState();
  5135:                 try{ renderThemeGrid(); }catch(_){}
  5136:               }catch(err){
  5137:                 if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✗ '+String(err&&err.message||err); statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;border-radius:5px;'; }
  5138:               }finally{
  5139:                 forceBtn.disabled=false;
  5140:                 forceBtn.innerHTML='🛡️ Force APEX + 130% for All Users';
  5141:               }
  5142:             };
  5143:           }
  5144: 
  5145:           if(clearBtn && !clearBtn.__apexBound){
  5146:             clearBtn.__apexBound = true;
  5147:             clearBtn.onclick = async () => {
  5148:               const token = getBearerToken();
  5149:               if(!token) return;
  5150:               clearBtn.disabled = true;
  5151:               try{
  5152:                 const res = await fetch('/api/settings/global-theme',{
  5153:                   method:'POST',
  5154:                   headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':`Bearer ${token}`},
  5155:                   body:JSON.stringify({forcedTheme:false,forcedBrightness:false})
  5156:                 });
  5157:                 const data = await res.json().catch(()=>({}));
  5158:                 if(!res.ok||!data.ok) throw new Error(data.message||data.error||'HTTP '+res.status);
  5159:                 __globalThemeSettings = Object.assign({},__globalThemeSettings,{forcedTheme:false,forcedBrightness:false,forcedAt:null,forcedByName:null});
  5160:                 if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='Force cleared — users may now customize freely.'; statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(139,148,158,.1);color:#8b949e;border-radius:5px;'; }
  5161:                 refreshPanelState();
  5162:                 try{ renderThemeGrid(); }catch(_){}
  5163:               }catch(err){
  5164:                 if(statusEl){ statusEl.textContent='✗ '+String(err&&err.message||err); statusEl.style.cssText='display:block;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;border-radius:5px;'; }
  5165:               }finally{ clearBtn.disabled = false; }
  5166:             };
  5167:           }
  5168: 
  5169:           refreshPanelState();
  5170:         })();
  5171:       }
  5172: 
  5173:       // Always sync brightness badge + toggles
  5174:       try{ _syncMsBrightnessBadge(); }catch(_){}
  5175:       try{ _syncMsBarToggles(); }catch(_){}
  5176: 
  5177:       // Open a settings panel directly (no nested Profile modal popup)
  5178:       try {
  5179:         _msSelectPanel('profile');
  5180:         var _defaultUser = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  5181:         if (_defaultUser) setTimeout(function(){ try{ openProfileModal(_defaultUser, { openModal:false }); }catch(_){} }, 80);
  5182:       } catch(_) {}
  5183:     };
  5184: 
  5185:     function _msSelectPanel(panelId) {
  5186:       try {
  5187:         // Hide all panels
  5188:         document.querySelectorAll('.ms-panel').forEach(function(p) { p.style.display = 'none'; });
  5189:         // Show target
  5190:         var target = document.getElementById('msp_' + panelId);
  5191:         if (target) target.style.display = '';
  5192:         // Update nav active state
  5193:         document.querySelectorAll('.ms-nav-item').forEach(function(btn) {
  5194:           btn.classList.toggle('ms-active', btn.dataset.panel === panelId);
  5195:         });
  5196:       } catch(_) {}
  5197:     }
  5198: 
  5199:     function _bindMsNav() {
  5200:       document.querySelectorAll('.ms-nav-item[data-panel]').forEach(function(btn) {
  5201:         if (btn.__msNavBound) return;

  5204:           var panel = btn.dataset.panel;

  5206:           // Special: panels that open sub-modals

  5208:           var _panelUser = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : user;
  5209:           var panelInits = {

  5211:               try{ openProfileModal(_panelUser, { openModal:false }); }catch(_){}
  5212:             },

  5219:               try{ renderLinksGrid(); }catch(_){}
  5220:             },

  5223:               try{ renderClocksGrid(); }catch(_){}

  5227:             },

  5256:               }catch(_){}

  5260:             },
  5261:             brightness: function(){
