  5263:             },
  5264:             mailboxtime: function(){
  5265:               // Run the original bind so open() / clock are initialized
  5266:               try{ if(typeof bindMailboxTimeModal === 'function') bindMailboxTimeModal(); }catch(_){}
  5267:               // Always call open() to refresh draft from Store (bypasses __bound guard)
  5268:               try{
  5269:                 var _mbModal = document.getElementById('mailboxTimeModal');
  5270:                 if(_mbModal && typeof _mbModal.__open === 'function') _mbModal.__open();
  5271:               }catch(_){}
  5272:               // FIX[PANEL-DIRECT]: Wire Save/Reset buttons with a DIRECT server API call
  5273:               // This is a belt-and-suspenders override of the existing onclick handlers.
  5274:               // It guarantees the DB is written regardless of draft/Store state issues.
  5275:               try{
  5276:                 var _saveBtn  = document.getElementById('mbTimeSave');
  5277:                 var _resetBtn = document.getElementById('mbTimeReset');
  5278:                 var _enabledEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeEnabled');
  5279:                 var _inputEl   = document.getElementById('mbTimeInput');
  5280:                 var _scopeEl   = document.getElementById('mbTimeScope');
  5281:                 var _freezeEl  = document.getElementById('mbTimeFreeze');
  5282:                 var _errEl     = document.getElementById('mbTimeErr');
  5283: 
  5284:                 var _getToken = function(){
  5285:                   try{
  5286:                     var t = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? String(CloudAuth.accessToken()||'').trim() : '';
  5287:                     if(t) return t;
  5288:                     var sess = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.loadSession) ? CloudAuth.loadSession() : null;
  5289:                     return (sess && (sess.access_token || (sess.session && sess.session.access_token)))
  5290:                       ? String(sess.access_token || sess.session.access_token).trim() : '';
  5291:                   }catch(e){ return ''; }
  5292:                 };
  5293: 
  5294:                 var _callOverrideApi = function(payload, onOk, onErr){
  5295:                   var token = _getToken();
  5296:                   if(!token){ if(onErr) onErr('Not authenticated'); return; }
  5297:                   fetch('/api/mailbox_override/set', {
  5298:                     method:'POST',
  5299:                     headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+token},
  5300:                     body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  5301:                   }).then(function(r){
  5302:                     return r.json().then(function(d){
  5303:                       if(r.ok && d && d.ok){ if(onOk) onOk(d); }
  5304:                       else{ if(onErr) onErr((d && d.message) || ('HTTP '+r.status)); }
  5305:                     });
  5306:                   }).catch(function(e){ if(onErr) onErr(String(e && e.message || e)); });
  5307:                 };
  5308: 
  5309:                 if(_resetBtn){
  5310:                   _resetBtn.onclick = function(){
  5311:                     _resetBtn.disabled = true;
  5312:                     _resetBtn.textContent = 'Clearing…';
  5313:                     _callOverrideApi(
  5314:                       {scope:'global', enabled:false, freeze:true, override_iso:''},
  5315:                       function(){
  5316:                         _callOverrideApi({scope:'superadmin', enabled:false, freeze:true, override_iso:''}, null, null);
  5317:                         try{ if(window.Store && Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride) Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride({propagateGlobal:true, forceScope:'global'}); }catch(_){}
  5318:                         try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Override cleared. Mailbox now uses system Manila time.','success'); }catch(_){}
  5319:                         try{ if(_mbModal && typeof _mbModal.__open === 'function') _mbModal.__open(); }catch(_){}
  5320:                         _resetBtn.disabled = false;
  5321:                         _resetBtn.textContent = 'Return to normal time';
  5322:                       },
  5323:                       function(err){
  5324:                         try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Error clearing override: '+err,'error'); }catch(_){}
  5325:                         _resetBtn.disabled = false;
  5326:                         _resetBtn.textContent = 'Return to normal time';
  5327:                       }
  5328:                     );
  5329:                   };
  5330:                 }
  5331: 
  5332:                 if(_saveBtn){
  5333:                   _saveBtn.onclick = function(){
  5334:                     var isEnabled = _enabledEl ? !!_enabledEl.checked : false;
  5335:                     if(!isEnabled){
  5336:                       // Treat same as reset
  5337:                       if(_resetBtn) _resetBtn.onclick();
  5338:                       return;
  5339:                     }
  5340:                     // Parse date from input
  5341:                     var inputVal = _inputEl ? String(_inputEl.value||'').trim() : '';
  5342:                     var MIN_MS = Date.UTC(2020,0,1);
  5343:                     var ms = 0;
  5344:                     if(inputVal){
  5345:                       try{
  5346:                         var parts = inputVal.split('T');
  5347:                         if(parts.length < 2) parts = inputVal.split(' ');
  5348:                         var d = parts[0].trim(), t = (parts[1]||'').trim();
  5349:                         var dp = d.split(/[-\/]/).map(Number);
  5350:                         var tp = t.split(':').map(Number);
  5351:                         // Handle MM/DD/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD
  5352:                         var y,m,day,hh,mm;
  5353:                         if(dp[0] > 31){ y=dp[0];m=dp[1];day=dp[2]; }
  5354:                         else{ m=dp[0];day=dp[1];y=dp[2]; }
  5355:                         hh=tp[0]||0; mm=tp[1]||0;
  5356:                         // Handle AM/PM
  5357:                         var tStr = (parts[1]||'').toUpperCase();
  5358:                         if(tStr.includes('PM') && hh < 12) hh+=12;
  5359:                         if(tStr.includes('AM') && hh===12) hh=0;
  5360:                         ms = Date.UTC(y,m-1,day,hh-8,mm,0,0);
  5361:                         if(!Number.isFinite(ms) || ms < MIN_MS) ms = 0;
  5362:                       }catch(e){ ms = 0; }
  5363:                     }
  5364:                     if(!ms || ms < MIN_MS){
  5365:                       // Try Store's current draft
  5366:                       try{
  5367:                         var cur = Store.getMailboxTimeOverride ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : null;
  5368:                         if(cur && cur.ms && cur.ms > MIN_MS) ms = cur.ms;
  5369:                       }catch(_){}
  5370:                     }
  5371:                     if(!ms || ms < MIN_MS){
  5372:                       if(_errEl) _errEl.textContent = 'Please select a valid Manila date & time.';
  5373:                       try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Please select a valid date & time first.','warn'); }catch(_){}
  5374:                       return;
  5375:                     }
  5376:                     var scope = (_scopeEl && _scopeEl.value === 'global') ? 'global' : 'superadmin';
  5377:                     var freeze = _freezeEl ? !!_freezeEl.checked : true;
  5378:                     var isoStr = new Date(ms).toISOString();
  5379:                     _saveBtn.disabled = true;
  5380:                     _saveBtn.textContent = 'Saving…';
  5381:                     _callOverrideApi(
  5382:                       {scope:scope, enabled:true, freeze:freeze, override_iso:isoStr},
  5383:                       function(){
  5384:                         try{ if(window.Store && Store.saveMailboxTimeOverride) Store.saveMailboxTimeOverride({enabled:true,ms:ms,freeze:freeze,scope:scope,setAt:freeze?0:Date.now()}); }catch(_){}
  5385:                         try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store',{detail:{key:'mailbox_override_cloud',source:'local'}})); }catch(_){}
  5386:                         try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store',{detail:{key:'mailbox_time_override',source:'local'}})); }catch(_){}
  5387:                         try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Override saved! ('+scope[0].toUpperCase()+scope.slice(1)+' scope)','success'); }catch(_){}
  5388:                         try{ if(_mbModal && typeof _mbModal.__open === 'function') _mbModal.__open(); }catch(_){}
  5389:                         _saveBtn.disabled = false;
  5390:                         _saveBtn.textContent = 'Save';
  5391:                       },
  5392:                       function(err){
  5393:                         try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Save failed: '+err,'error'); }catch(_){}
  5394:                         if(_errEl) _errEl.textContent = 'Save failed: '+err;
  5395:                         _saveBtn.disabled = false;
  5396:                         _saveBtn.textContent = 'Save';
  5397:                       }
  5398:                     );
  5399:                   };
  5400:                 }
  5401:               }catch(_){}
  5402:             },
  5403:             systemcheck: function(){
  5404:               try{ if(typeof bindSystemCheckModal === 'function') bindSystemCheckModal(_panelUser); }catch(_){}
  5405:             },
  5406:             globalqb: function(){
  5407:               // loadGqbSettings is scoped inside isSA block — access via window proxy
  5408:               try{ if(window.__mumsLoadGqbSettings) window.__mumsLoadGqbSettings();
  5409:               else if(typeof loadGqbSettings === 'function') loadGqbSettings(); }catch(_){}

  5459:     // ── PIN SECURITY SETTINGS PANEL RENDERER ────────────────────────────────
  5460:     window.__mumsRenderPinSettings = async function() {
  5461:       var body = document.getElementById('pinSettingsPanelBody');
  5462:       if (!body) return;
  5463: 
  5464:       body.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Loading…</div>';
  5465: 
  5466:       try {
  5467:         var tok = (window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  5468:         var res = await fetch('/api/pin/policy', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok } });
  5469:         var data = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
  5470:         var p = (data.ok && data.policy) ? data.policy : { enabled:true, requireOnLogin:true, enforceOnFirstLogin:true, sessionExpiryHours:3, autoLogoutOnFailures:true, maxFailedAttempts:3 };
  5471: 
  5472:         // Also get user count stats from Store
  5473:         var allUsers = (window.Store && Store.getUsers) ? Store.getUsers() : [];
  5474:         var pinSetCount = allUsers.filter(function(u) { return u && u.pin_hash; }).length;
  5475:         var pendingCount = allUsers.filter(function(u) { return u && !u.pin_hash; }).length;
  5476: 
  5477:         function tog(id, checked) {
  5478:           return '<div class="tog-wrap" style="width:42px;height:23px;border-radius:99px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,' + (checked?'.14':'.07') + ');background:rgba(' + (checked?'56,189,248,.2':'255,255,255,.04') + ');cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:.25s;flex-shrink:0" id="' + id + '" data-on="' + (checked?'1':'0') + '" onclick="window.__mumsTogglePin(this)">' +
  5479:             '<div style="position:absolute;top:3px;left:' + (checked?'20':'3') + 'px;width:15px;height:15px;border-radius:50%;background:' + (checked?'#38bdf8':'#475569') + ';transition:.25s;' + (checked?'box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(56,189,248,.45)':'') + '"></div>' +
  5480:             '</div>';
  5481:         }
  5482:         function statChip(num, label, color) {
  5483:           return '<div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px">' +
  5484:             '<div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:' + color + ';font-family:monospace;margin-bottom:4px">' + num + '</div>' +
  5485:             '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:monospace">' + label + '</div>' +
  5486:             '</div>';
  5487:         }
  5488:         function row(id, name, desc, checked) {
  5489:           return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)">' +
  5490:             '<div style="flex:1;margin-right:20px">' +
  5491:               '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:3px">' + name + '</div>' +

  5496:               tog('tog_' + id, checked) +
  5497:             '</div>' +
  5498:           '</div>';
  5499:         }

  5502:         }

  5549:             '<button id="pinSaveBtn" onclick="window.__mumsSavePinPolicy()" style="height:38px;padding:0 22px;border-radius:10px;border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(56,189,248,.85),rgba(56,189,248,.65));color:#06111e;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-family:var(--font,sans-serif)">Save PIN Policy</button>' +
  5550:           '</div>';
  5551: 
  5552:         // Store current policy for save
  5553:         window.__mumsPinCurrentPolicy = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(p));
  5554: 
  5555:       } catch(e) {
  5556:         body.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--rose,#fb7185);padding:20px;font-size:12px">Failed to load PIN settings: ' + (e && e.message || e) + '</div>';
  5557:       }

  5559: 
  5560:     // Toggle handler
  5561:     window.__mumsTogglePin = function(el) {
  5562:       var isOn = el.getAttribute('data-on') === '1';
  5563:       var newOn = !isOn;
  5564:       el.setAttribute('data-on', newOn ? '1' : '0');
  5565:       el.style.background = newOn ? 'rgba(56,189,248,.2)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.04)';
  5566:       el.style.borderColor = newOn ? 'rgba(56,189,248,.14)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.07)';
  5567:       var dot = el.querySelector('div');
  5568:       if (dot) { dot.style.left = newOn ? '20px' : '3px'; dot.style.background = newOn ? '#38bdf8' : '#475569'; dot.style.boxShadow = newOn ? '0 0 10px rgba(56,189,248,.45)' : 'none'; }
  5569:       var id = el.id.replace('tog_','');
  5570:       var ts = document.getElementById('ts_' + id);
  5571:       if (ts) { ts.textContent = newOn ? 'ON' : 'OFF'; ts.style.background = newOn?'rgba(16,185,129,.1)':'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'; ts.style.borderColor = newOn?'rgba(16,185,129,.2)':'rgba(255,255,255,.1)'; ts.style.color = newOn?'#10b981':'var(--muted)'; }
  5572:       if (window.__mumsPinCurrentPolicy) {
  5573:         var fieldMap = { enabled:'enabled', requireOnLogin:'requireOnLogin', enforceOnFirstLogin:'enforceOnFirstLogin', sessionExpiry:'sessionExpiryHours', autoLogout:'autoLogoutOnFailures' };
  5574:         var field = fieldMap[id];
  5575:         if (field) {
  5576:           if (field === 'sessionExpiryHours') window.__mumsPinCurrentPolicy[field] = newOn ? 3 : 0;
  5577:           else window.__mumsPinCurrentPolicy[field] = newOn;
  5578:         }
  5579:       }
  5580:     };
  5581: 
  5582:     // Save handler
  5583:     window.__mumsSavePinPolicy = async function() {
  5584:       var btn = document.getElementById('pinSaveBtn');
  5585:       if (!btn) return;
  5586:       btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Saving…';
  5587:       try {
  5588:         var tok = (window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  5589:         var res = await fetch('/api/pin/policy', {
  5590:           method: 'POST',
  5591:           headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  5592:           body: JSON.stringify(window.__mumsPinCurrentPolicy || {})
  5593:         });
  5594:         var data = await res.json().catch(function() { return {}; });
  5595:         if (data.ok) {
  5596:           // Update PinController policy cache
  5597:           if (window.PinController && typeof PinController.reloadPolicy === 'function') PinController.reloadPolicy();
  5598:           try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('PIN policy saved.', 'success'); }catch(_){}
  5599:         } else {
  5600:           try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Failed to save: ' + (data.message||'unknown error'), 'error'); }catch(_){}
  5601:         }
  5602:       } catch(e) {
  5603:         try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Network error saving PIN policy.', 'error'); }catch(_){}
  5604:       }
  5605:       btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Save PIN Policy';
  5606:     };

  5608: 
  5609:     function _bindMsSearch() {
  5610:       var inp = document.getElementById('msSearchInput');
  5611:       if (!inp || inp.__msBound) return;
  5612:       inp.__msBound = true;
  5613:       inp.addEventListener('input', function() {
  5614:         var q = inp.value.toLowerCase().trim();
  5615:         document.querySelectorAll('.ms-nav-item[data-panel]').forEach(function(btn) {
  5616:           var name = (btn.querySelector('.ms-ni-name')||{}).textContent || '';
  5617:           var sub  = (btn.querySelector('.ms-ni-sub')||{}).textContent  || '';
  5618:           btn.style.display = (!q || (name+sub).toLowerCase().includes(q)) ? '' : 'none';
  5619:         });
  5620:         // Show/hide group labels based on whether any items below are visible
  5621:         document.querySelectorAll('.ms-grp-label').forEach(function(lbl) {
  5622:           var next = lbl.nextElementSibling;
  5623:           var anyVisible = false;
  5624:           while (next && !next.classList.contains('ms-grp-label')) {
  5625:             if (next.style.display !== 'none') anyVisible = true;
  5626:             next = next.nextElementSibling;
  5627:           }
  5628:           lbl.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
  5629:         });
  5630:       });
  5631:     }
  5632: 
  5633:     function _syncMsBarToggles() {
  5634:       try {
  5635:         var onlineChk = document.getElementById('toggleOnlineBar');
  5636:         var qlChk = document.getElementById('toggleQuickLinksBar');
  5637:         // FIX: was using wrong keys. Must match outer BAR_KEYS object.
  5638:         if (onlineChk) onlineChk.checked = localStorage.getItem('mums_bar_online')     !== '0';
  5639:         if (qlChk)     qlChk.checked     = localStorage.getItem('mums_bar_quicklinks') !== '0';
  5640:       } catch(_) {}
  5641:     }
  5642: 
  5643:     function _syncMsBrightnessBadge() {
  5644:       try {
  5645:         var tag = document.getElementById('msBrightnessTag');
  5646:         var raw = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mums_brightness_v1') || '{}');
  5647:         var val = raw.useDefault ? 130 : (Number(raw.value) || 130);
  5648:         var label = document.getElementById('brightnessStatusLabel');
  5649:         if (tag) {
  5650:           if (!raw.useDefault && val !== 100) {
  5651:             tag.textContent = val + '%';
  5652:             tag.style.display = '';
  5653:           } else {
  5654:             tag.style.display = 'none';
  5655:           }
  5656:         }
  5657:         if (label) label.textContent = raw.useDefault ? 'default (130%)' : val + '%';
  5658:       } catch(_) {}
  5659:     }
  5660:   })();
  5661: 
  5662:   // ── BRIGHTNESS CONTROL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  5663:   (function initBrightnessSystem() {
  5664:     const LS_KEY = 'mums_brightness_v1';
  5665:     const DEFAULT_VAL = 130;
  5666:     const APP_EL_ID = 'app'; // root app element to apply filter on
  5667: 
  5668:     function clamp(v) { return Math.max(40, Math.min(130, Number(v) || DEFAULT_VAL)); }
  5669: 
  5670:     function getStoredBrightness() {
  5671:       try {
  5672:         const raw = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY) || '{}');
  5673:         return {
  5674:           value: clamp(raw.value ?? DEFAULT_VAL),
  5675:           useDefault: raw.useDefault === true
  5676:         };
  5677:       } catch(_) { return { value: DEFAULT_VAL, useDefault: false }; }
  5678:     }
  5679: 
  5680:     function saveBrightness(value, useDefault) {
  5681:       try { localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, JSON.stringify({ value, useDefault })); } catch(_) {}
  5682:     }
  5683: 
  5684:     function applyBrightness(value, useDefault) {
  5685:       const app = document.getElementById(APP_EL_ID) || document.body;
  5686:       const effective = useDefault ? DEFAULT_VAL : clamp(value);
  5687:       // Set CSS variable and data attribute for selector hook
  5688:       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--mums-brightness', effective / 100);
  5689:       app.setAttribute('data-brightness', String(effective));
  5690:       // Apply filter proportionally to ALL UI elements via root element
  5691:       // FIX: Clear filter only at true neutral (100%), not at DEFAULT_VAL.
  5692:       // Previously this was `effective === DEFAULT_VAL` which incorrectly
  5693:       // skipped the CSS filter when brightness was 130, making it look like 100%.
  5694:       if (effective === 100) {
  5695:         app.style.filter = '';
  5696:       } else {
  5697:         app.style.filter = `brightness(${effective / 100})`;
  5698:       }
  5699:     }
  5700: 
  5701:     function updateSliderTrack(slider) {
  5702:       try {
  5703:         const min = Number(slider.min || 40);
  5704:         const max = Number(slider.max || 130);
  5705:         const val = Number(slider.value || DEFAULT_VAL);
  5706:         const pct = ((val - min) / (max - min) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
  5707:         slider.style.setProperty('--sval', pct);
  5708:       } catch(_) {}
  5709:     }
  5710: 
  5711:     // Apply on page load (before settings modal is ever opened)
  5712:     const stored = getStoredBrightness();
  5713:     applyBrightness(stored.value, stored.useDefault);
  5714: 
  5715:     // Expose for settings modal
  5716:     window.initBrightnessControl = function() {
  5717:       try {
  5718:         const slider    = document.getElementById('brightnessSlider');
  5719:         const valLabel  = document.getElementById('brightnessVal');
  5720:         const useDefChk = document.getElementById('brightnessUseDefault');
  5721:         if (!slider || !valLabel || !useDefChk) return;
  5722: 
  5723:         const cur = getStoredBrightness();
  5724: 
  5725:         // Init state
  5726:         slider.value    = cur.value;
  5727:         useDefChk.checked = cur.useDefault;
  5728:         slider.disabled = cur.useDefault;
  5729:         valLabel.textContent = cur.useDefault ? DEFAULT_VAL + '%' : cur.value + '%';
  5730:         updateSliderTrack(slider);
  5731: 
  5732:         // Guard: bind only once per element
  5733:         if (slider.__brightBound) return;
  5734:         slider.__brightBound = true;
  5735: 
  5736:         slider.addEventListener('input', () => {
  5737:           if (useDefChk.checked) return;
  5738:           const v = clamp(slider.value);
  5739:           valLabel.textContent = v + '%';
  5740:           updateSliderTrack(slider);
  5741:           applyBrightness(v, false);
  5742:           saveBrightness(v, false);
  5743:         });
  5744: 
  5745:         useDefChk.addEventListener('change', () => {
  5746:           const isDefault = useDefChk.checked;
  5747:           slider.disabled = isDefault;
  5748:           if (isDefault) {
  5749:             valLabel.textContent = DEFAULT_VAL + '%';
  5750:             applyBrightness(DEFAULT_VAL, true);
  5751:             saveBrightness(Number(slider.value), true);
  5752:           } else {
  5753:             const v = clamp(slider.value);
  5754:             valLabel.textContent = v + '%';
  5755:             applyBrightness(v, false);
  5756:             saveBrightness(v, false);
  5757:           }
  5758:           updateSliderTrack(slider);
  5759:         });
  5760:       } catch(_) {}
  5761:     };
  5762:   })();
  5763: 
  5764:   // ── NAV KEYBOARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  5765:   function bindNavKeyboard() {
  5766:     try {
  5767:       document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  5768:         if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'k') {
  5769:           e.preventDefault();
  5770:           const inp = document.getElementById('globalSearchInput');
  5771:           if (inp) { inp.focus(); inp.select(); }
  5772:         }
  5773:         // [ / ] keys to toggle sidebar quickly.
  5774:         if (!e.ctrlKey && !e.metaKey && !e.altKey && e.key === '[') {
  5775:           const active = document.activeElement;
  5776:           if (active && (active.tagName === 'INPUT' || active.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || active.isContentEditable)) return;
  5777:           const isCollapsed = document.body.classList.contains('sidebar-collapsed');
  5778:           applySidebarState(!isCollapsed);
  5779:         }
  5780:       });
  5781:     } catch (_) {}
  5782:   }

  5787:   function bindMobileBottomSheets() { /* mobile bottom sheet placeholder */ }

  5789:   // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  5790: 
  5791: async function boot(){
  5792:     if(window.__mumsBooted) return;
  5793:     window.__mumsBooted = true;
  5794:     const __bootPerf = (function(){
  5795:       const marks = {};
  5796:       function now(){ return (window.performance && performance.now) ? performance.now() : Date.now(); }
  5797:       return {
  5798:         start: function(key){ marks[key] = { s: now(), d: 0, done: false }; },
  5799:         end: function(key){
  5800:           const m = marks[key];
  5801:           if(!m || m.done) return;
  5802:           m.done = true;
  5803:           m.d = Math.max(0, now() - m.s);
  5804:         },
  5805:         flush: function(){
  5806:           try{
  5807:             const out = {};
  5808:             Object.keys(marks).forEach((k)=>{ out[k] = Math.round(Number(marks[k].d || 0)); });
  5809:             console.info('[MUMS BOOT PERF]', out);
  5810:           }catch(_){ }
  5811:         }
  5812:       };
  5813:     })();
  5814:     try{ UI.bindDataClose && UI.bindDataClose(); }catch(_){ }
  5815:     window.addEventListener('error', (e)=>{ showFatalError(e.error || e.message || e); });
  5816:     window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e)=>{ showFatalError(e.reason || e); });
  5817: 
  5818:     Store.ensureSeed();
  5819: 
  5820:     try{
  5821:       __bootPerf.start('theme_load_ms');
  5822:       await Promise.all([loadThemeMeta(), loadGlobalThemeSettings()]);
  5823:       __bootPerf.end('theme_load_ms');
  5824:     }catch(_){ __bootPerf.end('theme_load_ms'); }
  5825: 
  5826:     // ── FORCED DEFAULTS: Super Admin may push APEX+130% to ALL users ──────
  5827:     try{
  5828:       if(__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedTheme){
  5829:         const ft = String(__globalThemeSettings.defaultTheme || 'apex').trim();
  5830:         if(isValidThemeId(ft)){
  5831:           try{ if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_THEME',{id:ft}); else Store.setTheme(ft); }catch(_){}
  5832:           try{ localStorage.setItem('mums_theme_preference', ft); }catch(_){}
  5833:         }
  5834:       }
  5835:       if(__globalThemeSettings && __globalThemeSettings.forcedBrightness){
  5836:         const fb = typeof __globalThemeSettings.brightness === 'number' ? __globalThemeSettings.brightness : 130;
  5837:         try{
  5838:           localStorage.setItem('mums_brightness_v1', JSON.stringify({ value: fb, useDefault: false }));
  5839:           const appEl = document.getElementById('app') || document.body;
  5840:           appEl.style.filter = fb === 100 ? '' : `brightness(${fb/100})`;
  5841:           document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--mums-brightness', fb/100);
  5842:           appEl.setAttribute('data-brightness', String(fb));
  5843:         }catch(_){}
  5844:       }
  5845:     }catch(_){}
  5846: 
  5847:     const effectiveTheme = resolveEffectiveThemeForUser();
  5848:     try{
  5849:       if(Store && Store.dispatch) Store.dispatch('UPDATE_THEME', { id: effectiveTheme });
  5850:       else if(Store && Store.setTheme) Store.setTheme(effectiveTheme);
  5851:     }catch(_){ }
  5852:     applyTheme(effectiveTheme);
  5853:     try{ setupClassicTopbarClock(); }catch(_){ }
  5854:     try{
  5855:       const d = (localStorage.getItem('mums_density')||'normal');
  5856:       localStorage.setItem('mums_density', d);
  5857:       document.body.classList.toggle('density-compact', d==='compact');
  5858:     }catch(e){}
  5859: 
  5860:     try{
  5861:       const cursorMode = 'system';
  5862:       localStorage.setItem('mums_cursor_mode', cursorMode);
  5863:     }catch(e){}
  5864:     try{ applySidebarState(); }catch(e){}
  5865:     try{ bindSidebarToggle(); }catch(e){}
  5866:     try{ bindMobilePanelToggle(); }catch(e){}
  5867:     try{ bindMobileBottomSheets(); }catch(e){}
  5868:     try{ bindMobileFabStack(); }catch(e){}
  5869:     try{ applyRightbarState(); }catch(e){}
  5870:     try{ bindRightbarToggle(); }catch(e){}
  5871:     try{ applyDensity(); }catch(e){}
  5872:     try{ applyBarVisibility(); }catch(e){}
  5873:     // Start ResizeObserver on both fixed bars — measures ACTUAL rendered heights
  5874:     // and writes them to --mums-dock-h / --mums-onlinebar-h on <html> inline style.
  5875:     // This permanently fixes sidebars/main overflowing behind the fixed bars.
  5876:     try{ _initBarObservers(); }catch(e){}
  5877:     try{ bindNavKeyboard(); }catch(e){}
  5878: 
  5879:     try{
  5880:       const curSel = document.getElementById('cursorModeSelect');
  5881:       if(curSel){
  5882:         curSel.value = (localStorage.getItem('mums_cursor_mode')||'custom');
  5883:         curSel.onchange = ()=>{ try{ UI.setCursorMode(curSel.value); }catch(e){} };
  5884:       }
  5885:       const densSel = document.getElementById('densitySelect');
  5886:       if(densSel){
  5887:         densSel.value = (localStorage.getItem('mums_density')||'normal');
  5888:         densSel.onchange = ()=>{
  5889:           const v = (densSel.value==='compact') ? 'compact' : 'normal';
  5890:           localStorage.setItem('mums_density', v);
  5891:           document.body.classList.toggle('density-compact', v==='compact');
  5892:         };
  5893: 
  5894:       const toggleRP = document.getElementById('toggleRightPanelBtn');
  5895:       if(toggleRP){
  5896:         toggleRP.onclick = ()=>{
  5897:           try{
  5898:             const now = document.body.classList.contains('rightbar-collapsed');
  5899:             applyRightbarState(!now);
  5900:           }catch(_){}
  5901:         };
  5902:       }
  5903: 
  5904:       }
  5905: 
  5906:       const hoverT = document.getElementById('sidebarHoverExpandToggle');
  5907:       if(hoverT){
  5908:         const on = (localStorage.getItem('mums_sidebar_hover') ?? '1');
  5909:         hoverT.checked = on==='1';
  5910:         hoverT.onchange = ()=>{
  5911:           localStorage.setItem('mums_sidebar_hover', hoverT.checked ? '1' : '0');
  5912:           const isCollapsed = document.body.classList.contains('sidebar-collapsed');
  5913:           document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-hoverable', isCollapsed && hoverT.checked);
  5914:         };
  5915:       }
  5916: 
  5917:       const sbSel = document.getElementById('sidebarDefaultSelect');
  5918:       if(sbSel){
  5919:         sbSel.value = (localStorage.getItem('mums_sidebar_default')||'expanded');
  5920:         sbSel.onchange = ()=>{
  5921:           const v = (sbSel.value==='collapsed') ? 'collapsed' : 'expanded';
  5922:           localStorage.setItem('mums_sidebar_default', v);
  5923:           applySidebarState(v==='collapsed');
  5924:         };
  5925:       }
  5926:     }catch(e){}
  5927: 
  5928: 
  5929:     // FIX-ENV-WAIT: Wait for /api/env to resolve before Auth.requireUser().
  5930:     // On fast devices / defer execution, boot() runs within ~50ms of DOMContentLoaded,
  5931:     // but /api/env is an async fetch that can take 200-600ms on cold starts.
  5932:     // Without this wait, ensureFreshSession() calls apiFetch() with an empty SUPABASE_URL,
  5933:     // throws "Supabase env missing", hits the catch block in requireUser → hardFail()
  5934:     // → user is redirected back to /login.html → stuck-on-login loop on fresh devices.
  5935:     // Max wait: 4 seconds (matches login.html guard). After timeout, proceed anyway —
  5936:     // local-mode fallback handles offline scenarios.
  5937:     try {

  5982:     function normalizeRole(v){
  5983:       const raw = String(v||'').trim();
  5984:       if(!raw) return (Config?.ROLES?.MEMBER) || 'MEMBER';
  5985:       const up = raw.toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_');
  5986:       const map = {
  5987:         'TEAMLEAD':'TEAM_LEAD',
  5988:         'TEAM-LEAD':'TEAM_LEAD',
  5989:         'TEAM_LEAD':'TEAM_LEAD',
  5990:         'LEAD':'TEAM_LEAD',
  5991:         'TL':'TEAM_LEAD',
  5992:         'SUPERADMIN':'SUPER_ADMIN',
  5993:         'SUPER-ADMIN':'SUPER_ADMIN',
  5994:         'SUPER_ADMIN':'SUPER_ADMIN',
  5995:         'ADMIN':'ADMIN',
  5996:         'MEMBER':'MEMBER'
  5997:       };
  5998:       const norm = map[up] || up;
  5999:       return (Config && Config.PERMS && Config.PERMS[norm]) ? norm : ((Config?.ROLES?.MEMBER) || 'MEMBER');
  6000:     }
  6001: 
  6002:     const __bootPatch = {};
  6003:     let __bootPatchTimer = null;
  6004:     function deferBootUserPatch(patch){
  6005:       try{
  6006:         Object.assign(__bootPatch, patch || {});
  6007:         if(__bootPatchTimer) return;
  6008:         __bootPatchTimer = setTimeout(function(){
  6009:           __bootPatchTimer = null;
  6010:           try{
  6011:             const p = Object.assign({}, __bootPatch);

  6013:             if(window.Store && Store.updateUser) Store.updateUser(user.id, p);
  6014:           }catch(_){ }
  6015:         }, 0);
  6016:       }catch(_){ }
  6017:     }
  6018: 
  6019:     const fixedRole = normalizeRole(user.role);

  6029:

  6053:       const afterShift = (!meta.wraps) ? (nowMin>=meta.end) : (nowMin>=meta.end && nowMin<meta.start);

  6217:       function fmtManilaLocal(ms){
  6218:         try{
  6219:           const p = UI.manilaParts(new Date(ms));
  6220:           const pad = (n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
  6221:           return `${p.isoDate}T${pad(p.hh)}:${pad(p.mm)}`;
  6222:         }catch(_){ return ''; }
  6223:       }
  6224: 
  6225:       function parseManilaLocal(str){
  6226:         const s = String(str||'').trim();
  6227:         if(!s) return 0;
  6228:         const parts = s.split('T');
  6229:         if(parts.length < 2) return 0;
  6230:         const d = parts[0];
  6231:         const t = parts[1];
  6232:         const dp = d.split('-').map(n=>Number(n));
  6233:         const tp = t.split(':').map(n=>Number(n));
  6234:         if(dp.length < 3 || tp.length < 2) return 0;
  6235:         const y = dp[0], m = dp[1], da = dp[2];
  6236:         const hh = tp[0], mm = tp[1];
  6237:         if(!y || !m || (!da && da !== 0)) return 0;
  6238:         if([y,m,da,hh,mm].some(x=>Number.isNaN(x))) return 0;
  6239:         // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Reject obviously invalid years (before 2020 or after 2099).
  6240:         if(y < 2020 || y > 2099) return 0;
  6241:         const result = Date.UTC(y, m-1, da, hh-8, mm, 0, 0);
  6242:         // Guard: parsed result must be a valid post-2020 timestamp.
  6243:         if(!Number.isFinite(result) || result <= Date.UTC(2020,0,1)) return 0;
  6244:         return result;
  6245:       }
  6246: 
  6247:       function bindMailboxTimeModal(){
  6248:         if(!modal) return;
  6249:         // FIX[BUG#2]: Original guard 'if(modal.__bound) return' permanently blocks rebind
  6250:         // even after soft DOM refreshes where the modal element is reused but handlers
  6251:         // are lost. Guard now checks: skip ONLY if bound AND still connected to DOM.
  6252:         if(modal.__bound && modal.isConnected) return;
  6253:         // Reset bound flag — re-entering means a fresh bind is needed.
  6254:         modal.__bound = false;
  6255:         modal.__bound = true;
  6256: 
  6257:         const enabledEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeEnabled');
  6258:         const freezeEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeFreeze');
  6259:         const inputEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeInput');
  6260:         const scopeEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeScope');
  6261:         const sysEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeSys');
  6262:         const effEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeEffective');
  6263:         const errEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeErr');
  6264:         const clockEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeClock');
  6265:         const clockDateEl = document.getElementById('mbTimeClockDate');
  6266:         const saveBtn = document.getElementById('mbTimeSave');
  6267:         const resetBtn = document.getElementById('mbTimeReset');
  6268:         const setNowBtn = document.getElementById('mbTimeSetNow');
  6269: 
  6270:         const canEdit = !!isSA;
  6271:         const readOnly = !canEdit;
  6272:         try{
  6273:           if(readOnly){
  6274:             [enabledEl, freezeEl, inputEl, scopeEl].forEach(el=>{ try{ if(el) el.disabled = true; }catch(_){ } });
  6275:             try{ if(setNowBtn) setNowBtn.disabled = true; }catch(_){ }
  6276:             try{ modal.querySelectorAll('[data-mbshift]').forEach(b=>{ try{ b.disabled = true; }catch(_){ } }); }catch(_){ }
  6277:             try{ if(saveBtn) { saveBtn.disabled = true; saveBtn.style.display = 'none'; } }catch(_){ }
  6278:             try{ if(resetBtn){ resetBtn.disabled = true; resetBtn.style.display = 'none'; } }catch(_){ }
  6279:           }
  6280:         }catch(_){ }
  6281: 
  6282:         let draft = Store.getMailboxTimeOverride ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'sa_only' };
  6283:         draft = {
  6284:           enabled: !!draft.enabled,
  6285:           ms: Number(draft.ms)||0,
  6286:           freeze: (draft.freeze !== false),
  6287:           setAt: Number(draft.setAt)||0,
  6288:           scope: (String(draft.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only',
  6289:         };
  6290:         // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Bind-time guard — treat ms=0/epoch as unset
  6291:         if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= Date.UTC(2020,0,1)) draft.ms = Date.now();
  6292:         if(!draft.freeze && !draft.setAt) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6293: 
  6294:         // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Min valid ms = year 2020. Any ms before this is treated as unset.
  6295:         const MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS = Date.UTC(2020, 0, 1);
  6296:         function safeDraftMs(ms){
  6297:           const n = Number(ms)||0;
  6298:           return (n > MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) ? n : Date.now();
  6299:         }
  6300: 
  6301:         function effectiveMs(){
  6302:           if(!draft.enabled) return Date.now();
  6303:           if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) return Date.now();
  6304:           if(draft.freeze) return draft.ms;
  6305:           // FIX[BUG#3b]: Use draft.setAt as anchor for running clock.
  6306:           const anchor = (Number(draft.setAt) > 0) ? Number(draft.setAt) : Date.now();
  6307:           return draft.ms + Math.max(0, Date.now() - anchor);
  6308:         }
  6309: 
  6310:         function render(){
  6311:           try{ if(errEl) errEl.textContent=''; }catch(_){ }
  6312:           const sys = UI.manilaNow();
  6313:           if(sysEl){
  6314:             sysEl.textContent = `System Manila time: ${sys.iso.replace('T',' ')}`;
  6315:           }
  6316:           if(enabledEl) enabledEl.checked = !!draft.enabled;
  6317:           if(freezeEl) freezeEl.checked = !!draft.freeze;
  6318:           // INPUT OVERWRITE FIX: Only write back to inputEl if the user is NOT
  6319:           // actively editing it. Overwriting while user is picking a time resets
  6320:           // the picker back to the old value mid-selection.
  6321:           // __userEditing is set by onfocus/onblur on inputEl for reliable detection.
  6322:           if(inputEl && !inputEl.__userEditing && document.activeElement !== inputEl){
  6323:             inputEl.value = fmtManilaLocal(safeDraftMs(draft.ms));
  6324:           }
  6325:           if(scopeEl) scopeEl.value = (String(draft.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only';
  6326: 
  6327:           const on = !!draft.enabled;
  6328:           if(effEl){
  6329:             if(!on) {
  6330:               effEl.textContent = 'Override OFF — Mailbox uses system Manila time.';
  6331:             } else {
  6332:               const scopeLbl = (String(draft.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'GLOBAL' : 'Super Admin-only';
  6333:               const modeLbl = draft.freeze ? 'Frozen clock' : 'Running clock';
  6334:               if(readOnly && scopeLbl === 'GLOBAL') effEl.textContent = `${scopeLbl} override active — ${modeLbl} (read-only view).`;
  6335:               else effEl.textContent = `${scopeLbl} override active — ${modeLbl}.`;
  6336:             }
  6337:           }
  6338: 
  6339:           const ms = effectiveMs();
  6340:           const p = UI.manilaParts(new Date(ms));
  6341:           const pad = (n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
  6342:           if(clockEl) clockEl.textContent = `${pad(p.hh)}:${pad(p.mm)}:${pad(p.ss)}`;
  6343:           if(clockDateEl) clockDateEl.textContent = `${p.isoDate} (Asia/Manila)`;
  6344:         }
  6345: 
  6346:         function startClock(){
  6347:           try{ if(modal.__clockInt) clearInterval(modal.__clockInt); }catch(_){ }
  6348:           modal.__clockInt = setInterval(()=>{ try{ render(); }catch(e){ } }, 1000);
  6349:         }
  6350: 
  6351:         function stopClock(){
  6352:           try{ if(modal.__clockInt) clearInterval(modal.__clockInt); }catch(_){ }
  6353:           modal.__clockInt = null;
  6354:         }
  6355: 
  6356:         function open(){
  6357:           // FIX[BUG#3c]: Always stop any existing clock before opening to prevent double-interval leak.
  6358:           stopClock();
  6359:           try{ if(window.Store && Store.startMailboxOverrideSync) Store.startMailboxOverrideSync({ force:true }); }catch(_){ }
  6360:           let o = Store.getMailboxTimeOverride ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'sa_only' };
  6361:           draft = {
  6362:             enabled: !!o.enabled,
  6363:             ms: Number(o.ms)||0,
  6364:             freeze: (o.freeze !== false),
  6365:             setAt: Number(o.setAt)||0,
  6366:             scope: (String(o.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only',
  6367:           };
  6368:           // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Guarantee draft.ms is always a valid (post-2020) timestamp.
  6369:           // Store may return ms:0 (epoch) when no override has been set or after a reset.
  6370:           if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) draft.ms = Date.now();
  6371:           if(!draft.freeze && !draft.setAt) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6372:           render();
  6373:           startClock();
  6374:         }
  6375: 
  6376:         modal.__open = open;
  6377: 
  6378:         if(enabledEl){
  6379:           enabledEl.onchange = ()=>{
  6380:             draft.enabled = !!enabledEl.checked;
  6381:             if(draft.enabled && !draft.ms) draft.ms = Date.now();
  6382:             if(draft.enabled && !draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6383:             render();
  6384:           };
  6385:         }
  6386:         if(freezeEl){
  6387:           freezeEl.onchange = ()=>{
  6388:             draft.freeze = !!freezeEl.checked;
  6389:             if(!draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6390:             else draft.setAt = 0;
  6391:             render();
  6392:           };
  6393:         }
  6394:         if(inputEl){
  6395:           // INPUT EVENT FIX: datetime-local fires 'input' on every scroll/keypress
  6396:           // but 'change' only on blur. We need both so draft.ms updates immediately
  6397:           // when user scrolls the hour/minute column in the picker.
  6398:           const _onInputChange = ()=>{
  6399:             const ms = parseManilaLocal(inputEl.value);
  6400:             // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Only accept parsed ms if it's a real post-2020 timestamp.
  6401:             // parseManilaLocal returns 0 for empty/invalid input — must not write 0 into draft.
  6402:             if(ms && ms > MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS){
  6403:               draft.ms = ms;
  6404:               if(draft.enabled && !draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6405:             }
  6406:             // Don't call render() from inside input event — it will overwrite the picker
  6407:           };
  6408:           inputEl.onchange = ()=>{
  6409:             _onInputChange();
  6410:             render(); // safe on change (picker has committed)
  6411:           };
  6412:           inputEl.oninput = _onInputChange; // update draft silently, no render()
  6413:           // FOCUS PROTECTION: While the picker is open, completely block render()
  6414:           // from overwriting inputEl.value — the 1-second clock ticker calls render()
  6415:           // every second which fights with the user's active picker selection.
  6416:           inputEl.onfocus = ()=>{ inputEl.__userEditing = true; };
  6417:           inputEl.onblur  = ()=>{
  6418:             inputEl.__userEditing = false;
  6419:             // Commit whatever value is in the picker on blur
  6420:             const ms = parseManilaLocal(inputEl.value);
  6421:             if(ms && ms > MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS){
  6422:               draft.ms = ms;
  6423:               if(draft.enabled && !draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6424:             }
  6425:             render();
  6426:           };
  6427:         }
  6428: 
  6429:         if(scopeEl){
  6430:           scopeEl.onchange = ()=>{
  6431:             const v = String(scopeEl.value||'sa_only');
  6432:             draft.scope = (v === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only';
  6433:             render();
  6434:           };
  6435:         }
  6436: 
  6437:         if(setNowBtn){
  6438:           setNowBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  6439:             draft.ms = Date.now();
  6440:             if(draft.enabled && !draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6441:             render();
  6442:           };
  6443:         }
  6444: 
  6445:         modal.querySelectorAll('[data-mbshift]').forEach(btn=>{
  6446:           btn.onclick = ()=>{
  6447:             const delta = Number(btn.getAttribute('data-mbshift')||0);
  6448:             // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: If draft.ms is epoch/invalid, start from now before shifting.
  6449:             draft.ms = (Number(draft.ms) > MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) ? Number(draft.ms) : Date.now();
  6450:             draft.ms += delta;
  6451:             if(draft.enabled && !draft.freeze) draft.setAt = Date.now();
  6452:             render();
  6453:           };
  6454:         });
  6455: 
  6456:         if(saveBtn){
  6457:           saveBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  6458:             try{ if(errEl) errEl.textContent=''; }catch(_){ }
  6459:             if(!draft.enabled){
  6460:               // FIX[GHOST-OVERRIDE-PERMANENT]: Always propagate to BOTH global AND superadmin
  6461:               // scopes on the server, regardless of what draft.scope shows.
  6462:               // The DB may have scope='global' while draft loaded with stale 'sa_only'.
  6463:               // Clearing both scopes is safe (idempotent) and ensures the DB is always clean.
  6464:               if(Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride){
  6465:                 Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride({ propagateGlobal:true, forceScope:'global' });
  6466:               } else {
  6467:                 Store.saveMailboxTimeOverride({ enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'sa_only' });
  6468:               }
  6469:               try{
  6470:                 if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Mailbox time override removed. System Manila time is now active.', 'success');
  6471:               }catch(_){ }
  6472:               try{ draft = Store.getMailboxTimeOverride ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : draft; }catch(_){ }
  6473:               // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: After disabling, Store returns ms:0. Reset to now for clean input display.
  6474:               if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) draft.ms = Date.now();
  6475:               render();
  6476:               return;
  6477:             }
  6478:             // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Reject epoch/zero ms even if draft guard somehow missed it.
  6479:             // SAVE INPUT FIX: Also try reading inputEl.value directly — if the picker scrolled
  6480:             // but 'change'/'input' didn't fire (browser-specific), draft.ms may be stale.
  6481:             // Reading the input value at Save time is the last-resort authoritative source.
  6482:             if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS){
  6483:               try{
  6484:                 if(inputEl && inputEl.value){
  6485:                   const fromInput = parseManilaLocal(inputEl.value);
  6486:                   if(fromInput && fromInput > MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) draft.ms = fromInput;
  6487:                 }
  6488:               }catch(_){}
  6489:             }
  6490:             if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS){
  6491:               if(errEl) errEl.textContent = 'Please select a valid Manila date & time.';
  6492:               return;
  6493:             }
  6494:             const payload = { enabled:true, ms: Number(draft.ms)||0, freeze: !!draft.freeze, scope: (draft.scope==='global'?'global':'sa_only') };
  6495:             if(!draft.freeze) payload.setAt = Number(draft.setAt)||Date.now();
  6496:             const saved = Store.saveMailboxTimeOverride(payload);
  6497:             try{ draft = Object.assign({}, draft, saved||{}); }catch(_){ }
  6498:             try{
  6499:               const scopeLbl = (String(draft.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'Global' : 'Super Admin';
  6500:               if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast(`Mailbox time override applied (${scopeLbl} scope).`, 'success');
  6501:             }catch(_){ }
  6502:             // OVERRIDE REALTIME FIX: Force-dispatch so mailbox page re-renders immediately
  6503:             // without requiring a page refresh — covers same-tab save for both global & sa_only.
  6504:             try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail:{ key:'mailbox_override_cloud', source:'local', reason:'save' } })); }catch(_){}
  6505:             try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail:{ key:'mailbox_time_override', source:'local', reason:'save' } })); }catch(_){}
  6506:             render();
  6507:           };
  6508:         }
  6509: 
  6510:         if(resetBtn){
  6511:           resetBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  6512:             // FIX[GHOST-OVERRIDE-PERMANENT]: Always clear BOTH global and superadmin scopes.
  6513:             if(Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride){
  6514:               Store.disableMailboxTimeOverride({ propagateGlobal:true, forceScope:'global' });
  6515:             } else {
  6516:               Store.saveMailboxTimeOverride({ enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'sa_only' });
  6517:             }
  6518:             draft = Store.getMailboxTimeOverride ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : {};
  6519:             try{ if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Mailbox time override removed. System Manila time is now active.', 'success'); }catch(_){ }
  6520:             // FIX[EPOCH-BUG]: Ensure draft.ms is never epoch after reset.
  6521:             if(!draft.ms || draft.ms <= MIN_VALID_OVERRIDE_MS) draft.ms = Date.now();
  6522:             // OVERRIDE REALTIME FIX: Force-dispatch so mailbox page removes banner immediately.
  6523:             try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail:{ key:'mailbox_override_cloud', source:'local', reason:'reset' } })); }catch(_){}
  6524:             try{ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:store', { detail:{ key:'mailbox_time_override', source:'local', reason:'reset' } })); }catch(_){}
  6525:             render();
  6526:           };
  6527:         }
  6528: 
  6529:         UI.els('[data-close="mailboxTimeModal"]').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{ stopClock(); UI.closeModal('mailboxTimeModal'); });
  6530: 
  6531:         // FIX[BUG#3]: Patch UI.closeModal to always call stopClock when mailboxTimeModal closes.
  6532:         // Previously only data-close buttons stopped the clock — programmatic closes leaked the interval.
  6533:         // We store stopClock on the modal element so any close path can access it.
  6534:         modal.__stopClock = stopClock;
  6535:         if(!window.__mumsMailboxTimeClosePatched){
  6536:           window.__mumsMailboxTimeClosePatched = true;
  6537:           const _origClose = UI.closeModal.bind(UI);
  6538:           UI.closeModal = function(id){
  6539:             if(id === 'mailboxTimeModal'){
  6540:               try{
  6541:                 const m = document.getElementById('mailboxTimeModal');
  6542:                 if(m && typeof m.__stopClock === 'function') m.__stopClock();
  6543:               }catch(_){}
  6544:             }
  6545:             return _origClose(id);
  6546:           };
  6547:         }
  6548:       }
  6549: 
  6550:       try{
  6551:         if(!window.__mumsMailboxOverrideRealtimeToastBound){
  6552:           window.__mumsMailboxOverrideRealtimeToastBound = true;
  6553:           window.addEventListener('mums:realtime_alert', (ev)=>{
  6554:             try{
  6555:               const row = ev && ev.detail ? ev.detail : null;
  6556:               if(!row) return;
  6557:               const action = String(row.action||'').toLowerCase();
  6558:               const scope = String(row.scope||'').toLowerCase();
  6559:               if(!['set','reset','freeze'].includes(action)) return;
  6560:               if(!['global','superadmin'].includes(scope)) return;
  6561:               const actor = String(row.actor_name || row.updated_by_name || 'System');
  6562:               const scopeLbl = (scope === 'global') ? 'Global' : 'Super Admin';
  6563:               let msg = `${scopeLbl} mailbox time override was updated by ${actor}.`;
  6564:               if(action === 'reset') msg = `${scopeLbl} mailbox time override was removed by ${actor}.`;
  6565:               else if(action === 'freeze') msg = `${scopeLbl} mailbox time override mode changed by ${actor}.`;
  6566:               if(window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast(msg, 'info');
  6567:             }catch(_){ }
  6568:           });
  6569:         }
  6570:       }catch(_){ }
  6571: 
  6572:       if(openMailboxTimeBtn){
  6573:         bindMailboxTimeModal();
  6574:         openMailboxTimeBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  6575:           const active = isGlobalOverrideActive();
  6576:           if(!isSA && !active){
  6577:             try{ UI.toast && UI.toast('Global mailbox override is not active.', 'warn'); }catch(_){ }
  6578:             return;
  6579:           }
  6580:           try{ if(modal && typeof modal.__open === 'function') modal.__open(); }catch(_){ }
  6581:         };
  6582:       }
  6583: 
  6584:     }catch(e){ console.error('Mailbox time override init error', e); }

  6586:     const openClocksBtn = document.getElementById('openClocksBtn');
  6587:     if(openClocksBtn){
  6588:       openClocksBtn.onclick = ()=>{};

  6593:       openGmtOverviewPageBtn.onclick = ()=>{ window.location.hash = '#gmt_overview'; };

  6596:     // Helper: show admin section header + row when any admin card is visible
  6597:     function _revealAdminSection(){

  6600:         const row = document.getElementById('stngsAdminRow');
  6601:         if(lbl) lbl.style.display = '';
  6602:         if(row) row.style.display = '';
  6603:       }catch(_){}
  6604:     }

  6607:       const sysCard = document.getElementById('systemCheckCard');
  6608:       const openSysBtn = document.getElementById('openSystemCheckBtn');
  6609:       if(sysCard && (isSA || isSU)){ sysCard.style.display = ''; _revealAdminSection(); }
  6610:       if(openSysBtn && (isSA || isSU)){
  6611:         bindSystemCheckModal(user);
  6612:         openSysBtn.onclick = ()=>{ try{ if(window.__mumsSystemCheck && typeof window.__mumsSystemCheck.reset === 'function') window.__mumsSystemCheck.reset(); }catch(_){ } };
  6613:       }
  6614:     }catch(_){ }
  6615: 
  6616:     // ── Global Quickbase Settings (Super Admin only) ──────────────────────────
  6617:     try {
  6618:       if (isSA) {
  6619:         const gqbCard = document.getElementById('globalQbSettingsCard');
  6620:         const openGqbBtn = document.getElementById('openGlobalQbSettingsBtn');
  6621:         if (gqbCard) { gqbCard.style.display = ''; _revealAdminSection(); }
  6622: 
  6623:         function parseQbLink(url) {
  6624:           const out = { realm: '', tableId: '', qid: '' };
  6625:           try {
  6626:             const u = new URL(url);
  6627:             const host = u.hostname;
  6628:             const m = host.match(/^([a-z0-9-]+)\.quickbase\.com$/i);
  6629:             if (m) out.realm = m[1] + '.quickbase.com';
  6630:             // Handle /db/<tableId> format
  6631:             const dbm = u.pathname.match(/\/db\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/);
  6632:             if (dbm) out.tableId = dbm[1];
  6633:             // Handle /nav/app/<appId>/table/<tableId>/... format
  6634:             const navM = u.pathname.match(/\/table\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/);
  6635:             if (!out.tableId && navM) out.tableId = navM[1];
  6636:             else if (navM) out.tableId = navM[1]; // /table/ is more specific
  6637:             // QID from ?qid= or ?a=q&qid= params
  6638:             out.qid = u.searchParams.get('qid') || u.searchParams.get('QID') || '';
  6639:           } catch (_) {}
  6640:           return out;
  6641:         }
  6642: 
  6643:         let gqbState = { reportLink:'', realm:'', tableId:'', qid:'', qbToken:'', customColumns:[], filterConfig:[], filterMatch:'ALL' };
  6644:         let gqbAvailableFields = [];
  6645:         let gqbActiveTab = 'report-config';
  6646: 
  6647:         function gqbShowTab(tab) {
  6648:           gqbActiveTab = tab;
  6649:           ['report-config','custom-columns','filter-config'].forEach(t => {
  6650:             const sec = document.getElementById('gqbSection-' + t);
  6651:             if (sec) sec.style.display = (t === tab) ? '' : 'none';
  6652:             const btn = document.querySelector('[data-gqb-tab="' + t + '"]');
  6653:             if (btn) {
  6654:               btn.style.borderBottom = (t === tab) ? '2px solid var(--primary)' : '2px solid transparent';
  6655:               btn.style.color = (t === tab) ? 'var(--primary)' : '';
  6656:               btn.classList.toggle('active', t === tab);
  6657:             }
  6658:           });
  6659:           if (tab === 'custom-columns') renderGqbColumns();
  6660:           if (tab === 'filter-config') renderGqbFilters();
  6661:         }
  6662: 
  6663:         // ── Column Grid (matches existing QB settings style) ──────────────────
  6664:         function esc(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
  6665: 
  6666:         function renderGqbSelectedPanel() {
  6667:           const panel = document.getElementById('gqbSelectedFloatingPanel');
  6668:           const list = document.getElementById('gqbSelectedFloatingList');
  6669:           if (!panel || !list) return;
  6670:           if (!gqbState.customColumns.length) { panel.style.display = 'none'; list.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  6671:           const byId = new Map(gqbAvailableFields.map(f => [String(f.id), String(f.label || 'Field #' + f.id)]));
  6672:           list.innerHTML = gqbState.customColumns.map((id, idx) =>
  6673:             `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="min-width:18px;color:#38bdf8;font-weight:700;">${idx+1}.</span><span>${esc(byId.get(String(id)) || 'Field #'+id)}</span></div>`
  6674:           ).join('');
  6675:           panel.style.display = 'block';
  6676:         }
  6677: 
  6678:         function initGqbSelectedPanelDrag() {
  6679:           const panel = document.getElementById('gqbSelectedFloatingPanel');
  6680:           const handle = document.getElementById('gqbSelectedFloatingHandle');
  6681:           if (!panel || !handle || panel.dataset.dragBound === '1') return;
  6682:           panel.dataset.dragBound = '1';
  6683: 
  6684:           let dragging = false;
  6685:           let offsetX = 0;
  6686:           let offsetY = 0;
  6687: 
  6688:           const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.max(min, Math.min(value, max));
  6689:           const getBounds = () => {
  6690:             const parent = panel.parentElement;
  6691:             if (!parent) return null;
  6692:             const parentRect = parent.getBoundingClientRect();
  6693:             const panelRect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
  6694:             return {
  6695:               minX: 0,
  6696:               minY: 0,
  6697:               maxX: Math.max(0, parentRect.width - panelRect.width),
  6698:               maxY: Math.max(0, parentRect.height - panelRect.height),
  6699:             };
  6700:           };
  6701: 
  6702:           handle.addEventListener('pointerdown', (event) => {
  6703:             if (event.button !== 0) return;
  6704:             const panelRect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
  6705:             const parentRect = panel.parentElement ? panel.parentElement.getBoundingClientRect() : panelRect;
  6706:             dragging = true;
  6707:             offsetX = event.clientX - panelRect.left;
  6708:             offsetY = event.clientY - panelRect.top;
  6709:             panel.style.left = `${Math.max(0, panelRect.left - parentRect.left)}px`;
  6710:             panel.style.top = `${Math.max(0, panelRect.top - parentRect.top)}px`;
  6711:             panel.style.right = 'auto';
  6712:             panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
  6713:             if (typeof handle.setPointerCapture === 'function') {
  6714:               handle.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
  6715:             }
  6716:             event.preventDefault();
  6717:           });
  6718: 
  6719:           handle.addEventListener('pointermove', (event) => {
  6720:             if (!dragging) return;
  6721:             const parentRect = panel.parentElement ? panel.parentElement.getBoundingClientRect() : null;
  6722:             if (!parentRect) return;
  6723:             const bounds = getBounds();
  6724:             if (!bounds) return;
  6725:             const nextX = clamp(event.clientX - parentRect.left - offsetX, bounds.minX, bounds.maxX);
  6726:             const nextY = clamp(event.clientY - parentRect.top - offsetY, bounds.minY, bounds.maxY);
  6727:             panel.style.left = `${nextX}px`;
  6728:             panel.style.top = `${nextY}px`;
  6729:             panel.style.right = 'auto';
  6730:             panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
  6731:           });
  6732: 
  6733:           const stopDrag = (event) => {
  6734:             if (!dragging) return;
  6735:             dragging = false;
  6736:             if (event && typeof handle.releasePointerCapture === 'function') {
  6737:               try { handle.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId); } catch (_) {}
  6738:             }
  6739:           };
  6740: 
  6741:           handle.addEventListener('pointerup', stopDrag);
  6742:           handle.addEventListener('pointercancel', stopDrag);
  6743:         }
  6744: 
  6745:         function applyGqbColumnSearch() {
  6746:           const input = document.getElementById('gqbColumnSearch');
  6747:           const query = String(input && input.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  6748:           document.querySelectorAll('#gqbColumnGrid .qb-col-card').forEach(card => {
  6749:             const hay = String(card.getAttribute('data-col-label') || '').toLowerCase();
  6750:             card.style.display = !query || hay.includes(query) ? 'flex' : 'none';
  6751:           });
  6752:         }
  6753: 
  6754:         function renderGqbColumns() {
  6755:           const grid = document.getElementById('gqbColumnGrid');
  6756:           if (!grid) return;
  6757:           if (!gqbAvailableFields.length) {
  6758:             grid.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted" style="padding:16px;text-align:center">Load Report Config first to populate columns.</div>';
  6759:             renderGqbSelectedPanel(); return;
  6760:           }
  6761:           const selectedById = new Map();
  6762:           gqbState.customColumns.forEach((id, idx) => selectedById.set(String(id), idx + 1));
  6763:           grid.innerHTML = gqbAvailableFields.map(f => {
  6764:             const id = String(f.id); const order = selectedById.get(id);
  6765:             const label = String(f.label || 'Field #' + id);
  6766:             return `<button type="button" data-col-id="${esc(id)}" data-col-label="${esc(label+' #'+id)}" class="qb-col-card" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid ${order?'rgba(56,189,248,.72)':'rgba(148,163,184,.25)'};background:${order?'rgba(14,116,144,.45)':'rgba(15,23,42,.45)'};color:inherit;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;min-height:40px;">
  6767:               <span class="small" style="font-weight:${order?'700':'500'};">${esc(label)} <span class="muted">(#${esc(id)})</span></span>
  6768:               ${order ? `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:22px;height:22px;padding:0 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.22);border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.55);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">${order}</span>` : ''}
  6769:             </button>`;
  6770:           }).join('');
  6771:           applyGqbColumnSearch();
  6772:           renderGqbSelectedPanel();
  6773:           grid.querySelectorAll('.qb-col-card').forEach(el => {
  6774:             el.addEventListener('click', () => {
  6775:               const id = String(el.getAttribute('data-col-id') || '').trim();
  6776:               if (!id) return;
  6777:               const numId = Number(id);
  6778:               const idx = gqbState.customColumns.indexOf(numId);
  6779:               if (idx === -1) gqbState.customColumns.push(numId);
  6780:               else gqbState.customColumns.splice(idx, 1);
  6781:               renderGqbColumns();
  6782:             });
  6783:           });
  6784:         }
  6785: 
  6786:         const gqbColSearch = document.getElementById('gqbColumnSearch');
  6787:         if (gqbColSearch) gqbColSearch.oninput = applyGqbColumnSearch;
  6788:         initGqbSelectedPanelDrag();
  6789: 
  6790:         // ── Filter Rows (matches existing QB settings style) ───────────────────
  6791:         function gqbFilterRowTemplate(f, idx) {
  6792:           const knownFields = gqbAvailableFields.slice();
  6793:           const selFid = String(f.fieldId || '').trim();
  6794:           if (selFid && !knownFields.some(x => String(x.id) === selFid)) {
  6795:             knownFields.unshift({ id: selFid, label: 'Field #' + selFid });
  6796:           }
  6797:           const fieldOpts = knownFields.map(x =>
  6798:             `<option value="${esc(String(x.id))}" ${String(f.fieldId) === String(x.id) ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(x.label)} (#${esc(String(x.id))})</option>`
  6799:           ).join('');
  6800:           const v = String(f.value || '').trim();
  6801:           return `<div class="row" data-gqb-filter-idx="${idx}" style="gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:6px;">
  6802:             <select class="input" data-gf="fieldId" style="max-width:300px;"><option value="">Select field</option>${fieldOpts}</select>
  6803:             <select class="input" data-gf="operator" style="max-width:140px;">
  6804:               <option value="EX"  ${f.operator==='EX'  ?'selected':''}>Is (Exact)</option>
  6805:               <option value="XEX" ${f.operator==='XEX' ?'selected':''}>Is Not</option>
  6806:               <option value="CT"  ${f.operator==='CT'  ?'selected':''}>Contains</option>
  6807:               <option value="XCT" ${f.operator==='XCT' ?'selected':''}>Does Not Contain</option>
  6808:               <option value="SW"  ${f.operator==='SW'  ?'selected':''}>Starts With</option>
  6809:               <option value="XSW" ${f.operator==='XSW' ?'selected':''}>Does Not Start With</option>
  6810:               <option value="BF"  ${f.operator==='BF'  ?'selected':''}>Before</option>
  6811:               <option value="AF"  ${f.operator==='AF'  ?'selected':''}>After</option>
  6812:             </select>
  6813:             <input type="text" class="input" data-gf="value" value="${esc(v)}" placeholder="Filter value" style="min-width:200px;" />
  6814:             <button class="btn" data-gqb-remove-filter="${idx}" type="button">Remove</button>
  6815:           </div>`;
  6816:         }
  6817: 
  6818:         function renderGqbFilters() {
  6819:           const container = document.getElementById('gqbFilterRows');
  6820:           if (!container) return;
  6821:           const filters = Array.isArray(gqbState.filterConfig) ? gqbState.filterConfig : [];
  6822:           container.innerHTML = filters.length
  6823:             ? filters.map((f, i) => gqbFilterRowTemplate(f, i)).join('')
  6824:             : '<div class="small muted">No global filters configured. Click + Add Filter.</div>';
  6825: 
  6826:           container.querySelectorAll('[data-gqb-filter-idx]').forEach(row => {
  6827:             const idx = Number(row.getAttribute('data-gqb-filter-idx'));
  6828:             row.querySelectorAll('[data-gf]').forEach(input => {
  6829:               const key = input.getAttribute('data-gf');
  6830:               input.addEventListener(input.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input', () => {
  6831:                 if (!gqbState.filterConfig[idx]) return;
  6832:                 gqbState.filterConfig[idx][key] = String(input.value || '').trim();
  6833:               });
  6834:             });
  6835:           });
  6836:           container.querySelectorAll('[data-gqb-remove-filter]').forEach(btn => {
  6837:             btn.onclick = () => {
  6838:               gqbState.filterConfig.splice(Number(btn.getAttribute('data-gqb-remove-filter')), 1);
  6839:               renderGqbFilters();
  6840:             };
  6841:           });
  6842:           const fm = document.getElementById('gqbFilterMatch');
  6843:           if (fm) fm.value = gqbState.filterMatch || 'ALL';
  6844:         }
  6845: 
  6846:         async function loadGqbSettings() {
  6847:           try {
  6848:             const tok = getBearerToken();
  6849:             const r = await fetch('/api/settings/global_quickbase', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
  6850:             const d = await r.json();
  6851:             if (d.ok && d.settings) {
  6852:               gqbState = { ...gqbState, ...d.settings, customColumns: Array.isArray(d.settings.customColumns) ? d.settings.customColumns : [], filterConfig: Array.isArray(d.settings.filterConfig) ? d.settings.filterConfig : [] };
  6853:               const rl = document.getElementById('gqbReportLink'); if (rl) rl.value = gqbState.reportLink;
  6854:               const rv = document.getElementById('gqbRealm'); if (rv) rv.value = gqbState.realm;
  6855:               const tv = document.getElementById('gqbTableId'); if (tv) tv.value = gqbState.tableId;
  6856:               const qv = document.getElementById('gqbQid'); if (qv) qv.value = gqbState.qid;
  6857:               const tok2 = document.getElementById('gqbToken'); if (tok2) tok2.value = gqbState.qbToken || '';
  6858:               const fm = document.getElementById('gqbFilterMatch'); if (fm) fm.value = gqbState.filterMatch || 'ALL';
  6859:             }
  6860:           } catch (_) {}
  6861:         }
  6862: 
  6863:         async function fetchGqbFields() {
  6864:           if (!gqbState.realm || !gqbState.tableId || !gqbState.qbToken) return;
  6865:           try {
  6866:             const tok = getBearerToken();
  6867:             const params = new URLSearchParams({ realm: gqbState.realm, tableId: gqbState.tableId, qid: gqbState.qid || '1' });
  6868:             const r = await fetch('/api/quickbase/monitoring?' + params.toString(), { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok } });
  6869:             const d = await r.json();
  6870:             if (d.allAvailableFields && Array.isArray(d.allAvailableFields)) {
  6871:               gqbAvailableFields = d.allAvailableFields;
  6872:               renderGqbColumns(); // always update since fields just loaded
  6873:             }
  6874:           } catch (_) {}
  6875:         }
  6876: 
  6877:         const rlInput = document.getElementById('gqbReportLink');
  6878:         if (rlInput) {
  6879:           rlInput.oninput = () => {
  6880:             const parsed = parseQbLink(rlInput.value.trim());
  6881:             gqbState.reportLink = rlInput.value.trim();
  6882:             gqbState.realm = parsed.realm; gqbState.tableId = parsed.tableId; gqbState.qid = parsed.qid;
  6883:             const rv = document.getElementById('gqbRealm'); if (rv) rv.value = parsed.realm;
  6884:             const tv = document.getElementById('gqbTableId'); if (tv) tv.value = parsed.tableId;
  6885:             const qv = document.getElementById('gqbQid'); if (qv) qv.value = parsed.qid;
  6886:           };
  6887:         }
  6888:         const tokInput = document.getElementById('gqbToken');
  6889:         if (tokInput) tokInput.oninput = () => { gqbState.qbToken = tokInput.value.trim(); };
  6890: 
  6891:         document.querySelectorAll('[data-gqb-tab]').forEach(btn => {
  6892:           btn.onclick = () => {
  6893:             const targetTab = btn.dataset.gqbTab;
  6894:             // Auto-fetch fields when switching to Custom Columns or Filter Config
  6895:             if (targetTab === 'custom-columns' || targetTab === 'filter-config') {
  6896:               if (!gqbAvailableFields.length) fetchGqbFields();
  6897:             }
  6898:             gqbShowTab(targetTab);
  6899:           };
  6900:         });
  6901: 
  6902:         const addFilterBtn = document.getElementById('gqbAddFilterBtn');
  6903:         if (addFilterBtn) addFilterBtn.onclick = () => {
  6904:           if (!Array.isArray(gqbState.filterConfig)) gqbState.filterConfig = [];
  6905:           gqbState.filterConfig.push({ fieldId: '', operator: 'EX', value: '' });
  6906:           renderGqbFilters();
  6907:           // Scroll to bottom of filter rows
  6908:           const fr = document.getElementById('gqbFilterRows');
  6909:           if (fr) fr.scrollTop = fr.scrollHeight;
  6910:         };
  6911: 
  6912:         const gqbFmSel = document.getElementById('gqbFilterMatch');
  6913:         if (gqbFmSel) gqbFmSel.onchange = () => { gqbState.filterMatch = gqbFmSel.value || 'ALL'; };
  6914: 
  6915:         const saveBtn = document.getElementById('gqbSaveBtn');
  6916:         if (saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = async () => {
  6917:           const msg = document.getElementById('gqbSaveMsg');
  6918:           try {
  6919:             const tok = getBearerToken();
  6920:             const r = await fetch('/api/settings/global_quickbase', {
  6921:               method: 'POST',
  6922:               headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  6923:               body: JSON.stringify(gqbState)
  6924:             });
  6925:             const d = await r.json();
  6926:             if (msg) { msg.textContent = d.ok ? '✅ Saved!' : '❌ ' + (d.message || 'Error'); msg.style.opacity = '1'; setTimeout(()=>{ msg.style.opacity='0'; }, 3000); }
  6927:           } catch (e) {
  6928:             if (msg) { msg.textContent = '❌ Network error'; msg.style.opacity = '1'; setTimeout(()=>{ msg.style.opacity='0'; }, 3000); }
  6929:           }
  6930:         };
  6931: 
  6932:         document.querySelectorAll('[data-close="globalQbModal"]').forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { UI.closeModal('globalQbModal'); });
  6933: 
  6934:         window.__mumsLoadGqbSettings = loadGqbSettings;
  6935:         if (openGqbBtn) openGqbBtn.onclick = async () => {
  6936:           await loadGqbSettings();
  6937:           gqbShowTab('report-config');
  6938:           // Auto-fetch fields in background so columns are ready when user switches tab
  6939:           if (gqbState.realm && gqbState.tableId) setTimeout(() => fetchGqbFields(), 300);
  6940:         };
  6941:       }
  6942:     } catch (_) {}

  6944:     // ── Manila Calendar Settings (Super Admin only) ──────────────────────────
  6945:     try {
  6946:       if (isSA) {
  6947:         const calCard = document.getElementById('calendarSettingsCard');
