  6950: 
  6951:         function parseCalLink(url) {
  6952:           const out = { realm: '', tableId: '', qid: '' };
  6953:           try {
  6954:             const u = new URL(url);
  6955:             const host = u.hostname;
  6956:             const m = host.match(/^([a-z0-9-]+)\.quickbase\.com$/i);
  6957:             if (m) out.realm = m[1] + '.quickbase.com';
  6958:             const navM = u.pathname.match(/\/table\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/);
  6959:             if (navM) out.tableId = navM[1];
  6960:             out.qid = u.searchParams.get('qid') || u.searchParams.get('QID') || '';
  6961:           } catch (_) {}
  6962:           return out;
  6963:         }
  6964: 
  6965:         async function loadCalSettings() {
  6966:           try {
  6967:             const tok = getBearerToken();
  6968:             const r = await fetch('/api/settings/global_calendar', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok } });
  6969:             const d = await r.json();
  6970:             if (d.ok && d.settings) {
  6971:               const s = d.settings;
  6972:               const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  6973:               if (el('calRL')) el('calRL').value = s.reportLink || '';
  6974:               if (el('calRealm')) el('calRealm').value = s.realm || '';
  6975:               if (el('calTableId')) el('calTableId').value = s.tableId || '';
  6976:               if (el('calQid')) el('calQid').value = s.qid || '';
  6977:               if (el('calToken')) el('calToken').value = s.qbToken ? '••••••••••••••' : '';
  6978:               if (el('calFEmployee')) el('calFEmployee').value = s.fieldEmployee || '';
  6979:               if (el('calFNote')) el('calFNote').value = s.fieldNote || '';
  6980:               if (el('calFStart')) el('calFStart').value = s.fieldStartDate || '';
  6981:               if (el('calFEnd')) el('calFEnd').value = s.fieldEndDate || '';
  6982:             }
  6983:           } catch (_) {}
  6984:         }
  6985: 
  6986:         const calRLInput = document.getElementById('calRL');
  6987:         if (calRLInput) {
  6988:           calRLInput.oninput = () => {
  6989:             const p = parseCalLink(calRLInput.value.trim());
  6990:             const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  6991:             if (el('calRealm')) el('calRealm').value = p.realm;
  6992:             if (el('calTableId')) el('calTableId').value = p.tableId;
  6993:             if (el('calQid')) el('calQid').value = p.qid;
  6994:           };
  6995:         }
  6996: 
  6997:         const calSaveBtn = document.getElementById('calSaveBtn');
  6998:         if (calSaveBtn) {
  6999:           calSaveBtn.onclick = async () => {
  7000:             const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  7001:             const msg = el('calSaveMsg');
  7002:             const rawToken = el('calToken') ? el('calToken').value.trim() : '';
  7003:             const payload = {
  7004:               reportLink: el('calRL') ? el('calRL').value.trim() : '',
  7005:               realm: el('calRealm') ? el('calRealm').value.trim() : '',
  7006:               tableId: el('calTableId') ? el('calTableId').value.trim() : '',
  7007:               qid: el('calQid') ? el('calQid').value.trim() : '',
  7008:               fieldEmployee: el('calFEmployee') ? el('calFEmployee').value.trim() : '',
  7009:               fieldNote: el('calFNote') ? el('calFNote').value.trim() : '',
  7010:               fieldStartDate: el('calFStart') ? el('calFStart').value.trim() : '',
  7011:               fieldEndDate: el('calFEnd') ? el('calFEnd').value.trim() : '',
  7012:             };
  7013:             // Only send token if user actually changed it (not the masked placeholder)
  7014:             if (rawToken && !rawToken.startsWith('•')) payload.qbToken = rawToken;
  7015:             try {
  7016:               calSaveBtn.disabled = true;
  7017:               calSaveBtn.textContent = 'Saving…';
  7018:               const tok = getBearerToken();
  7019:               const r = await fetch('/api/settings/global_calendar', {
  7020:                 method: 'POST',
  7021:                 headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  7022:                 body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  7023:               });
  7024:               const d = await r.json();
  7025:               if (msg) { msg.textContent = d.ok ? '✅ Saved!' : '❌ ' + (d.message || 'Error'); msg.style.opacity = '1'; setTimeout(() => { msg.style.opacity = '0'; }, 3000); }
  7026:             } catch (e) {
  7027:               if (msg) { msg.textContent = '❌ Network error'; msg.style.opacity = '1'; setTimeout(() => { msg.style.opacity = '0'; }, 3000); }
  7028:             } finally {
  7029:               calSaveBtn.disabled = false;
  7030:               calSaveBtn.textContent = 'Save Calendar Settings';
  7031:             }
  7032:           };
  7033:         }
  7034:

  7044:         // ── Login Mode Control (Super Admin only) ─────────────────────────────────
  7045:     try{
  7046:       if(isSA){
  7047:         const lmCard    = document.getElementById('msp_loginmode') || document.getElementById('loginModeCard');
  7048:         const lmStatus  = document.getElementById('loginModeStatus');
  7049:         const lmSaveBtn = document.getElementById('saveLoginModeBtn');
  7050:         const lmSaveMsg = document.getElementById('loginModeSaveMsg');
  7051:         const lmRadios  = ()=> document.querySelectorAll('input[name="loginModeChoice"]');
  7052:         const lmOptLabels = { both: document.getElementById('loginModeOpt_both'), password: document.getElementById('loginModeOpt_password'), microsoft: document.getElementById('loginModeOpt_microsoft') };
  7053: 
  7054:         if(lmCard){ lmCard.style.display = ''; _revealAdminSection(); }
  7055: 
  7056:         // Highlight active option label
  7057:         const highlightSelected = (mode) => {
  7058:           ['both','password','microsoft'].forEach(m => {
  7059:             const lbl = lmOptLabels[m];
  7060:             if(!lbl) return;
  7061:             if(m === mode){
  7062:               lbl.style.background = 'rgba(37,99,235,.10)';
  7063:               lbl.style.borderColor = 'rgba(37,99,235,.30)';
  7064:             } else {
  7065:               lbl.style.background = '';
  7066:               lbl.style.borderColor = 'transparent';
  7067:             }
  7068:           });
  7069:         };
  7070: 
  7071:         const modeLabels = { both: 'Both (Microsoft + Password)', password: 'Password only', microsoft: 'Microsoft OAuth only' };
  7072: 
  7073:         // Load current setting from server
  7074:         window.__mumsLoadLoginMode = window.__mumsLoadLoginMode || null;
  7075:         const loadLoginMode = async () => {
  7076:           if(lmStatus) lmStatus.textContent = 'Loading…';
  7077:           try{
  7078:             const jwt = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  7079:             const r = await fetch('/api/settings/login_mode', {
  7080:               headers: jwt ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${jwt}` } : {}
  7081:             });
  7082:             const data = await r.json().catch(()=> ({}));
  7083:             const mode = (data && data.settings && data.settings.mode) ? data.settings.mode : 'both';
  7084:             // Set radio
  7085:             lmRadios().forEach(radio => { radio.checked = (radio.value === mode); });
  7086:             highlightSelected(mode);
  7087:             const updatedBy = (data && data.settings && data.settings.updatedByName) ? data.settings.updatedByName : null;
  7088:             const updatedAt = (data && data.settings && data.settings.updatedAt) ? new Date(data.settings.updatedAt).toLocaleString() : null;
  7089:             if(lmStatus){
  7090:               lmStatus.textContent = `Current: ${modeLabels[mode] || mode}` + (updatedBy ? ` — last changed by ${updatedBy}` : '') + (updatedAt ? ` on ${updatedAt}` : '');
  7091:             }
  7092:           }catch(e){
  7093:             if(lmStatus) lmStatus.textContent = 'Could not load setting.';
  7094:           }
  7095:         };
  7096: 
  7097:         // Highlight on radio change
  7098:         lmRadios().forEach(radio => {
  7099:           radio.addEventListener('change', () => { highlightSelected(radio.value); });
  7100:         });
  7101:         lmOptLabels['both'] && lmOptLabels['both'].addEventListener('click', () => highlightSelected('both'));
  7102:         lmOptLabels['password'] && lmOptLabels['password'].addEventListener('click', () => highlightSelected('password'));
  7103:         lmOptLabels['microsoft'] && lmOptLabels['microsoft'].addEventListener('click', () => highlightSelected('microsoft'));
  7104: 
  7105:         // Save
  7106:         if(lmSaveBtn){
  7107:           lmSaveBtn.addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
  7108:             const selected = [...lmRadios()].find(r => r.checked);
  7109:             if(!selected){ if(lmSaveMsg){ lmSaveMsg.textContent='Please select a mode.'; lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='1'; lmSaveMsg.style.color='var(--danger)'; setTimeout(()=>{ lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='0'; }, 2500); } return; }
  7110:             lmSaveBtn.disabled = true;
  7111:             lmSaveBtn.textContent = 'Saving…';
  7112:             try{
  7113:               const jwt = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  7114:               const r = await fetch('/api/settings/login_mode', {
  7115:                 method: 'POST',
  7116:                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...(jwt ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${jwt}` } : {}) },
  7117:                 body: JSON.stringify({ mode: selected.value })
  7118:               });
  7119:               const data = await r.json().catch(()=> ({}));
  7120:               if(r.ok && data && data.ok){
  7121:                 if(lmSaveMsg){ lmSaveMsg.textContent = `✓ Saved: ${modeLabels[selected.value] || selected.value}`; lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='1'; lmSaveMsg.style.color='var(--success,#22c55e)'; setTimeout(()=>{ lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='0'; }, 3000); }
  7122:                 await loadLoginMode();
  7123:               } else {
  7124:                 const msg = (data && data.message) ? data.message : 'Save failed.';
  7125:                 if(lmSaveMsg){ lmSaveMsg.textContent = '✗ ' + msg; lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='1'; lmSaveMsg.style.color='var(--danger)'; setTimeout(()=>{ lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='0'; }, 4000); }
  7126:               }
  7127:             }catch(e){
  7128:               if(lmSaveMsg){ lmSaveMsg.textContent = '✗ Network error.'; lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='1'; lmSaveMsg.style.color='var(--danger)'; setTimeout(()=>{ lmSaveMsg.style.opacity='0'; }, 4000); }
  7129:             }finally{
  7130:               lmSaveBtn.disabled = false;
  7131:               lmSaveBtn.textContent = 'Save';
  7132:             }
  7133:           });
  7134:         }
  7135: 
  7136:         // Load on settings modal open
  7137:         const settingsBtn2 = document.getElementById('settingsBtn');
  7138:         if(settingsBtn2 && !settingsBtn2.__lmBound){
  7139:           settingsBtn2.__lmBound = true;
  7140:           const origOnClick = settingsBtn2.onclick;
  7141:           settingsBtn2.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ loadLoginMode(); });
  7142:         }
  7143:         window.__mumsLoadLoginMode = loadLoginMode;
  7144:         loadLoginMode();
  7145:       }
  7146:     }catch(e){ console.error('[LoginMode]', e); }
  7147: 
  7148:     // ── Mailbox Control Panel (Super Admin only) ───────────────────────────
  7149:     try{
  7150:       if(isSA){
  7151:         const mbxToggle  = document.getElementById('mailboxEnabledToggle');
  7152:         const mbxSaveBtn = document.getElementById('saveMailboxStatusBtn');
  7153:         const mbxSaveMsg = document.getElementById('mailboxStatusSaveMsg');
  7154:         const mbxBanner  = document.getElementById('mailboxStatusBanner');
  7155:         const mbxDot     = document.getElementById('mailboxStatusDot');
  7156:         const mbxLabel   = document.getElementById('mailboxStatusLabel');
  7157:         const mbxMeta    = document.getElementById('mailboxStatusMeta');
  7158:         const mbxWarn    = document.getElementById('mailboxDisableWarning');
  7159: 
  7160:         function _mbxCtrlRefreshUI(disabled) {
  7161:           if (!mbxToggle) return;
  7162:           mbxToggle.checked = !disabled;
  7163:           if (mbxBanner) {
  7164:             if (disabled) {
  7165:               mbxBanner.style.background = 'rgba(239,68,68,.08)';
  7166:               mbxBanner.style.borderColor = 'rgba(239,68,68,.28)';
  7167:             } else {
  7168:               mbxBanner.style.background = 'rgba(34,197,94,.08)';
  7169:               mbxBanner.style.borderColor = 'rgba(34,197,94,.25)';
  7170:             }
  7171:           }
  7172:           if (mbxDot) {
  7173:             mbxDot.style.background = disabled ? '#ef4444' : '#22c55e';
  7174:             mbxDot.style.boxShadow  = disabled ? '0 0 8px rgba(239,68,68,.6)' : '0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,.6)';
  7175:           }
  7176:           if (mbxLabel) {
  7177:             mbxLabel.textContent = disabled ? 'Mailbox is DISABLED' : 'Mailbox is ENABLED';

=== FILE: public/js/pages/my_quickbase_tab_manager.js ===
     1: /* @AI_CRITICAL_GUARD v3.0: UNTOUCHABLE ZONE — MACE APPROVAL REQUIRED.

     8: 
     9: 
    10: (function(rootFactory) {
    11:   if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
    12:     const built = rootFactory(typeof globalThis !== 'undefined' ? globalThis : global);
    13:     module.exports = built;
    14:     module.exports.default = built;
    15:   } else {
    16:     rootFactory(typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window : globalThis);
    17:   }
    18: })(function(root) {
    19:   const defaultQuickbaseSettings = {
    20:     tabName: '',
    21:     reportLink: '',
    22:     baseReportQid: '',
    23:     qid: '',
    24:     tableId: '',
    25:     realm: '',
    26:     bypassGlobal: false,
    27:     virtualColumn: { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] }
    28:   };
    29: 
    30:   const tabs = new Map();
    31:   let currentUserId = '';
    32:   let apiBaseUrl = '/api';
    33:   let storageNamespace = 'quickbase';
    34: 
    35:   function authHeader() {
    36:     const jwt = root.CloudAuth && typeof root.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function'
    37:       ? root.CloudAuth.accessToken()
    38:       : '';
    39:     return jwt ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${jwt}` } : {};
    40:   }
    41: 
    42:   function cloneDeep(value) {
    43:     // Deep clone is required so each tab gets isolated objects and no shared references leak across tabs.
    44:     if (typeof root.structuredClone === 'function') return root.structuredClone(value);
    45:     return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
    46:   }
    47: 
    48:   function safeUserId(userId) {
    49:     const out = String(userId || '').trim();
    50:     return out || 'anonymous';
    51:   }
    52: 
    53:   function storageKey() {
    54:     return `mums_${storageNamespace}_tabs_${safeUserId(currentUserId)}`;
    55:   }
    56: 
    57:   function makeUUID() {
    58:     if (root.crypto && typeof root.crypto.randomUUID === 'function') return root.crypto.randomUUID();
    59:     return `qb-tab-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2, 10)}`;
    60:   }
    61: 
    62:   function saveLocalFallback() {
    63:     if (!root.localStorage) return;
    64:     const payload = Array.from(tabs.entries()).map(([tabId, entry]) => ({
    65:       tab_id: tabId,
    66:       tab_name: String(entry.settings.tabName || '').trim(),
    67:       settings_json: cloneDeep(entry.settings),
    68:       meta: cloneDeep(entry.meta)
    69:     }));
    70:     root.localStorage.setItem(storageKey(), JSON.stringify(payload));
    71:   }
    72: 
    73:   function loadLocalFallback() {
    74:     if (!root.localStorage) return;
    75:     const raw = root.localStorage.getItem(storageKey());
    76:     if (!raw) return;
    77:     let parsed = [];
    78:     try {
    79:       parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    80:     } catch (_) {
    81:       parsed = [];
    82:     }
    83:     if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) return;
    84:     tabs.clear();
    85:     parsed.forEach((row) => {
    86:       const tabId = String(row && (row.tab_id || row.tabId) || '').trim();
    87:       if (!tabId) return;
    88:       const rawSettings = cloneDeep(row.settings_json || {});
    89:       // Ensure virtualColumn is always present — merge defaults without overwriting user data
    90:       if (!rawSettings.virtualColumn || typeof rawSettings.virtualColumn !== 'object') {
    91:         rawSettings.virtualColumn = cloneDeep(defaultQuickbaseSettings.virtualColumn);
    92:       }
    93:       const settings = Object.assign({}, defaultQuickbaseSettings, rawSettings);
    94:       tabs.set(tabId, {
    95:         settings,
    96:         meta: Object.assign({ createdAt: Date.now(), updatedAt: Date.now() }, row.meta || {})
    97:       });
    98:     });
    99:   }
   100: 
   101:   async function apiRequest(path, options) {
   102:     const base = String(apiBaseUrl || '/api').replace(/\/$/, '');
   103:     const opts = Object.assign({}, options || {});
   104:     opts.headers = Object.assign({}, opts.headers || {}, authHeader());
   105:     const response = await root.fetch(`${base}${path}`, opts);
   106:     const body = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
   107:     if (!response.ok) {
   108:       const err = new Error(body.message || body.error || 'quickbase_tab_manager_api_failed');
   109:       err.status = response.status;
   110:       throw err;
   111:     }
   112:     return body;
   113:   }
   114: 
   115:   const TabManager = {
   116:     init({ userId, apiBaseUrl: nextApiBaseUrl, namespace }) {
   117:       currentUserId = String(userId || '').trim();
   118:       apiBaseUrl = String(nextApiBaseUrl || '/api').trim() || '/api';
   119:       storageNamespace = String(namespace || 'quickbase').trim() || 'quickbase';
   120:       tabs.clear();
   121:       loadLocalFallback();
   122:       return this;
   123:     },
   124: 
   125:     createTab({ tabName }) {
   126:       const tabId = makeUUID();
   127:       const settings = cloneDeep(defaultQuickbaseSettings);
   128:       settings.tabName = String(tabName || 'New Tab').trim() || 'New Tab';
   129:       tabs.set(tabId, {
   130:         settings,
   131:         meta: { createdAt: Date.now(), updatedAt: Date.now() }
   132:       });
   133:       saveLocalFallback();
   134:       return tabId;
   135:     },
   136: 
   137:     getTab(tabId) {
   138:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   139:       const entry = tabs.get(safeTabId);
   140:       if (!entry) {
   141:         return {
   142:           settings: cloneDeep(defaultQuickbaseSettings),
   143:           meta: { createdAt: 0, updatedAt: 0 }
   144:         };
   145:       }
   146:       return {
   147:         settings: cloneDeep(entry.settings),
   148:         meta: cloneDeep(entry.meta)
   149:       };
   150:     },
   151: 
   152:     updateTabLocal(tabId, partialSettings) {
   153:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   154:       if (!safeTabId || !tabs.has(safeTabId)) return;
   155:       const entry = tabs.get(safeTabId);
   156:       const next = Object.assign({}, entry.settings, cloneDeep(partialSettings || {}));
   157:       tabs.set(safeTabId, {
   158:         settings: next,
   159:         meta: Object.assign({}, entry.meta, { updatedAt: Date.now() })
   160:       });
   161:       saveLocalFallback();
   162:     },
   163: 
   164:     async saveTab(tabId) {
   165:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   166:       const entry = tabs.get(safeTabId);
   167:       if (!entry) return;
   168:       // Always save to localStorage first — this is the reliable fallback.
   169:       saveLocalFallback();
   170:       // Attempt remote sync but DO NOT throw on failure.
   171:       // Settings are already persisted via mums_profiles.quickbase_settings
   172:       // by persistQuickbaseSettings(). The quickbase_tabs table is secondary.
   173:       try {
   174:         const payload = {
   175:           user_id: safeUserId(currentUserId),
   176:           tab_id: safeTabId,
   177:           tab_name: String(entry.settings.tabName || '').trim() || 'New Tab',
   178:           settings_json: cloneDeep(entry.settings)
   179:         };
   180:         const upsertPath = storageNamespace === 'quickbase_s'
   181:           ? '/quickbase_s_tabs/upsert'
   182:           : '/quickbase_tabs/upsert';
   183:         await apiRequest(upsertPath, {
   184:           method: 'POST',
   185:           headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   186:           body: JSON.stringify(payload)
   187:         });
   188:       } catch (_) {
   189:         // Silently ignore - localStorage fallback is already saved above.
   190:         // Primary settings are stored in mums_profiles via persistQuickbaseSettings().
   191:       }
   192:     },
   193: 
   194: 
   195: 
   196:     async deleteTab(tabId) {
   197:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   198:       if (!safeTabId) return;
   199:       // Remove from local map first — UI should update regardless of API result.
   200:       tabs.delete(safeTabId);
   201:       saveLocalFallback();
   202:       // Attempt remote delete but DO NOT throw on failure.
   203:       try {
   204:         const userId = encodeURIComponent(safeUserId(currentUserId));
   205:         const token = root.CloudAuth && typeof root.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function'
   206:           ? String(root.CloudAuth.accessToken() || '').trim()
   207:           : '';
   208:         await apiRequest(`/quickbase_tabs/${encodeURIComponent(safeTabId)}?user_id=${userId}&tab_id=${encodeURIComponent(safeTabId)}`, {
   209:           method: 'DELETE',
   210:           headers: {
   211:             'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   212:             Authorization: 'Bearer ' + token
   213:           }
   214:         });
   215:       } catch (_) {
   216:         // Silently ignore - local state is already cleaned up above.
   217:         // Tab is deleted from localStorage and state; the remote cleanup
   218:         // will happen naturally on next upsert cycle or can be ignored.
   219:       }
   220:     },
   221: 
   222:     async loadTabs() {
   223:       const userId = encodeURIComponent(safeUserId(currentUserId));
   224:       const out = await apiRequest(`/quickbase_tabs?user_id=${userId}`, { method: 'GET' });
   225:       const rows = Array.isArray(out && out.rows) ? out.rows : [];
   226:       tabs.clear();
   227:       rows.forEach((row) => {
   228:         const tabId = String(row && row.tab_id || '').trim();
   229:         if (!tabId) return;
   230:         const rawSettings = cloneDeep(row.settings_json || {});
   231:         // Always ensure virtualColumn exists — don't let old API data wipe it
   232:         if (!rawSettings.virtualColumn || typeof rawSettings.virtualColumn !== 'object') {
   233:           // Preserve from existing in-memory tab if available, else use default
   234:           const existingEntry = tabs.get(tabId);
   235:           rawSettings.virtualColumn = (existingEntry && existingEntry.settings && existingEntry.settings.virtualColumn)
   236:             ? cloneDeep(existingEntry.settings.virtualColumn)
   237:             : cloneDeep(defaultQuickbaseSettings.virtualColumn);
   238:         }
   239:         const settings = Object.assign({}, defaultQuickbaseSettings, rawSettings, {
   240:           tabName: String(row.tab_name || (rawSettings && rawSettings.tabName) || '').trim()
   241:         });
   242:         tabs.set(tabId, {
   243:           settings,
   244:           meta: {
   245:             createdAt: Date.parse(row.created_at || '') || Date.now(),
   246:             updatedAt: Date.parse(row.updated_at || '') || Date.now()
   247:           }
   248:         });
   249:       });
   250:       saveLocalFallback();
   251:       return Array.from(tabs.keys());
   252:     },
   253: 
   254:     clearNewTabFields() {
   255:       const defaults = cloneDeep(defaultQuickbaseSettings);
   256:       const map = {
   257:         qbTabName: defaults.tabName,
   258:         qbReportLink: defaults.reportLink,
   259:         qbTabBaseQid: defaults.baseReportQid,
   260:         qbQid: defaults.qid,
   261:         qbTableId: defaults.tableId
   262:       };
   263:       Object.keys(map).forEach((id) => {
   264:         const el = root.document && root.document.querySelector ? root.document.querySelector(`#${id}`) : null;
   265:         if (!el) return;
   266:         el.value = map[id];
   267:       });
   268:       return defaults;
   269:     },
   270: 
   271:     __unsafeDump() {
   272:       return Array.from(tabs.entries()).map(([tabId, value]) => ({ tabId, value: cloneDeep(value) }));
   273:     }
   274:   };
   275: 
   276:   root.TabManager = TabManager;
   277:   return TabManager;
   278: });

    17:   function resolveTabStorageNamespace(root) {
    18:     const pageKey = String(
    19:       (root && root.getAttribute && (root.getAttribute('data-page') || root.getAttribute('data-route')))
    20:       || (root && root.dataset && (root.dataset.page || root.dataset.route))
    21:       || (window.location && window.location.hash)
    22:       || ''
    23:     ).toLowerCase();
    24:     return pageKey.includes('quickbase_s') ? 'quickbase_s' : 'quickbase';
    25:   }
    26: 
    27:   function esc(v) {
    28:     if (window.UI && typeof window.UI.esc === 'function') return window.UI.esc(v);
    29:     return String(v == null ? '' : v)
    30:       .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    31:       .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    32:       .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    33:       .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    34:       .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
    35:   }

    37:   const ENABLE_QID_URL_MATCH_VALIDATION = true;
    38: 
    39:   function parseQuickbaseReportUrl(url) {
    40:     const value = String(url || '').trim();
    41:     if (!value) return null;
    42:     try {
    43:       const u = new URL(value);
    44:       const segments = String(u.pathname || '').split('/').filter(Boolean);
    45:       const appIndex = segments.findIndex((segment) => String(segment).toLowerCase() === 'app');
    46:       const tableIndex = segments.findIndex((segment) => String(segment).toLowerCase() === 'table');
    47:       const appId = appIndex >= 0 ? String(segments[appIndex + 1] || '').trim() : '';
    48:       const tableId = tableIndex >= 0
    49:         ? String(segments[tableIndex + 1] || '').trim()
    50:         : (() => {
    51:           const dbIndex = segments.findIndex((segment) => String(segment).toLowerCase() === 'db');
    52:           return dbIndex >= 0 ? String(segments[dbIndex + 1] || '').trim() : '';
    53:         })();
    54:       const rawQid = String(u.searchParams.get('qid') || '').trim();
    55:       const qidMatch = rawQid.match(/-?\d+/);
    56:       const qid = qidMatch && qidMatch[0] ? qidMatch[0] : '';
    57:       const out = {};
    58:       if (appId) out.appId = appId;
    59:       if (tableId) out.tableId = tableId;
    60:       if (qid) out.qid = qid;
    61:       return Object.keys(out).length ? out : null;
    62:     } catch (_) {
    63:       return null;
    64:     }
    65:   }
    66: 
    67:   function parseQuickbaseLink(link) {
    68:     const out = { realm: '', appId: '', tableId: '', qid: '' };
    69:     const value = String(link || '').trim();
    70:     if (!value) return out;
    71: 
    72:     const parsedGeneric = parseQuickbaseReportUrl(value);
    73:     if (parsedGeneric) {
    74:       out.appId = String(parsedGeneric.appId || '').trim();
    75:       out.tableId = String(parsedGeneric.tableId || '').trim();
    76:       out.qid = String(parsedGeneric.qid || '').trim();
    77:     }
    78: 
    79:     try {
    80:       const urlObj = new URL(value);
    81:       const host = String(urlObj.hostname || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    82:       const realmMatch = host.match(/^([a-z0-9-]+)\.quickbase\.com$/i);
    83:       out.realm = realmMatch && realmMatch[1] ? String(realmMatch[1]).trim() : host;
    84:     } catch (_) {}
    85:     const dbMatch = value.match(/\/db\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/i);
    86:     if (dbMatch && dbMatch[1]) out.tableId = String(dbMatch[1]).trim();
    87:     if (!out.tableId) {
    88:       const tableMatch = value.match(/\/table\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/i);
    89:       if (tableMatch && tableMatch[1]) out.tableId = String(tableMatch[1]).trim();
    90:     }
    91:     if (!out.qid) {
    92:       const qidParamMatch = value.match(/[?&]qid=(-?\d+)/i);
    93:       if (qidParamMatch && qidParamMatch[1]) out.qid = String(qidParamMatch[1]).trim();
    94:     }
    95:     if (!out.qid) {
    96:       const reportMatch = value.match(/\/report\/(-?\d+)/i);
    97:       if (reportMatch && reportMatch[1]) out.qid = String(reportMatch[1]).trim();
    98:     }
    99:     return out;
   100:   }
   101: 
   102:   function normalizeFilters(raw) {
   103:     const operatorMap = {
   104:       'IS EQUAL TO': 'EX',
   105:       'IS (EXACT)': 'EX',
   106:       EX: 'EX',
   107:       '=': 'EX',
   108:       'IS NOT': 'XEX',
   109:       'NOT EQUAL TO': 'XEX',
   110:       'IS NOT EQUAL TO': 'XEX',
   111:       XEX: 'XEX',
   112:       '!=': 'XEX',
   113:       '<>': 'XEX',
   114:       CONTAINS: 'CT',
   115:       CT: 'CT',
   116:       'DOES NOT CONTAIN': 'XCT',
   117:       XCT: 'XCT'
   118:     };
   119:     const toOperator = (value) => {
   120:       const key = String(value == null ? 'EX' : value).trim().toUpperCase();
   121:       return operatorMap[key] || key || 'EX';
   122:     };
   123:     if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return [];
   124:     return raw
   125:       .filter((f) => f && typeof f === 'object')
   126:       .map((f) => ({
   127:         fieldId: String((f.fieldId ?? f.field_id ?? f.fid ?? f.id ?? '')).trim(),
   128:         operator: toOperator(f.operator),
   129:         value: String((f.value ?? '')).trim()
   130:       }))
   131:       .filter((f) => f.fieldId && f.value);
   132:   }
   133: 
   134:   function normalizeFilterMatch(raw) {
   135:     const value = String(raw || '').trim().toUpperCase();
   136:     return value === 'ANY' ? 'ANY' : 'ALL';
   137:   }
   138: 
   139:   function normalizeCounterColor(value) {
   140:     const allowedColors = new Set(['default', 'blue', 'green', 'red', 'purple', 'orange']);
   141:     const normalized = String(value || 'default').trim().toLowerCase();
   142:     return allowedColors.has(normalized) ? normalized : 'default';
   143:   }
   144: 
   145:   function normalizeDashboardCounters(raw) {
   146:     let source = raw;
   147:     if (typeof source === 'string') {
   148:       try {
   149:         source = JSON.parse(source);
   150:       } catch (_) {
   151:         source = [];
   152:       }
   153:     }
   154:     if (!Array.isArray(source)) return [];
   155:     const allowedOperators = new Set(['EX', 'XEX', 'CT']);
   156:     const operatorMap = {
   157:       'IS EQUAL TO': 'EX',
   158:       '=': 'EX',
   159:       EX: 'EX',
   160:       'IS NOT EQUAL TO': 'XEX',
   161:       'IS NOT': 'XEX',
   162:       '!=': 'XEX',
   163:       XEX: 'XEX',
   164:       CONTAINS: 'CT',
   165:       CT: 'CT'
   166:     };
   167:     return source
   168:       .filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object')
   169:       .map((item) => {
   170:         const opKey = String(item.operator || '').trim().toUpperCase();
   171:         const normalizedOperator = operatorMap[opKey] || opKey || 'EX';
   172:         return {
   173:           fieldId: String(item.fieldId ?? item.field_id ?? '').trim(),
   174:           operator: allowedOperators.has(normalizedOperator) ? normalizedOperator : 'EX',
   175:           value: String(item.value ?? '').trim(),
   176:           label: String(item.label ?? '').trim(),
   177:           color: normalizeCounterColor(item.color)
   178:         };
   179:       })
   180:       .filter((item) => item.fieldId);
   181:   }

   183:   function getCounterGlassStyle(color) {
   184:     const palette = {
   185:       blue: 'background: rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.1);',
   186:       green: 'background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1);',
   187:       red: 'background: rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.1);',
   188:       purple: 'background: rgba(156, 39, 176, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(156, 39, 176, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(156, 39, 176, 0.1);',
   189:       orange: 'background: rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.1);',
   190:       default: 'background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.05);'
   191:     };
   192:     return palette[normalizeCounterColor(color)] || palette.default;
   193:   }
   194: 
   195:   function counterToFilter(counter) {
   196:     if (!counter || typeof counter !== 'object') return null;
   197:     const fieldId = String(counter.fieldId || '').trim();
   198:     const value = String(counter.value || '').trim();
   199:     const operator = String(counter.operator || 'EX').trim().toUpperCase();
   200:     if (!fieldId || !value) return null;
   201:     return { fieldId, operator, value };
   202:   }
   203: 
   204:   function rowsToCsv(rows, columns) {
   205:     const safeRows = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [];
   206:     const safeColumns = Array.isArray(columns) ? columns : [];
   207:     const headers = ['Case #'].concat(safeColumns.map((c) => String(c && c.label || c && c.id || 'Field')));
   208:     const escapeCsv = (value) => {
   209:       const text = String(value == null ? '' : value);
   210:       const escaped = text.replace(/"/g, '""');
   211:       if (/[,\n"]/g.test(escaped)) return `"${escaped}"`;
   212:       return escaped;
   213:     };
   214:     const body = safeRows.map((row) => {
   215:       const list = [String(row && row.qbRecordId || 'N/A')];
   216:       safeColumns.forEach((col) => {
   217:         const fid = String(col && col.id || '').trim();
   218:         const val = row && row.fields && row.fields[fid] ? row.fields[fid].value : '';
   219:         list.push(String(val == null ? '' : val));
   220:       });
   221:       return list.map(escapeCsv).join(',');
   222:     });
   223:     return [headers.map(escapeCsv).join(',')].concat(body).join('\n');
   224:   }

   227:   function parseQuickbaseSettings(raw) {
   228:     if (!raw) return {};
   229:     if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw;
   230:     try {
   231:       const parsed = JSON.parse(String(raw));
   232:       return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {};
   233:     } catch (_) {
   234:       return {};
   235:     }
   236:   }
   237: 
   238:   function generateUUID() {
   239:     try {
   240:       if (window.crypto && typeof window.crypto.randomUUID === 'function') return window.crypto.randomUUID();
   241:     } catch (_) {}
   242:     return `qb-tab-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2, 10)}`;
   243:   }
   244: 
   245:   function deepClone(obj) {
   246:     try {
   247:       return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
   248:     } catch (_) {
   249:       return obj;
   250:     }
   251:   }
   252: 
   253:   function createDefaultSettings(source, defaults) {
   254:     const src = source && typeof source === 'object' ? source : {};
   255:     const base = defaults && typeof defaults === 'object' ? defaults : {};
   256:     const reportLink = String(src.reportLink || src.qb_report_link || base.reportLink || '').trim();
   257:     const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
   258:     const hasReportLink = !!reportLink;
   259:     return {
   260:       reportLink,
   261:       qid: hasReportLink ? String(src.qid || src.qb_qid || parsed.qid || base.qid || '').trim() : '',
   262:       tableId: hasReportLink ? String(src.tableId || src.qb_table_id || parsed.tableId || base.tableId || '').trim() : '',
   263:       realm: hasReportLink ? String(src.realm || src.qb_realm || parsed.realm || base.realm || '').trim() : '',
   264:       // bypassGlobal: when true, this tab uses its own reportLink + profile.qb_token
   265:       // instead of the Global QB Settings. Each tab is independent.
   266:       bypassGlobal: !!(src.bypassGlobal || base.bypassGlobal || false),
   267:       dashboard_counters: deepClone(normalizeDashboardCounters(src.dashboard_counters || src.dashboardCounters || base.dashboard_counters || [])),
   268:       customColumns: deepClone(Array.isArray(src.customColumns || src.qb_custom_columns || base.customColumns)
   269:         ? (src.customColumns || src.qb_custom_columns || base.customColumns).map((v) => String(v))
   270:         : []),
   271:       customFilters: deepClone(normalizeFilters(src.customFilters || src.qb_custom_filters || base.customFilters || [])),
   272:       filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(src.filterMatch || src.qb_filter_match || base.filterMatch),
   273:       virtualColumn: deepClone(src.virtualColumn || base.virtualColumn || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] })
   274:     };
   275:   }
   276: 
   277:   function createTabMeta(source, defaults) {
   278:     const src = source && typeof source === 'object' ? source : {};
   279:     const base = defaults && typeof defaults === 'object' ? defaults : {};
   280:     return {
   281:       id: String(src.id || src.tabId || base.id || generateUUID()),
   282:       tabName: String(src.tabName || src.name || base.tabName || 'Main Report').trim() || 'Main Report'
   283:     };
   284:   }
   285: 
   286:   function buildDefaultTab(source, defaults) {
   287:     const src = source && typeof source === 'object' ? deepClone(source) : {};
   288:     const base = defaults && typeof defaults === 'object' ? deepClone(defaults) : {};
   289:     const reportLink = String(src.reportLink || src.qb_report_link || '').trim();
   290:     const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
   291:     const hasReportLink = !!reportLink;
   292:     return {
   293:       id: String(src.id || generateUUID()),
   294:       tabName: String(src.tabName || src.name || base.tabName || 'New Report').trim() || 'New Report',
   295:       reportLink,
   296:       qid: hasReportLink ? String(src.qid || src.qb_qid || parsed.qid || '').trim() : '',
   297:       tableId: hasReportLink ? String(src.tableId || src.qb_table_id || parsed.tableId || '').trim() : '',
   298:       realm: hasReportLink ? String(src.realm || src.qb_realm || parsed.realm || '').trim() : '',
   299:       bypassGlobal: !!(src.bypassGlobal || base.bypassGlobal || false),
   300:       dashboard_counters: deepClone(normalizeDashboardCounters(src.dashboard_counters || src.dashboardCounters || [])),
   301:       customColumns: deepClone(Array.isArray(src.customColumns || src.qb_custom_columns) ? (src.customColumns || src.qb_custom_columns).map((v) => String(v)) : []),
   302:       customFilters: deepClone(normalizeFilters(src.customFilters || src.qb_custom_filters || [])),
   303:       filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(src.filterMatch || src.qb_filter_match || 'ALL'),
   304:       virtualColumn: deepClone(src.virtualColumn || base.virtualColumn || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] })
   305:     };
   306:   }
   307: 
   308:   function normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(rawSettings, fallbackConfig) {
   309:     const flat = normalizeQuickbaseConfig(fallbackConfig);
   310:     const rawMissing = rawSettings == null;
   311:     let parseFailed = false;
   312:     let settings = {};
   313:     if (!rawMissing && typeof rawSettings === 'string') {
   314:       try {
   315:         const parsed = JSON.parse(String(rawSettings));
   316:         settings = parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {};
   317:       } catch (_) {
   318:         parseFailed = true;
   319:       }
   320:     } else {
   321:       settings = parseQuickbaseSettings(rawSettings);
   322:     }
   323: 
   324:     // FIX: [Issue 1] - Preserve tab-based settings when serialized quickbase_settings has a tabs array.
   325:     if (!parseFailed && Array.isArray(settings.tabs)) {
   326:       const tabs = [];
   327:       const settingsByTabId = {};
   328:       settings.tabs.forEach((tab, idx) => {
   329:         const tabMeta = createTabMeta(tab, { tabName: idx === 0 ? 'Main Report' : `Report ${idx + 1}` });
   330:         const tabSettings = createDefaultSettings(tab, {});
   331:         const isolatedTabSettings = createDefaultSettings(tabSettings, {});
   332:         tabs.push(Object.assign({}, tabMeta, deepClone(isolatedTabSettings) || createDefaultSettings({}, {})));
   333:         settingsByTabId[tabMeta.id] = deepClone(isolatedTabSettings) || createDefaultSettings({}, {});
   334:       });
   335:       // FIX: [Issue 1] - Defensive default when tabs array exists but is empty.
   336:       const safeTabs = tabs.length ? tabs : [buildDefaultTab(settings, { tabName: 'Main Report' })];
   337:       if (!tabs.length) settingsByTabId[safeTabs[0].id] = createDefaultSettings(settings, {});
   338:       const maxIndex = safeTabs.length - 1;
   339:       const activeTabIndex = Math.min(Math.max(Number(settings.activeTabIndex || 0), 0), maxIndex);
   340:       return { activeTabIndex, tabs: safeTabs, settingsByTabId };
   341:     }
   342: 
   343:     if (!rawMissing && parseFailed) {
   344:       const tab = buildDefaultTab({}, { tabName: 'Main Report' });
   345:       return { activeTabIndex: 0, tabs: [tab], settingsByTabId: { [tab.id]: createDefaultSettings({}, {}) } };
   346:     }
   347: 
   348:     const primaryTab = buildDefaultTab(settings, { tabName: 'Main Report' });
   349:     return {
   350:       activeTabIndex: 0,
   351:       tabs: [primaryTab],
   352:       settingsByTabId: {
   353:         [primaryTab.id]: createDefaultSettings(settings, {
   354:           reportLink: flat.reportLink,
   355:           qid: flat.qid,
   356:           tableId: flat.tableId,
   357:           customColumns: flat.customColumns,
   358:           customFilters: flat.customFilters,
   359:           filterMatch: flat.filterMatch,
   360:           dashboard_counters: flat.dashboardCounters
   361:         })
   362:       }
   363:     };
   364:   }
   365: 
   366:   function normalizeQuickbaseConfig(raw) {
   367:     const cfg = raw && typeof raw === 'object' ? raw : {};
   368:     return {
   369:       reportLink: String(cfg.reportLink || cfg.qb_report_link || '').trim(),
   370:       qid: String(cfg.qid || cfg.qb_qid || '').trim(),
   371:       tableId: String(cfg.tableId || cfg.qb_table_id || '').trim(),
   372:       realm: String(cfg.realm || cfg.qb_realm || '').trim(),
   373:       customColumns: Array.isArray(cfg.customColumns || cfg.qb_custom_columns)
   374:         ? (cfg.customColumns || cfg.qb_custom_columns).map((v) => String(v))
   375:         : [],
   376:       customFilters: normalizeFilters(cfg.customFilters || cfg.qb_custom_filters),
   377:       filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(cfg.filterMatch || cfg.qb_filter_match),
   378:       dashboardCounters: normalizeDashboardCounters(cfg.dashboardCounters || cfg.dashboard_counters || cfg.qb_dashboard_counters)
   379:     };
   380:   }
   381: 
   382:   function hasUsableQuickbaseSettings(rawSettings) {
   383:     const parsed = parseQuickbaseSettings(rawSettings);
   384:     if (Array.isArray(parsed && parsed.tabs) && parsed.tabs.length > 0) return true;
   385:     const cfg = normalizeQuickbaseConfig(parsed);
   386:     return Boolean(
   387:       String(cfg.reportLink || '').trim() ||
   388:       String(cfg.qid || '').trim() ||
   389:       String(cfg.tableId || '').trim() ||
   390:       (Array.isArray(cfg.customColumns) && cfg.customColumns.length) ||
   391:       (Array.isArray(cfg.customFilters) && cfg.customFilters.length) ||
   392:       (Array.isArray(cfg.dashboardCounters) && cfg.dashboardCounters.length)
   393:     );
   394:   }
   395: 
   396:   function chooseInitialQuickbaseSettingsSource(options) {
   397:     const opts = options && typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};
   398:     const hasBackendTabs = hasPersistedQuickbaseTabs(opts.backendQuickbaseSettings);
   399:     const hasWindowMeTabs = hasPersistedQuickbaseTabs(opts.windowMeQuickbaseSettings);
   400:     // ISOLATION FIX: Always prefer backend (Supabase) as the authoritative source.
   401:     // Backend tab IDs are the canonical IDs — local cache may have mismatched IDs
   402:     // causing settingsByTabId lookups to fail on tab switch.
   403:     if (hasBackendTabs) return deepClone(opts.backendQuickbaseSettings);
   404:     if (hasWindowMeTabs) return deepClone(opts.windowMeQuickbaseSettings);
   405:     // Only use local if backend has no usable config
   406:     const hasLocalTabs = hasPersistedQuickbaseTabs(opts.localQuickbaseSettings);
   407:     if (hasLocalTabs) return deepClone(opts.localQuickbaseSettings);
   408:     return deepClone(opts.backendQuickbaseSettings);
   409:   }
   410: 
   411:   function isSupportStudioNamespace(namespace) {
   412:     return String(namespace || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'quickbase_s';
   413:   }
   414: 
   415:   function getQuickbaseSettingsLocalKey(userId, namespace) {
   416:     if (isSupportStudioNamespace(namespace)) return 'support_studio_qb_settings';
   417:     const safeUserId = String(userId || 'anonymous').trim() || 'anonymous';
   418:     return `mums_my_quickbase_settings:${safeUserId}`;
   419:   }
   420: 
   421:   function getQuickbaseTabsLocalKey(userId, namespace) {
   422:     if (isSupportStudioNamespace(namespace)) return 'support_studio_qb_tabs';
   423:     const safeUserId = String(userId || 'anonymous').trim() || 'anonymous';
   424:     return `myQuickbase.tabs:${safeUserId}`;
   425:   }
   426: 
   427:   function getQuickbaseTabSettingsLocalKey(userId, tabId, namespace) {
   428:     if (isSupportStudioNamespace(namespace)) {
   429:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   430:       return `support_studio_qb_tab.${safeTabId}.settings`;
   431:     }
   432:     const safeUserId = String(userId || 'anonymous').trim() || 'anonymous';
   433:     const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
   434:     return `myQuickbase.tab.${safeUserId}.${safeTabId}.settings`;
   435:   }
   436: 
   437:   function readQuickbaseSettingsLocal(userId, namespace) {
   438:     try {
   439:       if (!window.localStorage) return null;
   440:       const rawTabs = localStorage.getItem(getQuickbaseTabsLocalKey(userId, namespace));
   441:       if (rawTabs) {
   442:         const parsedTabs = JSON.parse(rawTabs);
   443:         const tabs = Array.isArray(parsedTabs && parsedTabs.tabs) ? parsedTabs.tabs.map((tab, idx) => createTabMeta(tab, { tabName: idx === 0 ? 'Main Report' : `Report ${idx + 1}` })) : [];
   444:         if (!tabs.length) return null;
   445:         const settingsByTabId = {};
   446:         const hydratedTabs = [];
   447:         tabs.forEach((tab) => {
   448:           const tabSettingsRaw = localStorage.getItem(getQuickbaseTabSettingsLocalKey(userId, tab.id, namespace));
   449:           const parsedSettings = parseQuickbaseSettings(tabSettingsRaw);
   450:           const normalizedSettings = createDefaultSettings(parsedSettings, {});
   451:           settingsByTabId[tab.id] = deepClone(normalizedSettings) || createDefaultSettings({}, {});
   452:           hydratedTabs.push(Object.assign({}, tab, deepClone(normalizedSettings) || createDefaultSettings({}, {})));
   453:         });
   454:         const maxIndex = tabs.length - 1;
   455:         const activeTabIndex = Math.min(Math.max(Number(parsedTabs && parsedTabs.activeTabIndex || 0), 0), maxIndex);
   456:         return { activeTabIndex, tabs: hydratedTabs, settingsByTabId };
   457:       }
   458: 
   459:       const rawLegacy = localStorage.getItem(getQuickbaseSettingsLocalKey(userId, namespace));
   460:       if (!rawLegacy) return null;
   461:       const parsed = JSON.parse(rawLegacy);
   462:       const settings = parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.settings ? parsed.settings : parsed;
   463:       return normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(settings, {});
   464:     } catch (_) {
   465:       return null;
   466:     }
   467:   }
   468: 
   469:   function writeQuickbaseSettingsLocal(userId, settings, namespace) {
   470:     try {
   471:       if (!window.localStorage) return;
   472:       const normalized = normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(settings, {});
   473:       const payload = {
   474:         savedAt: Date.now(),
   475:         activeTabIndex: normalized.activeTabIndex,
   476:         tabs: normalized.tabs.map((tab) => {
   477:           const tabMeta = createTabMeta(tab, {});
   478:           const tabId = String(tabMeta.id || '').trim();
   479:           const tabSettings = normalized.settingsByTabId && normalized.settingsByTabId[tabId]
   480:             ? normalized.settingsByTabId[tabId]
   481:             : createDefaultSettings(tab, {});
   482:           return buildDefaultTab(Object.assign({}, tabMeta, tabSettings), {});
   483:         })
   484:       };
   485:       localStorage.setItem(getQuickbaseTabsLocalKey(userId, namespace), JSON.stringify(payload));
   486:       localStorage.setItem(getQuickbaseSettingsLocalKey(userId, namespace), JSON.stringify(normalized));
   487:       normalized.tabs.forEach((tab) => {
   488:         const tabId = String(tab.id || '').trim();
   489:         if (!tabId) return;
   490:         const tabSettings = normalized.settingsByTabId && normalized.settingsByTabId[tabId]
   491:           ? normalized.settingsByTabId[tabId]
   492:           : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
   493:         localStorage.setItem(getQuickbaseTabSettingsLocalKey(userId, tabId, namespace), JSON.stringify(tabSettings));
   494:       });
   495:     } catch (_) {}
   496:   }
   497: 
   498:   function getProfileQuickbaseConfig(profile) {
   499:     const p = profile && typeof profile === 'object' ? profile : {};
   500:     const quickbaseSettings = parseQuickbaseSettings(p.quickbase_settings);
   501:     const quickbaseConfig = parseQuickbaseSettings(p.quickbase_config);
   502:     const settingsFromTabs = Array.isArray(quickbaseSettings.tabs) && quickbaseSettings.tabs.length
   503:       ? (() => {
   504:         const maxIndex = quickbaseSettings.tabs.length - 1;
   505:         const idx = Math.min(Math.max(Number(quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex || 0), 0), maxIndex);
   506:         return quickbaseSettings.tabs[idx] || quickbaseSettings.tabs[0] || {};
   507:       })()
   508:       : null;
   509:     const source = Object.keys(quickbaseSettings).length
   510:       ? (settingsFromTabs || quickbaseSettings)
   511:       : Object.keys(quickbaseConfig).length
   512:         ? quickbaseConfig
   513:         : normalizeQuickbaseConfig(p);
   514:     return normalizeQuickbaseConfig(source);
   515:   }
   516: 
   517:   function hasPersistedQuickbaseTabs(settings) {
   518:     if (!settings || !Array.isArray(settings.tabs)) return false;
   519:     return settings.tabs.some((tab) => {
   520:       const rawTab = tab && typeof tab === 'object' ? tab : {};
   521:       const normalizedTab = createDefaultSettings(rawTab, {});
   522:       const hasReportConfig = !!String(normalizedTab.reportLink || normalizedTab.qid || normalizedTab.tableId || '').trim();
   523:       const hasCustomColumns = Array.isArray(normalizedTab.customColumns) && normalizedTab.customColumns.length > 0;
   524:       const hasFilterConfig = Array.isArray(normalizedTab.customFilters) && normalizedTab.customFilters.length > 0;
   525:       const hasDashboardCounters = Array.isArray(normalizedTab.dashboard_counters) && normalizedTab.dashboard_counters.length > 0;
   526:       return hasReportConfig || hasCustomColumns || hasFilterConfig || hasDashboardCounters;
   527:     });
   528:   }
   529: 
   530: 
   531:   function renderDashboardCounters(root, records, settings, state, onCounterToggle) {
   532:     const host = root.querySelector('#qbDashboardCounters');
   533:     if (!host) return;
   534:     try {
   535:       const rows = Array.isArray(records) ? records : [];
   536:       const dashboardCounters = normalizeDashboardCounters(settings && settings.dashboard_counters);
   537:       if (!dashboardCounters.length) {
   538:         host.innerHTML = '';
   539:         host.classList.remove('qb-counters-many');
   540:         return;
   541:       }
   542:       // Smart sizing: when >4 counters, switch to fill mode so they share space evenly
   543:       if (dashboardCounters.length > 4) {
   544:         host.classList.add('qb-counters-many');
   545:       } else {
   546:         host.classList.remove('qb-counters-many');
   547:       }
   548:       const widgets = dashboardCounters.map((counter, widgetsIndex) => {
   549:         const matcherValue = String(counter.value || '').toLowerCase();
   550:         const matchedRows = rows.filter((record) => {
   551:           const fields = record && record.fields ? record.fields : {};
   552:           const field = fields[String(counter.fieldId)] || null;
   553:           const sourceValue = String(field && field.value != null ? field.value : '').toLowerCase();
   554:           if (counter.operator === 'XEX') return sourceValue !== matcherValue;
   555:           if (counter.operator === 'CT') return sourceValue.includes(matcherValue);
   556:           return sourceValue === matcherValue;
   557:         });
   558: 
   559:         const label = counter.label || 'N/A';
   560:         return `
   561:           <div class="qb-counter-widget ${state && state.activeCounterIndex === widgetsIndex ? 'is-active' : ''}" data-counter-idx="${widgetsIndex}" style="${getCounterGlassStyle(counter.color)}">
   562:             <div class="qb-counter-label">${esc(label)}</div>
   563:             <div class="qb-counter-value">${esc(String(matchedRows.length))}</div>
   564:           </div>
   565:         `;
   566:       }).join('');
   567: 
   568:       host.innerHTML = widgets;
   569:       host.querySelectorAll('[data-counter-idx]').forEach((el) => {
   570:         el.onclick = () => {
   571:           if (typeof onCounterToggle === 'function') onCounterToggle(Number(el.getAttribute('data-counter-idx')));
   572:         };
   573:       });
   574:     } catch (_) {
   575:       host.innerHTML = '';
   576:     }
   577:   }
   578: 
   579:   // ── CASE NOTES DATE UTILITIES (outer scope — shared by renderRecords + applySearchAndRender) ──
   580:   const _MONTH_MAP_CN = {JAN:0,FEB:1,MAR:2,APR:3,MAY:4,JUN:5,JUL:6,AUG:7,SEP:8,OCT:9,NOV:10,DEC:11};
   581: 
   582:   // ── PHT CONVERSION (EST → Philippine Time, UTC+8) ────────────────────────
   583:   // QB stores case note timestamps in EST (UTC-5). PHT is UTC+8 = EST+13h.
   584:   // Format: [MON-DD-YY H:MM AM/PM Name...] → converted date+time in same bracket.
   585:   // Example: [MAR-22-26 7:22 PM Mace] → [MAR-22-26 8:22 PM Mace] (PHT)
   586:   const _MONTH_NAMES_CN = ['JAN','FEB','MAR','APR','MAY','JUN','JUL','AUG','SEP','OCT','NOV','DEC'];
   587:   const _PHT_OFFSET_MS  = 13 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // EST(UTC-5) → PHT(UTC+8) = +13h
   588: 
   589:   // QB stores timestamps in Eastern Time (ET) which observes US DST:
   590:   //   EDT (UTC-4): 2nd Sunday March → 1st Sunday November
   591:   //   EST (UTC-5): rest of year
   592:   // We must use the correct offset for the timestamp's date.
   593:   function _getEasternOffsetH(year, month, day) {
   594:     // month is 0-indexed (JS style): 2=March, 10=November
   595:     if (month > 2 && month < 10) return 4; // Apr-Oct: EDT (UTC-4)
   596:     if (month === 2) { // March: DST starts 2nd Sunday
   597:       const d = new Date(year, 2, 1);
   598:       const secondSun = ((7 - d.getDay()) % 7) + 8;
   599:       return day >= secondSun ? 4 : 5;
   600:     }
   601:     if (month === 10) { // November: DST ends 1st Sunday
   602:       const d = new Date(year, 10, 1);
   603:       const firstSun = ((7 - d.getDay()) % 7) + 1;
   604:       return day < firstSun ? 4 : 5;
   605:     }
   606:     return 5; // Dec, Jan, Feb: EST (UTC-5)
   607:   }
   608: 
   609:   function _cnDateToEST(mon, dd, yy, hh, mi, ap) {
   610:     const year = (yy < 50 ? 2000 : 1900) + yy;
   611:     const month = _MONTH_MAP_CN[mon];
   612:     let h = hh;
   613:     if (ap === 'PM' && h < 12) h += 12;
   614:     if (ap === 'AM' && h === 12) h = 0;
   615:     // Use DST-aware Eastern Time offset
   616:     const offsetH = _getEasternOffsetH(year, month, dd);
   617:     return new Date(Date.UTC(year, month, dd, h + offsetH, mi, 0, 0));
   618:   }
   619: 
   620:   function _fmtPHT(utcDate) {
   621:     // Convert UTC date to PHT formatted string: MON-DD-YY H:MM AM/PM
   622:     const pht = new Date(utcDate.getTime() + (8 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // UTC+8
   623:     const mon = _MONTH_NAMES_CN[pht.getUTCMonth()];
   624:     const dd  = pht.getUTCDate();
   625:     const yy  = String(pht.getUTCFullYear()).slice(-2);
   626:     let   h   = pht.getUTCHours();
   627:     const mi  = String(pht.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
   628:     const ap  = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
   629:     h = h % 12 || 12;
   630:     return `${mon}-${dd}-${yy} ${h}:${mi} ${ap}`;
   631:   }
   632: 
   633:   // Convert all [MON-DD-YY TIME ...] timestamps in a notes string from EST to PHT.
   634:   // Preserves everything else in the bracket (name, etc.) intact.
   635:   // Called on every case notes / latest-update field before rendering.
   636:   function _convertNotesESTtoPHT(text) {
   637:     if (!text) return text;
   638:     // Match [MON-DD-YY H:MM AM/PM ...rest...]
   639:     return text.replace(
   640:       /\[([A-Z]{3})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{2})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)([\s\S]*?)\]/gi,
   641:       function(full, mon, dd, yy, hh, mi, ap, rest) {
   642:         try {
   643:           const utc  = _cnDateToEST(mon.toUpperCase(), parseInt(dd,10), parseInt(yy,10), parseInt(hh,10), parseInt(mi,10), ap.toUpperCase());
   644:           const phtStr = _fmtPHT(utc);
   645:           return '[' + phtStr + rest + ']';
   646:         } catch(_) { return full; }
   647:       }
   648:     );
   649:   }
   650:   // ── END PHT CONVERSION ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   651: 
   652:   function _parseCNDate(m) {
   653:     const mon = m[1].toUpperCase(), dd = parseInt(m[2],10), yy = parseInt(m[3],10);
   654:     const hh  = parseInt(m[4],10),   mi = parseInt(m[5],10), ap = (m[6]||'').toUpperCase();
   655:     if (!(mon in _MONTH_MAP_CN)) return null;
   656:     const year = yy < 50 ? 2000+yy : 1900+yy;
   657:     let h = hh;
   658:     if (ap==='PM' && h<12) h+=12;
   659:     if (ap==='AM' && h===12) h=0;
   660:     const d = new Date(year, _MONTH_MAP_CN[mon], dd, h, mi, 0, 0);
   661:     return isNaN(d.getTime()) ? null : d;
   662:   }
   663: 
   664:   // Returns the most recent timestamp (ms) found in Case Notes text — 0 if none
   665:   function _caseNotesSortKey(text) {
   666:     if (!text) return 0;
   667:     const re = /\[([A-Z]{3})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{2})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)?/gi;
   668:     let best = 0, m;
   669:     while ((m = re.exec(text)) !== null) {
   670:       const d = _parseCNDate(m);
   671:       if (d && d.getTime() > best) best = d.getTime();
   672:     }
   673:     return best;
   674:   }
   675: 
   676:   // Returns today in Manila as "MAR-21-26"
   677:   function _getManilaToday() {
   678:     try {
   679:       const parts = {};
   680:       new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Manila',year:'2-digit',month:'short',day:'2-digit'})
   681:         .formatToParts(new Date()).forEach(p => { parts[p.type] = p.value; });
   682:       return parts.month.toUpperCase().slice(0,3) + '-' + parts.day.replace(/^0/,'') + '-' + parts.year;
   683:     } catch(_) { return ''; }
   684:   }
   685: 
   686:   // Wraps [MON-DD-YY ...] that match todayStr with <mark class="qb-date-today">.
   687:   // If myQbName is provided and the bracket name matches the current user,
   688:   // uses <mark class="qb-date-today qb-date-mine"> (Premium Gray Glass) instead.
   689:   // Returns highlighted HTML string, or null if today not found in text.
   690:   //
   691:   // FIX (v3.9.28): Only the FIRST (topmost / most-recent) matching bracket per
   692:   // cell is highlighted. Previously every today-date bracket in the cell was
   693:   // wrapped in <mark>, causing multiple highlights per row item. Since notes are
   694:   // written newest-first, the first match is always the latest update.
   695:   function _highlightTodayInNotes(rawText, todayStr, myQbName) {
   696:     if (!todayStr || !rawText) return null;
   697:     const myNameLower = String(myQbName || '').trim().toLowerCase();
   698:     const escapedSafe = rawText.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
   699:     const re = /\[([A-Z]{3}-\d{1,2}-\d{2}\s[^\]]*)\]/g;
   700:     let hasHighlight  = false;
   701:     let firstDone     = false; // guard — only the FIRST today-match gets the mark
   702:     const result = escapedSafe.replace(re, (full, inner) => {
   703:       const tok = inner.trim().split(/\s/)[0];
   704:       if (tok === todayStr && !firstDone) {
   705:         hasHighlight = true;
   706:         firstDone    = true; // lock — all subsequent today-brackets stay plain
   707:         const isMine = myNameLower && inner.toLowerCase().includes(myNameLower);
   708:         if (isMine) {
   709:           return '<mark class="qb-date-today qb-date-mine">[' + inner + ']<span class="qb-date-mine-badge">me</span></mark>';
   710:         }
   711:         return '<mark class="qb-date-today">[' + inner + ']</mark>';
   712:       }
   713:       return '[' + inner + ']';
   714:     });
   715:     return hasHighlight ? result : null;
   716:   }
   717:   // ── END CASE NOTES DATE UTILITIES ─────────────────────────────────────────
   718: 
   719:   function renderRecords(root, payload, options) {
   720:     const host = root.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
   721:     const meta = root.querySelector('#qbDataMeta');
   722:     if (!host || !meta) return;
   723: 
   724:     const columns = Array.isArray(payload && payload.columns) ? payload.columns : [];
   725:     const rows = Array.isArray(payload && payload.records) ? payload.records : [];
   726:     const opts = options && typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};
   727: 
   728:     if (!columns.length || !rows.length) {
   729:       const emptyBySearch = !!opts.userInitiatedSearch;
   730:       meta.textContent = 'No Quickbase Records Found';
   731:       // FIX v3.9.28: In QB_S (Studio) mode, when a search yields no local results,
   732:       // surface a "Search All Records" bridge that fires the Deep Search panel with
   733:       // the same term — Deep Search covers all 22k+ records, not just the loaded report.
   734:       const isStudioPage = !!(root && root.dataset && root.dataset.page === 'quickbase_s');
   735:       const searchTerm = opts.searchTerm || (root && root.querySelector && (root.querySelector('#qbHeaderSearch') || root.querySelector('input[type="text"]') || {}).value) || '';
   736:       const deepSearchBridge = (emptyBySearch && isStudioPage && String(searchTerm || '').trim())
   737:         ? `<button onclick="(function(){var inp=document.getElementById('qbs-search-input');if(inp){inp.value=${JSON.stringify(String(searchTerm || '').trim())};var leftPanel=document.getElementById('left-panel-qbs');if(leftPanel&&leftPanel.style.display==='none'){var leftBtn=document.querySelector('[data-tab=\'qbs\']');if(leftBtn)leftBtn.click();}if(typeof window._qbsDeepSearch==='function')window._qbsDeepSearch(inp.value,0);}})();"
   738:             style="margin-top:10px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 14px;background:rgba(88,166,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.3);color:#58a6ff;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;">
   739:             <i class="fas fa-search" style="font-size:10px;"></i> Search All 22k+ Records in Deep Search
   740:           </button>`
   741:         : '';
   742:       host.innerHTML = `<div class="card pad" style="text-align:center;padding:24px 16px;"><div class="small muted">${emptyBySearch ? 'No records match your filters in the current report.' : 'No records loaded. Open ⚙️ Settings to configure report, columns, and filters.'}</div>${deepSearchBridge}</div>`;
   743:       return;
   744:     }
   745: 
   746:     const pageSize = Number(opts.pageSize || 100);
   747:     const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(rows.length / pageSize));
   748:     const activePage = Math.min(Math.max(Number(opts.page || 1), 1), totalPages);
   749:     // FIX: [Issue 2] - Pagination for large record sets to avoid DOM-heavy render blocking.
   750:     const visibleRows = rows.slice((activePage - 1) * pageSize, activePage * pageSize);
   751:     meta.innerHTML = `${rows.length} record${rows.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} loaded${rows.length > pageSize ? ` • Page ${activePage}/${totalPages}` : ''}`;
   752: 
   753:     // Compute Manila today once per renderRecords call (used for cell highlighting)
   754:     const _CN_TODAY = _getManilaToday();
   755: 
   756:     // ENHANCEMENT 1: Days-only duration — never show hours
   757: 
   758:     const toDurationLabel = (value) => {
   759:       const numeric = Number(value);
   760:       if (!Number.isFinite(numeric) || numeric < 0) return String(value == null ? 'N/A' : value);
   761:       const hours = numeric / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   762:       const days = Math.round(hours / 24);
   763:       if (days < 1) return '< 1 day';
   764:       return `${days} day${days === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
   765:     };
   766: 
   767:     // ── CASE NOTES AUTO-WIDTH: scan visible rows to fit [DATE TIME NAME] ──────
   768:     // Extracts the FULL content of the first [bracket] in each row's Case Notes field.
   769:     // Computes the pixel width needed so the name is never cut mid-word.
   770:     // Uses character-count × font-width-estimate (7.2px for 13px DM Sans) + cell padding.
   771:     const _cnColIdx = columns.findIndex(c =>
   772:       ['case notes', 'notes'].includes(String(c && c.label || '').trim().toLowerCase())
   773:     );
   774:     let _cnColWidth = 220; // default (matches existing CSS)
   775:     if (_cnColIdx >= 0) {
   776:       const _cnFid = String(columns[_cnColIdx].id);
   777:       let _maxBracketLen = 0;
   778:       visibleRows.forEach(r => {
   779:         const val = r && r.fields && r.fields[_cnFid] ? String(r.fields[_cnFid].value || '') : '';
   780:         // Find ALL bracket groups [MON-DD-YY TIME NAME] and track the longest
   781:         const re = /\[([^\]]{5,80})\]/g;
   782:         let m;
   783:         while ((m = re.exec(val)) !== null) {
   784:           if (m[1].length > _maxBracketLen) _maxBracketLen = m[1].length;
   785:         }
   786:       });
   787:       if (_maxBracketLen > 0) {
   788:         // 7.2px per char (DM Sans 13px) + 32px cell padding + 10px buffer
   789:         const _computed = Math.round(_maxBracketLen * 7.2 + 42);
   790:         // Clamp: never narrower than 200px, never wider than 500px
   791:         _cnColWidth = Math.min(500, Math.max(200, _computed));
   792:       }
   793:     }
   794:     // ── END AUTO-WIDTH COMPUTE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   795: 
   796:     const headers = columns.map((c, _ci) => {
   797:       const _isNotesCol = _ci === _cnColIdx;
   798:       return `<th${_isNotesCol ? ' class="qb-cn-col"' : ''}>${esc(c.label || c.id || 'Field')}</th>`;
   799:     }).join('');
   800:     const rowStartIndex = (activePage - 1) * pageSize;
   801: 
   802:     // ── SCROLL POSITION SAVE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   803:     const existingTableInner = host.querySelector('.qb-table-inner');
   804:     const savedScrollTop  = existingTableInner ? existingTableInner.scrollTop  : 0;
   805:     const savedScrollLeft = existingTableInner ? existingTableInner.scrollLeft : 0;
   806: 
   807:     // ── CASE STATUS COLOR BADGE RENDERER ────────────────────────────────
   808:     function renderStatusBadge(rawStatus) {
   809:       const s = String(rawStatus || '').trim();
   810:       if (!s || s === 'N/A') return `<span class="qb-status-badge qb-status-default">${esc(s || '—')}</span>`;
   811:       const sl = s.toLowerCase();
   812:       let cls = 'qb-status-default';
   813:       if (sl.includes('investigating'))                                 cls = 'qb-status-investigating';
   814:       else if (sl.includes('waiting for customer') || sl.includes('waiting'))  cls = 'qb-status-waiting';
   815:       else if (sl.includes('soft close') || sl.includes('soft-close')) cls = 'qb-status-soft-close';
   816:       else if (sl.includes('initial inquiry'))                          cls = 'qb-status-initial';
   817:       else if (sl.includes('response received') || sl.includes('for support')) cls = 'qb-status-response';
   818:       else if (sl.includes('closed') || sl.startsWith('c -'))          cls = 'qb-status-closed';
   819:       else if (sl.startsWith('s -'))                                    cls = 'qb-status-soft-close';
   820:       else if (sl.startsWith('o -'))                                    cls = 'qb-status-investigating';
   821:       return `<span class="qb-status-badge ${cls}"><span class="qb-status-dot"></span>${esc(s)}</span>`;
   822:     }
   823: 
   824:     // ENHANCEMENT 2: 3-line clamp cell renderer with premium tooltip
   825:     function renderClampedCell(value, isStatus) {
   826:       if (isStatus) return `<td>${renderStatusBadge(String(value))}</td>`;
   827:       const safeVal = esc(String(value == null ? '' : value));
   828:       // Only apply clamp + tooltip for cells that may contain long text
   829:       const rawStr = String(value == null ? '' : value);
   830:       if (rawStr.length <= 60) return `<td><span class="qb-cell-text">${safeVal}</span></td>`;
   831:       return `<td><div class="qb-cell-clamp" data-full="${esc(rawStr)}"><span class="qb-cell-text">${safeVal}</span></div></td>`;
   832:     }
   833: 
   834:     // ENHANCEMENT 3: Virtual Column support
   835:     const vcSettings = opts.virtualColumnSettings || null;
   836:     const vcEnabled = !!(vcSettings && vcSettings.enabled && vcSettings.items && vcSettings.items.length);
   837:     const vcHeader = vcEnabled ? `<th class="qb-vc-th" title="Virtual Column">⬡ ${esc(vcSettings.label || 'Status')}</th>` : '';
   838: 
   839:     // Per-render snap store — buttons reference by index (no JSON parse needed)
   840:     const _qbRowSnaps = [];
   841:     const body = visibleRows.map((r, rowIdx) => {
   842:       const globalRowNum = rowStartIndex + rowIdx + 1;
   843:       const recordId = String(r && r.qbRecordId || 'N/A');
   844: 
   845:       // Virtual Column cell
   846:       let vcCell = '';
   847:       if (vcEnabled) {
   848:         const savedVal = (opts.virtualColumnValues && opts.virtualColumnValues[recordId]) || '';
   849:         const cfStyle = _getConditionalStyle(savedVal, vcSettings.conditionalRules || []);
   850:         const hasVal = !!savedVal;
   851:         const optionsHtml = vcSettings.items.map(item => {
   852:           const itemRule = (vcSettings.conditionalRules || []).find(r => r.value === item) || {};
   853:           const optStyle = itemRule.bgColor
   854:             ? ` style="background:${itemRule.bgColor};color:${itemRule.textColor || '#fff'};"`
   855:             : '';
   856:           return `<option value="${esc(item)}"${optStyle} ${savedVal === item ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(item)}</option>`;
   857:         }).join('');
   858:         // Build pill accent from the matching CF rule when a value is set
   859:         const vcRule = hasVal ? ((vcSettings.conditionalRules || []).find(r => r.value === savedVal) || {}) : {};
   860:         const pillAccent = hasVal && vcRule.bgColor
   861:           ? `background:${_hexToRgba(vcRule.bgColor, 0.22)}!important;border-color:${_hexToRgba(vcRule.bgColor, 0.55)}!important;color:${vcRule.textColor || '#e2e8f0'}!important;`
   862:           : '';
   863:         vcCell = `<td class="qb-vc-cell">
   864:           <select class="qb-vc-select${hasVal ? ' qb-vc-has-value' : ''}" data-record-id="${esc(recordId)}" data-vc-value="${esc(savedVal)}" title="${esc(savedVal || 'Set status…')}" style="${pillAccent}">
   865:             <option value="">—</option>${optionsHtml}
   866:           </select>
   867:         </td>`;
   868:       }
   869: 
   870:       // Apply row-level conditional formatting from virtual column
   871:       const savedVcVal = vcEnabled ? ((opts.virtualColumnValues && opts.virtualColumnValues[recordId]) || '') : '';
   872:       const rowCf = vcEnabled ? _getConditionalStyle(savedVcVal, vcSettings.conditionalRules || []) : {};
   873:       const rowStyleAttr = rowCf.rowStyle ? ` style="${rowCf.rowStyle}"` : '';
   874:       const rowClassAttr = rowCf.rowClass ? ` class="${rowCf.rowClass}"` : '';
   875:       // FIX: cellStyle must go on each <td> individually — tr-level color is overridden by td CSS specificity
   876:       const tdStyle = rowCf.cellStyle ? ` style="${rowCf.cellStyle}"` : '';
   877: 
   878:       // Columns that are always force-clamped regardless of text length
   879:       // (long-text columns that would otherwise blow out the table layout)
   880:       const _CLAMP_COLS = new Set(['case notes','notes','latest update on the case','latest update',
   881:         'last comment','update on the case','short description','description','concern','subject']);
   882:       // Columns that render a duration instead of raw value
   883:       const _DUR_COLS   = new Set(['last update days','last update','update days','age']);
   884: 
   885:       const cells = columns.map((c) => {
   886:         const field = r && r.fields ? r.fields[String(c.id)] : null;
   887:         const rawValue = field && field.value != null ? field.value : 'N/A';
   888:         const normalizedLabel = String(c && c.label || '').trim().toLowerCase();
   889: 
   890:         // Status badge
   891:         if (normalizedLabel === 'case status' || normalizedLabel === 'status') {
   892:           return `<td${tdStyle}>${renderStatusBadge(String(rawValue))}</td>`;
   893:         }
   894:         // Duration columns
   895:         const displayValue = _DUR_COLS.has(normalizedLabel)
   896:           ? toDurationLabel(rawValue)
   897:           : String(rawValue);
   898: 
   899:         const safeVal = esc(displayValue);
   900:         const rawStr  = String(displayValue);
   901: 
   902:         // Force-clamp known long-text columns + any cell over 60 chars
   903:         const forceClamp = _CLAMP_COLS.has(normalizedLabel);
   904:         const isCaseNotes = (normalizedLabel === 'case notes' || normalizedLabel === 'notes'
   905:           || normalizedLabel === 'latest update on the case' || normalizedLabel === 'latest update'
   906:           || normalizedLabel === 'last comment');
   907: 
   908:         // Apply Manila-date highlight for Case Notes column
   909:         if (isCaseNotes && rawStr.length > 0) {
   910:           // Convert EST timestamps → PHT before highlighting/rendering
   911:           const phtStr  = _convertNotesESTtoPHT(rawStr);
   912:           // Pass myQbName so own entries get gray-glass highlight
   913:           const highlighted = _highlightTodayInNotes(phtStr, _CN_TODAY, opts.myQbName || '');
   914:           if (highlighted) {
   915:             return `<td class="qb-col-clamped qb-col-hasnew qb-cn-col"${tdStyle}><div class="qb-cell-clamp qb-cell-hasnew" data-full="${esc(phtStr)}"><span class="qb-cell-text qb-notes-html">${highlighted}</span></div></td>`;
   916:           }
   917:           return `<td class="qb-col-clamped qb-cn-col"${tdStyle}><div class="qb-cell-clamp" data-full="${esc(phtStr)}"><span class="qb-cell-text">${esc(phtStr)}</span></div></td>`;
   918:         }
   919: 
   920:         if (!forceClamp && rawStr.length <= 60) {
   921:           return `<td${tdStyle}><span class="qb-cell-text">${safeVal}</span></td>`;
   922:         }
   923:         return `<td class="qb-col-clamped"${tdStyle}><div class="qb-cell-clamp" data-full="${esc(rawStr)}"><span class="qb-cell-text">${safeVal}</span></div></td>`;
   924:       }).join('');
   925: 
   926:       // Build the row data snapshot for the Case Detail Modal
   927:       // Store snap in JS array — no JSON encode/decode (avoids silent parse failures)
   928:       const rowSnapshot = {
   929:         rowNum:    globalRowNum,
   930:         recordId:  recordId,
   931:         fields:    r && r.fields ? r.fields : {},
   932:         columnMap: columns.reduce((acc, c) => { acc[String(c.id)] = String(c.label || c.id || ''); return acc; }, {}),
   933:       };
   934:       _qbRowSnaps.push(rowSnapshot);
   935:       const rowSnapIdx = _qbRowSnaps.length - 1;
   936: 
   937:       // FIX: Column order — # first, then Virtual Column, then user-defined columns
   938:       var rowDataAttr = esc(JSON.stringify({
   939:         qbRecordId: recordId,
   940:         fields: r && r.fields ? r.fields : {},
   941:       }).replace(/'/g, '&#39;'));
   942:       return `<tr${rowClassAttr}${rowStyleAttr}><td class="qb-row-num-cell"${tdStyle}><button type="button" class="qb-row-num-pill qb-row-detail-btn" data-action="case-view-details" data-rid="${esc(recordId)}" data-row='${rowDataAttr}' data-qb-snap-idx="${rowSnapIdx}" title="View case details" aria-label="View case #${esc(recordId)}">${globalRowNum}</button></td>${vcCell}<td class="qb-case-id"${tdStyle}>${esc(recordId)}</td>${cells}</tr>`;
   943:     }).join('');
   944: 
   945:     const vcThPrefix = vcEnabled ? vcHeader : '';
   946:     host.innerHTML = `<div class="qb-table-inner"><table class="qb-data-table"><thead><tr><th class="qb-row-num-th">#</th>${vcThPrefix}<th>Case #</th>${headers}</tr></thead><tbody>${body}</tbody></table></div>`;
   947: 
   948:     // ── APPLY DYNAMIC CASE NOTES COLUMN WIDTH ─────────────────────────────────
   949:     // Sets CSS variable --qb-cn-w so the qb-cn-col class gets the computed width.
   950:     // Must run AFTER host.innerHTML is set so the host element exists in DOM.
   951:     host.style.setProperty('--qb-cn-w', _cnColWidth + 'px');
   952:     // ── END APPLY WIDTH ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
