   953: 
   954:     // ── PREMIUM TOOLTIP SETUP ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   955:     _setupQbTooltips(host);
   956: 
   957:     // ── CASE DETAIL MODAL — Direct per-button onclick (primary) ─────────────────
   958:     // Belt+suspenders: bind onclick DIRECTLY on each button after innerHTML is set.
   959:     // This is the most reliable approach — no delegation, no bubbling, no closest().
   960:     // root._qbcdOpen is set by _initQbCaseDetailModal() in page-init (below).
   961:     // renderRecords runs AFTER that init, so root._qbcdOpen is always available.
   962:     // ── CASE DETAIL: bind clicks using integer index (no JSON parse) ──────────
   963:     (function _bindRowDetailBtns() {
   964:       // Store snaps on host so delegation can also access them
   965:       host._qbRowSnaps = _qbRowSnaps;
   966:       var btns = host.querySelectorAll('.qb-row-detail-btn');
   967:       for (var bi = 0; bi < btns.length; bi++) {
   968:         (function(btn) {
   969:           var idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-qb-snap-idx'), 10);
   970:           if (isNaN(idx)) return;
   971:           btn.onclick = function(e) {
   972:             e.stopPropagation();
   973:             var snap = _qbRowSnaps[idx];
   974:             if (!snap) return;
   975:             if (typeof root._qbcdOpen === 'function') {
   976:               root._qbcdOpen(snap, _qbRowSnaps);
   977:             }
   978:           };
   979:         })(btns[bi]);
   980:       }
   981:     })();
   982: 
   983:     // ── VIRTUAL COLUMN CHANGE HANDLER (PREMIUM) ───────────────────────────
   984:     if (vcEnabled && typeof opts.onVirtualColumnChange === 'function') {
   985:       host.querySelectorAll('.qb-vc-select').forEach(sel => {
   986:         // Apply initial pill accent if value already set
   987:         _applyVcPillAccent(sel, vcSettings.conditionalRules || []);
   988: 
   989:         sel.addEventListener('change', () => {
   990:           const rid = sel.getAttribute('data-record-id');
   991:           const val = sel.value;
   992:           // Toggle has-value class for CSS pill styling
   993:           sel.classList.toggle('qb-vc-has-value', !!val);
   994:           sel.setAttribute('data-vc-value', val);
   995:           sel.title = val || 'Set status…';
   996:           // Apply accent color from CF rule immediately (no re-render needed)
   997:           _applyVcPillAccent(sel, vcSettings.conditionalRules || []);
   998:           opts.onVirtualColumnChange(rid, val);
   999:         });
  1000:       });
  1001:     }
  1002: 
  1003:     // ── SCROLL POSITION PRESERVATION ──────────────────────────────────────────
  1004:     if (savedScrollTop > 0 || savedScrollLeft > 0) {
  1005:       const newTableInner = host.querySelector('.qb-table-inner');
  1006:       if (newTableInner) {
  1007:         newTableInner.scrollTop = savedScrollTop;
  1008:         newTableInner.scrollLeft = savedScrollLeft;
  1009:       }
  1010:     }
  1011:     if (rows.length > pageSize && typeof opts.onPageChange === 'function') {
  1012:       const pager = document.createElement('div');
  1013:       pager.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:8px;';
  1014:       pager.innerHTML = `
  1015:         <button type="button" class="btn" data-page-nav="prev" ${activePage <= 1 ? 'disabled' : ''}>Prev</button>
  1016:         <span class="small muted">Page ${activePage} of ${totalPages}</span>
  1017:         <button type="button" class="btn" data-page-nav="next" ${activePage >= totalPages ? 'disabled' : ''}>Next</button>
  1018:       `;
  1019:       host.appendChild(pager);
  1020:       pager.querySelectorAll('[data-page-nav]').forEach((btn) => {
  1021:         btn.onclick = () => {
  1022:           const direction = btn.getAttribute('data-page-nav');
  1023:           const nextPage = direction === 'next' ? activePage + 1 : activePage - 1;
  1024:           opts.onPageChange(nextPage);
  1025:         };
  1026:       });
  1027:     }
  1028:   }
  1029: 
  1030:   // ── PREMIUM TOOLTIP ENGINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1031:   // Singleton tooltip DOM node — created once, reused on hover
  1032:   let _qbTooltipEl = null;
  1033:   function _getTooltip() {
  1034:     if (_qbTooltipEl) return _qbTooltipEl;
  1035:     _qbTooltipEl = document.createElement('div');
  1036:     _qbTooltipEl.className = 'qb-cell-tooltip';
  1037:     _qbTooltipEl.setAttribute('role', 'tooltip');
  1038:     _qbTooltipEl.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
  1039:     document.body.appendChild(_qbTooltipEl);
  1040:     return _qbTooltipEl;
  1041:   }
  1042: 
  1043:   function _setupQbTooltips(host) {
  1044:     const clampEls = host.querySelectorAll('.qb-cell-clamp');
  1045:     clampEls.forEach(el => {
  1046:       el.addEventListener('mouseenter', _qbTooltipEnter);
  1047:       el.addEventListener('mousemove', _qbTooltipMove);
  1048:       el.addEventListener('mouseleave', _qbTooltipLeave);
  1049:     });
  1050:   }
  1051: 
  1052:   function _qbTooltipEnter(e) {
  1053:     const el = e.currentTarget;
  1054:     // data-full already stores PHT-converted text (set during renderRecords).
  1055:     // Do NOT run _convertNotesESTtoPHT again — that would double-convert.
  1056:     const full = el.getAttribute('data-full') || '';
  1057:     // Don't show tooltip if content isn't clamped (short text fits in 3 lines)
  1058:     if (!full || full.trim().length < 2) return;
  1059:     // Only show tooltip if text is actually truncated
  1060:     const clamped = el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight + 4;
  1061:     const hasLongContent = full.length > 80;
  1062:     if (!clamped && !hasLongContent) return;
  1063:     const tip = _getTooltip();
  1064: 
  1065:     // For Case Notes cells: highlight today's Manila dates in the tooltip too
  1066:     const todayStr = (typeof _getManilaToday === 'function') ? _getManilaToday() : '';
  1067:     if (todayStr) {
  1068:       // Also pass myQbName for consistent gray-glass on own entries in tooltip
  1069:       const highlighted = (typeof _highlightTodayInNotes === 'function')
  1070:         ? _highlightTodayInNotes(full, todayStr, window._qbMyNameCache || '')
  1071:         : null;
  1072:       if (highlighted) {
  1073:         tip.innerHTML = highlighted.replace(/\n/g,'<br>').replace(/\r/g,'');
  1074:         tip.classList.add('is-visible');
  1075:         _positionTooltip(tip, e);
  1076:         return;
  1077:       }
  1078:     }
  1079: 
  1080:     // Default: plain text with newlines
  1081:     tip.innerHTML = full.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/\n/g,'<br>').replace(/\r/g,'');
  1082:     tip.classList.add('is-visible');
  1083:     _positionTooltip(tip, e);
  1084:   }
  1085:   function _qbTooltipMove(e) {
  1086:     const tip = _getTooltip();
  1087:     _positionTooltip(tip, e);
  1088:   }
  1089:   function _qbTooltipLeave() {
  1090:     const tip = _getTooltip();
  1091:     tip.classList.remove('is-visible');
  1092:   }
  1093:   function _positionTooltip(tip, e) {
  1094:     const GAP = 14;
  1095:     const vw = window.innerWidth, vh = window.innerHeight;
  1096:     tip.style.left = '0'; tip.style.top = '0'; // reset to measure
  1097:     const tw = tip.offsetWidth || 280, th = tip.offsetHeight || 60;
  1098:     let x = e.clientX + GAP, y = e.clientY + GAP;
  1099:     if (x + tw > vw - 10) x = e.clientX - tw - GAP;
  1100:     if (y + th > vh - 10) y = e.clientY - th - GAP;
  1101:     tip.style.left = `${Math.max(8, x)}px`;
  1102:     tip.style.top  = `${Math.max(8, y)}px`;
  1103:   }
  1104: 
  1105:   // ── VIRTUAL COLUMN CONDITIONAL FORMATTING HELPER ───────────────────────────
  1106:   // PREMIUM DESIGN: Left accent bar only on <tr>. Background tint + typography on each <td>.
  1107:   // This eliminates full-row garish background while keeping clean enterprise look.
  1108:   function _getConditionalStyle(value, rules) {
  1109:     if (!value || !Array.isArray(rules) || !rules.length) return {};
  1110:     const rule = rules.find(r => String(r.value || '') === String(value));
  1111:     if (!rule) return {};
  1112: 
  1113:     const hasBg  = !!(rule.bgColor);
  1114:     const hasTxt = !!(rule.textColor);
  1115: 
  1116:     // <tr> gets ONLY the left accent bar — no background fill on the row itself.
  1117:     // Full-row fill is ugly on wide tables and conflicts with zebra striping themes.
  1118:     const rowStyle = hasBg
  1119:       ? `box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 ${rule.bgColor}!important`
  1120:       : '';
  1121: 
  1122:     // All styling (tint + typography) goes on each <td> individually.
  1123:     // tr-level color/bg is always overridden by td-level CSS specificity — must be per-cell.
  1124:     const cellParts = [];
  1125:     if (hasBg) {
  1126:       const tint = _hexToRgba(rule.bgColor, 0.10);
  1127:       cellParts.push(`background:${tint}!important`);
  1128:     }
  1129:     if (hasTxt) cellParts.push(`color:${rule.textColor}!important`);
  1130:     if (rule.fontWeight) cellParts.push(`font-weight:${rule.fontWeight}!important`);
  1131:     if (rule.fontSize)   cellParts.push(`font-size:${rule.fontSize}!important`);
  1132:     if (rule.fontStyle)  cellParts.push(`font-style:${rule.fontStyle}!important`);
  1133:     if (rule.textDecoration) cellParts.push(`text-decoration:${rule.textDecoration}!important`);
  1134:     if (rule.textAlign)  cellParts.push(`text-align:${rule.textAlign}!important`);
  1135:     const cellStyle = cellParts.join(';');
  1136: 
  1137:     // VC dropdown cell: slightly stronger accent tint + right divider for visual anchoring
  1138:     const vcCellStyle = hasBg
  1139:       ? `background:${_hexToRgba(rule.bgColor, 0.20)}!important;border-right:1px solid ${_hexToRgba(rule.bgColor, 0.35)}!important`
  1140:       : '';
  1141: 
  1142:     return {
  1143:       rowStyle,    // left accent bar only — on <tr>
  1144:       cellStyle,   // tint + typography — applied to every <td>
  1145:       vcCellStyle, // stronger accent on the VC dropdown <td>
  1146:       rowClass: (rowStyle || cellStyle) ? 'qb-cf-row' : ''
  1147:     };
  1148:   }
  1149: 
  1150: 
  1151:   // Helper: convert hex color to rgba string
  1152:   function _hexToRgba(hex, alpha) {
  1153:     try {
  1154:       const h = hex.replace('#', '');
  1155:       const r = parseInt(h.substring(0,2), 16);
  1156:       const g = parseInt(h.substring(2,4), 16);
  1157:       const b = parseInt(h.substring(4,6), 16);
  1158:       if (isNaN(r) || isNaN(g) || isNaN(b)) return hex;
  1159:       return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
  1160:     } catch(_) { return hex; }
  1161:   }
  1162: 
  1163:   // Apply dynamic accent color + pill styling to a .qb-vc-select element
  1164:   // based on its current value and the CF rules. Called on render + on change.
  1165:   function _applyVcPillAccent(sel, rules) {
  1166:     if (!sel) return;
  1167:     const val = sel.value;
  1168:     if (!val) {
  1169:       sel.style.cssText = '';
  1170:       sel.classList.remove('qb-vc-has-value');
  1171:       return;
  1172:     }
  1173:     sel.classList.add('qb-vc-has-value');
  1174:     const rule = Array.isArray(rules) ? rules.find(r => String(r.value || '') === val) : null;
  1175:     if (rule && rule.bgColor) {
  1176:       const bg = _hexToRgba(rule.bgColor, 0.22);
  1177:       const border = _hexToRgba(rule.bgColor, 0.55);
  1178:       const textClr = rule.textColor || '#e2e8f0';
  1179:       sel.style.cssText = `background:${bg}!important;border-color:${border}!important;color:${textClr}!important;`;
  1180:     } else {
  1181:       // Has value but no CF rule — use default accent
  1182:       sel.style.cssText = 'border-color:rgba(56,189,248,.35)!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;';
  1183:     }
  1184:   }
  1185: 
  1186:   function renderEmptyState(root, message) {
  1187:     const host = root.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
  1188:     const meta = root.querySelector('#qbDataMeta');
  1189:     if (meta) meta.textContent = 'No Quickbase Records Found';
  1190:     if (host) host.innerHTML = `<div class="card pad"><div class="small muted">${esc(String(message || 'No records loaded.'))}</div></div>`;
  1191:   }
  1192: 
  1193: 
  1194:   function shouldApplyInitialFilters(searchInput) {
  1195:     return String(searchInput || '').trim().length > 0;
  1196:   }
  1197: 
  1198:   function filterRecordsBySearch(payload, searchTerm) {
  1199:     const source = payload && typeof payload === 'object' ? payload : {};
  1200:     const columns = Array.isArray(source.columns) ? source.columns : [];
  1201:     const records = Array.isArray(source.records) ? source.records : [];
  1202:     const term = String(searchTerm || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  1203:     if (!term) {
  1204:       return { columns, records };
  1205:     }
  1206: 
  1207:     const filtered = records.filter((row) => {
  1208:       const caseId = String(row && row.qbRecordId || '').toLowerCase();
  1209:       if (caseId.includes(term)) return true;
  1210:       return columns.some((col) => {
  1211:         const fid = String(col && col.id || '').trim();
  1212:         if (!fid) return false;
  1213:         const cellValue = row && row.fields && row.fields[fid] ? row.fields[fid].value : '';
  1214:         return String(cellValue == null ? '' : cellValue).toLowerCase().includes(term);
  1215:       });
  1216:     });
  1217: 
  1218:     return { columns, records: filtered };
  1219:   }
  1220: 
  1221:   function filterRecordsByCounter(payload, counter) {
  1222:     const source = payload && typeof payload === 'object' ? payload : {};
  1223:     const columns = Array.isArray(source.columns) ? source.columns : [];
  1224:     const records = Array.isArray(source.records) ? source.records : [];
  1225:     const activeFilter = counterToFilter(counter);
  1226:     if (!activeFilter) return { columns, records };
  1227: 
  1228:     const targetFieldId = String(activeFilter.fieldId || '').trim();
  1229:     const matcherValue = String(activeFilter.value || '').toLowerCase();
  1230:     const op = String(activeFilter.operator || 'EX').toUpperCase();
  1231: 
  1232:     const filtered = records.filter((record) => {
  1233:       const fields = record && record.fields ? record.fields : {};
  1234:       const field = fields[targetFieldId] || null;
  1235:       const sourceValue = String(field && field.value != null ? field.value : '').toLowerCase();
  1236:       if (op === 'XEX') return sourceValue !== matcherValue;
  1237:       if (op === 'CT') return sourceValue.includes(matcherValue);
  1238:       return sourceValue === matcherValue;
  1239:     });
  1240: 
  1241:     return { columns, records: filtered };
  1242:   }
  1243: 
  1244:   function shouldApplyServerFilters(options) {
  1245:     const opts = options && typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};
  1246:     return opts.applyFilters !== false;
  1247:   }
  1248: 
  1249:   if (window.__MUMS_TEST_HOOKS__) {
  1250:     window.__MUMS_TEST_HOOKS__.myQuickbase = {
  1251:       shouldApplyInitialFilters,
  1252:       filterRecordsBySearch,
  1253:       filterRecordsByCounter,
  1254:       shouldApplyServerFilters,
  1255:       getQuickbaseSettingsLocalKey,
  1256:       getQuickbaseTabsLocalKey,
  1257:       getQuickbaseTabSettingsLocalKey,
  1258:       readQuickbaseSettingsLocal,
  1259:       writeQuickbaseSettingsLocal,
  1260:       normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs,
  1261:       createDefaultSettings,
  1262:       parseQuickbaseReportUrl,
  1263:       hasPersistedQuickbaseTabs,
  1264:       hasUsableQuickbaseSettings,
  1265:       chooseInitialQuickbaseSettingsSource
  1266:     };
  1267:   }
  1268: 
  1269:   window.Pages.my_quickbase = async function(root) {
  1270:     // ── STALE INSTANCE KILL ────────────────────────────────────────────
  1271:     // If a previous invocation of this page left a cleanup registered on root
  1272:     // (e.g. user navigated away then back while an interval was still live),
  1273:     // destroy it NOW — before any new state is created.
  1274:     // Without this, two independent closures share the same DOM and call
  1275:     // renderTabBar() with different state.activeTabIndex values, producing the
  1276:     // "tabs alternate every ~2 s" bug.
  1277:     if (typeof root._cleanup === 'function') {
  1278:       try { root._cleanup(); } catch (_) {}
  1279:       root._cleanup = null;
  1280:     }
  1281: 
  1282:     // ── LAYOUT GUARD — SYNCHRONOUS SETUP ──────────────────────────────
  1283:     // app.js calls window.Pages[id](main) WITHOUT await. Our function has
  1284:     // multiple awaits before root._cleanup is ever set, so app.js's cleanup
  1285:     // capture fires while cleanup is still null — meaning cleanup NEVER runs
  1286:     // when the user navigates away. We protect against this with THREE layers:
  1287:     //
  1288:     //  Layer 1 – Inline styles (not CSS class): Overflow/padding are set as
  1289:     //    root.style properties. Inline styles are unambiguously ours to clear.
  1290:     //
  1291:     //  Layer 2 – MutationObserver on root.childList: When app.js calls
  1292:     //    main.innerHTML = '' (navigation), our shell #qbPageShell disappears.
  1293:     //    The observer fires SYNCHRONOUSLY — calls root._cleanup() immediately,
  1294:     //    guaranteed regardless of whether app.js captured the cleanup reference.
  1295:     //
  1296:     //  Layer 3 – Preliminary root._cleanup set SYNCHRONOUSLY before first
  1297:     //    await so that app.js DOES capture a real cleanup function on the same
  1298:     //    microtask tick. setupAutoRefresh() chains onto this later.
  1299:     //
  1300:     // CSS .page-qb class is still added for theme/skin rules but must NOT
  1301:     // be the sole carrier of overflow/padding — those must be inline.
  1302:     root.classList.add('page-qb');
  1303:     root.style.padding  = '0';
  1304:     root.style.overflow = 'clip';     // Does NOT trap position:fixed children
  1305: 
  1306:     // ── PROMOTE TIMER VARS — must be declared BEFORE first await so that
  1307:     // the preliminary cleanup (below) and MutationObserver can reference them.
  1308:     let quickbaseRefreshTimer = null;
  1309:     let autosaveTimer         = null;
  1310:     let quickbaseLoadInFlight = null;
  1311:     let lastQuickbaseLoadAt   = 0;
  1312:     let modalBindingsActive   = false;
  1313: 
  1314:     // ── PRELIMINARY CLEANUP (Layer 3) ─────────────────────────────────
  1315:     // Set on root SYNCHRONOUSLY — app.js runs `cleanup = main._cleanup`
  1316:     // on the same tick as calling window.Pages[id](main), so this reference
  1317:     // IS captured.  setupAutoRefresh() will wrap this via its prevCleanup chain.
  1318:     root._cleanup = function _qbPreliminaryCleanup() {
  1319:       try { if (quickbaseRefreshTimer) { clearInterval(quickbaseRefreshTimer); quickbaseRefreshTimer = null; } } catch (_) {}
  1320:       try { if (autosaveTimer) { clearTimeout(autosaveTimer); autosaveTimer = null; } } catch (_) {}
  1321:       try { root.style.padding  = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1322:       try { root.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1323:       try { document.body.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1324:       try { root.classList.remove('page-qb'); } catch (_) {}
  1325:     };
  1326: 
  1327:     // ── MUTATION OBSERVER (Layer 2) ────────────────────────────────────
  1328:     // Install synchronously. When #qbPageShell vanishes (navigation), fire the
  1329:     // FULL root._cleanup() — not just style resets — so timers are always killed.
  1330:     let _qbLayoutGuardObs = null;
  1331:     try {
  1332:       _qbLayoutGuardObs = new MutationObserver(function() {
  1333:         if (!root.querySelector('#qbPageShell')) {
  1334:           // Shell is gone — app.js navigated away. Run FULL cleanup NOW.
  1335:           try {
  1336:             if (typeof root._cleanup === 'function') { root._cleanup(); root._cleanup = null; }
  1337:           } catch (_) {}
  1338:           // Belt-and-suspenders: ensure styles are cleared even if cleanup threw.
  1339:           try { root.style.padding  = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1340:           try { root.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1341:           try { document.body.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  1342:           try { root.classList.remove('page-qb'); } catch (_) {}
  1343:           try { if (_qbLayoutGuardObs) { _qbLayoutGuardObs.disconnect(); _qbLayoutGuardObs = null; } } catch (_) {}
  1344:         }
  1345:       });
  1346:       _qbLayoutGuardObs.observe(root, { childList: true });
  1347:     } catch (_) {}
  1348: 
  1349:     const AUTO_REFRESH_MS = 300000; // 5-min auto-refresh — was 60s (5× reduction). Egress optimization for Free Plan.
  1350:     const me = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  1351:     const currentUserId = me && me.id;
  1352:     const tabNamespace = resolveTabStorageNamespace(root);
  1353:     const isSupportStudio = isSupportStudioNamespace(tabNamespace);
  1354:     const tabManager = (window.TabManager && typeof window.TabManager.init === 'function')
  1355:       ? window.TabManager.init({ userId: currentUserId, apiBaseUrl: '/api', namespace: tabNamespace })
  1356:       : null;
  1357:     let profile = (me && window.Store && Store.getProfile) ? (Store.getProfile(me.id) || {}) : {};
  1358: 
  1359:     // ── GLOBAL QB SETTINGS — fetched once on page load ─────────────────────
  1360:     // Report Config (realm/tableId/qid/token) now comes from Global QB Settings.
  1361:     // Per-tab settings only customize columns + filters.
  1362:     let globalQbSettings = { reportLink: '', realm: '', tableId: '', qid: '', customColumns: [], filterConfig: [], filterMatch: 'ALL' };
  1363:     let studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings = {};
  1364:     async function fetchGlobalQbSettings() {
  1365:       try {
  1366:         const tok = window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function' ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  1367:         const endpoint = isSupportStudio ? '/api/studio/qb_settings_global' : '/api/settings/global_quickbase';
  1368:         const r = await fetch(endpoint, { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
  1369:         const d = await r.json();
  1370:         if (d.ok && d.settings) {
  1371:           globalQbSettings = Object.assign(globalQbSettings, d.settings);
  1372:           if (isSupportStudio) {
  1373:             studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings = normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(d.settings, d.settings);
  1374:             // Explicitly persist an isolated studio cache key.
  1375:             writeQuickbaseSettingsLocal('support_studio', studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings, 'quickbase_s');
  1376:           }
  1377:         }
  1378:       } catch (_) {}
  1379:     }
  1380:     await fetchGlobalQbSettings();
  1381: 
  1382:     async function refreshProfileFromCloud() {
  1383:       if (!me || !window.CloudUsers || typeof window.CloudUsers.me !== 'function') return;
  1384:       try {
  1385:         const out = await window.CloudUsers.me();
  1386:         const cloudProfile = out && out.ok && out.profile && typeof out.profile === 'object' ? out.profile : null;
  1387:         if (!cloudProfile) return;
  1388:         profile = cloudProfile;
  1389:         if (window.Store && typeof Store.setProfile === 'function') {
  1390:           Store.setProfile(me.id, Object.assign({}, cloudProfile, { updatedAt: Date.now() }));
  1391:         }
  1392:       } catch (_) {}
  1393:     }
  1394: 
  1395:     await refreshProfileFromCloud();
  1396:     profile = (me && window.Store && Store.getProfile) ? (Store.getProfile(me.id) || {}) : {};
  1397: 
  1398:     // FIX: If Store has no qb_name, check Store.getUsers() first (populated by
  1399:     // refreshIntoLocalStore which maps qb_name into the users array).
  1400:     // Then fallback to a direct /api/users/me fetch.
  1401:     // This handles: SA sets qb_name → realtime sync arrives → user opens My QB.
  1402:     if (me && !String(profile.qb_name || '').trim()) {
  1403:       try {
  1404:         // 1. Check Store.getUsers() — refreshIntoLocalStore maps qb_name here
  1405:         const storeUser = window.Store && Store.getUsers
  1406:           ? (Store.getUsers() || []).find(u => u && String(u.id || '') === String(me.id || ''))
  1407:           : null;
  1408:         if (storeUser && String(storeUser.qb_name || '').trim()) {
  1409:           profile = Object.assign({}, profile, { qb_name: storeUser.qb_name });
  1410:         }
  1411:       } catch(_) {}
  1412:     }
  1413:     if (me && !String(profile.qb_name || '').trim()) {
  1414:       try {
  1415:         // 2. Final fallback: direct API call — catches cold-start / stale Store
  1416:         const tok = window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function' ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  1417:         const r = await fetch('/api/users/me', { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + tok } });
  1418:         const d = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
  1419:         if (d.ok && d.profile && String(d.profile.qb_name || '').trim()) {
  1420:           profile = Object.assign({}, profile, { qb_name: d.profile.qb_name });
  1421:           if (window.Store && typeof Store.setProfile === 'function') {
  1422:             Store.setProfile(me.id, Object.assign({}, profile, { updatedAt: Date.now() }));
  1423:           }
  1424:         }
  1425:       } catch(_) {}
  1426:     }
  1427: 
  1428:     // ── QB NAME GUARD — blocks ALL data loading when no qb_name is assigned ──
  1429:     // Privacy rule: a user MUST have a Quickbase Name assigned before they can
  1430:     // see ANY records. This applies to every role including SUPER_ADMIN.
  1431:     // Without this guard the monitoring API returns all records for SUPER_ADMIN
  1432:     // (data leak). The correct fix is on the frontend: block the call entirely.
  1433:     const _userQbName = String(profile.qb_name || '').trim();
  1434:     // Cache globally so tooltip handler can access it without re-reading profile
  1435:     try { window._qbMyNameCache = _userQbName; } catch(_) {}
  1436:     if (!_userQbName) {
  1437:       root.classList.add('page-qb');
  1438:       root.style.padding  = '0';
  1439:       root.style.overflow = 'clip';
  1440:       root.innerHTML = `
  1441:         <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;min-height:320px;gap:16px;padding:40px;text-align:center;">
  1442:           <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2"/><path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"/></svg>
  1443:           <div style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);">Quickbase Name Not Assigned</div>
  1444:           <div style="font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);max-width:380px;line-height:1.6;">
  1445:             Your Quickbase Name has not been configured yet.<br>
  1446:             Contact your <strong style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Super Admin</strong> to assign your name in User Management → Edit User → Quickbase Name.
  1447:           </div>
  1448:         </div>`;
  1449:       root._cleanup = function() {
  1450:         try { root.style.padding = ''; } catch(_) {}
  1451:         try { root.style.overflow = ''; } catch(_) {}
  1452:         try { root.classList.remove('page-qb'); } catch(_) {}
  1453:       };
  1454:       return;
  1455:     }
  1456: 
  1457:     const cloudMe = window.me && typeof window.me === 'object' ? window.me : {};
  1458:     const profileWithCloudFallback = Object.assign({}, cloudMe, profile);
  1459:     if (
  1460:       cloudMe
  1461:       && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(cloudMe, 'quickbase_settings')
  1462:       && hasUsableQuickbaseSettings(cloudMe.quickbase_settings)
  1463:     ) {
  1464:       profileWithCloudFallback.quickbase_settings = cloudMe.quickbase_settings;
  1465:     }
  1466:     const quickbaseConfig = getProfileQuickbaseConfig(profileWithCloudFallback);
  1467:     const windowMeQuickbaseSettingsRaw = cloudMe && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(cloudMe, 'quickbase_settings')
  1468:       ? cloudMe.quickbase_settings
  1469:       : null;
  1470:     const parsedWindowMeQuickbaseSettings = parseQuickbaseSettings(windowMeQuickbaseSettingsRaw);
  1471:     const localQuickbaseSettings = readQuickbaseSettingsLocal(me && me.id, tabNamespace);
  1472:     const backendQuickbaseSettings = normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(profileWithCloudFallback.quickbase_settings, quickbaseConfig);
  1473:     const windowMeQuickbaseSettings = normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(windowMeQuickbaseSettingsRaw, quickbaseConfig);
  1474:     const quickbaseSettings = isSupportStudio
  1475:       ? normalizeQuickbaseSettingsWithTabs(
  1476:         (studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings && Object.keys(studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings).length
  1477:           ? studioGlobalQuickbaseSettings
  1478:           : globalQbSettings),
  1479:         globalQbSettings
  1480:       )
  1481:       : chooseInitialQuickbaseSettingsSource({
  1482:         backendQuickbaseSettings,
  1483:         windowMeQuickbaseSettings,
  1484:         localQuickbaseSettings
  1485:       });
  1486:     const initialTabMeta = quickbaseSettings.tabs[quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex] || quickbaseSettings.tabs[0] || createTabMeta({}, { tabName: 'Main Report' });
  1487:     const initialTabId = String(initialTabMeta.id || '').trim();
  1488:     const initialTabSettings = createDefaultSettings((quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[initialTabId]) || {}, {});
  1489:     const initialLink = String(initialTabSettings.reportLink || '').trim();
  1490:     const parsedFromLink = parseQuickbaseLink(initialLink);
  1491:     const state = {
  1492:       quickbaseSettings,
  1493:       activeTabIndex: quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex,
  1494:       modalDraft: null,
  1495:       tabName: String(initialTabMeta.tabName || 'Main Report').trim(),
  1496:       reportLink: initialLink,
  1497:       qid: String(initialTabSettings.qid || parsedFromLink.qid || '').trim(),
  1498:       tableId: String(initialTabSettings.tableId || parsedFromLink.tableId || '').trim(),
  1499:       realm: String(initialTabSettings.realm || parsedFromLink.realm || '').trim(),
  1500:       customColumns: Array.isArray(initialTabSettings.customColumns) ? initialTabSettings.customColumns.map((v) => String(v)) : [],
  1501:       customFilters: normalizeFilters(initialTabSettings.customFilters),
  1502:       filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(initialTabSettings.filterMatch),
  1503:       dashboardCounters: normalizeDashboardCounters(initialTabSettings.dashboard_counters),
  1504:       allAvailableFields: [],
  1505:       isSaving: false,
  1506:       activeCounterIndex: -1,
  1507:       searchTerm: '',
  1508:       searchDebounceTimer: null,
  1509:       baseRecords: [],
  1510:       rawPayload: { columns: [], records: [] },
  1511:       currentPayload: { columns: [], records: [] },
  1512:       hasUserSearched: false,
  1513:       didInitialDefaultRender: false,
  1514:       isDefaultReportMode: false,
  1515:       currentPage: 1,
  1516:       pageSize: 100,
  1517:       qbCache: {},
  1518:       _tabDataCache: {},
  1519:       settingsModalView: 'custom-columns',  // report-config moved to Global QB Settings
  1520:       settingsEditingTabId: '',
  1521:       virtualColumn: deepClone(initialTabSettings.virtualColumn || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] }),
  1522:       virtualColumnValues: {}  // { [recordId]: selectedValue } — persisted per-tab in localStorage
  1523:     };
  1524: 
  1525:     function syncTabManagerFromState(tabId) {
  1526:       if (!tabManager) return;
  1527:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
  1528:       if (!safeTabId) return;
  1529:       const tabMeta = Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings.tabs)
  1530:         ? state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.find((tab) => String(tab && tab.id || '').trim() === safeTabId)
  1531:         : null;
  1532:       const tabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId]
  1533:         ? state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId]
  1534:         : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  1535:       tabManager.updateTabLocal(safeTabId, Object.assign({}, tabSettings, {
  1536:         tabName: String(tabMeta && tabMeta.tabName || tabSettings.tabName || 'New Tab').trim()
  1537:       }));
  1538:     }
  1539: 
  1540:     const cleanupHandlers = [];
  1541:     // NOTE: quickbaseRefreshTimer, autosaveTimer, quickbaseLoadInFlight,
  1542:     // lastQuickbaseLoadAt, modalBindingsActive are declared ABOVE (before the
  1543:     // first await) so that the preliminary root._cleanup and MutationObserver
  1544:     // can reference them.  Do NOT re-declare them here.
  1545: 
  1546:     const QUICKBASE_CACHE_TTL_MS = 55 * 1000; // 55s — slightly under 60s refresh interval
  1547:     const QUICKBASE_BACKGROUND_LIMIT = 500;
  1548: 
  1549:     function getQuickbaseCacheKey({ tabId, tableId, qid, filters, filterMatch }) {
  1550:       const hashBase = JSON.stringify({ tabId, tableId, qid, filters, filterMatch });
  1551:       return `qb_cache:${hashBase}`;
  1552:     }
  1553: 
  1554:     function readQuickbaseCache(cacheKey, tabId) {
  1555:       const now = Date.now();
  1556:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
  1557:       if (safeTabId && state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[safeTabId]) {
  1558:         const tabEntry = state._tabDataCache[safeTabId][cacheKey];
  1559:         if (tabEntry && (now - tabEntry.savedAt) < QUICKBASE_CACHE_TTL_MS) return tabEntry.payload;
  1560:       }
  1561:       const memoryEntry = state.qbCache[cacheKey];
  1562:       if (memoryEntry && (now - memoryEntry.savedAt) < QUICKBASE_CACHE_TTL_MS) return memoryEntry.payload;
  1563:       try {
  1564:         const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(cacheKey);
  1565:         if (!raw) return null;
  1566:         const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
  1567:         if (!parsed || (now - Number(parsed.savedAt || 0)) >= QUICKBASE_CACHE_TTL_MS) {
  1568:           sessionStorage.removeItem(cacheKey);
  1569:           return null;
  1570:         }
  1571:         state.qbCache[cacheKey] = parsed;
  1572:         return parsed.payload || null;
  1573:       } catch (_) {
  1574:         return null;
  1575:       }
  1576:     }
  1577: 
  1578:     function writeQuickbaseCache(cacheKey, payload, tabId) {
  1579:       const entry = { savedAt: Date.now(), payload };
  1580:       state.qbCache[cacheKey] = entry;
  1581:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
  1582:       if (safeTabId) {
  1583:         if (!state._tabDataCache || typeof state._tabDataCache !== 'object') state._tabDataCache = {};
  1584:         if (!state._tabDataCache[safeTabId] || typeof state._tabDataCache[safeTabId] !== 'object') {
  1585:           state._tabDataCache[safeTabId] = {};
  1586:         }
  1587:         state._tabDataCache[safeTabId][cacheKey] = entry;
  1588:       }
  1589:       try {
  1590:         sessionStorage.setItem(cacheKey, JSON.stringify(entry));
  1591:       } catch (_) {}
  1592:     }
  1593: 
  1594:     function mergeRecordsById(existingRecords, incomingRecords) {
  1595:       const merged = [];
  1596:       const seen = new Set();
  1597:       (Array.isArray(existingRecords) ? existingRecords : []).concat(Array.isArray(incomingRecords) ? incomingRecords : []).forEach((record) => {
  1598:         const id = String(record && record.qbRecordId || '');
  1599:         if (!id || seen.has(id)) return;
  1600:         seen.add(id);
  1601:         merged.push(record);
  1602:       });
  1603:       return merged;
  1604:     }
  1605: 
  1606:     // FIX[Bug1]: Seed TabManager with all tabs from Supabase state so isolation works correctly.
  1607:     // TabManager uses a separate localStorage key; tabs loaded from Supabase profile won't be in
  1608:     // TabManager's internal Map unless we explicitly seed them here.
  1609:     if (tabManager && Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings.tabs) && me && me.id) {
  1610:       const lsKey = isSupportStudio
  1611:         ? 'mums_quickbase_tabs_support_studio'
  1612:         : `mums_quickbase_tabs_${String(me.id || 'anonymous').trim()}`;
  1613:       try {
  1614:         const raw = window.localStorage && window.localStorage.getItem(lsKey);
  1615:         const existingRows = JSON.parse(raw || '[]');
  1616:         const safeRows = Array.isArray(existingRows) ? existingRows : [];
  1617:         let changed = false;
  1618:         state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.forEach((tab) => {
  1619:           const tabId = String(tab && tab.id || '').trim();
  1620:           if (!tabId) return;
  1621:           const alreadyExists = safeRows.some((r) => String(r && r.tab_id || '').trim() === tabId);
  1622:           if (!alreadyExists) {
  1623:             const tabSettings = (state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]) || {};
  1624:             safeRows.push({
  1625:               tab_id: tabId,
  1626:               tab_name: String(tab.tabName || 'Report').trim(),
  1627:               settings_json: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(tabSettings)),
  1628:               meta: { createdAt: Date.now(), updatedAt: Date.now() }
  1629:             });
  1630:             changed = true;
  1631:           }
  1632:         });
  1633:         if (changed && window.localStorage) {
  1634:           window.localStorage.setItem(lsKey, JSON.stringify(safeRows));
  1635:         }
  1636:       } catch (_) {}
  1637:       // Reload TabManager from updated localStorage so getTab() returns correct data
  1638:       tabManager.init({ userId: me.id, apiBaseUrl: '/api', namespace: tabNamespace });
  1639:       // Now push latest Supabase settings into TabManager for each tab
  1640:       state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.forEach((tab) => {
  1641:         const tabId = String(tab && tab.id || '').trim();
  1642:         if (!tabId) return;
  1643:         const tabSettings = (state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]) || {};
  1644:         // FIX: Always seed ALL tabs into TabManager — not just those with reportLink/qid/tableId.
  1645:         // The old gate was silently dropping virtualColumn for bypass tabs and bare tabs.
  1646:         // settingsByTabId from backendQuickbaseSettings (mums_profiles) is authoritative.
  1647:         tabManager.updateTabLocal(tabId, Object.assign({}, tabSettings, {
  1648:           tabName: String(tab.tabName || 'Report').trim()
  1649:         }));
  1650:       });
  1651:     }
  1652: 
  1653:     // FIX[Bug1]: Ensure active tab state is immediately aligned after profile load.
  1654:     state.activeTabIndex = quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex;
  1655:     state.quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex = quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex;
  1656:     syncStateFromActiveTab();
  1657: 
  1658:     function getActiveTabMeta() {
  1659:       const tabs = Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings && state.quickbaseSettings.tabs) ? state.quickbaseSettings.tabs : [];
  1660:       if (!tabs.length) {
  1661:         const firstTab = createTabMeta({}, { tabName: 'Main Report' });
  1662:         state.quickbaseSettings = {
  1663:           activeTabIndex: 0,
  1664:           tabs: [firstTab],
  1665:           settingsByTabId: { [firstTab.id]: createDefaultSettings({}, {}) }
  1666:         };
  1667:       }
  1668:       const safeTabs = state.quickbaseSettings.tabs;
  1669:       const safeIndex = Math.min(Math.max(Number(state.activeTabIndex || 0), 0), safeTabs.length - 1);
  1670:       state.activeTabIndex = safeIndex;
  1671:       state.quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex = safeIndex;
  1672:       return safeTabs[safeIndex];
  1673:     }
  1674: 
  1675:     function getActiveTabId() {
  1676:       return String((getActiveTabMeta() || {}).id || '').trim();
  1677:     }
  1678: 
  1679:     function getActiveTab() {
  1680:       const meta = getActiveTabMeta();
  1681:       const tabId = String(meta && meta.id || '').trim();
  1682:       const settings = createDefaultSettings((state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]) || {}, {});
  1683:       return Object.assign({}, meta, settings);
  1684:     }
  1685: 
  1686:     function getActiveTabKey() {
  1687:       const activeTabId = getActiveTabId();
  1688:       return String(activeTabId || state.activeTabIndex);
  1689:     }
  1690: 
  1691:     function getActiveSearchTerm() {
  1692:       if (!state.quickbaseSettings || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[state.activeTabIndex]) return '';
  1693:       if (!state.searchByTab || typeof state.searchByTab !== 'object') state.searchByTab = {};
  1694:       return String(state.searchByTab[getActiveTabKey()] || '').trim();
  1695:     }
  1696: 
  1697:     function setActiveSearchTerm(value) {
  1698:       if (!state.quickbaseSettings || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[state.activeTabIndex]) return;
  1699:       if (!state.searchByTab || typeof state.searchByTab !== 'object') state.searchByTab = {};
  1700:       state.searchByTab[getActiveTabKey()] = String(value || '').trim();
  1701:     }
  1702: 
  1703:     function getActiveUserSearched() {
  1704:       if (!state.quickbaseSettings || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[state.activeTabIndex]) return false;
  1705:       if (!state.userSearchedByTab || typeof state.userSearchedByTab !== 'object') state.userSearchedByTab = {};
  1706:       return !!state.userSearchedByTab[getActiveTabKey()];
  1707:     }
  1708: 
  1709:     function setActiveUserSearched(value) {
  1710:       if (!state.quickbaseSettings || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs || !state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[state.activeTabIndex]) return;
  1711:       if (!state.userSearchedByTab || typeof state.userSearchedByTab !== 'object') state.userSearchedByTab = {};
  1712:       state.userSearchedByTab[getActiveTabKey()] = !!value;
  1713:     }
  1714: 
  1715:     function syncStateFromActiveTab() {
  1716:       const activeTabId = getActiveTabId();
  1717:       const freshSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId]
  1718:         ? createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId], {})
  1719:         : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  1720:       const activeTabMeta = getActiveTabMeta();
  1721:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(freshSettings.reportLink);
  1722:       state.tabName = String(activeTabMeta.tabName || 'Main Report').trim() || 'Main Report';
  1723:       state.reportLink = String(freshSettings.reportLink || '').trim();
  1724:       state.qid = String(freshSettings.qid || parsed.qid || '').trim();
  1725:       state.tableId = String(freshSettings.tableId || parsed.tableId || '').trim();
  1726:       state.realm = String(freshSettings.realm || parsed.realm || '').trim();
  1727:       state.customColumns = deepClone(Array.isArray(freshSettings.customColumns) ? freshSettings.customColumns : []);
  1728:       state.customFilters = deepClone(normalizeFilters(freshSettings.customFilters || []));
  1729:       state.filterMatch = normalizeFilterMatch(freshSettings.filterMatch || 'ALL');
  1730:       state.dashboardCounters = deepClone(normalizeDashboardCounters(freshSettings.dashboard_counters || []));
  1731:       state.activeCounterIndex = -1;
  1732:       state.virtualColumn = deepClone(freshSettings.virtualColumn || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] });
  1733:       const headerSearch = root.querySelector('#qbHeaderSearch');
  1734:       if (headerSearch) headerSearch.value = getActiveSearchTerm();
  1735:       const instanceTitle = root.querySelector('#qbInstanceTitle');
  1736:       if (instanceTitle) instanceTitle.textContent = state.tabName || 'Main Report';
  1737:       const activeTabRecordCache = state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[activeTabId] && Array.isArray(state._tabDataCache[activeTabId].cachedRows)
  1738:         ? state._tabDataCache[activeTabId].cachedRows
  1739:         : [];
  1740:       state.baseRecords = activeTabRecordCache.slice();
  1741:       state.rawPayload = {
  1742:         columns: Array.isArray(state.rawPayload && state.rawPayload.columns) ? state.rawPayload.columns : [],
  1743:         records: state.baseRecords.slice()
  1744:       };
  1745:     }
  1746: 
  1747:     function syncSettingsInputsFromState() {
  1748:       const tabNameEl = root.querySelector('#qbTabName');
  1749:       if (tabNameEl) tabNameEl.value = String(state.tabName || 'Main Report');
  1750: 
  1751:       const reportLinkEl = root.querySelector('#qbReportLink');
  1752:       if (reportLinkEl) reportLinkEl.value = String(state.reportLink || '');
  1753: 
  1754:       const qidEl = root.querySelector('#qbQid');
  1755:       if (qidEl) qidEl.value = String(state.qid || '');
  1756: 
  1757:       const tabBaseQidEl = root.querySelector('#qbTabBaseQid');
  1758:       if (tabBaseQidEl) tabBaseQidEl.value = String(state.qid || '');
  1759: 
  1760:       const tableIdEl = root.querySelector('#qbTableId');
  1761:       if (tableIdEl) tableIdEl.value = String(state.tableId || '');
  1762: 
  1763:       const filterMatchEl = root.querySelector('#qbFilterMatch');
  1764:       if (filterMatchEl) filterMatchEl.value = normalizeFilterMatch(state.filterMatch);
  1765:     }
  1766: 
  1767:     function syncActiveTabFromState() {
  1768:       const activeMeta = getActiveTabMeta();
  1769:       const tabId = String(activeMeta && activeMeta.id || '').trim() || generateUUID();
  1770:       const nextMeta = createTabMeta({
  1771:         id: tabId,
  1772:         tabName: String(state.tabName || 'Main Report').trim() || 'Main Report'
  1773:       });
  1774: 
  1775:       // ── BYPASS GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1776:       // Read existing bypassGlobal from settingsByTabId BEFORE building nextSettings.
  1777:       // syncActiveTabFromState rebuilds settings from state.reportLink etc, but bypass
  1778:       // tabs store their config in settingsByTabId — not in state.reportLink.
  1779:       // Without this guard, every sync call wipes bypassGlobal and the bypass reportLink.
  1780:       const _existingTabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId];
  1781:       const _isBypassTab = !!(_existingTabSettings && _existingTabSettings.bypassGlobal);
  1782: 
  1783:       let nextSettings;
  1784:       if (_isBypassTab) {
  1785:         // Bypass tab: preserve all bypass-specific fields, only sync non-report fields
  1786:         nextSettings = deepClone(createDefaultSettings({
  1787:           reportLink: String(_existingTabSettings.reportLink || '').trim(),
  1788:           qid: String(_existingTabSettings.qid || '').trim(),
  1789:           tableId: String(_existingTabSettings.tableId || '').trim(),
  1790:           realm: String(_existingTabSettings.realm || '').trim(),
  1791:           bypassGlobal: true,
  1792:           customColumns: Array.isArray(state.customColumns) ? state.customColumns.map((v) => String(v)) : [],
  1793:           customFilters: normalizeFilters(state.customFilters),
  1794:           filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(state.filterMatch),
  1795:           dashboard_counters: normalizeDashboardCounters(state.dashboardCounters),
  1796:           virtualColumn: deepClone(state.virtualColumn || (_existingTabSettings && _existingTabSettings.virtualColumn) || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] })
  1797:         }, {}));
  1798:       } else {
  1799:         nextSettings = deepClone(createDefaultSettings({
  1800:           reportLink: String(state.reportLink || '').trim(),
  1801:           qid: String(state.qid || '').trim(),
  1802:           tableId: String(state.tableId || '').trim(),
  1803:           realm: String(state.realm || '').trim(),
  1804:           bypassGlobal: false,
  1805:           customColumns: Array.isArray(state.customColumns) ? state.customColumns.map((v) => String(v)) : [],
  1806:           customFilters: normalizeFilters(state.customFilters),
  1807:           filterMatch: normalizeFilterMatch(state.filterMatch),
  1808:           dashboard_counters: normalizeDashboardCounters(state.dashboardCounters),
  1809:           virtualColumn: deepClone(state.virtualColumn || (_existingTabSettings && _existingTabSettings.virtualColumn) || { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] })
  1810:         }, {}));
  1811:       }
  1812: 
  1813:       // ISOLATION: Write only to this tab's slot — never mutate another tab's settings
  1814:       state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[state.activeTabIndex] = deepClone(nextMeta);
  1815:       state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = Object.assign({}, state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {}, {
  1816:         [tabId]: nextSettings
  1817:       });
  1818:       state.quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex = state.activeTabIndex;
  1819:       state.modalDraft = deepClone(Object.assign({}, nextMeta, nextSettings));
  1820:     }
  1821: 
  1822: 
  1823:     function updateTabSettings(tabId, partialUpdate) {
  1824:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
  1825:       if (!safeTabId) return;
  1826:       const nextPartial = partialUpdate && typeof partialUpdate === 'object' ? deepClone(partialUpdate) : {};
  1827:       const prevSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId]
  1828:         ? deepClone(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId])
  1829:         : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  1830:       // ISOLATION: always produce a fresh object — no reference sharing across tabs
  1831:       // Preserve bypassGlobal from prevSettings unless explicitly overriding
  1832:       const nextSettings = createDefaultSettings(Object.assign({}, prevSettings, nextPartial, {
  1833:         bypassGlobal: Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(nextPartial, 'bypassGlobal')
  1834:           ? !!nextPartial.bypassGlobal
  1835:           : !!prevSettings.bypassGlobal
  1836:       }), {});
  1837:       state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = Object.assign({}, state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {}, {
  1838:         [safeTabId]: deepClone(nextSettings)
  1839:       });
  1840:       const tabIndex = Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings.tabs)
  1841:         ? state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.findIndex((tab) => String(tab && tab.id || '').trim() === safeTabId)
  1842:         : -1;
  1843:       if (tabIndex >= 0) {
  1844:         const tabMeta = createTabMeta(state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[tabIndex], {});
  1845:         state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[tabIndex] = deepClone(tabMeta);
  1846:       }
  1847:     }
  1848: 
  1849:     function handleReportLinkChange(tabId, value) {
  1850:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || '').trim();
  1851:       if (!safeTabId) return;
  1852:       const reportLink = String(value || '').trim();
  1853:       updateTabSettings(safeTabId, { reportLink });
  1854:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseReportUrl(reportLink);
  1855:       const parsedLink = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
  1856:       const updates = {};
  1857:       if (!reportLink) {
  1858:         updates.qid = '';
  1859:         updates.tableId = '';
  1860:         updates.realm = '';
  1861:       } else {
  1862:         if (parsed && parsed.qid) {
  1863:           updates.qid = parsed.qid;
  1864:         }
  1865:         if (parsed && parsed.tableId) {
  1866:           updates.tableId = parsed.tableId;
  1867:         }
  1868:         if (parsedLink && parsedLink.realm) {
  1869:           updates.realm = parsedLink.realm;
  1870:         }
  1871:       }
  1872:       if (Object.keys(updates).length) updateTabSettings(safeTabId, updates);
  1873: 
  1874:       if (safeTabId === getActiveTabId()) {
  1875:         state.reportLink = reportLink;
  1876:         if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(updates, 'qid')) state.qid = String(updates.qid || '').trim();
  1877:         if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(updates, 'tableId')) state.tableId = String(updates.tableId || '').trim();
  1878:         if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(updates, 'realm')) state.realm = String(updates.realm || '').trim();
  1879:         syncSettingsInputsFromState();
  1880:       }
  1881:     }
  1882: 
  1883:     function validateQidMatchesUrl(tabSettings) {
  1884:       const tab = tabSettings && typeof tabSettings === 'object' ? tabSettings : {};
  1885:       const reportLink = String(tab.reportLink || '').trim();
  1886:       const qid = String(tab.qid || '').trim();
  1887:       if (!reportLink) return { ok: true };
  1888:       if (!ENABLE_QID_URL_MATCH_VALIDATION) return { ok: true };
  1889:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseReportUrl(reportLink);
  1890:       if (parsed && parsed.qid && qid && parsed.qid !== qid) {
  1891:         return { ok: false, field: 'qid', message: 'QID must match the qid value inside the Report Link URL.' };
  1892:       }
  1893:       return { ok: true };
  1894:     }
  1895: 
  1896:     function validateQuickbaseTabSettings(tabSettings) {
  1897:       return validateQidMatchesUrl(tabSettings);
  1898:     }
  1899: 
  1900:     /**
  1901:      * My Quickbase per-tab settings isolation – migration note
  1902:      * - Internal state now stores per-tab settings in settingsByTabId with cloned objects (no shared references).
  1903:      * - Report Link parsing auto-syncs qid/tableId for each tab independently.
  1904:      * - Save payload stays backward compatible: profile.quickbase_settings preserves legacy { activeTabIndex, tabs } shape.
  1905:      * - Future readers must not rely on object identity being shared across tabs.
  1906:      */
  1907:     function serializeQuickbaseSettingsForSave(quickbaseSettingsState, activeTabIndex) {
  1908:       const settingsState = quickbaseSettingsState && typeof quickbaseSettingsState === 'object' ? quickbaseSettingsState : {};
  1909:       const tabs = Array.isArray(settingsState.tabs) ? settingsState.tabs : [];
  1910:       const settingsByTabId = settingsState.settingsByTabId && typeof settingsState.settingsByTabId === 'object'
  1911:         ? settingsState.settingsByTabId
  1912:         : {};
  1913: 
  1914:       return {
  1915:         activeTabIndex: Number.isFinite(Number(activeTabIndex)) ? Number(activeTabIndex) : 0,
  1916:         tabs: tabs.map((tab) => {
  1917:           const tabMeta = createTabMeta(tab, {});
  1918:           const tabId = String(tabMeta.id || '').trim();
  1919:           const tabSettings = createDefaultSettings(settingsByTabId[tabId] || tab || {}, {});
  1920:           return buildDefaultTab(Object.assign({}, tabMeta, tabSettings), {});
  1921:         })
  1922:       };
  1923:     }
  1924: 
  1925: 
  1926:     function captureSettingsDraftFromInputs() {
  1927:       const tabNameEl = root.querySelector('#qbTabName');
  1928:       const reportLinkEl = root.querySelector('#qbReportLink');
  1929:       const tabBaseQidEl = root.querySelector('#qbTabBaseQid');
  1930:       const qidEl = root.querySelector('#qbQid');
  1931:       const tableIdEl = root.querySelector('#qbTableId');
  1932:       const filterMatchEl = root.querySelector('#qbFilterMatch');
  1933: 
  1934:       const reportLink = String(reportLinkEl && reportLinkEl.value || state.reportLink || '').trim();
  1935:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
  1936:       const hasReportLink = !!reportLink;
  1937:       const resolvedQid = hasReportLink
  1938:         ? String(tabBaseQidEl && tabBaseQidEl.value || qidEl && qidEl.value || parsed.qid || state.qid || '').trim()
  1939:         : '';
  1940:       const resolvedTableId = hasReportLink
  1941:         ? String(tableIdEl && tableIdEl.value || parsed.tableId || state.tableId || '').trim()
  1942:         : '';
  1943:       const resolvedRealm = hasReportLink ? String(parsed.realm || state.realm || '').trim() : '';
  1944: 
  1945:       state.tabName = String(tabNameEl && tabNameEl.value || state.tabName || 'Main Report').trim() || 'Main Report';
  1946:       state.reportLink = reportLink;
  1947:       state.qid = resolvedQid;
  1948:       state.tableId = resolvedTableId;
  1949:       state.realm = resolvedRealm;
  1950:       state.filterMatch = normalizeFilterMatch(String(filterMatchEl && filterMatchEl.value || state.filterMatch || 'ALL'));
  1951:       syncActiveTabFromState();
  1952:     }
  1953: 
  1954:     function scrapeModalCounterInputs() {
  1955:       const rows = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('#qbCounterRows [data-counter-idx]'));
  1956:       return rows
  1957:         .map((row) => {
  1958:           const fieldId = String((row.querySelector('[data-counter-f="fieldId"]') || {}).value || '').trim();
  1959:           const operator = String((row.querySelector('[data-counter-f="operator"]') || {}).value || 'EX').trim().toUpperCase();
  1960:           const value = String((row.querySelector('[data-counter-f="value"]') || {}).value || '').trim();
  1961:           const label = String((row.querySelector('[data-counter-f="label"]') || {}).value || '').trim();
  1962:           const color = String((row.querySelector('[data-counter-f="color"]') || {}).value || 'default').trim().toLowerCase();
  1963:           return { fieldId, operator, value, label, color };
  1964:         })
  1965:         .filter((counter) => counter.fieldId && counter.value);
  1966:     }
  1967: 
  1968:     function renderTabBar() {
  1969:       const tabBar = root.querySelector('#qbTabBar');
  1970:       if (!tabBar) return;
  1971:       const tabs = state.quickbaseSettings.tabs || [];
  1972:       tabBar.innerHTML = tabs.map((tab, idx) => {
  1973:         const isActive = idx === state.activeTabIndex;
  1974:         const tabId = String(tab && tab.id || '').trim();
  1975:         // Check if this tab has fresh cache data
  1976:         const tabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]
  1977:           ? createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId], {})
  1978:           : null;
  1979:         const hasCachedData = !!(state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[tabId] && Array.isArray(state._tabDataCache[tabId].cachedRows) && state._tabDataCache[tabId].cachedRows.length);
  1980:         const cacheBadge = isActive ? '' : hasCachedData
  1981:           ? '<span class="qb-tab-cache-badge qb-tab-badge-cached">◎</span>'
  1982:           : '';
  1983:         const activeBadge = isActive && hasCachedData ? '<span class="qb-tab-cache-badge qb-tab-badge-live">●</span>' : '';
  1984:         return `<button type="button" data-tab-idx="${idx}" class="qb-tab-btn${isActive ? ' qb-tab-btn-active' : ''}" title="${esc(tab.tabName || `Report ${idx + 1}`)}">${activeBadge}<span class="qb-tab-label">${esc(tab.tabName || `Report ${idx + 1}`)}</span>${cacheBadge}</button>`;
  1985:       }).join('');
  1986:     }
  1987: 
  1988:     function setSettingsModalView(viewKey) {
  1989:       const allowedViews = new Set(['report-config', 'custom-columns', 'filter-config', 'dashboard-counters', 'virtual-column']);
  1990:       const nextView = allowedViews.has(String(viewKey || '').trim()) ? String(viewKey).trim() : 'custom-columns';
  1991:       state.settingsModalView = nextView;
  1992: 
  1993:       root.querySelectorAll('[data-qb-settings-view]').forEach((section) => {
  1994:         const sectionView = String(section.getAttribute('data-qb-settings-view') || '').trim();
  1995:         section.style.display = sectionView === nextView ? 'block' : 'none';
  1996:       });
  1997: 
  1998:       root.querySelectorAll('[data-qb-settings-tab]').forEach((btn) => {
  1999:         const tabView = String(btn.getAttribute('data-qb-settings-tab') || '').trim();
  2000:         const isActive = tabView === nextView;
  2001:         btn.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
  2002:         // Support both old inline style tabs and new class-based tabs
  2003:         if (!btn.classList.contains('qb-modal-tab')) {
  2004:           btn.style.color = isActive ? '#fff' : 'rgba(226,232,240,0.78)';
  2005:           btn.style.borderBottom = isActive ? '2px solid #2196F3' : '2px solid transparent';
  2006:           btn.style.background = 'transparent';
  2007:         }
  2008:       });
  2009:     }
  2010: 
  2011:     function _isSettingsModalOpen() {
  2012:       const modal = root.querySelector('#qbSettingsModal');
  2013:       if (!modal) return false;
  2014:       const d = modal.style.display;
  2015:       return d === 'flex' || d === 'block';
  2016:     }
  2017: 
  2018:     function scrapeModalSettingsIntoActiveTab() {
  2019:       const activeTab = getActiveTab();
  2020: 
  2021:       // ── MODAL GUARD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  2022:       // persistQuickbaseSettings() calls this function before every save — even
  2023:       // from the auto-save timer (queuePersistQuickbaseSettings) when the modal
  2024:       // is CLOSED. When closed, #qbCounterRows has no [data-counter-idx] rows,
  2025:       // so scrapeModalCounterInputs() returns [] and WIPES saved counters.
  2026:       //
  2027:       // FIX: Only scrape DOM inputs when the modal is actually OPEN and visible.
  2028:       // When closed, preserve the existing in-memory values from state / activeTab.
  2029:       if (!_isSettingsModalOpen()) {
  2030:         // Modal is closed — use in-memory state, do not touch DOM
  2031:         syncActiveTabFromState();
  2032:         return;
  2033:       }
  2034: 
  2035:       const tabNameInput = String((root.querySelector('#qbTabName') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2036:       const tabBaseQidInput = String((root.querySelector('#qbTabBaseQid') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2037:       const reportLink = String((root.querySelector('#qbReportLink') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2038:       const qidInput = String((root.querySelector('#qbQid') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2039:       const tableIdInput = String((root.querySelector('#qbTableId') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2040:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
  2041:       const hasReportLink = !!reportLink;
  2042:       // Scrape counters ONLY while modal is open — guaranteed DOM rows exist
  2043:       const scrapedCounters = normalizeDashboardCounters(scrapeModalCounterInputs());
  2044:       // If scrape returned empty but state has counters (e.g. modal on different tab),
  2045:       // fall back to existing state counters to prevent an accidental wipe
  2046:       const safeCounters = scrapedCounters.length > 0
  2047:         ? scrapedCounters
  2048:         : deepClone(state.dashboardCounters || activeTab.dashboard_counters || []);
  2049: 
  2050:       activeTab.tabName = tabNameInput || activeTab.tabName || 'Main Report';
  2051:       activeTab.dashboard_counters = safeCounters;
  2052:       state.tabName = activeTab.tabName;
  2053:       state.dashboardCounters = safeCounters;
  2054: 
  2055:       // ── BYPASS GUARD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  2056:       // When tab is in bypass mode, reportLink/qid/tableId/realm come from
  2057:       // #qbBypassReportLink (Report Config section), NOT from #qbReportLink.
  2058:       // Scraping #qbReportLink (which is empty for bypass tabs) would wipe the
  2059:       // bypass settings. Only update these fields for non-bypass tabs.
  2060:       const _activeTabId = String(getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  2061:       const _activeTabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_activeTabId];
  2062:       const _isActiveBypassed = !!(_activeTabSettings && _activeTabSettings.bypassGlobal);
  2063: 
  2064:       if (!_isActiveBypassed) {
  2065:         // Non-bypass: scrape normally from the standard report link inputs
  2066:         activeTab.reportLink = reportLink;
  2067:         activeTab.qid = hasReportLink ? (tabBaseQidInput || qidInput || parsed.qid || '') : '';
  2068:         activeTab.tableId = hasReportLink ? (tableIdInput || parsed.tableId || '') : '';
  2069:         activeTab.realm = hasReportLink ? (parsed.realm || '') : '';
  2070:         state.reportLink = activeTab.reportLink;
  2071:         state.qid = activeTab.qid;
  2072:         state.tableId = activeTab.tableId;
  2073:         state.realm = activeTab.realm;
  2074:       }
  2075:       // For bypass tabs: reportLink/qid/tableId/realm are preserved from
  2076:       // state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId (already updated in save handler)
  2077: 
  2078:       // ── VIRTUAL COLUMN SCRAPE FIX ────────────────────────────────────────
  2079:       // BUG: The modal toggle (#qbVcEnabled) was never read back into state.virtualColumn
  2080:       // during save — _saveVcState() only fires on live toggle change, not on Save click.
  2081:       // FIX: Always sync the enabled state from the DOM toggle into state before persist.
  2082:       const _vcEnabledEl = root.querySelector('#qbVcEnabled');
  2083:       if (_vcEnabledEl) {
  2084:         const _curVc = _getVcState();
  2085:         _curVc.enabled = _vcEnabledEl.checked;
  2086:         state.virtualColumn = deepClone(_curVc);
  2087:         // Also ensure settingsByTabId is in sync for the active tab
  2088:         const _vcTabId = getActiveTabId();
  2089:         if (_vcTabId) {
  2090:           const _vcPrev = createDefaultSettings(
  2091:             (state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_vcTabId]) || {}, {}
  2092:           );
  2093:           state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = Object.assign({}, state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {}, {
  2094:             [_vcTabId]: Object.assign({}, _vcPrev, { virtualColumn: deepClone(_curVc) })
  2095:           });
  2096:         }
  2097:       }
  2098: 
  2099:       syncActiveTabFromState();
  2100:     }
  2101: 
  2102:     function scrapeModalTabSnapshot() {
  2103:       // Only call when modal is OPEN — returns current state snapshot when closed
  2104:       if (!_isSettingsModalOpen()) {
  2105:         const activeTab = getActiveTab();
  2106:         return {
  2107:           tabName: String(state.tabName || activeTab.tabName || 'Main Report').trim(),
  2108:           reportLink: String(state.reportLink || activeTab.reportLink || '').trim(),
  2109:           qid: String(state.qid || activeTab.qid || '').trim(),
  2110:           tableId: String(state.tableId || activeTab.tableId || '').trim(),
  2111:           realm: String(state.realm || activeTab.realm || '').trim(),
  2112:           dashboard_counters: deepClone(state.dashboardCounters || activeTab.dashboard_counters || [])
  2113:         };
  2114:       }
  2115:       const tabName = String((root.querySelector('#qbTabName') || {}).value || '').trim() || 'Main Report';
  2116:       const reportLink = String((root.querySelector('#qbReportLink') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2117:       const baseQid = String((root.querySelector('#qbTabBaseQid') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2118:       const qid = String((root.querySelector('#qbQid') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2119:       const tableId = String((root.querySelector('#qbTableId') || {}).value || '').trim();
  2120:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(reportLink);
  2121:       const hasReportLink = !!reportLink;
  2122:       const scrapedCounters = normalizeDashboardCounters(scrapeModalCounterInputs());
  2123:       const safeCounters = scrapedCounters.length > 0
  2124:         ? scrapedCounters
  2125:         : deepClone(state.dashboardCounters || []);
  2126:       return {
  2127:         tabName,
  2128:         reportLink,
  2129:         qid: hasReportLink ? (baseQid || qid || parsed.qid || '') : '',
  2130:         tableId: hasReportLink ? (tableId || parsed.tableId || '') : '',
  2131:         realm: hasReportLink ? (parsed.realm || '') : '',
  2132:         dashboard_counters: safeCounters
  2133:       };
  2134:     }
  2135: 
  2136:     async function persistQuickbaseSettings(settingsPayload) {
  2137:       if (!me) return;
  2138:       scrapeModalSettingsIntoActiveTab();
  2139:       syncActiveTabFromState();
  2140:       const activeTab = getActiveTab();
  2141:       // For bypass tabs: use settingsByTabId as source of truth for reportLink/qid/realm/tableId
  2142:       const _persistTabId = String(getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  2143:       const _persistTabSettings = _persistTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId
  2144:         ? (state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_persistTabId] || {})
  2145:         : {};
  2146:       const _isBypassPersist = !!(_persistTabSettings.bypassGlobal);
  2147:       const _effectiveRL = _isBypassPersist
  2148:         ? String(_persistTabSettings.reportLink || activeTab.reportLink || '').trim()
  2149:         : String(activeTab.reportLink || '').trim();
  2150:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(_effectiveRL);
  2151:       const activeSettingsObject = {
  2152:         reportLink: _effectiveRL,
  2153:         qid: (_isBypassPersist ? _persistTabSettings.qid : activeTab.qid) || parsed.qid || '',
  2154:         realm: (_isBypassPersist ? _persistTabSettings.realm : activeTab.realm) || parsed.realm || '',
  2155:         tableId: (_isBypassPersist ? _persistTabSettings.tableId : activeTab.tableId) || parsed.tableId || '',
  2156:         customColumns: activeTab.customColumns,
  2157:         customFilters: activeTab.customFilters,
  2158:         filterMatch: activeTab.filterMatch,
  2159:         dashboardCounters: normalizeDashboardCounters(activeTab.dashboard_counters)
  2160:       };
  2161: 
  2162:       const serializedQuickbaseSettings = settingsPayload || serializeQuickbaseSettingsForSave(state.quickbaseSettings, state.activeTabIndex);
  2163: 
  2164:       // Ensure payload is an object, not a string
  2165:       const normalizedPayload = typeof serializedQuickbaseSettings === 'string'
  2166:         ? JSON.parse(serializedQuickbaseSettings)
  2167:         : serializedQuickbaseSettings;
  2168: 
  2169:       const payload = {
  2170:         qb_report_link: activeSettingsObject.reportLink,
  2171:         qb_qid: activeSettingsObject.qid,
  2172:         qb_realm: activeSettingsObject.realm,
  2173:         qb_table_id: activeSettingsObject.tableId,
  2174:         qb_custom_columns: activeSettingsObject.customColumns,
  2175:         qb_custom_filters: activeSettingsObject.customFilters,
  2176:         qb_filter_match: activeSettingsObject.filterMatch,
  2177:         qb_dashboard_counters: activeSettingsObject.dashboardCounters,
  2178:         quickbase_config: activeSettingsObject,
  2179:         quickbase_settings: normalizedPayload
  2180:       };
  2181:       writeQuickbaseSettingsLocal(me && me.id, normalizedPayload, tabNamespace);
  2182:       if (isSupportStudio) return { ok: true, isolated: true };
  2183:       const authToken = window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function' ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  2184:       const response = await fetch('/api/users/update_me', {
  2185:         method: 'PATCH',
  2186:         headers: {
  2187:           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  2188:           ...(authToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } : {})
  2189:         },
  2190:         body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  2191:       });
  2192: 
  2193:       const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
  2194:       if (!response.ok || !data.ok) {
  2195:         throw new Error(data.message || data.error || 'Failed to save settings');
  2196:       }
  2197: 
  2198:       // Update local cache after successful save
  2199:       if (window.Store && Store.setProfileField) {
  2200:         Store.setProfileField('quickbase_settings', normalizedPayload);
  2201:       } else if (window.Store && Store.setProfile) {
  2202:         Store.setProfile(me.id, Object.assign({}, payload, { updatedAt: Date.now() }));
  2203:       }
  2204: 
  2205:       console.log('[Cloud Sync] Multi-Tab Settings Saved');
  2206:       writeQuickbaseSettingsLocal(me && me.id, normalizedPayload, tabNamespace);
  2207:       return data;
  2208:     }
  2209: 
  2210:     function queuePersistQuickbaseSettings() {
  2211:       if (!me) return;
  2212:       if (autosaveTimer) clearTimeout(autosaveTimer);
  2213:       autosaveTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
  2214:         try {
  2215:           await persistQuickbaseSettings();
  2216:         } catch (_) {}
  2217:       }, 700);
  2218:     }
  2219: 
  2220: 
  2221:     // STALE NAV GUARD: If app.js navigated away while we were awaiting
  2222:     // fetchGlobalQbSettings() or refreshProfileFromCloud(), root is no longer
  2223:     // connected to the document. Setting innerHTML on a detached root still
  2224:     // works, but subsequent root.querySelector() calls return elements that
  2225:     // are not in the DOM — addEventListener/onclick throw or silently fail,
  2226:     // leaving a blank page. Bail out early if root is detached.
  2227:     if (!root.isConnected) return;
  2228: 
  2229:     root.innerHTML = `
  2230:       <div class="qb-page-shell" id="qbPageShell">
  2231: 
  2232:         <!-- TAB BAR -->
  2233:         <div class="qb-tabbar-wrap">
  2234:           <div id="qbTabBar" class="qb-tabs-inner"></div>

  2236:           <button type="button" class="qb-fullscreen-btn" id="qbFullscreenBtn" title="Toggle Fullscreen" aria-label="Toggle Fullscreen">

  2238:             <svg id="qbFsIconCollapse" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="display:none;"><polyline points="4 14 10 14 10 20"/><polyline points="20 10 14 10 14 4"/><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="3" y2="21"/><line x1="21" y1="3" x2="14" y2="10"/></svg>
  2239:           </button>
  2240:         </div>
  2241:

  2250:               <span class="qb-search-ico">
  2251:                 <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
  2252:               </span>

  2257:           <div class="qb-header-actions">
  2258:             <button class="qb-btn qb-btn-ghost" id="qbExportCsvBtn" type="button">
  2259:               <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>

  2264:               Reload

  2267:               <svg id="qbForceRefreshIcon" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 2v3M12 19v3M4.22 4.22l2.12 2.12M17.66 17.66l2.12 2.12M2 12h3M19 12h3M4.22 19.78l2.12-2.12M17.66 6.34l2.12-2.12"/></svg>

  2490: 
  2491:     function renderSelectedFloatingPanel() {
  2492:       const panel = root.querySelector('#qbSelectedFloatingPanel');
  2493:       const list = root.querySelector('#qbSelectedFloatingList');
  2494:       if (!panel || !list) return;
  2495: 
  2496:       if (!state.customColumns.length) {
  2497:         panel.style.display = 'none';
  2498:         list.innerHTML = '';
  2499:         return;
  2500:       }
  2501: 
  2502:       const byId = new Map(state.allAvailableFields.map((f) => [String(f.id), String(f.label || `Field #${f.id}`)]));
  2503:       list.innerHTML = state.customColumns
  2504:         .map((id, idx) => `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="min-width:18px;color:#38bdf8;font-weight:700;">${idx + 1}.</span><span>${esc(byId.get(String(id)) || `Field #${id}`)}</span></div>`)
  2505:         .join('');
  2506:       panel.style.display = 'block';
  2507:     }
  2508: 
  2509:     function applyColumnSearch() {
  2510:       const input = root.querySelector('#qbColumnSearch');
  2511:       const query = String(input && input.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  2512:       root.querySelectorAll('#qbColumnGrid .qb-col-card').forEach((card) => {
  2513:         const haystack = String(card.getAttribute('data-col-label') || '').toLowerCase();
  2514:         card.style.display = !query || haystack.includes(query) ? 'flex' : 'none';
  2515:       });
  2516:     }
  2517: 
  2518:     function renderColumnGrid() {
  2519:       const grid = root.querySelector('#qbColumnGrid');
  2520:       if (!grid) return;
  2521:       if (!state.allAvailableFields.length) {
  2522:         grid.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted">Load data first to fetch available Quickbase fields.</div>';
  2523:         renderSelectedFloatingPanel();
  2524:         return;
  2525:       }
  2526: 
  2527:       const selectedById = new Map();
  2528:       state.customColumns.forEach((id, idx) => selectedById.set(String(id), idx + 1));
  2529: 
  2530:       grid.innerHTML = state.allAvailableFields.map((f) => {
  2531:         const id = String(f.id);
  2532:         const order = selectedById.get(id);
  2533:         const label = String(f.label || `Field #${id}`);
  2534:         return `
  2535:           <button type="button" data-col-id="${esc(id)}" data-col-label="${esc(`${label} #${id}`)}" class="qb-col-card" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid ${order ? 'rgba(56,189,248,.72)' : 'rgba(148,163,184,.25)'};background:${order ? 'rgba(14,116,144,.45)' : 'rgba(15,23,42,.45)'};color:inherit;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;min-height:40px;">
  2536:             <span class="small" style="font-weight:${order ? '700' : '500'};">${esc(label)} <span class="muted">(#${esc(id)})</span></span>
  2537:             ${order ? `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:22px;height:22px;padding:0 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(14,165,233,.22);border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.55);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;">${order}</span>` : ''}
  2538:           </button>
  2539:         `;
  2540:       }).join('');
  2541:       applyColumnSearch();
  2542:       renderSelectedFloatingPanel();
  2543: 
  2544:       grid.querySelectorAll('.qb-col-card').forEach((el) => {
  2545:         el.addEventListener('click', () => {
  2546:           const id = String(el.getAttribute('data-col-id') || '').trim();
  2547:           if (!id) return;
  2548:           if (!state.customColumns.includes(id)) {
