  2549:             state.customColumns.push(id);
  2550:           } else {
  2551:             state.customColumns = state.customColumns.filter((v) => v !== id);
  2552:           }
  2553:           syncActiveTabFromState();
  2554:           queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2555:           renderColumnGrid();
  2556:         });
  2557:       });
  2558:     }
  2559: 
  2560:     function filterRowTemplate(f, idx) {
  2561:       const knownFields = Array.isArray(state.allAvailableFields) ? state.allAvailableFields.slice() : [];
  2562:       const selectedFieldId = String(f.fieldId || '').trim();
  2563:       if (selectedFieldId && !knownFields.some((x) => String(x && x.id) === selectedFieldId)) {
  2564:         knownFields.unshift({ id: selectedFieldId, label: `Field #${selectedFieldId}` });
  2565:       }
  2566:       const fieldOptions = knownFields.map((x) => `<option value="${esc(String(x.id))}" ${String(f.fieldId) === String(x.id) ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(x.label)} (#${esc(String(x.id))})</option>`).join('');
  2567:       const activeValue = String(f.value || '').trim();
  2568:       return `
  2569:         <div class="row" data-filter-idx="${idx}" style="gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  2570:           <select class="input" data-f="fieldId" style="max-width:300px;"><option value="">Select field</option>${fieldOptions}</select>
  2571:           <select class="input" data-f="operator" style="max-width:120px;">
  2572:             <option value="EX" ${f.operator === 'EX' ? 'selected' : ''}>Is (Exact)</option>
  2573:             <option value="XEX" ${f.operator === 'XEX' ? 'selected' : ''}>Is Not</option>
  2574:             <option value="CT" ${f.operator === 'CT' ? 'selected' : ''}>Contains</option>
  2575:             <option value="XCT" ${f.operator === 'XCT' ? 'selected' : ''}>Does Not Contain</option>
  2576:             <option value="SW" ${f.operator === 'SW' ? 'selected' : ''}>Starts With</option>
  2577:             <option value="XSW" ${f.operator === 'XSW' ? 'selected' : ''}>Does Not Start With</option>
  2578:             <option value="BF" ${f.operator === 'BF' ? 'selected' : ''}>Before</option>
  2579:             <option value="AF" ${f.operator === 'AF' ? 'selected' : ''}>After</option>
  2580:             <option value="IR" ${f.operator === 'IR' ? 'selected' : ''}>In Range</option>
  2581:             <option value="XIR" ${f.operator === 'XIR' ? 'selected' : ''}>Not In Range</option>
  2582:           </select>
  2583:           <input type="text" class="input" data-f="value" value="${esc(activeValue)}" placeholder="Filter value" style="min-width:220px;" />
  2584:           <button class="btn" data-remove-filter="${idx}" type="button">Remove</button>
  2585:         </div>
  2586:       `;
  2587:     }
  2588: 
  2589:     function renderFilters() {
  2590:       const rows = root.querySelector('#qbFilterRows');
  2591:       if (!rows) return;
  2592:       if (!state.customFilters.length) {
  2593:         rows.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted">No custom filters configured.</div>';
  2594:       } else {
  2595:         rows.innerHTML = state.customFilters.map((f, idx) => filterRowTemplate(f, idx)).join('');
  2596:       }
  2597: 
  2598:       rows.querySelectorAll('[data-remove-filter]').forEach((btn) => {
  2599:         btn.onclick = () => {
  2600:           const idx = Number(btn.getAttribute('data-remove-filter'));
  2601:           state.customFilters = state.customFilters.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
  2602:           syncActiveTabFromState();
  2603:           queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2604:           renderFilters();
  2605:         };
  2606:       });
  2607: 
  2608:       rows.querySelectorAll('[data-filter-idx]').forEach((row) => {
  2609:         const idx = Number(row.getAttribute('data-filter-idx'));
  2610:         row.querySelectorAll('[data-f]').forEach((input) => {
  2611:           const key = String(input.getAttribute('data-f') || '');
  2612:           const eventName = input.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input';
  2613:           input.addEventListener(eventName, () => {
  2614:             if (!state.customFilters[idx]) return;
  2615:             if (key === 'fieldId') {
  2616:               state.customFilters[idx].fieldId = String(input.value || '').trim();
  2617:               syncActiveTabFromState();
  2618:               queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2619:               return;
  2620:             }
  2621:             if (key === 'value') {
  2622:               state.customFilters[idx].value = String(input.value || '').trim();
  2623:               syncActiveTabFromState();
  2624:               queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2625:               return;
  2626:             }
  2627:             state.customFilters[idx][key] = String(input.value || '').trim();
  2628:             syncActiveTabFromState();
  2629:             queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2630:           });
  2631:         });
  2632:       });
  2633: 
  2634:       const match = root.querySelector('#qbFilterMatch');
  2635:       if (match) {
  2636:         match.onchange = () => {
  2637:           state.filterMatch = normalizeFilterMatch(match.value);
  2638:           syncActiveTabFromState();
  2639:           queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2640:         };
  2641:       }
  2642:     }
  2643: 
  2644: 
  2645:     function getCounterTargetFields() {
  2646:       const candidates = [];
  2647:       const addFromSource = (list) => {
  2648:         if (!Array.isArray(list)) return;
  2649:         list.forEach((item) => {
  2650:           if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') return;
  2651:           const id = String(item.id ?? item.fieldId ?? item.fid ?? '').trim();
  2652:           if (!id) return;
  2653:           const label = String(item.label ?? item.name ?? item.title ?? '').trim() || `Field #${id}`;
  2654:           candidates.push({ id, label });
  2655:         });
  2656:       };
  2657: 
  2658:       addFromSource(state.allAvailableFields);
  2659:       if (!candidates.length) {
  2660:         addFromSource(state.rawPayload && state.rawPayload.columns);
  2661:       }
  2662: 
  2663:       const seen = new Set();
  2664:       return candidates.filter((field) => {
  2665:         if (seen.has(field.id)) return false;
  2666:         seen.add(field.id);
  2667:         return true;
  2668:       });
  2669:     }
  2670: 
  2671:     function counterRowTemplate(counter, idx) {
  2672:       const targetFields = getCounterTargetFields();
  2673:       const fieldOptions = targetFields
  2674:         .map((x) => `<option value="${esc(String(x.id))}" ${String(counter.fieldId) === String(x.id) ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(x.label)} (#${esc(String(x.id))})</option>`)
  2675:         .join('');
  2676:       return `
  2677:         <div data-counter-idx="${idx}" style="display:grid;gap:8px;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(15,23,42,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);">
  2678:           <div class="row" style="justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
  2679:             <div class="small muted" style="font-weight:700;">Counter ${idx + 1}</div>
  2680:             <button class="btn" data-remove-counter="${idx}" type="button" aria-label="Delete counter">🗑️</button>
  2681:           </div>
  2682:           <div class="grid cols-2" style="gap:8px;">
  2683:             <label class="field"><div class="label">Target Field</div><select class="input" data-counter-f="fieldId"><option value="">Select field</option>${fieldOptions}</select></label>
  2684:             <label class="field"><div class="label">Operator</div><select class="input" data-counter-f="operator">
  2685:               <option value="EX" ${counter.operator === 'EX' ? 'selected' : ''}>Is Equal To</option>
  2686:               <option value="XEX" ${counter.operator === 'XEX' ? 'selected' : ''}>Is Not Equal To</option>
  2687:               <option value="CT" ${counter.operator === 'CT' ? 'selected' : ''}>Contains</option>
  2688:             </select></label>
  2689:           </div>
  2690:           <label class="field"><div class="label">Glass Color</div><select class="input" data-counter-f="color">
  2691:             <option value="default" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'default' ? 'selected' : ''}>Default (Dark)</option>
  2692:             <option value="blue" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'blue' ? 'selected' : ''}>Blue</option>
  2693:             <option value="green" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'green' ? 'selected' : ''}>Green</option>
  2694:             <option value="red" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'red' ? 'selected' : ''}>Red</option>
  2695:             <option value="purple" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'purple' ? 'selected' : ''}>Purple</option>
  2696:             <option value="orange" ${normalizeCounterColor(counter.color) === 'orange' ? 'selected' : ''}>Orange</option>
  2697:           </select></label>
  2698:           <label class="field"><div class="label">Value</div><input type="text" class="input" data-counter-f="value" value="${esc(counter.value || '')}" placeholder="e.g. Open" /></label>
  2699:           <label class="field"><div class="label">Label</div><input type="text" class="input" data-counter-f="label" value="${esc(counter.label || '')}" placeholder="e.g. Open Cases" /></label>
  2700:         </div>
  2701:       `;
  2702:     }
  2703: 
  2704:     function renderCounterFilters() {
  2705:       const rows = root.querySelector('#qbCounterRows');
  2706:       if (!rows) return;
  2707:       if (!state.dashboardCounters.length) {
  2708:         rows.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted">No dashboard counter filters configured.</div>';
  2709:       } else {
  2710:         rows.innerHTML = state.dashboardCounters.map((counter, idx) => counterRowTemplate(counter, idx)).join('');
  2711:       }
  2712: 
  2713:       rows.querySelectorAll('[data-remove-counter]').forEach((btn) => {
  2714:         btn.onclick = () => {
  2715:           const idx = Number(btn.getAttribute('data-remove-counter'));
  2716:           state.dashboardCounters = state.dashboardCounters.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
  2717:           syncActiveTabFromState();
  2718:           queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2719:           renderCounterFilters();
  2720:         };
  2721:       });
  2722: 
  2723:       rows.querySelectorAll('[data-counter-idx]').forEach((row) => {
  2724:         const idx = Number(row.getAttribute('data-counter-idx'));
  2725:         row.querySelectorAll('[data-counter-f]').forEach((input) => {
  2726:           const key = String(input.getAttribute('data-counter-f') || '').trim();
  2727:           const eventName = input.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input';
  2728:           input.addEventListener(eventName, () => {
  2729:             if (!state.dashboardCounters[idx]) return;
  2730:             state.dashboardCounters[idx][key] = String(input.value || '').trim();
  2731:             syncActiveTabFromState();
  2732:             queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2733:           });
  2734:         });
  2735:       });
  2736:     }
  2737: 
  2738:     // ── VIRTUAL COLUMN RENDER & WIRE ──────────────────────────────────────────
  2739:     function _getVcState() {
  2740:       const tabId = getActiveTabId();
  2741:       const s = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId];
  2742:       return (s && s.virtualColumn) ? deepClone(s.virtualColumn) : { enabled: false, label: 'Status', items: [], conditionalRules: [] };
  2743:     }
  2744: 
  2745:     function _saveVcState(vc) {
  2746:       const tabId = getActiveTabId();
  2747:       if (!tabId) return;
  2748:       const prev = createDefaultSettings((state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]) || {}, {});
  2749:       state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = Object.assign({}, state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {}, {
  2750:         [tabId]: Object.assign({}, prev, { virtualColumn: deepClone(vc) })
  2751:       });
  2752:       state.virtualColumn = deepClone(vc);
  2753:       queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  2754:     }
  2755: 
  2756:     // localStorage key for per-tab virtual column values (dropdown selections per row)
  2757:     function _getVcValuesKey(tabId) {
  2758:       const uid = me && me.id ? String(me.id) : 'anon';
  2759:       return `qb_vc_values:${uid}:${tabId}`;
  2760:     }
  2761:     function _loadVcValues(tabId) {
  2762:       try {
  2763:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(_getVcValuesKey(tabId));
  2764:         return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
  2765:       } catch (_) { return {}; }
  2766:     }
  2767:     function _saveVcValues(tabId, values) {
  2768:       try { localStorage.setItem(_getVcValuesKey(tabId), JSON.stringify(values)); } catch (_) {}
  2769:     }
  2770: 
  2771:     function renderVirtualColumnSettings() {
  2772:       const vc = _getVcState();
  2773: 
  2774:       const enabledEl = root.querySelector('#qbVcEnabled');
  2775:       const configEl  = root.querySelector('#qbVcConfig');
  2776:       const labelEl   = root.querySelector('#qbVcLabel');
  2777:       const cfEnabledEl = root.querySelector('#qbVcCfEnabled');
  2778:       const cfRulesEl   = root.querySelector('#qbVcCfRules');
  2779:       const itemsEl   = root.querySelector('#qbVcItems');
  2780: 
  2781:       if (!enabledEl || !configEl) return;
  2782: 
  2783:       enabledEl.checked = !!vc.enabled;
  2784:       configEl.style.display = vc.enabled ? '' : 'none';
  2785:       if (labelEl) labelEl.value = vc.label || 'Status';
  2786: 
  2787:       const cfEnabled = !!(vc.conditionalRules && vc.conditionalRules.length);
  2788:       if (cfEnabledEl) cfEnabledEl.checked = cfEnabled;
  2789:       if (cfRulesEl) cfRulesEl.style.display = cfEnabled ? '' : 'none';
  2790: 
  2791:       // Render dropdown items
  2792:       if (itemsEl) {
  2793:         if (!vc.items || !vc.items.length) {
  2794:           itemsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted" style="padding:6px 0;">No options yet. Click "+ Add Option" to begin.</div>';
  2795:         } else {
  2796:           itemsEl.innerHTML = vc.items.map((item, idx) => `
  2797:             <div class="qb-vc-item-row" data-vc-item-idx="${idx}">
  2798:               <span class="qb-vc-item-drag" title="Drag to reorder">⠿</span>
  2799:               <input class="qb-field-input qb-vc-item-input" type="text" value="${esc(item)}" placeholder="Option label" data-vc-idx="${idx}" />
  2800:               <button class="qb-btn qb-btn-ghost qb-btn-sm qb-vc-item-del" data-vc-del="${idx}" type="button" title="Remove">✕</button>
  2801:             </div>
  2802:           `).join('');
  2803: 
  2804:           itemsEl.querySelectorAll('.qb-vc-item-input').forEach(inp => {
  2805:             inp.addEventListener('input', () => {
  2806:               const idx = Number(inp.getAttribute('data-vc-idx'));
  2807:               const cur = _getVcState();
  2808:               cur.items[idx] = inp.value.trim();
  2809:               _saveVcState(cur);
  2810:               if (cfRulesEl && cfRulesEl.style.display !== 'none') renderVcCfRules();
  2811:             });
  2812:           });
  2813:           itemsEl.querySelectorAll('[data-vc-del]').forEach(btn => {
  2814:             btn.onclick = () => {
  2815:               const idx = Number(btn.getAttribute('data-vc-del'));
  2816:               const cur = _getVcState();
  2817:               cur.items.splice(idx, 1);
  2818:               // Remove orphaned CF rules
  2819:               cur.conditionalRules = (cur.conditionalRules || []).filter(r => cur.items.includes(r.value));
  2820:               _saveVcState(cur);
  2821:               renderVirtualColumnSettings();
  2822:             };
  2823:           });
  2824:         }
  2825:       }
  2826: 
  2827:       if (cfEnabled) renderVcCfRules();
  2828:     }
  2829: 
  2830:     function renderVcCfRules() {
  2831:       const cfRulesEl = root.querySelector('#qbVcCfRules');
  2832:       if (!cfRulesEl) return;
  2833:       const vc = _getVcState();
  2834:       const items = vc.items || [];
  2835:       if (!items.length) {
  2836:         cfRulesEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px 0;font-size:12px;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Add dropdown options first to configure formatting.</div>';
  2837:         return;
  2838:       }
  2839: 
  2840:       // PREMIUM ENTERPRISE DESIGN: Card-based per-rule layout with live preview badge
  2841:       // No ugly full-row color swatches — accent bar + subtle tint + badge typography
  2842:       cfRulesEl.innerHTML = `
  2843:         <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:4px;">
  2844:           ${items.map((item) => {
  2845:             const rule = (vc.conditionalRules || []).find(r => r.value === item) || { value: item };
  2846:             const bg = rule.bgColor || '';
  2847:             const tc = rule.textColor || '';
  2848:             const fw = rule.fontWeight || 'normal';
  2849:             const fs = rule.fontSize || '12px';
  2850:             const fi = rule.fontStyle || 'normal';
  2851:             const td = rule.textDecoration || 'none';
  2852:             const ta = rule.textAlign || 'left';
  2853:             // Compute preview badge styles — badge uses the user colors directly
  2854:             const badgeBg = bg ? _hexToRgba(bg, 0.22) : 'rgba(255,255,255,.07)';
  2855:             const badgeBorder = bg ? `1px solid ${_hexToRgba(bg, 0.55)}` : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)';
  2856:             const badgeTxt = tc || '#c8d8f0';
  2857:             const accentBar = bg ? `background:${bg};` : 'background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);';
  2858:             return `
  2859:             <div class="qb-vc-cf-rule" data-cf-value="${esc(item)}" style="
  2860:               background:rgba(15,23,42,0.6);
  2861:               border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.12);
  2862:               border-radius:10px;
  2863:               overflow:hidden;
  2864:               transition:border-color .2s;
  2865:             ">
  2866:               <!-- Rule header: accent bar + badge preview + label -->
  2867:               <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.1);">
  2868:                 <div style="width:4px;min-width:4px;height:32px;border-radius:4px;${accentBar}flex-shrink:0;"></div>
  2869:                 <span class="qb-vc-cf-badge" data-preview-badge style="
  2870:                   display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
  2871:                   padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;
  2872:                   background:${badgeBg};
  2873:                   border:${badgeBorder};
  2874:                   color:${badgeTxt};
  2875:                   font-size:${fs};font-weight:${fw};font-style:${fi};text-decoration:${td};
  2876:                   letter-spacing:.03em;white-space:nowrap;
  2877:                   box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
  2878:                   transition:all .15s;
  2879:                 ">${esc(item)}</span>
  2880:                 <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.55);flex:1;">Row formatting when <strong style="color:rgba(226,232,240,.7);">"${esc(item)}"</strong> selected</span>
  2881:               </div>
  2882:               <!-- Controls grid -->
  2883:               <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:8px;padding:12px 14px;">
  2884:                 <!-- Accent Color -->
  2885:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2886:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Accent Color</span>
  2887:                   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
  2888:                     <div style="position:relative;width:32px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.25);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;">
  2889:                       <input type="color" class="qb-vc-cf-color" data-cf-key="bgColor" value="${bg||'#3b82f6'}" style="position:absolute;inset:-4px;width:calc(100% + 8px);height:calc(100% + 8px);border:none;padding:0;cursor:pointer;opacity:0.01;" />
  2890:                       <div data-swatch style="position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:5px;background:${bg||'rgba(148,163,184,.2)'};pointer-events:none;"></div>
  2891:                     </div>
  2892:                     <span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(148,163,184,.7);font-family:monospace;">${bg||'—'}</span>
  2893:                   </div>
  2894:                 </div>
  2895:                 <!-- Text Color -->
  2896:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2897:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Text Color</span>
  2898:                   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
  2899:                     <div style="position:relative;width:32px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.25);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;">
  2900:                       <input type="color" class="qb-vc-cf-color" data-cf-key="textColor" value="${tc||'#e2e8f0'}" style="position:absolute;inset:-4px;width:calc(100% + 8px);height:calc(100% + 8px);border:none;padding:0;cursor:pointer;opacity:0.01;" />
  2901:                       <div data-swatch style="position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:5px;background:${tc||'rgba(148,163,184,.2)'};pointer-events:none;"></div>
  2902:                     </div>
  2903:                     <span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(148,163,184,.7);font-family:monospace;">${tc||'—'}</span>
  2904:                   </div>
  2905:                 </div>
  2906:                 <!-- Weight -->
  2907:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2908:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Weight</span>
  2909:                   <select class="qb-field-input qb-vc-cf-sel" data-cf-key="fontWeight" style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 7px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;">
  2910:                     <option value="normal" ${fw==='normal'?'selected':''}>Normal</option>
  2911:                     <option value="600" ${fw==='600'?'selected':''}>Semi-Bold</option>
  2912:                     <option value="700" ${fw==='700'?'selected':''}>Bold</option>
  2913:                     <option value="800" ${fw==='800'?'selected':''}>Extra Bold</option>
  2914:                   </select>
  2915:                 </div>
  2916:                 <!-- Style -->
  2917:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2918:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Style</span>
  2919:                   <select class="qb-field-input qb-vc-cf-sel" data-cf-key="fontStyle" style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 7px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;">
  2920:                     <option value="normal" ${fi==='normal'?'selected':''}>Normal</option>
  2921:                     <option value="italic" ${fi==='italic'?'selected':''}>Italic</option>
  2922:                   </select>
  2923:                 </div>
  2924:                 <!-- Decoration -->
  2925:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2926:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Decoration</span>
  2927:                   <select class="qb-field-input qb-vc-cf-sel" data-cf-key="textDecoration" style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 7px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;">
  2928:                     <option value="none" ${td==='none'?'selected':''}>None</option>
  2929:                     <option value="underline" ${td==='underline'?'selected':''}>Underline</option>
  2930:                     <option value="line-through" ${td==='line-through'?'selected':''}>Strike</option>
  2931:                   </select>
  2932:                 </div>
  2933:                 <!-- Font Size -->
  2934:                 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
  2935:                   <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);">Size</span>
  2936:                   <select class="qb-field-input qb-vc-cf-sel" data-cf-key="fontSize" style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 7px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;">
  2937:                     <option value="11px" ${fs==='11px'?'selected':''}>11px</option>
  2938:                     <option value="12px" ${fs==='12px'?'selected':''}>12px</option>
  2939:                     <option value="13px" ${fs==='13px'?'selected':''}>13px</option>
  2940:                     <option value="14px" ${fs==='14px'?'selected':''}>14px</option>
  2941:                   </select>
  2942:                 </div>
  2943:               </div>
  2944:             </div>`;
  2945:           }).join('')}
  2946:         </div>`;
  2947: 
  2948:       // Wire all controls with live preview update
  2949:       cfRulesEl.querySelectorAll('[data-cf-key]').forEach(input => {
  2950:         const evtName = input.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input';
  2951:         input.addEventListener(evtName, () => {
  2952:           const ruleEl = input.closest('[data-cf-value]');
  2953:           if (!ruleEl) return;
  2954:           const val = ruleEl.getAttribute('data-cf-value');
  2955:           const key = input.getAttribute('data-cf-key');
  2956:           const cur = _getVcState();
  2957:           let rule = (cur.conditionalRules || []).find(r => r.value === val);
  2958:           if (!rule) { rule = { value: val }; (cur.conditionalRules = cur.conditionalRules || []).push(rule); }
  2959:           rule[key] = input.value;
  2960:           _saveVcState(cur);
  2961: 
  2962:           // Update swatch preview next to color input
  2963:           const swatch = input.parentElement && input.parentElement.querySelector('[data-swatch]');
  2964:           if (swatch) swatch.style.background = input.value;
  2965:           // Update hex label
  2966:           const hexLabel = input.parentElement && input.parentElement.nextElementSibling;
  2967:           if (hexLabel && hexLabel.tagName !== 'SELECT') hexLabel.textContent = input.value;
  2968: 
  2969:           // Live badge preview update
  2970:           const r2 = (cur.conditionalRules || []).find(r => r.value === val) || {};
  2971:           const badge = ruleEl.querySelector('[data-preview-badge]');
  2972:           if (badge) {
  2973:             const nb = r2.bgColor ? _hexToRgba(r2.bgColor, 0.22) : 'rgba(255,255,255,.07)';
  2974:             const nb2 = r2.bgColor ? `1px solid ${_hexToRgba(r2.bgColor, 0.55)}` : '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)';
  2975:             badge.style.background = nb;
  2976:             badge.style.border = nb2;
  2977:             badge.style.color = r2.textColor || '#c8d8f0';
  2978:             badge.style.fontWeight = r2.fontWeight || 'normal';
  2979:             badge.style.fontStyle = r2.fontStyle || 'normal';
  2980:             badge.style.textDecoration = r2.textDecoration || 'none';
  2981:             badge.style.fontSize = r2.fontSize || '12px';
  2982:           }
  2983:           // Update accent bar color
  2984:           const accentBar = ruleEl.querySelector('[data-cf-value] div');
  2985:           const firstDiv = ruleEl.querySelector('div > div');
  2986:           if (firstDiv && r2.bgColor) firstDiv.style.background = r2.bgColor;
  2987:         });
  2988:       });
  2989:     }
  2990: 
  2991:     // Wire virtual column modal controls (called once after HTML is rendered)
  2992:     function bindVirtualColumnControls() {
  2993:       const enabledEl   = root.querySelector('#qbVcEnabled');
  2994:       const labelEl     = root.querySelector('#qbVcLabel');
  2995:       const addItemBtn  = root.querySelector('#qbVcAddItem');
  2996:       const cfEnabledEl = root.querySelector('#qbVcCfEnabled');
  2997:       const cfRulesEl   = root.querySelector('#qbVcCfRules');
  2998:       const configEl    = root.querySelector('#qbVcConfig');
  2999: 
  3000:       if (enabledEl) {
  3001:         enabledEl.addEventListener('change', () => {
  3002:           const cur = _getVcState();
  3003:           cur.enabled = enabledEl.checked;
  3004:           _saveVcState(cur);
  3005:           if (configEl) configEl.style.display = cur.enabled ? '' : 'none';
  3006:         });
  3007:       }
  3008:       if (labelEl) {
  3009:         labelEl.addEventListener('input', () => {
  3010:           const cur = _getVcState();
  3011:           cur.label = labelEl.value.trim() || 'Status';
  3012:           _saveVcState(cur);
  3013:         });
  3014:       }
  3015:       if (addItemBtn) {
  3016:         addItemBtn.onclick = () => {
  3017:           const cur = _getVcState();
  3018:           cur.items = cur.items || [];
  3019:           cur.items.push('New Option');
  3020:           _saveVcState(cur);
  3021:           renderVirtualColumnSettings();
  3022:         };
  3023:       }
  3024:       if (cfEnabledEl) {
  3025:         cfEnabledEl.addEventListener('change', () => {
  3026:           const cur = _getVcState();
  3027:           if (!cfEnabledEl.checked) cur.conditionalRules = [];
  3028:           _saveVcState(cur);
  3029:           if (cfRulesEl) cfRulesEl.style.display = cfEnabledEl.checked ? '' : 'none';
  3030:           if (cfEnabledEl.checked) renderVcCfRules();
  3031:         });
  3032:       }
  3033:     }
  3034: 
  3035:     function bindColumnSearch() {
  3036:       const input = root.querySelector('#qbColumnSearch');
  3037:       if (!input || modalBindingsActive) return;
  3038:       const onKeyUp = () => applyColumnSearch();
  3039:       input.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp);
  3040:       cleanupHandlers.push(() => input.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp));
  3041:     }
  3042: 
  3043:     function bindFloatingDrag() {
  3044:       const panel = root.querySelector('#qbSelectedFloatingPanel');
  3045:       const handle = root.querySelector('#qbSelectedFloatingHandle');
  3046:       if (!panel || !handle || modalBindingsActive) return;
  3047: 
  3048:       let dragging = false;
  3049:       let startX = 0;
  3050:       let startY = 0;
  3051:       let originLeft = 0;
  3052:       let originTop = 0;
  3053: 
  3054:       const onMouseMove = (event) => {
  3055:         if (!dragging) return;
  3056:         const nextLeft = originLeft + (event.clientX - startX);
  3057:         const nextTop = originTop + (event.clientY - startY);
  3058:         panel.style.left = `${Math.max(6, nextLeft)}px`;
  3059:         panel.style.top = `${Math.max(6, nextTop)}px`;
  3060:         panel.style.right = 'auto';
  3061:       };
  3062:       const onMouseUp = () => {
  3063:         dragging = false;
  3064:       };
  3065:       const onMouseDown = (event) => {
  3066:         dragging = true;
  3067:         startX = event.clientX;
  3068:         startY = event.clientY;
  3069:         originLeft = panel.offsetLeft;
  3070:         originTop = panel.offsetTop;
  3071:         event.preventDefault();
  3072:       };
  3073: 
  3074:       handle.addEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
  3075:       document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
  3076:       document.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
  3077:       cleanupHandlers.push(() => {
  3078:         handle.removeEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
  3079:         document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
  3080:         document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
  3081:       });
  3082:     }
  3083: 
  3084:     function bindReportLinkAutoExtract() {
  3085:       const reportLinkEl = root.querySelector('#qbReportLink');
  3086:       const tableIdEl = root.querySelector('#qbTableId');
  3087:       const qidEl = root.querySelector('#qbQid');
  3088:       const tabBaseQidEl = root.querySelector('#qbTabBaseQid');
  3089:       if (!reportLinkEl || !tableIdEl || !qidEl || !tabBaseQidEl || modalBindingsActive) return;
  3090: 
  3091:       let lastAutoFillToastAt = 0;
  3092:       let fetchFieldsTimer = null;
  3093:       let lastFetchedLink = '';
  3094:       const applyAutoExtract = async () => {
  3095:         const nextLink = String(reportLinkEl.value || '').trim();
  3096:         const prevLink = String(state.reportLink || '').trim();
  3097:         const prevQid = String(state.qid || '').trim();
  3098:         const prevTableId = String(state.tableId || '').trim();
  3099:         const prevRealm = String(state.realm || '').trim();
  3100:         handleReportLinkChange(getActiveTabId(), nextLink);
  3101:         const didAutoFill = prevQid !== String(state.qid || '').trim()
  3102:           || prevTableId !== String(state.tableId || '').trim()
  3103:           || prevRealm !== String(state.realm || '').trim();
  3104:         syncActiveTabFromState();
  3105:         queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  3106:         if (didAutoFill && window.UI && UI.toast && (Date.now() - lastAutoFillToastAt) > 1200) {
  3107:           UI.toast('Auto-filled from Link');
  3108:           lastAutoFillToastAt = Date.now();
  3109:         }
  3110:         // FIX: [Issue 3] - Real-time field detection should refresh for any changed/pasted link,
  3111:         // even when qid/tableId stay the same (realm-only change, or repasting same link after tab switch).
  3112:         if (fetchFieldsTimer) clearTimeout(fetchFieldsTimer);
  3113:         const normalizedNextLink = String(nextLink || '').trim();
  3114:         const shouldRefreshFields = !!normalizedNextLink && (normalizedNextLink !== prevLink || normalizedNextLink !== lastFetchedLink);
  3115:         if (shouldRefreshFields) {
  3116:           fetchFieldsTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
  3117:             try {
  3118:               await refreshAvailableFieldsForActiveTab(getActiveTabId());
  3119:               lastFetchedLink = normalizedNextLink;
  3120:               renderColumnGrid();
  3121:               renderFilters();
  3122:               renderCounterFilters();
  3123:             } catch (_) {}
  3124:           }, 250);
  3125:         }
  3126:       };
  3127: 
  3128:       const onPaste = () => setTimeout(applyAutoExtract, 0);
  3129:       reportLinkEl.addEventListener('input', applyAutoExtract);
  3130:       reportLinkEl.addEventListener('paste', onPaste);
  3131:       cleanupHandlers.push(() => {
  3132:         if (fetchFieldsTimer) clearTimeout(fetchFieldsTimer);
  3133:         reportLinkEl.removeEventListener('input', applyAutoExtract);
  3134:         reportLinkEl.removeEventListener('paste', onPaste);
  3135:       });
  3136:     }
  3137: 
  3138:     function cleanupModalBindings() {
  3139:       while (cleanupHandlers.length) {
  3140:         const fn = cleanupHandlers.pop();
  3141:         if (typeof fn === 'function') fn();
  3142:       }
  3143:       modalBindingsActive = false;
  3144:     }
  3145: 
  3146: 
  3147:     async function refreshAvailableFieldsForActiveTab(tabId) {
  3148:       const safeTabId = String(tabId || getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  3149:       if (!safeTabId) return;
  3150:       const managerSettings = tabManager && typeof tabManager.getTab === 'function'
  3151:         ? ((tabManager.getTab(safeTabId) || {}).settings || {})
  3152:         : {};
  3153:       const fallbackSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId]
  3154:         ? state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[safeTabId]
  3155:         : {};
  3156:       const tabSettings = createDefaultSettings(Object.assign({}, fallbackSettings, managerSettings), {});
  3157:       // FIX[QB-NameFilter]: Fall back to globalQbSettings for qid/tableId/realm.
  3158:       // New users / new tabs have empty tab-level settings — without this fallback
  3159:       // the field list stays empty and the Settings modal shows "Load data first".
  3160:       const _isBypassTab = !!(tabSettings.bypassGlobal);
  3161:       const parsed = parseQuickbaseLink(String(
  3162:         _isBypassTab ? (tabSettings.reportLink || '') : (globalQbSettings.reportLink || tabSettings.reportLink || '')
  3163:       ));
  3164:       const qid = _isBypassTab
  3165:         ? String(tabSettings.qid || parsed.qid || '').trim()
  3166:         : String(globalQbSettings.qid || tabSettings.qid || parsed.qid || '').trim();
  3167:       const tableId = _isBypassTab
  3168:         ? String(tabSettings.tableId || parsed.tableId || '').trim()
  3169:         : String(globalQbSettings.tableId || tabSettings.tableId || parsed.tableId || '').trim();
  3170:       const realm = _isBypassTab
  3171:         ? String(tabSettings.realm || parsed.realm || '').trim()
  3172:         : String(globalQbSettings.realm || tabSettings.realm || parsed.realm || '').trim();
  3173: 
  3174:       if (!qid || !tableId || !realm) {
  3175:         state.allAvailableFields = [];
  3176:         renderColumnGrid();
  3177:         renderFilters();
  3178:         renderCounterFilters();
  3179:         return;
  3180:       }
  3181: 
  3182:       try {
  3183:         const data = await window.QuickbaseAdapter.fetchMonitoringData({
  3184:           bust: Date.now(),
  3185:           limit: 1,
  3186:           qid,
  3187:           tableId,
  3188:           realm,
  3189:           customFilters: [],
  3190:           filterMatch: 'ALL',
  3191:           search: ''
  3192:         });
  3193:         state.allAvailableFields = Array.isArray(data && data.allAvailableFields) ? data.allAvailableFields : [];
  3194:       } catch (_) {
  3195:         state.allAvailableFields = [];
  3196:       }
  3197:       renderColumnGrid();
  3198:       renderFilters();
  3199:       renderCounterFilters();
  3200:     }
  3201: 
  3202:     async function loadQuickbaseData(options) {
  3203:       const opts = options && typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};
  3204:       const silent = !!opts.silent;
  3205:       const forceRefresh = !!opts.forceRefresh;
  3206:       const host = root.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
  3207:       const meta = root.querySelector('#qbDataMeta');
  3208:       const reloadBtn = root.querySelector('#qbReloadBtn');
  3209: 
  3210:       const activeTabId = String(getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  3211:       const stateTabSettingsForGuard = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId]
  3212:         ? createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId], {})
  3213:         : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  3214:       // FIX[QB-NameFilter]: Use globalQbSettings.reportLink as primary source.
  3215:       // The outer guard was only checking the tab-level reportLink and returning
  3216:       // early before the inner logic could apply the global report link.
  3217:       // Members with a qb_name set should auto-load using the global report config.
  3218:       const _guardBypassed = !!(stateTabSettingsForGuard.bypassGlobal);
  3219:       const activeReportLink = _guardBypassed
  3220:         ? String(stateTabSettingsForGuard.reportLink || '').trim()
  3221:         : String(globalQbSettings.reportLink || stateTabSettingsForGuard.reportLink || '').trim();
  3222:       if (!activeReportLink) {
  3223:         const recordsContainer = document.querySelector('[data-qb-records-container]')
  3224:           || document.querySelector('.qb-records-body')
  3225:           || document.querySelector('#qbRecordsBody')
  3226:           || document.querySelector('.quickbase-records-container')
  3227:           || host;
  3228:         if (recordsContainer) {
  3229:           recordsContainer.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:15px;">No records Loaded — Please configure a Report Link in Settings.</div>';
  3230:         }
  3231:         if (meta) meta.textContent = 'No Report Link configured';
  3232:         return;
  3233:       }
  3234: 
  3235:       if (quickbaseLoadInFlight) return quickbaseLoadInFlight;
  3236: 
  3237:       if (!silent) {
  3238:         if (host) host.innerHTML = '<div class="small muted" style="padding:8px;">Loading Quickbase data...</div>';
  3239:         if (meta) meta.textContent = 'Loading...';
  3240:       }
  3241: 
  3242:       // Stale-response guard: stamp this load with the current tab ID.
  3243:       // If the tab changes while the fetch is in-flight, the response is discarded.
  3244:       const loadToken = activeTabId;
  3245:       state._currentLoadToken = loadToken;
  3246: 
  3247:       quickbaseLoadInFlight = (async () => {
  3248:         if (reloadBtn) reloadBtn.disabled = true;
  3249:         const startedAt = performance.now();
  3250:         try {
  3251:           if (!window.QuickbaseAdapter || typeof window.QuickbaseAdapter.fetchMonitoringData !== 'function') {
  3252:             throw new Error('Quickbase adapter unavailable');
  3253:           }
  3254:           // Snapshot tab ID for stale-response check inside the async block
  3255:           const thisLoadTabId = loadToken;
  3256: 
  3257:           // ── ALWAYS use state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId as the single source of truth.
  3258:           // TabManager (managerTab) is a secondary write-through cache and MUST NOT override
  3259:           // state.settingsByTabId — it may not be seeded for all tabs and can return stale defaults.
  3260:           const freshTabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[thisLoadTabId]
  3261:             ? createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[thisLoadTabId], {})
  3262:             : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  3263: 
  3264:           // ── BYPASS or GLOBAL report config resolution ────────────────────
  3265:           // Per-tab isolation: each tab independently decides if it bypasses global.
  3266:           // bypassGlobal=true → use tab's own reportLink + profile.qb_token (via server)
  3267:           // bypassGlobal=false → use Global QB Settings as usual
  3268:           const isTabBypassed = !!(freshTabSettings.bypassGlobal);
  3269:           const globalReportLink = String(globalQbSettings.reportLink || '').trim();
  3270:           const effectiveReportLink = isTabBypassed
  3271:             ? String(freshTabSettings.reportLink || '').trim()
  3272:             : (globalReportLink || String(freshTabSettings.reportLink || '').trim());
  3273: 
  3274:           const reportLink = effectiveReportLink;
  3275:           if (!reportLink) {
  3276:             state.allAvailableFields = [];
  3277:             state.baseRecords = [];
  3278:             state.rawPayload = { columns: [], records: [] };
  3279:             state.currentPayload = { columns: [], records: [] };
  3280:             renderColumnGrid();
  3281:             renderFilters();
  3282:             applySearchAndRender();
  3283:             const emptyMsg = isTabBypassed
  3284:               ? 'No records — configure your personal Report Link in Settings → Report Config tab.'
  3285:               : 'No records Loaded — Please configure a Report Link in Settings.';
  3286:             renderEmptyState(root, emptyMsg);
  3287:             return;
  3288:           }
  3289:           const shouldApplyFilters = shouldApplyServerFilters(opts);
  3290:           const tabCustomFilters = Array.isArray(freshTabSettings.customFilters) ? normalizeFilters(freshTabSettings.customFilters) : [];
  3291: 
  3292:           const tabFilterMatch = normalizeFilterMatch(freshTabSettings.filterMatch);
  3293:           const mergedFilters = shouldApplyFilters ? tabCustomFilters : [];
  3294:           // Derive qid/tableId/realm — bypass tab uses its own, non-bypass uses global first
  3295:           const _tabParsed = parseQuickbaseLink(effectiveReportLink);
  3296:           const activeQid = isTabBypassed
  3297:             ? String(freshTabSettings.qid || _tabParsed.qid || '').trim()
  3298:             : String(globalQbSettings.qid || freshTabSettings.qid || _tabParsed.qid || '').trim();
  3299:           const activeTableId = isTabBypassed
  3300:             ? String(freshTabSettings.tableId || _tabParsed.tableId || '').trim()
  3301:             : String(globalQbSettings.tableId || freshTabSettings.tableId || _tabParsed.tableId || '').trim();
  3302:           const activeRealm = isTabBypassed
  3303:             ? String(freshTabSettings.realm || _tabParsed.realm || '').trim()
  3304:             : String(globalQbSettings.realm || freshTabSettings.realm || _tabParsed.realm || '').trim();
  3305:           const hasExplicitLoadMore = Number(opts.offset || 0) >= 100;
  3306:           const hasActiveSearch = !!String(getActiveSearchTerm() || '').trim();
  3307:           // BYPASS FIX: For bypass mode, fetch the full report in one shot (limit 500).
  3308:           // The server uses /v1/reports/{id}/run which handles pagination on QB's side.
  3309:           // For global mode: keep the 100-record first-load + background progressive fetch.
  3310:           const requestLimit = isTabBypassed ? 500 : 100;
  3311:           const cacheKey = getQuickbaseCacheKey({
  3312:             tabId: activeTabId,
  3313:             tableId: activeTableId,
  3314:             qid: activeQid || '',
  3315:             filters: mergedFilters,
  3316:             filterMatch: tabFilterMatch
  3317:           });
  3318:           // FIX: [Issue 2] - Reuse cache if fetched within 2 minutes.
  3319:           const cachedPayload = forceRefresh ? null : readQuickbaseCache(cacheKey, thisLoadTabId);
  3320:           if (cachedPayload) {
  3321:             // ── STALE GUARD (cache hit path) ──────────────────────────────
  3322:             // Cache hit is also async — verify we're still on the same tab
  3323:             // before writing to shared state.
  3324:             if (state._currentLoadToken !== thisLoadTabId) {
  3325:               console.info('[Quickbase] discarding stale cache hit for tab', thisLoadTabId);
  3326:               return;
  3327:             }
  3328:             state.allAvailableFields = Array.isArray(cachedPayload.allAvailableFields) ? cachedPayload.allAvailableFields : [];
  3329:             state.baseRecords = Array.isArray(cachedPayload.records) ? cachedPayload.records.slice() : [];
  3330:             state._loadedForTabId = thisLoadTabId;
  3331:             if (thisLoadTabId) {
  3332:               state._tabDataCache = Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache || {}, {
  3333:                 [thisLoadTabId]: Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[thisLoadTabId] || {}, {
  3334:                   cachedRows: state.baseRecords.slice()
  3335:                 })
  3336:               });
  3337:             }
  3338:             state.rawPayload = {
  3339:               columns: Array.isArray(cachedPayload.columns) ? cachedPayload.columns : [],
  3340:               records: state.baseRecords.slice()
  3341:             };
  3342:             renderColumnGrid();
  3343:             renderFilters();
  3344:             state.currentPage = 1;
  3345:             state.isDefaultReportMode = !shouldApplyFilters && !getActiveSearchTerm();
  3346:             applySearchAndRender();
  3347:             lastQuickbaseLoadAt = Date.now();
  3348:             if (typeof updateDataFreshnessBadge === 'function') updateDataFreshnessBadge(true);
  3349:             renderTabBar();
  3350:             console.info(`[Quickbase] cache hit (${state.baseRecords.length} records) in ${Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt)}ms`);
  3351:             return;
  3352:           }
  3353:           const requestPayload = {
  3354:             bust: Date.now(),
  3355:             limit: requestLimit,
  3356:             qid: activeQid || '',
  3357:             tableId: activeTableId,
  3358:             realm: activeRealm
  3359:           };
  3360:           if (!requestPayload.qid || !requestPayload.tableId || !requestPayload.realm) {
  3361:             state.allAvailableFields = [];
  3362:             state.baseRecords = [];
  3363:             state.rawPayload = { columns: [], records: [] };
  3364:             state.currentPayload = { columns: [], records: [] };
  3365:             renderColumnGrid();
  3366:             renderFilters();
  3367:             applySearchAndRender();
  3368:             lastQuickbaseLoadAt = Date.now();
  3369:             return;
  3370:           }
  3371:           // FIX[GLOBAL-OVERRIDE]: When tab is not bypassed AND global QB has customColumns set,
  3372:           // send empty customColumns [] so the server uses its global column config.
  3373:           // This prevents stale old tab column configs (from before global QB was set up)
  3374:           // from silently overriding the SA's global settings.
  3375:           // When bypassed: always send the tab's own columns (personal report mode).
  3376:           const _effectiveCustomCols = isTabBypassed
  3377:             ? (Array.isArray(freshTabSettings.customColumns) ? freshTabSettings.customColumns : [])
  3378:             : (Array.isArray(globalQbSettings.customColumns) && globalQbSettings.customColumns.length
  3379:                 ? []   // Non-bypass + global has columns → let server apply global (don't send stale tab cols)
  3380:                 : (Array.isArray(freshTabSettings.customColumns) ? freshTabSettings.customColumns : []));
  3381: 
  3382:           const data = await window.QuickbaseAdapter.fetchMonitoringData({
  3383:             ...requestPayload,
  3384:             tab_id: activeTabId,
  3385:             reportLink,
  3386:             bypassGlobal: isTabBypassed,
  3387:             customColumns: _effectiveCustomCols,
  3388:             customFilters: mergedFilters,
  3389:             filterMatch: tabFilterMatch,
  3390:             search: ''
  3391:           });
  3392: 
  3393:           // ── STALE-RESPONSE GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────────
  3394:           // If the user switched tabs while this fetch was in-flight, discard
  3395:           // the response — it belongs to a different tab.
  3396:           if (state._currentLoadToken !== thisLoadTabId) {
  3397:             console.info('[Quickbase] discarding stale response for tab', thisLoadTabId, '(now on', state._currentLoadToken, ')');
  3398:             return;
  3399:           }
  3400: 
  3401:           state.allAvailableFields = Array.isArray(data && data.allAvailableFields) ? data.allAvailableFields : [];
  3402:           renderColumnGrid();
  3403:           renderFilters();
  3404:           const incomingColumns = Array.isArray(data && data.columns) ? data.columns : [];
  3405:           const incomingRecords = Array.isArray(data && data.records) ? data.records : [];
  3406:           state.baseRecords = incomingRecords.slice();
  3407:           // Expose records globally so notification system can read them
  3408:           window.__mumsQbRecords = {
  3409:             records: state.baseRecords.slice(),
  3410:             columns: incomingColumns.slice(),
  3411:             loadedAt: Date.now()
  3412:           };
  3413:           try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:qb_records_loaded', { detail: window.__mumsQbRecords })); } catch(_) {}
  3414:           state._loadedForTabId = thisLoadTabId;
  3415:           if (thisLoadTabId) {
  3416:             state._tabDataCache = Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache || {}, {
  3417:               [thisLoadTabId]: Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[thisLoadTabId] || {}, {
  3418:                 cachedRows: incomingRecords.slice()
  3419:               })
  3420:             });
  3421:           }
  3422:           state.rawPayload = { columns: incomingColumns, records: state.baseRecords.slice() };
  3423:           state.isDefaultReportMode = !shouldApplyFilters && !getActiveSearchTerm();
  3424:           state.currentPage = 1;
  3425:           applySearchAndRender();
  3426:           if (typeof updateDataFreshnessBadge === 'function') updateDataFreshnessBadge(false);
  3427:           renderTabBar();
  3428:           writeQuickbaseCache(cacheKey, {
  3429:             columns: incomingColumns,
  3430:             records: state.baseRecords.slice(),
  3431:             allAvailableFields: state.allAvailableFields
  3432:           }, thisLoadTabId);
  3433:           // BYPASS FIX: Progressive background fetch is DISABLED for bypass mode.
  3434:           // Bypass tabs use POST /v1/reports/{id}/run (server-side) which already returns
  3435:           // the complete report dataset in one call. The background fetch uses the old
  3436:           // /v1/records/query path which ignores report filters → fetches 500 raw table
  3437:           // records → merges them with correct 80 bypass records → corrupts the display.
  3438:           // For global mode: progressive fetch still works as before (no change).
  3439:           if (!isTabBypassed && requestLimit < QUICKBASE_BACKGROUND_LIMIT && !hasExplicitLoadMore && !hasActiveSearch) {
  3440:             setTimeout(async () => {
  3441:               try {
  3442:                 const bgData = await window.QuickbaseAdapter.fetchMonitoringData({
  3443:                   ...requestPayload,
  3444:                   tab_id: activeTabId,
  3445:                   reportLink,
  3446:                   bust: Date.now(),
  3447:                   limit: QUICKBASE_BACKGROUND_LIMIT,
  3448:                   customColumns: Array.isArray(freshTabSettings.customColumns) ? freshTabSettings.customColumns : [],
  3449:                   customFilters: mergedFilters,
  3450:                   filterMatch: tabFilterMatch,
  3451:                   search: ''
  3452:                 });
  3453:                 const bgRecords = Array.isArray(bgData && bgData.records) ? bgData.records : [];
  3454:                 if (!bgRecords.length) return;
  3455:                 state.baseRecords = mergeRecordsById(state.baseRecords, bgRecords);
  3456:                 // Keep global QB records in sync after background merge
  3457:                 window.__mumsQbRecords = { records: state.baseRecords.slice(), columns: incomingColumns.slice(), loadedAt: Date.now() };
  3458:                 try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:qb_records_loaded', { detail: window.__mumsQbRecords })); } catch(_) {}
  3459:                 if (activeTabId) {
  3460:                   state._tabDataCache = Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache || {}, {
  3461:                     [activeTabId]: Object.assign({}, state._tabDataCache && state._tabDataCache[activeTabId] || {}, {
  3462:                       cachedRows: state.baseRecords.slice()
  3463:                     })
  3464:                   });
  3465:                 }
  3466:                 state.rawPayload = { columns: incomingColumns, records: state.baseRecords.slice() };
  3467:                 writeQuickbaseCache(cacheKey, {
  3468:                   columns: incomingColumns,
  3469:                   records: state.baseRecords.slice(),
  3470:                   allAvailableFields: state.allAvailableFields
  3471:                 }, activeTabId);
  3472:                 applySearchAndRender();
  3473:                 console.info(`[Quickbase] progressive load merged ${bgRecords.length} records`);
  3474:               } catch (_) {}
  3475:             }, 0);
  3476:           }
  3477:           lastQuickbaseLoadAt = Date.now();
  3478:           console.info(`[Quickbase] loaded ${state.baseRecords.length} records in ${Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt)}ms`);
  3479:         } catch (err) {
  3480:           if (meta) meta.textContent = 'Check Connection';
  3481:           if (host) host.innerHTML = `<div class="small" style="padding:10px;color:#fecaca;">${esc(String(err && err.message || 'Unable to load Quickbase records'))}</div>`;
  3482:           renderDashboardCounters(root, [], { dashboard_counters: [] }, state);
  3483:         } finally {
  3484:           quickbaseLoadInFlight = null;
  3485:           if (reloadBtn) reloadBtn.disabled = false;
  3486:         }
  3487:       })();
  3488: 
  3489:       return quickbaseLoadInFlight;
  3490:     }
  3491: 
  3492:     function applySearchAndRender() {
  3493:       // ── TAB OWNERSHIP GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  3494:       // Never render data from a different tab. _loadedForTabId tracks which
  3495:       // tab's records are currently in state.baseRecords. If it doesn't match
  3496:       // the active tab, skip rendering stale data.
  3497:       const _renderForTabId = getActiveTabId();
  3498:       if (state._loadedForTabId && state._loadedForTabId !== _renderForTabId) {
  3499:         console.info('[Quickbase] applySearchAndRender skipped — data is for tab', state._loadedForTabId, 'but active is', _renderForTabId);
  3500:         return;
  3501:       }
  3502: 
  3503:       const normalizedSearch = getActiveSearchTerm();
  3504:       const activeCounter = state.activeCounterIndex >= 0 ? state.dashboardCounters[state.activeCounterIndex] : null;
  3505:       state.searchTerm = normalizedSearch;
  3506: 
  3507:       const activeTabId = _renderForTabId;
  3508:       const freshTabSettings = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId]
  3509:         ? createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId], {})
  3510:         : createDefaultSettings({}, {});
  3511: 
  3512:       let filteredBase = Array.isArray(state.baseRecords) ? state.baseRecords : [];
  3513:       if (Array.isArray(freshTabSettings.customFilters) && freshTabSettings.customFilters.length > 0) {
  3514:         const filterMatch = normalizeFilterMatch(freshTabSettings.filterMatch);
  3515: 
  3516:         // INCLUSION operators (EX, CT): same-field values → OR'd (record passes if it matches ANY value)
  3517:         // EXCLUSION operators (XEX, XCT): each must individually pass → AND'd
  3518:         // e.g. Status!=Resolved AND Status!=Bug — using some() here would be always-true
  3519:         var CLIENT_INCLUSION_OPS = { EX: 1, CT: 1, SW: 1, TV: 1, BF: 1, AF: 1, LT: 1, LTE: 1, GT: 1, GTE: 1, IR: 1 };
  3520: 
  3521:         var inclusionByField = new Map();
  3522:         var exclusionFilters = [];
  3523:         freshTabSettings.customFilters.forEach(function(filter) {
  3524:           var fid = String(filter.fieldId || '').trim();
  3525:           if (!fid) return;
  3526:           var op = String(filter.operator || 'EX').trim().toUpperCase();
  3527:           if (CLIENT_INCLUSION_OPS[op]) {
  3528:             if (!inclusionByField.has(fid)) inclusionByField.set(fid, []);
  3529:             inclusionByField.get(fid).push(filter);
  3530:           } else {
  3531:             exclusionFilters.push(filter);
  3532:           }
  3533:         });
  3534: 
  3535:         function evalFilter(filter, record) {
  3536:           var field = record && record.fields ? record.fields[String(filter.fieldId)] : null;
  3537:           var sourceValue = String(field && field.value != null ? field.value : '').toLowerCase();
  3538:           var matcherValue = String(filter.value || '').toLowerCase();
  3539:           var op = String(filter.operator || 'EX').trim().toUpperCase();
  3540:           if (op === 'XEX') return sourceValue !== matcherValue;
  3541:           if (op === 'CT') return sourceValue.includes(matcherValue);
  3542:           if (op === 'XCT') return !sourceValue.includes(matcherValue);
  3543:           if (op === 'SW') return sourceValue.startsWith(matcherValue);
  3544:           if (op === 'XSW') return !sourceValue.startsWith(matcherValue);
  3545:           return sourceValue === matcherValue;
  3546:         }
  3547: 
  3548:         filteredBase = filteredBase.filter(function(record) {
  3549:           if (filterMatch === 'ANY') {
  3550:             // ANY mode: record passes if any single filter condition is true
  3551:             return freshTabSettings.customFilters.some(function(f) { return evalFilter(f, record); });
  3552:           } else {
  3553:             // ALL mode, two-phase evaluation:
  3554:             // Phase 1 — INCLUSION: each field group needs at least one match (OR within field)
  3555:             var inclusionOk = Array.from(inclusionByField.entries()).every(function(entry) {
  3556:               return entry[1].some(function(f) { return evalFilter(f, record); });
  3557:             });
  3558:             if (!inclusionOk) return false;
  3559:             // Phase 2 — EXCLUSION: every exclusion must individually pass (AND'd)
  3560:             return exclusionFilters.every(function(f) { return evalFilter(f, record); });
  3561:           }
  3562:         });
  3563:       }
  3564: 
  3565:       const basePayload = {
  3566:         columns: Array.isArray(state.rawPayload && state.rawPayload.columns) ? state.rawPayload.columns : [],
  3567:         records: filteredBase
  3568:       };
  3569:       const counterFilteredPayload = filterRecordsByCounter(basePayload, activeCounter);
  3570:       state.currentPayload = normalizedSearch
  3571:         ? filterRecordsBySearch(counterFilteredPayload, normalizedSearch)
  3572:         : counterFilteredPayload;
  3573:       // ── SORT BY CASE NOTES MOST-RECENT DATE (default for all users) ──────────
  3574:       // Extracts the most recent [MON-DD-YY HH:MM] timestamp from each record's
  3575:       // Case Notes field and sorts DESC (newest first). Records with no date sort last.
  3576:       if (Array.isArray(state.currentPayload.records) && state.currentPayload.records.length > 1) {
  3577:         const _caseNotesCol = (state.currentPayload.columns || []).find(c =>
  3578:           ['case notes','notes'].includes(String(c && c.label || '').trim().toLowerCase())
  3579:         );
  3580:         if (_caseNotesCol) {
  3581:           const _cnFid = String(_caseNotesCol.id);
  3582:           state.currentPayload.records = state.currentPayload.records.slice().sort((a, b) => {
  3583:             const ta = _caseNotesSortKey(a && a.fields && a.fields[_cnFid] ? String(a.fields[_cnFid].value || '') : '');
  3584:             const tb = _caseNotesSortKey(b && b.fields && b.fields[_cnFid] ? String(b.fields[_cnFid].value || '') : '');
  3585:             return tb - ta; // DESC — most recent first
  3586:           });
  3587:         }
  3588:       }
  3589:       // ── END SORT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  3590: 
  3591:       const totalRows = Array.isArray(state.currentPayload.records) ? state.currentPayload.records.length : 0;
  3592:       const maxPage = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalRows / state.pageSize));
  3593:       state.currentPage = Math.min(Math.max(state.currentPage, 1), maxPage);
  3594: 
  3595:       // Virtual Column: load per-tab saved values for dropdown selections
  3596:       const _vcActiveTabId = getActiveTabId();
  3597:       const _vcSettings = state.virtualColumn && state.virtualColumn.enabled ? state.virtualColumn : null;
  3598:       const _vcValues = _vcSettings ? _loadVcValues(_vcActiveTabId) : {};
  3599: 
  3600:       // Pass current user's QB name so own case note entries get gray-glass highlight
  3601:       renderRecords(root, state.currentPayload, {
  3602:         myQbName: _userQbName,
  3603:         userInitiatedSearch: !!getActiveUserSearched() && !!normalizedSearch.length,
  3604:         page: state.currentPage,
  3605:         pageSize: state.pageSize,
  3606:         virtualColumnSettings: _vcSettings,
  3607:         virtualColumnValues: _vcValues,
  3608:         onVirtualColumnChange: (recordId, value) => {
  3609:           const cur = _loadVcValues(_vcActiveTabId);
  3610:           cur[recordId] = value;
  3611:           _saveVcValues(_vcActiveTabId, cur);
  3612:           // Re-render to apply conditional formatting instantly
  3613:           applySearchAndRender();
  3614:         },
  3615:         onPageChange: (nextPage) => {
  3616:           state.currentPage = nextPage;
  3617:           applySearchAndRender();
  3618:         }
  3619:       });
  3620:       renderDashboardCounters(root, state.baseRecords, { dashboard_counters: state.dashboardCounters }, state, (idx) => {
  3621:         state.activeCounterIndex = state.activeCounterIndex === idx ? -1 : idx;
  3622:         state.currentPage = 1;
  3623:         applySearchAndRender();
  3624:       });
  3625: 
  3626:       // ── SEARCH SCOPE INDICATOR ────────────────────────────────────────────
  3627:       // When a counter filter is active, show a scoped-search tag below the
  3628:       // search input so the user knows the search operates on the filtered
  3629:       // subset ONLY. Releasing the counter automatically resets the scope.
  3630:       const _scopeTagEl   = root.querySelector('#qbSearchScopeTag');
  3631:       const _searchInputEl = root.querySelector('#qbHeaderSearch');
  3632:       if (activeCounter) {
  3633:         const _cLabel       = String(activeCounter.label || activeCounter.value || 'Filter').trim();
  3634:         const _cCount       = Array.isArray(counterFilteredPayload.records) ? counterFilteredPayload.records.length : 0;
  3635:         const _cColor       = normalizeCounterColor(activeCounter.color);
  3636:         const _colorMap     = { blue: '#60a5fa', green: '#4ade80', red: '#f87171', purple: '#c084fc', orange: '#fb923c', default: '#94a3b8' };
  3637:         const _accentColor  = _colorMap[_cColor] || _colorMap.default;
  3638:         if (_scopeTagEl) {
  3639:           _scopeTagEl.innerHTML = `
  3640:             <svg class="qb-scope-ico" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${_accentColor}" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><polygon points="22 3 2 3 10 12.46 10 19 14 21 14 12.46 22 3"/></svg>
  3641:             <span style="color:rgba(148,163,184,.75);">Scope:</span>
  3642:             <span class="qb-scope-lbl" style="color:${_accentColor};" title="${esc(_cLabel)}">${esc(_cLabel)}</span>
  3643:             <span class="qb-scope-count">&nbsp;(${_cCount} record${_cCount === 1 ? '' : 's'})</span>
  3644:             <button class="qb-scope-dismiss" type="button" title="Clear counter filter" data-qb-scope-dismiss="1">×</button>
  3645:           `;
  3646:           _scopeTagEl.classList.add('is-visible');
  3647:           _scopeTagEl.style.borderColor = `${_accentColor}44`;
  3648:           _scopeTagEl.style.background  = `${_accentColor}12`;
  3649:           // Bind dismiss — clears the counter filter without removing search text
  3650:           const _dismissBtn = _scopeTagEl.querySelector('[data-qb-scope-dismiss]');
  3651:           if (_dismissBtn) {
  3652:             _dismissBtn.onclick = (e) => {
  3653:               e.stopPropagation();
  3654:               state.activeCounterIndex = -1;
  3655:               state.currentPage = 1;
  3656:               applySearchAndRender();
  3657:             };
  3658:           }
  3659:         }
  3660:         if (_searchInputEl) {
  3661:           _searchInputEl.placeholder = `Search within "${_cLabel}"…`;
  3662:           _searchInputEl.classList.add('qb-search-scoped');
  3663:         }
  3664:       } else {
  3665:         if (_scopeTagEl) {
  3666:           _scopeTagEl.classList.remove('is-visible');
  3667:           _scopeTagEl.innerHTML = '';
  3668:           _scopeTagEl.style.borderColor = '';
  3669:           _scopeTagEl.style.background  = '';
  3670:         }
  3671:         if (_searchInputEl) {
  3672:           _searchInputEl.placeholder = 'Search across active tab records…';
  3673:           _searchInputEl.classList.remove('qb-search-scoped');
  3674:         }
  3675:       }
  3676:     }
  3677: 
  3678:     function setupAutoRefresh() {
  3679:       if (quickbaseRefreshTimer) clearInterval(quickbaseRefreshTimer);
  3680:       quickbaseRefreshTimer = setInterval(() => {
  3681:         if (document.hidden) return;
  3682:         // forceRefresh:true bypasses the 2-min cache so every tick fetches live data
  3683:         loadQuickbaseData({ silent: true, forceRefresh: true });
  3684:       }, AUTO_REFRESH_MS);
  3685: 
  3686:       const onVisibilityChange = () => {
  3687:         if (document.hidden) return;
  3688:         const shouldRefresh = !lastQuickbaseLoadAt || (Date.now() - lastQuickbaseLoadAt) >= AUTO_REFRESH_MS;
  3689:         if (shouldRefresh) loadQuickbaseData({ silent: true, forceRefresh: true });
  3690:       };
  3691: 
  3692:       document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange);
  3693:       window.addEventListener('focus', onVisibilityChange);
  3694: 
  3695:       const prevCleanup = root._cleanup;
  3696:       root._cleanup = () => {
  3697:         try { if (prevCleanup) prevCleanup(); } catch (_) {}
  3698:         try { cleanupModalBindings(); } catch (_) {}
  3699:         try { if (quickbaseRefreshTimer) clearInterval(quickbaseRefreshTimer); } catch (_) {}
  3700:         try { if (state.searchDebounceTimer) clearTimeout(state.searchDebounceTimer); } catch (_) {}
  3701:         try { if (autosaveTimer) clearTimeout(autosaveTimer); } catch (_) {}
  3702:         // Layer 3: Standard cleanup — clear inline layout styles and remove class.
  3703:         // (Layers 1+2 already handled by MutationObserver the moment shell was removed.)
  3704:         try { root.style.padding  = ''; } catch (_) {}
  3705:         try { root.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  3706:         try { document.body.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  3707:         try { root.classList.remove('page-qb'); } catch (_) {}
  3708:         try { if (_qbLayoutGuardObs) { _qbLayoutGuardObs.disconnect(); _qbLayoutGuardObs = null; } } catch (_) {}
  3709:         quickbaseRefreshTimer = null;
  3710:         document.removeEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange);
  3711:         window.removeEventListener('focus', onVisibilityChange);
  3712:       };
  3713:     }
  3714: 
  3715:     function openSettings() {
  3716:       const currentTab = deepClone(getActiveTab() || {});
  3717:       state.settingsEditingTabId = String(currentTab.id || getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  3718:       state.modalDraft = {
  3719:         tabName: deepClone(currentTab.tabName) || '',
  3720:         reportLink: deepClone(currentTab.reportLink) || '',
  3721:         qid: deepClone(currentTab.qid) || '',
  3722:         tableId: deepClone(currentTab.tableId) || '',
  3723:         realm: deepClone(currentTab.realm) || '',
  3724:         customColumns: deepClone(currentTab.customColumns || []),
  3725:         customFilters: deepClone(currentTab.customFilters || []),
  3726:         filterMatch: currentTab.filterMatch || 'ALL',
  3727:         dashboard_counters: deepClone(currentTab.dashboard_counters || [])
  3728:       };
  3729:       syncSettingsInputsFromState();
  3730:       renderColumnGrid();
  3731:       renderFilters();
  3732:       renderCounterFilters();
  3733:       renderVirtualColumnSettings();
  3734:       setSettingsModalView('report-config');
  3735:       if (window.UI && UI.openModal) UI.openModal('qbSettingsModal');
  3736:       bindColumnSearch();
  3737:       bindFloatingDrag();
  3738:       bindReportLinkAutoExtract();
  3739:       bindVirtualColumnControls();
  3740:       modalBindingsActive = true;
  3741:       // Sync bypass UI state when opening settings modal
  3742:       const _openTabId = state.settingsEditingTabId || getActiveTabId();
  3743:       const _openTabSettings = createDefaultSettings((state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_openTabId]) || {}, {});
  3744:       const _isBypassed = !!_openTabSettings.bypassGlobal;
  3745:       applyBypassUIState(_isBypassed);
  3746:       syncBypassInputsFromState();
  3747: 
  3748:       // TOKEN MASK FIX: Apply masked-dots or empty state on every modal open.
  3749:       // Force-clear any browser autofill first, then re-apply correct visual state.
  3750:       const _tokEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassToken');
  3751:       if (_tokEl) {
  3752:         // Wipe any browser-autofilled value first
  3753:         _tokEl.value = '';
  3754:         _tokEl.removeAttribute('data-token-masked');
  3755:         // Then apply the correct visual state (dots if saved, empty if not)
  3756:         _applyTokenSavedUI(_tokEl);
  3757:       }
  3758: 
  3759:       // FIX[Bug2]: If reportLink is already configured, prefetch fields in realtime so
  3760:       // Custom Columns, Filter Config, and Dashboard Counter dropdowns populate immediately
  3761:       // without requiring the user to re-type or re-paste the link.
  3762:       // FIX[QB-NameFilter]: Also check globalQbSettings.reportLink — members with a
  3763:       // qb_name set never have a tab-level reportLink but global settings does.
  3764:       const existingReportLink = String(
  3765:         _isBypassed ? (_openTabSettings.reportLink || '') : (globalQbSettings.reportLink || state.reportLink || '')
  3766:       ).trim();
  3767:       if (existingReportLink && state.allAvailableFields.length === 0) {
  3768:         refreshAvailableFieldsForActiveTab(state.settingsEditingTabId || getActiveTabId()).catch(() => {});
  3769:       }
  3770:     }
  3771: 
  3772:     function closeSettings() {
  3773:       if (state.isSaving) return;
  3774:       state.settingsEditingTabId = '';
  3775:       cleanupModalBindings();
  3776:       if (window.UI && UI.closeModal) UI.closeModal('qbSettingsModal');
  3777:     }
  3778: 
  3779:     async function deleteTabAtIndex(tabIndex) {
  3780:       const tabs = Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings && state.quickbaseSettings.tabs) ? state.quickbaseSettings.tabs : [];
  3781:       if (tabs.length <= 1) {
  3782:         if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('At least one tab must remain.', 'error');
  3783:         return;
  3784:       }
  3785:       const idx = Number(tabIndex);
  3786:       if (!Number.isFinite(idx) || idx < 0 || idx >= tabs.length) return;
  3787:       const target = tabs[idx] || {};
  3788:       const targetTabId = String(target.id || '').trim();
  3789:       const isDeletingActiveTab = state.activeTabIndex === idx;
  3790:       if (!targetTabId) return;
  3791: 
  3792:       try {
  3793:         if (tabManager) await tabManager.deleteTab(targetTabId);
  3794:         delete state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[targetTabId];
  3795:         if (state._tabDataCache && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(state._tabDataCache, targetTabId)) {
  3796:           delete state._tabDataCache[targetTabId];
  3797:         }
  3798:         state.quickbaseSettings.tabs = tabs.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
  3799:         const nextLen = state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.length;
  3800:         if (!nextLen) {
  3801:           state.activeTabIndex = 0;
  3802:         } else if (isDeletingActiveTab) {
  3803:           state.activeTabIndex = 0;
  3804:         } else if (state.activeTabIndex > idx) {
  3805:           state.activeTabIndex = Math.max(0, state.activeTabIndex - 1);
  3806:         }
  3807:         state.activeTabIndex = Math.min(state.activeTabIndex, Math.max(0, nextLen - 1));
  3808:         state.quickbaseSettings.activeTabIndex = state.activeTabIndex;
  3809:         syncStateFromActiveTab();
  3810:         syncSettingsInputsFromState();
  3811:         queuePersistQuickbaseSettings();
  3812:         await persistQuickbaseSettings();
  3813:         renderTabBar();
  3814:         renderColumnGrid();
  3815:         renderFilters();
  3816:         renderCounterFilters();
  3817:         await loadQuickbaseData({ applyFilters: true, forceRefresh: true });
  3818:         if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Tab deleted successfully.');
  3819:       } catch (err) {
  3820:         if (window.UI && UI.toast) UI.toast('Failed to delete tab: ' + String(err && err.message || err), 'error');
  3821:       }
  3822:     }
  3823: 
  3824:     async function renderDefaultReport() {
  3825:       state.didInitialDefaultRender = true;
  3826:       setActiveUserSearched(false);
  3827:       setActiveSearchTerm('');
  3828:       state.searchTerm = '';
  3829:       return loadQuickbaseData({ applyFilters: true });
  3830:     }
  3831: 
  3832:     // STALE NAV GUARD: Re-check after all async setup is complete.
  3833:     // Covers the case where navigation happened during state initialization.
  3834:     if (!root.isConnected) return;
  3835: 
  3836:     // ── QB CASE DETAIL MODAL CONTROLLER — guaranteed early init ─────────────────
  3837:     // FIX v3.9.30: Moved out of try{} block. Previously this IIFE was the 2nd
  3838:     // statement inside try{} after querySelector wiring. If that querySelector
  3839:     // ever threw (missing element), root._qbcdOpen was never set and every
  3840:     // deep-search card click fell back to the broken empty-columnMap path.
  3841:     (function _initQbCaseDetailModal() {
  3842:       var _snaps = [];
  3843:       var _idx   = 0;
  3844: 
  3845:       function _field(snap, keys) {
  3846:         if (!snap || !snap.fields || !snap.columnMap) return '';
  3847:         var colId = Object.keys(snap.columnMap).find(function(id) {
  3848:           return keys.some(function(k) { return (snap.columnMap[id] || '').toLowerCase().includes(k); });
  3849:         });
  3850:         if (!colId) return '';
  3851:         var f = snap.fields[colId];
  3852:         return f && f.value != null ? String(f.value) : '';
  3853:       }
  3854: 
  3855:       function _dur(val) {
  3856:         var n = Number(val);
  3857:         if (!isFinite(n) || n < 0) return String(val == null ? '' : val);
  3858:         var d = Math.round(n / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  3859:         if (d < 1) return '< 1 day';
  3860:         return d + ' day' + (d === 1 ? '' : 's');
  3861:       }
  3862: 
  3863:       function _badge(s) {
  3864:         var sl = (s || '').toLowerCase();
  3865:         var cls = 'qb-status-default';
  3866:         if      (sl.includes('investigating'))                               cls = 'qb-status-investigating';
  3867:         else if (sl.includes('waiting'))                                     cls = 'qb-status-waiting';
  3868:         else if (sl.includes('initial'))                                     cls = 'qb-status-initial';
  3869:         else if (sl.includes('soft close') || sl.includes('soft-close'))    cls = 'qb-status-soft-close';
  3870:         else if (sl.includes('response received') || sl.includes('for support')) cls = 'qb-status-response';
  3871:         else if (sl.includes('closed') || sl.startsWith('c -'))             cls = 'qb-status-closed';
