  3872:         else if (sl.startsWith('s -'))                                       cls = 'qb-status-soft-close';
  3873:         else if (sl.startsWith('o -'))                                       cls = 'qb-status-investigating';
  3874:         var safe = String(s || '—').replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(c) {
  3875:           return { '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;' }[c];
  3876:         });
  3877:         return '<span class="qb-status-badge ' + cls + '"><span class="qb-status-dot"></span>' + safe + '</span>';
  3878:       }
  3879: 
  3880:       function _set(id, v)  { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = v; }
  3881:       function _html(id, h) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.innerHTML  = h; }
  3882: 
  3883:       // Known field key groups — used to identify and map fixed KPI slots
  3884:       // Each group = an array of label keywords (lowercase, partial match)
  3885:       var _KNOWN_GROUPS = {
  3886:         desc:    ['short description','description','concern','subject','title'],
  3887:         assign:  ['assigned to','assigned','agent'],
  3888:         contact: ['contact','full name','customer name'],
  3889:         endUser: ['end user','client','account','customer'],
  3890:         type:    ['type','category'],
  3891:         status:  ['case status','status'],
  3892:         age:     ['age'],
  3893:         lastUpd: ['last update days','last update','update days'],
  3894:         latest:  [
  3895:           'latest update on the case',
  3896:           'latest update',
  3897:           'last update',
  3898:           'last comment',
  3899:           'most recent update',
  3900:           'update on the case',
  3901:           'latest'
  3902:         ],
  3903:         notes:   [
  3904:           'case notes detail',
  3905:           'case notes',
  3906:           'case note',
  3907:           'case details',
  3908:           'resolution details',
  3909:           'notes'
  3910:         ],
  3911:       };
  3912: 
  3913:       // Escape HTML for dynamic sections
  3914:       function _esc(v) {
  3915:         return String(v == null ? '' : v)
  3916:           .replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')
  3917:           .replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;');
  3918:       }
  3919: 
  3920:       // Find colId that matches ANY of the keyword groups
  3921:       function _matchGroup(snap, keys) {
  3922:         if (!snap || !snap.columnMap) return null;
  3923:         return Object.keys(snap.columnMap).find(function(id) {
  3924:           var lbl = (snap.columnMap[id] || '').toLowerCase();
  3925:           return keys.some(function(k) { return lbl.includes(k); });
  3926:         }) || null;
  3927:       }
  3928: 
  3929:       function _populate(snap) {
  3930:         if (!snap) return;
  3931: 
  3932:         // ── Resolve all known field colIds ──────────────────────────────────
  3933:         var knownColIds = new Set();
  3934:         var resolved = {};
  3935:         Object.keys(_KNOWN_GROUPS).forEach(function(key) {
  3936:           var colId = _matchGroup(snap, _KNOWN_GROUPS[key]);
  3937:           resolved[key] = colId;
  3938:           if (colId) knownColIds.add(colId);
  3939:         });
  3940: 
  3941:         function _val(key) {
  3942:           var colId = resolved[key];
  3943:           if (!colId) return '';
  3944:           var f = snap.fields[colId];
  3945:           return f && f.value != null ? String(f.value) : '';
  3946:         }
  3947: 
  3948:         // ── Fixed fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  3949:         var caseId  = snap.recordId || '—';
  3950:         var desc    = _val('desc')    || '—';
  3951:         var assign  = _val('assign')  || '—';
  3952:         var contact = _val('contact') || '—';
  3953:         var endUser = _val('endUser') || '—';
  3954:         var type    = _val('type')    || '—';
  3955:         var status  = _val('status')  || '—';
  3956:         var age     = _val('age');
  3957:         var lastUpd = _val('lastUpd');
  3958:         // Convert EST→PHT for all timestamp-bearing text fields
  3959:         var latest  = _convertNotesESTtoPHT(_val('latest')  || '') || '—';
  3960:         var notes   = _convertNotesESTtoPHT(_val('notes')   || '');
  3961:         var ridFromField = snap.fields && snap.fields['3'] && snap.fields['3'].value != null
  3962:           ? String(snap.fields['3'].value)
  3963:           : '';
  3964:         var caseNum = String(ridFromField || caseId || '').trim();
  3965:         var qbBase = 'https://copeland-coldchainservices.quickbase.com/nav/app/bpvmztzkw/table/bpvmztzr5';
  3966:         var editUrl = caseNum ? (qbBase + '/action/er?rid=' + encodeURIComponent(caseNum) + '&rl=bmg5') : '#';
  3967:         var viewUrl = caseNum ? (qbBase + '/action/dr?rid=' + encodeURIComponent(caseNum) + '&rl=bmg5') : '#';
  3968: 
  3969:         // ── Populate fixed DOM slots ─────────────────────────────────────────
  3970:         _set('qbcdRowBadge',  snap.rowNum || '—');
  3971:         _set('qbcdCaseId',    caseId);
  3972:         _set('qbcdDesc',      desc);
  3973:         _html('qbcdStatusBadge', _badge(status));
  3974:         _set('qbcdMeta',      'Row ' + snap.rowNum + ' · ' + endUser);
  3975:         _set('qbcdKpiAge',    age     ? _dur(age)     : '—');
  3976:         _set('qbcdKpiLast',   lastUpd ? _dur(lastUpd) : '—');
  3977:         _set('qbcdKpiType',   type);
  3978:         _set('qbcdKpiEndUser',endUser);
  3979:         _set('qbcdAssigned',  assign);
  3980:         _set('qbcdContact',   contact);
  3981:         _set('qbcdEndUser',   endUser);
  3982:         _set('qbcdCaseId2',   caseId);
  3983:         _set('qbcdType2',     type);
  3984:         _html('qbcdStatus2',  _badge(status));
  3985:         _set('qbcdLatest',    latest);
  3986:         ['qbcdEditLink','qbcdViewLink','qbcdEditLinkHeader','qbcdViewLinkHeader'].forEach(function(id) {
  3987:           var el = document.getElementById(id);
  3988:           if (!el) return;
  3989:           var isEdit = id.toLowerCase().includes('edit');
  3990:           var href = isEdit ? editUrl : viewUrl;
  3991:           el.setAttribute('href', href);
  3992:           el.setAttribute('aria-disabled', href === '#' ? 'true' : 'false');
  3993:           if (href === '#') el.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');
  3994:           else el.removeAttribute('tabindex');
  3995:         });
  3996: 
  3997:         // ── Case Notes slot (dedicated) ───────────────────────────────────────
  3998:         var notesBlock = document.getElementById('qbcdNotesBlock');
  3999:         if (notes && notes !== 'N/A') {
  4000:           _set('qbcdNotes', notes);
  4001:           if (notesBlock) notesBlock.style.display = '';
  4002:         } else {
  4003:           if (notesBlock) notesBlock.style.display = 'none';
  4004:         }
  4005: 
  4006:         // ── DYNAMIC EXTRA FIELDS ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  4007:         // Render any columns that are NOT in the known groups above
  4008:         var extraContainer = document.getElementById('qbcdExtraFields');
  4009:         if (extraContainer && snap.columnMap) {
  4010:           var extraCols = Object.keys(snap.columnMap).filter(function(id) {
  4011:             return !knownColIds.has(id);
  4012:           });
  4013:           if (extraCols.length) {
  4014:             var extraHtml = extraCols.map(function(colId) {
  4015:               var label = snap.columnMap[colId] || ('Field #' + colId);
  4016:               var f     = snap.fields[colId];
  4017:               var val   = (f && f.value != null) ? String(f.value) : '—';
  4018:               if (!val || val === 'N/A') return '';
  4019:               return '<div class="qbcd-kv">' +
  4020:                 '<span class="qbcd-kv-lbl">' + _esc(label) + '</span>' +
  4021:                 '<span class="qbcd-kv-val">' + _esc(val)   + '</span>' +
  4022:               '</div>';
  4023:             }).filter(Boolean).join('');
  4024:             extraContainer.innerHTML = extraHtml || '';
  4025:             var extraBlock = document.getElementById('qbcdExtraBlock');
  4026:             if (extraBlock) extraBlock.style.display = extraHtml ? '' : 'none';
  4027:           } else {
  4028:             var extraBlock2 = document.getElementById('qbcdExtraBlock');
  4029:             if (extraBlock2) extraBlock2.style.display = 'none';
  4030:           }
  4031:         }
  4032: 
  4033:         // ── Nav position ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4034:         var posEl   = document.getElementById('qbcdPos');
  4035:         var prevBtn = document.getElementById('qbcdPrevBtn');
  4036:         var nextBtn = document.getElementById('qbcdNextBtn');
  4037:         if (posEl)   posEl.textContent = (_idx + 1) + ' of ' + _snaps.length;
  4038:         if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled  = _idx <= 0;
  4039:         if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled  = _idx >= _snaps.length - 1;
  4040:       }
  4041: 
  4042:       function _nav(dir) {
  4043:         var next = _idx + dir;
  4044:         if (next < 0 || next >= _snaps.length) return;
  4045:         _idx = next;
  4046:         _populate(_snaps[_idx]);
  4047:       }
  4048: 
  4049:       function _close() {
  4050:         var m = document.getElementById('qbCaseDetailModal');
  4051:         if (!m) return;
  4052:         m.classList.remove('open');
  4053:         m.removeAttribute('style');
  4054:         try { if (!document.querySelector('.modal.open')) document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); } catch(ee) {}
  4055:       }
  4056: 
  4057:       function _open(snap, allSnaps) {
  4058:         _snaps = Array.isArray(allSnaps) ? allSnaps : [snap];
  4059:         _idx   = _snaps.findIndex(function(s) { return s && s.rowNum === snap.rowNum; });
  4060:         if (_idx < 0) _idx = 0;
  4061:         _populate(snap);
  4062:         var m = document.getElementById('qbCaseDetailModal');
  4063:         if (!m) { return; }
  4064:         // Direct DOM manipulation — no dependency on UI.openModal
  4065:         // Clear all inline styles that could block visibility
  4066:         m.removeAttribute('style');
  4067:         // Force display before adding open class
  4068:         m.style.cssText = 'display:flex!important;position:fixed!important;inset:0!important;' +
  4069:           'z-index:2147483647!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;' +
  4070:           'background:rgba(6,12,24,.88)!important;padding:16px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;';
  4071:         m.classList.add('open');
  4072:         try { document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); } catch(ee) {}
  4073:         // Re-append to body to escape any stacking context
  4074:         if (m.parentElement !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(m);
  4075:       }
  4076: 
  4077:       // Expose _open on root so renderRecords can call it directly (belt+suspenders)
  4078:       // root is per-page-load (not window), so this resets cleanly on SPA re-navigation
  4079:       root._qbcdOpen = _open;
  4080:       function openCaseDetailModal(payload) {
  4081:         payload = payload || {};
  4082:         var host = root.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
  4083:         var snaps = host && Array.isArray(host._qbRowSnaps) ? host._qbRowSnaps : [];
  4084:         if (!snaps.length) return;
  4085:         var rid = String(payload.qbRecordId || payload.recordId || '');
  4086:         var snap = rid
  4087:           ? snaps.find(function(s) { return s && String(s.recordId) === rid; })
  4088:           : null;
  4089:         if (!snap) snap = snaps[0];
  4090:         if (!snap) return;
  4091:         _open(snap, snaps);
  4092:       }
  4093:       root._qbcdOpenCaseDetailModal = openCaseDetailModal;
  4094:       window.MQ = window.MQ || {};
  4095:       window.MQ.openCaseDetailModal = openCaseDetailModal;
  4096: 
  4097:       // Wire modal's own buttons (close, prev, next, copy, backdrop)
  4098:       var _modal = document.getElementById('qbCaseDetailModal');
  4099:       if (_modal) {
  4100:         [
  4101:           { id: 'qbcdCloseBtn',  fn: _close },
  4102:           { id: 'qbcdCloseBtn2', fn: _close },
  4103:           { id: 'qbcdPrevBtn',   fn: function() { _nav(-1); } },
  4104:           { id: 'qbcdNextBtn',   fn: function() { _nav(1);  } },
  4105:         ].forEach(function(item) {
  4106:           var el = document.getElementById(item.id);
  4107:           if (el) el.addEventListener('click', item.fn);
  4108:         });
  4109:         var _copyBtn = document.getElementById('qbcdCopyBtn');
  4110:         if (_copyBtn) {
  4111:           var _copyLabel = _copyBtn.querySelector('span');
  4112:           _copyBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
  4113:             var id = (document.getElementById('qbcdCaseId') || {}).textContent || '';
  4114:             if (!id || id === '—') return;
  4115:             if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
  4116:               navigator.clipboard.writeText(id).then(function() {
  4117:                 if (_copyLabel) _copyLabel.textContent = 'Copied!';
  4118:                 else _copyBtn.textContent = 'Copied!';
  4119:                 setTimeout(function() {
  4120:                   if (_copyLabel) _copyLabel.textContent = 'Copy Case #';
  4121:                   else _copyBtn.textContent = 'Copy Case #';
  4122:                 }, 1800);
  4123:               }).catch(function() {});
  4124:             }
  4125:           });
  4126:         }
  4127:         // Backdrop click
  4128:         _modal.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
  4129:           if (e.target === _modal) _close();
  4130:         });
  4131:       }
  4132: 
  4133:       // Keyboard: Escape / ArrowLeft / ArrowRight
  4134:       document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  4135:         var m = document.getElementById('qbCaseDetailModal');
  4136:         if (!m || !m.classList.contains('open')) return;
  4137:         if      (e.key === 'Escape')     _close();
  4138:         else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft')  _nav(-1);
  4139:         else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') _nav(1);
  4140:       });
  4141: 
  4142:       // ── Single delegated listener on #qbDataBody ──────────────────────────
  4143:       // Handles ALL .qb-row-detail-btn clicks regardless of re-renders.
  4144:       var _dataBody = root.querySelector('#qbDataBody');
  4145:       if (_dataBody) {
  4146:         _dataBody.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  4147:           // Walk up from click target to find .qb-row-detail-btn
  4148:           var btn = null;
  4149:           var t = e.target;
  4150:           while (t && t !== _dataBody) {
  4151:             if (t.classList && t.classList.contains('qb-row-detail-btn')) { btn = t; break; }
  4152:             t = t.parentElement;
  4153:           }
  4154:           if (!btn) return;
  4155:           e.stopPropagation();
  4156:           // Use index-based lookup from host._qbRowSnaps (no JSON parse)
  4157:           var host = _dataBody;
  4158:           var snaps = host._qbRowSnaps || [];
  4159:           var idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-qb-snap-idx'), 10);
  4160:           if (isNaN(idx) || !snaps[idx]) return;
  4161:           _open(snaps[idx], snaps);
  4162:         });
  4163:       }
  4164:     })();
  4165:     // ── END _initQbCaseDetailModal ────────────────────────────────────────────

  4170: 
  4171:     // ── QB CASE DETAIL MODAL CONTROLLER ──────────────────────────────────────
  4172:     // Wired ONCE per page-load via a delegated 'click' listener on #qbDataBody.
  4173:     // Survives every renderRecords() call without rebinding.

  4190:     // ── BYPASS TOGGLE LOGIC ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4191:     // Controls per-tab bypass of Global QB Settings.
  4192:     // When ON: shows Report Config tab, allows personal reportLink + qb_token.
  4193:     // Isolation: each tab stores its own bypassGlobal flag independently.
  4194: 
  4195:     function getActiveTabBypassState() {
  4196:       const tabId = getActiveTabId();
  4197:       const s = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId];
  4198:       return !!(s && s.bypassGlobal);
  4199:     }
  4200: 
  4201:     function applyBypassUIState(isBypassed) {
  4202:       const toggle = root.querySelector('#qbBypassToggle');
  4203:       const reportConfigTab = root.querySelector('#qbTabReportConfig');
  4204:       const bypassOnlyEls = root.querySelectorAll('.qb-bypass-only');
  4205:       if (toggle) toggle.checked = !!isBypassed;
  4206:       bypassOnlyEls.forEach(el => { el.style.display = isBypassed ? '' : 'none'; });
  4207:       if (reportConfigTab) {
  4208:         reportConfigTab.style.display = isBypassed ? '' : 'none';
  4209:       }
  4210:       // If bypass just turned on, auto-switch to Report Config tab
  4211:       if (isBypassed) {
  4212:         const currentView = state.settingsModalView;
  4213:         if (currentView !== 'report-config') setSettingsModalView('report-config');
  4214:       } else {
  4215:         // If bypass turned off while on report-config, switch to custom-columns
  4216:         if (state.settingsModalView === 'report-config') setSettingsModalView('custom-columns');
  4217:       }
  4218:     }
  4219: 
  4220:     // Sentinel value used internally to mark "token is saved in DB".
  4221:     // This is NEVER sent to the server — it's stripped in the save handler.
  4222:     // Its only purpose is to show the password dots so users see the token is saved.
  4223:     const _QB_TOKEN_SAVED_SENTINEL = '__QB_TOKEN_SAVED__';
  4224: 
  4225:     function _applyTokenSavedUI(tokEl) {
  4226:       if (!tokEl) return;
  4227:       const _hasRealToken = !!(profile && (profile.qb_token_set || String(profile.qb_token || '').trim()));
  4228:       if (_hasRealToken) {
  4229:         // Show masked dots so user clearly sees a token is stored
  4230:         tokEl.value = _QB_TOKEN_SAVED_SENTINEL;
  4231:         tokEl.placeholder = '';
  4232:         tokEl.setAttribute('data-token-masked', '1');
  4233:         // On focus: clear so user can type a new token
  4234:         if (!tokEl._maskFocusBound) {
  4235:           tokEl._maskFocusBound = true;
  4236:           tokEl.addEventListener('focus', function _clearOnFocus() {
  4237:             if (tokEl.value === _QB_TOKEN_SAVED_SENTINEL) {
  4238:               tokEl.value = '';
  4239:               tokEl.removeAttribute('data-token-masked');
  4240:             }
  4241:           });
  4242:           tokEl.addEventListener('blur', function _restoreOnBlur() {
  4243:             if (tokEl.value === '') {
  4244:               const _stillHasToken = !!(profile && (profile.qb_token_set || String(profile.qb_token || '').trim()));
  4245:               if (_stillHasToken) {
  4246:                 tokEl.value = _QB_TOKEN_SAVED_SENTINEL;
  4247:                 tokEl.setAttribute('data-token-masked', '1');
  4248:               }
  4249:             }
  4250:           });
  4251:         }
  4252:       } else {
  4253:         tokEl.value = '';
  4254:         tokEl.placeholder = 'Enter your personal QB User Token';
  4255:         tokEl.removeAttribute('data-token-masked');
  4256:       }
  4257:     }
  4258: 
  4259:     function syncBypassInputsFromState() {
  4260:       const tabId = getActiveTabId();
  4261:       const s = createDefaultSettings((state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId && state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[tabId]) || {}, {});
  4262:       const rlEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassReportLink');
  4263:       const realmEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassRealm');
  4264:       const tableEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassTableId');
  4265:       const qidEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassQid');
  4266:       if (rlEl) rlEl.value = s.reportLink || '';
  4267:       if (realmEl) realmEl.value = s.realm || '';
  4268:       if (tableEl) tableEl.value = s.tableId || '';
  4269:       if (qidEl) qidEl.value = s.qid || '';
  4270:       // TOKEN MASK FIX: Show masked dots (password field filled) when token is saved in DB.
  4271:       // Empty field = confusing to users ("did my token save?"). Filled dots = clear confirmation.
  4272:       // The sentinel value is stripped before any save — never reaches the server.
  4273:       _applyTokenSavedUI(root.querySelector('#qbBypassToken'));
  4274:     }

  4280:         const tabId = getActiveTabId();

  4317: 
  4318:     // ── FORCE REFRESH "ACTIVE" BUTTON — wired once ──────────────────────────
  4319:     // Manual force-fetch from Quickbase. Bypasses the 300s auto-refresh.
  4320:     // Use case: user needs latest data immediately without waiting for next cycle.
  4321:     // Behavior:
  4322:     //   1. Kills any in-flight request (same as cache badge)
  4323:     //   2. Clears ALL tab caches (not just active tab)
  4324:     //   3. Triggers live fetch: forceRefresh:true + applyFilters:true
  4325:     //   4. Button shows spinning animation + "Fetching…" label while loading
  4326:     //   5. Reverts to "Active" with pulse animation on success
  4327:     const _forceRefreshBtn = root.querySelector('#qbForceRefreshBtn');
  4328:     const _forceRefreshIcon = root.querySelector('#qbForceRefreshIcon');
  4329:     const _forceRefreshLabel = root.querySelector('#qbForceRefreshLabel');
  4330:     let _forceRefreshCooldown = false;
  4331: 
  4332:     if (_forceRefreshBtn) {
  4333:       _forceRefreshBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  4334:         if (_forceRefreshCooldown) return;
  4335:         _forceRefreshCooldown = true;
  4336: 
  4337:         // Visual: spinning state
  4338:         _forceRefreshBtn.classList.add('qb-force-fetching');
  4339:         if (_forceRefreshIcon) _forceRefreshIcon.classList.add('qb-spin');
  4340:         if (_forceRefreshLabel) _forceRefreshLabel.textContent = 'Fetching…';
  4341:         _forceRefreshBtn.disabled = true;
  4342: 
  4343:         try {
  4344:           // Kill inflight + clear ALL caches across all tabs
  4345:           quickbaseLoadInFlight = null;
  4346:           if (state.qbCache) { Object.keys(state.qbCache).forEach(k => { delete state.qbCache[k]; }); }
  4347:           if (state._tabDataCache) { Object.keys(state._tabDataCache).forEach(k => { delete state._tabDataCache[k]; }); }
  4348: 
  4349:           await loadQuickbaseData({ forceRefresh: true, applyFilters: true, silent: false });
  4350: 
  4351:           // Visual: success pulse
  4352:           _forceRefreshBtn.classList.remove('qb-force-fetching');
  4353:           _forceRefreshBtn.classList.add('qb-force-success');
  4354:           if (_forceRefreshIcon) _forceRefreshIcon.classList.remove('qb-spin');
  4355:           if (_forceRefreshLabel) _forceRefreshLabel.textContent = 'Active';
  4356:           setTimeout(() => { _forceRefreshBtn.classList.remove('qb-force-success'); }, 1500);
  4357:         } catch (_) {
  4358:           _forceRefreshBtn.classList.remove('qb-force-fetching');
  4359:           if (_forceRefreshIcon) _forceRefreshIcon.classList.remove('qb-spin');
  4360:           if (_forceRefreshLabel) _forceRefreshLabel.textContent = 'Active';
  4361:         } finally {
  4362:           _forceRefreshBtn.disabled = false;
  4363:           // 10s cooldown — prevent spam clicking
  4364:           setTimeout(() => { _forceRefreshCooldown = false; }, 10000);
  4365:         }
  4366:       });
  4367:     }
  4368: 
  4369:     // ── CACHE BADGE CLICK — wired once, permanent. ─────────────────────────
  4370:     // Cannot use onclick set inside updateDataFreshnessBadge because the
  4371:     // quickbaseLoadInFlight guard silently blocks re-entry. Fix: kill the
  4372:     // inflight reference first, then call forceRefresh.
  4373:     const _cacheBadgeBtn = root.querySelector('#qbCacheBadge');

  4375:       _cacheBadgeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  4376:         // Kill any in-flight promise so the guard doesn't block us
  4377:         quickbaseLoadInFlight = null;
  4378:         // Clear all QB cache entries for the active tab
  4379:         const _tabId = getActiveTabId();
  4380:         if (state.qbCache) {
  4381:           Object.keys(state.qbCache).forEach(k => { delete state.qbCache[k]; });
  4382:         }
  4383:         if (state._tabDataCache && _tabId) {
  4384:           delete state._tabDataCache[_tabId];
  4385:         }
  4386:         loadQuickbaseData({ forceRefresh: true, silent: false });
  4387:       });
  4388:     }

  4471:       const idx = Number(target.getAttribute('data-tab-idx'));
  4472:       if (!Number.isFinite(idx) || idx === state.activeTabIndex) return;
  4473: 
  4474:       // FIX[TabSwitch-1]: Only capture modal inputs when the modal is actually OPEN.
  4475:       // Calling captureSettingsDraftFromInputs() when modal is closed reads stale DOM

  4488:       quickbaseLoadInFlight = null;

  4612:     const saveBtn = root.querySelector('#qbSaveSettingsBtn');
  4613:     const saveLock = root.querySelector('#qbSettingsSavingLock');
  4614:     saveBtn.onclick = async () => {
  4615:       if (!me) return;
  4616:       const tabSnapshot = scrapeModalTabSnapshot();
  4617:       // FIX[TabName]: Use settingsEditingTabId as the authoritative source for which tab
  4618:       // is being edited. state.activeTabIndex can change if user clicks another tab
  4619:       // while the settings modal is open — that must NOT redirect the save to the wrong tab.
  4620:       const _editingTabId = String(state.settingsEditingTabId || getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  4621:       const activeIdx = state.quickbaseSettings.tabs.findIndex(
  4622:         (t) => String(t && t.id || '').trim() === _editingTabId
  4623:       );
  4624:       const safeActiveIdx = activeIdx >= 0 ? activeIdx : Number(state.activeTabIndex || 0);
  4625:       const saveTabId = _editingTabId || String(getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  4626: 
  4627:       // ── BYPASS: Read bypass toggle + personal config inputs ─────────────
  4628:       const bypassToggleEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassToggle');
  4629:       const isBypass = !!(bypassToggleEl && bypassToggleEl.checked);
  4630:       const bypassRL   = String((root.querySelector('#qbBypassReportLink') || {}).value || '').trim();
  4631:       const bypassTokEl = root.querySelector('#qbBypassToken');
  4632:       // SENTINEL STRIP: If value is the masked-dots sentinel, treat as empty (no new token entered).
  4633:       // The sentinel is only a visual indicator — it must NEVER be sent to the server.
  4634:       const _rawTokVal = String((bypassTokEl && bypassTokEl.value) || '').trim();
  4635:       const bypassTok  = (_rawTokVal === _QB_TOKEN_SAVED_SENTINEL) ? '' : _rawTokVal;
  4636: 
  4637:       // If bypass ON, merge personal report config into snapshot
  4638:       if (isBypass && bypassRL) {
  4639:         const parsedBypass = parseQuickbaseLink(bypassRL);
  4640:         tabSnapshot.reportLink = bypassRL;
  4641:         tabSnapshot.realm      = parsedBypass.realm || tabSnapshot.realm;
  4642:         tabSnapshot.tableId    = parsedBypass.tableId || tabSnapshot.tableId;
  4643:         tabSnapshot.qid        = parsedBypass.qid || tabSnapshot.qid;
  4644:       }
  4645:       // Always carry bypassGlobal flag in the tab snapshot
  4646:       tabSnapshot.bypassGlobal = isBypass;
  4647: 
  4648:       if (Array.isArray(state.quickbaseSettings.tabs) && state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[safeActiveIdx]) {
  4649:         state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[safeActiveIdx] = deepClone({
  4650:           ...state.quickbaseSettings.tabs[safeActiveIdx],
  4651:           ...tabSnapshot
  4652:         });
  4653:       }
  4654:       const activeTabId = saveTabId;
  4655:       if (activeTabId) {
  4656:         state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {};
  4657:         const prevTabSettings = createDefaultSettings(state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId] || {}, {});
  4658:         const _newBypassRL = (isBypass && bypassRL) ? bypassRL : (tabSnapshot.reportLink || prevTabSettings.reportLink || '');
  4659:         const _newParsed   = parseQuickbaseLink(_newBypassRL);
  4660:         state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[activeTabId] = createDefaultSettings({
  4661:           ...prevTabSettings,
  4662:           ...tabSnapshot,
  4663:           bypassGlobal: isBypass,
  4664:           // When bypass, persist the bypass reportLink into the tab's own settings
  4665:           reportLink: isBypass ? _newBypassRL : (tabSnapshot.reportLink || prevTabSettings.reportLink || ''),
  4666:           qid:        isBypass ? (_newParsed.qid || prevTabSettings.qid || '') : (tabSnapshot.qid || prevTabSettings.qid || ''),
  4667:           tableId:    isBypass ? (_newParsed.tableId || prevTabSettings.tableId || '') : (tabSnapshot.tableId || prevTabSettings.tableId || ''),
  4668:           realm:      isBypass ? (_newParsed.realm || prevTabSettings.realm || '') : (tabSnapshot.realm || prevTabSettings.realm || ''),
  4669:           customColumns: deepClone(state.customColumns || prevTabSettings.customColumns || []),
  4670:           customFilters: deepClone(state.customFilters || prevTabSettings.customFilters || []),
  4671:           filterMatch: state.filterMatch || prevTabSettings.filterMatch || 'ALL',
  4672:           dashboard_counters: deepClone(state.dashboardCounters || prevTabSettings.dashboard_counters || [])
  4673:         }, {});
  4674:       }
  4675:       state.tabName = tabSnapshot.tabName;
  4676:       // Bypass tab: keep its own reportLink/qid/tableId/realm isolated from global state
  4677:       if (tabSnapshot.bypassGlobal) {
  4678:         // Only update per-tab settings, don't stomp global state.reportLink
  4679:         const _btid = String(getActiveTabId() || '').trim();
  4680:         if (_btid) {
  4681:           state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId = state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId || {};
  4682:           state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_btid] = Object.assign(
  4683:             {},
  4684:             state.quickbaseSettings.settingsByTabId[_btid] || {},
  4685:             {
  4686:               bypassGlobal: true,
  4687:               reportLink: tabSnapshot.reportLink,
  4688:               qid: tabSnapshot.qid,
  4689:               tableId: tabSnapshot.tableId,
  4690:               realm: tabSnapshot.realm
  4691:             }
  4692:           );
  4693:         }
  4694:       } else {
  4695:         state.reportLink = tabSnapshot.reportLink;
  4696:         state.qid = tabSnapshot.qid;
  4697:         state.tableId = tabSnapshot.tableId;

  4922:     // ── FULLSCREEN TOGGLE + DYNAMIC SHELL HEIGHT ──────────────────────
  4923:     const fsBtn = root.querySelector('#qbFullscreenBtn');
  4924:     const fsExpand = root.querySelector('#qbFsIconExpand');
  4925:     const fsCollapse = root.querySelector('#qbFsIconCollapse');
  4926:     const qbShell = root.querySelector('#qbPageShell');
  4927: 
  4928:     // ── RESIZEOBSERVER: Dynamically fit shell height to container ──────
  4929:     // Sets shell.style.height = root.offsetHeight so the QB page always fills
  4930:     // its grid cell exactly — regardless of topbar, theme, or density changes.
  4931:     // More robust than calc(100vh - Npx) which can't know the real available
  4932:     // height at runtime. Skipped when fullscreen is active (CSS uses 100vh).
  4933:     let _qbShellResizeObs = null;
  4934:     function _fitQbShellHeight() {
  4935:       if (!qbShell || qbShell.classList.contains('qb-is-fullscreen')) return;
  4936:       const h = root.offsetHeight;
  4937:       if (h > 0) qbShell.style.height = h + 'px';
  4938:     }
  4939:     if (window.ResizeObserver) {
  4940:       _qbShellResizeObs = new ResizeObserver(_fitQbShellHeight);
  4941:       _qbShellResizeObs.observe(root);
  4942:     }
  4943:     // Initial fit — defer one frame so layout has settled after page render
  4944:     requestAnimationFrame(_fitQbShellHeight);
  4945: 
  4946:     if (fsBtn && qbShell) {
  4947:       // CSS-only in-browser fullscreen: position:fixed inset:0 z-index:100000
  4948:       //
  4949:       // ROOT CAUSE FIX (aurora_midnight theme):
  4950:       //   aurora_midnight adds `position: relative` to .main.card.
  4951:       //   My previous fix set overflow:clip on .main.card.pad.page-qb.
  4952:       //   In Chrome 108+ / Safari 16+, position:relative + overflow:clip/hidden
  4953:       //   creates a clipping context that TRAPS position:fixed descendants.
  4954:       //   → The fullscreen shell was being clipped inside #main.
  4955:       //
  4956:       // SOLUTION: On fullscreen enter, set root.style.overflow = 'visible'
  4957:       //   so the fixed-position shell is no longer clipped by its parent.
  4958:       //   Restore on exit. The ResizeObserver handles re-fitting the height.
  4959:       let _qbIsFs = false;
  4960: 
  4961:       function _applyQbFs(enable) {
  4962:         _qbIsFs = enable;
  4963:         qbShell.classList.toggle('qb-is-fullscreen', enable);
  4964:         if (enable) {
  4965:           // Clear JS-set inline height so CSS height:100vh !important takes over
  4966:           qbShell.style.height = '';
  4967:           // Unlock parent overflow so fixed child escapes the clipping context
  4968:           root.style.overflow = 'visible';
  4969:         } else {
  4970:           // Restore overflow:clip (NOT '' — empty would fall back to CSS which
  4971:           // might re-apply overflow:hidden from other rules and trap fixed children)
  4972:           root.style.overflow = 'clip';
  4973:           // Re-measure shell height for normal mode
  4974:           requestAnimationFrame(_fitQbShellHeight);
  4975:         }
  4976:         if (fsExpand)   fsExpand.style.display   = enable ? 'none' : '';
  4977:         if (fsCollapse) fsCollapse.style.display  = enable ? '' : 'none';
  4978:         // Lock/unlock body scroll when in fullscreen
  4979:         try { document.body.style.overflow = enable ? 'hidden' : ''; } catch (_) {}
  4980:       }
  4981: 
  4982:       fsBtn.onclick = () => _applyQbFs(!_qbIsFs);
  4983: 
  4984:       // Escape key closes fullscreen (mimics native fullscreen UX)
  4985:       const _qbEscHandler = (e) => {
  4986:         if (e.key === 'Escape' && _qbIsFs) _applyQbFs(false);
  4987:       };
  4988:       document.addEventListener('keydown', _qbEscHandler);
  4989: 
  4990:       // Cleanup on page navigation away
  4991:       const prevCleanupFs = root._cleanup;
  4992:       root._cleanup = () => {
  4993:         try { if (prevCleanupFs) prevCleanupFs(); } catch (_) {}
  4994:         try { if (_qbShellResizeObs) _qbShellResizeObs.disconnect(); } catch (_) {}
  4995:         document.removeEventListener('keydown', _qbEscHandler);
  4996:         // Restore body scroll + ALL parent inline styles if navigating away
  4997:         try { document.body.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  4998:         try { root.style.overflow = ''; } catch (_) {}
  4999:         try { root.style.padding  = ''; } catch (_) {}
  5000:       };
  5001:     }
  5002: 
  5003:     // ── FRESH / CACHED BADGE UPDATER ───────────────────────────────────
  5004:     function updateDataFreshnessBadge(fromCache) {
  5005:       const freshBadge = root.querySelector('#qbFreshBadge');
  5006:       const cacheBadge = root.querySelector('#qbCacheBadge');
  5007:       if (!freshBadge || !cacheBadge) return;
  5008:       if (fromCache) {
  5009:         freshBadge.style.display = 'none';
  5010:         cacheBadge.style.display = '';
  5011:         // Click handler is wired ONCE at init time (after root.innerHTML).
  5012:         // No onclick re-assignment here — avoids the quickbaseLoadInFlight block.
  5013:       } else {
  5014:         freshBadge.style.display = '';
  5015:         cacheBadge.style.display = 'none';
  5016:       }
  5017:     }
  5018:     } catch(pageInitErr) {
  5019:       // Surface async errors that would otherwise leave a blank page silently.
  5020:       // This catches querySelector failures when elements are missing from the
  5021:       // shell HTML and any other unexpected init errors.
  5022:       if (root.isConnected) {
  5023:         root.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;padding:40px;text-align:center;">
  5024:           <div>
  5025:             <div style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,80,80,0.9);margin-bottom:8px;">My Quickbase failed to load</div>
  5026:             <div style="font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);max-width:400px;line-height:1.6;">
  5027:               ${String(pageInitErr && (pageInitErr.message || pageInitErr) || 'Unknown error')}
  5028:               <br><br>Try refreshing the page. If this persists, contact your Super Admin.
  5029:             </div>
  5030:           </div>
  5031:         </div>`;
  5032:       }
  5033:     }
  5034:   };
  5035: })();

     1: /* @AI_CRITICAL_GUARD v3.0: UNTOUCHABLE ZONE — MACE APPROVAL REQUIRED.
     2:    Protects: Enterprise UI/UX · Realtime Sync Logic · Core State Management ·
     3:    Database/API Adapters · Tab Isolation · Virtual Column State ·
     4:    QuickBase Settings Persistence · Auth Flow.
     5:    DO NOT modify any existing logic, layout, or structure in this file without
     6:    first submitting a RISK IMPACT REPORT to MACE and receiving explicit "CLEARED" approval.
     7:    Violations will cause regressions. When in doubt — STOP and REPORT. */
     8: 
     9: 
    10: /* File: public/js/ui.js */
    11: 
    12: (function(){
    13:   const UI = {
    14:     el(sel, root){ return (root||document).querySelector(sel); },
    15:     els(sel, root){ return Array.from((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel)); },
    16:     esc(s){ return String(s??'').replace(/[&<>"']/g, c=>({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;' }[c])); },
    17: 
    18:     overrideLabel(override){
    19:       try{
    20:         const o = override;
    21:         if(!o || typeof o !== 'object') return '';
    22:         if(!o.enabled) return '';
    23:         if(String(o.scope||'') !== 'global') return '';
    24:         return `<span class="override-label" role="status" aria-live="polite">GLOBAL OVERRIDE ACTIVE</span>`;
    25:       }catch(_){
    26:         return '';
    27:       }
    28:     },
    29: 
    30:     initials(name){
    31:       const parts = String(name||"").trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    32:       if(!parts.length) return "U";
    33:       const a = (parts[0]||"")[0]||"";
    34:       const b = (parts[1]||parts[0]||"")[0]||"";
    35:       return (a+b).toUpperCase();
    36:     },
    37: 
    38:     async readImageAsDataUrl(file, maxSize){
    39:       const f = file;
    40:       if(!f) return null;
    41:       const dataUrl = await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
    42:         const r = new FileReader();
    43:         r.onload = ()=>resolve(String(r.result||""));
    44:         r.onerror = ()=>reject(r.error||new Error("read failed"));
    45:         r.readAsDataURL(f);
    46:       });
    47:       const limit = Number(maxSize||0);
    48:       if(!limit) return dataUrl;
    49:       const img = await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
    50:         const im = new Image();
    51:         im.onload = ()=>resolve(im);
    52:         im.onerror = ()=>reject(new Error("image load failed"));
    53:         im.src = dataUrl;
    54:       });
    55:       const w = img.naturalWidth||img.width;
    56:       const h = img.naturalHeight||img.height;
    57:       const scale = Math.min(1, limit/Math.max(w,h));
    58:       if(scale>=1) return dataUrl;
    59:       const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
    60:       canvas.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(w*scale));
    61:       canvas.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(h*scale));
    62:       const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    63:       ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    64:       return canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.9);
    65:     },
    66: 
    67:     openModal(id){
    68:       const m = UI.el('#'+id);
    69:       if(m){
    70:         // BUG FIX: closeModal() sets style.display='none' (inline style).
    71:         // Inline styles override CSS class rules (.modal.open { display:flex }).
    72:         // So on second open, the CSS class is added back but display:none wins → modal invisible.
    73:         // FIX: Always clear the inline style before adding the open class so CSS takes over.
    74:         m.style.display = '';
    75:         UI.bringToFront(m);
    76:         m.classList.add('open');
    77:       }
    78:       try{ document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); }catch(_){ }
    79:     },
    80: 
    81:     closeModal(id){
    82:       // Block closing the notification modal when MAILBOX_ASSIGN cases are pending
    83:       if(id === 'schedNotifModal' && window._schedNotifLocked) return;
    84:       const m = UI.el('#'+id);
    85:       if(m){
    86:         m.classList.remove('open');
    87:         // Fix: custom mailbox modals use 'is-open' class + display:none pattern
    88:         m.classList.remove('is-open');
    89:         m.style.display = 'none';
    90:       }
    91:       try{
    92:         const any = document.querySelector('.modal.open');
    93:         if(!any) document.body.classList.remove('modal-open');
    94:       }catch(_){ }
    95:     },
    96: 
    97:     bringToFront(modal, opts){
    98:       try{
    99:         const m = modal;
   100:         if(!m || !(m instanceof HTMLElement)) return;
   101:         if(document.body && m.parentElement === document.body){
   102:           document.body.appendChild(m);
   103:         }
   104:         const o = Object.assign({ baseZ: 2147483000, panelOffset: 1, headOffset: 2 }, opts || {});
   105:         m.style.zIndex = String(Math.max(10000, Number(o.baseZ)||2147483000));
   106:         const panel = m.querySelector('.panel');
   107:         if(panel) panel.style.zIndex = String((Number(m.style.zIndex)||2147483000) + Number(o.panelOffset||1));
   108:         const head = m.querySelector('.head, .modal-head');
   109:         if(head) head.style.zIndex = String((Number(m.style.zIndex)||2147483000) + Number(o.headOffset||2));
   110:       }catch(_){ }
   111:     },
   112: 
   113:     _ensureToastHost(){
   114:       let host = document.getElementById('toastHost');
   115:       if(host) return host;
   116:       host = document.createElement('div');
   117:       host.id = 'toastHost';
   118:       host.className = 'toast-host';
   119:       document.body.appendChild(host);
   120:       return host;
   121:     },
   122: 
   123:     _normalizeToastMessage(message){
   124:       if(message == null) return '';
   125:       if(typeof message === 'string') return message;
   126:       try{ if(message instanceof Error) return message.message || String(message); }catch(_){ }
   127:       if(typeof message === 'object'){
   128:         try{
   129:           if(typeof message.message === 'string') return message.message;
   130:           if(typeof message.error === 'string') return message.error;
   131:           if(typeof message.details === 'string') return message.details;
   132:           if(typeof message.hint === 'string') return message.hint;
   133:         }catch(_){ }
   134:         try{ return JSON.stringify(message); }catch(_){ return String(message); }
   135:       }
   136:       return String(message);
   137:     },
   138: 
   139:     _ensureHighAlertHosts(){
   140:       let overlay = document.getElementById('highAlertOverlay');
   141:       if(!overlay){
   142:         overlay = document.createElement('div');
   143:         overlay.id = 'highAlertOverlay';
   144:         overlay.className = 'high-alert-overlay';
   145:         overlay.style.display = 'none';
   146:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
   147:       }
   148:       let host = document.getElementById('highAlertHost');
   149:       if(!host){
   150:         host = document.createElement('div');
   151:         host.id = 'highAlertHost';
   152:         host.className = 'high-alert-host';
   153:         host.style.display = 'none';
   154:         host.innerHTML = `
   155:           <div class="high-alert-box" role="alert" aria-live="assertive">
   156:             <div class="high-alert-title">⚠️ Error</div>
   157:             <div class="high-alert-message" id="highAlertMessage"></div>
   158:             <div class="high-alert-actions">
   159:               <button class="btn danger" type="button" id="highAlertCloseBtn">Close</button>
   160:             </div>
   161:           </div>
   162:         `;
   163:         document.body.appendChild(host);
   164:       }
   165:       return { overlay, host };
   166:     },
   167: 
   168:     alertError(message, opts){
   169:       try{
   170:         const msg = UI._normalizeToastMessage(message);
   171:         const o = Object.assign({ title: '⚠️ Error', autoCloseMs: 7000 }, (opts||{}));
   172:         const hosts = UI._ensureHighAlertHosts();
   173:         const overlay = hosts.overlay;
   174:         const host = hosts.host;
   175:         const titleEl = host.querySelector('.high-alert-title');
   176:         const msgEl = host.querySelector('#highAlertMessage');
   177:         const closeBtn = host.querySelector('#highAlertCloseBtn');
   178: 
   179:         if(titleEl) titleEl.textContent = String(o.title || '⚠️ Error');
   180:         if(msgEl) msgEl.textContent = String(msg || 'Unknown error');
   181: 
   182:         overlay.style.display = 'block';
   183:         host.style.display = 'flex';
   184:         overlay.style.zIndex = '2147483645';
   185:         host.style.zIndex = '2147483646';
   186: 
   187:         if(closeBtn && !closeBtn._mumsBound){
   188:           closeBtn._mumsBound = true;
   189:           closeBtn.onclick = () => UI.closeAlertError();
   190:         }
   191:         if(!host._mumsBound){
   192:           host._mumsBound = true;
   193:           host.addEventListener('click', (ev)=>{ if(ev.target === host) UI.closeAlertError(); });
   194:         }
   195: 
   196:         if(host._mumsTimer) clearTimeout(host._mumsTimer);
   197:         const ms = Number(o.autoCloseMs || 0);
   198:         if(ms > 0){ host._mumsTimer = setTimeout(()=>UI.closeAlertError(), ms); }
   199:       }catch(err){ try{ console.error('UI.alertError failed', err); }catch(_){} }
   200:     },
   201: 
   202:     closeAlertError(){
   203:       try{
   204:         const overlay = document.getElementById('highAlertOverlay');
   205:         const host = document.getElementById('highAlertHost');
   206:         if(host && host._mumsTimer){ clearTimeout(host._mumsTimer); host._mumsTimer = null; }
   207:         if(overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
   208:         if(host) host.style.display = 'none';
   209:       }catch(_){}
   210:     },
   211: 
   212:     toast(message, variant){
   213:       try{
   214:         const v = String(variant||'').toLowerCase();
   215:         if(v==='danger' || v==='error' || v==='invalid'){
   216:           UI.alertError(message);
   217:           return;
   218:         }
   219:         const host = UI._ensureToastHost();
   220:         const t = document.createElement('div');
   221:         t.className = 'toast' + (v ? ` ${v}` : '');
   222:         const msg = UI._normalizeToastMessage(message);
   223:         t.textContent = msg;
   224:         host.appendChild(t);
   225:         requestAnimationFrame(()=>t.classList.add('show'));
   226:         setTimeout(()=>{
   227:           t.classList.remove('show');
   228:           setTimeout(()=>{ try{ t.remove(); }catch(_){} }, 250);
   229:         }, 3200);
   230:       }catch(e){ try{ console.log(UI._normalizeToastMessage(message)); }catch(_){} }
   231:     },
   232: 
   233:     confirm(opts){
   234:       const o = Object.assign({
   235:         title: 'Confirm', message: '', detail: '', okText: 'Confirm', cancelText: 'Cancel', danger: false
   236:       }, (opts||{}));
   237: 
   238:       return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   239:         let modal = document.getElementById('mumsConfirmModal');
   240:         if(!modal){
   241:           modal = document.createElement('div');
   242:           modal.id = 'mumsConfirmModal';
   243:           modal.className = 'modal confirm-modal';
   244:           modal.innerHTML = `
   245:             <div class="panel" style="max-width:520px">
   246:               <div class="head">
   247:                 <div>
   248:                   <div class="announce-title" id="mcmTitle"></div>
   249:                   <div class="small muted" id="mcmDetail" style="margin-top:2px"></div>
   250:                 </div>
   251:                 <button class="btn ghost" type="button" id="mcmX" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
   252:               </div>
   253:               <div class="body" style="display:grid;gap:10px">
   254:                 <div class="h3" id="mcmMsg" style="margin:0"></div>
   255:                 <div class="small muted" id="mcmMsg2" style="margin-top:-6px"></div>
   256:                 <div class="row" style="justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap">
   257:                   <button class="btn" id="mcmCancel" type="button"></button>
   258:                   <button class="btn primary" id="mcmOk" type="button"></button>
   259:                 </div>
   260:               </div>
   261:             </div>
   262:           `;
   263:           document.body.appendChild(modal);
   264:         }
   265: 
   266:         const titleEl = modal.querySelector('#mcmTitle');
   267:         const detailEl = modal.querySelector('#mcmDetail');
   268:         const msgEl = modal.querySelector('#mcmMsg');
   269:         const msg2El = modal.querySelector('#mcmMsg2');
   270:         const okBtn = modal.querySelector('#mcmOk');
   271:         const cancelBtn = modal.querySelector('#mcmCancel');
   272:         const xBtn = modal.querySelector('#mcmX');
   273: 
   274:         titleEl.textContent = String(o.title||'Confirm');
   275:         msgEl.textContent = String(o.message||'');
   276:         msg2El.textContent = String(o.detail||'');
   277:         detailEl.textContent = '';
   278:         cancelBtn.textContent = String(o.cancelText||'Cancel');
   279:         okBtn.textContent = String(o.okText||'Confirm');
   280: 
   281:         okBtn.classList.toggle('danger', !!o.danger);
   282:         okBtn.classList.toggle('primary', !o.danger);
   283: 
   284:         const cleanup = ()=>{
   285:           try{
   286:             modal.classList.remove('open');
   287:             modal.removeEventListener('click', onBackdrop);
   288:             document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);
   289:             okBtn.onclick = null; cancelBtn.onclick = null; xBtn.onclick = null;
   290:           }catch(_){}
   291:         };
   292:         const done = (v)=>{ cleanup(); resolve(!!v); };
   293: 
   294:         const onBackdrop = (e)=>{ if(e.target === modal) done(false); };
   295:         const onKey = (e)=>{
   296:           if(e.key === 'Escape'){ e.preventDefault(); done(false); }
   297:           if(e.key === 'Enter'){ e.preventDefault(); done(true); }
   298:         };
   299: 
   300:         okBtn.onclick = ()=>done(true);
   301:         cancelBtn.onclick = ()=>done(false);
   302:         xBtn.onclick = ()=>done(false);
   303: 
   304:         UI.bringToFront(modal, { baseZ: 2147483200, panelOffset: 1, headOffset: 2 });
   305:         modal.addEventListener('click', onBackdrop);
   306:         document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   307:         modal.classList.add('open');
   308:         setTimeout(()=>{ try{ okBtn.focus(); }catch(_){} }, 0);
   309:       });
   310:     },
   311: 
   312:     promptText(opts){
   313:       const o = Object.assign({
   314:         title: 'Input required', message: '', detail: '', placeholder: 'Type here...',
   315:         okText: 'Save', cancelText: 'Cancel', required: true, maxLen: 500
   316:       }, (opts||{}));
   317: 
   318:       return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   319:         let modal = document.getElementById('mumsPromptTextModal');
   320:         if(!modal){
   321:           modal = document.createElement('div');
   322:           modal.id = 'mumsPromptTextModal';
   323:           modal.className = 'modal prompt-modal';
   324:           modal.innerHTML = `
   325:             <div class="panel" style="max-width:560px">
   326:               <div class="head">
   327:                 <div>
   328:                   <div class="announce-title" id="mptTitle"></div>
   329:                   <div class="small muted" id="mptDetail" style="margin-top:2px"></div>
   330:                 </div>
   331:                 <button class="btn ghost" type="button" id="mptX" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
   332:               </div>
   333:               <div class="body" style="display:grid;gap:10px">
   334:                 <div class="h3" id="mptMsg" style="margin:0"></div>
   335:                 <textarea id="mptTextarea" class="input" style="min-height:110px;resize:vertical" maxlength="${o.maxLen}"></textarea>
   336:                 <div class="row" style="justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
   337:                   <div class="small muted" id="mptHint"></div>
   338:                   <div class="row" style="gap:8px">
   339:                     <button class="btn" id="mptCancel" type="button"></button>
   340:                     <button class="btn primary" id="mptOk" type="button"></button>
   341:                   </div>
   342:                 </div>
   343:               </div>
   344:             </div>
   345:           `;
   346:           document.body.appendChild(modal);
   347:         }
   348: 
   349:         const titleEl = modal.querySelector('#mptTitle');
   350:         const detailEl = modal.querySelector('#mptDetail');
   351:         const msgEl = modal.querySelector('#mptMsg');
   352:         const ta = modal.querySelector('#mptTextarea');
   353:         const hintEl = modal.querySelector('#mptHint');
   354:         const okBtn = modal.querySelector('#mptOk');
   355:         const cancelBtn = modal.querySelector('#mptCancel');
   356:         const xBtn = modal.querySelector('#mptX');
   357: 
   358:         titleEl.textContent = String(o.title||'Input required');
   359:         detailEl.textContent = String(o.detail||'');
   360:         msgEl.textContent = String(o.message||'');
   361:         ta.value = String(o.value||'');
   362:         ta.placeholder = String(o.placeholder||'');
   363:         okBtn.textContent = String(o.okText||'Save');
   364:         cancelBtn.textContent = String(o.cancelText||'Cancel');
   365:         hintEl.textContent = o.required ? `Required (max ${o.maxLen} chars)` : `Optional (max ${o.maxLen} chars)`;
   366: 
   367:         const cleanup = ()=>{
   368:           try{
   369:             modal.classList.remove('open');
   370:             modal.removeEventListener('click', onBackdrop);
   371:             document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   372:             okBtn.onclick = null; cancelBtn.onclick = null; xBtn.onclick = null;
   373:           }catch(_){ }
   374:         };
   375:         const done = (v)=>{ cleanup(); resolve(v); };
   376: 
   377:         const onBackdrop = (e)=>{ if(e.target === modal) done(null); };
   378:         const onKey = (e)=>{
   379:           if(e.key === 'Escape'){ e.preventDefault(); done(null); }
   380:           if(e.key === 'Enter' && (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey)){ e.preventDefault(); okBtn.click(); }
   381:         };
   382: 
   383:         okBtn.onclick = ()=>{
   384:           const v = String(ta.value||'').trim();
   385:           if(o.required && !v){
   386:             UI.toast('Please enter a reason before saving.', 'warn');
   387:             try{ ta.focus(); }catch(_){ }
   388:             return;
   389:           }
   390:           done(v);
   391:         };
   392:         cancelBtn.onclick = ()=>done(null);
   393:         xBtn.onclick = ()=>done(null);
   394: 
   395:         UI.bringToFront(modal, { baseZ: 2147483200, panelOffset: 1, headOffset: 2 });
   396:         modal.addEventListener('click', onBackdrop);
   397:         document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   398:         modal.classList.add('open');
   399:         setTimeout(()=>{ try{ ta.focus(); }catch(_){ } }, 0);
   400:       });
   401:     },
   402: 
   403:     attendancePrompt(user, team){
   404:       return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   405:         const u = user || {};
   406:         const t = team || { id:'', label:'' };
   407:         const teamId = String(u.teamId || t.id || '');
   408:         const reasons = (window.Store && Store.getTeamWFHReasons) ? (Store.getTeamWFHReasons(teamId)||[]) : [];
   409:         const safeReasons = (Array.isArray(reasons) && reasons.length) ? reasons : ['Other'];
   410: 
   411:         let modal = document.getElementById('mumsAttendanceModal');
   412:         if(!modal){
   413:           modal = document.createElement('div');
   414:           modal.id = 'mumsAttendanceModal';
   415:           modal.className = 'modal attendance-modal';
   416:           modal.innerHTML = `
   417:             <div class="panel" style="max-width:640px">
   418:               <div class="head">
   419:                 <div>
   420:                   <div class="announce-title">Attendance Confirmation</div>
   421:                   <div class="small muted" id="attSub" style="margin-top:2px"></div>
   422:                 </div>
   423:               </div>
   424:               <div class="body" style="display:grid;gap:12px">
   425:                 <div class="row" style="gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
   426:                   <div class="avatar-lg" id="attAvatar"></div>
   427:                   <div style="display:grid;gap:2px">
   428:                     <div class="h3" id="attName" style="margin:0"></div>
   429:                     <div class="small muted" id="attTeam"></div>
   430:                   </div>
   431:                 </div>
   432: 
   433:                 <div class="card pad" style="padding:14px">
   434:                   <div class="small muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">
   435:                     To confirm your attendance for today, please select if you are working.
   436:                   </div>
   437:                   <div class="row" style="gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
   438:                     <button class="btn" type="button" id="attOffice">In Office</button>
   439:                     <button class="btn" type="button" id="attWFH">Work From Home</button>
   440:                   </div>
   441: 
   442:                   <div id="attWFHWrap" style="display:none;margin-top:12px">
   443:                     <label class="field" style="max-width:420px">
   444:                       <div class="label">WFH Reason (required)</div>
   445:                       <select class="input" id="attReason">
   446:                         <option value="">Select reason</option>
   447:                       </select>
   448:                     </label>
   449:                   </div>
   450: 
   451:                   <div class="row" style="justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
   452:                     <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="attSubmit" disabled>Save Attendance</button>
   453:                   </div>
   454:                 </div>
   455:                 <div class="small muted">
   456:                   Note: Attendance is required during your active shift window. You cannot proceed until you submit.
   457:                 </div>
   458:               </div>
   459:             </div>
   460:           `;
   461:           document.body.appendChild(modal);
   462:         }
   463: 
   464:         document.body.classList.add('attendance-locked');
   465:         UI.bringToFront(modal, { baseZ: 2147483300, panelOffset: 1, headOffset: 2 });
   466: 
   467:         const name = String(u.name || u.fullName || u.username || 'User');
   468:         const sub = modal.querySelector('#attSub');
   469:         const attName = modal.querySelector('#attName');
   470:         const attTeam = modal.querySelector('#attTeam');
   471:         const av = modal.querySelector('#attAvatar');
   472:         const reasonSel = modal.querySelector('#attReason');
   473:         const wfhWrap = modal.querySelector('#attWFHWrap');
   474:         const bOffice = modal.querySelector('#attOffice');
   475:         const bWFH = modal.querySelector('#attWFH');
   476:         const bSubmit = modal.querySelector('#attSubmit');
   477: 
   478:         sub.textContent = 'Please submit your attendance to continue.';
   479:         attName.textContent = name;
   480:         attTeam.textContent = `Team: ${String(t.label||teamId||'')}`;
   481: 
   482:         try{
   483:           const prof = (window.Store && Store.getProfile) ? (Store.getProfile(u.id)||{}) : {};
   484:           if(prof.photoDataUrl){
   485:             av.innerHTML = `<img src="${UI.esc(prof.photoDataUrl)}" alt="Profile" />`;
   486:           }else{
   487:             av.textContent = UI.initials(name);
   488:           }
   489:         }catch(_){
   490:           av.textContent = UI.initials(name);
   491:         }
   492: 
   493:         reasonSel.innerHTML = `<option value="">Select reason</option>` + safeReasons.map(r=>`<option value="${UI.esc(r)}">${UI.esc(r)}</option>`).join('');
   494: 
   495:         let mode = '';
   496:         let reason = '';
   497: 
   498:         function update(){
   499:           if(mode === 'OFFICE'){
   500:             wfhWrap.style.display = 'none';
   501:             bSubmit.disabled = false;
   502:           }else if(mode === 'WFH'){
   503:             wfhWrap.style.display = '';
   504:             bSubmit.disabled = !reason;
   505:           }else{
   506:             wfhWrap.style.display = 'none';
   507:             bSubmit.disabled = true;
   508:           }
   509:           bOffice.classList.toggle('primary', mode==='OFFICE');
   510:           bWFH.classList.toggle('primary', mode==='WFH');
   511:         }
   512: 
   513:         bOffice.onclick = ()=>{ mode='OFFICE'; reason=''; if(reasonSel) reasonSel.value=''; update(); };
   514:         bWFH.onclick = ()=>{ mode='WFH'; update(); };
   515:         reasonSel.onchange = ()=>{ reason = String(reasonSel.value||''); update(); };
   516: 
   517:         const onKey = (e)=>{
   518:           if(e.key === 'Escape'){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); return false; }
   519:           return true;
   520:         };
   521: 
   522:         document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   523: 
   524:         bSubmit.onclick = ()=>{
   525:           if(!mode) return;
   526:           if(mode==='WFH' && !reason) return;
   527:           document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   528:           modal.classList.remove('open');
   529:           document.body.classList.remove('attendance-locked');
   530: 
   531:           const record = {
   532:             id: 'att_' + Math.random().toString(16).slice(2) + '_' + Date.now(),
   533:             userId: u.id,
   534:             username: u.username || '',
   535:             name,
   536:             teamId: teamId || '',
   537:             teamLabel: String(t.label||''),
   538:             mode,
   539:             reason: (mode==='WFH') ? reason : '',
   540:             ts: Date.now()
   541:           };
   542:           resolve(record);
   543:         };
   544: 
   545:         modal.onclick = (e)=>{ if(e.target===modal){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); } };
   546:         update();
   547:         modal.classList.add('open');
   548:       });
   549:     },
   550: 
   551:     overtimePrompt(user, team, ctx){
   552:       return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   553:         const u = user || {};
   554:         const t = team || { id:'', label:'' };
   555:         const c = ctx || {};
   556:         const scheduledEnd = Number(c.scheduledEndTs || 0);
   557:         const overtimeMinutes = Math.max(0, Number(c.overtimeMinutes || 0));
   558:         const name = String(u.name || u.fullName || u.username || 'User');
   559: 
   560:         let modal = document.getElementById('mumsOvertimeModal');
   561:         if(!modal){
   562:           modal = document.createElement('div');
   563:           modal.id = 'mumsOvertimeModal';
   564:           modal.className = 'modal attendance-modal';
   565:           modal.innerHTML = `
   566:             <div class="panel" style="max-width:700px">
   567:               <div class="head">
   568:                 <div>
   569:                   <div class="announce-title">Overtime Confirmation Required</div>

   571:                 </div>
   572:               </div>
   573:               <div class="body" style="display:grid;gap:12px">
   574:                 <div class="card pad" style="padding:14px;display:grid;gap:10px">
   575:                   <div class="small" style="line-height:1.5;color:#e2e8f0">
   576:                     Your scheduled work hours have ended. Please confirm if you are continuing as overtime.
   577:                   </div>
   578:                   <div class="small muted" id="otMeta"></div>
   579:                   <div class="row" style="gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">

   581:                     <button class="btn" type="button" id="otNo">No, mark shift as completed</button>
   582:                   </div>

   586:                       <div class="label">Reason for Overtime (required)</div>
   587:                       <textarea class="input" id="otReason" rows="3" maxlength="300" placeholder="Example: Backlog clean-up, urgent customer cases, production support"></textarea>
   588:                     </label>
   589:                     <div class="row" style="justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:8px">
   590:                       <button class="btn" type="button" id="otCancelReason">Back</button>
   591:                       <button class="btn primary" type="button" id="otConfirmYes" disabled>Confirm Overtime</button>
   592:                     </div>
   593:                   </div>
   594:                 </div>
   595:               </div>
   596:             </div>
   597:           `;
   598:           document.body.appendChild(modal);
   599:         }
   600: 
   601:         UI.bringToFront(modal, { baseZ: 2147483350, panelOffset: 1, headOffset: 2 });
   602:         const sub = modal.querySelector('#otSub');
   603:         const meta = modal.querySelector('#otMeta');
   604:         const yesBtn = modal.querySelector('#otYes');
   605:         const noBtn = modal.querySelector('#otNo');
   606:         const reasonWrap = modal.querySelector('#otReasonWrap');
   607:         const reasonTa = modal.querySelector('#otReason');
   608:         const cancelReason = modal.querySelector('#otCancelReason');
   609:         const confirmYes = modal.querySelector('#otConfirmYes');
   610: 
   611:         sub.textContent = `${name} • Team ${String(t.label || t.id || u.teamId || 'N/A')}`;
   612:         const when = scheduledEnd ? new Date(scheduledEnd).toLocaleString('en-CA', { year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'2-digit', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' }) : 'N/A';
   613:         const hh = Math.floor(overtimeMinutes / 60);
   614:         const mm = overtimeMinutes % 60;
   615:         const otLabel = overtimeMinutes > 0 ? `${hh>0?`${hh}h `:''}${mm}m` : '0m';
   616:         meta.textContent = `Scheduled end: ${when} • Current overtime: ${otLabel}`;
   617: 
   618:         const cleanup = ()=>{
   619:           modal.classList.remove('open');
   620:           modal.onclick = null;
   621:           document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   622:         };
   623:         const finish = (v)=>{ cleanup(); resolve(v); };
   624:         const onKey = (e)=>{
   625:           if(e.key === 'Escape'){ e.preventDefault(); finish({ action:'NO' }); }
   626:         };
   627:         document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey, true);
   628: 
   629:         const syncReasonState = ()=>{
   630:           const txt = String((reasonTa && reasonTa.value) || '').trim();
   631:           if(confirmYes) confirmYes.disabled = !txt;
   632:         };
   633: 
   634:         if(reasonTa) reasonTa.value = '';
   635:         if(reasonWrap) reasonWrap.style.display = 'none';
   636:         if(confirmYes) confirmYes.disabled = true;
   637: 
   638:         yesBtn.onclick = ()=>{
   639:           if(reasonWrap) reasonWrap.style.display = '';
   640:           try{ reasonTa && reasonTa.focus(); }catch(_){ }
   641:           syncReasonState();
   642:         };
   643:         noBtn.onclick = ()=>finish({ action:'NO' });
   644:         if(reasonTa) reasonTa.oninput = ()=>syncReasonState();
   645:         if(cancelReason) cancelReason.onclick = ()=>{
   646:           if(reasonWrap) reasonWrap.style.display = 'none';
   647:           if(reasonTa) reasonTa.value = '';
   648:           syncReasonState();
   649:         };
   650:         if(confirmYes) confirmYes.onclick = ()=>{
   651:           const reason = String((reasonTa && reasonTa.value) || '').trim();
   652:           if(!reason) return;
   653:           finish({ action:'YES', reason });
   654:         };
   655: 
   656:         modal.onclick = (e)=>{ if(e.target===modal){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); } };
   657:         modal.classList.add('open');
   658:       });
   659:     },
   660: 
   661:     downloadJSON(filename, obj){
   662:       const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2)], { type:'application/json' });
   663:       const a = document.createElement('a');
   664:       a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   665:       a.download = filename;
   666:       document.body.appendChild(a);
   667:       a.click();
   668:       a.remove();
   669:       setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 4000);
   670:     },
   671: 
   672:     downloadCSV(filename, rows){
   673:       const esc = (v)=>{
   674:         const s = String(v ?? '');
   675:         if(/^[0-9]{12,18}$/.test(s)){ return '"=""' + s + '"""'; }
   676:         if(/[",\n\r]/.test(s)) return '"' + s.replace(/"/g,'""') + '"';
   677:         return s;
   678:       };
   679:       const csv = rows.map(r => r.map(esc).join(',')).join('\r\n');
   680:       const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
   681:       const a = document.createElement('a');
   682:       a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   683:       a.download = filename;
   684:       document.body.appendChild(a);
   685:       a.click();
   686:       a.remove();
   687:       setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 4000);
   688:     },
   689: 
   690:     pickJSON(){
   691:       return new Promise((resolve)=>{
   692:         const inp = document.createElement('input');
   693:         inp.type='file';
   694:         inp.accept='application/json';
   695:         inp.onchange = async () => {
   696:           const f = inp.files && inp.files[0];
   697:           if(!f) return resolve(null);
   698:           const txt = await f.text();
   699:           try{ resolve(JSON.parse(txt)); }catch(e){ resolve(null); }
   700:         };
   701:         inp.click();
   702:       });
   703:     },
   704: 
   705:     manilaParts(date){
   706:       const Config = window.Config;
   707:       const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA', {
   708:         timeZone: (Config && Config.TZ) || 'Asia/Manila',
   709:         year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',
   710:         hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',
   711:         hour12:false
   712:       });
   713:       const parts = Object.fromEntries(
   714:         fmt.formatToParts(date||new Date())
   715:           .filter(p=>p.type!=='literal')
   716:           .map(p=>[p.type,p.value])
   717:       );
   718:       return {
   719:         y:+parts.year, m:+parts.month, d:+parts.day,
   720:         hh:+parts.hour, mm:+parts.minute, ss:+parts.second,
   721:         isoDate:`${parts.year}-${parts.month}-${parts.day}`,
   722:         iso:`${parts.year}-${parts.month}-${parts.day}T${parts.hour}:${parts.minute}:${parts.second}`
   723:       };
   724:     },
   725:     manilaNow(){ return UI.manilaParts(new Date()); },

   727:     mailboxNowParts(){
   728:       try{
   729:         const u = (window.Auth && Auth.getUser) ? Auth.getUser() : null;
   730:         const superAdmin = window.Config && Config.ROLES ? Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN : 'SUPER_ADMIN';
   731:         const isSA = !!(u && u.role === superAdmin);
   732:         let o = (window.Store && Store.getMailboxTimeOverride) ? Store.getMailboxTimeOverride() : null;
   733:         try{
   734:           const raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_mailbox_time_override_cloud');
   735:           const cloud = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
   736:           if(cloud && typeof cloud === 'object' && cloud.enabled && String(cloud.scope) === 'global'){
   737:             const def = { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'global' };
   738:             const c = Object.assign({}, def, cloud);
   739:             c.enabled = !!c.enabled;
   740:             c.ms = Number(c.ms)||0;
   741:             c.freeze = (c.freeze !== false);
   742:             c.setAt = Number(c.setAt)||0;
   743:             c.scope = 'global';
   744:             const oScope = String(o?.scope||'');
   745:             const oMs = Number(o?.ms)||0;
   746:             const oSetAt = Number(o?.setAt)||0;
   747:             const oFreeze = (o?.freeze !== false);
   748:             if(!o || !o.enabled || oScope !== 'global' || oMs !== c.ms || oSetAt !== c.setAt || oFreeze !== c.freeze){
   749:               o = c;
   750:             }
   751:           }
   752:         }catch(_){}
   753:         if(!o || !o.enabled || String(o.scope||'') !== 'global'){
   754:           try{
   755:             const raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_mailbox_time_override_cloud');
   756:             const cloud = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
   757:             if(cloud && typeof cloud === 'object' && cloud.enabled && String(cloud.scope) === 'global'){
   758:               const def = { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'global' };
   759:               const c = Object.assign({}, def, cloud);
   760:               c.enabled = !!c.enabled;
   761:               c.ms = Number(c.ms)||0;
   762:               c.freeze = (c.freeze !== false);
   763:               c.setAt = Number(c.setAt)||0;
   764:               c.scope = 'global';
   765:               o = c;
   766:             }
   767:           }catch(_){}
   768:         }
   769: 
   770:         if(!o || !o.enabled) return UI.manilaNow();
   771:         const scope = (String(o.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only';
   772:         if(scope === 'sa_only' && !isSA) return UI.manilaNow();
   773: 
   774:         const base = Number(o.ms);
   775:         const MIN_VALID_MS = Date.UTC(2020,0,1);
   776:         const MAX_VALID_MS = Date.now() + (366 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   777:         if(!Number.isFinite(base) || base <= 0) return UI.manilaNow();
   778:         if(base < MIN_VALID_MS || base > MAX_VALID_MS) return UI.manilaNow();
   779: 
   780:         const freeze = (o.freeze !== false);
   781:         let setAt = Number(o.setAt)||0;
   782:         if(!freeze){
   783:           if(!Number.isFinite(setAt) || setAt <= 0 || setAt > (Date.now() + 60*1000)) setAt = Date.now();
   784:         }else{
   785:           setAt = 0;
   786:         }
   787: 
   788:         const ms = freeze ? base : (base + Math.max(0, Date.now() - setAt));
   789:         if(!Number.isFinite(ms) || ms <= 0) return UI.manilaNow();
   790:         return UI.manilaParts(new Date(ms));
   791:       }catch(_){
   792:         return UI.manilaNow();
   793:       }
   794:     },

   796:     mailboxTimeInfo(){
