   806:         try{
   807:           const raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_mailbox_time_override_cloud');
   808:           const cloud = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
   809:           if(cloud && typeof cloud === 'object' && cloud.enabled && String(cloud.scope) === 'global'){
   810:             const def = { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'global' };
   811:             const c = Object.assign({}, def, cloud);
   812:             c.enabled = !!c.enabled;
   813:             c.ms = Number(c.ms)||0;
   814:             c.freeze = (c.freeze !== false);
   815:             c.setAt = Number(c.setAt)||0;
   816:             c.scope = 'global';
   817:             const oScope = String(o?.scope||'');
   818:             const oMs = Number(o?.ms)||0;
   819:             const oSetAt = Number(o?.setAt)||0;
   820:             const oFreeze = (o?.freeze !== false);
   821:             if(!o || !o.enabled || oScope !== 'global' || oMs !== c.ms || oSetAt !== c.setAt || oFreeze !== c.freeze){
   822:               o = c;
   823:             }
   824:           }
   825:         }catch(_){}
   826:         if(!o || !o.enabled || String(o.scope||'') !== 'global'){
   827:           try{
   828:             const raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_mailbox_time_override_cloud');
   829:             const cloud = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
   830:             if(cloud && typeof cloud === 'object' && cloud.enabled && String(cloud.scope) === 'global'){
   831:               const def = { enabled:false, ms:0, freeze:true, setAt:0, scope:'global' };
   832:               const c = Object.assign({}, def, cloud);
   833:               c.enabled = !!c.enabled;
   834:               c.ms = Number(c.ms)||0;
   835:               c.freeze = (c.freeze !== false);
   836:               c.setAt = Number(c.setAt)||0;
   837:               c.scope = 'global';
   838:               o = c;
   839:             }
   840:           }catch(_){}
   841:         }
   842: 
   843:         if(!o || !o.enabled) return info;
   844:         const base = Number(o.ms);
   845:         const MIN_VALID_MS = Date.UTC(2020,0,1);
   846:         const MAX_VALID_MS = Date.now() + (366 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   847:         if(!Number.isFinite(base) || base <= 0) return info;
   848:         if(base < MIN_VALID_MS || base > MAX_VALID_MS) return info;
   849:         info.scope = (String(o.scope||'sa_only') === 'global') ? 'global' : 'sa_only';
   850:         info.isApplicable = (info.scope === 'global') ? true : info.isSuperAdmin;
   851:         if(!info.isApplicable) return info;
   852:         info.overrideEnabled = true;
   853:         info.freeze = (o.freeze !== false);
   854:         info.baseMs = base;
   855:         let setAt = Number(o.setAt)||0;
   856:         if(info.freeze === false){
   857:           if(!Number.isFinite(setAt) || setAt <= 0 || setAt > (Date.now() + 60*1000)) setAt = Date.now();
   858:         }else{
   859:           setAt = 0;
   860:         }
   861:         info.effectiveMs = info.freeze ? info.baseMs : (info.baseMs + Math.max(0, Date.now()-setAt));
   862:         info.effectiveParts = UI.manilaParts(new Date(info.effectiveMs));
   863:       }catch(_){ }
   864:       return info;
   865:     },

   867:     isMailboxOverrideActive(){
   868:       try{
   869:         const i = UI.mailboxTimeInfo();
   870:         return !!(i && i.overrideEnabled);

   873: 
   874:     parseManilaDateTimeLocal(v){
   875:       const s = String(v||'').trim();
   876:       if(!s || !s.includes('T')) return 0;
   877:       const [d,t] = s.split('T');
   878:       const [yy,mm,dd] = d.split('-').map(n=>Number(n));
   879:       const [hh,mi] = t.split(':').map(n=>Number(n));
   880:       if(!yy||!mm||!dd||Number.isNaN(hh)||Number.isNaN(mi)) return 0;
   881:       return Date.UTC(yy, mm-1, dd, hh-8, mi, 0, 0);
   882:     },
   883: 
   884:     formatManilaDateTimeLocal(ms){
   885:       const p = UI.manilaParts(new Date(Number(ms)||Date.now()));
   886:       const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0');
   887:       return `${p.y}-${pad(p.m)}-${pad(p.d)}T${pad(p.hh)}:${pad(p.mm)}`;
   888:     },
   889: 
   890:     isoToYMD(iso){
   891:       const parts = String(iso||'').split('-');
   892:       const y = Number(parts[0]);
   893:       const m = Number(parts[1]);
   894:       const d = Number(parts[2]);
   895:       if(!y || !m || !d) return null;
   896:       return { y, m, d };
   897:     },
   898: 
   899:     weekdayFromISO(iso){
   900:       const v = UI.isoToYMD(iso);
   901:       if(!v) return null;
   902:       const t = [0, 3, 2, 5, 0, 3, 5, 1, 4, 6, 2, 4];
   903:       let y = v.y;
   904:       const m = v.m;
   905:       const d = v.d;
   906:       if(m < 3) y -= 1;
   907:       const wd = (y + Math.floor(y/4) - Math.floor(y/100) + Math.floor(y/400) + t[m-1] + d) % 7;
   908:       return wd;
   909:     },
   910: 
   911:     addDaysISO(iso, deltaDays){
   912:       const v = UI.isoToYMD(iso);
   913:       if(!v) return String(iso||'');
   914:       const ms = Date.UTC(v.y, v.m-1, v.d) + (Number(deltaDays||0) * 86400000);
   915:       const d = new Date(ms);
   916:       const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0');
   917:       return `${d.getUTCFullYear()}-${pad(d.getUTCMonth()+1)}-${pad(d.getUTCDate())}`;
   918:     },
   919: 
   920:     manilaTodayISO(){
   921:       return UI.manilaNow().isoDate;
   922:     },
   923:     minutesOfDay(p){ return (p.hh*60) + p.mm; },
   924:     parseHM(hm){ const a = String(hm||'00:00').split(':'); return (+a[0]||0)*60 + (+a[1]||0); },
   925: 
   926:     DAYS: ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'],
   927: 
   928:     shiftMeta(team){
   929:       let startHM = team && team.teamStart;
   930:       let endHM = team && team.teamEnd;
   931:       try{
   932:         if(window.Store && Store.getTeamConfig && team && team.id){
   933:           const cfg = Store.getTeamConfig(team.id);
   934:           startHM = (cfg && cfg.schedule && cfg.schedule.start) ? cfg.schedule.start : startHM;
   935:           endHM = (cfg && cfg.schedule && cfg.schedule.end) ? cfg.schedule.end : endHM;
   936:         }
   937:       }catch(_){ }
   938:       const start = UI.parseHM(startHM);
   939:       const end = UI.parseHM(endHM);
   940:       const wraps = end <= start;
   941:       const length = wraps ? (24*60 - start + end) : (end - start);
   942:       return { start, end, wraps, length };
   943:     },
   944: 
   945:     offsetFromShiftStart(team, hm){
   946:       const m = UI.parseHM(hm);
   947:       const meta = UI.shiftMeta(team);
   948:       if(!meta.wraps) return m - meta.start;
   949:       if(m >= meta.start) return m - meta.start;
   950:       return (24*60 - meta.start) + m;
   951:     },
   952: 
   953:     blockToStyle(team, block){
   954:       const meta = UI.shiftMeta(team);
   955:       const a = UI.offsetFromShiftStart(team, block.start);
   956:       const b = UI.offsetFromShiftStart(team, block.end);
   957:       const left = (a / meta.length) * 100;
   958:       const width = ((b - a) / meta.length) * 100;
   959:       return { left: left, width: width };
   960:     },
   961: 
   962:     snapMinutes(mins, step){
   963:       const s = step || 15;
   964:       return Math.max(0, Math.round(mins / s) * s);
   965:     },
   966: 
   967:     offsetToHM(team, off){
   968:       const meta = UI.shiftMeta(team);
   969:       const abs = (meta.start + off) % (24*60);
   970:       const hh = String(Math.floor(abs/60)).padStart(2,'0');
   971:       const mm = String(abs%60).padStart(2,'0');
   972:       return `${hh}:${mm}`;
   973:     },
   974: 
   975:     manilaNowDate(){

   977:     },
   978: 
   979:     manilaWeekStartMondayMs(){
   980:       const d = UI.manilaNowDate();
   981:       const day = d.getDay();
   982:       const diff = (day === 0) ? 6 : (day - 1);
   983:       d.setDate(d.getDate() - diff);
   984:       d.setHours(0,0,0,0);
   985:       return d.getTime();
   986:     },
   987:     formatDuration(sec){
   988:       sec = Math.max(0, Math.floor(sec||0));
   989:       const h = Math.floor(sec/3600);
   990:       const m = Math.floor((sec%3600)/60);
   991:       const s = sec%60;
   992:       const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0');
   993:       return `${pad(h)}:${pad(m)}:${pad(s)}`;
   994:     },
   995: 
   996:     getDutyWindow(nowParts){
   997:       const Config = window.Config;
   998:       const p = nowParts || UI.manilaNow();
   999:       const nowMin = UI.minutesOfDay(p);
  1000:       const teams = (Config && Array.isArray(Config.TEAMS)) ? Config.TEAMS : [];
  1001:       const windows = teams.map(t=>{
  1002:         const start = UI.parseHM(t.dutyStart);
  1003:         const end = UI.parseHM(t.dutyEnd);
  1004:         return { team:t, start, end, wraps: end<=start };
  1005:       });
  1006: 
  1007:       function inWindow(w){
  1008:         if(!w.wraps) return nowMin>=w.start && nowMin<w.end;
  1009:         return (nowMin>=w.start) || (nowMin<w.end);
  1010:       }
  1011: 
  1012:       let cur = windows.find(inWindow) || windows[0];
  1013:       const idx = Math.max(0, windows.findIndex(w=>w.team.id===cur.team.id));
  1014:       const next = windows[(idx+1)%windows.length] || windows[0];
  1015: 
  1016:       let minsLeft;
  1017:       if(!cur.wraps) minsLeft = cur.end - nowMin;
  1018:       else minsLeft = (nowMin < cur.end) ? (cur.end - nowMin) : (24*60 - nowMin + cur.end);
  1019:       const secLeft = minsLeft*60 - p.ss;
  1020: 
  1021:       return { current: cur.team, next: next.team, secLeft };
  1022:     },
  1023: 
  1024:     schedulePill(scheduleId){
  1025:       const Config = window.Config;
  1026:       const s = Config && Config.scheduleById ? Config.scheduleById(scheduleId) : null;
  1027:       if(!s) return '';
  1028:       return `<span class="iconpill"><span class="icon">${UI.esc(s.icon)}</span>${UI.esc(s.label)}</span>`;
  1029:     },
  1030: 
  1031:     activeAnnouncements(){
  1032:       const Store = window.Store;
  1033:       const list = Store ? Store.getAnnouncements() : [];
  1034:       const nowMs = Date.now();
  1035:       return list
  1036:         .filter(a => nowMs >= a.startAt && nowMs <= a.endAt)
  1037:         .sort((a,b)=>a.startAt-b.startAt);
  1038:     },
  1039: 
  1040:     toDatetimeLocal(ms){

  1043:       return `${d.getFullYear()}-${pad(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(d.getDate())}T${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`;
  1044:     },
  1045: 
  1046:     _sndKey(userId){ return `ums_sound_settings_${userId||'anon'}`; },
  1047:     getSoundSettings(userId){
  1048:       try{
  1049:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(UI._sndKey(userId));
  1050:         const obj = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
  1051:         const out = Object.assign({ enabled: true, volume: 0.65, type: 'beep' }, (obj||{}));
  1052:         out.volume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(out.volume)));
  1053:         out.enabled = !!out.enabled;
  1054:         out.type = ['beep','chime','pop'].includes(out.type) ? out.type : 'beep';
  1055:         return out;
  1056:       }catch(e){
  1057:         return { enabled: true, volume: 0.65, type: 'beep' };
  1058:       }
  1059:     },
  1060:     saveSoundSettings(userId, settings){
  1061:       const s = Object.assign(UI.getSoundSettings(userId), settings||{});
  1062:       try{ localStorage.setItem(UI._sndKey(userId), JSON.stringify(s)); }catch(e){}
  1063:       return s;
  1064:     },
  1065:     playNotifSound(userId){
  1066:       const s = UI.getSoundSettings(userId);
  1067:       if(!s.enabled || s.volume<=0.001) return;
  1068: 
  1069:       try{
  1070:         const Ctx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
  1071:         if(!Ctx) return;
  1072:         const ctx = UI._audioCtx || (UI._audioCtx = new Ctx());
  1073:         const now = ctx.currentTime;
  1074:         const gain = ctx.createGain();
  1075:         gain.gain.value = 0;
  1076:         gain.connect(ctx.destination);
  1077: 
  1078:         const env = (t0, attack, hold, release, peak)=>{
  1079:           gain.gain.cancelScheduledValues(t0);
  1080:           gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0, t0);
  1081:           gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(peak, t0 + attack);
  1082:           gain.gain.setValueAtTime(peak, t0 + attack + hold);
  1083:           gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, t0 + attack + hold + release);
  1084:         };
  1085: 
  1086:         const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
  1087:         osc.connect(gain);
  1088: 
  1089:         if(s.type==='chime'){
  1090:           osc.type = 'sine';
  1091:           osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(880, now);
  1092:           env(now, 0.01, 0.08, 0.18, 0.35*s.volume);
  1093:           osc.start(now);
  1094:           osc.stop(now + 0.30);
  1095: 
  1096:           const osc2 = ctx.createOscillator();
  1097:           osc2.type='sine';
  1098:           osc2.frequency.setValueAtTime(1175, now + 0.11);
  1099:           osc2.connect(gain);
  1100:           osc2.start(now + 0.11);
  1101:           osc2.stop(now + 0.36);
  1102:         } else if(s.type==='pop'){
  1103:           osc.type='triangle';
  1104:           osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(520, now);
  1105:           env(now, 0.005, 0.03, 0.09, 0.45*s.volume);
  1106:           osc.start(now);
  1107:           osc.stop(now + 0.13);
  1108:         } else {
  1109:           osc.type='square';
  1110:           osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(760, now);
  1111:           env(now, 0.01, 0.05, 0.12, 0.30*s.volume);
  1112:           osc.start(now);
  1113:           osc.stop(now + 0.20);
  1114:           const osc2 = ctx.createOscillator();
  1115:           osc2.type='square';
  1116:           osc2.frequency.setValueAtTime(760, now + 0.22);
  1117:           osc2.connect(gain);
  1118:           env(now + 0.22, 0.01, 0.05, 0.12, 0.26*s.volume);
  1119:           osc2.start(now + 0.22);
  1120:           osc2.stop(now + 0.42);
  1121:         }
  1122:       }catch(e){}
  1123:     },
  1124:

  1319:     bindReleaseNotesModal(user){
  1320:       const u = user || (window.Auth && Auth.getUser && Auth.getUser());
  1321:       const modal = document.getElementById('releaseNotesModal');
  1322:       if(!modal || !window.Store) return;
  1323: 
  1324:       const searchEl = document.getElementById('rnSearch');
  1325:       const filterEl = document.getElementById('rnFilter');
  1326:       const metaEl = document.getElementById('rnMeta');
  1327:       const listEl = document.getElementById('rnList');
  1328: 
  1329:       const adminWrap = document.getElementById('rnAdmin');
  1330:       const verEl = document.getElementById('rnVer');
  1331:       const tagsEl = document.getElementById('rnTags');
  1332:       const titleEl = document.getElementById('rnTitle');

  1334:       const addEl = document.getElementById('rnAdd');

  1347: 
  1348:       const fmt = (ms)=>{
  1349:         try{
  1350:           const d = new Date(Number(ms||0)||Date.now());
  1351:           return d.toLocaleString('en-CA', { year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'2-digit', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' });
  1352:         }catch(_){ return ''; }
  1353:       };
  1354: 
  1355:       const normalizeTags = (s)=>{
  1356:         return String(s||'').split(',').map(x=>x.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean).slice(0,8);
  1357:       };
  1358: 
  1359:       const resolveDefaultVersion = ()=>{

  1362:           return el ? String(el.textContent||'').replace('Build:','').trim() : '';
  1363:         }catch(_){ return ''; }
  1364:       };
  1365: 
  1366:       const render = ()=>{
  1367:         const q = String(searchEl && searchEl.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();

  1369:         const all = (Store.getReleaseNotes ? Store.getReleaseNotes() : []);
  1370: 
  1371:         let filtered = all;
  1372:         if(f && f!=='all'){ filtered = filtered.filter(n => (n.tags||[]).map(t=>String(t).toLowerCase()).includes(f)); }

  1374:           filtered = filtered.filter(n=>{
  1375:             const hay = (String(n.version||'') + ' ' + String(n.title||'') + ' ' + String(n.body||'') + ' ' + String((n.tags||[]).join(' '))).toLowerCase();
  1376:             return hay.includes(q);
  1377:           });
  1378:         }
  1379:

  1383:           listEl.innerHTML = filtered.map(n=>{

  1385:             return `
  1386:               <div class="card pad rn-item" style="margin:10px 0" data-rnid="${UI.esc(n.id||'')}">
  1387:                 <div class="row" style="justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
  1388:                   <div style="min-width:0">
  1389:                     <div class="h3" style="margin:0">${UI.esc(n.title||'Update')}</div>
  1390:                     <div class="small muted" style="margin-top:4px">${UI.esc(n.version||'')} • ${UI.esc(fmt(n.date))}${n.author?(' • '+UI.esc(n.author)):''}</div>
  1391:                   </div>
  1392:                   ${canDelete ? `<button class="btn danger ghost rn-del" type="button" data-del="${UI.esc(n.id||'')}">Delete</button>` : ''}
  1393:                 </div>
  1394:                 <div class="rn-body" style="margin-top:10px">${renderMarkdownSafe(n.body||'')}</div>
  1395:                 <div style="margin-top:10px">${tags}</div>
  1396:               </div>
  1397:             `;
  1398:           }).join('') || `<div class="card pad"><div class="small muted">No release notes match your filter.</div></div>`;
  1399:         }
  1400:       };
  1401: 
  1402:       function renderMarkdownSafe(md){
  1403:         const esc = UI.esc(String(md||''));
  1404:         let out = esc.replace(/```([\s\S]*?)```/g, (m,g)=>`<pre class="rn-pre"><code>${g}</code></pre>`);
  1405:         out = out.replace(/^###\s(.+)$/gm, '<div class="rn-h3">$1</div>');
  1406:         out = out.replace(/^##\s(.+)$/gm, '<div class="rn-h2">$1</div>');
  1407:         out = out.replace(/^#\s(.+)$/gm, '<div class="rn-h1">$1</div>');
  1408:         out = out.replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
  1409:         out = out.replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>');
  1410:         out = out.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code class="rn-code">$1</code>');
  1411:         out = out.replace(/^(?:\s*[-*]\s.+\n?)+/gm, (block)=>{
  1412:           const items = block.trim().split(/\n/).map(l=>l.replace(/^\s*[-*]\s+/,'').trim()).filter(Boolean);
  1413:           if(!items.length) return block;
  1414:           return `<ul class="rn-ul">${items.map(i=>`<li>${i}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`;
  1415:         });
  1416:         out = out.replace(/^(?:\s*\d+\.\s.+\n?)+/gm, (block)=>{
  1417:           const items = block.trim().split(/\n/).map(l=>l.replace(/^\s*\d+\.\s+/,'').trim()).filter(Boolean);
  1418:           if(!items.length) return block;
  1419:           return `<ol class="rn-ol">${items.map(i=>`<li>${i}</li>`).join('')}</ol>`;
  1420:         });
  1421:         out = out.replace(/\n/g, '<br/>');
  1422:         return `<div class="rn-md">${out}</div>`;
  1423:       }
  1424: 
  1425:       if(searchEl) searchEl.oninput = ()=>render();
  1426:       if(filterEl) filterEl.onchange = ()=>render();
  1427: 
  1428:       if(toolbar && bodyEl){
  1429:         toolbar.querySelectorAll('[data-md]').forEach(btn=>{
  1430:           btn.onclick = ()=>{
  1431:             try{
  1432:               const t = String(btn.dataset.md||'');
  1433:               const ta = bodyEl;
  1434:               const start = ta.selectionStart || 0;
  1435:               const end = ta.selectionEnd || 0;
  1436:               const sel = String(ta.value||'').slice(start,end);
  1437:               const before = String(ta.value||'').slice(0,start);
  1438:               const after = String(ta.value||'').slice(end);
  1439: 
  1440:               let insert = t;
  1441:               if(t.includes('{text}')) insert = t.replace('{text}', sel||'text');
  1442:               ta.value = before + insert + after;
  1443:               const pos = before.length + insert.length;
  1444:               ta.focus();
  1445:               ta.selectionStart = ta.selectionEnd = pos;
  1446:               if(bodyPreviewEl) bodyPreviewEl.innerHTML = renderMarkdownSafe(ta.value||'');
  1447:             }catch(_){ }
  1448:           };
  1449:         });
  1450:       }
  1451: 
  1452:       if(bodyEl && bodyPreviewEl){
  1453:         bodyPreviewEl.innerHTML = renderMarkdownSafe(bodyEl.value||'');
  1454:         bodyEl.oninput = ()=>{ bodyPreviewEl.innerHTML = renderMarkdownSafe(bodyEl.value||''); };
  1455:       }
  1456: 
  1457:       if(addEl && canManage){
  1458:         addEl.onclick = ()=>{
  1459:           const ver = String(verEl && verEl.value || '').trim();
  1460:           const ttl = String(titleEl && titleEl.value || '').trim();
  1461:           const body = String(bodyEl && bodyEl.value || '').trim();
  1462:           const tags = normalizeTags(tagsEl && tagsEl.value || '');
  1463: 
  1464:           if(!ttl || !body){ alert('Please enter a Title and Details.'); return; }
  1465:           Store.addReleaseNote({
  1466:             version: ver || resolveDefaultVersion(),
  1467:             date: Date.now(), title: ttl, body: body, author: u ? (u.name||u.username||u.id) : '', tags: tags.length ? tags : ['feature'],
  1468:           });
  1469:           if(titleEl) titleEl.value = '';
  1470:           if(bodyEl) bodyEl.value = '';
  1471:           if(bodyPreviewEl) bodyPreviewEl.innerHTML = renderMarkdownSafe('');
  1472:           if(tagsEl) tagsEl.value = '';
  1473:           if(verEl) verEl.value = '';
  1474:           render();
  1475:         };
  1476:       }
  1477: 
  1478:       if(importBtn && canManage){
  1479:         importBtn.onclick = async()=>{
  1480:           const f = importEl && importEl.files && importEl.files[0];
  1481:           if(!f){ alert('Please choose a file to import.'); return; }
  1482:           const mode = String(importModeEl && importModeEl.value || 'merge');
  1483:           const name = String(f.name||'').toLowerCase();
  1484:           const text = await (f.text ? f.text() : new Promise((res,rej)=>{
  1485:             const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ()=>res(String(r.result||'')); r.onerror = rej; r.readAsText(f);
  1486:           }));
  1487:           try{
  1488:             if(name.endsWith('.json')){
  1489:               const obj = JSON.parse(text);
  1490:               Store.importReleaseNotes(obj, mode);
  1491:             } else {
  1492:               const lines = String(text||'').replace(/\r/g,'').split('\n');
  1493:               const first = String(lines[0]||'').trim();
  1494:               const body = lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim();
  1495:               Store.addReleaseNote({
  1496:                 version: resolveDefaultVersion(), date: Date.now(), title: first || 'Imported note', body: body || String(text||''),
  1497:                 author: u ? (u.name||u.username||u.id) : '', tags: ['import']
  1498:               });
  1499:             }
  1500:             if(importEl) importEl.value = '';
  1501:             render();
  1502:           }catch(err){ console.error(err); alert('Import failed. Please verify the file format.'); }
  1503:         };
  1504:       }
  1505: 
  1506:       if(exportBtn && canManage){
  1507:         exportBtn.onclick = ()=>{
  1508:           try{
  1509:             const data = Store.getReleaseNotes ? Store.getReleaseNotes() : [];
  1510:             const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
  1511:             const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  1512:             const a = document.createElement('a');
  1513:             const ts = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
  1514:             a.href = url;
  1515:             a.download = `mums_release_notes_${ts}.json`;
  1516:             document.body.appendChild(a);
  1517:             a.click();
  1518:             a.remove();
  1519:             setTimeout(()=>{ try{ URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }catch(_){ } }, 1500);
  1520:           }catch(err){ console.error(err); alert('Export failed.'); }
  1521:         };
  1522:       }
  1523: 
  1524:       if(clearBtn && canManage){

  1527:           if(!ok1) return;

  1542:           if(!ok) return;

  1544:           render();

  1552:     },
  1553: 
  1554:     startScheduleNotifListener(user){

  1566:                 <div class="head modal-header-glass" style="padding:20px 24px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; background:rgba(15,23,42,0.6);">

  1577:                       <div class="notif-count" id="schedNotifCount" style="background:#ef4444; color:#fff; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:999px; font-size:12px; font-weight:900;"></div>
  1578:                       <button id="schedNotifClose" class="btn-glass btn-glass-ghost" onclick="if(!window._schedNotifLocked){window.UI.closeModal('schedNotifModal');}" style="padding:6px 12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color:#cbd5e1; background:transparent; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer;">✕</button>
  1579:                   </div>
  1580:                 </div>
  1581:                 <div class="body modal-body-scroll" id="schedNotifBody" style="padding:24px; overflow-y:auto; overflow-x:hidden; flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px;"></div>
  1582:               </div>

  1584:         document.body.appendChild(m);
  1585:       }
  1586: 
  1587:       const channel = ('BroadcastChannel' in window) ? new BroadcastChannel('ums_schedule_updates') : null;
  1588: 
  1589:       const TASK_PALETTE = {
  1590:         'mailbox manager': '#4aa3ff',
  1591:         'back office': '#ffa21a',
  1592:         'call available': '#2ecc71',
  1593:         'lunch': '#22d3ee',
  1594:         'block': '#ff4d4f',
  1595:       };
  1596:       const getTeamTasks = ()=>{
  1597:         try{
  1598:           if(window.Store && Store.getTeamTasks && user.teamId != null) return Store.getTeamTasks(user.teamId) || [];
  1599:         }catch(_){ }
  1600:         return [];
  1601:       };
  1602:       const taskColorByLabel = (label, taskId)=>{
  1603:         const tasks = getTeamTasks();
  1604:         const id = String(taskId||'').trim();
  1605:         const lbl = String(label||'').trim();
  1606:         const hit = tasks.find(t=>{
  1607:           if(!t) return false;
  1608:           const tid = String(t.id||t.taskId||'').trim();
  1609:           const tlabel = String(t.label||t.name||'').trim();
  1610:           return (id && tid && tid === id) || (lbl && tlabel && tlabel.toLowerCase() === lbl.toLowerCase());
  1611:         });
  1612:         if(hit && hit.color) return hit.color;
  1613:         const s = String(label||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  1614:         if(TASK_PALETTE[s]) return TASK_PALETTE[s];
  1615:         if(s.includes('mailbox')) return TASK_PALETTE['mailbox manager'];
  1616:         if(s.includes('back')) return TASK_PALETTE['back office'];
  1617:         if(s.includes('call')) return TASK_PALETTE['call available'];
  1618:         if(s.includes('lunch')) return TASK_PALETTE['lunch'];
  1619:         if(s.includes('block')) return TASK_PALETTE['block'];
  1620:         return '';
  1621:       };
  1622: 
  1623:       const hexToRgb = (hex)=>{
  1624:         const m = String(hex||'').trim().match(/^#?([0-9a-f]{6})$/i);
  1625:         if(!m) return null;
  1626:         const n = parseInt(m[1],16);
  1627:         return { r:(n>>16)&255, g:(n>>8)&255, b:n&255 };
  1628:       };
  1629:       const esc = UI.esc || ((x)=>String(x||'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,(c)=>({ '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;' }[c])));
  1630: 
  1631:       const renderTaskSummary = (summary)=>{
  1632:         if(!summary || !summary.items) return '';
  1633:         const dateLabel = summary.dateLabel || summary.iso || '';
  1634:         const rows = (summary.items||[]).map(item=>{
  1635:           const label = item.label || item.role || '';
  1636:           const c = taskColorByLabel(label, item.role);
  1637:           return `
  1638:             <div class="notif-task-row">
  1639:               <span class="notif-task-bullet" style="--task-color:${esc(c)}"></span>
  1640:               <span class="notif-task-time">${esc(item.start||'')} to ${esc(item.end||'')}</span>
  1641:               <span class="notif-task-eq">=</span>
  1642:               <span class="notif-task-label">${esc(label)}</span>
  1643:             </div>
  1644:           `;
  1645:         }).join('');
  1646:         const empty = !rows ? '<div class="small muted">No assignments for this date.</div>' : rows;
  1647:         return `
  1648:           <div class="notif-summary">
  1649:             <div class="notif-date">Date: ${esc(dateLabel || '—')}</div>
  1650:             ${empty}
  1651:           </div>
  1652:         `;
  1653:       };
  1654: 
  1655:       const renderNotifBody = (msg, summary)=>{
  1656:         const text = String(msg||'').trim();
  1657:         const m = text.match(/^Schedule Updated:\s*(.+?)\s+(added|removed|updated)\s+on\s+(.+?)\.?\s*$/i);
  1658:         if(!m){
  1659:           const fallback = `<div class="notif-intro">${esc(text || 'Your schedule has been updated.')}</div>`;
  1660:           return `${fallback}${renderTaskSummary(summary)}`;
  1661:         }
  1662:         const label = m[1];
  1663:         const action = m[2];
  1664:         const date = m[3];
  1665:         const c = taskColorByLabel(label);
  1666:         const rgb = hexToRgb(c);
  1667:         const bg = rgb ? `rgba(${rgb.r},${rgb.g},${rgb.b},0.14)` : 'rgba(255,255,255,.06)';
  1668:         const border = rgb ? `rgba(${rgb.r},${rgb.g},${rgb.b},0.35)` : 'rgba(255,255,255,.14)';
  1669:         const taskText = '#081018';
  1670:         const headline = `
  1671:           <div class="notif-intro">
  1672:             <span class="task-label" style="--task-color:${esc(c)};--task-bg:${esc(bg)};--task-border:${esc(border)};--task-text:${esc(taskText)}">
  1673:               <span class="task-color" style="background:${esc(c)}"></span>
  1674:               ${esc(label)}
  1675:             </span>
  1676:             <span>${esc(action)} on ${esc(date)}.</span>
  1677:           </div>
  1678:         `;
  1679:         return `${headline}${renderTaskSummary(summary)}`;
  1680:       };
  1681: 
  1682:       const formatAssignTimer = (ts)=>{
  1683:         const assignedAt = Number(ts)||0;
  1684:         if(!assignedAt) return '00:00:00';
  1685:         const sec = Math.floor(Math.max(0, Date.now() - assignedAt) / 1000);
  1686:         const h = String(Math.floor(sec / 3600)).padStart(2, '0');
  1687:         const m = String(Math.floor((sec % 3600) / 60)).padStart(2, '0');
  1688:         const s = String(sec % 60).padStart(2, '0');
  1689:         return `${h}:${m}:${s}`;
  1690:       };
  1691:       const updateTimers = ()=>{
  1692:         document.querySelectorAll('[data-assign-timer]').forEach((el)=>{
  1693:           const start = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-assign-timer'));
  1694:           if(start) el.textContent = formatAssignTimer(start);
  1695:         });
  1696:       };
  1697:       const formatAssignTimestamp = (ts)=>{
  1698:         const ms = Number(ts) || 0;
  1699:         if(!ms) return 'N/A';
  1700:         try{
  1701:           const d = new Date(ms);
  1702:           const mm = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  1703:           const dd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  1704:           const yyyy = String(d.getFullYear());
  1705:           const hour24 = d.getHours();
  1706:           const mins = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  1707:           const hour12 = String(hour24 % 12 || 12).padStart(2, '0');
  1708:           const meridiem = hour24 >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
  1709:           return `${mm}/${dd}/${yyyy} ${hour12}:${mins} ${meridiem}`;
  1710:         }catch(_){
  1711:           return 'N/A';
  1712:         }
  1713:       };
  1714:       const truncate = (v, max=50)=>{
  1715:         const s = String(v || '').trim();
  1716:         if(!s) return '';
  1717:         if(s.length <= max) return s;
  1718:         return `${s.slice(0, max-1)}…`;
  1719:       };
  1720:       const renderAssignedBy = (n)=>{
  1721:         const name = String((n && n.fromName) || 'Mailbox Manager').trim() || 'Mailbox Manager';
  1722:         const avatar = String((n && (n.fromAvatar || n.fromAvatarUrl || n.avatarUrl)) || '').trim();
  1723:         if(avatar){
  1724:           return `
  1725:             <div class="mbx-assign-by-wrap">
  1726:               <span class="mini-avatar"><img src="${esc(avatar)}" alt="${esc(name)} avatar" loading="lazy"/></span>
  1727:               <span class="mbx-assign-by-name">${esc(name)}</span>
  1728:             </div>
  1729:           `;
  1730:         }
  1731:         return `<span class="mbx-assign-by-name">${esc(name)}</span>`;
  1732:       };
  1733:       const mailboxAssignmentIdFromNotif = (n)=>{
  1734:         try{
  1735:           const explicit = String((n && n.assignmentId) || '').trim();
  1736:           if(explicit) return explicit;
  1737:           const id = String((n && n.id) || '').trim();
  1738:           if(id.startsWith('mbx_assign_')) return id.slice('mbx_assign_'.length);
  1739:         }catch(_){ }
  1740:         return '';
  1741:       };
  1742:       const confirmMailboxAssignmentFromNotif = async (n)=>{
  1743:         try{
  1744:           if(!n || String(n.type||'') !== 'MAILBOX_ASSIGN') return { ok:true, skipped:true };
  1745:           let shiftKey = String((n && n.shiftKey) || '').trim();
  1746:           const assignmentId = mailboxAssignmentIdFromNotif(n);
  1747:           // Fallback: resolve shiftKey from Store when notification predates shiftKey field
  1748:           if(!shiftKey && assignmentId && window.Store && Store.getMailboxTables) {
  1749:             try {
  1750:               const tables = Store.getMailboxTables() || {};
  1751:               outer: for (const [key, table] of Object.entries(tables)) {
  1752:                 const assigns = (table && Array.isArray(table.assignments)) ? table.assignments : [];
  1753:                 for (const a of assigns) {
  1754:                   if (a && String(a.id||'') === assignmentId) { shiftKey = key; break outer; }
  1755:                 }
  1756:               }
  1757:             } catch(_){}
  1758:           }
  1759:           if(!shiftKey || !assignmentId) return { ok:false, message:'Missing mailbox assignment reference.' };
  1760: 
  1761:           const jwt = (window.CloudAuth && CloudAuth.accessToken) ? CloudAuth.accessToken() : '';
  1762:           if(!jwt) return { ok:false, message:'Session expired. Please log in again.' };
  1763: 
  1764:           const res = await fetch('/api/mailbox/confirm', {
  1765:             method: 'POST',
  1766:             headers: {
  1767:               'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  1768:               'Authorization': `Bearer ${jwt}`
  1769:             },
  1770:             body: JSON.stringify({ shiftKey, assignmentId })
  1771:           });
  1772:           const data = await res.json().catch(()=>null);
  1773: 
  1774:           // FIX: 404 = assignment was deleted by manager. Silently dismiss
  1775:           // the notification so the accept button disappears without error.
  1776:           if(res.status === 404){
  1777:             try{
  1778:               const Store = window.Store;
  1779:               const me = window.Auth && Auth.getUser ? Auth.getUser() : null;
  1780:               if(Store && Store.ackNotif && n && n.id && me && me.id) Store.ackNotif(n.id, me.id);
  1781:               if(Store && Store.getNotifs && Store.saveNotifs && assignmentId){
  1782:                 const _list = Store.getNotifs() || [];
  1783:                 const _kept = _list.filter(x => {
  1784:                   if(!x || !x.id) return false;
  1785:                   if(n && String(x.id) === String(n.id)) return false;
  1786:                   if(String(x.assignmentId||'') === assignmentId) return false;
  1787:                   return true;
  1788:                 });
  1789:                 if(_kept.length !== _list.length) Store.saveNotifs(_kept);
  1790:               }
  1791:             }catch(_){ }
  1792:             return { ok:true, deletedByManager:true };
  1793:           }
  1794: 
  1795:           if(!res.ok || !data || !data.ok){
  1796:             const msg = (data && (data.message || data.error)) ? String(data.message || data.error) : `Failed (${res.status})`;
  1797:             return { ok:false, message: msg };
  1798:           }
  1799:           try{
  1800:             if(data.table && window.Store && Store.saveMailboxTable){
  1801:               Store.saveMailboxTable(shiftKey, data.table, { fromRealtime:true });
  1802:             }
  1803:           }catch(_){ }
  1804:           return { ok:true };
  1805:         }catch(e){
  1806:           return { ok:false, message: String(e && (e.message || e) || 'Confirm failed') };
  1807:         }
  1808:       };
  1809: 
  1810:       const renderMailboxAssignTable = (list)=>{
  1811:         const rows = (Array.isArray(list) ? list : []).map((n, index)=>{
  1812:           const assignedAt = Number((n && (n.assignedAt || n.ts)) || 0);
  1813:           const ts = formatAssignTimestamp(assignedAt);
  1814:           const caseNo = String((n && (n.caseNo || n.ticketNumber || n.id)) || '').trim() || 'N/A';
  1815:           const desc = String((n && n.desc) || '').trim();
  1816:           const descDisplay = truncate(desc, 50) || 'N/A';
  1817:           const timer = formatAssignTimer(assignedAt);
  1818:           return `
  1819:             <tr class="mbx-assign-row-item" data-ack-row="${esc(n.id)}" style="transition:background 0.2s;">
  1820:               <td style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color:#64748b; font-weight:700;">${index + 1}</td>
  1821:               <td class="mbx-assign-ts" style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color:#cbd5e1; font-size:12px;">${esc(ts)}</td>
  1822:               <td style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02);"><strong class="mbx-assign-case-cell" style="color:#38bdf8; font-size:14px; letter-spacing:0.5px;">${esc(caseNo)}</strong></td>
  1823:               <td title="${esc(desc || 'N/A')}" style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color:#e2e8f0; font-size:13px; max-width:200px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;">${esc(descDisplay)}</td>
  1824:               <td style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:#f8fafc;">${renderAssignedBy(n)}</td>
  1825:               <td class="mbx-assign-live" data-assign-timer="${esc(assignedAt)}" style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color:#fcd34d; font-family:monospace; font-weight:800;">${esc(timer)}</td>
  1826:               <td style="padding:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.02); text-align:right;">
  1827:                 <button class="btn-glass dashx-ack mbx-accept-btn" data-ack="${esc(n.id)}" type="button" aria-label="Accept case assignment" style="background:linear-gradient(145deg, #10b981, #059669); color:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.4); padding:8px 16px; border-radius:8px; font-weight:800; box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(16,185,129,0.3); cursor:pointer;">
  1828:                   <span class="dashx-spin" aria-hidden="true" style="display:none;">⏳ </span>
  1829:                   <span class="dashx-acklbl">ACCEPT ✓</span>
  1830:                 </button>
  1831:               </td>
  1832:             </tr>
  1833:           `;
  1834:         }).join('');
  1835: 
  1836:         if(!rows){
  1837:           return '<div class="muted">No pending cases.</div>';
  1838:         }
  1839: 
  1840:         return `
  1841:           <style>
  1842:             .mbx-assign-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(56,189,248,0.05); }
  1843:             .mbx-accept-btn { white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; }
  1844:             .mbx-accept-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #34d399, #10b981) !important; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(16,185,129,0.4) !important; }
  1845:           </style>
  1846:           <div class="mbx-assign-table-wrap glass-table-container" role="region" aria-label="Pending case assignments" style="border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius:10px; overflow-x:auto; background:rgba(2,6,23,0.5);">
  1847:             <table class="mbx-assign-table" role="table" style="width:100%; min-width:800px; border-collapse:collapse;">
  1848:               <thead>
  1849:                 <tr>
  1850:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">No.</th>
  1851:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Timestamp</th>
  1852:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Case #</th>
  1853:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Description</th>
  1854:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Assigned By</th>
  1855:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Elapsed</th>
  1856:                   <th style="background:rgba(15,23,42,0.95); padding:14px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); text-align:right; position:sticky; top:0; z-index:5;">Action</th>
  1857:                 </tr>
  1858:               </thead>
  1859:               <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
  1860:             </table>
  1861:           </div>
  1862:         `;
  1863:       };
  1864: 
  1865:       const shownKeys = new Set();
  1866:       let lastBeepedId = null;
  1867:       const pendingKeyFor = (n)=>{
  1868:         if(!n) return '';
  1869:         if(String(n.type||'') === 'MAILBOX_ASSIGN') return `id:${String(n.id||'')}`;
  1870:         if(n.snapshotDigest) return `digest:${String(n.snapshotDigest)}`;
  1871:         return `id:${String(n.id||'')}`;
  1872:       };
  1873:       let lastPending = [];
  1874:       const _justAccepted = new Set(); // IDs accepted but not yet confirmed by server
  1875: 
  1876:       const ackNotif = (n)=>{
  1877:         if(!n || !n.id) return;
  1878:         _justAccepted.add(String(n.id)); // mark as accepted locally
  1879:         Store.ackNotif(n.id, user.id);
  1880:         try{ channel && channel.postMessage({ type:'ack', notifId:n.id, userId:user.id }); }catch(e){}
  1881:         // Clean up the just-accepted set after 5s (server should confirm by then)
  1882:         setTimeout(()=>{ _justAccepted.delete(String(n.id)); }, 5000);
  1883:       };
  1884:       const renderPendingNotifs = (list)=>{
  1885:         if(!list.length){
  1886:           return '<div class="muted">No pending cases.</div>';
  1887:         }
  1888:         const allMailbox = list.every(n=>String(n && n.type || '') === 'MAILBOX_ASSIGN');
  1889:         if(allMailbox) return renderMailboxAssignTable(list);
  1890:         return list.map(n=>{
  1891:           try{
  1892:             if(String(n.type||'') === 'MAILBOX_ASSIGN'){
  1893:               return `
  1894:                 <div class="notif-item mailbox-assign">
  1895:                   <div class="notif-item-head">
  1896:                     <button class="btn dashx-ack" data-ack="${esc(n.id)}" type="button" aria-label="Acknowledge case assignment notification">
  1897:                       <span class="dashx-spin" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  1898:                       <span class="dashx-acklbl">Acknowledge</span>
  1899:                     </button>
  1900:                   </div>
  1901:                   <div class="notif-item-body">${renderMailboxAssign(n)}</div>
  1902:                 </div>
  1903:               `;
  1904:             }
  1905:             const perUser = (n.userMessages && n.userMessages[user.id]) ? n.userMessages[user.id] : '';
  1906:             const bodyMsg = perUser || n.body || 'Your schedule has been updated.';
  1907:             const summary = (n.userSummaries && n.userSummaries[user.id]) ? n.userSummaries[user.id] : null;
  1908:             const isTaskDist = String(n.type||'') === 'TASK_DISTRIBUTION';
  1909:             const isOvertimeAlert = String(n.type||'') === 'OVERTIME_ALERT';
  1910:             const distId = String(n.distribution_id || '');
  1911:             const distTitle = String(n.distribution_title || n.title || 'New Task Distribution');
  1912:             const taskDistBody = isTaskDist
  1913:               ? `
  1914:                 <div class="notif-intro">${esc(distTitle)}</div>
  1915:                 <div class="small">${esc(summary || bodyMsg || 'N/A')}</div>
  1916:               `
  1917:               : '';
  1918:             const overtimeBody = isOvertimeAlert
  1919:               ? `
  1920:                 <div class="notif-intro">${esc(bodyMsg || 'Overtime confirmation recorded.')}</div>
  1921:                 <div class="small" style="white-space:pre-line">${esc(String(n.detailText || 'N/A'))}</div>
  1922:               `
  1923:               : '';
  1924:             const meta = isTaskDist
  1925:               ? `From: ${n.fromName||'Team Lead'} • ${new Date(n.ts||Date.now()).toLocaleString()} • Tasks`
  1926:               : isOvertimeAlert
  1927:                 ? `From: Attendance System • ${new Date(n.ts||Date.now()).toLocaleString()} • Overtime`
  1928:               : (String(n.type||'')==='MAILBOX_ASSIGN')
  1929:                 ? `From: ${n.fromName||'Mailbox Manager'} • ${new Date(n.ts||Date.now()).toLocaleString()} • Mailbox`
  1930:                 : `From: ${n.fromName||'Team Lead'} • Week of ${n.weekStartISO||'—'}`;
  1931:             return `
  1932:               <div class="notif-item">
  1933:                 <div class="notif-item-head">
  1934:                   <div>
  1935:                     <div class="notif-item-title">${esc(isTaskDist ? distTitle : (n.title || (isOvertimeAlert ? 'Overtime Alert – Team Member' : 'Schedule Updated')))}</div>
  1936:                     <div class="small muted">${esc(meta)}</div>
  1937:                   </div>
  1938:                   <div class="row" style="gap:8px">
  1939:                     ${isTaskDist ? `<a class="btn" href="#my_task?dist=${encodeURIComponent(distId)}" data-view-tasks="${esc(n.id)}" type="button" style="font-weight:900">View All Details</a>` : ''}
  1940:                     <button class="btn dashx-ack" data-ack="${esc(n.id)}" type="button" aria-label="Acknowledge schedule notification">
  1941:                       <span class="dashx-spin" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  1942:                       <span class="dashx-acklbl">Acknowledge</span>
  1943:                     </button>
  1944:                   </div>
  1945:                 </div>
  1946:                 <div class="notif-item-body">${isTaskDist ? taskDistBody : (isOvertimeAlert ? overtimeBody : renderNotifBody(bodyMsg, summary))}</div>
  1947:               </div>
  1948:             `;
  1949:           }catch(err){
  1950:             try{ console.error('renderPendingNotifs: render failed', err, n); }catch(_){ }
  1951:             return `
  1952:               <div class="notif-item">
  1953:                 <div class="notif-item-head">
  1954:                   <div>
  1955:                     <div class="notif-item-title">${esc((n && (n.title||n.type)) ? String(n.title||n.type) : 'Notification')}</div>
  1956:                     <div class="small muted">${esc((n && n.ts) ? new Date(n.ts).toLocaleString() : '')}</div>
  1957:                   </div>
  1958:                 </div>
  1959:                 <div class="notif-item-body"><div class="muted">N/A</div></div>
  1960:               </div>
  1961:             `;
  1962:           }
  1963:         }).join('');
  1964:       };
  1965:       const ping = ()=>{
  1966:         const list = Store.getNotifs();
  1967:         const pendingRaw = list.filter(x=>x && Array.isArray(x.recipients) && x.recipients.includes(user.id) && !(x.acks && x.acks[user.id]));
  1968:         const pendingSorted = pendingRaw.sort((a,b)=> (b.ts||0) - (a.ts||0));
  1969:         const deduped = [];
  1970:         const seen = new Set();
  1971:         for(const n of pendingSorted){
  1972:           const key = pendingKeyFor(n);
  1973:           if(!key || seen.has(key)) continue;
  1974:           // Skip items we just accepted locally — wait for server confirmation
  1975:           if(_justAccepted.has(String(n.id||''))) continue;
  1976:           seen.add(key);
  1977:           deduped.push(n);
  1978:         }
  1979:         lastPending = deduped;
  1980: 
  1981:         const modal = document.getElementById('schedNotifModal');
  1982:         const isOpen = !!(modal && modal.classList.contains('open'));
  1983:         if(!deduped.length){
  1984:           // BUG FIX 1: Always close when no pending items remain (even if not open tracking)
  1985:           UI.closeModal('schedNotifModal');
  1986:           window._schedNotifLocked = false;
  1987:           return;
  1988:         }
  1989: 
  1990:         const latest = deduped[0];
  1991:         if(latest && latest.id && latest.id !== lastBeepedId){
  1992:           lastBeepedId = latest.id;
  1993:           UI.playNotifSound(user.id);
  1994:         }
  1995: 
  1996:         const allMailbox = deduped.length && deduped.every(n=>String(n.type||'')==='MAILBOX_ASSIGN');
  1997:         const compactMailboxMode = false;
  1998:         const mailboxTableMode = !!allMailbox;
  1999:         const headerLabel = allMailbox
  2000:           ? `Case Assigned Notification${deduped.length===1?'':'s'}`
  2001:           : 'Schedule Notifications';
  2002:         const metaLabel = allMailbox
  2003:           ? `You have ${deduped.length} pending case assignment${deduped.length===1?'':'s'}.`
  2004:           : `You have ${deduped.length} pending schedule update${deduped.length===1?'':'s'}.`;
  2005:         UI.el('#schedNotifMember').textContent = user.name || user.username || 'Member';
  2006:         UI.el('#schedNotifTitle').textContent = headerLabel;
  2007:         UI.el('#schedNotifMeta').textContent = metaLabel;
  2008:         const countEl = UI.el('#schedNotifCount');
  2009:         if(countEl) countEl.textContent = String(deduped.length);
  2010:         const visibleList = deduped;
  2011:         UI.el('#schedNotifBody').innerHTML = renderPendingNotifs(visibleList);
  2012: 
  2013:         const panelEl = modal ? modal.querySelector('.notification-popout') : null;
  2014:         if(panelEl){
  2015:           panelEl.classList.toggle('mailbox-compact-mode', compactMailboxMode);
  2016:           panelEl.classList.toggle('mailbox-table-mode', mailboxTableMode);
  2017:           if(compactMailboxMode || mailboxTableMode) panelEl.scrollTop = 0;
  2018:         }
  2019: 
  2020:         if(modal && !modal._ackBound){
  2021:           modal._ackBound = true;
  2022:           modal.addEventListener('click', async (e)=>{
  2023:             const viewBtn = e && e.target ? e.target.closest('[data-view-tasks]') : null;
  2024:             if(viewBtn){
  2025:               try{ e.preventDefault(); }catch(_){ }
  2026:               const id = String(viewBtn.getAttribute('data-view-tasks')||'');
  2027:               const n = lastPending.find(x=>String(x.id||'')===id);
  2028:               const distId = n ? String(n.distribution_id || '') : '';
  2029: 
  2030:               if(!distId){
  2031:                 try{ UI.toast('Missing distribution reference in this notification.', 'warn'); }catch(_){ }
  2032:                 return;
  2033:               }
  2034: 
  2035:               const path = String(window.location.pathname || '').replace(/\/+$/,'');
  2036:               const isMyTask = path === '/my_task' || path.endsWith('/my_task');
  2037:               if(isMyTask){
  2038:                 try{
  2039:                   window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mums:open_task_distribution', { detail: { distribution_id: distId } }));
  2040:                   UI.closeModal('schedNotifModal');
  2041:                 }catch(_){ }
  2042:               }else{
  2043:                 try{ window.location.href = `/my_task?dist=${encodeURIComponent(distId)}`; }catch(_){ window.location.href = '/my_task'; }
  2044:               }
  2045:               return;
  2046:             }
  2047: 
  2048:             const btn = e && e.target ? e.target.closest('[data-ack]') : null;
  2049:             if(!btn) return;
  2050:             const id = String(btn.getAttribute('data-ack')||'');
  2051:             if(!id) return;
  2052:             const row = btn.closest('[data-ack-row]');
  2053:             // Prevent double-fire
  2054:             if(btn.dataset.busy==='1') return;
  2055:             btn.dataset.busy='1';
  2056: 
  2057:             // ── STEP 1: Capture 'n' FIRST before any filtering ───────────────
  2058:             // CRITICAL FIX: n MUST be captured before lastPending.filter()
  2059:             // otherwise find() returns undefined and the API call is skipped entirely.
  2060:             const n = lastPending.find(x=>String(x.id||'')===id)
  2061:                    || Store.getNotifs().find(x=>String(x.id||'')===id);
  2062: 
  2063:             // ── STEP 2: NOW optimistically remove from pending (blocks ping re-render) ──
  2064:             _justAccepted.add(id);
  2065:             lastPending = lastPending.filter(x => String(x.id||'') !== id);
  2066: 
  2067:             // Show "Accepting..." state immediately
  2068:             try{
  2069:               btn.disabled = true;
  2070:               const spin = btn.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2071:               const lbl  = btn.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2072:               if(spin){ spin.textContent = ''; spin.style.display = 'inline-block'; spin.classList.add('on'); }
  2073:               if(lbl)  lbl.textContent = 'ACCEPTING…';
  2074:               btn.style.opacity = '0.8';
  2075:             }catch(_){}
  2076: 
  2077:             try{
  2078:               const confirmResult = await confirmMailboxAssignmentFromNotif(n);
  2079: 
  2080:               if(confirmResult && !confirmResult.ok){
  2081:                 // Failed — remove from justAccepted so it shows again
  2082:                 _justAccepted.delete(id);
  2083:                 // Re-add to lastPending
  2084:                 if(n) lastPending = [n, ...lastPending];
  2085:                 try{
  2086:                   btn.dataset.busy='0';
  2087:                   btn.disabled = false;
  2088:                   btn.style.opacity = '';
  2089:                   const spin = btn.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2090:                   const lbl  = btn.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2091:                   if(spin){ spin.style.display='none'; spin.classList.remove('on'); }
  2092:                   if(lbl) lbl.textContent = 'ACCEPT ✓';
  2093:                 }catch(_){}
  2094:                 try{ UI.toast(confirmResult.message || 'Unable to accept case assignment.', 'warn'); }catch(_){}
  2095:                 return;
  2096:               }
  2097: 
  2098:               // ── SUCCESS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  2099:               ackNotif(n); // persist ack to store/server
  2100: 
  2101:               // Show green check state on the button
  2102:               try{
  2103:                 const spin = btn.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2104:                 const lbl  = btn.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2105:                 if(spin){ spin.style.display='none'; spin.classList.remove('on'); }
  2106:                 if(lbl) lbl.textContent = '✓ ACCEPTED';
  2107:                 btn.style.background   = 'linear-gradient(145deg,#059669,#047857)';
  2108:                 btn.style.boxShadow    = '0 4px 16px rgba(5,150,105,0.45)';
  2109:                 btn.style.color        = '#fff';
  2110:                 btn.style.border       = '1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.55)';
  2111:                 btn.style.opacity      = '1';
  2112:                 btn.disabled = true;
  2113:                 if(row){
  2114:                   row.style.background   = 'rgba(5,150,105,0.09)';
  2115:                   row.style.borderLeft   = '3px solid #34d399';
  2116:                   row.style.transition   = 'background 0.3s, border 0.3s';
  2117:                 }
  2118:               }catch(_){}
  2119: 
  2120:               // Close modal after a short pause so user sees the green state
  2121:               setTimeout(()=>{
  2122:                 try{
  2123:                   // Re-check: if no more pending items → close modal
  2124:                   const stillPending = Store.getNotifs().filter(x =>
  2125:                     x && Array.isArray(x.recipients) &&
  2126:                     x.recipients.includes(user.id) &&
  2127:                     !(x.acks && x.acks[user.id]) &&
  2128:                     !_justAccepted.has(String(x.id||''))
  2129:                   );
  2130:                   if(!stillPending.length){
  2131:                     UI.closeModal('schedNotifModal');
  2132:                     window._schedNotifLocked = false;
  2133:                   } else {
  2134:                     ping();
  2135:                   }
  2136:                 }catch(_){ ping(); }
  2137:               }, 1000);
  2138: 
  2139:             }catch(err){
  2140:               // Network or parse error — remove from justAccepted so it shows again
  2141:               _justAccepted.delete(id);
  2142:               if(n) lastPending = [n, ...lastPending];
  2143:               try{
  2144:                 btn.dataset.busy='0';
  2145:                 btn.disabled = false;
  2146:                 btn.style.opacity = '';
  2147:                 const spin = btn.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2148:                 const lbl  = btn.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2149:                 if(spin){ spin.style.display='none'; spin.classList.remove('on'); }
  2150:                 if(lbl) lbl.textContent = 'ACCEPT ✓';
  2151:               }catch(_){}
  2152:               ping();
  2153:             }
  2154:           });
  2155:         }
  2156: 
  2157:         // ── Lock / Unlock modal for unacknowledged case assignments ────────────
  2158:         const hasPendingMailbox = deduped.some(n => String(n.type||'') === 'MAILBOX_ASSIGN');
  2159:         window._schedNotifLocked = hasPendingMailbox;
  2160: 
  2161:         // Update close button visibility
  2162:         const closeBtn = document.getElementById('schedNotifClose');
  2163:         if (closeBtn) {
  2164:           closeBtn.style.display = hasPendingMailbox ? 'none' : '';
  2165:           closeBtn.style.pointerEvents = hasPendingMailbox ? 'none' : '';
  2166:         }
  2167:         // Show/hide the lock warning badge
  2168:         const lockBadge = document.getElementById('schedNotifLockBadge');
  2169:         if (lockBadge) lockBadge.style.display = hasPendingMailbox ? 'block' : 'none';
  2170:         // Highlight modal border red when locked
  2171:         const popout = modal ? modal.querySelector('.notification-popout') : null;
  2172:         if (popout) {
  2173:           popout.style.borderColor = hasPendingMailbox ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.5)' : 'rgba(56,189,248,0.3)';
  2174:           popout.style.boxShadow = hasPendingMailbox
  2175:             ? '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), 0 0 0 1px rgba(239,68,68,0.3)'
  2176:             : '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
  2177:         }
  2178: 
  2179:         // Prevent backdrop click from closing when locked
  2180:         if (modal && !modal._lockHandlerBound) {
  2181:           modal._lockHandlerBound = true;
  2182:           modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  2183:             if (e.target === modal && window._schedNotifLocked) {
  2184:               e.preventDefault();
  2185:               e.stopPropagation();
  2186:             }
  2187:           }, true);
  2188:         }
  2189: 
  2190:         // Force modal open when MAILBOX_ASSIGN pending — always, even after refresh/close
  2191:         if (hasPendingMailbox) {
  2192:           if (!isOpen) UI.openModal('schedNotifModal');
  2193:         } else if (!isOpen) {
  2194:           const key = pendingKeyFor(latest);
  2195:           if (!shownKeys.has(key)) {
  2196:             shownKeys.add(key);
  2197:             UI.openModal('schedNotifModal');
  2198:           }
  2199:         }
  2200:       };
  2201: 
  2202:       let timer = setInterval(()=>{
  2203:         ping();
  2204:         updateTimers();
  2205:       }, 1000);
  2206:       const onStorage = (ev)=>{
  2207:         if(!ev || !ev.key) return;
  2208:         if(ev.key=== 'ums_schedule_notifs' || ev.key=== 'mums_schedule_notifs') ping();
  2209:       };
  2210:       window.addEventListener('storage', onStorage);
  2211:       const onStore = (ev)=>{
  2212:         try{
  2213:           const key = ev && ev.detail ? String(ev.detail.key||'') : '';
  2214:           if(key === 'ums_schedule_notifs' || key === 'mums_schedule_notifs') ping();
  2215:         }catch(_){ }
  2216:       };
  2217:       window.addEventListener('mums:store', onStore);
  2218: 
  2219:       if(channel){ channel.onmessage = ()=>ping(); }
  2220:       ping();
  2221: 
  2222:       return ()=>{
  2223:         try{ clearInterval(timer); }catch(e){}
  2224:         try{ window.removeEventListener('storage', onStorage); }catch(e){}
  2225:         try{ window.removeEventListener('mums:store', onStore); }catch(e){}
  2226:         try{ channel && channel.close(); }catch(e){}
  2227:       };
  2228:     },
  2229: 
  2230:     initAppCursor(){
  2231:       try{
  2232:         if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)').matches) return;
  2233:         const mode = (localStorage.getItem('mums_cursor_mode')||'custom');
  2234:         if(mode !== 'custom') return;
  2235:         if(document.getElementById('appCursor')) return;
  2236: 
  2237:         const cur = document.createElement('div');
  2238:         cur.id = 'appCursor';
  2239:         cur.className = 'app-cursor';
  2240:         cur.innerHTML = '<div class="app-cursor-arrow"></div><div class="app-cursor-ibar"></div>';
  2241:         document.body.appendChild(cur);
  2242:         document.body.classList.add('app-cursor-on');
  2243: 
  2244:         let x = window.innerWidth/2, y = window.innerHeight/2;
  2245: 
  2246:         const isTextTarget = (el)=>{
  2247:           if(!el) return false;
  2248:           const tag = (el.tagName||'').toLowerCase();
  2249:           if(tag==='input' || tag==='textarea' || tag==='select') return true;
  2250:           if(el.isContentEditable) return true;
  2251:           return false;
  2252:         };
  2253: 
  2254:         const update = (cx, cy)=>{
  2255:           x = cx; y = cy;
  2256:           cur.style.transform = `translate(${x}px, ${y}px)`;
  2257:           const el = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy);
  2258:           cur.classList.toggle('is-text', isTextTarget(el));
  2259:         };
  2260: 
  2261:         const onMove = (ev)=>{ update(ev.clientX, ev.clientY); };
  2262:         const onDown = ()=>cur.classList.add('is-down');
  2263:         const onUp = ()=>cur.classList.remove('is-down');
  2264: 
  2265:         window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove, { passive:true });
  2266:         window.addEventListener('mousedown', onDown, { passive:true });
  2267:         window.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp, { passive:true });
  2268: 
  2269:         update(x, y);
  2270: 
  2271:         cur._cleanup = ()=>{
  2272:           try{ window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); }catch(_){}
  2273:           try{ window.removeEventListener('mousedown', onDown); }catch(_){}
  2274:           try{ window.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp); }catch(_){}
  2275:         };
  2276:       }catch(e){}
  2277:     },
  2278: 
  2279:     setCursorMode(mode){
  2280:       try{
  2281:         const m = (mode==='system') ? 'system' : 'custom';
  2282:         localStorage.setItem('mums_cursor_mode', m);
  2283:         const cur = document.getElementById('appCursor');
  2284:         if(m==='system'){
  2285:           if(cur && cur._cleanup) cur._cleanup();
  2286:           if(cur) cur.remove();
  2287:           document.body.classList.remove('app-cursor-on');
  2288:           return;
  2289:         }
  2290:         if(!cur) UI.initAppCursor();
  2291:         document.body.classList.add('app-cursor-on');
  2292:       }catch(e){ console.error('setCursorMode error', e); }
  2293:     }
  2294:   };
  2295: 
  2296:   UI.bindDataClose = function(){
  2297:     if(UI.__dataCloseBound) return;
  2298:     UI.__dataCloseBound = true;
  2299:     document.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
  2300:       const btn = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('[data-close]') : null;
  2301:       if(!btn) return;
  2302:       const id = btn.getAttribute('data-close');
  2303:       if(!id) return;
  2304:       try{ UI.closeModal(id); }catch(_){}
  2305:       e.preventDefault();
  2306:       e.stopPropagation();
  2307:     }, true);
  2308:   };
  2309: 
  2310:   UI.renderDashboard = function(root){
  2311:     try{
  2312:       const Config = window.Config || {};
  2313:       const Store = window.Store || {};
  2314:       const Auth = window.Auth || {};
  2315:       const me = (Auth.getUser ? (Auth.getUser()||{}) : {});
  2316: 
  2317:       try{ if(root && root._dashCleanup) root._dashCleanup(); }catch(_){ }
  2318: 
  2319:       const state = root._dashState || { filter: 'unread', q: '', sync: { mode:'offline', detail:'', lastOkAt:0 } };
  2320:       state.sync = state.sync || { mode:'offline', detail:'', lastOkAt:0 };
  2321:       root._dashState = state;
  2322: 
  2323:       const tz = (Config && Config.TZ) || 'Asia/Manila';
  2324:       const esc = (s)=> (window.UI && UI.esc) ? UI.esc(s) : String(s||'');
  2325:       const pad2 = (n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
  2326: 
  2327:       const role = String(me.role||'');
  2328:       const ROLES = (Config.ROLES || {});
  2329:       const SA = ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN || 'SUPER_ADMIN';
  2330:       const SU = ROLES.SUPER_USER || 'SUPER_USER';
  2331:       const AD = ROLES.ADMIN || 'ADMIN';
  2332:       const TL = ROLES.TEAM_LEAD || 'TEAM_LEAD';
  2333:       const isAdmin = role===SA || role===SU || role===AD;
  2334:       const isLead = role===TL;
  2335: 
  2336:       const _parseHM = (hm)=>{
  2337:         try{ if(UI && typeof UI.parseHM==='function') return UI.parseHM(hm); }catch(_){ }
  2338:         try{
  2339:           const s = String(hm||'0:0').split(':');
  2340:           const h = Math.max(0, Math.min(23, parseInt(s[0]||'0',10)||0));
  2341:           const m = Math.max(0, Math.min(59, parseInt(s[1]||'0',10)||0));
  2342:           return h*60+m;
  2343:         }catch(_){ return 0; }
  2344:       };
  2345: 
  2346:       const inBucket = (nowMin, b)=>{
  2347:         const s = _parseHM(b.start);
  2348:         const e = _parseHM(b.end);
  2349:         const wrap = e <= s;
  2350:         if(!wrap) return nowMin >= s && nowMin < e;
  2351:         return (nowMin >= s) || (nowMin < e);
  2352:       };
  2353: 
  2354:       function manilaDateFromTs(ts){
  2355:         try{ return new Date(new Date(Number(ts||0)).toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: tz })); }catch(_){ return new Date(Number(ts||0)); }
  2356:       }
  2357:       function isoFromManilaDate(d){
  2358:         try{ return `${d.getFullYear()}-${pad2(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad2(d.getDate())}`; }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2359:       }
  2360: 
  2361:       const nowText = ()=>{
  2362:         try{
  2363:           return new Date().toLocaleString('en-CA', {
  2364:             timeZone: tz, weekday:'short', year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'2-digit', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit', hour12:false
  2365:           });
  2366:         }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2367:       };
  2368: 
  2369:       function buildModel(){
  2370:         const parts = (UI.mailboxNowParts ? UI.mailboxNowParts() : (UI.manilaNow ? UI.manilaNow() : null)) || {};
  2371:         const duty = (UI.getDutyWindow ? UI.getDutyWindow(parts) : null);
  2372:         const dutyCur = duty && duty.current ? duty.current : null;
  2373:         const dutyNext = duty && duty.next ? duty.next : null;
  2374:         const secLeft = duty && Number.isFinite(Number(duty.secLeft)) ? Number(duty.secLeft) : 0;
  2375: 
  2376:         const teamLabel = (Config.teamLabel && me.teamId!=null) ? Config.teamLabel(me.teamId) : (me.teamId||'—');
  2377:         const dutyLabel = dutyCur ? (dutyCur.label||dutyCur.id||'—') : '—';
  2378:         const nextLabel = dutyNext ? (dutyNext.label||dutyNext.id||'—') : '—';
  2379: 
  2380:         const allCases = (Store.getCases ? (Store.getCases()||[]) : []);
  2381:         const isOpen = (c)=>{
  2382:           const st = String((c && (c.status||c.state)) || '').toLowerCase();
  2383:           return !st || (st!=='closed' && st!=='done' && st!=='resolved');
  2384:         };
  2385:         const openCases = allCases.filter(c=>c && isOpen(c));
  2386:         const myOpen = openCases.filter(c=>c && String(c.assigneeId||'')===String(me.id||''));
  2387: 
  2388:         const notifsAll = (Store.getNotifs ? (Store.getNotifs()||[]) : []);
  2389:         const notifsTeam = me.teamId ? notifsAll.filter(n=>n && n.teamId===me.teamId) : notifsAll;
  2390:         const myNotifs = notifsTeam.filter(n=>n && Array.isArray(n.recipients) && me.id && n.recipients.includes(me.id));
  2391:         const myUnread = myNotifs.filter(n=>!(n.acks && n.acks[me.id]));
  2392: 
  2393:         const shiftKey = dutyCur ? String(dutyCur.id||'') : '';
  2394:         const table = (shiftKey && Store.getMailboxTable) ? Store.getMailboxTable(shiftKey) : null;
  2395:         const nowMin = (UI.minutesOfDay ? UI.minutesOfDay(parts) : (Number(parts.hh||0)*60 + Number(parts.mm||0)));
  2396: 
  2397:         let activeBucketId = '';
  2398:         let bucketLabel = '';
  2399:         let bucketManager = '';
  2400:         let mbx = {
  2401:           shiftKey, hasTable: !!table, totalAssigned: 0, totalConfirmed: 0, totalOpen: 0, bucketAssigned: 0, bucketOpen: 0, avgRespMin: 0, byBucket: [], byRole: [], topAssignees: []
  2402:         };
  2403: 
  2404:         if(table && typeof table==='object'){
  2405:           const buckets = Array.isArray(table.buckets) ? table.buckets : [];
  2406:           const assigns = Array.isArray(table.assignments) ? table.assignments : [];
  2407:           const totalAssigned = assigns.length;
  2408: 
  2409:           const bActive = buckets.find(b=>b && inBucket(nowMin, b)) || buckets[0] || null;
  2410:           activeBucketId = bActive ? String(bActive.id||'') : '';
  2411:           bucketLabel = bActive ? `${String(bActive.start||'')}–${String(bActive.end||'')}` : '';
  2412: 
  2413:           try{
  2414:             const bm = table.meta && table.meta.bucketManagers ? table.meta.bucketManagers[activeBucketId] : null;
  2415:             bucketManager = bm && bm.name ? String(bm.name) : '';
  2416:           }catch(_){ bucketManager=''; }
  2417: 
  2418:           const confirmed = assigns.filter(a=>a && Number(a.confirmedAt||0) > 0);
  2419:           const open = assigns.filter(a=>a && !(Number(a.confirmedAt||0) > 0));
  2420:           const inB = (a)=> String(a.bucketId||'') === activeBucketId;
  2421: 
  2422:           const confirmedDur = confirmed.map(a=> (Number(a.confirmedAt||0) - Number(a.assignedAt||0))).filter(ms=>Number.isFinite(ms) && ms>0);
  2423:           const avgRespMs = confirmedDur.length ? (confirmedDur.reduce((x,y)=>x+y,0) / confirmedDur.length) : 0;
  2424: 
  2425:           mbx.totalAssigned = assigns.length;
  2426:           mbx.totalConfirmed = confirmed.length;
  2427:           mbx.totalOpen = open.length;
  2428:           mbx.bucketAssigned = assigns.filter(a=>a && inB(a)).length;
  2429:           mbx.bucketOpen = open.filter(a=>a && inB(a)).length;
  2430:           mbx.avgRespMin = avgRespMs ? Math.round(avgRespMs/60000) : 0;
  2431: 
  2432:           const byB = {};
  2433:           for(const a of assigns){
  2434:             if(!a) continue;
  2435:             const bid = String(a.bucketId||'');
  2436:             byB[bid] = byB[bid] || { bucketId: bid, assigned:0, open:0, confirmed:0 };
  2437:             byB[bid].assigned++;
  2438:             if(Number(a.confirmedAt||0)>0) byB[bid].confirmed++; else byB[bid].open++;
  2439:           }
  2440:           mbx.byBucket = buckets.map(b=>{
  2441:             const bid = String(b && b.id || '');
  2442:             const row = byB[bid] || { bucketId: bid, assigned:0, open:0, confirmed:0 };
  2443:             return {
  2444:               bucketId: bid, label: b ? `${String(b.start||'')}–${String(b.end||'')}` : bid, assigned: row.assigned, open: row.open, confirmed: row.confirmed, isActive: bid === activeBucketId
  2445:             };
  2446:           });
  2447: 
  2448:           const users = (Store.getUsers ? (Store.getUsers()||[]) : []);
  2449:           const roleById = {};
  2450:           for(const u of users){ if(!u) continue; roleById[String(u.id||'')] = String(u.role||'MEMBER'); }
  2451:           const byRole = {};
  2452:           for(const a of assigns){
  2453:             if(!a) continue;
  2454:             const rid = roleById[String(a.assigneeId||'')] || 'MEMBER';
  2455:             byRole[rid] = (byRole[rid]||0) + 1;
  2456:           }
  2457:           mbx.byRole = Object.keys(byRole).sort((a,b)=>byRole[b]-byRole[a]).map(r=>({ role:r, count: byRole[r], pct: totalAssigned ? Math.round((byRole[r]/totalAssigned)*100) : 0 }));
  2458: 
  2459:           const byA = {};
  2460:           for(const a of assigns){
  2461:             if(!a) continue;
  2462:             const uid = String(a.assigneeId||'');
  2463:             byA[uid] = (byA[uid]||0) + 1;
  2464:           }
  2465:           const nameById = {};
  2466:           for(const u of users){ if(u) nameById[String(u.id||'')] = String(u.name||u.username||''); }
  2467:           mbx.topAssignees = Object.keys(byA).sort((a,b)=>byA[b]-byA[a]).slice(0, 6).map(uid=>({ uid, name: nameById[uid] || uid, count: byA[uid], pct: totalAssigned ? Math.round((byA[uid]/totalAssigned)*100) : 0 }));
  2468:         }
  2469: 
  2470:         const logsAll = (Store.getLogs ? (Store.getLogs()||[]) : []);
  2471:         const logs = me.teamId ? logsAll.filter(l=>l && (!l.teamId || String(l.teamId)===String(me.teamId))) : logsAll;
  2472: 
  2473:         const nowM = manilaDateFromTs(Date.now());
  2474:         const days = [];
  2475:         for(let i=6;i>=0;i--){
  2476:           const d = new Date(nowM.getTime());
  2477:           d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);
  2478:           const iso = isoFromManilaDate(d);
  2479:           const wd = d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday:'short', timeZone: tz });
  2480:           days.push({ iso, wd, label: `${wd} ${iso.slice(5)}` });
  2481:         }
  2482:         const dayIndex = {};
  2483:         days.forEach((d, idx)=>{ dayIndex[d.iso] = idx; });
  2484: 
  2485:         const bins = 6;
  2486:         const mat = Array.from({length: bins}, ()=> Array.from({length:7}, ()=>0));
  2487:         const recentCut = Date.now() - (7*24*60*60*1000);
  2488: 
  2489:         for(const e of logs){
  2490:           if(!e || !e.ts) continue;
  2491:           const ts = Number(e.ts)||0;
  2492:           if(ts < recentCut) continue;
  2493:           const md = manilaDateFromTs(ts);
  2494:           const iso = isoFromManilaDate(md);
  2495:           const di = dayIndex[iso];
  2496:           if(di==null) continue;
  2497:           const hr = md.getHours();
  2498:           const bi = Math.max(0, Math.min(bins-1, Math.floor(hr/4)));
  2499:           mat[bi][di] += 1;
  2500:         }
  2501: 
  2502:         let maxV = 0;
  2503:         for(const row of mat){ for(const v of row){ if(v>maxV) maxV=v; } }
  2504: 
  2505:         return { parts, dutyCur, dutyNext, dutyLabel, nextLabel, secLeft, teamLabel, openCases: openCases.length, myOpen: myOpen.length, pendingAcks: myUnread.length, notifs: myNotifs, unreadNotifs: myUnread, mbx, activeBucketId, bucketLabel, bucketManager, heat: { days, mat, maxV }, logs };
  2506:       }
  2507: 
  2508:       function render(model){
  2509:         const syncMode = String(state.sync.mode||'offline');
  2510:         const syncLabel = (syncMode==='cloud') ? 'Realtime' : (syncMode==='poll') ? 'Polling' : (syncMode==='connecting') ? 'Connecting' : 'Offline';
  2511:         const syncDot = (syncMode==='cloud') ? 'ok' : (syncMode==='poll' || syncMode==='connecting') ? 'warn' : 'bad';
  2512: 
  2513:         const dutyCountdown = (UI && UI.formatDuration) ? UI.formatDuration(model.secLeft||0) : String(model.secLeft||0);
  2514: 
  2515:         const card = (k,v,s)=>`<div class="ux-card dashx-card"><div class="k">${esc(k)}</div><div class="v">${esc(v)}</div>${s?`<div class="s">${esc(s)}</div>`:''}</div>`;
  2516: 
  2517:         const heatRows = [];
  2518:         heatRows.push(`<div></div>`);
  2519:         for(const d of model.heat.days){ heatRows.push(`<div class="h">${esc(d.wd)}</div>`); }
  2520:         const labels = ['00','04','08','12','16','20'];
  2521:         for(let r=0;r<6;r++){
  2522:           heatRows.push(`<div class="h" style="text-align:left;padding-left:4px">${labels[r]}</div>`);
  2523:           for(let c=0;c<7;c++){
  2524:             const v = model.heat.mat[r][c];
  2525:             const maxV = model.heat.maxV || 1;
  2526:             const level = v<=0 ? 0 : Math.min(4, Math.ceil((v/maxV)*4));
  2527:             const alpha = 0.04 + (level*0.06);
  2528:             const dayIso = model.heat.days[c].iso;
