  2529:             const title = `${dayIso} ${labels[r]}–${labels[r]=== '20' ? '24' : pad2((parseInt(labels[r],10)+4)%24)} • ${v} events`;
  2530:             heatRows.push(`<div class="cell" title="${esc(title)}" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,${alpha.toFixed(3)})"></div>`);
  2531:           }
  2532:         }
  2533: 
  2534:         const bucketRows = (model.mbx.hasTable && model.mbx.byBucket.length) ? model.mbx.byBucket.map(b=>{
  2535:           const dot = b.isActive ? '<span class="badge ok" style="margin-left:8px">Now</span>' : '';
  2536:           return `<div class="small" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-top:6px"><div>${esc(b.label)}${dot}</div><div class="muted">${esc(b.open)} open • ${esc(b.assigned)} assigned</div></div>`;
  2537:         }).join('') : `<div class="small muted" style="margin-top:8px">Mailbox table not loaded yet for this shift.</div>`;
  2538: 
  2539:         const byRole = (model.mbx.byRole && model.mbx.byRole.length) ?
  2540:           `<div class="small muted" style="margin-top:10px">Distribution by assignee role</div>
  2541:            <div class="dashx-dist" style="margin-top:8px">
  2542:              ${model.mbx.byRole.slice(0,6).map(r=>`<div class="dashx-dist-row"><div class="dashx-dist-left">${esc(r.role)}</div><div class="dashx-dist-mid"><div class="dashx-bar" role="img" aria-label="${esc(r.role)} ${esc(r.count)} (${esc(r.pct)}%)"><div class="fill" style="width:${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(r.pct||0)))}%"></div></div></div><div class="dashx-dist-right muted">${esc(r.count)} • ${esc(r.pct)}%</div></div>`).join('')}
  2543:            </div>` : '';
  2544: 
  2545:         const topAsg = (model.mbx.topAssignees && model.mbx.topAssignees.length) ?
  2546:           `<div class="small muted" style="margin-top:12px">Top assignees (distribution)</div>
  2547:            <div class="dashx-top" style="margin-top:8px">
  2548:              ${model.mbx.topAssignees.map(a=>`<div class="dashx-top-row"><div class="dashx-top-name">${esc(a.name)}</div><div class="dashx-top-meta muted">${esc(a.count)} • ${esc(a.pct)}%</div><div class="dashx-bar" role="img" aria-label="${esc(a.name)} ${esc(a.count)} (${esc(a.pct)}%)"><div class="fill" style="width:${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(a.pct||0)))}%"></div></div></div>`).join('')}
  2549:            </div>` : '';
  2550: 
  2551:         root.innerHTML = `
  2552:           <div class="dashx">
  2553:             <div class="dashx-head">
  2554:               <div>
  2555:                 <div class="ux-row" style="gap:12px">
  2556:                   <h2 class="ux-h1" style="margin:0">Dashboard</h2>
  2557:                   <span class="badge ${syncDot}" id="dashSyncBadge">${esc(syncLabel)}</span>
  2558:                 </div>
  2559:                 <div class="small muted ux-sub">
  2560:                   <span id="dashNow">${esc(nowText())}</span> • Team: <b>${esc(model.teamLabel)}</b> • Duty: <b>${esc(model.dutyLabel)}</b> (next: ${esc(model.nextLabel)} in <span id="dashDutyLeft">${esc(dutyCountdown)}</span>)
  2561:                 </div>
  2562:               </div>
  2563:               <div class="dashx-actions">
  2564:                 <button class="btn" type="button" id="dashToggleSidebar">Toggle Sidebar</button>
  2565:                 <a class="btn" href="/mailbox">Assign Case</a>
  2566:                 <a class="btn" href="/${isAdmin||isLead ? 'master_schedule' : 'my_schedule'}">Schedule</a>
  2567:                 <a class="btn" href="/logs">Export Logs</a>
  2568:               </div>
  2569:             </div>
  2570:             <div class="dashx-cards">
  2571:               ${card('Active cases', String(model.openCases), isAdmin ? 'All open cases in system' : 'Your team workload signal')}
  2572:               ${card('My active cases', String(model.myOpen), 'Assigned to you')}
  2573:               ${card('Pending acknowledgements', String(model.pendingAcks), 'Schedule blocks awaiting your acknowledge')}
  2574:               ${card('Mailbox shift load', model.mbx.hasTable ? String(model.mbx.totalOpen) : '—', model.mbx.hasTable ? `Open assignments (${esc(model.mbx.shiftKey||'shift')})` : 'Mailbox not loaded')}
  2575:             </div>
  2576:             <div class="dashx-layout">
  2577:               <div class="ux-card dashx-panel">
  2578:                 <div class="dashx-title">Team Activity Heatmap</div>
  2579:                 <div class="small muted" style="margin-top:6px">Last 7 days • 4-hour bins • Hover for counts</div>
  2580:                 <div class="dashx-heatmap" id="dashHeatmap">${heatRows.join('')}</div>
  2581:                 <div style="margin-top:14px" class="dashx-title">Notification Center</div>
  2582:                 <div class="dashx-notif-tools">
  2583:                   <button class="dashx-filter ux-focusable" data-filter="unread" id="dashF_unread">Unread (${esc(model.unreadNotifs.length)})</button>
  2584:                   <button class="dashx-filter ux-focusable" data-filter="schedule" id="dashF_schedule">Schedule (${esc(model.notifs.length)})</button>
  2585:                   <button class="dashx-filter ux-focusable" data-filter="mailbox" id="dashF_mailbox">Mailbox</button>
  2586:                   <button class="dashx-filter ux-focusable" data-filter="system" id="dashF_system">System</button>
  2587:                   <button class="dashx-filter ux-focusable" data-filter="all" id="dashF_all">All</button>
  2588:                   <input class="dashx-filter" style="flex:1;min-width:180px" id="dashNotifSearch" placeholder="Search…" value="${esc(state.q||'')}" />
  2589:                 </div>
  2590:                 <div class="dashx-notifs" id="dashNotifs"></div>
  2591:               </div>
  2592:               <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px">
  2593:                 <div class="ux-card dashx-panel">
  2594:                   <div class="dashx-title">Mailbox Analytics</div>
  2595:                   <div class="small muted" style="margin-top:6px">Shift: <b>${esc(model.mbx.shiftKey||'—')}</b>${model.bucketLabel ? ` • Bucket: <b>${esc(model.bucketLabel)}</b>` : ''}${model.bucketManager ? ` • Manager: <b>${esc(model.bucketManager)}</b>` : ''}</div>
  2596:                   ${model.mbx.hasTable ? `<div class="ux-row" style="margin-top:10px;gap:10px"><span class="badge">Assigned: ${esc(model.mbx.totalAssigned)}</span><span class="badge ok">Confirmed: ${esc(model.mbx.totalConfirmed)}</span><span class="badge warn">Open: ${esc(model.mbx.totalOpen)}</span><span class="badge">Avg response: ${esc(model.mbx.avgRespMin ? (model.mbx.avgRespMin+' min') : '—')}</span></div>` : ''}
  2597:                   <div style="margin-top:10px">${bucketRows}</div>
  2598:                   ${byRole}
  2599:                   ${topAsg}
  2600:                 </div>
  2601:                 <div class="ux-card dashx-panel">
  2602:                   <div class="dashx-title">Quick Navigation</div>
  2603:                   <div class="small muted" style="margin-top:6px">Role-aware shortcuts</div>
  2604:                   <div class="dashx-actions" style="margin-top:10px">
  2605:                     <a class="btn" href="/my_schedule">My Schedule</a>
  2606:                     <a class="btn" href="/mailbox">Mailbox</a>
  2607:                     <a class="btn" href="/attendance">Attendance</a>
  2608:                     <a class="btn" href="/tasks">Tasks</a>
  2609:                     ${(isAdmin||isLead) ? `<a class="btn" href="/master_schedule">Master Schedule</a>` : ''}
  2610:                     ${isAdmin ? `<a class="btn" href="/members">User Management</a>` : ''}
  2611:                   </div>
  2612:                 </div>
  2613:               </div>
  2614:             </div>
  2615:           </div>
  2616:         `;
  2617: 
  2618:         try{
  2619:           const f = String(state.filter||'unread');
  2620:           (root.querySelectorAll('.dashx-filter[data-filter]')||[]).forEach(b=>{
  2621:             try{ b.classList.toggle('active', String(b.getAttribute('data-filter')||'')===f); }catch(_){ }
  2622:           });
  2623:         }catch(_){ }
  2624: 
  2625:         bindNotifCenter(model);
  2626:         bindQuickActions();
  2627:       }
  2628: 
  2629:       function classifyActivity(a){
  2630:         const act = String(a && a.action || '').toUpperCase();
  2631:         if(act.startsWith('MAILBOX_')) return 'mailbox';
  2632:         if(act.includes('SCHEDULE') || act.includes('ACK')) return 'schedule';
  2633:         if(act.includes('ERROR') || act.includes('EXCEPTION') || act==='APP_ERROR') return 'system';
  2634:         return 'other';
  2635:       }
  2636: 
  2637:       function renderNotifs(model){
  2638:         const f = String(state.filter||'unread');
  2639:         const q = String(state.q||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  2640:         const items = [];
  2641: 
  2642:         for(const n of (model.notifs||[])){
  2643:           if(!n) continue;
  2644:           const unread = !!(me.id && Array.isArray(n.recipients) && n.recipients.includes(me.id) && !(n.acks && n.acks[me.id]));
  2645:           items.push({
  2646:             type:'schedule', id: n.id, ts: Number(n.ts||0) || Date.now(), title: n.title || 'Schedule Updated',
  2647:             body: n.body || '', from: n.fromName || 'Team Lead', unread, category:'schedule'
  2648:           });
  2649:         }
  2650: 
  2651:         const logs = (model.logs||[]).slice(0, 60);
  2652:         for(const l of logs){
  2653:           if(!l) continue;
  2654:           items.push({
  2655:             type:'activity', id: String(l.ts||'') + '_' + String(l.action||''), ts: Number(l.ts||0) || 0,
  2656:             title: String(l.action||'Activity'), body: [l.msg, l.detail].filter(Boolean).join('\\n'), from: l.actorName || '',
  2657:             unread:false, category: classifyActivity(l)
  2658:           });
  2659:         }
  2660: 
  2661:         items.sort((a,b)=> (b.ts||0) - (a.ts||0));
  2662: 
  2663:         const filtered = items.filter(it=>{
  2664:           if(f==='unread' && !it.unread) return false;
  2665:           if(f==='schedule' && it.category!=='schedule') return false;
  2666:           if(f==='mailbox' && it.category!=='mailbox') return false;
  2667:           if(f==='system' && it.category!=='system') return false;
  2668:           if(f!=='all' && f!=='unread' && f!=='schedule' && f!=='mailbox' && f!=='system') return true;
  2669:           if(q){
  2670:             const txt = (it.title+'\n'+it.body+'\n'+it.from).toLowerCase();
  2671:             if(!txt.includes(q)) return false;
  2672:           }
  2673:           return true;
  2674:         }).slice(0, 16);
  2675: 
  2676:         const fmt = (ts)=>{
  2677:           try{ return new Date(Number(ts||0)).toLocaleString('en-CA', { timeZone: tz, month:'short', day:'2-digit', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', hour12:false }); }catch(_){ return ''; }
  2678:         };
  2679: 
  2680:         if(!filtered.length){
  2681:           return `<div class="small muted" style="padding:10px 2px">No items for this filter.</div>`;
  2682:         }
  2683: 
  2684:         return filtered.map(it=>{
  2685:           const unreadCls = it.unread ? 'unread' : '';
  2686:           const topRight = `<div class="small muted">${esc(fmt(it.ts))}</div>`;
  2687:           const ackBtn = (it.type==='schedule' && it.unread) ? `<button class="btn dashx-ack" data-ack="${esc(it.id)}" type="button" aria-label="Acknowledge schedule notification"><span class="dashx-spin" aria-hidden="true"></span><span class="dashx-acklbl">Acknowledge</span></button>` : '';
  2688:           const from = it.from ? `<div class="small muted">From: ${esc(it.from)}</div>` : '';
  2689:           return `
  2690:             <div class="dashx-notif ${unreadCls}">
  2691:               <div class="top">
  2692:                 <div><div class="t">${esc(it.title)}</div>${from}</div>
  2693:                 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">${topRight}${ackBtn}</div>
  2694:               </div>
  2695:               <div class="m">${esc(it.body||'')}</div>
  2696:             </div>
  2697:           `;
  2698:         }).join('');
  2699:       }
  2700: 
  2701:       function bindNotifCenter(model){
  2702:         const box = root.querySelector('#dashNotifs');
  2703:         if(!box) return;
  2704:         box.innerHTML = renderNotifs(model);
  2705: 
  2706:         (root.querySelectorAll('.dashx-filter[data-filter]')||[]).forEach(btn=>{
  2707:           btn.onclick = ()=>{
  2708:             state.filter = String(btn.getAttribute('data-filter')||'all');
  2709:             const next = buildModel();
  2710:             render(next);
  2711:           };
  2712:         });
  2713: 
  2714:         const inp = root.querySelector('#dashNotifSearch');
  2715:         if(inp){
  2716:           inp.oninput = ()=>{
  2717:             state.q = String(inp.value||'');
  2718:             const next = buildModel();
  2719:             const list = root.querySelector('#dashNotifs');
  2720:             if(list) list.innerHTML = renderNotifs(next);
  2721:           };
  2722:         }
  2723: 
  2724:         (box.querySelectorAll('[data-ack]')||[]).forEach(b=>{
  2725:           b.onclick = ()=>{
  2726:             const id = String(b.getAttribute('data-ack')||'');
  2727:             if(!id) return;
  2728:             try{
  2729:               if(b.dataset.busy==='1') return;
  2730:               b.dataset.busy='1'; b.disabled = true;
  2731:               const spin = b.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2732:               const lbl = b.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2733:               if(spin) spin.classList.add('on');
  2734:               if(lbl) lbl.textContent = 'Acknowledging…';
  2735:             }catch(_){ }
  2736: 
  2737:             try{
  2738:               Store.ackNotif && Store.ackNotif(id, me.id);
  2739:               UI.toast && UI.toast('Acknowledged.');
  2740:             }catch(e){
  2741:               try{ UI.toast && UI.toast('Failed to acknowledge. Try again.', 'warn'); }catch(_){ }
  2742:               try{
  2743:                 b.dataset.busy='0'; b.disabled = false;
  2744:                 const spin = b.querySelector('.dashx-spin');
  2745:                 const lbl = b.querySelector('.dashx-acklbl');
  2746:                 if(spin) spin.classList.remove('on');
  2747:                 if(lbl) lbl.textContent = 'Acknowledge';
  2748:               }catch(_){ }
  2749:               return;
  2750:             }
  2751:             try{ const next = buildModel(); render(next); }catch(_){
  2752:               try{ const list = root.querySelector('#dashNotifs'); if(list){ const next = buildModel(); list.innerHTML = renderNotifs(next); } }catch(_){}
  2753:             }
  2754:           };
  2755:         });
  2756:       }
  2757: 
  2758:       function bindQuickActions(){
  2759:         const btn = root.querySelector('#dashToggleSidebar');
  2760:         if(btn){ btn.onclick = ()=>{ try{ const t = document.getElementById('sidebarToggle'); if(t) t.click(); }catch(_){ } }; }
  2761:       }
  2762: 
  2763:       function softUpdateHeader(){
  2764:         try{
  2765:           const now = root.querySelector('#dashNow');
  2766:           if(now) now.textContent = nowText();
  2767: 
  2768:           const parts = (UI.mailboxNowParts ? UI.mailboxNowParts() : (UI.manilaNow ? UI.manilaNow() : null)) || {};
  2769:           const duty = (UI.getDutyWindow ? UI.getDutyWindow(parts) : null);
  2770:           const left = duty && Number.isFinite(Number(duty.secLeft)) ? Number(duty.secLeft) : 0;
  2771:           const el = root.querySelector('#dashDutyLeft');
  2772:           if(el && UI && UI.formatDuration) el.textContent = UI.formatDuration(left);
  2773:         }catch(_){ }
  2774:       }
  2775: 
  2776:       function updateSyncBadge(){
  2777:         try{
  2778:           const b = root.querySelector('#dashSyncBadge');
  2779:           if(!b) return;
  2780:           const mode = String(state.sync.mode||'offline');
  2781:           const label = (mode==='cloud') ? 'Realtime' : (mode==='poll') ? 'Polling' : (mode==='connecting') ? 'Connecting' : 'Offline';
  2782:           b.textContent = label;
  2783:           b.classList.remove('ok','warn','bad');
  2784:           b.classList.add(mode==='cloud' ? 'ok' : (mode==='poll' || mode==='connecting') ? 'warn' : 'bad');
  2785:         }catch(_){ }
  2786:       }
  2787: 
  2788:       const model = buildModel();
  2789:       render(model);
  2790: 
  2791:       try{ if(root._dashTimer) clearInterval(root._dashTimer); }catch(_){ }
  2792:       root._dashTimer = setInterval(()=>{ softUpdateHeader(); }, 1000);
  2793: 
  2794:       const onStore = (ev)=>{
  2795:         try{
  2796:           const k = ev && ev.detail ? String(ev.detail.key||'') : '';
  2797:           if(!k) return;
  2798:           if(k==='ums_cases' || k==='ums_schedule_notifs' || k==='mums_mailbox_tables' || k==='mums_mailbox_state' || k==='ums_activity_logs'){
  2799:             const next = buildModel();
  2800:             render(next);
  2801:           }
  2802:         }catch(_){ }
  2803:       };
  2804:       window.addEventListener('mums:store', onStore);
  2805: 
  2806:       const onSync = (ev)=>{
  2807:         try{
  2808:           const d = (ev && ev.detail) ? ev.detail : {};
  2809:           state.sync = { mode: d.mode || 'offline', detail: d.detail || '', lastOkAt: d.lastOkAt || 0 };
  2810:           updateSyncBadge();
  2811:         }catch(_){ }
  2812:       };
  2813:       window.addEventListener('mums:syncstatus', onSync);
  2814: 
  2815:       const prevCleanup = root._cleanup;
  2816:       root._dashCleanup = ()=>{
  2817:         try{ if(root._dashTimer) clearInterval(root._dashTimer); }catch(_){ }
  2818:         try{ root._dashTimer = null; }catch(_){ }
  2819:         try{ window.removeEventListener('mums:store', onStore); }catch(_){ }
  2820:         try{ window.removeEventListener('mums:syncstatus', onSync); }catch(_){ }
  2821:       };
  2822:       root._cleanup = ()=>{
  2823:         try{ if(prevCleanup) prevCleanup(); }catch(_){ }
  2824:         try{ if(root._dashCleanup) root._dashCleanup(); }catch(_){ }
  2825:       };
  2826: 
  2827:     }catch(err){
  2828:       try{ console.error(err); }catch(_){ }
  2829:       try{ root.innerHTML = `<h2 style="margin:0 0 10px">Dashboard</h2><div class="card pad">Failed to load dashboard. Please reload.</div>`; }catch(_){ }
  2830:     }
  2831:   };
  2832: 
  2833:   UI.renderSchedule = function(root){
  2834:     try{
  2835:       const host = root || document.getElementById('main') || document.body;
  2836:       if(window.Pages && typeof window.Pages.my_schedule === 'function'){
  2837:         window.Pages.my_schedule(host);
  2838:         return;
  2839:       }
  2840:       host.innerHTML = `<div class="card pad">My Schedule module not loaded. Please reload.</div>`;
  2841:     }catch(err){
  2842:       try{ console.error(err); }catch(_){ }
  2843:       try{
  2844:         const host = root || document.getElementById('main') || document.body;
  2845:         host.innerHTML = `<div class="card pad">Failed to load My Schedule. Please reload.</div>`;
  2846:       }catch(_){ }
  2847:     }
  2848:   };
  2849: 
  2850:   // ENTERPRISE UPGRADE: God-Eye MS Teams Style Toast for Managers & Admins
  2851:   UI.initMailboxManagerToasts = function() {
  2852:     if(window._mbxToastEngineRunning) return;
  2853:     window._mbxToastEngineRunning = true;
  2854: 
  2855:     // Pre-populate from current confirmed state so refresh doesn't re-fire toasts
  2856:     const _initKnownAssignments = () => {
  2857:       const known = {};
  2858:       try {
  2859:         const state = window.Store?.getMailboxState?.() || {};
  2860:         const curKey = state.currentKey;
  2861:         if (curKey) {
  2862:           const t = window.Store?.getMailboxTable?.(curKey);
  2863:           (t && Array.isArray(t.assignments) ? t.assignments : []).forEach(a => {
  2864:             if (a && a.id) known[a.id] = Number(a.confirmedAt || 0) > 0;
  2865:           });
  2866:         }
  2867:         // Also scan all tables in case shift rotated
  2868:         const allTables = window.Store?.getMailboxTables?.() || {};
  2869:         Object.values(allTables).forEach(t => {
  2870:           (t && Array.isArray(t.assignments) ? t.assignments : []).forEach(a => {
  2871:             if (a && a.id) known[a.id] = Number(a.confirmedAt || 0) > 0;
  2872:           });
  2873:         });
  2874:       } catch (_) {}
  2875:       return known;
  2876:     };
  2877:     let knownAssignments = _initKnownAssignments();
  2878: 
  2879:     if (!document.getElementById('ms-teams-toast-styles')) {
  2880:         const s = document.createElement('style');
  2881:         s.id = 'ms-teams-toast-styles';
  2882:         s.textContent = `
  2883:             @keyframes toastSlideIn { from { transform: translateX(120%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }
  2884:             @keyframes toastSlideOut { from { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateX(120%); opacity: 0; } }
  2885:             @keyframes toastProgress { from { transform: scaleX(1); } to { transform: scaleX(0); } }
  2886: 
  2887:             .ms-enterprise-toast {
  2888:                 position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.95), rgba(2,6,23,0.98));
  2889:                 backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3); border-left: 4px solid #10b981;
  2890:                 border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 20px rgba(16,185,129,0.1);
  2891:                 display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; width: 360px; pointer-events: auto; overflow: hidden;
  2892:                 animation: toastSlideIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) forwards;
  2893:             }
  2894:             .ms-enterprise-toast.hiding { animation: toastSlideOut 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.6, -0.28, 0.735, 0.045) forwards; }
  2895: 
  2896:             .ms-toast-close {
  2897:                 position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; background: transparent; border: none;
  2898:                 color: #94a3b8; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px;
  2899:                 transition: all 0.2s; line-height: 1; z-index: 10;
  2900:             }
  2901:             .ms-toast-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #f8fafc; }
  2902: 
  2903:             .ms-toast-progress {
  2904:                 position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0ea5e9, #10b981);
  2905:                 width: 100%; transform-origin: left; animation: toastProgress 6s linear forwards;
  2906:             }
  2907:         `;
  2908:         document.head.appendChild(s);
  2909:     }
  2910: 
  2911:     window.addEventListener('mums:store', (e) => {
  2912:         if(e?.detail?.key !== 'mums_mailbox_tables') return;
  2913: 
  2914:         if(!isCurrentMailboxManager()) return;
  2915: 
  2916:         const state = window.Store?.getMailboxState?.() || {};
  2917:         const curKey = state.currentKey;
  2918:         if(!curKey) return;
  2919: 
  2920:         const table = window.Store?.getMailboxTable?.(curKey);
  2921:         if(!table || !Array.isArray(table.assignments)) return;
  2922: 
  2923:         table.assignments.forEach(a => {
  2924:            if (!a || !a.id) return;
  2925:            const wasConfirmed = knownAssignments[a.id];
  2926:            const isConfirmed = Number(a.confirmedAt||0) > 0;
  2927: 
  2928:            if (!wasConfirmed && isConfirmed) {
  2929:                const assignee = window.Store?.getUsers?.().find(u => u.id === a.assigneeId);
  2930:                const name = assignee ? (assignee.name || assignee.username) : 'A team member';
  2931:                showTeamsToast(name, a.caseNo || 'Unknown Case');
  2932:            }
  2933:            knownAssignments[a.id] = isConfirmed;
  2934:         });
  2935:     });
  2936: 
  2937:     function isCurrentMailboxManager() {
  2938:         try {
  2939:             const u = window.Auth?.getUser?.();
  2940:             if (!u) return false;
  2941: 
  2942:             const role = String(u.role || '').toUpperCase();
  2943:             const SA = (window.Config && window.Config.ROLES && window.Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN) ? window.Config.ROLES.SUPER_ADMIN : 'SUPER_ADMIN';
  2944:             if (role === SA) return true;
  2945: 
  2946:             const now = window.UI?.manilaNow?.();
  2947:             if (!now) return false;
  2948:             const nowMin = now.hh * 60 + now.mm;
  2949:             const dow = new Date(now.isoDate + 'T00:00:00+08:00').getDay();
  2950:             const blocks = window.Store?.getUserDayBlocks?.(u.id, dow) || [];
  2951: 
  2952:             for (const b of blocks) {
  2953:                 if (b.role !== 'mailbox_manager' && b.role !== 'mailbox_call') continue;
  2954:                 const sParts = String(b.start).split(':');
  2955:                 const eParts = String(b.end).split(':');
  2956:                 const s = (parseInt(sParts[0])||0)*60 + (parseInt(sParts[1])||0);
  2957:                 const e = (parseInt(eParts[0])||0)*60 + (parseInt(eParts[1])||0);
  2958:                 const wraps = e <= s;
  2959:                 const hit = !wraps ? (nowMin >= s && nowMin < e) : (nowMin >= s || nowMin < e);
  2960:                 if (hit) return true;
  2961:             }
  2962:             return false;
  2963:         } catch(e) {
  2964:             return false;
  2965:         }
  2966:     }
  2967: 
  2968:     function showTeamsToast(name, caseNo) {
  2969:         let container = document.getElementById('ms-teams-toast-container');
  2970:         if(!container) {
  2971:             container = document.createElement('div');
  2972:             container.id = 'ms-teams-toast-container';
  2973:             container.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; bottom:24px; right:24px; z-index:999999; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; pointer-events:none;';
  2974:             document.body.appendChild(container);
  2975:         }
  2976: 
  2977:         const toast = document.createElement('div');
  2978:         toast.className = 'ms-enterprise-toast';
  2979:         const initials = window.UI.initials ? window.UI.initials(name) : 'U';
  2980: 
  2981:         toast.innerHTML = `
  2982:             <div class="ms-toast-progress"></div>
  2983:             <button class="ms-toast-close" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.add('hiding'); setTimeout(() => this.parentElement.remove(), 400);">✕</button>
  2984: 
  2985:             <div style="position:relative;">
  2986:                 <div style="width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #38bdf8); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#fff; font-weight:900; font-size:16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(14,165,233,0.3); border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
  2987:                     ${initials}
  2988:                 </div>
  2989:                 <div style="position:absolute; bottom:-4px; right:-4px; background:#10b981; width:18px; height:18px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:10px; font-weight:900; color:#fff; border:2px solid #0f172a; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(16,185,129,0.5);">✓</div>
  2990:             </div>
  2991: 
  2992:             <div style="flex:1; min-width:0; padding-right:12px;">
  2993:                 <div style="font-size:11px; color:#10b981; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; margin-bottom:2px;">Task Acknowledged</div>

  3043:         };
  3044:       }

=== FILE: public/js/sync_status_ui.js ===
     1: /* @AI_CRITICAL_GUARD v3.0: UNTOUCHABLE ZONE — MACE APPROVAL REQUIRED.
     2:    Protects: Enterprise UI/UX · Realtime Sync Logic · Core State Management ·
     3:    Database/API Adapters · Tab Isolation · Virtual Column State ·
     4:    QuickBase Settings Persistence · Auth Flow.
     5:    DO NOT modify any existing logic, layout, or structure in this file without
     6:    first submitting a RISK IMPACT REPORT to MACE and receiving explicit "CLEARED" approval.
     7:    Violations will cause regressions. When in doubt — STOP and REPORT. */
     8: 
     9: 
    10: (function(){
    11:   const ENABLE_BLOCKER_MODAL = false; // Enterprise: no disruptive modal popouts.
    12: 
    13:   // UI stability controls:
    14:   // Debounce rapid status changes and add hysteresis to prevent orange/green flashing.
    15:   // Apply improvements immediately (e.g., Connected), but delay degradations
    16:   // (e.g., Connected -> Offline) to avoid transient drops during token refresh.
    17:   const DEBOUNCE_MS = 200;
    18:   // BUG FIX 2026-04-16: Increased delays to absorb token-rotation reconnect cycle.
    19:   // Token refresh takes ~400ms debounce + channel setup time. Without longer delays
    20:   // the UI briefly flashes orange "Connecting" after every 1-hour token refresh.
    21:   const DOWNGRADE_DELAY_MS = 2500;  // Connected -> (Connecting/Polling/Offline) — was 800ms
    22:   const OFFLINE_CONFIRM_MS = 3000;  // Require sustained offline before showing — was 1200ms
    23:   const RECENT_CONNECT_GRACE_MS = 2000; // Grace after connect — was 1000ms
    24: 
    25:   let lastApplied = { mode: null, detail: '' };
    26:   let lastConnectedAt = 0;
    27:   let pendingTimer = null;
    28:   let pendingSeq = 0;
    29:   let latestWanted = { mode: 'connecting', detail: 'Sync starting…' };
    30: 
    31:   function root(){ return document.getElementById('realtimeSyncStatus'); }
    32:   function isLoginPage(){
    33:     try {
    34:       const p = String(location.pathname || '');
    35:       return p.endsWith('/login.html') || p.endsWith('login.html');
    36:     } catch (_) { return false; }
    37:   }
    38: 
    39:   function removeLegacyBlocker(){
    40:     try {
    41:       const el = document.getElementById('realtimeBlocker');
    42:       if (el && el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el);
    43:     } catch(_) {}
    44:   }
    45: 
    46:   function ensureBlocker(){
    47:     if (!ENABLE_BLOCKER_MODAL) return null;
    48:     if (isLoginPage()) return null;
    49:     let el = document.getElementById('realtimeBlocker');
    50:     if (el) return el;
    51:     el = document.createElement('div');
    52:     el.id = 'realtimeBlocker';
    53:     el.className = 'realtime-blocker';
    54:     el.style.display = 'none';
    55:     el.innerHTML = `
    56:       <div class="realtime-blocker-card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="rtTitle">
    57:         <div class="rt-head">
    58:           <div class="rt-title" id="rtTitle">Realtime Sync Required</div>
    59:           <div class="rt-sub">This app requires an active realtime connection to ensure cross-device consistency.</div>
    60:         </div>
    61:         <div class="rt-body">
    62:           <div class="rt-status"><span class="rt-dot"></span><span class="rt-status-text">Connecting…</span></div>
    63:           <div class="rt-detail" aria-live="polite"></div>
    64:           <div class="rt-hint">
    65:             If this persists, verify: (1) you are logged in, (2) Supabase Realtime is enabled for <b>mums_documents</b>, and (3) your network allows WebSockets.
    66:           </div>
    67:         </div>
    68:         <div class="rt-actions">
    69:           <button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" id="rtRetryBtn">Retry connection</button>
    70:           <button class="btn" type="button" id="rtReloadBtn">Reload page</button>
    71:           <button class="btn" type="button" id="rtLoginBtn" style="display:none;">Go to login</button>
    72:         </div>
    73:       </div>
    74:     `;
    75:     document.body.appendChild(el);
    76:     try {
    77:       el.querySelector('#rtRetryBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){
    78:         try {
    79:           if (window.Realtime && typeof Realtime.forceReconnect === 'function') Realtime.forceReconnect();
    80:           else location.reload();
    81:         } catch (_) { location.reload(); }
    82:       });
    83:       el.querySelector('#rtReloadBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){ location.reload(); });
    84:       el.querySelector('#rtLoginBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){
    85:         const next = encodeURIComponent(window.location.href);
    86:         window.location.href = `/login.html?next=${next}`;
    87:       });
    88:     } catch (_) {}
    89:     return el;
    90:   }
    91: 
    92:   function setBlockerVisible(visible, mode, detail){
    93:     const el = ensureBlocker();
    94:     if (!el) return;
    95:     el.style.display = visible ? 'flex' : 'none';
    96:     if (!visible) return;
    97:     try {
    98:       const st = el.querySelector('.rt-status-text');
    99:       if (st) st.textContent = (mode === 'connecting') ? 'Connecting…' : 'Offline';
   100:       const det = el.querySelector('.rt-detail');
   101:       if (det) det.textContent = detail || '';
   102: 
   103:       // Only show "Go to login" if we truly appear unauthenticated.
   104:       const loginBtn = el.querySelector('#rtLoginBtn');
   105:       const hasToken = !!(window.CloudAuth && typeof CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function' && CloudAuth.accessToken());
   106:       const needsLogin = /login required/i.test(String(detail || ''));
   107:       if (loginBtn) loginBtn.style.display = (needsLogin && !hasToken) ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
   108:     } catch (_) {}
   109:   }
   110: 
   111:   function applyMode(mode, detail){
   112:     if (!ENABLE_BLOCKER_MODAL) removeLegacyBlocker();
   113: 
   114:     var el = root();
   115:     if (!el) return;
   116: 
   117:     // IMPORTANT: Do not auto-redirect to login based on realtime status.
   118:     // Realtime may momentarily report "login required" during token refresh,
   119:     // cold starts, or transient 401s. Redirecting here causes a login loop.
   120:     // Auth routing must be handled by Auth.requireUser() (auth.js).
   121:     el.classList.remove('ok','poll','off');
   122:     if (mode === 'realtime') el.classList.add('ok');
   123:     else if (mode === 'connecting' || mode === 'polling') el.classList.add('poll');
   124:     else el.classList.add('off');
   125: 
   126:     var state = el.querySelector('.state');
   127:     if (state) {
   128:       state.textContent = (mode === 'realtime') ? 'Connected' : (mode === 'connecting') ? 'Connecting' : (mode === 'polling') ? 'Polling' : (mode === 'error') ? 'Offline ↺' : 'Offline';
   129:     }
   130:     if (detail) el.title = detail;
   131:     el.style.cursor = (mode === 'error') ? 'pointer' : '';
   132:     el.onclick = null;
   133:     if (mode === 'error') {
   134:       el.title = detail || 'Sync offline. Click to retry.';
   135:       el.onclick = function(){
   136:         try {
   137:           if (window.Realtime && typeof window.Realtime.forceReconnect === 'function') {
   138:             window.Realtime.forceReconnect();
   139:           }
   140:         } catch (_) {}
   141:       };
   142:     }
   143: 
   144:     // Mandatory realtime: block interactions unless connected.
   145:     if (mode === 'realtime') setBlockerVisible(false);
   146:     else setBlockerVisible(true, mode, detail);
   147: 
   148:     lastApplied = { mode: mode, detail: String(detail || '') };
   149:     if (mode === 'realtime') lastConnectedAt = Date.now();
   150:   }
   151: 
   152:   function normalizeMode(m){
   153:     m = String(m || 'offline');
   154:     if (m === 'ok') return 'realtime';
   155:     if (m === 'poll') return 'polling';
   156:     return m;
   157:   }
   158: 
   159:   function scheduleMode(mode, detail){
   160:     mode = normalizeMode(mode);
   161:     detail = String(detail || '');
   162:     latestWanted = { mode: mode, detail: detail };
   163: 
   164:     // Improvements are applied immediately.
   165:     if (mode === 'realtime') {
   166:       if (pendingTimer) { clearTimeout(pendingTimer); pendingTimer = null; }
   167:       applyMode(mode, detail);
   168:       return;
   169:     }
   170: 
   171:     // Compute delay with hysteresis.
   172:     const now = Date.now();
   173:     let delay = DEBOUNCE_MS;
   174: 
   175:     // Delay degradations from Connected to reduce flicker.
   176:     if (lastApplied.mode === 'realtime' && mode !== 'realtime') {
   177:       delay = Math.max(delay, DOWNGRADE_DELAY_MS);
   178:     }
   179: 
   180:     // Offline should be "confirmed" (transient 401s, websocket blips, etc.).
   181:     if (mode === 'offline') {
   182:       delay = Math.max(delay, OFFLINE_CONFIRM_MS);
   183:     }
   184: 
   185:     // Grace period right after connecting; ignore brief drops.
   186:     if (lastConnectedAt && (now - lastConnectedAt) < RECENT_CONNECT_GRACE_MS) {
   187:       delay = Math.max(delay, RECENT_CONNECT_GRACE_MS - (now - lastConnectedAt));
   188:     }
   189: 
   190:     // Schedule (debounced). Only the most recent status should be applied.
   191:     pendingSeq += 1;
   192:     const mySeq = pendingSeq;
   193:     if (pendingTimer) clearTimeout(pendingTimer);
   194:     pendingTimer = setTimeout(function(){
   195:       pendingTimer = null;
   196:       if (mySeq !== pendingSeq) return;
   197:       if (!latestWanted) return;
   198:       // If we connected while waiting, do nothing (Connected already applied).
   199:       if (latestWanted.mode === 'realtime') return;
   200:       applyMode(latestWanted.mode, latestWanted.detail);
   201:     }, delay);
   202:   }
   203: 
   204:   window.addEventListener('mums:syncstatus', function(e){
   205:     try {
   206:       var d = (e && e.detail) ? e.detail : {};
   207:       scheduleMode(String(d.mode || 'offline'), String(d.detail || ''));
   208:     } catch(_) {}
   209:   });
   210: 
   211:   document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
   212:     // Ensure any legacy blocker element from older builds is removed (modal is optional).
   213:     removeLegacyBlocker();
   214:     // Default to connecting; realtime module will update shortly.
   215:     applyMode('connecting', 'Sync starting…');
   216:   });
   217: })();

=== FILE: public/js/support_studio/features/quickbase_s.js ===
     1: /* @AI_CRITICAL_GUARD v3.0: UNTOUCHABLE ZONE — MACE APPROVAL REQUIRED.
     2:    Protects: Enterprise UI/UX · Realtime Sync Logic · Core State Management ·
     3:    Database/API Adapters · Tab Isolation · Virtual Column State ·
     4:    QuickBase Settings Persistence · Auth Flow.
     5:    DO NOT modify any existing logic, layout, or structure in this file without
     6:    first submitting a RISK IMPACT REPORT to MACE and receiving explicit "CLEARED" approval.
     7:    Violations will cause regressions. When in doubt — STOP and REPORT. */
     8: 
     9: /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    10:    QuickBase_S — Injects Pages.my_quickbase into #qbs-root
    11:    ISOLATED: Uses /api/studio/qb_settings (per-user) NOT global QB.
    12:    fetch() is patched ONLY for the my_quickbase instance running inside
    13:    #qbs-root, redirecting global_quickbase calls to studio/qb_settings_global.
    14: ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
    15: (function() {
    16:   'use strict';
    17: 
    18:   var _qbsPageMounted = false;
    19:   var _fetchPatched   = false;
    20: 
    21:   // ── Patch fetch ONCE before my_quickbase.js boots ─────────────────
    22:   // my_quickbase.js calls two endpoints we need to redirect to Studio-isolated versions:
    23:   // 1. /api/settings/global_quickbase  → /api/studio/qb_settings_global  (settings)
    24:   // 2. /api/quickbase/monitoring       → /api/studio/qb_monitoring        (data fetch)
    25:   // This ensures QuickBase_S reads from Studio QB Settings, never from Global QB.
    26:   function applyFetchPatch() {
    27:     if (_fetchPatched) return;
    28:     _fetchPatched = true;
    29:     var _orig = window.fetch;
    30:     window.fetch = function(resource, init) {
    31:       var url = (resource && typeof resource === 'object' && resource.url)
    32:         ? resource.url : String(resource || '');
    33:       // Redirect global QB settings reads/writes → Studio isolated settings
    34:       if (url === '/api/settings/global_quickbase' ||
    35:           url.startsWith('/api/settings/global_quickbase?') ||
    36:           url.startsWith('/api/settings/global_quickbase ')) {
    37:         var studioUrl = url.replace('/api/settings/global_quickbase', '/api/studio/qb_settings_global');
    38:         return _orig.call(this, studioUrl, init);
    39:       }
    40:       // Redirect monitoring data fetch → Studio monitoring proxy (uses Studio token)
    41:       if (url.startsWith('/api/quickbase/monitoring') ||
    42:           url.startsWith('/functions/quickbase/monitoring')) {
    43:         var studioMonUrl = url
    44:           .replace('/api/quickbase/monitoring', '/api/studio/qb_monitoring')
    45:           .replace('/functions/quickbase/monitoring', '/api/studio/qb_monitoring');
    46:         return _orig.call(this, studioMonUrl, init);
    47:       }
    48:       return _orig.apply(this, arguments);
    49:     };
    50:   }
    51: 
    52:   window._qbsInit = function() {
    53:     if (_qbsPageMounted) return;
    54: 
    55:     var root = document.getElementById('qbs-root');
    56:     if (!root) return;
    57: 
    58:     // Apply patch before my_quickbase boots
    59:     applyFetchPatch();
    60: 
    61:     function tryInit() {
    62:       if (!window.Pages || !window.Pages.my_quickbase) {
    63:         setTimeout(tryInit, 150);
    64:         return;
    65:       }
    66:       root.className = 'main card pad';
    67:       root.style.cssText = 'flex:1;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;';
    68:       root.innerHTML = '';
    69:       // ENFORCE ISOLATION NAMESPACE
    70:       root.setAttribute('data-page', 'quickbase_s');
    71:       root.dataset.page = 'quickbase_s';
    72:             try {
    73:               var _qbsInitResult = window.Pages.my_quickbase(root);
    74:               _qbsPageMounted = true;
    75: 
    76:               // Robust polling to expose root._qbcdOpen as window.__studioQbCdOpen
    77:               // root._qbcdOpen is set by my_quickbase.js only AFTER async data loads + renderRecords
    78:               function _exposeQbCdOpen() {
    79:                 if (typeof root._qbcdOpen === 'function') {
    80:                   // FIX v3.9.28: __studioQbCdOpen passes [snap] as the snaps array
    81:                   // when called from deep search, since host._qbRowSnaps only has the
    82:                   // current report rows and won't contain resolved/old cases.
    83:                   window.__studioQbCdOpen = function(snap, allSnaps) {
    84:                     var snapsToUse = Array.isArray(allSnaps) && allSnaps.length
    85:                       ? allSnaps
    86:                       : [snap];
    87:                     return root._qbcdOpen(snap, snapsToUse);
    88:                   };
    89:                   console.log('[SupportStudio] __studioQbCdOpen exposed successfully');
    90:                   return true;
    91:                 }
    92:                 return false;
    93:               }
    94: 
    95:               // Try immediately after init
    96:               Promise.resolve(_qbsInitResult).then(function() {
    97:                 if (_exposeQbCdOpen()) return;
    98:                 // Poll every 1s for up to 20s (covers slow data loads)
    99:                 var attempts = 0;
   100:                 var poller = setInterval(function() {
   101:                   attempts++;
   102:                   if (_exposeQbCdOpen() || attempts >= 20) {
   103:                     clearInterval(poller);
   104:                   }
   105:                 }, 1000);
   106:               }).catch(function(){});
   107:       } catch (e) {
   108:         root.innerHTML =
   109:           '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;gap:12px;color:#f85149;padding:24px;text-align:center;">' +
   110:           '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="font-size:32px;opacity:.6;"></i>' +
   111:           '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">QuickBase_S failed to load</div>' +
   112:           '<div style="font-size:11px;opacity:.6;max-width:360px;">' + String(e && e.message || e) + '</div>' +
   113:           '<button onclick="window._qbsReset()" style="margin-top:8px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:#f85149;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;">Retry</button>' +
   114:           '</div>';
   115:         console.error('[QBS] my_quickbase init failed:', e);
   116:       }
   117:     }
   118: 
   119:     tryInit();
   120:   };
   121: 
   122:   window._qbsReset = function() {
   123:     _qbsPageMounted = false;
   124:     var root = document.getElementById('qbs-root');
   125:     if (root) {
   126:       if (typeof root._cleanup === 'function') { try { root._cleanup(); } catch(_) {} root._cleanup = null; }
   127:       root.innerHTML = '';
   128:     }
   129:     window._qbsInit();
   130:   };
   131: 
   132:   // ── Open Case Detail Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────
   133:   // Works for both: row number clicks (from my_quickbase) and deep search cards.
   134:   // The modal #qbCaseDetailModal is now in support_studio.html directly.
   135: 
   136:   // PHT conversion — Eastern Time (ET) → PHT(UTC+8)
   137:   // QB uses Eastern Time which observes US DST:
   138:   //   EDT(UTC-4): 2nd Sunday March → 1st Sunday November
   139:   //   EST(UTC-5): December, January, February
   140:   function _ssConvertPHT(text) {
   141:     if (!text) return text;
   142:     var _MON = {JAN:0,FEB:1,MAR:2,APR:3,MAY:4,JUN:5,JUL:6,AUG:7,SEP:8,OCT:9,NOV:10,DEC:11};
   143:     var _MN  = ['JAN','FEB','MAR','APR','MAY','JUN','JUL','AUG','SEP','OCT','NOV','DEC'];
   144:     function _etOffset(year, month, day) {
   145:       if (month > 2 && month < 10) return 4;
   146:       if (month === 2) { var d = new Date(year,2,1); var s2 = ((7-d.getDay())%7)+8; return day>=s2?4:5; }
   147:       if (month === 10) { var d2 = new Date(year,10,1); var s1 = ((7-d2.getDay())%7)+1; return day<s1?4:5; }
   148:       return 5;
   149:     }
   150:     return text.replace(
   151:       /\[([A-Z]{3})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{2})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s*(AM|PM)([\s\S]*?)\]/gi,
   152:       function(full, mon, dd, yy, hh, mi, ap, rest) {
   153:         try {
   154:           var monU = mon.toUpperCase();
   155:           if (!(_MON[monU] !== undefined)) return full;
   156:           var year = parseInt(yy,10); year = year < 50 ? 2000+year : 1900+year;
   157:           var month = _MON[monU], day = parseInt(dd,10);
   158:           var h = parseInt(hh,10);
   159:           if (ap.toUpperCase()==='PM' && h<12) h+=12;
   160:           if (ap.toUpperCase()==='AM' && h===12) h=0;
   161:           var offsetH = _etOffset(year, month, day);
   162:           var utcMs = Date.UTC(year, month, day, h+offsetH, parseInt(mi,10), 0);
   163:           var phtMs = utcMs + 8*3600*1000;
   164:           var p = new Date(phtMs);
   165:           var ph = p.getUTCHours(), pm2 = p.getUTCMinutes();
   166:           var pap = ph >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
   167:           ph = ph % 12 || 12;
   168:           // FIX: pad day to 2 digits so date-parsing regexes always match \d{2}
   169:           var dayStr = String(p.getUTCDate()).padStart(2,'0');
   170:           return '[' + _MN[p.getUTCMonth()] + '-' + dayStr + '-' +
   171:             String(p.getUTCFullYear()).slice(-2) + ' ' + ph + ':' +
   172:             String(pm2).padStart(2,'0') + ' ' + pap + rest + ']';
   173:         } catch(_) { return full; }
   174:       }
   175:     );
   176:   }
   177:   // Expose on window so YCT and other modules can use it
   178:   window._ssConvertPHT = _ssConvertPHT;
   179: 
   180:   window._qbsOpenCaseDetail = function(snap, allSnaps) {
   181:     var root = document.getElementById('qbs-root');
   182: 
   183:     // Primary path: use root._qbcdOpen set by Pages.my_quickbase
   184:     if (root && typeof root._qbcdOpen === 'function') {
   185:       root._qbcdOpen(snap, allSnaps || [snap]);
   186:       return;
   187:     }
   188: 
   189:     // Fallback path: directly open the modal ourselves
   190:     // (when QBS page is mounted but _qbcdOpen ref lost, or called before full mount)
   191:     var m = document.getElementById('qbCaseDetailModal');
   192:     if (!m) { console.warn('[QBS] qbCaseDetailModal not found'); return; }
   193: 
   194:     // Populate fields
   195:     function set(id, val) {
   196:       var el = document.getElementById(id);
   197:       if (el) el.textContent = val || '—';
   198:     }
   199:     function html(id, val) {
   200:       var el = document.getElementById(id);
   201:       if (el) el.innerHTML = val || '';
   202:     }
   203:     function fieldVal(keys) {
   204:       if (!snap || !snap.fields || !snap.columnMap) return '';
   205:       var colId = Object.keys(snap.columnMap).find(function(id) {
   206:         var lbl = (snap.columnMap[id] || '').toLowerCase();
   207:         return keys.some(function(k) { return lbl.includes(k); });
   208:       });
   209:       if (!colId) return '';
   210:       var f = snap.fields[colId];
   211:       return f && f.value != null ? String(f.value) : '';
   212:     }
   213:     function statusBadge(s) {
   214:       if (!s) return '';
   215:       var colors = { resolv: '#3fb950', invest: '#58a6ff', initial: '#f59e0b',
   216:         triag: '#a78bfa', close: '#8b949e', wait: '#f97316' };
   217:       var sl = s.toLowerCase();
   218:       var c = '#8b949e';
   219:       for (var k in colors) { if (sl.includes(k)) { c = colors[k]; break; } }
   220:       return '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;background:' + c + '18;color:' + c + ';border:1px solid ' + c + '40;">' + s + '</span>';
   221:     }
   222: 
   223:     var caseId = snap.recordId || '—';
   224:     var desc   = fieldVal(['short description','description','concern','subject']) || '—';
   225:     var assign = fieldVal(['assigned to','assigned','agent']);
   226:     var contact= fieldVal(['contact','full name','customer name']);
   227:     var endUser= fieldVal(['end user','client','account','customer']);
   228:     var type   = fieldVal(['type','category']);
   229:     var status = fieldVal(['case status','status']);
   230:     var age    = fieldVal(['age']);
   231:     var lastUpd= fieldVal(['last update days','last update']);
   232:     // Convert EST→PHT timestamps in all text-bearing fields
   233:     var latest = _ssConvertPHT(fieldVal([
   234:       'latest update on the case',
   235:       'latest update',
   236:       'last update',
   237:       'last comment',
   238:       'most recent update',
   239:       'update on the case'
   240:     ]));
   241:     var notes  = _ssConvertPHT(fieldVal([
   242:       'case notes detail',
   243:       'case notes',
   244:       'case note',
   245:       'case details',
   246:       'resolution details',
   247:       'notes'
   248:     ]));
   249: 
   250:     set('qbcdRowBadge', snap.rowNum || '—');
   251:     set('qbcdCaseId',   caseId);
   252:     set('qbcdDesc',     desc);
   253:     html('qbcdStatusBadge', statusBadge(status));
   254:     set('qbcdMeta',     'Row ' + (snap.rowNum || '?') + (endUser ? ' · ' + endUser : ''));
   255:     set('qbcdKpiAge',   age     ? (Number(age) < 86400000 ? '< 1 day' : Math.round(Number(age)/(86400000)) + ' days') : '—');
   256:     set('qbcdKpiLast',  lastUpd ? (Number(lastUpd) < 1 ? '< 1 day' : lastUpd + ' days') : '—');
   257:     set('qbcdKpiType',  type);
   258:     set('qbcdKpiEndUser', endUser);
   259:     set('qbcdAssigned', assign);
   260:     set('qbcdContact',  contact);
   261:     set('qbcdEndUser',  endUser);
   262:     set('qbcdCaseId2',  caseId);
   263:     set('qbcdType2',    type);
   264:     html('qbcdStatus2', statusBadge(status));
   265:     set('qbcdLatest',   latest || '—');
   266: 
   267:     var notesBlock = document.getElementById('qbcdNotesBlock');
   268:     if (notes) {
   269:       set('qbcdNotes', notes);
   270:       if (notesBlock) notesBlock.style.display = '';
   271:     } else {
   272:       if (notesBlock) notesBlock.style.display = 'none';
   273:     }
   274: 
   275:     // Nav position
   276:     var _allSnaps = Array.isArray(allSnaps) ? allSnaps : [snap];
   277:     var _idx = _allSnaps.findIndex(function(s) { return s && s.rowNum === snap.rowNum; });
   278:     if (_idx < 0) _idx = 0;
   279:     var posEl = document.getElementById('qbcdPos');
   280:     if (posEl) posEl.textContent = (_idx + 1) + ' of ' + _allSnaps.length;
   281:     var prevBtn = document.getElementById('qbcdPrevBtn');
   282:     var nextBtn = document.getElementById('qbcdNextBtn');
   283:     if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = _idx <= 0;
   284:     if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = _idx >= _allSnaps.length - 1;
   285: 
   286:     // Store state for nav buttons
   287:     m._qbsSnaps = _allSnaps;
   288:     m._qbsIdx   = _idx;
   289: 
   290:     // Wire nav/close if not already wired
   291:     if (!m._qbsWired) {
   292:       m._qbsWired = true;
   293:       function navTo(newIdx) {
   294:         var s = m._qbsSnaps[newIdx];
   295:         if (!s) return;
   296:         m._qbsIdx = newIdx;
   297:         window._qbsOpenCaseDetail(s, m._qbsSnaps);
   298:       }
   299:       var cbtn  = document.getElementById('qbcdCloseBtn');
   300:       var cbtn2 = document.getElementById('qbcdCloseBtn2');
   301:       var pb    = document.getElementById('qbcdPrevBtn');
   302:       var nb    = document.getElementById('qbcdNextBtn');
   303:       var cpy   = document.getElementById('qbcdCopyBtn');
   304:       function closeModal() {
   305:         m.classList.remove('open');
   306:         m.removeAttribute('style');
   307:         try { document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
   308:       }
   309:       if (cbtn)  cbtn.addEventListener('click',  closeModal);
   310:       if (cbtn2) cbtn2.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
   311:       if (pb)    pb.addEventListener('click', function() { navTo(m._qbsIdx - 1); });
   312:       if (nb)    nb.addEventListener('click', function() { navTo(m._qbsIdx + 1); });
   313:       if (cpy)   cpy.addEventListener('click', function() {
   314:         var id = (document.getElementById('qbcdCaseId') || {}).textContent || '';
   315:         if (id && navigator.clipboard) navigator.clipboard.writeText(id).then(function() {
   316:           cpy.textContent = 'Copied!';
   317:           setTimeout(function() { cpy.textContent = 'Copy Case #'; }, 1800);
   318:         }).catch(function() {});
   319:       });
   320:       m.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) { if (e.target === m) closeModal(); });
   321:       document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
   322:         if (!m.classList.contains('open')) return;
   323:         if (e.key === 'Escape')    closeModal();
   324:         if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') navTo(m._qbsIdx - 1);
   325:         if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') navTo(m._qbsIdx + 1);
   326:       });
   327:     }
   328: 
   329:     // Open
   330:     m.removeAttribute('style');
   331:     m.style.cssText = 'display:flex!important;position:fixed!important;inset:0!important;' +
   332:       'z-index:2147483647!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;' +
   333:       'background:rgba(6,12,24,.88)!important;padding:16px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;';
   334:     m.classList.add('open');
   335:     if (m.parentElement !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(m);
   336:     try { document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
   337:   };
   338: 
   339:   // Clean up when leaving the QBS tab
   340:   document.querySelectorAll('.ss-tab').forEach(function(tab) {
   341:     tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
   342:       if (tab.dataset.tab !== 'qbs' && _qbsPageMounted) {
   343:         var root = document.getElementById('qbs-root');
   344:         if (root && typeof root._cleanup === 'function') {
   345:           try { root._cleanup(); } catch(_) {}
   346:           root._cleanup = null;
   347:         }
   348:         _qbsPageMounted = false;
   349:       }
   350:     });
   351:   });
   352: 
   353:   // ── Deep Search — searches ALL QB records via /api/studio/qb_search ──
   354:   // Results sorted by Case # DESCENDING (highest = newest case first).
   355:   // Renders clickable cards in #qbs-search-results.
   356:   function _qbsReadContextConfig() {
   357:     var reportLink = ((document.getElementById('sqb-report-link') || {}).value || '').trim();
   358:     var realm = ((document.getElementById('sqb-realm') || {}).value || '').trim();
   359:     var tableId = ((document.getElementById('sqb-table-id') || {}).value || '').trim();
   360:     var appId = '';
   361:     if (reportLink) {
   362:       try {
   363:         var u = new URL(reportLink);
   364:         var segs = String(u.pathname || '').split('/').filter(Boolean);
   365:         var ai = segs.findIndex(function(seg) { return String(seg).toLowerCase() === 'app'; });
   366:         if (ai >= 0 && segs[ai + 1]) appId = String(segs[ai + 1]).trim();
   367:       } catch(_) {}
   368:     }
   369:     var tabConfig = { reportLink: reportLink, realm: realm, tableId: tableId };
   370:     return { tabConfig: tabConfig, realm: realm, appId: appId, tableId: tableId };
   371:   }
   372: 
   373:   // FIX v3.9.28: _qbsBuildDeepSearchSnaps now uses rec.columnMap from the server
   374:   // response directly (which includes ALL field IDs, including field 3 / Record ID#).
   375:   // Previously it rebuilt columnMap only from d.columns (which filters out field 3),
   376:   // so _populate() could not find "Case #" or other critical fields → empty modal.
   377:   function _qbsBuildDeepSearchSnaps(records, labelMap) {
   378:     var context = _qbsReadContextConfig();
   379:     var cols = Object.keys(labelMap || {}).map(function(id) {
   380:       return { id: Number(id) || id, label: labelMap[id] || ('Field #' + id) };
   381:     });
   382:     return (Array.isArray(records) ? records : []).map(function(rec, idx) {
   383:       // Prefer the server-supplied rec.columnMap (complete field map including field 3).
   384:       // Fall back to labelMap (built from d.columns) only if server didn't send it.
   385:       var colMap = (rec && rec.columnMap && Object.keys(rec.columnMap).length)
   386:         ? Object.assign({}, rec.columnMap)
   387:         : Object.assign({}, labelMap || {});
   388:       return {
   389:         rowNum: idx + 1,
   390:         recordId: rec && (rec.qbRecordId || rec.recordId || rec.id) ? String(rec.qbRecordId || rec.recordId || rec.id) : '',
   391:         qbRecordId: rec && rec.qbRecordId ? rec.qbRecordId : '',
   392:         fields: rec && rec.fields ? rec.fields : {},
   393:         columns: cols,
   394:         columnMap: colMap,
   395:         tabConfig: context.tabConfig,
   396:         realm: context.realm,
   397:         appId: context.appId,
   398:         tableId: context.tableId
   399:       };
   400:     });
   401:   }
   402: 
   403:   /*
   404:     DIAGNOSTIC (Q1-Q4)
   405:     Q1: my_quickbase case detail opener was not exposed on window; it was an internal _open closure inside _initQbCaseDetailModal with root._qbcdOpen only.
   406:     Q2: QB_S row number click handler exists via .qb-row-detail-btn (direct onclick + delegated #qbDataBody listener), but cross-module callers could not reliably access the opener.
   407:     Q3: Deep Search cards had a CASE VIEW DETAILS button (.qbs-case-detail-btn) but it used only data-qbs-result-idx and local fallback openers.
   408:     Q4: Timing issue risk existed for cross-module calls because no stable window-level modal opener was guaranteed before external handlers fired.
   409:   */
   410:   // FIX v3.9.30: Removed the broken columnMap:{} snap path entirely.
   411:   // This function now delegates ALL opens to _qbsOpenDeepResult which uses
   412:   // the pre-built snap from _qbsDeepSearchSnaps (has full fields + columnMap).
   413:   function _qbsEnsureDeepSearchCaseDetailBinding(resultsEl) {
   414:     if (!resultsEl || resultsEl._qbsCaseDetailBound) return;
   415:     resultsEl._qbsCaseDetailBound = true;
   416:     resultsEl.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   417:       var btn = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[data-action="ds-case-view-details"]');
   418:       if (!btn) return;
   419:       e.preventDefault();
   420:       e.stopPropagation();
   421:       var resultIdx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-qbs-result-idx') || '', 10);
   422:       var rid = btn.getAttribute('data-rid') || '';
   423:       // Always use the pre-built snap which has the FULL columnMap + fields from the API.
   424:       // The old path built columnMap:{} here, making every detail view show all dashes.
   425:       if (!isNaN(resultIdx)) {
   426:         window._qbsOpenDeepResult(rid, resultIdx);
   427:       }
   428:     });
   429:   }
   430: 
   431:   window._qbsDeepSearch = function(term, skip) {
   432:     term = String(term || '').trim();
   433:     if (!term) {
   434:       document.getElementById('qbs-search-status').textContent = '';
   435:       document.getElementById('qbs-search-results').innerHTML = '';
   436:       return;
   437:     }
   438:     skip = Math.max(0, Number(skip || 0));
   439:     var TOP = 50;
   440: 
   441:     var statusEl  = document.getElementById('qbs-search-status');
   442:     var resultsEl = document.getElementById('qbs-search-results');
   443:     var qfEl      = document.getElementById('qbs-quick-filters');
   444:     var btn       = document.getElementById('qbs-deep-search-btn');
   445: 
   446:     if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = 'Searching…';
   447:     if (resultsEl && skip === 0) resultsEl.innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--ss-muted);font-size:11px;padding:12px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Searching all records…</div>';
   448:     if (qfEl) qfEl.style.display = 'none';
   449:     if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
   450: 
   451:     // Auth token
   452:     var tok = '';
   453:     try {
   454:       var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
   455:       if (raw) { var p = JSON.parse(raw); if (p && p.access_token) tok = p.access_token; }
   456:       if (!tok && window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') tok = window.CloudAuth.accessToken() || '';
   457:     } catch(_) {}
   458: 
   459:     var headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' };
   460:     if (tok) headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + tok;
   461: 
   462:     var url = '/api/studio/qb_search?q=' + encodeURIComponent(term) + '&skip=' + skip + '&top=' + TOP;
   463: 
   464:     fetch(url, { headers: headers })
   465:       .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
   466:       .then(function(d) {
   467:         if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
   468: 
   469:         // Not configured
   470:         if (d.warning === 'studio_qb_not_configured') {
   471:           if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = '';
   472:           if (resultsEl) resultsEl.innerHTML =
   473:             '<div style="padding:16px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.06);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:#f85149;line-height:1.6;">' +
   474:             '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="margin-right:6px;"></i>' +
   475:             'QB not configured. Go to <strong>General Settings → Studio Quickbase Settings</strong>.</div>';
   476:           return;
   477:         }
   478: 
   479:         if (!d.ok) {
   480:           if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = 'Search failed.';
   481:           if (resultsEl) resultsEl.innerHTML =
   482:             '<div style="padding:12px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.06);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:#f85149;">' +
   483:             '<i class="fas fa-times-circle" style="margin-right:6px;"></i>' + _dsEsc(d.message || 'Unknown error') + '</div>';
   484:           return;
   485:         }
   486: 
   487:         var records = Array.isArray(d.records) ? d.records : [];
   488:         var cols    = Array.isArray(d.columns) ? d.columns : [];
   489:         var total   = typeof d.total === 'number' ? d.total : null;
   490: 
   491:         // Sort by Case # (field 3) DESCENDING — highest number = newest case
   492:         records.sort(function(a, b) {
   493:           var aId = Number(a.qbRecordId) || 0;
   494:           var bId = Number(b.qbRecordId) || 0;
   495:           return bId - aId; // descending
   496:         });
   497: 
   498:         // Build column label map
   499:         var labelMap = {};
   500:         cols.forEach(function(c) { labelMap[String(c.id)] = c.label; });
   501: 
   502:         // Key fields we want to surface in cards
   503:         var PRIORITY_KEYS = ['case status','short description','assigned to','contact','type','latest update','end user','age','last update'];
   504: 
   505:         function getFieldValue(fields, labelHint) {
   506:           if (!fields) return '';
   507:           var keys = Object.keys(fields);
   508:           // Try to find by label hint
   509:           var matched = keys.find(function(k) {
   510:             var lbl = (labelMap[k] || '').toLowerCase();
   511:             return PRIORITY_KEYS.some(function(h) { return lbl.includes(h); }) &&
   512:               lbl.includes(labelHint.toLowerCase());
   513:           });
   514:           if (!matched) matched = keys.find(function(k) { return (labelMap[k]||'').toLowerCase().includes(labelHint.toLowerCase()); });
   515:           if (!matched) return '';
   516:           var v = fields[matched];
   517:           return v && typeof v === 'object' ? String(v.value || '') : String(v || '');
   518:         }
   519: 
   520:         function _dsEsc2(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }
   521: 
   522:         // Render result cards
   523:         var html = '';
   524:         if (!records.length) {
   525:           html = '<div style="padding:20px 0;text-align:center;color:var(--ss-muted);font-size:11px;">' +
   526:             '<i class="fas fa-search" style="font-size:20px;opacity:.3;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;"></i>' +
   527:             'No results for <strong>' + _dsEsc2(term) + '</strong></div>';
   528:         } else {
   529:           records.forEach(function(rec, resultIdx) {
   530:             var caseNum   = rec.qbRecordId || '—';
   531:             var status    = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'case status') || getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'status');
   532:             var desc      = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'short description') || getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'description') || getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'latest update') || '';
   533:             var assignee  = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'assigned') || '';
   534:             var contact   = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'contact') || getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'full name') || '';
   535:             var caseType  = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'type') || '';
   536:             var age       = getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'age') || getFieldValue(rec.fields, 'last update days') || '';
   537: 
   538:             // Status badge color
   539:             var statusColor = '#58a6ff';
   540:             var sl = status.toLowerCase();
   541:             if (sl.includes('resolv') || sl.includes('closed') || sl.startsWith('c -')) statusColor = '#3fb950';
   542:             else if (sl.includes('investigat') || sl.includes('waiting') || sl.startsWith('o -')) statusColor = '#d29922';
   543: 
   544:             var descTrunc = desc.length > 110 ? desc.slice(0, 107) + '…' : desc;
   545: 
   546:             html += '<div onclick="window._qbsOpenDeepResult(\'' + _dsEsc2(caseNum) + '\',' + resultIdx + ')" ' +
   547:               'style="padding:10px 11px;margin-bottom:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .12s,border-color .12s;" ' +
   548:               'onmouseover="this.style.background=\'rgba(88,166,255,.07)\';this.style.borderColor=\'rgba(88,166,255,.25)\';" ' +
   549:               'onmouseout="this.style.background=\'rgba(255,255,255,.03)\';this.style.borderColor=\'rgba(255,255,255,.07)\';">' +
   550: 
   551:               '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;">' +
   552:                 '<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:#e6edf3;letter-spacing:-.01em;">#' + _dsEsc2(String(caseNum)) + '</span>' +
   553:                 '<span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;background:' + statusColor + '18;color:' + statusColor + ';border:1px solid ' + statusColor + '30;">' + _dsEsc2(status || 'Open') + '</span>' +
   554:               '</div>' +
   555: 
   556:               (caseType || contact || age ? '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">' +
   557:                 (caseType ? '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--ss-muted);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;">' + _dsEsc2(caseType) + '</span>' : '') +
   558:                 (contact  ? '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--ss-muted);"><i class="fas fa-user" style="margin-right:3px;opacity:.5;"></i>' + _dsEsc2(contact) + '</span>' : '') +
   559:                 (age      ? '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--ss-muted);margin-left:auto;opacity:.7;">' + _dsEsc2(age) + '</span>' : '') +
   560:               '</div>' : '') +
   561: 
   562:               (descTrunc ? '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--ss-muted);line-height:1.5;opacity:.85;">' + _dsEsc2(descTrunc) + '</div>' : '') +
   563: 
   564:               '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-top:7px;padding-top:7px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);">' +
   565:                 '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;min-width:0;">' +
   566:                   '<span class="ds-card-label" style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ss-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;">Assigned to</span>' +
   567:                   '<span class="ds-card-value" style="font-size:10px;color:#e6edf3;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:170px;">' + _dsEsc2(assignee || '—') + '</span>' +
   568:                 '</div>' +
   569:                 '<button type="button" class="qb-row-num-pill qb-row-detail-btn qbs-case-detail-btn ds-case-view-btn" data-action="ds-case-view-details" data-rid="' + _dsEsc2(String(caseNum || '')) + '" data-row=\'' + _dsEsc2(JSON.stringify(rec).replace(/'/g, '&#39;')) + '\' data-qbs-result-idx="' + resultIdx + '" style="border-radius:999px;padding:5px 10px;min-width:auto;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.02em;" onclick="event.stopPropagation();" title="View case details" aria-label="CASE VIEW DETAILS for case #' + _dsEsc2(String(caseNum)) + '">CASE VIEW DETAILS</button>' +
   570:               '</div>' +
   571: 
   572:               '</div>';
   573:           });
   574:         }
   575: 
   576:         // Pagination controls
   577:         var paginationHtml = '';
   578:         if (records.length === TOP || skip > 0) {
   579:           paginationHtml = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--ss-border);">' +
   580:             (skip > 0 ? '<button onclick="window._qbsDeepSearch(\'' + _dsEsc2(term) + '\',' + Math.max(0, skip - TOP) + ')" style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#58a6ff;background:rgba(88,166,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.2);border-radius:5px;padding:5px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--ss-font);">← Prev</button>' : '<span></span>') +
   581:             (records.length === TOP ? '<button onclick="window._qbsDeepSearch(\'' + _dsEsc2(term) + '\',' + (skip + TOP) + ')" style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#58a6ff;background:rgba(88,166,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.2);border-radius:5px;padding:5px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--ss-font);">Next →</button>' : '<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--ss-muted);">End of results</span>') +
   582:           '</div>';
   583:         }
   584: 
   585:         var countText = total !== null
   586:           ? records.length + ' of ' + total.toLocaleString() + ' total'
   587:           : records.length + ' results';
   588:         if (skip > 0) countText = 'Showing ' + (skip + 1) + '–' + (skip + records.length);
   589: 
   590:         if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = countText;
   591:         if (resultsEl) {
   592:           resultsEl.innerHTML = html + paginationHtml;
   593:           resultsEl._qbsDeepSearchSnaps = _qbsBuildDeepSearchSnaps(records, labelMap);
   594:           resultsEl._qbsDeepSearchColumns = cols;
   595:           // Keep global references in sync for patch-layer fallback openers.
   596:           window.__studioQbDeepRecords = records;
   597:           window.__studioQbDeepColumns = cols;
   598:           _qbsEnsureDeepSearchCaseDetailBinding(resultsEl);
   599:         }
   600:       })
   601:       .catch(function(err) {
   602:         if (btn) btn.disabled = false;
   603:         if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = 'Search error.';
   604:         if (resultsEl) resultsEl.innerHTML =
   605:           '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#f85149;padding:8px 0;">' +
   606:           '<i class="fas fa-times-circle" style="margin-right:6px;"></i>' + String(err && err.message || 'Network error') + '</div>';
   607:       });
   608:   };
   609: 
   610:   // Helper: open a deep search result as a case detail
   611:   // FIX v3.9.28: Removed the broken window.MQ.openCaseDetailModal path.
   612:   // That function looks up the record in the CURRENTLY LOADED REPORT rows
   613:   // (_qbRowSnaps, max 100–500 records, filtered to active cases only).
   614:   // Resolved/old cases are NOT in that set, so the modal opened with
   615:   // wrong data (row 0) or empty dashes.
   616:   // Correct path: root._qbcdOpen(snap, snaps) which calls _populate(snap)
   617:   // using the snap's own fields + columnMap from the deep search API.
   618:   // FIX v3.9.30: always use the pre-built snap from deep-search (has full fields + columnMap).
   619:   // root._qbcdOpen is now set synchronously (moved before try{} — FIX 1), so it is
   620:   // reliably available. MQ.openCaseDetailModal path removed: it looked up records in
   621:   // host._qbRowSnaps (active report only, max 500 rows) and missed resolved/old cases.
   622:   window._qbsOpenDeepResult = function(caseNum, resultIdx) {
   623:     var resultsEl = document.getElementById('qbs-search-results');
   624:     var snaps = resultsEl && Array.isArray(resultsEl._qbsDeepSearchSnaps) ? resultsEl._qbsDeepSearchSnaps : [];
   625:     var idx = Number(resultIdx);
   626:     var root = document.getElementById('qbs-root');
   627: 
   628:     function _open() {
   629:       var snap = null;
   630:       if (!isNaN(idx) && snaps[idx]) snap = snaps[idx];
   631:       if (!snap) {
   632:         snap = snaps.find(function(s) {
   633:           return s && String(s.recordId || s.qbRecordId || '') === String(caseNum || '');
   634:         }) || null;
   635:       }
   636:       if (!snap) return false;
   637:       if (root && typeof root._qbcdOpen === 'function') {
   638:         root._qbcdOpen(snap, snaps);
   639:         return true;
   640:       }
   641:       if (typeof window._qbsOpenCaseDetail === 'function') {
   642:         window._qbsOpenCaseDetail(snap, snaps);
   643:         return true;
   644:       }
   645:       return false;
   646:     }
   647: 
   648:     if (!_open()) {
   649:       setTimeout(function() {
   650:         if (!_open()) {
   651:           var s = root && root.querySelector && root.querySelector('input[type="text"]');
   652:           if (s) { s.value = '#' + caseNum; s.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); }
   653:         }
   654:       }, 300);
   655:     }
   656:   };
   657: 
   658:   // Escape helper for deep search HTML interpolation
   659:   function _dsEsc(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }
   660: 
   661:   // Wire Enter key on the deep search input
   662:   (function() {
   663:     var inp = document.getElementById('qbs-search-input');
   664:     if (inp) {
   665:       inp.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
   666:         if (e.key === 'Enter') window._qbsDeepSearch(inp.value, 0);
   667:       });
   668:     }
   669:   })();
   670: 
   671: 
   672:   // Calls /api/studio/qb_export which paginates through all QB records.
   673:   // v2: retry-with-backoff per page — handles QB API 502/504 transient errors.
   674:   // PAGE_SIZE reduced to 500 to stay safely under QB API timeout limits.
   675:   // No record limit — fetches all 22,000+ cases.
   676:   window._qbsExportAll = function(format) {
   677:     var statusEl  = document.getElementById('qbs-export-status');
   678:     var csvBtn    = document.getElementById('qbs-export-csv-btn');
   679:     var xlsBtn    = document.getElementById('qbs-export-xls-btn');
   680:     var isCsv     = format === 'csv';
   681:     var startTime = Date.now();
   682: 
   683:     function _setStatus(html, color) { if (statusEl) { statusEl.innerHTML = html; statusEl.style.color = color || '#58a6ff'; } }
   684:     function _setDisabled(v) { if (csvBtn) csvBtn.disabled = v; if (xlsBtn) xlsBtn.disabled = v; }
   685:     function _esc(s) { return String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/"/g, '\\"'); }
   686:     function _xlEsc(s) { return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/[\x00-\x08\x0B\x0C\x0E-\x1F]/g,''); }
   687:     function _tok() {
   688:       try {
   689:         var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
