   690:         if (raw) { var p = JSON.parse(raw); if (p && p.access_token) return p.access_token; }
   691:         if (window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') return window.CloudAuth.accessToken();
   692:       } catch(_) {} return '';
   693:     }
   694: 
   695:     // Delay helper for exponential backoff
   696:     function _wait(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); }
   697: 
   698:     // Fetch one page with up to 4 retries on 502/504/network errors
   699:     function _fetchPage(skip, pageSize, hdrs, attempt) {
   700:       attempt = attempt || 1;
   701:       var MAX_RETRIES = 4;
   702:       return fetch('/api/studio/qb_export?skip=' + skip + '&top=' + pageSize, { headers: hdrs })
   703:         .then(function(r) {
   704:           // Always read as text first — body may not be JSON on gateway errors
   705:           return r.text().then(function(txt) {
   706:             var d = null;
   707:             try { d = JSON.parse(txt); } catch(_) {}
   708: 
   709:             // 502/504/429 = transient error — retry with exponential backoff
   710:             if ((r.status === 502 || r.status === 504 || r.status === 429 || r.status === 503) && attempt <= MAX_RETRIES) {
   711:               var waitSec = Math.pow(2, attempt); // 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s
   712:               _setStatus(
   713:                 '<i class="fas fa-sync fa-spin" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>' +
   714:                 'QB API timeout on page at record ' + (skip+1) +
   715:                 ' (attempt ' + attempt + '/' + MAX_RETRIES + ') — retrying in ' + waitSec + 's…',
   716:                 '#f59e0b'
   717:               );
   718:               return _wait(waitSec * 1000).then(function() {
   719:                 return _fetchPage(skip, pageSize, hdrs, attempt + 1);
   720:               });
   721:             }
   722: 
   723:             // Parse error message from response body if available
   724:             if (!d || !d.ok) {
   725:               var errDetail = (d && (d.message || d.error || d.detail)) || txt.slice(0, 200);
   726:               throw new Error('QB API' + r.status + ': ' + errDetail);
   727:             }
   728:             return d;
   729:           });
   730:         })
   731:         .catch(function(err) {
   732:           // Network-level failure (no response at all) — also retry
   733:           var isNet = String(err && err.name || '').indexOf('TypeError') >= 0 ||
   734:                       String(err && err.message || '').toLowerCase().indexOf('fetch') >= 0;
   735:           if (isNet && attempt <= MAX_RETRIES) {
   736:             var waitSec = Math.pow(2, attempt);
   737:             _setStatus(
   738:               '<i class="fas fa-sync fa-spin" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>' +
   739:               'Network error at record ' + (skip+1) +
   740:               ' (attempt ' + attempt + '/' + MAX_RETRIES + ') — retrying in ' + waitSec + 's…',
   741:               '#f59e0b'
   742:             );
   743:             return _wait(waitSec * 1000).then(function() {
   744:               return _fetchPage(skip, pageSize, hdrs, attempt + 1);
   745:             });
   746:           }
   747:           throw err;
   748:         });
   749:     }
   750: 
   751:     _setDisabled(true);
   752:     _setStatus('<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>Starting export — fetching QB settings…');
   753: 
   754:     var headers = {};
   755:     var tok = _tok();
   756:     if (tok) headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + tok;
   757: 
   758:     // Step 1: get QB settings — read body safely regardless of HTTP status
   759:     fetch('/api/studio/qb_settings_global', { headers: headers })
   760:       .then(function(r) {
   761:         return r.text().then(function(txt) {
   762:           var d = null; try { d = JSON.parse(txt); } catch(_) {}
   763:           if (!r.ok || !d || !d.ok) throw new Error((d && (d.message || d.error)) || 'Settings fetch failed (HTTP ' + r.status + ')');
   764:           return d;
   765:         });
   766:       })
   767:       .then(function(resp) {
   768:         var cfg     = (resp && resp.settings) ? resp.settings : resp;
   769:         var realm   = cfg.realm   || '';
   770:         var tableId = cfg.tableId || '';
   771:         var qid     = cfg.qid     || '';
   772:         if (!realm || !tableId || !qid) throw new Error('Studio QB not configured. Go to General Settings → Studio Quickbase Settings first.');
   773: 
   774:         // Step 2: paginated fetch — 500 records/page (safe under QB API 30s timeout)
   775:         var allRecords = [];
   776:         var fields     = [];
   777:         var PAGE_SIZE  = 500;
   778:         var skip       = 0;
   779: 
   780:         function fetchNext() {
   781:           _setStatus(
   782:             '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>' +
   783:             'Fetching records ' + (skip + 1) + '–' + (skip + PAGE_SIZE) +
   784:             ' (' + allRecords.length.toLocaleString() + ' loaded so far)…'
   785:           );
   786:           return _fetchPage(skip, PAGE_SIZE, headers, 1)
   787:             .then(function(d) {
   788:               if (!fields.length && d.fields) fields = d.fields;
   789:               var batch = d.records || [];
   790:               allRecords = allRecords.concat(batch);
   791:               // Continue if we got a full page and haven't exceeded 100K safety cap
   792:               if (batch.length >= PAGE_SIZE && skip < 100000) {
   793:                 skip += PAGE_SIZE;
   794:                 return fetchNext();
   795:               }
   796:             });
   797:         }
   798: 
   799:         return fetchNext().then(function() { return { allRecords: allRecords, fields: fields }; });
   800:       })
   801:       .then(function(result) {
   802:         var recs = result.allRecords;
   803:         var cols = (result.fields || []).map(function(f) { return { id: String(f.id), label: String(f.label || 'Field ' + f.id) }; });
   804:         _setStatus('<i class="fas fa-cog fa-spin" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>Building ' + format.toUpperCase() + ' file (' + recs.length.toLocaleString() + ' records)…', '#22d3ee');
   805: 
   806:         function cellVal(row, col) {
   807:           var cell = row && row[col.id];
   808:           return (cell && typeof cell === 'object') ? cell.value : cell;
   809:         }
   810: 
   811:         var blob, filename, mime;
   812:         if (isCsv) {
   813:           var rows = [cols.map(function(c) { return '"' + _esc(c.label) + '"'; }).join(',')];
   814:           recs.forEach(function(row) { rows.push(cols.map(function(c) { return '"' + _esc(cellVal(row,c)) + '"'; }).join(',')); });
   815:           blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + rows.join('\r\n')], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
   816:           filename = 'quickbase_all_cases_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.csv';
   817:           mime = 'text/csv';
   818:         } else {
   819:           var xml = ['<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>',
   820:             '<Workbook xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet">',
   821:             '<Worksheet ss:Name="QB Export"><Table>',
   822:             '<Row>' + cols.map(function(c) { return '<Cell><Data ss:Type="String">' + _xlEsc(c.label) + '</Data></Cell>'; }).join('') + '</Row>'];
   823:           recs.forEach(function(row) {
   824:             xml.push('<Row>' + cols.map(function(c) {
   825:               var v = String(cellVal(row,c) == null ? '' : cellVal(row,c));
   826:               return '<Cell><Data ss:Type="' + (!isNaN(v)&&v.trim()&&v.length<15?'Number':'String') + '">' + _xlEsc(v) + '</Data></Cell>';
   827:             }).join('') + '</Row>');
   828:           });
   829:           xml.push('</Table></Worksheet></Workbook>');
   830:           blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + xml.join('\n')], { type: 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8;' });
   831:           filename = 'quickbase_all_cases_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.xls';
   832:           mime = 'application/vnd.ms-excel';
   833:         }
   834: 
   835:         var a = document.createElement('a');
   836:         a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   837:         a.download = filename;
   838:         document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
   839:         setTimeout(function() { URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href); }, 5000);
   840: 
   841:         var elapsed = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(1);
   842:         _setStatus(
   843:           '<i class="fas fa-check-circle" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>' +
   844:           recs.length.toLocaleString() + ' records exported — ' + filename + ' (' + elapsed + 's)',
   845:           '#3fb950'
   846:         );
   847:         setTimeout(function() { if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = ''; }, 12000);
   848:       })
   849:       .catch(function(e) {
   850:         _setStatus(
   851:           '<i class="fas fa-times-circle" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>' +
   852:           'Export failed: ' + (e && e.message || 'Unknown error'),
   853:           '#f85149'
   854:         );
   855:         console.error('[qbsExport] failed:', e);
   856:       })
   857:       .finally(function() { _setDisabled(false); });
   858:   };
   859: 
   860:   // ── Connect+ tab state (BUG FIX: was missing — caused ReferenceError) ──
   861:   var _state = {
   862:     loaded:    false,
   863:     loading:   false,
   864:     all:       [],
   865:     filtered:  [],
   866:     page:      1,
   867:     search:    '',
   868:     country:   '',
   869:     directory: '',
   870:     sortCol:   null,
   871:     sortDir:   1,
   872:     modalIdx:  0,
   873:   };
   874:   var CSV_URL  = '';
   875:   var PAGE_SIZE = 100;
   876: 
   877:   // ── Helper: get active CSV URL from live window var or localStorage ──
   878:   // (BUG FIX: _getActiveCsvUrl + _normalizeCsvUrl were missing from scope)
   879:   function _getActiveCsvUrl() {
   880:     // Primary: live value set by CPS settings module
   881:     if (window._cpCsvUrl) return String(window._cpCsvUrl);
   882:     // Fallback: read directly from localStorage key used by CPS module
   883:     try {
   884:       var raw = localStorage.getItem('ss_connectplus_settings');
   885:       if (raw) {
   886:         var obj = JSON.parse(raw);
   887:         if (obj && obj.csvUrl) return String(obj.csvUrl);
   888:       }
   889:     } catch (_) {}
   890:     return '';
   891:   }
   892: 
   893:   function _normalizeCsvUrl(raw) {
   894:     var url = String(raw || '').trim();
   895:     if (!url) return url;
   896:     // Already a correct CSV export URL
   897:     if (url.includes('output=csv')) return url;
   898:     try {
   899:       var u = new URL(url);
   900:       // Case 1: /pub link missing output=csv param
   901:       if (u.pathname.includes('/pub')) {
   902:         u.searchParams.set('output', 'csv');
   903:         return u.toString();
   904:       }
   905:       // Case 2: /pubhtml — replace with /pub?output=csv
   906:       if (u.pathname.includes('/pubhtml')) {
   907:         var gid2 = u.searchParams.get('gid') || '';
   908:         u.pathname = u.pathname.replace('/pubhtml', '/pub');
   909:         u.searchParams.set('output', 'csv');
   910:         if (gid2) u.searchParams.set('gid', gid2);
   911:         return u.toString();
   912:       }
   913:       // Case 3: /edit or /view — build export URL
   914:       if (u.pathname.includes('/edit') || u.pathname.includes('/view')) {
   915:         var gid3 = u.searchParams.get('gid') || '0';
   916:         var m2 = u.pathname.match(/\/d\/([^/]+)\//);
   917:         if (m2) {
   918:           return 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/' + m2[1] +
   919:             '/export?format=csv&gid=' + gid3;
   920:         }
   921:       }
   922:     } catch (_) {}
   923:     return url;
   924:   }
   925: 
   926:   // ── CSV parser (handles quoted fields with commas) ──────────────────
   927:   function parseCSV(text) {
   928:     var lines = [];
   929:     var cur = '';
   930:     var inQ  = false;
   931:     var rows = [];
   932:     for (var i = 0; i < text.length; i++) {
   933:       var c = text[i];
   934:       if (c === '"') { inQ = !inQ; cur += c; }
   935:       else if (c === '\n' && !inQ) { rows.push(cur); cur = ''; }
   936:       else if (c === '\r' && !inQ) {}
   937:       else { cur += c; }
   938:     }
   939:     if (cur) rows.push(cur);
   940: 
   941:     return rows.map(function(row) {
   942:       var fields = [];
   943:       var f = ''; var q = false;
   944:       for (var j = 0; j < row.length; j++) {
   945:         var ch = row[j];
   946:         if (ch === '"') {
   947:           if (q && row[j+1] === '"') { f += '"'; j++; }
   948:           else q = !q;
   949:         } else if (ch === ',' && !q) { fields.push(f); f = ''; }
   950:         else f += ch;
   951:       }
   952:       fields.push(f);
   953:       return fields;
   954:     });
   955:   }
   956: 
   957:   function esc(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
   958: 
   959:   // ── Load CSV ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   960:   window._cpInit = function() {
   961:     if (_state.loaded || _state.loading) return;
   962:     _cpLoad();
   963:   };
   964: 
   965:   window._cpRefresh = function() {
   966:     _state.loaded = false;
   967:     _state.all = [];
   968:     _state.filtered = [];
   969:     _state.page = 1;
   970:     _cpLoad();
   971:   };
   972: 
   973:   function _cpLoad() {
   974:     _state.loading = true;
   975:     _setStatus('Loading…');
   976: 
   977:     var body = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
   978:     function _loadSettingsIfNeeded() {
   979:       // We need both CSV URL and detected column metadata.
   980:       // Having only _cpCsvUrl is not enough for cache schema validation.
   981:       if (window._cpCsvUrl && Array.isArray(window._cpDetectedCols)) return Promise.resolve();
   982: 
   983:       // Fast path from local storage (no auth/network required)
   984:       try {
   985:         var localRaw = localStorage.getItem('ss_connectplus_settings');
   986:         if (localRaw) {
   987:           var localCfg = JSON.parse(localRaw);
   988:           if (!window._cpCsvUrl && localCfg && localCfg.csvUrl) window._cpCsvUrl = localCfg.csvUrl;
   989:           if (!Array.isArray(window._cpDetectedCols) && localCfg && Array.isArray(localCfg.detectedColumns)) {
   990:             window._cpDetectedCols = localCfg.detectedColumns;
   991:           }
   992:           if (!window._cpSearchCols && localCfg && Array.isArray(localCfg.searchColumns)) {
   993:             window._cpSearchCols = localCfg.searchColumns.length > 0 ? localCfg.searchColumns : null;
   994:           }
   995:         }
   996:       } catch(_) {}
   997: 
   998:       if (window._cpCsvUrl && Array.isArray(window._cpDetectedCols)) return Promise.resolve();
   999: 
  1000:       var tok = '';
  1001:       try {
  1002:         var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
  1003:         if (raw) {
  1004:           var p = JSON.parse(raw);
  1005:           if (p && p.access_token) tok = p.access_token;
  1006:         }
  1007:         if (!tok && window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') tok = window.CloudAuth.accessToken();
  1008:       } catch(_) {}
  1009:       if (!tok) return Promise.resolve(); // no token yet — caller will handle empty CSV_URL
  1010:       return fetch('/api/studio/csv_settings?type=connect_plus', {
  1011:         headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache' }
  1012:       }).then(function(resp) { return resp.ok ? resp.json().catch(function(){ return null; }) : null; })
  1013:         .then(function(d) {
  1014:           if (d && d.ok && d.settings && d.settings.csvUrl) {
  1015:             window._cpCsvUrl = d.settings.csvUrl;
  1016:             window._cpSearchCols = (Array.isArray(d.settings.searchColumns) && d.settings.searchColumns.length > 0)
  1017:               ? d.settings.searchColumns : null;
  1018:             window._cpDetectedCols = Array.isArray(d.settings.detectedColumns) ? d.settings.detectedColumns : null;
  1019:           }
  1020:         })
  1021:         .catch(function() {});
  1022:     }
  1023: 
  1024:     // ── Cache-first: try IndexedDB before hitting network ─────────────
  1025:     var cacheAvailable = typeof window.StudioCache !== 'undefined';
  1026:     var cachePromise   = cacheAvailable
  1027:       ? window.StudioCache.getBundle('connect_plus')
  1028:       : Promise.resolve(null);
  1029: 
  1030:     _loadSettingsIfNeeded().then(function() {
  1031:       CSV_URL = _normalizeCsvUrl(_getActiveCsvUrl());
  1032:       return cachePromise;
  1033:     }).then(function(cached) {
  1034:       if (cached && Array.isArray(cached.data) && cached.data.length > 0) {
  1035:         // Cache schema guard:
  1036:         // older cached bundles may not include endUser key at all.
  1037:         var cacheHasEndUserKey = cached.data.some(function(row) {
  1038:           return row && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(row, 'endUser');
  1039:         });
  1040:         if (!cacheHasEndUserKey) cached = null;
  1041: 
  1042:         // BUG-FIX: Invalidate caches built before storeNumber was added to the data model.
  1043:         // Any cache missing the storeNumber key was built with the old schema and must be refreshed.
  1044:         if (cached) {
  1045:           var cacheHasStoreNumberKey = cached.data.some(function(row) {
  1046:             return row && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(row, 'storeNumber');
  1047:           });
  1048:           if (!cacheHasStoreNumberKey) cached = null;
  1049:         }
  1050: 
  1051:         // If settings detected an End User column but cache has no non-empty
  1052:         // values, treat cache as stale and force a network refresh.
  1053:         if (cached) {
  1054:           var detectedCols = Array.isArray(window._cpDetectedCols) ? window._cpDetectedCols : [];
  1055:           var expectsEndUser = detectedCols.some(function(col) {
  1056:             var k = String(col || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
  1057:             return k.indexOf('enduser') >= 0 || (k.indexOf('end') >= 0 && k.indexOf('user') >= 0);
  1058:           });
  1059:           if (expectsEndUser) {
  1060:             var hasEndUserValue = cached.data.some(function(row) {
  1061:               return row && String(row.endUser || '').trim().length > 0;
  1062:             });
  1063:             if (!hasEndUserValue) cached = null;
  1064:           }
  1065:         }
  1066:       }
  1067: 
  1068:       if (cached && Array.isArray(cached.data) && cached.data.length > 0) {
  1069:         // ✅ Serve from cache — instant, no network
  1070:         _state.all     = cached.data;
  1071:         window.__studioCpRecords = Array.isArray(_state.all) ? _state.all.slice() : [];
  1072:         _state.loaded  = true;
  1073:         _state.loading = false;
  1074:         _buildFilterOptions();
  1075:         _cpApplyFilters();
  1076:         var lb = document.getElementById('cp-live-badge');
  1077:         if (lb) lb.style.display = '';
  1078:         var ageMin = Math.round((Date.now() - (cached.fetchedAt || 0)) / 60000);
  1079:         _setStatus('Loaded from cache (' + ageMin + 'm ago)');
  1080:         setTimeout(function() { _setStatus(''); }, 3000);
  1081:         return;
  1082:       }
  1083: 
  1084:       // ── No cache — load from network ─────────────────────────────
  1085:       if (!CSV_URL) {
  1086:         _state.loading = false;
  1087:         if (body) body.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;gap:10px;color:var(--ss-muted);"><i class="fas fa-link-slash" style="font-size:28px;opacity:.4;"></i><div style="font-size:13px;">No CSV URL configured</div><div style="font-size:11px;opacity:.6;">Go to General Settings → Connect+ Settings</div></div>';
  1088:         _setStatus('No CSV URL configured.');
  1089:         return;
  1090:       }
  1091: 
  1092:       if (body) body.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;gap:12px;color:var(--ss-muted);"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin" style="font-size:20px;opacity:.4;"></i><span style="font-size:13px;opacity:.5;">Loading Connect+ sites…</span></div>';
  1093: 
  1094:       fetch(CSV_URL, { cache: 'no-store' })
  1095:       .then(function(r) {
  1096:         if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status);
  1097:         return r.text();
  1098:       })
  1099:       .then(function(text) {
  1100:         var rows = parseCSV(text);
  1101:         if (!rows.length) throw new Error('Empty CSV');
  1102:         var header = rows[0] || [];
  1103:         function _normHeader(v) {
  1104:           return String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
  1105:         }
  1106:         function _findHeaderIndex(aliases, fallbackIndex) {
  1107:           var aliasSet = aliases.map(_normHeader);
  1108:           for (var i = 0; i < header.length; i++) {
  1109:             if (aliasSet.indexOf(_normHeader(header[i])) >= 0) return i;
  1110:           }
  1111:           return typeof fallbackIndex === 'number' ? fallbackIndex : -1;
  1112:         }
  1113:         // Header-based mapping (resilient to column order/label variations)
  1114:         // BUG-FIX: Added storeNumber (CSV index 10). Corrected endUser fallback
  1115:         // from 10→11 and endUser2 fallback from 11→12 to match actual CSV column order:
  1116:         // 0=Site,1=Directory,2=Address1,3=Country,4=City,5=State,6=Zip,7=TimeZone,
  1117:         // 8=Systems,9=URL,10=STORE NUMBER,11=END USER,12=END USER2
  1118:         var colIdx = {
  1119:           site:        _findHeaderIndex(['site'], 0),
  1120:           directory:   _findHeaderIndex(['directory'], 1),
  1121:           address1:    _findHeaderIndex(['address 1','address1','address'], 2),
  1122:           country:     _findHeaderIndex(['country'], 3),
  1123:           city:        _findHeaderIndex(['city'], 4),
  1124:           state:       _findHeaderIndex(['state/province/region','state province region','state','province','region'], 5),
  1125:           zip:         _findHeaderIndex(['zip/postal code','zip postal code','zip','postal code','postal'], 6),
  1126:           timezone:    _findHeaderIndex(['time zone','timezone'], 7),
  1127:           systems:     _findHeaderIndex(['number of control systems','control systems','systems'], 8),
  1128:           url:         _findHeaderIndex(['url connect+ link','url connect link','connect+ link','connect link','url'], 9),
  1129:           storeNumber: _findHeaderIndex(['store number','storenumber','store no','store #','store#'], 10),
  1130:           endUser:     _findHeaderIndex(['end user','enduser','client','account','customer'], 11),
  1131:           endUser2:    _findHeaderIndex(['end user2','enduser2','end user 2','client 2','account 2','customer 2'], 12)
  1132:         };
  1133: 
  1134:         var data = [];
  1135:         for (var i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
  1136:           var r = rows[i];
  1137:           if (!r || !String(r[colIdx.site] || '').trim()) continue;
  1138:           var endUser = '';
  1139:           var endUserIdxOrder = [colIdx.endUser, colIdx.endUser2];
  1140:           for (var e = 0; e < endUserIdxOrder.length; e++) {
  1141:             var euIdx = endUserIdxOrder[e];
  1142:             if (typeof euIdx !== 'number' || euIdx < 0) continue;
  1143:             var euVal = String(r[euIdx] || '').trim();
  1144:             if (euVal) { endUser = euVal; break; }
  1145:           }
  1146:           data.push({
  1147:             site:        String(r[colIdx.site]        || '').trim(),
  1148:             directory:   String(r[colIdx.directory]   || '').trim(),
  1149:             address1:    String(r[colIdx.address1]    || '').trim(),
  1150:             country:     String(r[colIdx.country]     || '').trim(),
  1151:             city:        String(r[colIdx.city]        || '').trim(),
  1152:             state:       String(r[colIdx.state]       || '').trim(),
  1153:             zip:         String(r[colIdx.zip]         || '').trim(),
  1154:             timezone:    String(r[colIdx.timezone]    || '').trim(),
  1155:             systems:     String(r[colIdx.systems]     || '').trim(),
  1156:             url:         String(r[colIdx.url]         || '').trim(),
  1157:             storeNumber: String(r[colIdx.storeNumber] || '').trim(),
  1158:             endUser:     endUser,
  1159:             // _search includes ALL text columns including STORE NUMBER — searches all 36k+ records by default
  1160:             _search:     [
  1161:               r[colIdx.site], r[colIdx.directory], r[colIdx.address1], r[colIdx.country],
  1162:               r[colIdx.city], r[colIdx.state], r[colIdx.zip], r[colIdx.timezone],
  1163:               r[colIdx.systems], r[colIdx.url], r[colIdx.storeNumber], endUser
  1164:             ].join(' ').toLowerCase(),
  1165:           });
  1166:         }
  1167:         _state.all     = data;
  1168:         window.__studioCpRecords = Array.isArray(data) ? data.slice() : [];
  1169:         _state.loaded  = true;
  1170:         _state.loading = false;
  1171:         _buildFilterOptions();
  1172:         _cpApplyFilters();
  1173:         var lb = document.getElementById('cp-live-badge');
  1174:         if (lb) lb.style.display = '';
  1175:         // ── Write to IndexedDB cache for next visit ─────────────
  1176:         if (cacheAvailable) {
  1177:           window.StudioCache.setBundle('connect_plus', data, '', data.length)
  1178:             .catch(function() {});
  1179:         }
  1180:       })
  1181:       .catch(function(e) {
  1182:         _state.loading = false;
  1183:         var body2 = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
  1184:         if (body2) body2.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;gap:10px;color:#f85149;"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="font-size:28px;opacity:.6;"></i><div style="font-size:13px;">Failed to load Connect+ data</div><div style="font-size:11px;opacity:.6;">' + esc(e.message) + '</div><button onclick="window._cpRefresh()" style="margin-top:8px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.3);color:#f85149;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--ss-font);cursor:pointer;"><i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Retry</button></div>';
  1185:         _setStatus('Error: ' + e.message);
  1186:       });
  1187:     }); // end cachePromise.then
  1188:   }
  1189: 
  1190:   function _buildFilterOptions() {
  1191:     var countries = {};
  1192:     var dirs      = {};
  1193:     _state.all.forEach(function(r) {
  1194:       if (r.country) countries[r.country] = 1;
  1195:       if (r.directory) dirs[r.directory]  = 1;
  1196:     });
  1197:     var cSel = document.getElementById('cp-country-filter');
  1198:     var dSel = document.getElementById('cp-dir-filter');
  1199:     if (cSel) {
  1200:       var cOpts = Object.keys(countries).sort();
  1201:       cSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Countries</option>' +
  1202:         cOpts.map(function(c) { return '<option value="' + esc(c) + '">' + esc(c) + '</option>'; }).join('');
  1203:     }
  1204:     if (dSel) {
  1205:       var dOpts = Object.keys(dirs).sort();
  1206:       dSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Directories</option>' +
  1207:         dOpts.map(function(d) { return '<option value="' + esc(d) + '">' + esc(d) + '</option>'; }).join('');
  1208:     }
  1209:   }
  1210: 
  1211:   // ── Search + Filter + Sort ──────────────────────────────────────────
  1212:   window._cpOnSearch = function(val) {
  1213:     _state.search = String(val || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  1214:     // Sync both search inputs
  1215:     var si = document.getElementById('cp-search-input');
  1216:     var sm = document.getElementById('cp-main-search');
  1217:     if (si && si.value.toLowerCase() !== _state.search) si.value = val || '';
  1218:     if (sm && sm.value.toLowerCase() !== _state.search) sm.value = val || '';
  1219:     _state.page = 1;
  1220:     _cpApplyFilters();
  1221:   };
  1222: 
  1223:   window._cpApplyFilters = function() {
  1224:     var cSel = document.getElementById('cp-country-filter');
  1225:     var dSel = document.getElementById('cp-dir-filter');
  1226:     _state.country   = cSel ? cSel.value : '';
  1227:     _state.directory = dSel ? dSel.value : '';
  1228: 
  1229:     var q = _state.search;
  1230:     // Respect active search columns from Connect+ Settings
  1231:     // window._cpSearchCols = null or empty = search ALL columns (default)
  1232:     var activeCols = (Array.isArray(window._cpSearchCols) && window._cpSearchCols.length > 0)
  1233:       ? window._cpSearchCols : null;
  1234: 
  1235:     var colIndexMap = { 'Site':0,'Directory':1,'Address 1':2,'Country':3,'City':4,'State/Province/Region':5,'Zip/Postal Code':6,'Time Zone':7 };
  1236:     var filtered = _state.all.filter(function(r) {
  1237:       if (_state.country   && r.country   !== _state.country)   return false;
  1238:       if (_state.directory && r.directory !== _state.directory) return false;
  1239:       if (q) {
  1240:         var haystack;
  1241:         if (!activeCols) {
  1242:           // No column filter — search all indexed fields including storeNumber
  1243:           haystack = r._search || [r.site,r.directory,r.address1,r.country,r.city,r.state,r.zip,r.timezone,r.systems,r.url,r.storeNumber,r.endUser].join(' ').toLowerCase();
  1244:         } else {
  1245:           // Build haystack from only selected columns
  1246:           haystack = activeCols.map(function(col) {
  1247:             var colKey = col.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
  1248:             // Map column name to row field
  1249:             if (colKey === 'site')                     return r.site        || '';
  1250:             if (colKey === 'directory')                return r.directory   || '';
  1251:             if (colKey.includes('address'))            return r.address1    || '';
  1252:             if (colKey === 'country')                  return r.country     || '';
  1253:             if (colKey === 'city')                     return r.city        || '';
  1254:             if (colKey.includes('state') || colKey.includes('province') || colKey.includes('region')) return r.state || '';
  1255:             if (colKey.includes('zip') || colKey.includes('postal'))     return r.zip         || '';
  1256:             if (colKey.includes('time') || colKey.includes('zone'))      return r.timezone    || '';
  1257:             if (colKey.includes('url') || colKey.includes('connect') || colKey.includes('link')) return r.url || '';
  1258:             if (colKey.includes('system') || colKey.includes('control')) return r.systems     || '';
  1259:             // BUG-FIX: map STORE NUMBER column to storeNumber field
  1260:             if (colKey === 'storenumber' || colKey.includes('store'))    return r.storeNumber || '';
  1261:             if (colKey.includes('enduser') || (colKey.includes('end') && colKey.includes('user')) ||
  1262:                 colKey.includes('client') || colKey.includes('account') || colKey.includes('customer')) return r.endUser || '';
  1263:             // Fallback: try index map
  1264:             var idx = colIndexMap[col];
  1265:             if (idx != null) {
  1266:               var fields = [r.site,r.directory,r.address1,r.country,r.city,r.state,r.zip,r.timezone];
  1267:               return fields[idx] || '';
  1268:             }
  1269:             return '';
  1270:           }).join(' ').toLowerCase();
  1271:         }
  1272:         if (!haystack.includes(q)) return false;
  1273:       }
  1274:       return true;
  1275:     });
  1276: 
  1277:     // Sort
  1278:     if (_state.sortCol) {
  1279:       var col = _state.sortCol;
  1280:       var dir = _state.sortDir;
  1281:       filtered.sort(function(a, b) {
  1282:         var av = String(a[col] || '').toLowerCase();
  1283:         var bv = String(b[col] || '').toLowerCase();
  1284:         return av < bv ? -dir : av > bv ? dir : 0;
  1285:       });
  1286:     }
  1287: 
  1288:     _state.filtered = filtered;
  1289:     _state.page = 1;
  1290:     _cpRender();
  1291:   };
  1292: 
  1293:   window._cpSort = function(col) {
  1294:     if (_state.sortCol === col) _state.sortDir *= -1;
  1295:     else { _state.sortCol = col; _state.sortDir = 1; }
  1296:     document.querySelectorAll('[id^="cp-sort-"]').forEach(function(el) {
  1297:       el.className = 'fas fa-sort'; el.style.opacity = '.3';
  1298:     });
  1299:     var icon = document.getElementById('cp-sort-' + col);
  1300:     if (icon) {
  1301:       icon.className = 'fas fa-sort-' + (_state.sortDir > 0 ? 'up' : 'down');
  1302:       icon.style.opacity = '1';
  1303:       icon.style.color = '#22d3ee';
  1304:     }
  1305:     _cpApplyFilters();
  1306:   };
  1307: 
  1308:   // ── Render table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1309:   function _cpRender() {
  1310:     var total    = _state.filtered.length;
  1311:     var page     = _state.page;
  1312:     var maxPage  = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(total / PAGE_SIZE));
  1313:     if (page > maxPage) page = _state.page = 1;
  1314:     var start = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;
  1315:     var end   = Math.min(start + PAGE_SIZE, total);
  1316:     var rows  = _state.filtered.slice(start, end);
  1317: 
  1318:     // Update counts
  1319:     var cnt = document.getElementById('cp-record-count');
  1320:     if (cnt) cnt.textContent = total.toLocaleString() + ' site' + (total !== 1 ? 's' : '');
  1321:     var sc = document.getElementById('cp-search-count');
  1322:     if (sc) sc.textContent = _state.search
  1323:       ? (total.toLocaleString() + ' of ' + _state.all.length.toLocaleString())
  1324:       : (_state.all.length.toLocaleString() + ' total');
  1325: 
  1326:     _setStatus('');
  1327: 
  1328:     var body = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
  1329:     if (!body) return;
  1330: 
  1331:     if (!total) {
  1332:       body.innerHTML = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;gap:10px;color:var(--ss-muted);"><i class="fas fa-search" style="font-size:28px;opacity:.2;"></i><div style="font-size:13px;opacity:.5;">No sites match your search.</div></div>';
  1333:       document.getElementById('cp-pagination').style.display = 'none';
  1334:       _cpSyncHeadScrollbarGap();
  1335:       return;
  1336:     }
  1337: 
  1338:     // Build table — HD Premium rows
  1339:     var html = '<table class="prem-table cyan" style="width:100%;min-width:1020px;">';
  1340:     html += '<tbody>';
  1341:     rows.forEach(function(row, i) {
  1342:       var globalIdx = start + i;
  1343:       var rowBg = i % 2 === 0 ? 'transparent' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.012)';
  1344:       html += '<tr data-cp-idx="' + globalIdx + '" style="background:' + rowBg + ';cursor:pointer;" ' +
  1345:         'onclick="window._cpOpenDetail(' + globalIdx + ')" ' +
  1346:         'onmouseover="this.querySelectorAll(\'td\').forEach(function(t){t.style.background=\'rgba(34,211,238,.04)\'})" ' +
  1347:         'onmouseout="this.querySelectorAll(\'td\').forEach(function(t){t.style.background=\'\'});">';
  1348:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-muted);font-size:10px;width:38px;">' + (start + i + 1) + '</td>';
  1349:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);"><span class="cp-site-link">' + esc(row.site) + '</span></td>';
  1350:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-text);">' + esc(row.directory) + '</td>';
  1351:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-text);">' + esc(row.city) + '</td>';
  1352:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-muted);">' + esc(row.state) + '</td>';
  1353:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-text);">' + esc(row.country) + '</td>';
  1354:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-muted);font-size:10px;">' + esc(row.timezone) + '</td>';
  1355:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--ss-text);">' + esc(row.endUser || '—') + '</td>';
  1356:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);text-align:center;"><span class="cp-sys-badge">' + esc(row.systems || '—') + '</span></td>';
  1357:       html += '<td style="padding:6px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025);">';
  1358:       if (row.url) {
  1359:         html += '<a href="' + esc(row.url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" ' +
  1360:           'onclick="event.stopPropagation()" class="cp-open-btn">' +
  1361:           '<i class="fas fa-external-link-alt" style="font-size:8px;"></i> Open</a>';
  1362:       }
  1363:       html += '</td></tr>';
  1364:     });
  1365:     html += '</tbody></table>';
  1366:     body.innerHTML = html;
  1367:     _cpSyncHeadScrollbarGap();
  1368: 
  1369:     _renderPagination(total, maxPage);
  1370:   }
  1371: 
  1372:   function _cpSyncHeadScrollbarGap() {
  1373:     var bodyEl = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
  1374:     var headWrap = document.getElementById('cp-table-head-wrap');
  1375:     if (!bodyEl || !headWrap) return;
  1376:     var scrollbarW = Math.max(0, bodyEl.offsetWidth - bodyEl.clientWidth);
  1377:     headWrap.style.paddingRight = scrollbarW ? (scrollbarW + 'px') : '';
  1378:   }
  1379: 
  1380:   function _renderPagination(total, maxPage) {
  1381:     var pg = document.getElementById('cp-pagination');
  1382:     if (!pg) return;
  1383:     if (maxPage <= 1 && total <= PAGE_SIZE) { pg.style.display = 'none'; return; }
  1384:     pg.style.display = 'flex';
  1385:     var page = _state.page;
  1386:     var start = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE + 1;
  1387:     var end   = Math.min(page * PAGE_SIZE, total);
  1388:     var info  = document.getElementById('cp-page-info');
  1389:     if (info) info.textContent = 'Showing ' + start.toLocaleString() + '–' + end.toLocaleString() + ' of ' + total.toLocaleString() + ' sites';
  1390:     var prevBtn = document.getElementById('cp-prev-btn');
  1391:     var nextBtn = document.getElementById('cp-next-btn');
  1392:     if (prevBtn) { prevBtn.disabled = page <= 1; prevBtn.style.opacity = page <= 1 ? '.4' : '1'; }
  1393:     if (nextBtn) { nextBtn.disabled = page >= maxPage; nextBtn.style.opacity = page >= maxPage ? '.4' : '1'; }
  1394:     var btnContainer = document.getElementById('cp-page-btns');
  1395:     if (btnContainer) {
  1396:       var pages = [];
  1397:       for (var p = Math.max(1, page - 2); p <= Math.min(maxPage, page + 2); p++) pages.push(p);
  1398:       btnContainer.innerHTML = pages.map(function(p) {
  1399:         return '<button onclick="window._cpGoPage(' + p + ')" class="prem-page-num ' + (p === page ? 'cyan' : '') + '" ' +
  1400:           (p !== page ? 'style="border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--ss-muted);"' : '') +
  1401:           '>' + p + '</button>';
  1402:       }).join('');
  1403:     }
  1404:   }
  1405: 
  1406:   window._cpChangePage = function(delta) {
  1407:     var maxPage = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(_state.filtered.length / PAGE_SIZE));
  1408:     _state.page = Math.max(1, Math.min(_state.page + delta, maxPage));
  1409:     _cpRender();
  1410:     var body = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
  1411:     if (body) body.scrollTop = 0;
  1412:   };
  1413:   window._cpGoPage = function(p) {
  1414:     _state.page = p;
  1415:     _cpRender();
  1416:     var body2 = document.getElementById('cp-table-body');
  1417:     if (body2) body2.scrollTop = 0;
  1418:   };
  1419: 
  1420:   window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
  1421:     _cpSyncHeadScrollbarGap();
  1422:   });
  1423: 
  1424:   // ── Detail Modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1425:   window._cpOpenDetail = function(idx) {
  1426:     var row = _state.filtered[idx];
  1427:     if (!row) return;
  1428:     _state.modalIdx = idx;
  1429:     _cpPopulateModal(row, idx);
  1430:     var m = document.getElementById('cp-detail-modal');
  1431:     if (m) {
  1432:       m.style.display = 'flex';
  1433:       if (m.parentElement !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(m);
  1434:     }
  1435:     try { document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
  1436:   };
  1437: 
  1438:   function _cpPopulateModal(row, idx) {
  1439:     function set(id, v) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = v || '—'; }
  1440:     var total = _state.filtered.length;
  1441:     set('cp-modal-site',      row.site);
  1442:     set('cp-modal-address',   [row.address1, row.city, row.state, row.zip].filter(Boolean).join(', '));
  1443:     set('cp-modal-country',   row.country);
  1444:     set('cp-modal-directory', row.directory);
  1445:     set('cp-modal-timezone',  row.timezone);
  1446:     set('cp-modal-systems',   row.systems || '0');
  1447:     set('cp-modal-city',      row.city);
  1448:     set('cp-modal-state',     row.state);
  1449:     set('cp-modal-zip',       row.zip);
  1450:     set('cp-modal-addr1',     row.address1);
  1451:     set('cp-modal-pos',       (idx + 1) + ' of ' + total.toLocaleString());
  1452: 
  1453:     var urlEl = document.getElementById('cp-modal-url');
  1454:     var urlTx = document.getElementById('cp-modal-url-text');
  1455:     if (urlEl) {
  1456:       if (row.url) {
  1457:         urlEl.href = row.url;
  1458:         urlEl.style.display = 'inline-flex';
  1459:         if (urlTx) urlTx.textContent = row.url;
  1460:       } else {
  1461:         urlEl.style.display = 'none';
  1462:       }
  1463:     }
  1464: 
  1465:     var prev = document.getElementById('cp-modal-prev');
  1466:     var next = document.getElementById('cp-modal-next');
  1467:     if (prev) prev.disabled = idx <= 0;
  1468:     if (next) next.disabled = idx >= total - 1;
  1469:   }
  1470: 
  1471:   window._cpModalNav = function(dir) {
  1472:     var next = _state.modalIdx + dir;
  1473:     if (next < 0 || next >= _state.filtered.length) return;
  1474:     _state.modalIdx = next;
  1475:     _cpPopulateModal(_state.filtered[next], next);
  1476:   };
  1477: 
  1478:   window._cpCloseModal = function() {
  1479:     var m = document.getElementById('cp-detail-modal');
  1480:     if (m) m.style.display = 'none';
  1481:     try { if (!document.querySelector('.modal.open')) document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); } catch(_) {}
  1482:   };
  1483: 
  1484:   // Keyboard nav + escape for modal
  1485:   document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  1486:     var m = document.getElementById('cp-detail-modal');
  1487:     if (!m || m.style.display === 'none') return;
  1488:     if (e.key === 'Escape')     window._cpCloseModal();
  1489:     if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft')  window._cpModalNav(-1);
  1490:     if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') window._cpModalNav(1);
  1491:   });
  1492:   // Backdrop click — guard against null when modal not yet in DOM
  1493:   (function() {
  1494:     var _modal = document.getElementById('cp-detail-modal');
  1495:     if (_modal) {
  1496:       _modal.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  1497:         if (e.target === this) window._cpCloseModal();
  1498:       });
  1499:     }
  1500:   })();
  1501: 
  1502:   // ── CSV Export ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1503:   window._cpExportCsv = function() {
  1504:     var rows = _state.filtered;
  1505:     if (!rows.length) { alert('No data to export.'); return; }
  1506:     var header = ['Site','Directory','Address 1','Country','City','State/Province/Region','Zip/Postal Code','Time Zone','End User','Number of Control Systems','URL CONNECT+ LINK'];
  1507:     var csv = [header].concat(rows.map(function(r) {
  1508:       return [r.site,r.directory,r.address1,r.country,r.city,r.state,r.zip,r.timezone,r.endUser,r.systems,r.url].map(function(v) {
  1509:         return '"' + String(v||'').replace(/"/g,'""') + '"';
  1510:       });
  1511:     })).map(function(r) { return r.join ? r.join(',') : r; }).join('\n');
  1512:     var a = document.createElement('a');
  1513:     a.href = 'data:text/csv;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(csv);
  1514:     a.download = 'connect_plus_sites_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.csv';
  1515:     a.click();
  1516:   };
  1517: 
  1518:   function _setStatus(msg) {
  1519:     var el = document.getElementById('cp-status');
  1520:     if (el) el.textContent = msg;
  1521:   }

    14:   'use strict';

    16:   // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    17:   function el(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }
    18:   function _fmtAge(ms) {
    19:     var m = Math.round(ms / 60000);
    20:     if (m < 2)  return 'Just now';
    21:     if (m < 60) return m + 'm ago';
    22:     var h = Math.round(m / 60);
    23:     if (h < 24) return h + 'h ago';
    24:     return Math.round(h / 24) + 'd ago';
    25:   }
    26:   function _fmtDate(ts) {
    27:     if (!ts) return '—';
    28:     var d = new Date(ts);
    29:     return d.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month:'short', day:'numeric' }) +
    30:       ' ' + d.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, { hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' });
    31:   }
    32:   function _fmtCount(n) { return Number.isFinite(n) ? n.toLocaleString() : '—'; }
    33:   function _estimateSize(bundle) {
    34:     if (!bundle || !bundle.data) return 0;
    35:     try { return new Blob([JSON.stringify(bundle.data)]).size; } catch(_) { return 0; }
    36:   }
    37: 
    38:   // ── Banner control ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    43:   function showSoftBanner(outdated, serverManifest) {
    44:     _pendingOutdated = outdated || [];
    45:     _pendingManifest = serverManifest;
    46: 
    47:     var names = outdated.map(function(o) {
    48:       return o.id === 'connect_plus'  ? 'Connect+ Sites' :
    49:              o.id === 'parts_number'  ? 'Parts Number'   :
    50:              o.id === 'catalog'       ? 'Catalog Items'  :
    51:              o.id === 'qb_schema'     ? 'QB Schema'      : o.id;
    52:     });
    53: 
    54:     var msg  = '<strong>' + names.join(', ') + '</strong> ';
    55:     msg += outdated.length === 1 ? 'has been updated on the server.' : 'have been updated on the server.';
    56:     msg += ' <span style="opacity:.75;font-weight:500;">Update your local cache to see the latest data.</span>';
    57: 
    58:     var msgEl = el('ss-cache-banner-msg');
    59:     if (msgEl) msgEl.innerHTML = msg;
    60: 
    61:     // ss-cache-banner-soft is a fixed-position floating toast — show it
    62:     var soft = el('ss-cache-banner-soft');
    63:     if (soft) { soft.classList.remove('toast-hiding'); soft.style.display = 'flex'; }
    64: 
    65:     // Show dot on Cache Manager nav item
    66:     var dot = el('ss-cache-nav-dot');
    67:     if (dot) dot.style.display = '';
    68:   }

    70:   function autoSyncOutdated() {
    71:     if (_isSyncing) return;
    72:     if (!_pendingOutdated || !_pendingOutdated.length) return;
    73:     // Defer slightly so banner/beacon can render first, then sync automatically.
    74:     setTimeout(function() {
    75:       if (_isSyncing) return;
    76:       if (window._cacheUI && typeof window._cacheUI.startSync === 'function') {
    77:         window._cacheUI.startSync(false);
    78:       }
    79:     }, 900);
    80:   }
    81: 
    82:   function showCriticalModal(critical, outdated, serverManifest) {
    83:     _pendingOutdated = [].concat(critical || [], outdated || []);
    84:     _pendingManifest = serverManifest;
    85: 
    86:     var changes = el('ss-cache-modal-changes');
    87:     if (changes) {
    88:       changes.innerHTML = (critical || []).map(function(c) {
    89:         var label = c.id === 'connect_plus' ? 'Connect+ Sites' :
    90:                     c.id === 'parts_number' ? 'Parts Number'   :
    91:                     c.id === 'catalog'      ? 'Catalog Items'  :
    92:                     c.id === 'qb_schema'    ? 'QB Schema'      : c.id;
    93:         var icon  = c.reason === 'deletions_detected'
    94:           ? '<i class="fas fa-minus-circle" style="color:#f85149;width:14px;"></i>'
    95:           : '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="color:#d29922;width:14px;"></i>';
    96:         var desc  = c.reason === 'deletions_detected'
    97:           ? label + ': <strong>' + (c.localCount - c.serverCount) + ' records deleted</strong> on server — local cache is stale'
    98:           : label + ': <strong>Critical schema or data change</strong> detected';
    99:         return '<div style="padding:7px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);font-size:11px;color:#7d8590;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">' +
   100:           icon + '<span>' + desc + '</span></div>';
   101:       }).join('');
   102:     }
   103: 
   104:     var modal = el('ss-cache-modal');
   105:     if (modal) modal.style.display = 'flex';
   106: 
   107:     // Allow skip after 5 seconds
   108:     var skip = el('ss-cache-modal-skip');
   109:     if (skip) {
   110:       skip.disabled = true;
   111:       setTimeout(function() { if (skip) skip.disabled = false; }, 5000);
   112:     }
   113:   }
   114: 
   115:   function showProgress(bundleId, pct, overallDone, overallTotal) {
   116:     var soft = el('ss-cache-banner-soft');
   117:     var prog = el('ss-cache-progress');
   118:     var bar    = el('ss-cache-progress-bar');
   119:     var msgEl  = el('ss-cache-progress-msg');
   120:     var pctEl  = el('ss-cache-progress-pct');
   121: 
   122:     // Toast host is always visible (fixed pos); just toggle child toasts
   123:     if (soft) { soft.classList.add('toast-hiding'); setTimeout(function(){ if(soft) soft.style.display='none'; }, 180); }
   124:     if (prog) { prog.classList.remove('toast-hiding'); prog.style.display = 'flex'; }
   125: 
   126:     var label = bundleId === 'connect_plus' ? 'Connect+ Sites' :
   127:                 bundleId === 'parts_number' ? 'Parts Number'   :
   128:                 bundleId === 'catalog'      ? 'Catalog Items'  :
   129:                 bundleId === 'qb_schema'    ? 'QB Field Schema': bundleId;
   130:     var overall = overallTotal > 1
   131:       ? ' (' + overallDone + '/' + overallTotal + ' bundles)'
   132:       : '';
   133: 
   134:     if (msgEl) msgEl.textContent = 'Syncing ' + label + overall + '…';
   135:     if (bar)   bar.style.width   = pct + '%';
   136:     if (pctEl) pctEl.textContent = pct + '%';
   137:   }

   139:   function hideBannerAndProgress() {
   140:     var soft  = el('ss-cache-banner-soft');

   142:     var modal = el('ss-cache-modal');
   143:     var dot   = el('ss-cache-nav-dot');
   144: 
   145:     setTimeout(function() {
   146:       // Animate toasts out, then hide
   147:       function _hideToast(el) {
   148:         if (!el || el.style.display === 'none') return;
   149:         el.classList.add('toast-hiding');
   150:         setTimeout(function() {
   151:           if (el) { el.style.display = 'none'; el.classList.remove('toast-hiding'); }
   152:         }, 200);
   153:       }
   154:       _hideToast(soft);
   155:       _hideToast(prog);
   156:       if (modal)  modal.style.display  = 'none';
   157:       if (dot)    dot.style.display    = 'none';
   158:       _isSyncing = false;
   159:     }, 1500);

   162:   // ── Cache Manager panel refresh ───────────────────────────────────
   163:   function refreshPanel() {
   164:     if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') {
   165:       var msgEl = el('cache-manager-msg');
   166:       if (msgEl) { msgEl.textContent = 'IndexedDB not available in this browser.'; msgEl.style.opacity = '1'; msgEl.style.color = '#f85149'; }
   167:       return;
   168:     }
   169:     window.StudioCache.getStats().then(function(stats) {
   170:       _renderBundleRow('connect_plus',  stats.connect_plus,  '#58a6ff');
   171:       _renderBundleRow('parts_number',  stats.parts_number,  '#fb923c');
   172:       _renderBundleRow('catalog',       stats.catalog,       '#22d3ee');
   173:       _renderBundleRow('qb_schema',     stats.qb_schema,     '#3fb950');
   174:       _renderStorageBar(stats);
   175:     });
   176:   }
   177: 
   178:   function _renderBundleRow(id, stat, color) {
   179:     var subEl    = el('cache-sub-'    + id);
   180:     var ageEl    = el('cache-age-'    + id);
   181:     var countEl  = el('cache-count-'  + id);
   182:     var statusEl = el('cache-status-' + id);
   183: 
   184:     if (!stat || !stat.cached) {
   185:       if (subEl)    subEl.textContent    = 'Not cached';
   186:       if (ageEl)    ageEl.textContent    = '—';
   187:       if (countEl)  countEl.textContent  = '—';
   188:       if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML   = '<span style="color:#7d8590;">No data</span>';
   189:       return;
   190:     }
   191: 
   192:     if (subEl)   subEl.textContent  = _fmtCount(stat.count) + ' records';
   193:     if (ageEl)   ageEl.innerHTML    = '<div style="color:#e6edf3;">' + _fmtDate(stat.fetchedAt) + '</div>' +
   194:       '<div style="color:' + (stat.expired ? '#f85149' : '#3fb950') + ';font-size:9px;">' +
   195:       _fmtAge(stat.ageMs) + '</div>';
   196:     if (countEl) countEl.textContent = _fmtCount(stat.count);
   197:     if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = stat.expired
   198:       ? '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;"><div style="width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#f85149;"></div><span style="color:#f85149;font-weight:700;">Expired</span></div>'
   199:       : '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;"><div style="width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#3fb950;box-shadow:0 0 5px #3fb950;animation:pulse 2s infinite;"></div><span style="color:#3fb950;font-weight:700;">Current</span></div>';
   200:   }
   201: 
   202:   function _renderStorageBar(stats) {
   203:     // Estimate sizes (rough: JSON bytes)
   204:     var cpSize  = stats.connect_plus  && stats.connect_plus.cached  ? (stats.connect_plus.count  * 200)  : 0;
   205:     var pnSize  = stats.parts_number  && stats.parts_number.cached  ? (stats.parts_number.count  * 250)  : 0;
   206:     var catSize = stats.catalog       && stats.catalog.cached       ? (stats.catalog.count       * 2000) : 0;
   207:     var schSize = stats.qb_schema     && stats.qb_schema.cached     ? 5000                               : 0;
   208:     var total   = cpSize + pnSize + catSize + schSize;
   209: 
   210:     var totalEl = el('cache-total-size');
   211:     if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = total > 0
   212:       ? (total / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB estimated'
   213:       : 'Nothing cached yet';
   214: 
   215:     function pct(n) { return total > 0 ? Math.round(n / total * 100) + '%' : '0%'; }
   216:     var barCp  = el('cache-bar-cp');
   217:     var barCat = el('cache-bar-cat');
   218:     var barSch = el('cache-bar-sch');
   219:     if (barCp)  barCp.style.width  = pct(cpSize);
   220:     if (barCat) barCat.style.width = pct(catSize);
   221:     if (barSch) barSch.style.width = pct(schSize);
   222:   }
   223: 
   224:   // ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   225:   window._cacheUI = {
   226: 
   227:     dismissBanner: function() {
   228:       var soft = el('ss-cache-banner-soft');
   229:       if (soft) {
   230:         soft.classList.add('toast-hiding');
   231:         setTimeout(function() {
   232:           if (soft) { soft.style.display = 'none'; soft.classList.remove('toast-hiding'); }
   233:         }, 200);
   234:       }
   235:     },
   236: 
   237:     dismissModal: function() {
   238:       var modal = el('ss-cache-modal');
   239:       if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
   240:     },
   241: 
   242:     startSync: function(fromModal) {
   243:       if (_isSyncing) return;
   244:       _isSyncing = true;
   245: 
   246:       if (fromModal) {
   247:         var modal = el('ss-cache-modal');
   248:         if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
   249:       }
   250: 
   251:       if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') {
   252:         _isSyncing = false;
   253:         return;
   254:       }
   255: 
   256:       var bundleIds = (_pendingOutdated.length > 0
   257:         ? _pendingOutdated.map(function(o) { return o.id; })
   258:         : ['connect_plus', 'parts_number', 'catalog', 'qb_schema']
   259:       ).filter(function(id, i, a) { return a.indexOf(id) === i; });
   260: 
   261:       window.StudioCache.fetchServerManifest(true).then(function(manifest) {
   262:         return window.StudioCache.syncBundles(bundleIds, manifest || { bundles: {} });
   263:       }).catch(function(err) {
   264:         console.warn('[CacheUI] sync error:', err.message);
   265:         _isSyncing = false;
   266:         hideBannerAndProgress();
   267:       });
   268:     },
   269: 
   270:     syncAll: function() {
   271:       _pendingOutdated = [
   272:         { id: 'connect_plus' }, { id: 'parts_number' }, { id: 'catalog' }, { id: 'qb_schema' }
   273:       ];
   274:       this.startSync(false);
   275:     },
   276: 
   277:     syncOne: function(bundleId) {
   278:       _pendingOutdated = [{ id: bundleId }];
   279:       this.startSync(false);
   280:     },
   281: 
   282:     clearAllConfirm: function() {
   283:       if (!confirm('Clear all cached data? Connect+ and Catalog will reload from network on next visit.')) return;
   284:       if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') return;
   285:       window.StudioCache.clearAll().then(function() {
   286:         refreshPanel();
   287:         var msgEl = el('cache-manager-msg');
   288:         if (msgEl) {
   289:           msgEl.textContent = '✓ All cache cleared.';
   290:           msgEl.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;opacity:1;color:#3fb950;font-weight:600;';
   291:           clearTimeout(msgEl._t);
   292:           msgEl._t = setTimeout(function() { msgEl.style.opacity = '0'; }, 3000);
   293:         }
   294:       });
   295:     },
   296: 
   297:     refreshPanel: refreshPanel,
   298:   };
   299: 
   300:   // ── Listen to StudioCache events ──────────────────────────────────
   301:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:firstrun', function(e) {
   302:     // First time — auto-download everything silently in background
   303:     if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') return;
   304:     _pendingManifest = e.detail.serverManifest;
   305:     _pendingOutdated = [
   306:       { id: 'connect_plus' }, { id: 'parts_number' }, { id: 'catalog' }, { id: 'qb_schema' }
   307:     ];
   308:     // Don't show banner on first run — silent background download
   309:     window.StudioCache.syncBundles(['connect_plus', 'parts_number', 'catalog', 'qb_schema'], e.detail.serverManifest || { bundles: {} })
   310:       .catch(function(err) { console.warn('[CacheUI] firstrun sync failed:', err.message); });
   311:   });
   312: 
   313:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:update', function(e) {
   314:     showSoftBanner(e.detail.outdated, e.detail.serverManifest);
   315:     beaconSetState('stale');
   316:     beaconRefreshPopup(e.detail.outdated, []);
   317:     autoSyncOutdated();
   318:   });
   319: 
   320:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:critical', function(e) {
   321:     showCriticalModal(e.detail.critical, e.detail.outdated, e.detail.serverManifest);
   322:     beaconSetState('critical');
   323:     beaconRefreshPopup(e.detail.outdated, e.detail.critical);
   324:   });
   325: 
   326:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:progress', function(e) {
   327:     var d = e.detail;
   328:     showProgress(d.bundleId, d.bundlePct, d.overallDone, d.overallTotal);
   329:     beaconSetState('syncing');
   330:     var syncLabel = document.getElementById('bp-sync-label');
   331:     var syncIcon  = document.getElementById('bp-sync-icon');
   332:     var syncBtn   = document.getElementById('bp-sync-btn');
   333:     if (syncLabel) syncLabel.textContent = 'Syncing…';
   334:     if (syncIcon)  syncIcon.className    = 'fas fa-spinner fa-spin';
   335:     if (syncBtn)   syncBtn.disabled      = true;
   336:     var bpSub = document.getElementById('bp-sub');
   337:     if (bpSub) bpSub.textContent = 'Downloading ' + (d.bundleId || '') + ' (' + (d.bundlePct || 0) + '%)…';
   338:   });
   339: 
   340:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:synccomplete', function() {
   341:     hideBannerAndProgress();
   342:     refreshPanel();
   343:     beaconSetState('fresh');
   344:     beaconRefreshPopup([], []);
   345:     var syncLabel = document.getElementById('bp-sync-label');
   346:     var syncIcon  = document.getElementById('bp-sync-icon');
   347:     var syncBtn   = document.getElementById('bp-sync-btn');
   348:     if (syncLabel) syncLabel.textContent = 'Sync All';
   349:     if (syncIcon)  syncIcon.className    = 'fas fa-sync-alt';
   350:     if (syncBtn)   syncBtn.disabled      = false;
   351:     // Reload Connect+ data from fresh cache if tab is open
   352:     if (typeof window._cpRefresh === 'function' &&
   353:         document.getElementById('left-panel-connectplus') &&
   354:         document.getElementById('left-panel-connectplus').style.display !== 'none') {
   355:       window._cpRefresh();
   356:     }
   357:     // Reload Parts Number data from fresh cache if tab is open
   358:     if (typeof window._pnRefresh === 'function' &&
   359:         document.getElementById('left-panel-parts_number') &&
   360:         document.getElementById('left-panel-parts_number').style.display !== 'none') {
   361:       window._pnRefresh();
   362:     }
   363:   });
   364: 
   365:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:fresh', function(e) {
   366:     beaconSetState('fresh');
   367:     beaconRefreshPopup([], []);
   368:   });
   369: 
   370:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:firstrun', function(e) {
   371:     beaconSetState('syncing');
   372:   });
   373: 
   374:   window.addEventListener('studiocache:bundleerror', function(e) {
   375:     console.warn('[CacheUI] bundle error:', e.detail.bundleId, e.detail.error);
   376:   });
   377: 
   378:   // ── Beacon state controller ───────────────────────────────────────
   379:   function beaconSetState(state) {
   380:     var b = document.getElementById('ss-cache-beacon');
   381:     if (b) b.setAttribute('data-state', state);
   382:   }
   383: 
   384:   // ── Beacon popup content refresh ─────────────────────────────────
   385:   function _fmtAgo(ms) {
   386:     var m = Math.round(ms / 60000);
   387:     if (m < 2)  return 'just now';
   388:     if (m < 60) return m + 'm ago';
   389:     var h = Math.round(m / 60);
   390:     if (h < 24) return h + 'h ago';
   391:     return Math.round(h / 24) + 'd ago';
   392:   }
   393: 
   394:   function beaconRefreshPopup(outdated, critical) {
   395:     if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') return;
   396: 
   397:     var outdatedIds = (outdated  || []).map(function(o) { return o.id; });
   398:     var criticalIds = (critical  || []).map(function(o) { return o.id; });
   399: 
   400:     window.StudioCache.getStats().then(function(stats) {
   401:       var allFresh = true;
   402:       var bpSub    = document.getElementById('bp-sub');
   403: 
   404:       ['connect_plus','parts_number','catalog','qb_schema'].forEach(function(id) {
   405:         var stat    = stats[id];
   406:         var metaEl  = document.getElementById('bp-meta-' + id);
   407:         var tagEl   = document.getElementById('bp-tag-' + id);
   408:         if (!metaEl || !tagEl) return;
   409: 
   410:         if (!stat || !stat.cached) {
   411:           metaEl.textContent = 'Not downloaded yet';
   412:           tagEl.textContent  = 'None';
   413:           tagEl.className    = 'bp-tag bp-tag-none';
   414:           allFresh = false;
   415:           return;
   416:         }
   417: 
   418:         metaEl.textContent = (stat.count || 0).toLocaleString() + ' records · ' + _fmtAgo(stat.ageMs);
   419: 
   420:         if (criticalIds.indexOf(id) >= 0) {
   421:           tagEl.textContent = '⚠ Critical';
   422:           tagEl.className   = 'bp-tag bp-tag-critical';
   423:           allFresh = false;
   424:         } else if (outdatedIds.indexOf(id) >= 0 || stat.expired) {
   425:           tagEl.textContent = 'Update';
   426:           tagEl.className   = 'bp-tag bp-tag-stale';
   427:           allFresh = false;
   428:         } else {
   429:           tagEl.textContent = '✓ Fresh';
   430:           tagEl.className   = 'bp-tag bp-tag-fresh';
   431:         }
   432:       });
   433: 
   434:       if (bpSub) {
   435:         bpSub.textContent = allFresh
   436:           ? 'All data current · Last check: just now'
   437:           : (criticalIds.length > 0 ? 'Critical update required' : 'Update available');
   438:       }
   439: 
   440:       // Update beacon head icon color
   441:       var ico = document.getElementById('bp-head-ico');
   442:       if (ico) {
   443:         var col = allFresh ? '#3fb950' : (criticalIds.length > 0 ? '#f85149' : '#d29922');
   444:         ico.style.background   = 'rgba(' + (allFresh ? '63,185,80' : (criticalIds.length > 0 ? '248,81,73' : '210,153,34')) + ',.1)';
   445:         ico.style.borderColor  = 'rgba(' + (allFresh ? '63,185,80' : (criticalIds.length > 0 ? '248,81,73' : '210,153,34')) + ',.2)';
   446:         ico.querySelector('i').style.color = col;
   447:       }
   448:     }).catch(function() {});
   449:   }
   450: 
   451:   // ── Beacon toggle / close ─────────────────────────────────────────
   452:   window._beaconToggle = function() {
   453:     var popup = document.getElementById('ss-beacon-popup');
   454:     if (!popup) return;
   455:     var isOpen = popup.classList.contains('open');
   456:     if (isOpen) {
   457:       popup.classList.remove('open');
   458:     } else {
   459:       popup.classList.add('open');
   460:       beaconRefreshPopup([], []);
   461:     }
   462:   };
   463: 
   464:   window._beaconClose = function() {
   465:     var popup = document.getElementById('ss-beacon-popup');
   466:     if (popup) popup.classList.remove('open');
   467:   };
   468: 
   469:   window._beaconSync = function() {
   470:     window._beaconClose();
   471:     if (window._cacheUI) window._cacheUI.syncAll();
   472:   };
   473: 
   474:   // Close popup on outside click
   475:   document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   476:     if (!e.target.closest('#ss-beacon-popup') &&
   477:         !e.target.closest('#ss-cache-beacon')) {
   478:       window._beaconClose();
   479:     }
   480:   });
   481: 
   482:   // ── Boot: run check on page load (after 2s to not block initial render) ──
   483:   function _bootCacheCheck() {
   484:     if (typeof window.StudioCache === 'undefined') return;
   485:     window.StudioCache.startAutoCheck();
   486:     setTimeout(function() {
   487:       window.StudioCache.checkForUpdates(false).catch(function(err) {
   488:         console.warn('[StudioCache] boot check failed:', err.message);
   489:       });
   490:     }, 2000);
   491:   }
   492: 
   493:   if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
   494:     document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', _bootCacheCheck);
   495:   } else {
   496:     _bootCacheCheck();
   497:   }
   498: 
   499: })();

    38:       el.classList.remove('active'));

    42:       window._catInit();

    56:         window._kbLoadSettings();

    60:       // Guard: _qbsInit is defined in a later script block

    62:       else setTimeout(function() { if (typeof window._qbsInit === 'function') window._qbsInit(); }, 200);
    63:     }

    66:     }
    67:     if (contentTarget === 'parts_number') {
    68:       if (typeof window._pnInit === 'function') window._pnInit();
    69:     }

    71:       if (typeof window._ctiInit === 'function') window._ctiInit();

    74:       if (typeof window._kbInit === 'function') window._kbInit();

    77:       if (typeof window._srInit === 'function') window._srInit();

   103:   const qbMenu = document.getElementById('ss-quickbase-menu');

   105:   const qbDropdown = document.getElementById('ss-quickbase-dropdown');
   106:   function positionQuickbaseMenu() {
   107:     if (!qbTrigger || !qbDropdown) return;
   108:     const r = qbTrigger.getBoundingClientRect();
   109:     const menuWidth = Math.max(188, Math.round(r.width));
   110:     const top = Math.round(r.bottom + 6);
   111:     const maxLeft = Math.max(8, window.innerWidth - menuWidth - 8);
   112:     const left = Math.max(8, Math.min(Math.round(r.left), maxLeft));
   113:     qbDropdown.style.top = top + 'px';
   114:     qbDropdown.style.left = left + 'px';
   115:     qbDropdown.style.minWidth = menuWidth + 'px';
   116:   }
   117:   function closeQuickbaseMenu() {
   118:     if (!qbMenu || !qbTrigger) return;

   120:     qbTrigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
   121:   }
   122:   if (qbMenu && qbTrigger) {
   123:     qbTrigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   124:       e.preventDefault();
   125:       e.stopPropagation();
   126:       const willOpen = !qbMenu.classList.contains('open');
   127:       qbMenu.classList.toggle('open', willOpen);
   128:       qbTrigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', willOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
   129:       if (willOpen) positionQuickbaseMenu();
   130:     });
   131:     document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   132:       if (!qbMenu.contains(e.target)) closeQuickbaseMenu();
   133:     });
   134:     document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
   135:       if (e.key === 'Escape') closeQuickbaseMenu();
   136:     });
   137:     window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
   138:       if (qbMenu.classList.contains('open')) positionQuickbaseMenu();
   139:     });
   140:     window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
   141:       if (qbMenu.classList.contains('open')) positionQuickbaseMenu();
   142:     }, true);
   143:     qbMenu.querySelectorAll('.ss-tab').forEach(function(tabBtn) {
   144:       tabBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { closeQuickbaseMenu(); });
   145:     });
   146:   }
