   197: 
   198:   // ── Call Widget + Call Information — Supabase-backed, per-user ───────────
   199:   // Notes are stored server-side (/api/studio/call_notes) keyed by user ID,
   200:   // so they survive cross-device login. localStorage is a write-back cache only.
   201:   const CI_KEY = 'mums_ss_call_notes_cache'; // local cache key (not source of truth)
   202:   var _ciNotesMemory = null;  // in-memory cache
   203:   var _ciNotesLoaded = false; // flag: have we fetched from Supabase yet?
   204: 
   205:   // ── BUG FIX: editing state tracker ───────────────────────────────────────
   206:   // -1 = new note; >= 0 = index of note being edited
   207:   var _ciEditingIdx = -1;
   208: 
   209:   // ── Auth token helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   210:   function _ciGetToken() {
   211:     try {
   212:       var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
   213:       if (raw) { var p = JSON.parse(raw); var t = p && (p.access_token || (p.session && p.session.access_token)); if (t) return String(t); }
   214:       if (window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') { var t2 = window.CloudAuth.accessToken(); if (t2) return t2; }
   215:     } catch(_) {}
   216:     return '';
   217:   }
   218: 
   219:   // ── Load from Supabase (on first open) ────────────────────────────────────
   220:   function loadCallNotes() {
   221:     if (_ciNotesMemory !== null) return _ciNotesMemory.slice();
   222:     try { var raw = localStorage.getItem(CI_KEY); if (raw) { _ciNotesMemory = JSON.parse(raw) || []; return _ciNotesMemory.slice(); } } catch(_) {}
   223:     _ciNotesMemory = [];
   224:     return [];
   225:   }
   226: 
   227:   function _ciFetchFromServer() {
   228:     if (_ciNotesLoaded) return;
   229:     var tok = _ciGetToken();
   230:     if (!tok) return;
   231:     fetch('/api/studio/call_notes', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok } })
   232:       .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
   233:       .then(function(d) {
   234:         if (d && d.ok && Array.isArray(d.notes)) {
   235:           _ciNotesMemory = d.notes;
   236:           _ciNotesLoaded = true;
   237:           try { localStorage.setItem(CI_KEY, JSON.stringify(d.notes)); } catch(_) {}
   238:           renderRecentNotes();
   239:         }
   240:       }).catch(function() {});
   241:   }
   242: 
   243:   // ── Save to Supabase (async, fire-and-forget with local cache update) ─────
   244:   function saveCallNotes(notes) {
   245:     _ciNotesMemory = notes.slice(0, 200);
   246:     try { localStorage.setItem(CI_KEY, JSON.stringify(_ciNotesMemory)); } catch(_) {}
   247:     var tok = _ciGetToken();
   248:     if (!tok) return;
   249:     fetch('/api/studio/call_notes', {
   250:       method: 'POST',
   251:       headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok },
   252:       body: JSON.stringify({ notes: _ciNotesMemory })
   253:     }).catch(function() {});
   254:   }
   255: 
   256:   /* ── Helper: read all CI field values ────────────────────────────── */
   257:   function _ciReadFields() {
   258:     function v(id) { var e = document.getElementById(id); return e ? e.value.trim() : ''; }
   259:     return {
   260:       callerName:    v('ci-caller-name'),
   261:       company:       v('ci-company'),
   262:       contactNumber: v('ci-contact-number'),
   263:       endUser:       v('ci-end-user'),
   264:       caseNum:       v('ci-case-num'),
   265:       issue:         v('ci-issue'),
   266:       notes:         v('ci-notes'),
   267:       product:       v('ci-product'),
   268:       status:        v('ci-status'),
   269:       ticket:        v('ci-ticket'),
   270:       caseStatus:    (document.getElementById('ci-case-status-badge') || {}).textContent || '',
   271:       shortDesc:     v('ci-short-desc'),
   272:       detailDesc:    v('ci-detail-desc'),
   273:       actionTaken:   v('ci-action-taken'),
   274:     };
   275:   }
   276: 
   277:   /* ── Helper: populate CI fields from a saved note ────────────────── */
   278:   function _ciPopulateFields(n) {
   279:     function s(id, val) { var e = document.getElementById(id); if (e) e.value = val || ''; }
   280:     s('ci-caller-name',    n.callerName);
   281:     s('ci-company',        n.company);
   282:     s('ci-contact-number', n.contactNumber);
   283:     s('ci-end-user',       n.endUser);
   284:     s('ci-case-num',       n.caseNum);
   285:     s('ci-issue',          n.issue);
   286:     s('ci-notes',          n.notes);
   287:     s('ci-product',        n.product);
   288:     s('ci-status',         n.status);
   289:     s('ci-ticket',         n.ticket);
   290:     s('ci-short-desc',     n.shortDesc);
   291:     s('ci-detail-desc',    n.detailDesc);
   292:     s('ci-action-taken',   n.actionTaken);
   293:     // Restore QB status badge if stored
   294:     var badge = document.getElementById('ci-case-status-badge');
   295:     if (badge) {
   296:       if (n.caseStatus) {
   297:         badge.textContent = n.caseStatus;
   298:         badge.style.display = '';
   299:         _ciStyleStatusBadge(badge, n.caseStatus);
   300:       } else {
   301:         badge.style.display = 'none';
   302:         badge.textContent = '';
   303:       }
   304:     }
   305:   }
   306: 
   307:   function _ciStyleStatusBadge(badge, statusText) {
   308:     var s = (statusText || '').toLowerCase();
   309:     var color = '#58a6ff'; // default blue
   310:     if (s.includes('invest'))  color = '#58a6ff';
   311:     else if (s.includes('init'))    color = '#d29922';
   312:     else if (s.includes('wait'))    color = '#a25ddc';
   313:     else if (s.includes('resolv'))  color = '#3fb950';
   314:     else if (s.includes('close') || s.includes('soft')) color = '#7d8590';
   315:     badge.style.background    = 'rgba(' + (color === '#58a6ff' ? '88,166,255' : color === '#d29922' ? '210,153,34' : color === '#a25ddc' ? '162,93,220' : color === '#3fb950' ? '63,185,80' : '125,133,144') + ',.12)';
   316:     badge.style.borderColor   = color + '55';
   317:     badge.style.color         = color;
   318:   }
   319: 
   320:   /* ── QB Case# Status Lookup — debounced ───────────────────────────── */
   321:   var _ciCaseLookupTimer = null;
   322:   window._ciCaseLookup = function(val) {
   323:     var badge = document.getElementById('ci-case-status-badge');
   324:     var spin  = document.getElementById('ci-case-lookup-spin');
   325:     clearTimeout(_ciCaseLookupTimer);
   326:     var q = String(val || '').trim();
   327:     if (!q) {
   328:       if (badge) { badge.style.display = 'none'; badge.textContent = ''; }
   329:       if (spin)  spin.style.display = 'none';
   330:       return;
   331:     }
   332:     if (spin) spin.style.display = '';
   333:     if (badge) badge.style.display = 'none';
   334:     _ciCaseLookupTimer = setTimeout(function() {
   335:       var tok = _ciGetToken();
   336:       if (!tok) { if (spin) spin.style.display = 'none'; return; }
   337:       fetch('/api/studio/qb_search?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q) + '&skip=0&top=10', {
   338:         headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok }
   339:       })
   340:       .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
   341:       .then(function(d) {
   342:         if (spin) spin.style.display = 'none';
   343:         if (!d.ok || !Array.isArray(d.records) || !d.records.length) return;
   344:         // Find exact match: recordId === query (case-insensitive / trimmed)
   345:         var match = d.records.find(function(r) {
   346:           return String(r.qbRecordId || '').trim() === q ||
   347:                  String(r.qbRecordId || '').trim().toLowerCase() === q.toLowerCase();
   348:         }) || d.records[0];
   349:         if (!match || !match.fields || !match.columnMap) return;
   350:         // Extract case status value from fields
   351:         var statusFid = Object.keys(match.columnMap).find(function(id) {
   352:           return (match.columnMap[id] || '').toLowerCase().includes('case status') ||
   353:                  (match.columnMap[id] || '').toLowerCase() === 'status';
   354:         });
   355:         if (!statusFid) return;
   356:         var statusVal = match.fields[statusFid];
   357:         var statusText = (statusVal && statusVal.value != null) ? String(statusVal.value) : String(statusVal || '');
   358:         if (!statusText) return;
   359:         if (badge) {
   360:           badge.textContent = statusText;
   361:           badge.style.display = '';
   362:           _ciStyleStatusBadge(badge, statusText);
   363:         }
   364:       })
   365:       .catch(function() { if (spin) spin.style.display = 'none'; });
   366:     }, 700);
   367:   };
   368: 
   369:   /* ── Sidebar mini-list ───────────────────────────────── */
   370:   function renderRecentNotes() {
   371:     var list = document.getElementById('ci-recent-list');
   372:     if (!list) return;
   373:     var notes = loadCallNotes();
   374:     if (!notes.length) {
   375:       list.innerHTML = '<div class="ss-empty-note" style="padding:8px 0;font-size:10px;">No saved notes yet.</div>';
   376:       return;
   377:     }
   378:     list.innerHTML = notes.slice(0, 5).map(function(n, i) {
   379:       var dt = new Date(n.savedAt || Date.now());
   380:       var timeStr = dt.toLocaleDateString('en-PH',{month:'short',day:'numeric'}) + ' ' +
   381:                     dt.toLocaleTimeString('en-PH',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
   382:       var durBadge = n.callDuration ? '<span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:8px;font-weight:800;color:#f85149;font-family:var(--ss-font);background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;flex-shrink:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;"><i class="fas fa-phone-volume" style="font-size:7px;"></i>' + n.callDuration + '</span>' : '';
   383:       var statusDot = n.caseStatus ? '<span style="font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:#58a6ff;margin-left:4px;">' + escHtml(n.caseStatus) + '</span>' : '';
   384:       return '<div class="ci-note-card" data-idx="' + i + '" onclick="window._ciLoadNote(' + i + ')" style="cursor:pointer;">' +
   385:         '<div class="ci-note-time" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">' + timeStr + statusDot + durBadge + '</div>' +
   386:         '<div class="ci-note-caller">' + escHtml(n.callerName || '(no name)') + (n.caseNum ? ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; #' + escHtml(n.caseNum) : '') + '</div>' +
   387:         '<div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--ss-muted);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">' + escHtml(n.shortDesc || n.endUser || '—') + '</div>' +
   388:         '</div>';
   389:     }).join('');
   390:   }
   391: 
   392:   // ── BUG FIX 1: _ciLoadNote — NO timer start when editing a saved note ─────
   393:   window._ciLoadNote = function(idx) {
   394:     var notes = loadCallNotes();
   395:     var n = notes[idx];
   396:     if (!n) return;
   397:     _ciEditingIdx = idx; // track which note we're editing
   398:     _ciPopulateFields(n);
   399:     // Show "EDITING" badge
   400:     var eb = document.getElementById('ci-edit-badge');
   401:     if (eb) eb.style.display = '';
   402:     // Re-open Call Information — but DO NOT start the timer (fix for timer bug)
   403:     _cwShowCallInfo();
   404:     // _cwStartTimer() is intentionally NOT called here — timer only runs for live calls
   405:   };
   406: 
   407:   /* ── BUG FIX 2 + 3: Save — updates existing note when editing, required fields ── */
   408:   window._ciSaveNote = function() {
   409:     var fields = _ciReadFields();
   410:     // Required field validation
   411:     var required = [
   412:       { key: 'callerName',    label: 'Caller Name' },
   413:       { key: 'contactNumber', label: 'Contact Number' },
   414:       { key: 'endUser',       label: 'End User' },
   415:       { key: 'shortDesc',     label: 'Short Description' },
   416:       { key: 'detailDesc',    label: 'Detailed Description' },
   417:       { key: 'actionTaken',   label: 'Action Taken' },
   418:     ];
   419:     var missing = required.filter(function(r) { return !fields[r.key]; });
   420:     var reqMsg = document.getElementById('ci-req-msg');
   421:     if (missing.length) {
   422:       if (reqMsg) {
   423:         reqMsg.textContent = '✗ Required: ' + missing.map(function(r){return r.label;}).join(', ');
   424:         reqMsg.style.opacity = '1';
   425:         clearTimeout(reqMsg._t);
   426:         reqMsg._t = setTimeout(function() { reqMsg.style.opacity = '0'; }, 4000);
   427:       }
   428:       return;
   429:     }
   430:     if (reqMsg) reqMsg.style.opacity = '0';
   431: 
   432:     // Capture duration BEFORE stopping (only meaningful for live new calls)
   433:     var durSecs  = _cwCallStartTime ? Math.floor((Date.now() - _cwCallStartTime) / 1000) : 0;
   434:     var durLabel = durSecs > 0 ? _cwFmtTime(durSecs) : null;
   435: 
   436:     var note = {
   437:       callerName:    fields.callerName,
   438:       company:       fields.company,
   439:       contactNumber: fields.contactNumber,
   440:       endUser:       fields.endUser,
   441:       caseNum:       fields.caseNum,
   442:       issue:         fields.issue,
   443:       notes:         fields.notes,
   444:       product:       fields.product,
   445:       status:        fields.status,
   446:       ticket:        fields.ticket,
   447:       caseStatus:    fields.caseStatus,
   448:       shortDesc:     fields.shortDesc,
   449:       detailDesc:    fields.detailDesc,
   450:       actionTaken:   fields.actionTaken,
   451:       callDuration:  _ciEditingIdx >= 0
   452:                        ? (loadCallNotes()[_ciEditingIdx] || {}).callDuration || null
   453:                        : durLabel,   // preserve original duration when editing
   454:       savedAt:       new Date().toISOString(),
   455:     };
   456: 
   457:     var all = loadCallNotes();
   458:     if (_ciEditingIdx >= 0 && _ciEditingIdx < all.length) {
   459:       // ── BUG FIX 2: UPDATE existing note in-place instead of unshift ──
   460:       all[_ciEditingIdx] = note;
   461:     } else {
   462:       // ── New note: prepend ──
   463:       all.unshift(note);
   464:       // Only stop the live call timer for new notes, not edits
   465:       if (_cwCallStartTime) _cwStopTimer();
   466:     }
   467:     _ciEditingIdx = -1; // reset edit state
   468: 
   469:     saveCallNotes(all);
   470:     renderRecentNotes();
   471: 
   472:     // Hide EDITING badge
   473:     var eb = document.getElementById('ci-edit-badge');
   474:     if (eb) eb.style.display = 'none';
   475: 
   476:     // Show success message
   477:     var ciMsg = document.getElementById('ci-save-msg');
   478:     if (ciMsg) {
   479:       var durationTxt = note.callDuration ? ' (' + note.callDuration + ')' : '';
   480:       ciMsg.textContent = '✓ Note saved!' + durationTxt;
   481:       ciMsg.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#3fb950;text-align:center;margin-top:4px;opacity:1;transition:opacity .4s;';
   482:       clearTimeout(ciMsg._t);
   483:       ciMsg._t = setTimeout(function() { ciMsg.style.opacity = '0'; }, 2500);
   484:     }
   485: 
   486:     // Close panel after short delay
   487:     setTimeout(function() { _cwHideCallInfo(); }, 900);
   488:   };
   489: 
   490:   window._ciClearForm = function() {
   491:     ['ci-caller-name','ci-company','ci-contact-number','ci-end-user',
   492:      'ci-case-num','ci-issue','ci-notes','ci-product','ci-status','ci-ticket',
   493:      'ci-short-desc','ci-detail-desc','ci-action-taken'].forEach(function(id) {
   494:       var el = document.getElementById(id);
   495:       if (el) el.value = '';
   496:     });
   497:     var badge = document.getElementById('ci-case-status-badge');
   498:     if (badge) { badge.style.display = 'none'; badge.textContent = ''; }
   499:     var eb = document.getElementById('ci-edit-badge');
   500:     if (eb) eb.style.display = 'none';
   501:     _ciEditingIdx = -1;
   502:   };
   503: 
   504:   /* ── Premium Notes Panel ────────────────────────────── */
   505:   function buildNpCard(n, idx) {
   506:     var dt      = new Date(n.savedAt || Date.now());
   507:     var dateStr = dt.toLocaleDateString('en-PH',{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});
   508:     var timeStr = dt.toLocaleTimeString('en-PH',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
   509:     var sc      = '#58a6ff';
   510:     if (n.caseStatus) {
   511:       var sl = n.caseStatus.toLowerCase();
   512:       if (sl.includes('invest')) sc = '#58a6ff';
   513:       else if (sl.includes('init'))   sc = '#d29922';
   514:       else if (sl.includes('wait'))   sc = '#a25ddc';
   515:       else if (sl.includes('resolv')) sc = '#3fb950';
   516:       else if (sl.includes('close') || sl.includes('soft')) sc = '#7d8590';
   517:     }
   518:     var hasCaller = n.callerName || n.caseNum;
   519:     var fields = [
   520:       ['Company',      n.company],
   521:       ['Contact #',    n.contactNumber],
   522:       ['End User',     n.endUser],
   523:       ['Case #',       n.caseNum ? (n.caseNum + (n.caseStatus ? '  ·  ' + n.caseStatus : '')) : ''],
   524:       ['Issue',        n.issue],
   525:       ['Notes',        n.notes],
   526:       ['Product',      n.product],
   527:       ['Status',       n.status],
   528:       ['Ticket',       n.ticket],
   529:       ['Short Desc',   n.shortDesc],
   530:       ['Details',      n.detailDesc],
   531:       ['Action Taken', n.actionTaken],
   532:       ['Duration',     n.callDuration],
   533:     ].filter(function(f){ return f[1]; });
   534: 
   535:     return '<div class="ci-np-card" style="background:rgba(13,17,23,.9);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 20px;transition:border-color .18s;cursor:default;" ' +
   536:       'data-npidx="' + idx + '">' +
   537:       '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">' +
   538:         '<div>' +
   539:           (hasCaller ? '<div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#e6edf3;">' + escHtml(n.callerName || '(no name)') + (n.caseNum ? '<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ss-muted);margin-left:8px;">#' + escHtml(n.caseNum) + '</span>' : '') + '</div>' : '') +
   540:           '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--ss-muted);margin-top:2px;">' + escHtml(dateStr) + ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; ' + escHtml(timeStr) + '</div>' +
   541:         '</div>' +
   542:         '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;">' +
   543:           (n.callDuration ? '<span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.25);background:rgba(248,81,73,.1);color:#f85149;font-family:var(--ss-mono,monospace);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><i class=\'fas fa-clock\' style=\'font-size:8px;\'></i>' + escHtml(n.callDuration) + '</span>' : '') +
   544:           (n.caseStatus ? '<span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:800;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid ' + sc + '30;background:' + sc + '18;color:' + sc + ';">' + escHtml(n.caseStatus) + '</span>' : '') +
   545:           '<button onclick="window._ciLoadNoteAndClose(' + idx + ')" style="background:rgba(88,166,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(88,166,255,.25);border-radius:6px;color:#58a6ff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--ss-font);white-space:nowrap;">Load</button>' +
   546:           '<button onclick="window._ciDeleteNote(' + idx + ')" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.06);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:6px;color:#f85149;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--ss-font);" title="Delete note"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button>' +
   547:         '</div>' +
   548:       '</div>' +
   549:       (fields.length ? '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">' +
   550:         fields.map(function(f) {
   551:           return '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">' +
   552:             '<span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--ss-muted);padding-top:2px;flex-shrink:0;width:66px;">' + escHtml(f[0]) + '</span>' +
   553:             '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ss-text);line-height:1.5;word-break:break-word;">' + escHtml(f[1]) + '</span>' +
   554:           '</div>';
   555:         }).join('') +
   556:       '</div>' : '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ss-muted);opacity:.4;">No additional details</div>') +
   557:       '</div>';
   558:   }
   559: 
   560:   function escHtml(s) {
   561:     return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
   562:   }
   563: 
   564:   function buildNpStats(notes) {
   565:     var total  = notes.length;
   566:     var invest = notes.filter(function(n){return (n.caseStatus||'').toLowerCase().includes('invest');}).length;
   567:     var wait   = notes.filter(function(n){return (n.caseStatus||'').toLowerCase().includes('wait');}).length;
   568:     var res    = notes.filter(function(n){return (n.caseStatus||'').toLowerCase().includes('resolv') || (n.caseStatus||'').toLowerCase().includes('close');}).length;
   569:     var stats  = [
   570:       {label:'Total',        val:total,  color:'#58a6ff'},
   571:       {label:'Investigating',val:invest, color:'#58a6ff'},
   572:       {label:'Waiting',      val:wait,   color:'#a25ddc'},
   573:       {label:'Resolved',     val:res,    color:'#3fb950'},
   574:     ];
   575:     return stats.map(function(s) {
   576:       return '<div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;">' +
   577:         '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:' + s.color + ';">' + s.val + '</div>' +
   578:         '<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ss-muted);">' + s.label + '</div>' +
   579:       '</div>';
   580:     }).join('');
   581:   }
   582: 
   583:   function renderNpGrid(filter) {
   584:     var notes   = loadCallNotes();
   585:     var q       = (filter||'').toLowerCase().trim();
   586:     var filtered = q ? notes.filter(function(n) {
   587:       return (n.callerName    ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   588:              (n.company       ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   589:              (n.contactNumber ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   590:              (n.endUser       ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   591:              (n.caseNum       ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   592:              (n.caseStatus    ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   593:              (n.issue         ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   594:              (n.notes         ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   595:              (n.product       ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   596:              (n.status        ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   597:              (n.ticket        ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   598:              (n.shortDesc     ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   599:              (n.detailDesc    ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   600:              (n.actionTaken   ||'').toLowerCase().includes(q);
   601:     }) : notes;
   602: 
   603:     var grid    = document.getElementById('ci-np-grid');
   604:     var empty   = document.getElementById('ci-np-empty');
   605:     var subtitle = document.getElementById('ci-np-subtitle');
   606:     if (!grid) return;
   607: 
   608:     if (subtitle) subtitle.textContent = filtered.length + ' note' + (filtered.length!==1?'s':'') + ' saved';
   609:     if (!filtered.length) {
   610:       grid.innerHTML  = '';
   611:       if (empty) empty.style.display = 'block';
   612:       return;
   613:     }
   614:     if (empty) empty.style.display = 'none';
   615:     grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(function(n, i) {
   616:       // Use original index for load/delete
   617:       var origIdx = notes.indexOf(n);
   618:       return buildNpCard(n, origIdx);
   619:     }).join('');
   620:   }
   621: 
   622:   window._ciNpFilter = function(val) { renderNpGrid(val); };
   623: 
   624:   window._ciOpenNotesPanel = function() {
   625:     var panel = document.getElementById('ci-notes-panel');
   626:     if (!panel) return;
   627:     var stats = document.getElementById('ci-np-stats');
   628:     var notes = loadCallNotes();
   629:     if (stats) stats.innerHTML = buildNpStats(notes);
   630:     var searchEl = document.getElementById('ci-np-search');
   631:     if (searchEl) searchEl.value = '';
   632:     renderNpGrid('');
   633:     panel.style.display = 'block';
   634:     // Close on backdrop click
   635:     panel.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === panel || e.target.parentElement === panel) window._ciCloseNotesPanel(); };
   636:   };
   637: 
   638:   window._ciCloseNotesPanel = function() {
   639:     var panel = document.getElementById('ci-notes-panel');
   640:     if (panel) panel.style.display = 'none';
   641:   };
   642: 
   643:   window._ciLoadNoteAndClose = function(idx) {
   644:     window._ciLoadNote(idx);  // _ciLoadNote already calls _cwShowCallInfo
   645:     window._ciCloseNotesPanel();
   646:   };
   647: 
   648:   window._ciDeleteNote = function(idx) {
   649:     if (!confirm('Delete this note?')) return;
   650:     var all = loadCallNotes();
   651:     all.splice(idx, 1);
   652:     saveCallNotes(all);
   653:     renderRecentNotes();
   654:     var stats = document.getElementById('ci-np-stats');
   655:     if (stats) stats.innerHTML = buildNpStats(loadCallNotes());
   656:     renderNpGrid(document.getElementById('ci-np-search') ? document.getElementById('ci-np-search').value : '');
   657:   };
   658: 
   659:   // Keyboard: Escape closes panel
   660:   document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
   661:     if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   662:       var panel = document.getElementById('ci-notes-panel');
   663:       if (panel && panel.style.display !== 'none') window._ciCloseNotesPanel();
   664:     }
   665:   });
   666: 
   667: 
   668:   var _ssNotesSidebarVisible = false;
   669:   var _ssRightSidebarMode = 'notes';
   670:   var _ssRightSidebarCollapsed = true;
   671: 
   672:   function _ssSyncMiniRail() {
   673:     var right = document.getElementById('ss-right-sidebar');
   674:     var notesBtn = document.getElementById('ss-mini-notes-btn');
   675:     var bookmarksBtn = document.getElementById('ss-mini-bookmarks-btn');
   676:     var collapseBtn = document.getElementById('ss-mini-collapse-btn');
   677:     if (!right) return;
   678: 
   679:     right.classList.toggle('ss-right-hidden', _ssRightSidebarCollapsed);
   680:     right.classList.toggle('ss-collapsed-notes', !_ssNotesSidebarVisible);
   681:     right.classList.toggle('ss-bookmarks-mode', _ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'bookmarks');
   682: 
   683:     if (notesBtn) notesBtn.classList.toggle('active', _ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'notes');
   684:     if (bookmarksBtn) bookmarksBtn.classList.toggle('active', _ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'bookmarks');
   685:     if (collapseBtn) {
   686:       collapseBtn.textContent = _ssRightSidebarCollapsed ? '<<' : '>>';
   687:       collapseBtn.title = _ssRightSidebarCollapsed ? 'Show right sidebar' : 'Collapse right sidebar';
   688:     }
   689: 
   690:     if (_ssRightSidebarCollapsed) return;
   691:     if (_ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'notes') renderRecentNotes();
   692:     if (_ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'bookmarks' && typeof window._ssRenderBookmarks === 'function') {
   693:       window._ssRenderBookmarks();
   694:     }
   695:   }
   696: 
   697:   window._ssToggleRightNotes = function() {
   698:     _ssRightSidebarCollapsed = false;
   699:     if (_ssNotesSidebarVisible && _ssRightSidebarMode === 'notes') {
   700:       _ssNotesSidebarVisible = false;
   701:     } else {
   702:       _ssNotesSidebarVisible = true;
   703:       _ssRightSidebarMode = 'notes';
   704:     }
   705:     _ssSyncMiniRail();
   706:   };
   707: 
   708:   window._ssOpenBookmarksPanel = function() {
   709:     _ssRightSidebarCollapsed = false;
   710:     _ssNotesSidebarVisible = true;
   711:     _ssRightSidebarMode = 'bookmarks';
   712:     if (typeof window._se2SetBookmarkFolderFilter === 'function') window._se2SetBookmarkFolderFilter('default');
   713:     _ssSyncMiniRail();
   714:     if (typeof window._se2EnsureBookmarksLoaded === 'function') window._se2EnsureBookmarksLoaded();
   715:   };
   716: 
   717:   window._ssToggleSidebarCollapse = function() {
   718:     _ssRightSidebarCollapsed = !_ssRightSidebarCollapsed;
   719:     _ssSyncMiniRail();
   720:   };
   721: 
   722:   // ── Call Widget & Timer ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   723:   // DESIGN:
   724:   //   • Recent Notes panel starts minimized.
   725:   //   • Call Information section slides open when widget is clicked → timer starts.
   726:   //   • Call widget auto-opens the right notes panel.
   727: 
   728:   var _cwCallStartTime = null;
   729:   var _cwTimerInterval = null;
   730: 
   731:   // ── FIX: Human-readable duration format ──────────────────────────────────
   732:   // "1m 27s" instead of "1:27" or "0:87" (which was the bug — seconds > 59 display)
   733:   function _cwFmtTime(secs) {
   734:     secs = Math.floor(Math.max(0, Number(secs) || 0));
   735:     var h = Math.floor(secs / 3600);
   736:     var m = Math.floor((secs % 3600) / 60);
   737:     var s = secs % 60;
   738:     if (h > 0) return h + 'h ' + m + 'm ' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s + 's';
   739:     if (m > 0) return m + 'm ' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s + 's';
   740:     return s + 's';
   741:   }
   742: 
   743:   // Badge label keeps compact format for the widget bubble: "1:27"
   744:   function _cwFmtBadge(secs) {
   745:     secs = Math.floor(Math.max(0, Number(secs) || 0));
   746:     var m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
   747:     var s = secs % 60;
   748:     return m + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s;
   749:   }
   750: 
   751:   function _cwUpdateDisplay() {
   752:     if (!_cwCallStartTime) return;
   753:     var elapsed = Math.floor((Date.now() - _cwCallStartTime) / 1000);
   754:     var disp  = document.getElementById('ci-timer-display');
   755:     var badge = document.getElementById('cw-timer-badge');
   756:     if (disp)  disp.textContent  = _cwFmtBadge(elapsed);
   757:     if (badge) badge.textContent = _cwFmtBadge(elapsed);
   758:   }
   759: 
   760:   function _cwShowCallInfo() {
   761:     var sec = document.getElementById('ci-call-info-section');
   762:     if (sec) sec.style.display = 'flex';
   763:     _ssRightSidebarCollapsed = false;
   764:     _ssNotesSidebarVisible = true;
   765:     _ssRightSidebarMode = 'notes';
   766:     _ssSyncMiniRail();
   767:   }
   768: 
   769:   function _cwHideCallInfo() {
   770:     var sec = document.getElementById('ci-call-info-section');
   771:     if (sec) sec.style.display = 'none';
   772:   }
   773: 
   774:   function _cwStartTimer() {
   775:     if (_cwTimerInterval) return;
   776:     _cwCallStartTime = _cwCallStartTime || Date.now();
   777:     _cwUpdateDisplay();
   778:     _cwTimerInterval = setInterval(_cwUpdateDisplay, 1000);
   779:     var bar = document.getElementById('ci-timer-bar');
   780:     if (bar) bar.classList.add('active');
   781:     var btn = document.getElementById('ss-call-widget-btn');
   782:     if (btn) btn.classList.add('call-active');
   783:   }
   784: 
   785:   function _cwStopTimer() {
   786:     clearInterval(_cwTimerInterval);
   787:     _cwTimerInterval = null;
   788:     _cwCallStartTime = null;
   789:     var bar = document.getElementById('ci-timer-bar');
   790:     if (bar) bar.classList.remove('active');
   791:     var btn = document.getElementById('ss-call-widget-btn');
   792:     if (btn) btn.classList.remove('call-active');
   793:     var disp  = document.getElementById('ci-timer-display');
   794:     var badge = document.getElementById('cw-timer-badge');
   795:     if (disp)  disp.textContent  = '0:00';
   796:     if (badge) badge.textContent = '0:00';
   797:   }
   798: 
   799:   // ── Toggle: widget click shows Call Info + starts timer ──────────────────
   800:   window._cwTogglePanel = function() {
   801:     var sec = document.getElementById('ci-call-info-section');
   802:     if (!sec) return;
   803:     var isOpen = sec.style.display !== 'none';
   804:     if (isOpen) {
   805:       // Second click while open: close without saving (just hide)
   806:       _cwStopTimer();
   807:       _cwHideCallInfo();
   808:     } else {
   809:       // Open Call Information and start a new call timer
   810:       _cwShowCallInfo();
   811:       if (!_cwCallStartTime) _cwStartTimer();
   812:       if (!_ciNotesLoaded) _ciFetchFromServer();
   813:       // Scroll to top of call info section
   814:       if (sec.scrollTop !== undefined) sec.scrollTop = 0;
   815:     }
   816:   };
   817: 
   818:   // ── End Call button: stop timer + hide Call Information ──────────────────
   819:   window._cwEndCall = function() {
   820:     _cwStopTimer();
   821:     _cwHideCallInfo();
   822:   };
   823: 
   824:   window._cwCloseCallInfoPanel = function() {
   825:     _cwStopTimer();
   826:     _cwHideCallInfo();
   827:   };
   828: 
   829:   // Expose for other modules
   830:   window._cwShowCallInfo = _cwShowCallInfo;
   831:   window._cwHideCallInfo = _cwHideCallInfo;
   832: 
   833:   // Boot: fetch notes from Supabase when auth token becomes available
   834:   window.addEventListener('mums:authtoken', function() {
   835:     setTimeout(function() {
   836:       if (!_ciNotesLoaded) _ciFetchFromServer();
   837:     }, 200);
   838:   });
   839:   // Fallback: try on DOMContentLoaded or immediately if already loaded
   840:   (function() {
   841:     function _tryFetch() { if (!_ciNotesLoaded && _ciGetToken()) _ciFetchFromServer(); }
   842:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
   843:       document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { setTimeout(_tryFetch, 500); });
   844:     } else {
   845:       setTimeout(_tryFetch, 500);
   846:     }
   847:   })();
   848: 
   849:   // Init
   850:   renderRecentNotes();
   851:   _ssSyncMiniRail();
   852:   document.title = 'MUMS Support Studio';
   853: 
   854:   // ── Home: Controller Testing Lab Widget ───────────────────────────────
   855:   (function(){
   856:     var STORAGE_KEY = 'mums_controller_lab_items_v1';
   857:     var editingId = null;
   858:     var _ctlSavePending = false;
   859:     var _ctlSaveTimer = null;
   860:     var CATALOG = {
   861:       'E2':             { img: '/Widget%20Images/E2_Widget.png',             label: 'E2'    },
   862:       'E3':             { img: '/Widget%20Images/E3_Widget.png',             label: 'E3'       },
   863:       'Site Supervisor':{ img: '/Widget%20Images/Site%20Supervisor_Widget.png', label: 'Site Supervisor' }
   864:     };
   865:     var FALLBACK_IMG = '/Widget%20Images/quickbase_logo.png';
   866: 
   867:     function esc(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v)
   868:       .replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')
   869:       .replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;'); }
   870: 
   871:     // ── Auth token helper for API calls ───────────────────────────────────
   872:     function _ctlGetToken() {
   873:       try {
   874:         var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
   875:         if (raw) { var p = JSON.parse(raw); var t = p && (p.access_token || (p.session && p.session.access_token)); if (t) return String(t); }
   876:         if (window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') { var t2 = window.CloudAuth.accessToken(); if (t2) return t2; }
   877:       } catch(_) {}
   878:       return '';
   879:     }
   880: 
   881:     // ── BUG-FIX: Shared storage via Supabase ─────────────────────────────
   882:     // ROOT CAUSE: Items were stored ONLY in localStorage, so each user/browser
   883:     // had its own empty list — other users saw "No controller configured yet."
   884:     // FIX: items are now persisted in mums_documents via /api/studio/ctl_lab_config
   885:     // and shared across ALL authenticated users. localStorage = fast local cache.
   886: 
   887:     function getItems() {
   888:       // Read from localStorage cache for instant render (no async blocking)
   889:       try { var r=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY); var p=r?JSON.parse(r):[]; return Array.isArray(p)?p:[]; }
   890:       catch(_){ return []; }
   891:     }
   892: 
   893:     function setItems(items) {
   894:       // Write to local cache immediately for instant UI update
   895:       try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(items||[])); } catch(_) {}
   896:       // Debounce Supabase write — coalesce rapid edits into a single API call
   897:       if (_ctlSaveTimer) clearTimeout(_ctlSaveTimer);
   898:       _ctlSaveTimer = setTimeout(function() { _ctlPushToServer(items||[]); }, 400);
   899:     }
   900: 
   901:     function _ctlPushToServer(items) {
   902:       if (_ctlSavePending) return;
   903:       var tok = _ctlGetToken();
   904:       if (!tok) return;
   905:       if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && navigator.onLine === false) {
   906:         setTimeout(function(){ _ctlPushToServer(items); }, 1500);
   907:         return;
   908:       }
   909:       _ctlSavePending = true;
   910:       fetch('/api/studio/ctl_lab_config', {
   911:         method: 'POST',
   912:         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok },
   913:         body: JSON.stringify({ items: items })
   914:       }).catch(function(){
   915:         setTimeout(function(){ _ctlPushToServer(items); }, 1500);
   916:       }).finally(function(){ _ctlSavePending = false; });
   917:     }
   918: 
   919:     // Called once on mount — fetches the authoritative shared list from Supabase
   920:     function _ctlLoadFromServer() {
   921:       var tok = _ctlGetToken();
   922:       if (!tok) { setTimeout(_ctlLoadFromServer, 1200); return; }
   923:       if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && navigator.onLine === false) { setTimeout(_ctlLoadFromServer, 1500); return; }
   924:       fetch('/api/studio/ctl_lab_config', {
   925:         headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Cache-Control': 'no-store' }
   926:       })
   927:       .then(function(r){ return r.ok ? r.json() : null; })
   928:       .then(function(d) {
   929:         if (!d || !d.ok || !Array.isArray(d.items)) return;
   930:         var serverItems = d.items;
   931:         var localItems = getItems();
   932:         // If server has more items (another user added controllers), adopt server list.
   933:         // If local has more (admin added while offline/logged-out), keep local and push.
   934:         var useItems = serverItems.length >= localItems.length ? serverItems : localItems;
   935:         try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(useItems)); } catch(_) {}
   936:         if (localItems.length > serverItems.length) _ctlPushToServer(localItems);
   937:         renderAll();
   938:       })
   939:       .catch(function(){ setTimeout(_ctlLoadFromServer, 1800); });
   940:     }
   941:     function imageFor(type) {
   942:       var hit = CATALOG[type]; return hit && hit.img ? hit.img : FALLBACK_IMG;
   943:     }
   944:     function labelFor(type) {
   945:       var hit = CATALOG[type]; return hit && hit.label ? hit.label : type;
   946:     }
   947:     function statusCls(status) {
   948:       var v = String(status||'').toLowerCase();
   949:       if(v==='offline') return 'offline';
   950:       if(v==='maintenance') return 'maintenance';
   951:       return '';
   952:     }
   953:     function openModal(id, open) {
   954:       var el = document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
   955:       el.classList.toggle('open', !!open);
   956:       el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
   957:     }
   958:     function renderPreview() {
   959:       var sel = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-type-select');
   960:       var img = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-preview-img');
   961:       if(!sel||!img) return;
   962:       img.src = imageFor(sel.value);
   963:       img.alt = sel.value;
   964:     }
   965: 
   966:     /* ── Horizontal list in config modal ── */
   967:     function renderChipRow(items) {
   968:       var row = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-chip-row'); if(!row) return;
   969:       if(!items.length) {
   970:         row.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-size:11px;">No controllers added yet. Select a type and click Add Now.</div>';
   971:         return;
   972:       }
   973:       row.innerHTML = items.map(function(item){
   974:         var cls = statusCls(item.status);
   975:         return '<div class="hp-ctl-chip">'+
   976:           '<img class="hp-ctl-chip-img" src="'+esc(imageFor(item.type))+'" alt="'+esc(item.type)+'" onerror="this.src=\''+esc(FALLBACK_IMG)+'\';" />'+
   977:           '<div class="hp-ctl-chip-meta">'+
   978:             '<div class="hp-ctl-chip-name">'+esc(labelFor(item.type))+'</div>'+
   979:             '<div class="hp-ctl-chip-ip">'+esc(item.ip||'—')+'</div>'+
   980:           '</div>'+
   981:           '<span class="hp-ctl-chip-status '+cls+'">'+esc(item.status||'Online')+'</span>'+
   982:           '<button class="hp-ctl-settings-btn" data-ctl-settings="'+esc(item.id)+'">'+
   983:             '<i class="fas fa-sliders-h" style="font-size:9px;margin-right:4px;"></i>Settings'+
   984:           '</button>'+
   985:         '</div>';
   986:       }).join('');
   987:     }
   988: 
   989:     /* ── Vertical column display in main lab area ── */
   990:     /* ── Booking / Queue state helpers (shared with booking module) ── */
   991:     function _ctlLS(key) { try{var r=localStorage.getItem(key);return r?JSON.parse(r):null;}catch(_){return null;} }
   992:     function getBooking(id){
   993:       if (typeof window._ctlSharedStateGetBooking === 'function') return window._ctlSharedStateGetBooking(id);
   994:       return _ctlLS('ctl_booking_'+id)||null;
   995:     }
   996:     function setBooking(id,data){
   997:       if (typeof window._ctlSetSharedBooking === 'function') { window._ctlSetSharedBooking(id, data); return; }
   998:       try{if(data)localStorage.setItem('ctl_booking_'+id,JSON.stringify(data));else localStorage.removeItem('ctl_booking_'+id);}catch(_){}
   999:       _ctlBroadcast({type:'ctl_update',key:'ctl_booking_'+id});
  1000:     }
  1001:     function getQueue(id){
  1002:       if (typeof window._ctlSharedStateGetQueue === 'function') return window._ctlSharedStateGetQueue(id);
  1003:       var r=_ctlLS('ctl_queue_'+id); return Array.isArray(r)?r:[];
  1004:     }
  1005:     function setQueue(id,arr){
  1006:       if (typeof window._ctlSetSharedQueue === 'function') { window._ctlSetSharedQueue(id, arr); return; }
  1007:       try{localStorage.setItem('ctl_queue_'+id,JSON.stringify(arr||[]));}catch(_){}
  1008:       _ctlBroadcast({type:'ctl_update',key:'ctl_queue_'+id});
  1009:     }
  1010: 
  1011:     /* ── Cross-tab broadcast (BroadcastChannel + storage event fallback) ── */
  1012:     var _ctlChannel=null;
  1013:     try{ _ctlChannel=new BroadcastChannel('mums_ctl_v1'); }catch(_){}
  1014:     /* _ctlTimeUpAlert state is managed by Booking System v6 */
  1015: 
  1016:     function _ctlBroadcast(msg){
  1017:       // BroadcastChannel for same-origin tabs
  1018:       try{ if(_ctlChannel) _ctlChannel.postMessage(msg); }catch(_){}
  1019:       // localStorage storage event fires in OTHER tabs automatically on write
  1020:       // (we just need to trigger renderAll in THIS tab after any write)
  1021:       setTimeout(renderAll, 0);
  1022:     }
  1023: 
  1024:     if(_ctlChannel){
  1025:       _ctlChannel.addEventListener('message',function(e){
  1026:         if(e.data&&e.data.type==='ctl_update') renderAll();
  1027:       });
  1028:     }
  1029:     // Also listen for storage events (other tabs writing localStorage)
  1030:     window.addEventListener('storage', function(e){
  1031:       if(e.key&&(e.key.startsWith('ctl_booking_')||e.key.startsWith('ctl_queue_'))){
  1032:         renderAll();
  1033:       }
  1034:     });
  1035: 
  1036:     /* ── Format ms → readable countdown ── */
  1037:     function fmtMs(ms){
  1038:       if(ms<=0) return '00:00';
  1039:       var s=Math.ceil(ms/1000),h=Math.floor(s/3600);s%=3600;var m=Math.floor(s/60);s%=60;
  1040:       if(h>0) return h+'h '+pad2(m)+'m '+pad2(s)+'s';
  1041:       return pad2(m)+':'+pad2(s);
  1042:     }
  1043:     function pad2(n){return n<10?'0'+n:String(n);}
  1044:     function parseDurMs(str){
  1045:       str=String(str||'').trim().toLowerCase(); var ms=0;
  1046:       var h=str.match(/(\d+)\s*h(?:our)?s?/);if(h)ms+=parseInt(h[1])*3600000;
  1047:       var m=str.match(/(\d+)\s*m(?:in(?:ute)?s?)?/);if(m)ms+=parseInt(m[1])*60000;
  1048:       var s=str.match(/(\d+)\s*s(?:ec(?:ond)?s?)?/);if(s)ms+=parseInt(s[1])*1000;
  1049:       if(!ms){var only=str.match(/^(\d+)$/);if(only)ms=parseInt(only[1])*60000;}
  1050:       return ms||0;
  1051:     }
  1052:     function initials(n){return String(n||'').trim().split(/\s+/).map(function(w){return w[0]||'';}).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2)||'??';}
  1053:     function _ctlGetCurrentUser(){
  1054:       try{
  1055:         if(window._qbMyNameCache&&window._qbMyNameCache.trim()) return window._qbMyNameCache.trim();
  1056:         var store=window.store&&typeof window.store.getState==='function'?window.store.getState():null;
  1057:         if(store&&store.user){var u=store.user;return(u.qb_name||u.name||u.email||'Unknown').trim();}
  1058:         if(window.me) return(window.me.qb_name||window.me.name||window.me.email||'Unknown').trim();
  1059:       }catch(_){}
  1060:       return 'Unknown';
  1061:     }
  1062:     function _ctlGetAvatar(){
  1063:       try{
  1064:         var store=window.store&&typeof window.store.getState==='function'?window.store.getState():null;
  1065:         if(store&&store.user&&store.user.avatar_url) return store.user.avatar_url;
  1066:         if(window.me&&window.me.avatar_url) return window.me.avatar_url;
  1067:       }catch(_){}
  1068:       return '';
  1069:     }
  1070:     function _sameUserLite(a,b){
  1071:       return String(a||'').trim().toLowerCase()===String(b||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  1072:     }
  1073:     /* Time-up alert delegated to Booking System v6 (bottom of file).
  1074:        _maybeTimeUpAlert, _showTimeUpAlert, _stopTimeUpAlert are all defined there.
  1075:        Stub wrappers so the config IIFE can still call them before the booking
  1076:        module initialises (call order safety). */
  1077:     function _maybeTimeUpAlert(item, booking){
  1078:       /* Delegates to booking system v6 once loaded */
  1079:       if(window._ctlMaybeTimeUpAlert) { window._ctlMaybeTimeUpAlert(item, booking); return; }
  1080:       /* Inline minimal fallback (booking module still loading) */
  1081:       if(!item||!booking) return;
  1082:       var me = window._qbMyNameCache || 'Unknown';
  1083:       if(String(booking.user||'').trim().toLowerCase()!==String(me||'').trim().toLowerCase()) return;
  1084:       var modal=document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-modal');
  1085:       if(modal) return; /* already showing */
  1086:       alert('Time is up! Your session on '+esc(labelFor(item.type||''))+' has ended.');
  1087:     }
  1088: 
  1089:     /* ── Render controller cards ── */
  1090:     function renderMainList(items){
  1091:       var host=document.getElementById('hp-ctl-list'); if(!host) return;
  1092:       if(!items.length){
  1093:         if(window._ctlTimers){Object.keys(window._ctlTimers).forEach(function(k){var t=window._ctlTimers[k];clearInterval(t&&t.interval?t.interval:t);});}
  1094:         window._ctlTimers={};
  1095:         host.innerHTML='<div class="hp-ctl-empty"><i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i><span>No controller configured yet</span><span style="font-size:9px;opacity:.5;">Click the cog icon to add one</span></div>';
  1096:         return;
  1097:       }
  1098:       host.innerHTML=items.map(function(item){
  1099:         var cls=statusCls(item.status);
  1100:         var booking=getBooking(item.id);
  1101:         var queue=getQueue(item.id);
  1102:         var isActive=!!(booking&&booking.endMs>Date.now());
  1103:         var me=_ctlGetCurrentUser();
  1104: 
  1105:         /* header badge */
  1106:         var headerBadge=isActive
  1107:           ?'<div class="hp-ctl-col-header-badge in-use"><i class="fas fa-user-clock" style="font-size:7px;"></i> IN USED</div>'
  1108:           :'<div class="hp-ctl-col-header-badge available"><i class="fas fa-check-circle" style="font-size:7px;"></i> Available</div>';
  1109: 
  1110:         /* user strip */
  1111:         var userBadge='';
  1112:         if(isActive){
  1113:           var av=booking.avatarUrl||'';
  1114:           var avHtml=av
  1115:             ?'<img src="'+esc(av)+'" alt="" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'" style="width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" />'
  1116:             :'<span style="width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(162,93,220,.35);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:#c084fc;flex-shrink:0;">'+esc(initials(booking.user))+'</span>';
  1117:           userBadge='<div class="hp-ctl-user-strip"><div class="hp-ctl-user-avatar">'+avHtml+'</div>'
  1118:             +'<div class="hp-ctl-user-info"><div class="hp-ctl-user-name">'+esc(booking.user)+'</div>'
  1119:             +'<div class="hp-ctl-user-task">'+esc((booking.task||'').slice(0,30))+'</div></div></div>';
  1120:         }
  1121: 
  1122:         /* timer OVERLAY (centered on image) */
  1123:         var timerId='ctl-timer-'+item.id;
  1124:         var imgBlock='';
  1125:         if(isActive){
  1126:           imgBlock='<div class="hp-ctl-img-wrap">'
  1127:             +'<img class="hp-ctl-col-img" src="'+esc(imageFor(item.type))+'" alt="'+esc(item.type)+'" onerror="this.src=\''+esc(FALLBACK_IMG)+'\';" />'
  1128:             +'<div class="hp-ctl-timer-overlay" id="'+timerId+'">'
  1129:               +'<div class="hp-ctl-timer-inner">'
  1130:                 +'<div class="hp-ctl-timer-label">REMAINING</div>'
  1131:                 +'<div class="hp-ctl-timer-val" id="'+timerId+'-val">--:--</div>'
  1132:               +'</div>'
  1133:             +'</div>'
  1134:           +'</div>';
  1135:         } else {
  1136:           imgBlock='<div class="hp-ctl-img-wrap">'
  1137:             +'<img class="hp-ctl-col-img" src="'+esc(imageFor(item.type))+'" alt="'+esc(item.type)+'" onerror="this.src=\''+esc(FALLBACK_IMG)+'\';" />'
  1138:           +'</div>';
  1139:         }
  1140: 
  1141:         /* queue pill */
  1142:         var queueNames = queue.slice(0, 8).map(function(q, i){
  1143:           var uname = q && q.user ? q.user : 'Unknown';
  1144:           return '<div class="hp-ctl-queue-tip-item"><span class="hp-ctl-queue-tip-pos">#'+(i+1)+'</span><span class="hp-ctl-queue-tip-name">'+esc(uname)+'</span></div>';
  1145:         }).join('');
  1146:         if (queue.length > 8) queueNames += '<div class="hp-ctl-queue-tip-more">+'+(queue.length-8)+' more</div>';
  1147:         var queuePill=queue.length>0
  1148:           ?'<div class="hp-ctl-queue-pill" tabindex="0" aria-label="'+queue.length+' waiting users">'
  1149:             +'<div class="hp-ctl-queue-pill-main"><i class="fas fa-users" style="font-size:8px;"></i><span>'+queue.length+' waiting</span></div>'
  1150:             +'<div class="hp-ctl-queue-tooltip">'+queueNames+'</div>'
  1151:           +'</div>':'' ;
  1152: 
  1153:         /* action button — waiting status for current user if they're in queue */
  1154:         var myQueuePos=queue.findIndex(function(q){
  1155:           return String((q&&q.user)||'').trim().toLowerCase()===String(me||'').trim().toLowerCase();
  1156:         });
  1157:         var actionBtn;
  1158:         if(isActive){
  1159:           if(myQueuePos>=0){
  1160:             actionBtn='<div class="hp-ctl-queue-position-badge">'
  1161:               +'<i class="fas fa-hourglass-half" style="font-size:9px;"></i>'
  1162:               +' Queue position <strong>#'+(myQueuePos+1)+'</strong>'
  1163:             +'</div>';
  1164:           } else {
  1165:             actionBtn='<button class="hp-ctl-book-btn queue-mode" data-ctl-queue="'+esc(item.id)+'">'
  1166:               +'<i class="fas fa-list-alt" style="font-size:10px;"></i> Join Queue'
  1167:             +'</button>';
  1168:           }
  1169:         } else {
  1170:           actionBtn='<button class="hp-ctl-book-btn" data-ctl-use="'+esc(item.id)+'">'
  1171:             +'<i class="fas fa-calendar-check" style="font-size:10px;"></i> Book this Controller'
  1172:           +'</button>';
  1173:         }
  1174: 
  1175:         var statusIcon=cls==='offline'?'<span style="color:#f85149;">&#9679;</span>':cls==='maintenance'?'<span style="color:#fbbf24;">&#9679;</span>':'<span style="color:#10b981;">&#9679;</span>';
  1176: 
  1177:         return '<div class="hp-ctl-col'+(isActive?' in-use':'')+'" data-ctl-id="'+esc(item.id)+'">'
  1178:           +headerBadge+userBadge+imgBlock
  1179:           +'<div class="hp-ctl-col-meta">'+'<div class="hp-ctl-col-name">'+esc(labelFor(item.type))+'</div>'+'<div class="hp-ctl-ip-chip">'+'<i class="fas fa-network-wired hp-ctl-ip-chip-icon"></i>'+'<span class="hp-ctl-ip-chip-val" id="hp-ctl-ip-val-'+esc(item.id)+'">'+esc(item.ip||'--')+'</span>'+'<button class="hp-ctl-ip-copy-btn" title="Copy IP address" onclick="event.stopPropagation();window._ctlCopyIp(\''+esc(item.id)+'\',\''+esc(item.ip||'')+'\')" >'+'<i class="fas fa-copy"></i>'+'</button>'+'<div class="hp-ctl-ip-copy-toast" id="hp-ctl-copy-toast-'+esc(item.id)+'">Copied!</div>'+'</div>'+'</div>'
  1180:           +'<span class="hp-ctl-col-status '+cls+'">'+statusIcon+' '+esc(item.status||'Online')+'</span>'
  1181:           +queuePill
  1182:           +'<div class="hp-ctl-col-actions">'+actionBtn
  1183:           +'<div class="hp-ctl-col-action-row">'
  1184:           +'<button class="hp-ctl-folder-btn" title="Backup File Log" onclick="event.stopPropagation();window._ctlOpenBackupLog(\''+esc(item.id)+'\')">'
  1185:           +'<i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>'
  1186:           +'<span>Backup Log</span>'
  1187:           +'</button>'
  1188:           +'<button class="hp-ctl-overlay-settings" data-ctl-settings="'+esc(item.id)+'"><i class="fas fa-cog" style="font-size:10px;"></i> Settings</button>'
  1189:           +'</div>'
  1190:           +'</div>'
  1191:         +'</div>';
  1192:       }).join('');
  1193: 
  1194:       /* BUG 6 FIX: Use smart syncTimers — only starts/restarts timers when booking
  1195:          endMs changed. Prevents frozen countdowns on storage-event re-renders. */
  1196:       if (window._ctlSyncTimers) {
  1197:         window._ctlSyncTimers(items);
  1198:       } else {
  1199:         if(window._ctlTimers){Object.keys(window._ctlTimers).forEach(function(k){var t=window._ctlTimers[k];clearInterval(t&&t.interval?t.interval:t);});}
  1200:         window._ctlTimers={};
  1201:       }
  1202:     }
  1203: 
  1204:     function renderAll() {
  1205:       var items = getItems();
  1206:       renderChipRow(items);
  1207:       // NEW LAYOUT GATE: ctl_booking.js sets window._ctlNewLayoutActive = true
  1208:       // and exclusively owns #hp-ctl-list rendering via _renderCards().
  1209:       // Do NOT call renderMainList when the new layout is active — it would
  1210:       // overwrite the new card-based UI with the old hp-ctl-col columns.
  1211:       if (!window._ctlNewLayoutActive) {
  1212:         renderMainList(items);
  1213:       }
  1214:     }
  1215: 
  1216:     function addController() {
  1217:       var sel = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-type-select'); if(!sel) return;
  1218:       var type = sel.value || 'E2';
  1219:       var items = getItems();
  1220:       var idx = items.length + 1;
  1221:       items.push({
  1222:         id: String(Date.now())+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7),
  1223:         type: type,
  1224:         ip: '192.168.123.'+idx,
  1225:         status: 'Online'
  1226:       });
  1227:       setItems(items);
  1228:       renderAll();
  1229:     }
  1230: 
  1231:     function openSettings(id) {
  1232:       var items = getItems();
  1233:       var target = items.find(function(it){ return it.id===id; });
  1234:       if(!target) return;
  1235:       editingId = id;
  1236:       // Populate settings modal
  1237:       var ipEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-ip-input');
  1238:       var stEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-status-select');
  1239:       var imgEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-settings-img');
  1240:       var tyEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-settings-type-label');
  1241:       var idEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-settings-id-label');
  1242:       if(ipEl)  ipEl.value  = target.ip     || '';
  1243:       if(stEl)  stEl.value  = target.status || 'Online';
  1244:       if(imgEl) imgEl.src   = imageFor(target.type);
  1245:       if(tyEl)  tyEl.textContent = labelFor(target.type);
  1246:       if(idEl)  idEl.textContent = 'ID: '+target.id.slice(0,16);
  1247:       openModal('hp-ctl-settings-modal', true);
  1248:     }
  1249: 
  1250:     function saveSettings() {
  1251:       if(!editingId) return;
  1252:       var ipEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-ip-input');
  1253:       var stEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-status-select');
  1254:       var ip = (ipEl && ipEl.value ? ipEl.value.trim() : '') || 'N/A';
  1255:       var st = (stEl && stEl.value ? stEl.value.trim() : 'Online');
  1256:       var items = getItems().map(function(it){
  1257:         if(it.id!==editingId) return it;
  1258:         return Object.assign({}, it, {ip:ip, status:st});
  1259:       });
  1260:       setItems(items);
  1261:       openModal('hp-ctl-settings-modal', false);
  1262:       editingId = null;
  1263:       renderAll();
  1264:     }
  1265: 
  1266:     function deleteController() {
  1267:       if(!editingId) return;
  1268:       if(!confirm('Remove this controller from the lab?')) return;
  1269:       var items = getItems().filter(function(it){ return it.id!==editingId; });
  1270:       setItems(items);
  1271:       openModal('hp-ctl-settings-modal', false);
  1272:       openModal('hp-ctl-config-modal', false);
  1273:       editingId = null;
  1274:       renderAll();
  1275:     }
  1276: 
  1277:     /* ── Event delegation ── */
  1278:     document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
  1279:       var t = e.target; if(!t) return;
  1280:       // Gear icon → open config modal
  1281:       var cfg = t.closest && t.closest('#hp-ctl-config-btn');
  1282:       if(cfg){ openModal('hp-ctl-config-modal', true); renderPreview(); renderAll(); return; }
  1283:       // Add Now in preview
  1284:       var addNow = t.closest && t.closest('#hp-ctl-add-now-btn');
  1285:       if(addNow){ addController(); return; }
  1286:       // Add Controller button in header
  1287:       var quickAdd = t.closest && t.closest('#hp-ctl-add-btn');
  1288:       if(quickAdd){ addController(); return; }
  1289:       // Save settings
  1290:       var saveBtn = t.closest && t.closest('#hp-ctl-settings-save-btn');
  1291:       if(saveBtn){ saveSettings(); return; }
  1292:       // Delete controller
  1293:       var delBtn = t.closest && t.closest('#hp-ctl-settings-delete-btn');
  1294:       if(delBtn){ deleteController(); return; }
  1295:       // "Book this Controller" button (free) OR "Join Queue" (in-use)
  1296:       var useBtn = t.closest && t.closest('[data-ctl-use]');
  1297:       if(useBtn){ window._ctlOpenBooking(String(useBtn.getAttribute('data-ctl-use')||'')); return; }
  1298:       var queueBtn = t.closest && t.closest('[data-ctl-queue]');
  1299:       if(queueBtn){ window._ctlOpenQueue(String(queueBtn.getAttribute('data-ctl-queue')||'')); return; }
  1300:       // Override button
  1301:       var overrideBtn = t.closest && t.closest('[data-ctl-override]');
  1302:       if(overrideBtn){ window._ctlOverride(String(overrideBtn.getAttribute('data-ctl-override')||'')); return; }
  1303:       // Any settings button
  1304:       var settingsBtn = t.closest && t.closest('[data-ctl-settings]');
  1305:       if(settingsBtn){ openSettings(String(settingsBtn.getAttribute('data-ctl-settings')||'')); return; }
  1306:       // Backdrop click to close
  1307:       if(t.id==='hp-ctl-config-modal'){ openModal('hp-ctl-config-modal', false); return; }
  1308:       if(t.id==='hp-ctl-settings-modal'){ openModal('hp-ctl-settings-modal', false); return; }
  1309:     });
  1310: 
  1311:     var selectEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-type-select');
  1312:     if(selectEl) selectEl.addEventListener('change', renderPreview);
  1313: 
  1314:     // Listen for booking system re-render requests
  1315:     document.addEventListener('ctl:rerender', renderAll);
  1316: 
  1317:     renderPreview();
  1318:     renderAll();
  1319: 
  1320:     // BUG 1 FIX: On mount, fetch the shared controller list from Supabase.
  1321:     // This ensures ALL users see the same controllers regardless of their browser's
  1322:     // localStorage state. renderAll() above shows the local cache instantly while
  1323:     // _ctlLoadFromServer() fetches the authoritative list in the background.
  1324:     _ctlLoadFromServer();
  1325: 
  1326:     // Expose internal renderAll + server refresh for booking system
  1327:     window._ctlRenderAll = renderAll;
  1328:     window._ctlRefreshFromServer = _ctlLoadFromServer;
  1329:   })();
  1330: 
  1331:   /* ── FEATURE 1: Copy IP address to clipboard ──────────────────────────── */
  1332:   window._ctlCopyIp = function(itemId, ip) {
  1333:     if (!ip || ip === '--') return;
  1334:     var toastEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-copy-toast-' + itemId);
  1335:     function _showToast() {
  1336:       if (toastEl) { toastEl.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(function(){ toastEl.classList.remove('show'); }, 1800); }
  1337:     }
  1338:     if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
  1339:       navigator.clipboard.writeText(ip).then(_showToast).catch(function() { _fallback(ip); });
  1340:     } else { _fallback(ip); }
  1341:     function _fallback(text) {
  1342:       var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
  1343:       ta.value = text; ta.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:-9999px;left:-9999px;opacity:0;';
  1344:       document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select(); ta.setSelectionRange(0,99999);
  1345:       try { document.execCommand('copy'); } catch(_) {}
  1346:       document.body.removeChild(ta);
  1347:       _showToast();
  1348:     }
  1349:   };
  1350: 
  1351:   /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1352:      FEATURE 2: Backup File Log System
  1353:      ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1354:      Logic:
  1355:        • Each controller has its own log list stored in localStorage.
  1356:        • Key: 'ctl_backup_log_<itemId>'
  1357:        • Each entry: { timestamp, user, task, backupFile, status }
  1358:        • When User1 books with a backupFile link, a SYSTEM entry is appended
  1359:          to represent the "receiver" of that backup (the previous state).
  1360:        • The very first entry per controller is always SYSTEM / DEFAULT.
  1361:        • On every new booking, the submitted backupFile link populates the
  1362:          PREVIOUS row's backupFile (the "current user" row from the last booking),
  1363:          and a new empty row is inserted for the current user.
  1364:        • Sort: newest timestamp first (index 0 = newest).
  1365:   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  1366: 
  1367:   var CTL_BACKUP_LOG_PREFIX = 'ctl_backup_log_';
  1368: 
  1369:   function _ctlGetBackupLog(itemId) {
  1370:     try {
  1371:       var raw = localStorage.getItem(CTL_BACKUP_LOG_PREFIX + itemId);
  1372:       var parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
  1373:       return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  1374:     } catch(_) { return []; }
  1375:   }
  1376: 
  1377:   function _ctlSetBackupLog(itemId, log) {
  1378:     try { localStorage.setItem(CTL_BACKUP_LOG_PREFIX + itemId, JSON.stringify((log||[]).slice(0, 500))); } catch(_) {}
  1379:   }
  1380: 
  1381:   /* Called when a booking is submitted with a backup file link.
  1382:      Rules:
  1383:        1. If log is empty → seed with SYSTEM/DEFAULT row then add user row.
  1384:        2. Find the most recent row that has backupFile === '' or 'No files uploaded yet from next user'
  1385:           (that is the PREVIOUS booking's "waiting" row) and fill its backupFile with the new link.
  1386:        3. Append a new row for the current user with backupFile = '' (waiting for next user's upload).
  1387:   */
  1388:   window._ctlAppendBackupLog = function(itemId, entry) {
  1389:     /* entry = { timestamp, user, task, backupFile } */
  1390:     var log = _ctlGetBackupLog(itemId);
  1391: 
  1392:     /* Seed SYSTEM row if this is the very first booking ever */
  1393:     if (log.length === 0) {
  1394:       log.unshift({
  1395:         timestamp: entry.timestamp,
  1396:         user: 'SYSTEM',
  1397:         task: 'DEFAULT',
  1398:         backupFile: entry.backupFile   /* first user's backup goes to SYSTEM */
  1399:       });
  1400:       /* Add the current user's row — their backup slot is empty until next user uploads */
  1401:       log.unshift({
  1402:         timestamp: entry.timestamp,
  1403:         user: entry.user,
  1404:         task: entry.task,
  1405:         backupFile: 'No files uploaded yet from next user'
  1406:       });
  1407:       _ctlSetBackupLog(itemId, log);
  1408:       return;
  1409:     }
  1410: 
  1411:     /* Fill the most recent "waiting" row (the current user from last booking)
  1412:        with the backup link submitted by the new user (who downloaded the backup
  1413:        FROM the controller, which represents the previous user's state). */
  1414:     var waitingIdx = -1;
  1415:     for (var i = 0; i < log.length; i++) {
  1416:       var bf = String(log[i].backupFile || '');
  1417:       if (bf === '' || bf === 'No files uploaded yet from next user') {
  1418:         waitingIdx = i;
  1419:         break;
  1420:       }
  1421:     }
  1422:     if (waitingIdx >= 0) {
  1423:       log[waitingIdx].backupFile = entry.backupFile;
  1424:     }
  1425: 
  1426:     /* Add a new empty row for the current user (their backup waiting for next user) */
  1427:     log.unshift({
  1428:       timestamp: entry.timestamp,
  1429:       user: entry.user,
  1430:       task: entry.task,
  1431:       backupFile: 'No files uploaded yet from next user'
  1432:     });
  1433: 
  1434:     _ctlSetBackupLog(itemId, log);
  1435:   };
  1436: 
  1437:   /* ── Open Backup Log Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1438:   window._ctlOpenBackupLog = function(itemId) {
  1439:     var items = (typeof getItems === 'function') ? [] : [];
  1440:     /* Resolve item label from config IIFE storage */
  1441:     try {
  1442:       var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_controller_lab_items_v1');
  1443:       var parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
  1444:       items = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  1445:     } catch(_) {}
  1446:     var ctrl = items.find(function(it){ return it.id === itemId; }) || {};
  1447:     var ctrlLabel = ctrl.type ? (ctrl.type + (ctrl.ip ? ' — ' + ctrl.ip : '')) : ('Controller ' + itemId.slice(0,8));
  1448: 
  1449:     var log = _ctlGetBackupLog(itemId);
  1450: 
  1451:     /* Remove existing modal if any */
  1452:     var existing = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-backup-log-modal');
  1453:     if (existing) existing.remove();
  1454: 
  1455:     function renderRows(entries) {
  1456:       if (!entries.length) {
  1457:         return '<tr><td colspan="4" style="text-align:center;padding:28px 16px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-size:11px;">'
  1458:           + '<i class="fas fa-folder-open" style="font-size:20px;opacity:.3;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;"></i>'
  1459:           + 'No backup logs yet for this controller.</td></tr>';
  1460:       }
  1461:       return entries.map(function(row, idx) {
  1462:         var isSystem = row.user === 'SYSTEM';
  1463:         var isWaiting = row.backupFile === 'No files uploaded yet from next user' || !row.backupFile;
  1464:         var userBadge = isSystem
  1465:           ? '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25);color:#fbbf24;border-radius:5px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.06em;">'
  1466:             + '<i class="fas fa-server" style="font-size:7px;"></i>SYSTEM</span>'
  1467:           : '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(162,93,220,.12);border:1px solid rgba(162,93,220,.25);color:#c084fc;border-radius:5px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;">'
  1468:             + '<i class="fas fa-user" style="font-size:7px;"></i>' + _ctlEscHtml(row.user) + '</span>';
  1469:         var backupCell;
  1470:         if (isWaiting) {
  1471:           backupCell = '<span style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-style:italic;">'
  1472:             + '<i class="fas fa-clock" style="margin-right:4px;opacity:.5;"></i>No files uploaded yet from next user</span>';
  1473:         } else if (row.backupFile && (row.backupFile.startsWith('http') || row.backupFile.startsWith('//'))) {
  1474:           backupCell = '<a href="' + _ctlEscHtml(row.backupFile) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" '
  1475:             + 'style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:#60a5fa;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;'
  1476:             + 'background:rgba(96,165,250,.1);border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.25);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 9px;transition:all .15s;" '
  1477:             + '>'
  1478:             + '<i class="fas fa-download" style="font-size:8px;"></i>Backup File</a>';
  1479:         } else {
  1480:           backupCell = '<span style="font-size:10px;color:#6b7280;">' + _ctlEscHtml(row.backupFile || '—') + '</span>';
  1481:         }
  1482:         var rowBg = idx % 2 === 0 ? 'transparent' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.015)';
  1483:         return '<tr style="background:' + rowBg + ';transition:background .12s;" '
  1484:           + '>'
  1485:           + '<td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-family:monospace;white-space:nowrap;">' + _ctlEscHtml(row.timestamp || '—') + '</td>'
  1486:           + '<td style="padding:10px 14px;">' + userBadge + '</td>'
  1487:           + '<td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:10px;color:#94a3b8;max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;" title="' + _ctlEscHtml(row.task || '') + '">' + _ctlEscHtml(row.task || '—') + '</td>'
  1488:           + '<td style="padding:10px 14px;">' + backupCell + '</td>'
  1489:           + '</tr>';
  1490:       }).join('');
  1491:     }

  1598:   function _ctlEscHtml(v) {
  1599:     return String(v == null ? '' : v)
  1600:       .replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')
  1601:       .replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;');
  1602:   }

  1631:       });

  1634:       btn.classList.add('ss-settings-nav-active');

  1636:       btn.style.borderLeftColor = colors.border;
  1637:       btn.style.color           = colors.fg;
  1638:       btn.style.opacity         = '1';
  1639:

  1641:       document.querySelectorAll('[id^="settings-section-"]').forEach(function(s) {
  1642:         s.style.display = 'none';
  1643:       });
  1644:       var target = document.getElementById('settings-section-' + section);
  1645:       if (target) target.style.display = 'block';
  1646:

  1648:       if (section === 'studio-qb' && typeof window._sqbLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1649:         window._sqbLoadSettings();
  1650:       } else if (section === 'connectplus-settings' && typeof window._cpsLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1651:         window._cpsLoadSettings();
  1652:       } else if (section === 'parts-number-settings' && typeof window._pnsLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1653:         window._pnsLoadSettings();
  1654:       } else if (section === 'contact-information-settings' && typeof window._ctisLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1655:         window._ctisLoadSettings();
  1656:       } else if (section === 'studio-cache' && typeof window._cacheUI !== 'undefined') {
  1657:         window._cacheUI.refreshPanel();
  1658:       } else if (section === 'studio-appearance' && typeof window._appLoadDisplay === 'function') {
  1659:         window._appLoadDisplay();
  1660:       } else if (section === 'kb-settings' && typeof window._kbLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1661:         // FIX BUG 1: was missing — KB Settings fields were always blank
  1662:         // because _kbLoadSettings() was never called when clicking this nav item.
  1663:         window._kbLoadSettings();
  1664:       } else if (section === 'oncall-tech-settings' && typeof window._ocsLoadSettings === 'function') {
  1665:         window._ocsLoadSettings();
