  1672: 
  1673: /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1674:    CONTROLLER LAB — Full Booking System v6.0
  1675:    BUGFIX SUMMARY (v6):
  1676:    ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1677:    BUG 1 — RACE CONDITION: Two users could simultaneously book the same
  1678:      controller because the server had no atomic lock. Both clients read
  1679:      "available", both write bookings, last writer wins → silent double-book.
  1680:      FIX: Server-side optimistic lock. POST now sends `lockedSince` timestamp;
  1681:      server rejects if another booking was written after that timestamp.
  1682:      Client re-fetches + shows "Controller was just booked" error.
  1683: 
  1684:    BUG 2 — STALE LOCAL STATE: Polling fetched server state, applied it to
  1685:      _stateCache, but still fell back to localStorage for getBooking/getQueue
  1686:      when window._ctlSharedState* functions weren't registered yet.
  1687:      FIX: Single source of truth — _stateCache only. localStorage is a
  1688:      write-through cache for offline resilience, never used as primary read.
  1689: 
  1690:    BUG 3 — DOUBLE BOOKING via expired booking not cleared: normalizeBooking()
  1691:      on server returned null for expired bookings (endMs <= Date.now()) but
  1692:      the client could still see a stale booking from the local cache right at
  1693:      expiry boundary (race between timer tick and state sync).
  1694:      FIX: Client-side getBooking() also checks endMs > Date.now() before
  1695:      returning. Expired bookings are treated as null everywhere.
  1696: 
  1697:    BUG 4 — QUEUE DUPLICATE JOIN: No deduplication guard on server — a user
  1698:      refreshing the page while _ctlJoinQueue was in-flight could push their
  1699:      name twice. Server-side normalizeQueueEntry runs but doesn't dedup users.
  1700:      FIX: Server POST deduplicates queue entries by user (case-insensitive).
  1701:      Client also checks alreadyIn before pushing.
  1702: 
  1703:    BUG 5 — QUEUE NOTIFY LOOP: _ctlNotifyQueue checked notifiedAt but the
  1704:      expiry guard had a clock-skew window where it could re-notify before the
  1705:      user responded — causing duplicate "It's Your Turn!" modals.
  1706:      FIX: Added a per-controller notify-lock Map (_notifyLocks). Once a notify
  1707:      is dispatched for a ctrlId, it is suppressed for 30s unless explicitly
  1708:      reset by queue advance.
  1709: 
  1710:    BUG 6 — TIMER CLEARS ON RE-RENDER: renderMainList() called clearInterval
  1711:      on ALL _ctlTimers before rebuilding innerHTML. If renderAll() fired during
  1712:      a tick (storage event from another tab), the in-flight timer for the
  1713:      current user's session was killed → countdown froze.
  1714:      FIX: Timers are keyed by (itemId + endMs). Only clear timers whose
  1715:      endMs changed or whose controller was removed.
  1716: 
  1717:    BUG 7 — BOOKING MODAL SHOWS "AVAILABLE" for stale bookings: When another
  1718:      user's booking just expired, the "Book this Controller" button worked but
  1719:      the modal still briefly showed the stale in-use notice because it read
  1720:      booking from local cache before the poll cycle updated it.
  1721:      FIX: _ctlOpenBooking() always does a fresh server fetch before rendering.
  1722: 
  1723:    BUG 8 — POLL STORM: 3-second polling with no back-off caused 20 requests/
  1724:      minute per user. For 30 users → 600 DB reads/min → free tier IO bleed.
  1725:      FIX: Poll interval 8s when page is visible, 30s when hidden.
  1726:      Added visibility change listener to recover quickly on tab focus.
  1727: 
  1728:    BUG 9 — OVERRIDE leaves queue intact: After an override, the overridden
  1729:      user's booking was deleted but they could still re-appear in queue and
  1730:      get notified immediately for their own forced-out session.
  1731:      FIX: Override also removes the overridden user from queue and resets
  1732:      any pending notify lock for that controller.
  1733: 
  1734:    BUG 10 — TIME-UP ALERT CSS not injected for support_studio context:
  1735:      The CSS animation keyframes were only injected inside the core_ui IIFE
  1736:      scope, but support_studio.html loads core_ui.js and the injector ran
  1737:      before DOM was ready in some load orders.
  1738:      FIX: _injectTimeUpCSS() now checks document.head and defers via
  1739:      requestAnimationFrame if head is not yet available.
  1740:    ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  1741: 
  1742: (function () {
  1743:   'use strict';
  1744: 
  1745:   /* ── CONFIG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1746:   var BACKUP_FOLDER_URL = 'https://mycopeland.sharepoint.com/sites/AdvanceServices/Shared%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2FAdvanceServices%2FShared%20Documents%2FManila%20Controller%20Appsheet%20Project%2FMUMS%20APP%2FCONTROLLER%20LAB%20BACKUP%20FILE&viewid=e4a428c7%2D1e26%2D4929%2D9fe6%2D85f5f21174a9';
  1747:   var BACKUP_LS_KEY     = 'mums_ctl_log_backup';
  1748:   var SHEETS_ENDPOINT   = window._CTL_SHEETS_ENDPOINT || '';
  1749:   // Root-level paths are the ONLY reliable way to serve audio in Cloudflare Pages.
  1750:   // Folder names with spaces (/sound%20alert/) fail silently in many CDN configs.
  1751:   var TIMEUP_SOUND_URL  = '/Alert_Yourtimeisup.mp3';
  1752:   var QUEUE_SOUND_URL   = '/Alert_Yourturntousethecontroller.mp3';
  1753:   var SOUND_FALLBACK    = '/sound_alert_queue.mp3';
  1754: 
  1755:   /* ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1756:   var _bookingCtlId     = null;
  1757:   var _bookingCtlData   = null;
  1758:   var _queueCtlId       = null;
  1759:   var _sheetReachable   = null;
  1760:   var _timeUpAudio      = null;   // looping time-up Audio
  1761:   var _queueAudio       = null;   // looping queue-turn Audio
  1762:   var _backupUploadTimer = null;
  1763:   var _pollTimer        = null;
  1764:   var _pollInterval     = 8000;
  1765:   var _queueSweepBusy   = false;
  1766:   var _pendingRetryBusy = false;
  1767:   var _stateReqBusy     = false;
  1768:   var _lastServerWrite  = 0;      // BUG 1 FIX: optimistic lock timestamp
  1769:   var _notifyLocks      = {};     // BUG 5 FIX: { ctrlId: timestampMs }
  1770:   var _queueAlertState  = { activeKey: '', acked: {} };
  1771: 
  1772:   /* BUG 6 FIX: keyed timer registry { itemId: { interval, endMs } } */
  1773:   window._ctlTimers = window._ctlTimers || {};
  1774: 
  1775:   /* ── Single source of truth ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1776:   /* BUG 2 FIX: _stateCache is the ONE authoritative read source.
  1777:      localStorage is write-through only (for offline resilience).          */
  1778:   var _stateCache = { bookings: {}, queues: {} };
  1779: 
  1780:   /* ── Cross-tab broadcast channel ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1781:   var _channel = null;
  1782:   try { _channel = new BroadcastChannel('mums_ctl_v1'); } catch (_) {}
  1783:   if (_channel) {
  1784:     _channel.addEventListener('message', function (e) {
  1785:       if (!e || !e.data || e.data.type !== 'ctl_update') return;
  1786:       /* Apply the inline state patch if provided (faster than a full re-fetch) */
  1787:       if (e.data.statePatch) _applyStatePatch(e.data.statePatch);
  1788:       if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  1789:       /* queue_notify — only trigger alarm for the target user */
  1790:       if (
  1791:         e.data.subtype === 'queue_notify' &&
  1792:         _sameUser(e.data.targetUser, _getCurrentUser())
  1793:       ) {
  1794:         _triggerQueueAlert(e.data.ctrlId, e.data.ctrlLabel, Number(e.data.notifyExpiresAt || 0));
  1795:       }
  1796:       /* booking_expired — re-run queue sweep on ALL tabs so the alarm fires
  1797:          for the next queued user regardless of which tab had the active timer */
  1798:       if (e.data.subtype === 'booking_expired' && e.data.ctrlId) {
  1799:         setTimeout(function() { _ctlNotifyQueue(e.data.ctrlId); }, 200);
  1800:       }
  1801:     });
  1802:   }
  1803: 
  1804:   /* BUG 8 FIX: adaptive poll — faster when visible, slower when hidden */
  1805:   function _startPoll() {
  1806:     if (_pollTimer) { clearInterval(_pollTimer); _pollTimer = null; }
  1807:     var interval = (_pushBackoffUntil && Date.now() < _pushBackoffUntil) ? 30000 : _pollInterval;
  1808:     _pollTimer = setInterval(function () {
  1809:       // During backoff, use a slower poll to let the server breathe
  1810:       if (_pushBackoffUntil && Date.now() < _pushBackoffUntil) {
  1811:         _startPoll(); // reschedule at 30s
  1812:         return;
  1813:       }
  1814:       _loadSharedStateFromServer(function () {
  1815:         _ctlSweepQueueTimeouts();
  1816:         if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  1817:       });
  1818:     }, _pollInterval);
  1819:   }
  1820:   document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () {
  1821:     _pollInterval = document.hidden ? 30000 : 8000;
  1822:     _startPoll();
  1823:   });
  1824:   _startPoll();
  1825: 
  1826:   function _broadcast(msg) {
  1827:     try { if (_channel) _channel.postMessage(msg); } catch (_) {}
  1828:   }
  1829: 
  1830:   /* ── Auth helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1831:   function _ctlGetToken() {
  1832:     try {
  1833:       var raw = localStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session') || sessionStorage.getItem('mums_supabase_session');
  1834:       if (raw) { var p = JSON.parse(raw); var t = p && (p.access_token || (p.session && p.session.access_token)); if (t) return String(t); }
  1835:       if (window.CloudAuth && typeof window.CloudAuth.accessToken === 'function') { var t2 = window.CloudAuth.accessToken(); if (t2) return String(t2); }
  1836:     } catch (_) {}
  1837:     return '';
  1838:   }
  1839: 
  1840:   /* ── Storage helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1841:   function _ls(key) { try { var r = localStorage.getItem(key); return r ? JSON.parse(r) : null; } catch (_) { return null; } }
  1842:   function _setLs(key, v) { try { localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(v)); } catch (_) {} }
  1843: 
  1844:   /* ── State cache persistence ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1845:   function _saveStateCache() { _setLs('mums_ctl_lab_state_v1', _stateCache); }
  1846:   function _loadStateCache() {
  1847:     var s = _ls('mums_ctl_lab_state_v1');
  1848:     if (s && typeof s === 'object') {
  1849:       _stateCache = {
  1850:         bookings: (s.bookings && typeof s.bookings === 'object') ? s.bookings : {},
  1851:         queues:   (s.queues   && typeof s.queues   === 'object') ? s.queues   : {},
  1852:       };
  1853:     }
  1854:   }
  1855:   function _applySharedState(data) {
  1856:     if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') return;
  1857:     _stateCache = {
  1858:       bookings: (data.bookings && typeof data.bookings === 'object') ? data.bookings : {},
  1859:       queues:   (data.queues   && typeof data.queues   === 'object') ? data.queues   : {},
  1860:     };
  1861:     _saveStateCache();
  1862:   }
  1863:   /* BUG 1 helper: apply only the fields that changed (from broadcast or poll) */
  1864:   function _applyStatePatch(patch) {
  1865:     if (!patch || typeof patch !== 'object') return;
  1866:     if (patch.bookings) Object.assign(_stateCache.bookings, patch.bookings);
  1867:     if (patch.deletedBookings && Array.isArray(patch.deletedBookings)) {
  1868:       patch.deletedBookings.forEach(function (id) { delete _stateCache.bookings[id]; });
  1869:     }
  1870:     if (patch.queues) Object.assign(_stateCache.queues, patch.queues);
  1871:     _saveStateCache();
  1872:   }
  1873: 
  1874:   /* ── Server I/O ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  1875:   function _loadSharedStateFromServer(cb) {
  1876:     if (_stateReqBusy) { if (cb) cb(); return; }
  1877:     var tok = _ctlGetToken();
  1878:     if (!tok) { if (cb) cb(); return; }
  1879:     _stateReqBusy = true;
  1880:     fetch('/api/studio/ctl_lab_state', {
  1881:       headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Cache-Control': 'no-store' }
  1882:     })
  1883:       .then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; })
  1884:       .then(function (d) { if (d && d.ok) { _applySharedState(d); _lastServerWrite = Date.now(); } })
  1885:       .catch(function () {})
  1886:       .finally(function () { _stateReqBusy = false; if (cb) cb(); });
  1887:   }
  1888: 
  1889:   /* BUG 1 FIX: server push now includes lockedSince for optimistic locking */
  1890:   /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1891:      PUSH PATCH SYSTEM — Per-resource write queue (replaces global _pushInFlight)
  1892:      ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1893:      Root causes fixed here:
  1894:      BUG B: A single global _pushInFlight flag blocked ALL concurrent writes.
  1895:             When setBooking() set _pushInFlight=true, any concurrent setQueue()
  1896:             call was silently dropped → queue state never reached the server →
  1897:             poll returned stale data → sweep looped endlessly → 500 storm.
  1898:      FIX:   Per-resource inflight map. Booking writes and queue writes are
  1899:             independent resources and NEVER block each other.
  1900:      BUG C: JSON parse failure on 500 HTML responses left startBtn disabled.
  1901:      FIX:   Always wrap r.json() with a .catch() fallback.
  1902:      ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  1903:   var _pushInFlight    = {};   // { resourceKey: bool }   — per-resource lock
  1904:   var _pushQueue       = {};   // { resourceKey: [pending] } — coalesce rapid writes
  1905:   var _pushFailCount   = 0;
  1906:   var _pushBackoffUntil = 0;
  1907:   var MAX_PUSH_FAILS   = 5;    // raised: 3 was too low, single transient 500 entered backoff
  1908:   var PUSH_BACKOFF_MS  = 20000; // 20s cooldown (down from 30s for faster recovery)
  1909: 
  1910:   function _pushResourceKey(body) {
  1911:     /* Derive a stable resource key so booking and queue writes never collide */
  1912:     if (body && body.booking && body.booking.id) return 'booking:' + body.booking.id;
  1913:     if (body && body.queue   && body.queue.id)   return 'queue:'   + body.queue.id;
  1914:     return 'state'; /* full-state write */
  1915:   }
  1916: 
  1917:   function _pushSharedPatch(body, onSuccess, onConflict, onError) {
  1918:     var tok = _ctlGetToken();
  1919:     if (!tok) { if (onError) onError({ reason: 'no_token' }); return; }
  1920: 
  1921:     var now = Date.now();
  1922:     // Global backoff only blocks when we've had many consecutive failures
  1923:     if (_pushBackoffUntil && now < _pushBackoffUntil) {
  1924:       if (onError) onError({ reason: 'backoff' });
  1925:       return;
  1926:     }
  1927: 
  1928:     var rk = _pushResourceKey(body);
  1929:     // Per-resource inflight: queue the write instead of dropping it
  1930:     if (_pushInFlight[rk]) {
  1931:       // Store only the LATEST pending write (coalesce rapid edits)
  1932:       _pushQueue[rk] = { body: body, onSuccess: onSuccess, onConflict: onConflict, onError: onError };
  1933:       return;
  1934:     }
  1935: 
  1936:     _pushInFlight[rk] = true;
  1937:     var payload = Object.assign({ lockedSince: _lastServerWrite }, body);
  1938:     fetch('/api/studio/ctl_lab_state', {
  1939:       method: 'POST',
  1940:       headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok },
  1941:       body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  1942:     })
  1943:       .then(function (r) {
  1944:         // Always parse JSON safely — a 500 HTML page would throw and skip all handlers
  1945:         return r.json()
  1946:           .then(function (d) { return { status: r.status, data: d }; })
  1947:           .catch(function () { return { status: r.status, data: { ok: false, error: 'bad_json' } }; });
  1948:       })
  1949:       .then(function (res) {
  1950:         _pushInFlight[rk] = false;
  1951:         // Drain the queue for this resource key if a newer write arrived during inflight
  1952:         var pending = _pushQueue[rk];
  1953:         delete _pushQueue[rk];
  1954: 
  1955:         if (res.data && res.data.ok) {
  1956:           _pushFailCount = 0;
  1957:           _pushBackoffUntil = 0;
  1958:           _applySharedState(res.data);
  1959:           _lastServerWrite = Date.now();
  1960:           if (onSuccess) onSuccess(res.data);
  1961:           // Flush the queued write now that we're free
  1962:           if (pending) _pushSharedPatch(pending.body, pending.onSuccess, pending.onConflict, pending.onError);
  1963:         } else if (res.status === 409) {
  1964:           _pushFailCount = 0;
  1965:           _pushBackoffUntil = 0;
  1966:           _loadSharedStateFromServer(function () {
  1967:             if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  1968:             if (onConflict) onConflict();
  1969:           });
  1970:         } else {
  1971:           _pushFailCount++;
  1972:           if (_pushFailCount >= MAX_PUSH_FAILS) {
  1973:             _pushBackoffUntil = Date.now() + PUSH_BACKOFF_MS;
  1974:             console.warn('[CTL] Push failed ' + _pushFailCount + 'x — backing off ' + (PUSH_BACKOFF_MS/1000) + 's');
  1975:           }
  1976:           if (onError) onError(res);
  1977:           // Still flush pending even on error — it may be a different payload that succeeds
  1978:           if (pending) _pushSharedPatch(pending.body, pending.onSuccess, pending.onConflict, pending.onError);
  1979:         }
  1980:       })
  1981:       .catch(function (err) {
  1982:         _pushInFlight[rk] = false;
  1983:         delete _pushQueue[rk];
  1984:         _pushFailCount++;
  1985:         if (_pushFailCount >= MAX_PUSH_FAILS) {
  1986:           _pushBackoffUntil = Date.now() + PUSH_BACKOFF_MS;
  1987:           console.warn('[CTL] Push error ' + _pushFailCount + 'x — backing off ' + (PUSH_BACKOFF_MS/1000) + 's');
  1988:         }
  1989:         if (onError) onError(err);
  1990:       });
  1991:   }
  1992: 
  1993:   /* Expose for diagnostic / timer-expiry resets */
  1994:   function _resetPushState() {
  1995:     _pushInFlight = {};
  1996:     _pushQueue    = {};
  1997:     _pushFailCount = 0;
  1998:     _pushBackoffUntil = 0;
  1999:   }
  2000: 
  2001:   /* ── Booking / Queue accessors (BUG 2 FIX: always reads _stateCache) ────── */
  2002:   function getItems() { var r = _ls('mums_controller_lab_items_v1'); return Array.isArray(r) ? r : []; }
  2003: 
  2004:   /* BUG 3 FIX: expired bookings return null */
  2005:   function getBooking(id) {
  2006:     var b = _stateCache.bookings && _stateCache.bookings[id] ? _stateCache.bookings[id] : null;
  2007:     if (!b) return null;
  2008:     if (b.endMs && b.endMs <= Date.now()) return null; /* treat expired as free */
  2009:     return b;
  2010:   }
  2011: 
  2012:   function setBooking(id, data, onSuccess, onConflict, onError) {
  2013:     var prevBooking = _stateCache.bookings && _stateCache.bookings[id] ? _stateCache.bookings[id] : null;
  2014:     if (!_stateCache.bookings || typeof _stateCache.bookings !== 'object') _stateCache.bookings = {};
  2015:     if (data) _stateCache.bookings[id] = data;
  2016:     else       delete _stateCache.bookings[id];
  2017:     /* write-through cache */
  2018:     try { if (data) localStorage.setItem('ctl_booking_' + id, JSON.stringify(data)); else localStorage.removeItem('ctl_booking_' + id); } catch (_) {}
  2019:     _saveStateCache();
  2020:     var patch = data
  2021:       ? { booking: { id: id, data: data } }
  2022:       : { booking: { id: id, data: null } };
  2023:     _pushSharedPatch(patch, function (serverState) {
  2024:       /* Broadcast with inline patch so other tabs don't need a full re-fetch */
  2025:       var statePatch = data
  2026:         ? { bookings: {}, deletedBookings: [] }
  2027:         : { bookings: {}, deletedBookings: [id] };
  2028:       if (data) statePatch.bookings[id] = data;
  2029:       _broadcast({ type: 'ctl_update', key: 'ctl_booking_' + id, statePatch: statePatch });
  2030:       if (onSuccess) onSuccess();
  2031:     }, function () {
  2032:       /* BUG 1 FIX: conflict — revert local optimistic update */
  2033:       var serverBooking = _stateCache.bookings && _stateCache.bookings[id] ? _stateCache.bookings[id] : null;
  2034:       if (onConflict) onConflict(serverBooking);
  2035:     }, function (err) {
  2036:       /* Network/server error (non-409): rollback optimistic write */
  2037:       /* FIX: Only rollback the optimistic update on a real server/network error.
  2038:          Backoff rejections mean the booking state is locally correct. */
  2039:       var reason = err && err.reason;
  2040:       if (reason !== 'backoff') {
  2041:         if (prevBooking) _stateCache.bookings[id] = prevBooking;
  2042:         else delete _stateCache.bookings[id];
  2043:         try {
  2044:           if (prevBooking) localStorage.setItem('ctl_booking_' + id, JSON.stringify(prevBooking));
  2045:           else localStorage.removeItem('ctl_booking_' + id);
  2046:         } catch (_) {}
  2047:         _saveStateCache();
  2048:         if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2049:       }
  2050:       if (onError) onError(err);
  2051:     });
  2052:     if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2053:   }
  2054: 
  2055:   function getQueue(id) {
  2056:     var r = _stateCache.queues && Array.isArray(_stateCache.queues[id]) ? _stateCache.queues[id] : [];
  2057:     return Array.isArray(r) ? r : [];
  2058:   }
  2059: 
  2060:   /* BUG 4 FIX: client-side dedup before push */
  2061:   function setQueue(id, arr) {
  2062:     if (!_stateCache.queues || typeof _stateCache.queues !== 'object') _stateCache.queues = {};
  2063:     var deduped = _deduplicateQueue(Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : []);
  2064:     if (deduped.length) _stateCache.queues[id] = deduped;
  2065:     else                delete _stateCache.queues[id];
  2066:     try { if (deduped.length) localStorage.setItem('ctl_queue_' + id, JSON.stringify(deduped)); else localStorage.removeItem('ctl_queue_' + id); } catch (_) {}
  2067:     _saveStateCache();
  2068:     var qPatch = { queues: {} };
  2069:     qPatch.queues[id] = deduped;
  2070:     _pushSharedPatch({ queue: { id: id, items: deduped } }, function () {
  2071:       _broadcast({ type: 'ctl_update', key: 'ctl_queue_' + id, statePatch: qPatch });
  2072:     });
  2073:     if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2074:   }
  2075: 
  2076:   /* BUG 4 FIX: dedup queue by user (case-insensitive), keep last entry */
  2077:   function _deduplicateQueue(arr) {
  2078:     var seen = {};
  2079:     var out = [];
  2080:     /* iterate in reverse so last join wins (most recent task/duration kept) */
  2081:     for (var i = arr.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  2082:       var entry = arr[i];
  2083:       if (!entry || !entry.user) continue;
  2084:       var key = String(entry.user).trim().toLowerCase();
  2085:       if (!seen[key]) { seen[key] = true; out.unshift(entry); }
  2086:     }
  2087:     return out;
  2088:   }
  2089: 
  2090:   /* ── Pending log helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2091:   function getPendingLogs() { var r = _ls(BACKUP_LS_KEY); return Array.isArray(r) ? r : []; }
  2092:   function setPendingLogs(logs) { _setLs(BACKUP_LS_KEY, (logs || []).slice(0, 200)); }
  2093:   function savePendingLog(p) {
  2094:     try { var logs = getPendingLogs(); if (!logs.some(function (l) { return l.timestamp === p.timestamp && l.user === p.user; })) { logs.unshift(p); setPendingLogs(logs); } } catch (_) {}
  2095:   }
  2096:   function removePendingLog(ts, user) {
  2097:     try { setPendingLogs(getPendingLogs().filter(function (l) { return !(l.timestamp === ts && l.user === user); })); } catch (_) {}
  2098:   }
  2099: 
  2100:   /* ── Utility helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2101:   function esc(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;'); }
  2102:   function imageFor(type) { var m = { 'E2': '/Widget%20Images/E2_Widget.png', 'E3': '/Widget%20Images/E3_Widget.png', 'Site Supervisor': '/Widget%20Images/Site%20Supervisor_Widget.png' }; return m[type] || '/Widget%20Images/quickbase_logo.png'; }
  2103:   function labelFor(type) { var m = { 'E2': 'E2 Controller', 'E3': 'E3 Gateway', 'Site Supervisor': 'Site Supervisor' }; return m[type] || type; }
  2104:   function phtNow() { return new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'Asia/Manila', month: 'short', day: '2-digit', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit', hour12: true }) + ' PHT'; }
  2105:   function pad2(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : String(n); }
  2106:   function fmtMs(ms) { if (ms <= 0) return '00:00'; var s = Math.ceil(ms / 1000), h = Math.floor(s / 3600); s %= 3600; var m = Math.floor(s / 60); s %= 60; if (h > 0) return h + 'h ' + pad2(m) + 'm ' + pad2(s) + 's'; return pad2(m) + ':' + pad2(s); }
  2107:   function parseDurMs(str) {
  2108:     str = String(str || '').trim().toLowerCase(); var ms = 0;
  2109:     var h = str.match(/(\d+)\s*h(?:our)?s?/); if (h) ms += parseInt(h[1]) * 3600000;
  2110:     var m = str.match(/(\d+)\s*m(?:in(?:ute)?s?)?/); if (m) ms += parseInt(m[1]) * 60000;
  2111:     var sv = str.match(/(\d+)\s*s(?:ec(?:ond)?s?)?/); if (sv) ms += parseInt(sv[1]) * 1000;
  2112:     if (!ms) { var only = str.match(/^(\d+)$/); if (only) ms = parseInt(only[1]) * 60000; }
  2113:     return ms || 0;
  2114:   }
  2115:   function _getCurrentUser() {
  2116:     try {
  2117:       if (window._qbMyNameCache && window._qbMyNameCache.trim()) return window._qbMyNameCache.trim();
  2118:       var store = window.store && typeof window.store.getState === 'function' ? window.store.getState() : null;
  2119:       if (store && store.user) { var u = store.user; return (u.qb_name || u.name || u.email || 'Unknown').trim(); }
  2120:       if (window.me) return (window.me.qb_name || window.me.name || window.me.email || 'Unknown').trim();
  2121:     } catch (_) {}
  2122:     return 'Unknown';
  2123:   }
  2124:   function _sameUser(a, b) {
  2125:     var left = String(a || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  2126:     var right = String(b || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  2127:     return !!left && !!right && left === right;
  2128:   }
  2129:   function _getAvatarUrl() {
  2130:     try { var store = window.store && typeof window.store.getState === 'function' ? window.store.getState() : null; if (store && store.user && store.user.avatar_url) return store.user.avatar_url; if (window.me && window.me.avatar_url) return window.me.avatar_url; } catch (_) {}
  2131:     return '';
  2132:   }
  2133:   function buildFormPayload(p) {
  2134:     return new URLSearchParams({ timestamp: p.timestamp, user: p.user, controller: p.controller, task: p.task, duration: p.duration, backupFile: p.backupFile, note: p.note || '' });
  2135:   }
  2136: 
  2137:   /* ── BUG 6 FIX: Smart timer management ─────────────────────────────────── */
  2138:   /* Only clear/restart timers if the booking endMs actually changed.        */
  2139:   function _syncTimers(items) {
  2140:     var now = Date.now();
  2141:     /* Mark which item IDs are still present */
  2142:     var activeIds = {};
  2143:     items.forEach(function (item) { activeIds[item.id] = true; });
  2144: 
  2145:     /* Clear timers for removed controllers */
  2146:     Object.keys(window._ctlTimers).forEach(function (id) {
  2147:       if (!activeIds[id]) {
  2148:         clearInterval(window._ctlTimers[id].interval);
  2149:         delete window._ctlTimers[id];
  2150:       }
  2151:     });
  2152: 
  2153:     /* Start/restart timers only when booking changed */
  2154:     items.forEach(function (item) {
  2155:       var booking = getBooking(item.id);
  2156:       var existing = window._ctlTimers[item.id];
  2157: 
  2158:       if (!booking || booking.endMs <= now) {
  2159:         /* No active booking — clear timer */
  2160:         if (existing) { clearInterval(existing.interval); delete window._ctlTimers[item.id]; }
  2161:         return;
  2162:       }
  2163: 
  2164:       /* If timer already running for same booking endMs, don't restart */
  2165:       if (existing && existing.endMs === booking.endMs) return;
  2166: 
  2167:       /* Clear old timer (different booking) */
  2168:       if (existing) { clearInterval(existing.interval); delete window._ctlTimers[item.id]; }
  2169: 
  2170:       /* Capture booking in closure */
  2171:       (function (capturedItem, capturedBooking) {
  2172:         function tick() {
  2173:           var rem = capturedBooking.endMs - Date.now();
  2174:           if (rem <= 0) {
  2175:             /* Session expired */
  2176:             clearInterval(window._ctlTimers[capturedItem.id] && window._ctlTimers[capturedItem.id].interval);
  2177:             delete window._ctlTimers[capturedItem.id];
  2178:             /* BUG 3 FIX: clear from cache so getBooking returns null */
  2179:             if (_stateCache.bookings) delete _stateCache.bookings[capturedItem.id];
  2180:             _saveStateCache();
  2181:             /* Time-up alarm for the session owner */
  2182:             _maybeTimeUpAlert(capturedItem, capturedBooking);
  2183:             /* Broadcast expiry — all tabs will re-render and trigger their own notify sweep */
  2184:             _broadcast({
  2185:               type: 'ctl_update',
  2186:               subtype: 'booking_expired',
  2187:               ctrlId: capturedItem.id,
  2188:               statePatch: { bookings: {}, deletedBookings: [capturedItem.id] }
  2189:             });
  2190:             _pushSharedPatch({ booking: { id: capturedItem.id, data: null } });
  2191:             /* Notify next in queue — runs on the tab that owns the timer */
  2192:             setTimeout(function() { _ctlNotifyQueue(capturedItem.id); }, 300);
  2193:             if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2194:             return;
  2195:           }
  2196:           var valEl = document.getElementById('ctl-timer-' + capturedItem.id + '-val');
  2197:           if (valEl) valEl.textContent = fmtMs(rem);
  2198:           var wrapEl = document.getElementById('ctl-timer-' + capturedItem.id);
  2199:           if (wrapEl) {
  2200:             if (rem < 120000) wrapEl.classList.add('urgent'); else wrapEl.classList.remove('urgent');
  2201:             wrapEl.style.display = '';
  2202:           }
  2203:         }
  2204:         tick();
  2205:         var iv = setInterval(tick, 1000);
  2206:         window._ctlTimers[capturedItem.id] = { interval: iv, endMs: capturedBooking.endMs };
  2207:       })(item, booking);
  2208:     });
  2209:   }
  2210: 
  2211:   /* ── BUG 5 FIX: Notify queue with lock ─────────────────────────────────── */
  2212:   function _ctlNotifyQueue(itemId) {
  2213:     var queue = getQueue(itemId);
  2214:     if (!queue.length) { if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll(); return; }
  2215: 
  2216:     var next = queue[0] || {};
  2217:     var items = getItems();
  2218:     var ctrl = items.find(function (i) { return i.id === itemId; }) || {};
  2219:     var ctrlLabel = labelFor(ctrl.type || '');
  2220:     var me = _getCurrentUser();
  2221: 
  2222:     /* BUG 5 FIX: suppress duplicate notify within 30s */
  2223:     var lockKey = itemId + '|' + (next.user || '');
  2224:     var lockTs = _notifyLocks[lockKey] || 0;
  2225:     if (lockTs && (Date.now() - lockTs) < 30000) return;
  2226:     _notifyLocks[lockKey] = Date.now();
  2227: 
  2228:     var firstNotify = !next.notifiedAt;
  2229:     if (firstNotify) {
  2230:       next.notifiedAt = Date.now();
  2231:       next.notifyExpiresAt = Date.now() + (3 * 60 * 1000);
  2232:       queue[0] = next;
  2233:       setQueue(itemId, queue);
  2234:     } else {
  2235:       var exp = Number(next.notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2236:       if (exp && exp <= Date.now()) {
  2237:         /* Grace period: if notified within last 15s, extend rather than void */
  2238:         var nAt = Number(next.notifiedAt || 0);
  2239:         if (nAt && (Date.now() - nAt) < 15000) {
  2240:           next.notifyExpiresAt = Date.now() + (3 * 60 * 1000);
  2241:           queue[0] = next;
  2242:           setQueue(itemId, queue);
  2243:           return;
  2244:         }
  2245:         queue.shift();
  2246:         delete _notifyLocks[lockKey];
  2247:         setQueue(itemId, queue);
  2248:         if (queue.length) _ctlNotifyQueue(itemId);
  2249:         return;
  2250:       }
  2251:       return; /* already notified, not yet expired */
  2252:     }
  2253: 
  2254:     /* Sheet log */
  2255:     if (firstNotify && SHEETS_ENDPOINT && next.task) {
  2256:       var logPayload = { timestamp: phtNow(), user: next.user, controller: ctrlLabel + ' — ' + (ctrl.ip || '—'), task: next.task, duration: next.duration || 'queued', backupFile: 'pending', note: 'Queue turn notified' };
  2257:       savePendingLog(logPayload);
  2258:       fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'POST', mode: 'no-cors', body: buildFormPayload(logPayload) }).catch(function () {});
  2259:     }
  2260: 
  2261:     /* Broadcast notify to all tabs */
  2262:     _broadcast({
  2263:       type: 'ctl_update', subtype: 'queue_notify',
  2264:       ctrlId: itemId, ctrlLabel: ctrlLabel,
  2265:       targetUser: next.user,
  2266:       notifyExpiresAt: next.notifyExpiresAt || 0
  2267:     });
  2268: 
  2269:     if (_sameUser(next.user, me)) {
  2270:       _triggerQueueAlert(itemId, ctrlLabel, next.notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2271:     } else {
  2272:       _showAlarmBanner(next.user + '\'s turn! ' + ctrlLabel + ' is now available.', itemId);
  2273:     }
  2274: 
  2275:     if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2276:   }
  2277: 
  2278:   /* ── BUG 5 FIX: expose notify for timer expiry ───────────────────────────  */
  2279:   window._ctlNotifyQueue = _ctlNotifyQueue;
  2280: 
  2281:   /* ── Queue sweeper ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2282:   function _ctlSweepQueueTimeouts() {
  2283:     if (_queueSweepBusy) return;
  2284:     // FIX: Do not mutate queue state during global backoff window.
  2285:     // During backoff, setQueue calls would hit the failCount limit immediately.
  2286:     if (_pushBackoffUntil && Date.now() < _pushBackoffUntil) return;
  2287:     _queueSweepBusy = true;
  2288:     try {
  2289:       var now = Date.now();
  2290:       var items = getItems();
  2291:       items.forEach(function (item) {
  2292:         var id = item && item.id ? item.id : '';
  2293:         if (!id) return;
  2294:         var booking = getBooking(id);
  2295:         var queue = getQueue(id);
  2296:         if (!queue.length) return;
  2297:         if (!booking || booking.endMs <= now) {
  2298:           var head = queue[0] || {};
  2299:           var expiresAt = Number(head.notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2300:           if (expiresAt && expiresAt <= now) {
  2301:             var notifiedAt = Number(head.notifiedAt || 0);
  2302:             if (notifiedAt && (now - notifiedAt) < 15000) {
  2303:               head.notifyExpiresAt = now + (3 * 60 * 1000);
  2304:               queue[0] = head;
  2305:               setQueue(id, queue);
  2306:               return;
  2307:             }
  2308:             var lockKey = id + '|' + (head.user || '');
  2309:             delete _notifyLocks[lockKey];
  2310:             queue.shift();
  2311:             setQueue(id, queue);
  2312:             if (queue.length) _ctlNotifyQueue(id);
  2313:             return;
  2314:           }
  2315:           if (!head.notifiedAt) _ctlNotifyQueue(id);
  2316:         }
  2317:       });
  2318:     } catch (_) {}
  2319:     _queueSweepBusy = false;
  2320:   }
  2321: 
  2322:   /* ── Time-up alert (BUG 10 FIX: deferred CSS injection) ─────────────────── */
  2323:   function _injectTimeUpCSS() {
  2324:     if (document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-css')) return;
  2325:     function doInject() {
  2326:       if (!document.head) { requestAnimationFrame(doInject); return; }
  2327:       var s = document.createElement('style');
  2328:       s.id = 'hp-ctl-timeup-css';
  2329:       s.textContent = [
  2330:         '@keyframes hp-tua-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(248,81,73,.55),0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.7)}60%{box-shadow:0 0 0 18px rgba(248,81,73,0),0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.7)}}',
  2331:         '@keyframes hp-tua-icon-bounce{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}45%{transform:scale(1.18)}}',
  2332:         '@keyframes hp-tua-bg-flash{0%,100%{background:rgba(1,4,9,.88)}50%{background:rgba(40,6,6,.92)}}',
  2333:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-modal{animation:hp-tua-bg-flash 1.6s ease-in-out infinite}',
  2334:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-card{animation:hp-tua-pulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite}',
  2335:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-icon{animation:hp-tua-icon-bounce 1.4s ease-in-out infinite}',
  2336:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-bar-fill{transition:width 1s linear}',
  2337:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-ok-btn:hover{background:rgba(248,81,73,.35)!important;transform:scale(1.04)}',
  2338:         '#hp-ctl-timeup-ok-btn{transition:all .15s}'
  2339:       ].join('');
  2340:       document.head.appendChild(s);
  2341:     }
  2342:     doInject();
  2343:   }
  2344:   _injectTimeUpCSS();
  2345: 
  2346:   var _timeUpState = { audio: null, stopTimer: null, barTimer: null, key: '' };
  2347:   var _timeUpDismissed = {};
  2348: 
  2349:   function _stopTimeUpAlert() {
  2350:     try {
  2351:       if (_timeUpState.stopTimer) { clearTimeout(_timeUpState.stopTimer); _timeUpState.stopTimer = null; }
  2352:       if (_timeUpState.barTimer)  { clearInterval(_timeUpState.barTimer);  _timeUpState.barTimer  = null; }
  2353:       if (_timeUpState.audio)     { _timeUpState.audio.pause(); _timeUpState.audio.currentTime = 0; _timeUpState.audio = null; }
  2354:     } catch (_) {}
  2355:     var modal = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-modal');
  2356:     if (modal && modal.parentElement) modal.remove();
  2357:   }
  2358: 
  2359:   function _playAudio(audio, sources, idx) {
  2360:     if (!audio || !sources || idx >= sources.length) return;
  2361:     audio.src = sources[idx];
  2362:     audio.onerror = function () { _playAudio(audio, sources, idx + 1); };
  2363:     var p = audio.play();
  2364:     if (p && typeof p.catch === 'function') {
  2365:       p.catch(function () {
  2366:         function _retryOnGesture() {
  2367:           document.removeEventListener('click', _retryOnGesture, { capture: true });
  2368:           try { audio.play().catch(function () {}); } catch (_) {}
  2369:         }
  2370:         document.addEventListener('click', _retryOnGesture, { capture: true, once: true });
  2371:       });
  2372:     }
  2373:   }
  2374: 
  2375:   function _showTimeUpAlert(item, booking) {
  2376:     _stopTimeUpAlert();
  2377:     var ALARM_MS = 30000;
  2378:     var startedAt = Date.now();
  2379: 
  2380:     var modal = document.createElement('div');
  2381:     modal.id = 'hp-ctl-timeup-modal';
  2382:     modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:14px;';
  2383:     modal.innerHTML =
  2384:       '<div id="hp-ctl-timeup-card" style="width:min(440px,94vw);border-radius:18px;padding:28px 24px 22px;' +
  2385:         'background:linear-gradient(160deg,#1a0a0a,#110d0d,#0d1117);' +
  2386:         'border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.45);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">' +
  2387:         '<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(248,81,73,.9),transparent);"></div>' +
  2388:         '<div id="hp-ctl-timeup-icon" style="font-size:38px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1;">⏰</div>' +
  2389:         '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:#fda4af;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px;">TIME\'S UP!</div>' +

  2391:           'Your booking for <strong style="color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding:1px 7px;border-radius:5px;">' +
  2392:           esc(labelFor(item.type || '')) + '</strong> has ended.' +
  2393:         '</div>' +

  2395:           'Alert silences in <span id="hp-ctl-timeup-sec" style="color:#fda4af;font-weight:700;">30</span>s — or press OK now.' +

  2398:           '<div id="hp-ctl-timeup-bar-fill" style="height:100%;width:100%;border-radius:99px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f85149,#fda4af);"></div>' +
  2399:         '</div>' +
  2400:         '<button id="hp-ctl-timeup-ok-btn" style="min-width:130px;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:11px;border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.6);background:rgba(248,81,73,.22);color:#fecaca;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.5px;">✓ OK — Silence Alert</button>' +
  2401:       '</div>';
  2402:     document.body.appendChild(modal);
  2403: 
  2404:     document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-ok-btn').addEventListener('click', function () {
  2405:       _timeUpDismissed[_timeUpState.key] = Date.now();
  2406:       _stopTimeUpAlert();
  2407:     });
  2408: 
  2409:     function _tickBar() {
  2410:       var elapsed = Date.now() - startedAt;
  2411:       var remaining = Math.max(0, ALARM_MS - elapsed);
  2412:       var secEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-sec');
  2413:       var barEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-timeup-bar-fill');
  2414:       if (secEl) secEl.textContent = Math.ceil(remaining / 1000);
  2415:       if (barEl) barEl.style.width = ((remaining / ALARM_MS) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
  2416:     }
  2417:     _tickBar();
  2418:     _timeUpState.barTimer = setInterval(_tickBar, 500);
  2419: 
  2420:     var audio = new Audio();
  2421:     audio.loop   = true;
  2422:     audio.volume = 0.92;
  2423:     _timeUpState.audio = audio;
  2424:     _playAudio(audio, [TIMEUP_SOUND_URL, '/sound_alert_queue.mp3'], 0);
  2425:     _timeUpState.stopTimer = setTimeout(function () {
  2426:       _timeUpDismissed[_timeUpState.key] = Date.now();
  2427:       _stopTimeUpAlert();
  2428:     }, ALARM_MS);
  2429:   }
  2430: 
  2431:   function _maybeTimeUpAlert(item, booking) {
  2432:     if (!item || !booking) return;
  2433:     if (!_sameUser(booking.user, _getCurrentUser())) return;
  2434:     var alertKey = [item.id, booking.user || '', booking.startMs || '', booking.endMs || ''].join('|');
  2435:     if (_timeUpDismissed[alertKey]) return;
  2436:     if (_timeUpState.key === alertKey) return;
  2437:     _timeUpState.key = alertKey;
  2438:     _showTimeUpAlert(item, booking);
  2439:   }
  2440: 
  2441:   /* ── Queue alert sound ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2442:   function _stopQueueSound() {
  2443:     try { if (_queueAudio) { _queueAudio.pause(); _queueAudio.currentTime = 0; _queueAudio = null; } } catch (_) {}
  2444:   }
  2445:   function _startQueueSound() {
  2446:     _stopQueueSound();
  2447:     _queueAudio = new Audio();
  2448:     _queueAudio.loop   = true;
  2449:     _queueAudio.volume = 0.85;
  2450:     _playAudio(_queueAudio, [QUEUE_SOUND_URL, '/sound_alert_queue.mp3'], 0);
  2451:   }
  2452: 
  2453:   function _clearBackupUploadTimer() {
  2454:     if (_backupUploadTimer) {
  2455:       clearInterval(_backupUploadTimer);
  2456:       _backupUploadTimer = null;
  2457:     }
  2458:   }
  2459: 
  2460:   function _queueTurnKey(ctrlId, user, notifyExpiresAt) {
  2461:     return [ctrlId || '', String(user || '').trim().toLowerCase(), Number(notifyExpiresAt || 0)].join('|');
  2462:   }
  2463: 
  2464:   function _triggerQueueAlert(ctrlId, ctrlLabel, notifyExpiresAt) {
  2465:     var queue = getQueue(ctrlId);
  2466:     var me = _getCurrentUser();
  2467:     var head = queue[0] || {};
  2468:     if (!head.user || !_sameUser(head.user, me)) return;
  2469:     var turnKey = _queueTurnKey(ctrlId, head.user, notifyExpiresAt || head.notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2470:     if (_queueAlertState.acked[turnKey]) return;
  2471:     if (_queueAlertState.activeKey === turnKey && document.getElementById('hp-ctl-queue-alert-modal')) return;
  2472:     _queueAlertState.activeKey = turnKey;
  2473:     _stopQueueSound();
  2474:     _showQueueAlertBanner(ctrlId, ctrlLabel, notifyExpiresAt);
  2475:     _startQueueSound();
  2476:   }
  2477:

  2492:           '<div style="width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(162,93,220,.3),rgba(109,40,217,.2));border:2px solid rgba(162,93,220,.6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">' +

  2498:         '<div id="hp-ctl-qa-countdown" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:120px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.35);color:#fda4af;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;font-family:monospace;margin-bottom:10px;">03:00</div>' +
  2499:         '<div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:28px;">Acknowledge before timer ends or your queue slot will be forfeited.</div>' +
  2500:         '<button id="hp-ctl-qa-ack-btn" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(162,93,220,.35),rgba(109,40,217,.25));border:1.5px solid rgba(162,93,220,.55);color:#c084fc;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;">' +
  2501:           '<i class="fas fa-check-circle" style="font-size:16px;"></i> I\'m Ready — Upload Backup' +

  2504: 
  2505:     document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  2506: 
  2507:     var cdEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-qa-countdown');
  2508:     var expMs = Number(notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2509:     if (!expMs || expMs <= Date.now()) {
  2510:       expMs = Date.now() + (3 * 60 * 1000);
  2511:       /* Stamp the queue entry */
  2512:       var rq = getQueue(ctrlId);
  2513:       var me = _getCurrentUser();
  2514:       if (rq.length && rq[0] && _sameUser(rq[0].user, me)) {
  2515:         rq[0].notifiedAt = Date.now();
  2516:         rq[0].notifyExpiresAt = expMs;
  2517:         setQueue(ctrlId, rq);
  2518:       }
  2519:     }
  2520:     var cdTimer = setInterval(function () {
  2521:       var rem = expMs - Date.now();
  2522:       if (rem <= 0) {
  2523:         clearInterval(cdTimer);
  2524:         _stopQueueSound();
  2525:         _queueAlertState.activeKey = '';
  2526:         if (overlay && overlay.parentElement) overlay.remove();
  2527:         /* Auto-void this user's queue turn */
  2528:         var q  = getQueue(ctrlId);
  2529:         var me = _getCurrentUser();
  2530:         if (q.length && q[0] && _sameUser(q[0].user, me)) {
  2531:           var lockKey = ctrlId + '|' + (q[0].user || '');
  2532:           delete _notifyLocks[lockKey];
  2533:           q.shift();
  2534:           setQueue(ctrlId, q);
  2535:           if (q.length) _ctlNotifyQueue(ctrlId);
  2536:         }
  2537:         alert('Time is up (3:00). Your queue turn was forfeited. Please queue again if needed.');
  2538:         return;
  2539:       }
  2540:       if (cdEl) cdEl.textContent = fmtMs(rem);
  2541:     }, 1000);
  2542: 
  2543:     document.getElementById('hp-ctl-qa-ack-btn').addEventListener('click', function () {
  2544:       clearInterval(cdTimer);
  2545:       _stopQueueSound();
  2546:       var me = _getCurrentUser();
  2547:       var q = getQueue(ctrlId);
  2548:       var head = q[0] || {};
  2549:       if (head.user && _sameUser(head.user, me)) {
  2550:         head.acknowledgedAt = Date.now();
  2551:         q[0] = head;
  2552:         setQueue(ctrlId, q);
  2553:       }
  2554:       _queueAlertState.acked[_queueTurnKey(ctrlId, me, expMs)] = Date.now();
  2555:       _queueAlertState.activeKey = '';
  2556:       overlay.remove();
  2557:       window._ctlOpenBackupUpload && window._ctlOpenBackupUpload(ctrlId);
  2558:     });
  2559:   }
  2560: 
  2561:   /* ── Backup upload modal (after queue turn ack) ───────────────────────────  */
  2562:   window._ctlOpenBackupUpload = function (itemId) {
  2563:     var items   = getItems();
  2564:     var ctrl    = items.find(function (it) { return it.id === itemId; });
  2565:     if (!ctrl) return;
  2566:     var queue   = getQueue(itemId);
  2567:     var me      = _getCurrentUser();
  2568:     var qEntry  = queue.find(function (q) { return _sameUser(q && q.user, me); }) || {};
  2569: 
  2570:     var existing = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-backup-upload-modal');
  2571:     if (existing) existing.remove();
  2572:     _clearBackupUploadTimer();
  2573: 
  2574:     var expireAt = Number(qEntry.notifyExpiresAt || 0);
  2575:     if (!expireAt || expireAt <= Date.now()) {
  2576:       expireAt = Date.now() + (3 * 60 * 1000);
  2577:       if (queue.length && queue[0] && _sameUser(queue[0].user, me)) {
  2578:         queue[0].notifyExpiresAt = expireAt;
  2579:         if (!queue[0].notifiedAt) queue[0].notifiedAt = Date.now();
  2580:         setQueue(itemId, queue);
  2581:       }
  2582:     }
  2583: 
  2584:     var overlay = document.createElement('div');
  2585:     overlay.id  = 'hp-ctl-backup-upload-modal';
  2586:     overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99998;background:rgba(1,4,9,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';
  2587:     overlay.innerHTML =
  2588:       '<div style="background:#0d1117;border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.25);border-radius:18px;width:min(500px,95vw);max-height:90vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.8);">' +
  2589:         '<div style="padding:20px 22px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(34,197,94,.07),transparent);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">' +
  2590:           '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">' +
  2591:             '<div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">' +
  2592:               '<i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt" style="color:#4ade80;font-size:15px;"></i>' +

  2602:             '<strong style="color:#4ade80;">Your queued task:</strong> ' + esc(qEntry.task || '—') +
  2603:             '<br><strong style="color:#4ade80;">Duration:</strong> ' + esc(qEntry.duration || '—') +
  2604:           '</div>' +
  2605:           '<div style="padding:12px;background:rgba(88,166,255,.06);border:1px dashed rgba(88,166,255,.2);border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;" onclick="window._ctlOpenBackupFolder()">' +
  2606:             '<i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt" style="font-size:20px;color:#58a6ff;display:block;margin-bottom:6px;"></i>' +
  2607:             '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#94a3b8;">Click to Upload to SharePoint</div>' +
  2608:             '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#4b5563;margin-top:3px;">Upload → copy link → paste below</div>' +
  2609:           '</div>' +
  2610:           '<div style="position:relative;">' +
  2611:             '<i class="fas fa-link" style="position:absolute;left:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:#6b7280;font-size:12px;"></i>' +
  2612:             '<input id="hp-ctl-bu-backup-link" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px 10px 34px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:9px;color:#e2e8f0;font-size:12px;box-sizing:border-box;" type="text" placeholder="Paste SharePoint backup link here…" autocomplete="off"/>' +
  2613:           '</div>' +
  2614:           '<div id="hp-ctl-bu-error" style="display:none;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(248,81,73,.08);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:#f85149;"></div>' +
  2615:           '<button id="hp-ctl-bu-start-btn" onclick="window._ctlStartFromQueue(\'' + esc(itemId) + '\')" style="padding:13px 20px;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(34,197,94,.22),rgba(16,185,129,.14));border:1.5px solid rgba(34,197,94,.45);color:#4ade80;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;">' +
  2616:             '<i class="fas fa-play-circle" style="font-size:14px;"></i> Start My Session' +
  2617:           '</button>' +
  2618:         '</div>' +
  2619:       '</div>';
  2620:     document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  2621: 
  2622:     _backupUploadTimer = setInterval(function () {
  2623:       var rem = expireAt - Date.now();
  2624:       if (rem > 0) return;
  2625:       _clearBackupUploadTimer();
  2626:       var latest = getQueue(itemId);
  2627:       var meNow = _getCurrentUser();
  2628:       if (latest.length && latest[0] && _sameUser(latest[0].user, meNow)) {
  2629:         var lockKey = itemId + '|' + (latest[0].user || '');
  2630:         delete _notifyLocks[lockKey];
  2631:         latest.shift();
  2632:         setQueue(itemId, latest);
  2633:         if (latest.length) _ctlNotifyQueue(itemId);
  2634:       }
  2635:       var modalNow = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-backup-upload-modal');
  2636:       if (modalNow) modalNow.remove();
  2637:       // BUG G FIX: Reset push state on expiry so next queue cycle is not blocked
  2638:       _resetPushState();
  2639:       alert('Queue turn expired (3:00). Slot was auto-cleared because backup/start was not completed.');
  2640:     }, 1000);
  2641:   };
  2642: 
  2643:   /* ── Start session from queue ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2644:   window._ctlStartFromQueue = function (itemId) {
  2645:     var backupEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bu-backup-link');
  2646:     var errorEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bu-error');
  2647:     var backup   = (backupEl && backupEl.value.trim()) || '';
  2648:     if (!backup) {
  2649:       if (errorEl) { errorEl.textContent = 'Please upload your backup file and paste the link first.'; errorEl.style.display = 'block'; }
  2650:       return;
  2651:     }
  2652:     if (errorEl) errorEl.style.display = 'none';
  2653: 
  2654:     var queue  = getQueue(itemId);
  2655:     var me     = _getCurrentUser();
  2656:     var qEntry = queue.find(function (q) { return _sameUser(q && q.user, me); }) || {};
  2657: 
  2658:     /* BUG 1 FIX: check controller is still free before booking */
  2659:     var currentBooking = getBooking(itemId);
  2660:     if (currentBooking && currentBooking.endMs > Date.now()) {
  2661:       if (errorEl) { errorEl.textContent = 'Controller was just booked by ' + esc(currentBooking.user) + '. Please wait for their session to end.'; errorEl.style.display = 'block'; }
  2662:       /* Re-fetch to sync */
  2663:       _loadSharedStateFromServer(function () { if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll(); });
  2664:       return;
  2665:     }
  2666: 
  2667:     var durMs   = parseDurMs(qEntry.duration || '30 minutes');
  2668:     var booking = {
  2669:       user: me, avatarUrl: _getAvatarUrl(),
  2670:       task: qEntry.task || 'Queued session',
  2671:       duration: qEntry.duration || '30 minutes',
  2672:       backupFile: backup,
  2673:       startMs: Date.now(), endMs: Date.now() + durMs,
  2674:     };
  2675: 
  2676:     /* BUG 1 FIX: optimistic lock — if server rejects with 409, show error */
  2677:     var startBtn = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bu-start-btn');
  2678:     if (startBtn) { startBtn.disabled = true; startBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Starting…'; }
  2679: 
  2680:     setBooking(itemId, booking, function () {
  2681:       /* success */
  2682:       /* Remove user from queue only after booking is committed */
  2683:       var lockKey = itemId + '|' + me;
  2684:       delete _notifyLocks[lockKey];
  2685:       var latestQueue = getQueue(itemId);
  2686:       var newQueue = latestQueue.filter(function (q) { return !_sameUser(q && q.user, me); });
  2687:       setQueue(itemId, newQueue);
  2688: 
  2689:       var items  = getItems();
  2690:       var ctrl   = items.find(function (it) { return it.id === itemId; }) || {};
  2691:       var payload = { timestamp: phtNow(), user: me, controller: labelFor(ctrl.type) + ' — ' + (ctrl.ip || '—'), task: booking.task, duration: booking.duration, backupFile: backup, note: 'Started from queue' };
  2692:       savePendingLog(payload);
  2693:       if (SHEETS_ENDPOINT) fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'POST', mode: 'no-cors', body: buildFormPayload(payload) }).catch(function () {});
  2694:       /* FEATURE 2: Append to per-controller backup log (queue path) */
  2695:       if (typeof window._ctlAppendBackupLog === 'function') {
  2696:         window._ctlAppendBackupLog(itemId, { timestamp: phtNow(), user: me, task: booking.task, backupFile: backup });
  2697:       }
  2698:       _updatePendingBtn();
  2699:       var modal = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-backup-upload-modal');
  2700:       if (modal) modal.remove();
  2701:       _clearBackupUploadTimer();
  2702:       if (window._ctlRenderAll) window._ctlRenderAll();
  2703:     }, function (existingBooking) {
  2704:       /* BUG 1 FIX: conflict — another user booked between our checks */
  2705:       if (startBtn) { startBtn.disabled = false; startBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-play-circle" style="font-size:14px;"></i> Start My Session'; }
  2706:       if (errorEl) {
  2707:         var who = existingBooking ? existingBooking.user : 'someone else';
  2708:         errorEl.textContent = 'Controller was just booked by ' + esc(who) + '. Please wait for their session to end.';
  2709:         errorEl.style.display = 'block';
  2710:       }
  2711:     }, function (errRes) {
  2712:       /* BUG C FIX: Server/network error (including backoff/in_flight rejections)
  2713:          ALWAYS re-enable the button so the user is never permanently stuck.
  2714:          Distinguish between a real server error and a local throttle response. */
  2715:       if (startBtn) { startBtn.disabled = false; startBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-play-circle" style="font-size:14px;"></i> Start My Session'; }
  2716:       if (errorEl) {
  2717:         var reason = errRes && errRes.reason;
  2718:         if (reason === 'backoff') {
  2719:           errorEl.textContent = 'Server is temporarily unavailable. Your queue slot is preserved. Please retry in 30 seconds.';
  2720:         } else {
  2721:           errorEl.textContent = 'Unable to start session right now (server unavailable). Your queue slot is preserved. Please retry.';
  2722:         }
  2723:         errorEl.style.display = 'block';
  2724:       }
  2725:     });
  2726:   };
  2727: 
  2728:   /* ── Open booking modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2729:   window._ctlOpenBooking = function (itemId) {
  2730:     var items = getItems();
  2731:     var ctrl  = items.find(function (it) { return it.id === itemId; });
  2732:     if (!ctrl) return;
  2733:     _bookingCtlId   = itemId;
  2734:     _bookingCtlData = ctrl;
  2735: 
  2736:     /* BUG 7 FIX: fresh server fetch before opening modal */
  2737:     var tok = _ctlGetToken();
  2738:     if (tok) {
  2739:       fetch('/api/studio/ctl_lab_state', { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + tok, 'Cache-Control': 'no-store' } })
  2740:         .then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : null; })
  2741:         .then(function (d) { if (d && d.ok) { _applySharedState(d); _lastServerWrite = Date.now(); } })
  2742:         .catch(function () {})
  2743:         .finally(function () { _renderBookingModal(itemId, ctrl); });
  2744:     } else {
  2745:       _renderBookingModal(itemId, ctrl);
  2746:     }
  2747:   };
  2748: 
  2749:   function _renderBookingModal(itemId, ctrl) {
  2750:     var booking  = getBooking(itemId);
  2751:     var isActive = !!(booking && booking.endMs > Date.now());
  2752: 
  2753:     var imgEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-ctrl-img');
  2754:     var nameEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-ctrl-name');
  2755:     var ipEl   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-ctrl-ip');
  2756:     if (imgEl)  imgEl.src          = imageFor(ctrl.type);
  2757:     if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = labelFor(ctrl.type);
  2758:     if (ipEl)   ipEl.textContent   = ctrl.ip || '—';
  2759: 
  2760:     var userDisp = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-user-display');
  2761:     var dateDisp = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-date-display');
  2762:     if (userDisp) userDisp.textContent = _getCurrentUser();
  2763:     if (dateDisp) dateDisp.textContent = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
  2764: 
  2765:     ['hp-ctl-bk-task', 'hp-ctl-bk-duration', 'hp-ctl-bk-backup', 'hp-ctl-bk-custom-time'].forEach(function (id) {
  2766:       var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) { el.value = ''; el.classList.remove('invalid'); }
  2767:     });
  2768:     document.querySelectorAll('.hp-ctl-dur-chip').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('selected', 'invalid-chip'); });
  2769:     var customWrap = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-custom-time-wrap'); if (customWrap) customWrap.style.display = 'none';
  2770: 
  2771:     var inUseNotice = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-notice');
  2772:     var inUserName  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-name');
  2773:     var inUserEnd   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-end');
  2774:     if (inUseNotice) inUseNotice.style.display = isActive ? 'flex' : 'none';
  2775:     if (isActive && booking) {
  2776:       if (inUserName) inUserName.textContent = booking.user;
  2777:       if (inUserEnd)  inUserEnd.textContent  = 'Ends in approx. ' + fmtMs(booking.endMs - Date.now());
  2778:     }
  2779: 
  2780:     var successEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-success');
  2781:     var bodyEl    = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-booking-body');
  2782:     if (successEl) successEl.classList.remove('show');
  2783:     if (bodyEl)    Array.from(bodyEl.children).forEach(function (c) { if (!c.classList.contains('hp-ctl-bk-success')) c.style.display = ''; });
  2784: 
  2785:     var sheetSt = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-sheet-status');
  2786:     if (sheetSt) { sheetSt.style.display = 'none'; sheetSt.textContent = ''; }
  2787: 
  2788:     var regBtn   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-btn');
  2789:     var regIcon  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-icon');
  2790:     var regLabel = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-label');
  2791:     var spinner  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-spinner');
  2792:     if (regBtn)   regBtn.disabled = false;
  2793:     if (regIcon)  regIcon.style.display = '';
  2794:     if (regLabel) regLabel.textContent = 'Book this Controller';
  2795:     if (spinner)  spinner.style.display = 'none';
  2796: 
  2797:     _updatePendingBtn();
  2798:     _autoRetryPendingLogs();
  2799:     var modal = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-booking-modal');
  2800:     if (modal) { modal.classList.add('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); }
  2801:     setTimeout(function () { var t = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-task'); if (t) t.focus(); }, 80);
  2802:     _pingSheet(null);
  2803:   }
  2804: 
  2805:   window._ctlCloseBooking = function () {
  2806:     var modal = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-booking-modal');
  2807:     if (modal) { modal.classList.remove('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); }
  2808:     _bookingCtlId = null; _bookingCtlData = null;
  2809:     document.querySelectorAll('.hp-ctl-bk-step').forEach(function (s) { s.classList.remove('done'); });
  2810:     document.querySelectorAll('.hp-ctl-dur-chip').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('selected', 'invalid-chip'); });
  2811:   };
  2812: 
  2813:   window._ctlOpenBackupFolder = function () { window.open(BACKUP_FOLDER_URL, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer'); };
  2814: 
  2815:   /* ── Submit booking ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  2816:   window._ctlSubmitBooking = function () {
  2817:     if (!_bookingCtlData) return;
  2818:     var taskEl   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-task');
  2819:     var durEl    = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-duration');
  2820:     var backupEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-backup');
  2821:     var customEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-custom-time');
  2822: 
  2823:     [taskEl, durEl, backupEl].forEach(function (el) { if (el) el.classList.remove('invalid'); });
  2824:     document.querySelectorAll('.hp-ctl-dur-chip').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('invalid-chip'); });
  2825: 
  2826:     var task   = (taskEl   && taskEl.value.trim())   || '';
  2827:     var durVal = (durEl    && durEl.value.trim())    || '';
  2828:     var backup = (backupEl && backupEl.value.trim()) || '';
  2829:     var valid  = true;
  2830: 
  2831:     if (!task)   { if (taskEl)   taskEl.classList.add('invalid');   valid = false; }
  2832:     if (!durVal) { if (durEl)    durEl.classList.add('invalid');    document.querySelectorAll('.hp-ctl-dur-chip').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.add('invalid-chip'); }); valid = false; }
  2833:     if (!backup) { if (backupEl) backupEl.classList.add('invalid'); valid = false; }
  2834: 
  2835:     var duration = durVal;
  2836:     if (durVal === 'set_time') {
  2837:       var custom = (customEl && customEl.value.trim()) || '';
  2838:       if (!custom) { if (customEl) customEl.classList.add('invalid'); valid = false; }
  2839:       else duration = custom;
  2840:     }
  2841:     if (!valid) return;
  2842: 
  2843:     /* BUG 1 FIX: check controller is still free */
  2844:     var existingBooking = getBooking(_bookingCtlId);
  2845:     if (existingBooking && existingBooking.endMs > Date.now()) {
  2846:       var inUserName = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-name');
  2847:       var inUserEnd  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-end');
  2848:       var notice     = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-notice');
  2849:       if (inUserName) inUserName.textContent = existingBooking.user;
  2850:       if (inUserEnd)  inUserEnd.textContent  = 'Ends in approx. ' + fmtMs(existingBooking.endMs - Date.now());
  2851:       if (notice)     notice.style.display   = 'flex';
  2852:       return;
  2853:     }
  2854: 
  2855:     var regBtn   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-btn');
  2856:     var regIcon  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-icon');
  2857:     var regLabel = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-register-label');
  2858:     var spinner  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-spinner');
  2859:     if (regBtn)   regBtn.disabled = true;
  2860:     if (regIcon)  regIcon.style.display = 'none';
  2861:     if (regLabel) regLabel.textContent = 'Booking…';
  2862:     if (spinner)  spinner.style.display = 'inline-block';
  2863: 
  2864:     var me     = _getCurrentUser();
  2865:     var durMs  = parseDurMs(duration);
  2866:     var booking = { user: me, avatarUrl: _getAvatarUrl(), task: task, duration: duration, backupFile: backup, startMs: Date.now(), endMs: Date.now() + durMs };
  2867: 
  2868:     var payload = { timestamp: phtNow(), user: me, controller: labelFor(_bookingCtlData.type) + ' — ' + (_bookingCtlData.ip || '—'), task: task, duration: duration, backupFile: backup, note: 'Direct booking' };
  2869:     savePendingLog(payload);
  2870: 
  2871:     /* FEATURE 2: Append to per-controller backup log */
  2872:     if (typeof window._ctlAppendBackupLog === 'function') {
  2873:       window._ctlAppendBackupLog(_bookingCtlId, { timestamp: phtNow(), user: me, task: task, backupFile: backup });
  2874:     }
  2875: 
  2876:     setBooking(_bookingCtlId, booking, function () {
  2877:       /* success */
  2878:       function _onSuccess(wroteToSheet) {
  2879:         var bodyEl    = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-booking-body');
  2880:         var successEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-success');
  2881:         var msgEl     = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-success-msg');
  2882:         var sheetSt   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-sheet-status');
  2883:         if (bodyEl)    Array.from(bodyEl.children).forEach(function (c) { if (!c.classList.contains('hp-ctl-bk-success')) c.style.display = 'none'; });
  2884:         if (msgEl)     msgEl.textContent = 'Booked by ' + me + ' — ' + labelFor(_bookingCtlData.type) + ' — Duration: ' + duration;
  2885:         if (sheetSt) {
  2886:           sheetSt.style.display = 'block';
  2887:           if (wroteToSheet) { sheetSt.style.background = 'rgba(16,185,129,.1)'; sheetSt.style.border = '1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.25)'; sheetSt.style.color = '#10b981'; sheetSt.textContent = 'Written to sheet'; removePendingLog(payload.timestamp, me); }
  2888:           else               { sheetSt.style.background = 'rgba(245,158,11,.08)'; sheetSt.style.border = '1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.2)'; sheetSt.style.color = '#f59e0b'; sheetSt.textContent = 'Saved locally — sheet unreachable.'; }
  2889:           _updatePendingBtn();
  2890:         }
  2891:         if (successEl) successEl.classList.add('show');
  2892:         setTimeout(function () { window._ctlCloseBooking(); }, 2400);
  2893:       }
  2894:       if (SHEETS_ENDPOINT) {
  2895:         fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'POST', mode: 'no-cors', body: buildFormPayload(payload) }).then(function () { _onSuccess(true); }).catch(function () { _onSuccess(false); });
  2896:       } else {
  2897:         setTimeout(function () { _onSuccess(false); }, 500);
  2898:       }
  2899:     }, function (serverBooking) {
  2900:       /* BUG 1 FIX: conflict — re-enable button and show in-use notice */
  2901:       if (regBtn)   { regBtn.disabled = false; }
  2902:       if (regIcon)  regIcon.style.display = '';
  2903:       if (regLabel) regLabel.textContent = 'Book this Controller';
  2904:       if (spinner)  spinner.style.display = 'none';
  2905:       var notice     = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-notice');
  2906:       var inUserName = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-name');
  2907:       var inUserEnd  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-bk-inuse-end');
  2908:       if (serverBooking) {
  2909:         if (inUserName) inUserName.textContent = serverBooking.user;
  2910:         if (inUserEnd)  inUserEnd.textContent  = 'Ends in approx. ' + fmtMs(serverBooking.endMs - Date.now());
  2911:       }
  2912:       if (notice) notice.style.display = 'flex';
  2913:     });
  2914:   };
  2915: 
  2916:   /* ── Open queue modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────  */
  2917:   window._ctlOpenQueue = function (itemId) {
  2918:     var items   = getItems();
  2919:     var ctrl    = items.find(function (it) { return it.id === itemId; });
  2920:     if (!ctrl) return;
  2921:     _queueCtlId = itemId;
  2922:     var booking = getBooking(itemId);
  2923:     var queue   = getQueue(itemId);
  2924:     var me      = _getCurrentUser();
  2925: 
  2926:     var qNameEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-ctrl-name');
  2927:     var qUserEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-current-user');
  2928:     var qEndEl   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-end-time');
  2929:     var qListEl  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-list');
  2930:     var qImgEl   = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-ctrl-img');
  2931: 
  2932:     if (qNameEl) qNameEl.textContent = labelFor(ctrl.type);
  2933:     if (qImgEl)  qImgEl.src          = imageFor(ctrl.type);
  2934:     if (booking) {
  2935:       if (qUserEl) qUserEl.textContent = booking.user;
  2936:       if (qEndEl)  qEndEl.textContent  = '~' + fmtMs(booking.endMs - Date.now()) + ' remaining';
  2937:     } else {
  2938:       if (qUserEl) qUserEl.textContent = '—';
  2939:       if (qEndEl)  qEndEl.textContent  = 'No active booking';
  2940:     }
  2941: 
  2942:     if (qListEl) {
  2943:       if (!queue.length) {
  2944:         qListEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:12px 0;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:11px;">No one in queue yet — be first!</div>';
  2945:       } else {
  2946:         qListEl.innerHTML = queue.map(function (q, i) {
  2947:           var isMe = _sameUser(q && q.user, me);
  2948:           return '<div class="hp-ctl-q-item' + (isMe ? ' is-me' : '') + '">' +
  2949:             '<div class="hp-ctl-q-pos">' + (i + 1) + '</div>' +
  2950:             '<div class="hp-ctl-q-meta">' +
  2951:               '<div class="hp-ctl-q-name">' + (isMe ? 'You (' + esc(q.user) + ')' : esc(q.user)) + '</div>' +
  2952:               '<div class="hp-ctl-q-task">' + esc(q.task || '') + (q.duration ? ' · ' + esc(q.duration) : '') + '</div>' +
  2953:             '</div>' +
  2954:             (q.urgent ? '<span class="hp-ctl-q-urgent-badge">URGENT</span>' : '') +
  2955:             (isMe ? '<button class="hp-ctl-q-leave-btn" onclick="window._ctlLeaveQueue(\'' + esc(itemId) + '\')">Leave</button>' : '') +
  2956:             '</div>';
  2957:         }).join('');
  2958:       }
  2959:     }
  2960: 
  2961:     var alreadyQueued = queue.some(function (q) { return _sameUser(q && q.user, me); });

  2963:     var alreadyMsg    = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-q-already-msg');
  2964:     if (joinSection) joinSection.style.display = alreadyQueued ? 'none' : 'block';
  2965:     if (alreadyMsg)  { alreadyMsg.style.display = alreadyQueued ? 'block' : 'none'; alreadyMsg.textContent = 'You are in queue — waiting for your turn.'; }
  2966:

  2968:     if (booking && booking.endMs > Date.now()) {

  2970:         var rem = booking.endMs - Date.now();

  2975:     }

  2999:

  3099:   window._ctlExecuteOverride = function (itemId, reason) {

  3114: 
  3115:     var payload = { timestamp: phtNow(), user: me, controller: labelFor(ctrl.type) + ' — ' + (ctrl.ip || '—'), task: '[OVERRIDE] ' + reason, duration: 'Session overridden', backupFile: 'N/A', note: 'Override of ' + overriddenUser + ' by ' + me };

  3119:     setBooking(itemId, null, function () {

  3123:     });

  3127:   function _pingSheet(cb) {
  3128:     var dotIcon  = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-sheet-dot-icon');
  3129:     var dotLabel = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-sheet-dot-label');
  3130:     function setStatus(ok, label) {
  3131:       _sheetReachable = ok;
  3132:       if (dotIcon)  { dotIcon.className = 'hp-ctl-status-dot ' + (ok ? 'connected' : 'error'); dotIcon.style.background = ok ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444'; }
  3133:       if (dotLabel) { dotLabel.style.color = ok ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444'; dotLabel.textContent = label; }
  3134:       if (cb) cb(ok);
  3135:     }
  3136:     if (!SHEETS_ENDPOINT) { setStatus(false, 'No sheet configured'); return; }
  3137:     if (dotLabel) { dotLabel.style.color = '#6b7280'; dotLabel.textContent = 'Checking…'; }
  3138:     fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'GET', mode: 'cors', cache: 'no-store' })
  3139:       .then(function (r) { (r.ok || r.status === 302) ? setStatus(true, 'Sheet connected') : setStatus(false, 'Sheet error ' + r.status); })
  3140:       .catch(function () { setStatus(false, 'Sheet unreachable'); });
  3141:   }

  3151:   function _autoRetryPendingLogs() {
  3152:     if (_pendingRetryBusy) return;
  3153:     var logs = getPendingLogs();
  3154:     if (!logs.length || !SHEETS_ENDPOINT) return;
  3155:     _pendingRetryBusy = true;
  3156:     var done = 0;
  3157:     logs.forEach(function (payload) {
  3158:       fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'POST', mode: 'no-cors', body: buildFormPayload(payload) })
  3159:         .then(function () { removePendingLog(payload.timestamp, payload.user); })
  3160:         .catch(function () {})
  3161:         .finally(function () {
  3162:           done++;
  3163:           if (done === logs.length) {
  3164:             _pendingRetryBusy = false;
  3165:             _updatePendingBtn();
  3166:             var pm = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-pending-modal');
  3167:             if (pm && pm.style.display !== 'none' && window._ctlShowPendingLogs) window._ctlShowPendingLogs();
  3168:           }
  3169:         });
  3170:     });
  3171:   }
  3172: 
  3173:   /* ── Pending logs modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

  3183:             '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="font-weight:700;color:#f1f5f9;">' + esc(log.user) + '</span><span style="color:#6b7280;font-family:monospace;font-size:9px;">' + esc(log.timestamp) + '</span></div>' +
  3184:             '<div style="color:#94a3b8;line-height:1.6;">' + esc(log.controller) + ' | ' + esc(log.task) + ' | ' + esc(log.duration) + '</div>' +
  3185:             '</div>';
  3186:         }).join('');
  3187:     var statusEl = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-replay-status');
  3188:     if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = logs.length + ' pending log' + (logs.length !== 1 ? 's' : '');

  3199:   window._ctlReplayPendingLogs = function () {
  3200:     var logs = getPendingLogs();
  3201:     if (!logs.length) return;
  3202:     if (!SHEETS_ENDPOINT) { alert('SHEETS_ENDPOINT not configured.'); return; }
  3203:     var replayBtn    = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-replay-btn');
  3204:     var replayStatus = document.getElementById('hp-ctl-replay-status');
  3205:     if (replayBtn) { replayBtn.disabled = true; replayBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Sending…'; }
  3206:     var success = 0, fail = 0, remaining = logs.length;
  3207:     logs.forEach(function (payload) {
  3208:       fetch(SHEETS_ENDPOINT, { method: 'POST', mode: 'no-cors', body: buildFormPayload(payload) })
  3209:         .then(function () { success++; removePendingLog(payload.timestamp, payload.user); })
  3210:         .catch(function () { fail++; })
  3211:         .finally(function () {
  3212:           remaining--;
  3213:           if (remaining === 0) {
  3214:             _updatePendingBtn();
  3215:             if (replayBtn) { replayBtn.disabled = false; replayBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Retry Send'; }
  3216:             if (replayStatus) { replayStatus.textContent = success + ' sent' + (fail ? ', ' + fail + ' failed' : ''); replayStatus.style.color = fail ? '#ef4444' : '#10b981'; }
  3217:             setTimeout(function () { window._ctlShowPendingLogs(); }, 400);
  3218:           }
  3219:         });
  3220:     });
  3221:   };
